`components/PediaAssist.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // apps/web/app/components/PediatricAIAssistant.tsx
   2 | import { useMutation } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   3 | import { useState } from "react";
   4 | 
   5 | import { sendToPediatricAI } from "../functions/ai-service";
   6 | 
   7 | export function PediatricAIAssistant() {
   8 | 	const [message, setMessage] = useState("");
   9 | 
  10 | 	const mutation = useMutation({
  11 | 		mutationFn: sendToPediatricAI,
  12 | 		onSuccess: data => {
  13 | 			console.log("AI Response:", data.response);
  14 | 		}
  15 | 	});
  16 | 
  17 | 	return (
  18 | 		<div className='rounded-lg border p-4'>
  19 | 			<h3 className='font-bold'>👶 Pediatric AI Assistant</h3>
  20 | 			<p className='text-gray-600 text-sm'>Ask about growth charts, vaccines, development, or symptoms</p>
  21 | 
  22 | 			<textarea
  23 | 				className='mt-2 w-full rounded border p-2'
  24 | 				onChange={e => setMessage(e.target.value)}
  25 | 				placeholder="e.g., 'My 6-month-old has a fever of 101°F, what should I do?'"
  26 | 				value={message}
  27 | 			/>
  28 | 
  29 | 			<button
  30 | 				className='mt-2 rounded bg-blue-500 px-4 py-2 text-white'
  31 | 				disabled={mutation.isPending}
  32 | 				onClick={() => {
  33 | 					mutation.mutate({
  34 | 						content: message,
  35 | 						role: "user"
  36 | 					});
  37 | 				}}
  38 | 				type='button'
  39 | 			>
  40 | 				{mutation.isPending ? "Thinking..." : "Ask AI"}
  41 | 			</button>
  42 | 
  43 | 			{mutation.data && <div className='mt-3 rounded bg-gray-100 p-3'>{mutation.data.response}</div>}
  44 | 		</div>
  45 | 	);
  46 | }

```

`components/PediatricAIAssistant.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // components/ai/PediatricAIAssistant.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import type { GrowthRecord, VaccineSchedule } from "@clinic/db/zod/clinic.schema";
   4 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
   5 | import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   6 | import { Store, useSelector } from "@tanstack/react-store";
   7 | import { Activity, BotIcon, Send, Stethoscope, Syringe, X } from "lucide-react";
   8 | import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
   9 | import { Streamdown } from "streamdown";
  10 | 
  11 | import { type ChatMessages, usePediatricChat } from "../hooks/ai-hooks";
  12 | 
  13 | export const showAIAssistant = new Store(false);
  14 | 
  15 | function DiagnosisSuggestion({ data }: { data: any }) {
  16 | 	if (!data) return null;
  17 | 
  18 | 	return (
  19 | 		<Card className='mt-4 border-blue-200 bg-blue-50'>
  20 | 			<CardHeader className='pb-2'>
  21 | 				<CardTitle className='flex items-center gap-2 font-medium text-blue-700 text-sm'>
  22 | 					<Stethoscope className='h-4 w-4' />
  23 | 					AI Diagnosis Suggestions
  24 | 				</CardTitle>
  25 | 			</CardHeader>
  26 | 			<CardContent className='space-y-3 text-sm'>
  27 | 				<div>
  28 | 					<span className='font-semibold'>Possible Conditions:</span>
  29 | 					<ul className='mt-1 list-disc pl-4'>
  30 | 						{data.conditions?.map((condition: string, i: number) => (
  31 | 							<li key={i}>{condition}</li>
  32 | 						))}
  33 | 					</ul>
  34 | 				</div>
  35 | 				<div>
  36 | 					<span className='font-semibold'>Recommended Tests:</span>
  37 | 					<ul className='mt-1 list-disc pl-4'>
  38 | 						{data.tests?.map((test: string, i: number) => (
  39 | 							<li key={i}>{test}</li>
  40 | 						))}
  41 | 					</ul>
  42 | 				</div>
  43 | 				{data.redFlags && (
  44 | 					<div className='border-red-400 border-l-4 bg-red-50 p-2'>
  45 | 						<span className='font-semibold text-red-600'>⚠️ Red Flags:</span>
  46 | 						<p className='mt-1 text-red-600'>{data.redFlags}</p>
  47 | 					</div>
  48 | 				)}
  49 | 			</CardContent>
  50 | 		</Card>
  51 | 	);
  52 | }
  53 | 
  54 | function VaccinationSchedule({ data }: { data: VaccineSchedule[] }) {
  55 | 	if (!data || data.length === 0) return null;
  56 | 
  57 | 	return (
  58 | 		<Card className='mt-4 border-green-200 bg-green-50'>
  59 | 			<CardHeader className='pb-2'>
  60 | 				<CardTitle className='flex items-center gap-2 font-medium text-green-700 text-sm'>
  61 | 					<Syringe className='h-4 w-4' />
  62 | 					Recommended Vaccinations
  63 | 				</CardTitle>
  64 | 			</CardHeader>
  65 | 			<CardContent>
  66 | 				<div className='space-y-2'>
  67 | 					{data.map((vaccine, i: number) => (
  68 | 						<div
  69 | 							className='flex items-center justify-between border-green-100 border-b pb-2'
  70 | 							key={i}
  71 | 						>
  72 | 							<div>
  73 | 								<span className='font-medium'>{vaccine.vaccineName}</span>
  74 | 								<p className='text-green-600 text-xs'>Due at {vaccine.recommendedAge}</p>
  75 | 							</div>
  76 | 							<Badge variant={vaccine.isMandatory ? "destructive" : "secondary"}>
  77 | 								{vaccine.isMandatory ? "Mandatory" : "Optional"}
  78 | 							</Badge>
  79 | 						</div>
  80 | 					))}
  81 | 				</div>
  82 | 			</CardContent>
  83 | 		</Card>
  84 | 	);
  85 | }
  86 | 
  87 | function GrowthChartPreview({ data }: { data: GrowthRecord }) {
  88 | 	if (!data) return null;
  89 | 
  90 | 	return (
  91 | 		<Card className='mt-4 border-purple-200 bg-purple-50'>
  92 | 			<CardHeader className='pb-2'>
  93 | 				<CardTitle className='flex items-center gap-2 font-medium text-purple-700 text-sm'>
  94 | 					<Activity className='h-4 w-4' />
  95 | 					Growth Analysis
  96 | 				</CardTitle>
  97 | 			</CardHeader>
  98 | 			<CardContent>
  99 | 				<div className='space-y-2 text-sm'>
 100 | 					<p>
 101 | 						<span className='font-semibold'>Weight:</span> {data.weight}th percentile ({data.weight})
 102 | 					</p>
 103 | 					<p>
 104 | 						<span className='font-semibold'>Height:</span> {data?.percentile}th percentile ({data?.notes})
 105 | 					</p>
 106 | 					<p>
 107 | 						<span className='font-semibold'>BMI:</span> {data.percentile}th percentile
 108 | 					</p>
 109 | 					{data.notes && <div className='mt-2 rounded bg-purple-100 p-2 text-purple-700'>{data.notes}</div>}
 110 | 				</div>
 111 | 			</CardContent>
 112 | 		</Card>
 113 | 	);
 114 | }
 115 | 
 116 | function Messages({ messages }: { messages: ChatMessages }) {
 117 | 	const messagesContainerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
 118 | 
 119 | 	useEffect(() => {
 120 | 		if (messagesContainerRef.current) {
 121 | 			messagesContainerRef.current.scrollTop = messagesContainerRef.current.scrollHeight;
 122 | 		}
 123 | 	}, []);
 124 | 
 125 | 	if (!messages.length) {
 126 | 		return (
 127 | 			<div className='flex flex-1 flex-col items-center justify-center p-8 text-center text-gray-400'>
 128 | 				<BotIcon className='mb-4 h-12 w-12 text-blue-400' />
 129 | 				<p className='text-sm'>Ask me about pediatric care, symptoms, vaccinations, or growth tracking!</p>
 130 | 				<p className='mt-2 text-xs'>Example: "What vaccines does a 2-month-old need?"</p>
 131 | 			</div>
 132 | 		);
 133 | 	}
 134 | 
 135 | 	return (
 136 | 		<div
 137 | 			className='flex-1 space-y-4 overflow-y-auto p-4'
 138 | 			ref={messagesContainerRef}
 139 | 		>
 140 | 			{messages.map(({ id, role, parts }) => (
 141 | 				<div
 142 | 					className={`flex ${role === "assistant" ? "justify-start" : "justify-end"}`}
 143 | 					key={id}
 144 | 				>
 145 | 					<div
 146 | 						className={`max-w-[85%] rounded-lg p-3 ${
 147 | 							role === "assistant"
 148 | 								? "bg-linr-to-r from-blue-50 to-purple-50 text-gray-800"
 149 | 								: "bg-blue-500 text-white"
 150 | 						}`}
 151 | 					>
 152 | 						{parts.map((part, index) => {
 153 | 							if (part.type === "text" && part.content) {
 154 | 								return (
 155 | 									<div
 156 | 										className='prose prose-sm max-w-none'
 157 | 										key={index}
 158 | 									>
 159 | 										<Streamdown>{part.content}</Streamdown>
 160 | 									</div>
 161 | 								);
 162 | 							}
 163 | 							if (part.type === "tool-call") {
 164 | 								if ((part.name as string) === "suggestDiagnosis" && part.output) {
 165 | 									return (
 166 | 										<DiagnosisSuggestion
 167 | 											data={part.output}
 168 | 											key={part.id}
 169 | 										/>
 170 | 									);
 171 | 								}
 172 | 								if ((part.name as string) === "getVaccinationSchedule" && part.output) {
 173 | 									return (
 174 | 										<VaccinationSchedule
 175 | 											data={part.output}
 176 | 											key={part.id}
 177 | 										/>
 178 | 									);
 179 | 								}
 180 | 								if ((part.name as string) === "analyzeGrowth" && part.output) {
 181 | 									return (
 182 | 										<GrowthChartPreview
 183 | 											data={part.output}
 184 | 											key={part.id}
 185 | 										/>
 186 | 									);
 187 | 								}
 188 | 							}
 189 | 							return null;
 190 | 						})}
 191 | 					</div>
 192 | 				</div>
 193 | 			))}
 194 | 		</div>
 195 | 	);
 196 | }
 197 | 
 198 | export function PediatricAIAssistant() {
 199 | 	const isOpen = useSelector(showAIAssistant, state => state);
 200 | 	const { messages, sendMessage, isLoading } = usePediatricChat();
 201 | 	const [input, setInput] = useState("");
 202 | 
 203 | 	return (
 204 | 		<div className='fixed right-6 bottom-6 z-50'>
 205 | 			{!isOpen && (
 206 | 				<button
 207 | 					className='flex h-14 w-14 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-linear-to-r from-blue-500 to-purple-600 text-white shadow-lg transition-all hover:scale-105 hover:shadow-xl'
 208 | 					onClick={() => showAIAssistant.setState(true)}
 209 | 					type='button'
 210 | 				>
 211 | 					<BotIcon className='h-6 w-6' />
 212 | 				</button>
 213 | 			)}
 214 | 			{isOpen && (
 215 | 				<div className='flex h-[600px] w-[450px] flex-col overflow-hidden rounded-lg border border-blue-200 bg-white shadow-xl'>
 216 | 					<div className='flex items-center justify-between border-blue-100 border-b bg-linear-to-r from-blue-500 to-purple-600 px-4 py-3'>
 217 | 						<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 218 | 							<BotIcon className='h-5 w-5 text-white' />
 219 | 							<h3 className='font-semibold text-white'>Pediatric AI Assistant</h3>
 220 | 							<Badge
 221 | 								className='bg-blue-100 text-blue-700'
 222 | 								variant='secondary'
 223 | 							>
 224 | 								Beta
 225 | 							</Badge>
 226 | 						</div>
 227 | 						<button
 228 | 							className='rounded p-1 text-white/80 transition-colors hover:text-white'
 229 | 							onClick={() => showAIAssistant.setState(false)}
 230 | 							type='button'
 231 | 						>
 232 | 							<X className='h-4 w-4' />
 233 | 						</button>
 234 | 					</div>
 235 | 
 236 | 					<Messages messages={messages} />
 237 | 
 238 | 					<div className='border-gray-200 border-t p-4'>
 239 | 						<form
 240 | 							onSubmit={e => {
 241 | 								e.preventDefault();
 242 | 								if (input.trim() && !isLoading) {
 243 | 									sendMessage(input);
 244 | 									setInput("");
 245 | 								}
 246 | 							}}
 247 | 						>
 248 | 							<div className='relative'>
 249 | 								<textarea
 250 | 									className='w-full resize-none rounded-lg border border-gray-200 p-3 pr-12 text-sm focus:border-blue-300 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500'
 251 | 									disabled={isLoading}
 252 | 									onChange={e => setInput(e.target.value)}
 253 | 									onKeyDown={e => {
 254 | 										if (e.key === "Enter" && !e.shiftKey) {
 255 | 											e.preventDefault();
 256 | 											if (input.trim() && !isLoading) {
 257 | 												sendMessage(input);
 258 | 												setInput("");
 259 | 											}
 260 | 										}
 261 | 									}}
 262 | 									placeholder='Ask about symptoms, vaccines, growth, or pediatric care...'
 263 | 									rows={2}
 264 | 									value={input}
 265 | 								/>
 266 | 								<button
 267 | 									className='absolute right-2 bottom-2 rounded bg-blue-500 p-2 text-white transition-colors hover:bg-blue-600 disabled:opacity-50'
 268 | 									disabled={!input.trim() || isLoading}
 269 | 									type='submit'
 270 | 								>
 271 | 									{isLoading ? (
 272 | 										<div className='h-4 w-4 animate-spin rounded-full border-2 border-white border-t-transparent' />
 273 | 									) : (
 274 | 										<Send className='h-4 w-4' />
 275 | 									)}
 276 | 								</button>
 277 | 							</div>
 278 | 							<p className='mt-2 text-gray-400 text-xs'>
 279 | 								AI assistant for clinical decision support only. Always verify with medical judgment.
 280 | 							</p>
 281 | 						</form>
 282 | 					</div>
 283 | 				</div>
 284 | 			)}
 285 | 		</div>
 286 | 	);
 287 | }

```

`components/appointments/AppointmentForm.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/forms/AppointmentForm.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
   4 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   5 | import { Calendar } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/calendar";
   6 | import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   7 | import { Label } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/label";
   8 | import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/popover";
   9 | import { Separator } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/separator";
  10 | import { useMutation, useQuery, useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
  11 | import { useSelector } from "@tanstack/react-store";
  12 | import { format } from "date-fns";
  13 | import { Activity, Calendar as CalendarIcon, Stethoscope, User } from "lucide-react";
  14 | import * as React from "react";
  15 | import { toast } from "sonner";
  16 | import * as z from "zod";
  17 | 
  18 | import { cn } from "#/lib/utils";
  19 | import { useAppForm, useFormFields } from "@/components/forms/tanstack-form";
  20 | import { orpc } from "@/utils/orpc";
  21 | 
  22 | import { type AppointmentStatus, AppointmentStatusSchema, type AppointmentTypeEnum } from "../../schemas";
  23 | 
  24 | // Schema for appointment form
  25 | const appointmentFormSchema = z.object({
  26 | 	id: z.string().optional(),
  27 | 	patientId: z.string().min(1, "Please select a patient"),
  28 | 	doctorId: z.string().min(1, "Please select a doctor"),
  29 | 	appointmentDate: z.date(),
  30 | 	startTime: z.string().min(1, "Please select a start time"),
  31 | 	endTime: z.string(),
  32 | 	type: z.string().min(1).catch("CONSULTATION"),
  33 | 	status: AppointmentStatusSchema,
  34 | 	note: z.string(),
  35 | 	reason: z.string(),
  36 | 	duration: z.number().min(15).max(120).default(30),
  37 | 	serviceId: z.string().optional(),
  38 | 	isVirtual: z.boolean().default(false),
  39 | 	sendReminder: z.boolean().default(true),
  40 | 	reminderMethod: z.string().default("EMAIL")
  41 | });
  42 | 
  43 | type AppointmentFormValues = z.infer<typeof appointmentFormSchema>;
  44 | 
  45 | // Time slots (30-minute intervals)
  46 | const timeSlots = Array.from({ length: 48 }, (_, i) => {
  47 | 	const hour = Math.floor(i / 2);
  48 | 	const minute = (i % 2) * 30;
  49 | 	const time = `${hour.toString().padStart(2, "0")}:${minute.toString().padStart(2, "0")}`;
  50 | 	return {
  51 | 		value: time,
  52 | 		label: format(new Date().setHours(hour, minute), "h:mm a")
  53 | 	};
  54 | });
  55 | 
  56 | const appointmentTypes = [
  57 | 	{ value: "CONSULTATION", label: "Consultation" },
  58 | 	{ value: "CHECKUP", label: "Checkup" },
  59 | 	{ value: "FOLLOW_UP", label: "Follow-up" },
  60 | 	{ value: "EMERGENCY", label: "Emergency" },
  61 | 	{ value: "VACCINATION", label: "Vaccination" },
  62 | 	{ value: "PROCEDURE", label: "Procedure" }
  63 | ];
  64 | 
  65 | type AppointmentFormProps = {
  66 | 	defaultPatientId?: string;
  67 | 	defaultDoctorId?: string;
  68 | 	initialData?: Partial<AppointmentFormValues>;
  69 | 	onCancel?: () => void;
  70 | 	onSuccess?: () => void;
  71 | };
  72 | 
  73 | export function AppointmentForm({
  74 | 	defaultPatientId,
  75 | 	defaultDoctorId,
  76 | 	initialData,
  77 | 	onSuccess,
  78 | 	onCancel
  79 | }: AppointmentFormProps) {
  80 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
  81 | 	const [availableSlots, setAvailableSlots] = React.useState<Array<{ startTime: string; endTime: string }>>([]);
  82 | 	const [checkingAvailability, setCheckingAvailability] = React.useState(false);
  83 | 
  84 | 	// Fetch patients
  85 | 	const { data: patientsData, isLoading: patientsLoading } = useQuery(
  86 | 		orpc.patient.list.queryOptions({
  87 | 			input: { search: "", page: 1, pageSize: 100 }
  88 | 		})
  89 | 	);
  90 | 
  91 | 	// Fetch doctors
  92 | 	const { data: doctorsData, isLoading: doctorsLoading } = useQuery(
  93 | 		orpc.doctor.list.queryOptions({
  94 | 			input: { search: "", page: 1, pageSize: 100 }
  95 | 		})
  96 | 	);
  97 | 
  98 | 	// Fetch services
  99 | 	const { data: servicesData } = useQuery(
 100 | 		orpc.service.list.queryOptions({
 101 | 			input: { search: "", page: 1, pageSize: 100 }
 102 | 		})
 103 | 	);
 104 | 
 105 | 	// Check availability mutation
 106 | 	const checkAvailability = useMutation({
 107 | 		mutationFn: async (input: { doctorId: string; date: Date; serviceId?: string }) => {
 108 | 			const response = await orpc.appointment.getAvailableTimeSlots.call(input);
 109 | 			return response;
 110 | 		},
 111 | 		onSuccess: data => {
 112 | 			setAvailableSlots("availableSlots" in data ? data.availableSlots : []);
 113 | 		},
 114 | 		onError: (error: Error) => {
 115 | 			toast.error(error.message || "Failed to check availability");
 116 | 			setAvailableSlots([]);
 117 | 		}
 118 | 	});
 119 | 
 120 | 	// Create appointment mutation
 121 | 	const { mutate: createAppointment, isPending: isCreatePending } = useMutation(
 122 | 		orpc.appointment.create.mutationOptions({
 123 | 			onSuccess: () => {
 124 | 				toast.success("Appointment created successfully");
 125 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: orpc.appointment.key() });
 126 | 				onSuccess?.();
 127 | 			},
 128 | 			onError(error) {
 129 | 				console.error(error);
 130 | 				toast.error(error.message || "Failed to create appointment");
 131 | 			}
 132 | 		})
 133 | 	);
 134 | 
 135 | 	// Update appointment mutation
 136 | 	const { mutate: updateAppointment, isPending: isUpdatePending } = useMutation(
 137 | 		orpc.appointment.update.mutationOptions({
 138 | 			onSuccess: () => {
 139 | 				toast.success("Appointment updated successfully");
 140 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: orpc.appointment.key() });
 141 | 				onSuccess?.();
 142 | 			},
 143 | 			onError(error) {
 144 | 				console.error(error);
 145 | 				toast.error(error.message || "Failed to update appointment");
 146 | 			}
 147 | 		})
 148 | 	);
 149 | 
 150 | 	const isPending = isCreatePending || isUpdatePending;
 151 | 
 152 | 	const form = useAppForm({
 153 | 		defaultValues: {
 154 | 			id: initialData?.id,
 155 | 			patientId: initialData?.patientId ?? defaultPatientId ?? "",
 156 | 			doctorId: initialData?.doctorId ?? defaultDoctorId ?? "",
 157 | 			appointmentDate: initialData?.appointmentDate ?? new Date(),
 158 | 			startTime: initialData?.startTime ?? "09:00",
 159 | 			endTime: initialData?.endTime ?? "09:30",
 160 | 			type: initialData?.type ?? "CONSULTATION",
 161 | 			status: (initialData?.status as AppointmentStatus) ?? "SCHEDULED",
 162 | 			note: initialData?.note ?? "",
 163 | 			reason: initialData?.reason ?? "",
 164 | 			duration: initialData?.duration ?? 30,
 165 | 			serviceId: initialData?.serviceId ?? "",
 166 | 			isVirtual: initialData?.isVirtual ?? false,
 167 | 			sendReminder: initialData?.sendReminder ?? true,
 168 | 			reminderMethod: initialData?.reminderMethod ?? "EMAIL"
 169 | 		} satisfies AppointmentFormValues,
 170 | 		validators: {
 171 | 			onSubmit: appointmentFormSchema
 172 | 		},
 173 | 		onSubmit: async ({ value }) => {
 174 | 			const appointmentDateTime = new Date(value.appointmentDate);
 175 | 			const [startHour = 0, startMinute = 0] = value.startTime.split(":").map(Number);
 176 | 			appointmentDateTime.setHours(startHour, startMinute, 0, 0);
 177 | 
 178 | 			const payload = {
 179 | 				doctorId: value.doctorId,
 180 | 				patientId: value.patientId,
 181 | 				appointmentDate: appointmentDateTime,
 182 | 				type: value.type as AppointmentTypeEnum,
 183 | 				note: value.note,
 184 | 				reason: value.reason,
 185 | 				time: value.startTime,
 186 | 				duration: value.duration,
 187 | 				serviceId: value.serviceId || ""
 188 | 			};
 189 | 
 190 | 			if (initialData?.appointmentDate) {
 191 | 				updateAppointment({ id: initialData.id || "", ...payload });
 192 | 			} else {
 193 | 				createAppointment(payload);
 194 | 			}
 195 | 		}
 196 | 	});
 197 | 
 198 | 	const formValues = useSelector(form.store, s => s.values);
 199 | 
 200 | 	// Check availability when doctor, date, or service changes
 201 | 	React.useEffect(() => {
 202 | 		if (formValues.doctorId && formValues.appointmentDate) {
 203 | 			setCheckingAvailability(true);
 204 | 			checkAvailability.mutate(
 205 | 				{
 206 | 					doctorId: formValues.doctorId,
 207 | 					date: formValues.appointmentDate,
 208 | 					serviceId: formValues.serviceId || undefined
 209 | 				},
 210 | 				{
 211 | 					onSettled: () => setCheckingAvailability(false)
 212 | 				}
 213 | 			);
 214 | 		}
 215 | 	}, [formValues.doctorId, formValues.appointmentDate, formValues.serviceId, checkAvailability.mutate]);
 216 | 
 217 | 	// Auto-calculate end time based on start time and duration
 218 | 	React.useEffect(() => {
 219 | 		if (formValues.startTime && formValues.duration) {
 220 | 			const [hours = 0, minutes = 0] = formValues.startTime.split(":").map(Number);
 221 | 			const totalMinutes = hours * 60 + minutes + formValues.duration;
 222 | 			const endHours = Math.floor(totalMinutes / 60);
 223 | 			const endMinutes = totalMinutes % 60;
 224 | 			const endTime = `${endHours.toString().padStart(2, "0")}:${endMinutes.toString().padStart(2, "0")}`;
 225 | 			if (endTime !== formValues.endTime) {
 226 | 				form.setFieldValue("endTime", endTime);
 227 | 			}
 228 | 		}
 229 | 	}, [formValues.startTime, formValues.duration, formValues.endTime, form]);
 230 | 
 231 | 	const { FormSelectField, FormTextField, FormSwitchField, FormTextareaField } =
 232 | 		useFormFields<AppointmentFormValues>();
 233 | 
 234 | 	const patients = patientsData?.patients || [];
 235 | 	const doctors = doctorsData?.doctors || [];
 236 | 	const services = servicesData?.services || [];
 237 | 
 238 | 	return (
 239 | 		<Card className='mx-auto w-full max-w-4xl'>
 240 | 			<CardHeader>
 241 | 				<CardTitle className='font-bold text-2xl'>
 242 | 					{initialData?.appointmentDate ? "Edit Appointment" : "Schedule New Appointment"}
 243 | 				</CardTitle>
 244 | 				<p className='text-muted-foreground'>Fill in the details to schedule a patient appointment</p>
 245 | 			</CardHeader>
 246 | 			<CardContent>
 247 | 				<form.AppForm>
 248 | 					<form.Form className='space-y-6'>
 249 | 						{/* Patient & Doctor Selection */}
 250 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 251 | 							<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 252 | 								<User className='h-5 w-5' />
 253 | 								Patient & Doctor Information
 254 | 							</h3>
 255 | 							<Separator />
 256 | 							<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2'>
 257 | 								<FormSelectField
 258 | 									label='Patient'
 259 | 									name='patientId'
 260 | 									options={patients.map((p: { id: string; firstName: string; lastName: string }) => ({
 261 | 										value: p.id,
 262 | 										label: `${p.firstName} ${p.lastName}`
 263 | 									}))}
 264 | 									placeholder={patientsLoading ? "Loading..." : "Select patient"}
 265 | 									required
 266 | 									validators={{
 267 | 										onBlur: z.string().min(1, "Please select a patient")
 268 | 									}}
 269 | 								/>
 270 | 
 271 | 								<FormSelectField
 272 | 									label='Doctor'
 273 | 									name='doctorId'
 274 | 									options={doctors.map((d: { id: string; name: string; specialty: string }) => ({
 275 | 										value: d.id,
 276 | 										label: `Dr. ${d.name} - ${d.specialty || "General"}`
 277 | 									}))}
 278 | 									placeholder={doctorsLoading ? "Loading..." : "Select doctor"}
 279 | 									required
 280 | 									validators={{
 281 | 										onBlur: z.string().min(1, "Please select a doctor")
 282 | 									}}
 283 | 								/>
 284 | 							</div>
 285 | 						</div>
 286 | 
 287 | 						{/* Date & Time */}
 288 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 289 | 							<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 290 | 								<CalendarIcon className='h-5 w-5' />
 291 | 								Date & Time
 292 | 							</h3>
 293 | 							<Separator />
 294 | 							<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-3'>
 295 | 								{/* Date Picker */}
 296 | 								<form.AppField name='appointmentDate'>
 297 | 									{field => (
 298 | 										<div className='space-y-2'>
 299 | 											<Label>Appointment Date *</Label>
 300 | 											<Popover>
 301 | 												<PopoverTrigger asChild>
 302 | 													<Button
 303 | 														className={cn(
 304 | 															"w-full justify-start text-left font-normal",
 305 | 															!field.state.value && "text-muted-foreground"
 306 | 														)}
 307 | 														variant='outline'
 308 | 													>
 309 | 														<CalendarIcon className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 310 | 														{field.state.value
 311 | 															? format(field.state.value, "PPP")
 312 | 															: "Pick a date"}
 313 | 													</Button>
 314 | 												</PopoverTrigger>
 315 | 												<PopoverContent
 316 | 													align='start'
 317 | 													className='w-auto p-0'
 318 | 												>
 319 | 													<Calendar
 320 | 														disabled={date => date < new Date()}
 321 | 														mode='single'
 322 | 														onSelect={date => date && field.handleChange(date)}
 323 | 														selected={field.state.value}
 324 | 													/>
 325 | 												</PopoverContent>
 326 | 											</Popover>
 327 | 											{field.state.meta.isTouched && field.state.meta.errors.length > 0 && (
 328 | 												<p className='text-red-500 text-sm'>
 329 | 													{field.state.meta.errors.join(", ")}
 330 | 												</p>
 331 | 											)}
 332 | 										</div>
 333 | 									)}
 334 | 								</form.AppField>
 335 | 
 336 | 								<FormSelectField
 337 | 									label='Start Time'
 338 | 									name='startTime'
 339 | 									options={
 340 | 										availableSlots.length > 0
 341 | 											? availableSlots.map(slot => ({
 342 | 													value: slot.startTime,
 343 | 													label: `${slot.startTime} - ${slot.endTime}`
 344 | 												}))
 345 | 											: timeSlots
 346 | 									}
 347 | 									placeholder={
 348 | 										checkingAvailability ? "Checking availability..." : "Select start time"
 349 | 									}
 350 | 									required
 351 | 									validators={{
 352 | 										onBlur: z.string().min(1, "Please select start time")
 353 | 									}}
 354 | 								/>
 355 | 
 356 | 								<FormTextField
 357 | 									label='Duration (minutes)'
 358 | 									max={120}
 359 | 									min={15}
 360 | 									name='duration'
 361 | 									placeholder='30'
 362 | 									required
 363 | 									step={15}
 364 | 									type='number'
 365 | 									validators={{
 366 | 										onBlur: z.number().min(15, "Minimum 15 minutes").max(120, "Maximum 120 minutes")
 367 | 									}}
 368 | 								/>
 369 | 							</div>
 370 | 							<div className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>
 371 | 								End time:{" "}
 372 | 								{formValues.endTime
 373 | 									? format(
 374 | 											new Date().setHours(
 375 | 												Number.parseInt(formValues.endTime.split(":")[0] ?? "", 10),
 376 | 												Number.parseInt(formValues.endTime.split(":")[1] ?? "", 10)
 377 | 											),
 378 | 											"h:mm a"
 379 | 										)
 380 | 									: "Not set"}
 381 | 							</div>
 382 | 						</div>
 383 | 
 384 | 						{/* Appointment Details */}
 385 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 386 | 							<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 387 | 								<Stethoscope className='h-5 w-5' />
 388 | 								Appointment Details
 389 | 							</h3>
 390 | 							<Separator />
 391 | 							<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2'>
 392 | 								<FormSelectField
 393 | 									label='Appointment Type'
 394 | 									name='type'
 395 | 									options={appointmentTypes.map(t => ({
 396 | 										value: t.value,
 397 | 										label: t.label
 398 | 									}))}
 399 | 									placeholder='Select type'
 400 | 									required
 401 | 								/>
 402 | 
 403 | 								<FormSelectField
 404 | 									label='Service (Optional)'
 405 | 									name='serviceId'
 406 | 									options={services.map((s: { id: string; serviceName: string }) => ({
 407 | 										value: s.id,
 408 | 										label: s.serviceName
 409 | 									}))}
 410 | 									placeholder='Select service'
 411 | 								/>
 412 | 
 413 | 								<FormSwitchField
 414 | 									description='Conduct appointment via video call'
 415 | 									label='Virtual Appointment'
 416 | 									name='isVirtual'
 417 | 								/>
 418 | 
 419 | 								<FormSwitchField
 420 | 									description='Send appointment reminder to patient'
 421 | 									label='Send Reminder'
 422 | 									name='sendReminder'
 423 | 								/>
 424 | 							</div>
 425 | 
 426 | 							{/* Reminder Method (conditional) */}
 427 | 							{formValues.sendReminder && (
 428 | 								<div className='mt-4'>
 429 | 									<FormSelectField
 430 | 										label='Reminder Method'
 431 | 										name='reminderMethod'
 432 | 										options={[
 433 | 											{ value: "EMAIL", label: "Email" },
 434 | 											{ value: "SMS", label: "SMS" },
 435 | 											{ value: "BOTH", label: "Both" }
 436 | 										]}
 437 | 									/>
 438 | 								</div>
 439 | 							)}
 440 | 						</div>
 441 | 
 442 | 						{/* Medical Information */}
 443 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 444 | 							<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 445 | 								<Activity className='h-5 w-5' />
 446 | 								Medical Information
 447 | 							</h3>
 448 | 							<Separator />
 449 | 							<FormTextareaField
 450 | 								label='Reason for Visit'
 451 | 								name='reason'
 452 | 								placeholder='What brings the patient in today?'
 453 | 								rows={2}
 454 | 							/>
 455 | 							<FormTextareaField
 456 | 								label='Notes'
 457 | 								name='note'
 458 | 								placeholder='Any additional information...'
 459 | 								rows={3}
 460 | 							/>
 461 | 						</div>
 462 | 
 463 | 						{/* Status Badge Display */}
 464 | 						{formValues.status && (
 465 | 							<div className='flex items-center gap-2 rounded-lg bg-muted p-3'>
 466 | 								<span className='font-medium text-sm'>Status:</span>
 467 | 								<Badge
 468 | 									className={cn(
 469 | 										formValues.status === "SCHEDULED" && "bg-green-500",
 470 | 										formValues.status === "PENDING" && "bg-yellow-500",
 471 | 										formValues.status === "COMPLETED" && "bg-blue-500",
 472 | 										formValues.status === "CANCELLED" && "bg-red-500",
 473 | 										formValues.status === "NO_SHOW" && "bg-gray-500"
 474 | 									)}
 475 | 								>
 476 | 									{formValues.status}
 477 | 								</Badge>
 478 | 							</div>
 479 | 						)}
 480 | 
 481 | 						{/* Actions */}
 482 | 						<Separator />
 483 | 						<div className='flex justify-end gap-4'>
 484 | 							{onCancel && (
 485 | 								<Button
 486 | 									disabled={isPending}
 487 | 									onClick={onCancel}
 488 | 									type='button'
 489 | 									variant='outline'
 490 | 								>
 491 | 									Cancel
 492 | 								</Button>
 493 | 							)}
 494 | 							<form.SubmitButton
 495 | 								className='min-w-30'
 496 | 								disabled={isPending}
 497 | 							>
 498 | 								{isPending
 499 | 									? initialData?.appointmentDate
 500 | 										? "Updating..."
 501 | 										: "Scheduling..."
 502 | 									: initialData?.appointmentDate
 503 | 										? "Update Appointment"
 504 | 										: "Schedule Appointment"}
 505 | 							</form.SubmitButton>
 506 | 						</div>
 507 | 					</form.Form>
 508 | 				</form.AppForm>
 509 | 			</CardContent>
 510 | 		</Card>
 511 | 	);
 512 | }

```

`components/appointments/AppointmentTableRowActions.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/table/AppointmentTableRowActions.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import {
   4 | 	AlertDialog,
   5 | 	AlertDialogAction,
   6 | 	AlertDialogCancel,
   7 | 	AlertDialogContent,
   8 | 	AlertDialogDescription,
   9 | 	AlertDialogFooter,
  10 | 	AlertDialogHeader,
  11 | 	AlertDialogTitle
  12 | } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/alert-dialog";
  13 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
  14 | import {
  15 | 	Dialog,
  16 | 	DialogContent,
  17 | 	DialogDescription,
  18 | 	DialogFooter,
  19 | 	DialogHeader,
  20 | 	DialogTitle
  21 | } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/dialog";
  22 | import {
  23 | 	DropdownMenu,
  24 | 	DropdownMenuContent,
  25 | 	DropdownMenuItem,
  26 | 	DropdownMenuLabel,
  27 | 	DropdownMenuSeparator,
  28 | 	DropdownMenuShortcut,
  29 | 	DropdownMenuSub,
  30 | 	DropdownMenuSubContent,
  31 | 	DropdownMenuSubTrigger,
  32 | 	DropdownMenuTrigger
  33 | } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/dropdown-menu";
  34 | import { Label } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/label";
  35 | import { Textarea } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/textarea";
  36 | import { DotsHorizontalIcon } from "@radix-ui/react-icons";
  37 | import { useMutation, useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
  38 | import { useNavigate } from "@tanstack/react-router";
  39 | import type { Row } from "@tanstack/react-table";
  40 | import { useState } from "react";
  41 | import { toast } from "sonner";
  42 | 
  43 | import { orpc } from "@/utils/orpc";
  44 | 
  45 | interface Appointment {
  46 | 	id: string;
  47 | 	patientId: string;
  48 | 	patientName?: string;
  49 | 	doctorId: string;
  50 | 	doctorName?: string;
  51 | 	appointmentDate: Date;
  52 | 	status: "SCHEDULED" | "PENDING" | "COMPLETED" | "CANCELLED" | "NO_SHOW";
  53 | 	type: string;
  54 | }
  55 | 
  56 | interface AppointmentTableRowActionsProps<TData> {
  57 | 	row: Row<TData>;
  58 | 	onStatusUpdate?: () => void;
  59 | }
  60 | 
  61 | export function AppointmentTableRowActions<TData>({ row, onStatusUpdate }: AppointmentTableRowActionsProps<TData>) {
  62 | 	const appointment = row.original as Appointment;
  63 | 	const navigate = useNavigate();
  64 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
  65 | 	const [showCancelDialog, setShowCancelDialog] = useState(false);
  66 | 	const [showRescheduleDialog, setShowRescheduleDialog] = useState(false);
  67 | 	const [showNoShowDialog, setShowNoShowDialog] = useState(false);
  68 | 	const [cancellationReason, setCancellationReason] = useState("");
  69 | 	const [rescheduleDate, setRescheduleDate] = useState("");
  70 | 	const [rescheduleTime, setRescheduleTime] = useState("");
  71 | 	const [isProcessing, setIsProcessing] = useState(false);
  72 | 
  73 | 	const updateStatus = useMutation(
  74 | 		orpc.appointment.updateStatus.mutationOptions({
  75 | 			onSuccess: () => {
  76 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: orpc.appointment.key() });
  77 | 				toast.success("Appointment status updated successfully");
  78 | 				onStatusUpdate?.();
  79 | 				setShowCancelDialog(false);
  80 | 				setShowNoShowDialog(false);
  81 | 				setShowRescheduleDialog(false);
  82 | 			},
  83 | 			onError: (error: Error) => {
  84 | 				toast.error(error.message || "Failed to update appointment status");
  85 | 			},
  86 | 			onSettled: () => {
  87 | 				setIsProcessing(false);
  88 | 			}
  89 | 		})
  90 | 	);
  91 | 
  92 | 	const deleteAppointment = useMutation(
  93 | 		orpc.appointment.delete.mutationOptions({
  94 | 			onSuccess: () => {
  95 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: orpc.appointment.key() });
  96 | 				toast.success("Appointment deleted successfully");
  97 | 				onStatusUpdate?.();
  98 | 			},
  99 | 			onError: (error: Error) => {
 100 | 				toast.error(error.message || "Failed to delete appointment");
 101 | 			}
 102 | 		})
 103 | 	);
 104 | 
 105 | 	const handleViewDetails = () => {
 106 | 		navigate({
 107 | 			to: "/dashboard/appointments/$id",
 108 | 			params: { id: appointment.id }
 109 | 		});
 110 | 	};
 111 | 
 112 | 	const handleEdit = () => {
 113 | 		navigate({
 114 | 			to: "/dashboard/appointments/$id/edit",
 115 | 			params: { id: appointment.id }
 116 | 		});
 117 | 	};
 118 | 
 119 | 	const handleStartVisit = () => {
 120 | 		navigate({
 121 | 			to: "/dashboard/encounters/new",
 122 | 			search: { appointmentId: appointment.id }
 123 | 		});
 124 | 	};
 125 | 
 126 | 	const handleCancel = () => {
 127 | 		setIsProcessing(true);
 128 | 		updateStatus.mutate({
 129 | 			id: appointment.id,
 130 | 			status: "CANCELLED",
 131 | 			cancellationReason: cancellationReason || undefined
 132 | 		});
 133 | 	};
 134 | 
 135 | 	const handleNoShow = () => {
 136 | 		setIsProcessing(true);
 137 | 		updateStatus.mutate({
 138 | 			id: appointment.id,
 139 | 			status: "NO_SHOW",
 140 | 			note: "Patient did not show up for scheduled appointment"
 141 | 		});
 142 | 	};
 143 | 
 144 | 	const handleReschedule = () => {
 145 | 		if (!rescheduleDate || !rescheduleTime) {
 146 | 			toast.error("Please select both date and time");
 147 | 			return;
 148 | 		}
 149 | 		setIsProcessing(true);
 150 | 		const newDateTime = new Date(rescheduleDate);
 151 | 		const [hours, minutes] = rescheduleTime.split(":").map(Number);
 152 | 		newDateTime.setHours(hours, minutes);
 153 | 
 154 | 		updateStatus.mutate({
 155 | 			id: appointment.id,
 156 | 			status: "PENDING",
 157 | 			rescheduledTo: newDateTime
 158 | 		});
 159 | 	};
 160 | 
 161 | 	const handleDelete = () => {
 162 | 		deleteAppointment.mutate({ id: appointment.id });
 163 | 	};
 164 | 
 165 | 	const canEdit = appointment.status === "SCHEDULED" || appointment.status === "PENDING";
 166 | 	const canStart = appointment.status === "SCHEDULED";
 167 | 
 168 | 	return (
 169 | 		<>
 170 | 			<DropdownMenu>
 171 | 				<DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
 172 | 					<Button
 173 | 						className='flex h-8 w-8 p-0 data-[state=open]:bg-muted'
 174 | 						variant='ghost'
 175 | 					>
 176 | 						<DotsHorizontalIcon className='h-4 w-4' />
 177 | 						<span className='sr-only'>Open menu</span>
 178 | 					</Button>
 179 | 				</DropdownMenuTrigger>
 180 | 				<DropdownMenuContent
 181 | 					align='end'
 182 | 					className='w-48'
 183 | 				>
 184 | 					<DropdownMenuLabel>Actions</DropdownMenuLabel>
 185 | 					<DropdownMenuItem onClick={handleViewDetails}>View details</DropdownMenuItem>
 186 | 					{canEdit && <DropdownMenuItem onClick={handleEdit}>Edit appointment</DropdownMenuItem>}
 187 | 					{canStart && (
 188 | 						<DropdownMenuItem onClick={handleStartVisit}>
 189 | 							Start visit
 190 | 							<DropdownMenuShortcut>▶</DropdownMenuShortcut>
 191 | 						</DropdownMenuItem>
 192 | 					)}
 193 | 					<DropdownMenuSeparator />
 194 | 					<DropdownMenuSub>
 195 | 						<DropdownMenuSubTrigger>Change status</DropdownMenuSubTrigger>
 196 | 						<DropdownMenuSubContent>
 197 | 							{appointment.status !== "COMPLETED" && (
 198 | 								<DropdownMenuItem
 199 | 									onClick={() =>
 200 | 										updateStatus.mutate({
 201 | 											id: appointment.id,
 202 | 											status: "COMPLETED"
 203 | 										})
 204 | 									}
 205 | 								>
 206 | 									Mark as Completed
 207 | 								</DropdownMenuItem>
 208 | 							)}
 209 | 							{appointment.status !== "CANCELLED" && canEdit && (
 210 | 								<DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => setShowCancelDialog(true)}>Cancel</DropdownMenuItem>
 211 | 							)}
 212 | 							{appointment.status !== "NO_SHOW" && canEdit && (
 213 | 								<DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => setShowNoShowDialog(true)}>
 214 | 									Mark as No Show
 215 | 								</DropdownMenuItem>
 216 | 							)}
 217 | 							{canEdit && (
 218 | 								<DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => setShowRescheduleDialog(true)}>
 219 | 									Reschedule
 220 | 								</DropdownMenuItem>
 221 | 							)}
 222 | 						</DropdownMenuSubContent>
 223 | 					</DropdownMenuSub>
 224 | 					<DropdownMenuSeparator />
 225 | 					<DropdownMenuItem
 226 | 						className='text-destructive focus:text-destructive'
 227 | 						onClick={handleDelete}
 228 | 					>
 229 | 						Delete record
 230 | 						<DropdownMenuShortcut>⌘⌫</DropdownMenuShortcut>
 231 | 					</DropdownMenuItem>
 232 | 				</DropdownMenuContent>
 233 | 			</DropdownMenu>
 234 | 
 235 | 			{/* Cancel Appointment Dialog */}
 236 | 			<AlertDialog
 237 | 				onOpenChange={setShowCancelDialog}
 238 | 				open={showCancelDialog}
 239 | 			>
 240 | 				<AlertDialogContent>
 241 | 					<AlertDialogHeader>
 242 | 						<AlertDialogTitle>Cancel Appointment</AlertDialogTitle>
 243 | 						<AlertDialogDescription>
 244 | 							Are you sure you want to cancel the appointment with {appointment.patientName}? This will
 245 | 							notify the patient.
 246 | 						</AlertDialogDescription>
 247 | 					</AlertDialogHeader>
 248 | 					<div className='space-y-2'>
 249 | 						<Label htmlFor='reason'>Cancellation Reason (Optional)</Label>
 250 | 						<Textarea
 251 | 							id='reason'
 252 | 							onChange={e => setCancellationReason(e.target.value)}
 253 | 							placeholder='e.g., Patient request, scheduling conflict...'
 254 | 							rows={2}
 255 | 							value={cancellationReason}
 256 | 						/>
 257 | 					</div>
 258 | 					<AlertDialogFooter>
 259 | 						<AlertDialogCancel disabled={isProcessing}>Keep Appointment</AlertDialogCancel>
 260 | 						<AlertDialogAction
 261 | 							className='bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/90'
 262 | 							disabled={isProcessing}
 263 | 							onClick={handleCancel}
 264 | 						>
 265 | 							{isProcessing ? "Processing..." : "Cancel Appointment"}
 266 | 						</AlertDialogAction>
 267 | 					</AlertDialogFooter>
 268 | 				</AlertDialogContent>
 269 | 			</AlertDialog>
 270 | 
 271 | 			{/* No Show Dialog */}
 272 | 			<AlertDialog
 273 | 				onOpenChange={setShowNoShowDialog}
 274 | 				open={showNoShowDialog}
 275 | 			>
 276 | 				<AlertDialogContent>
 277 | 					<AlertDialogHeader>
 278 | 						<AlertDialogTitle>Mark as No Show</AlertDialogTitle>
 279 | 						<AlertDialogDescription>
 280 | 							Mark the appointment with {appointment.patientName} as a no-show. This will be recorded in
 281 | 							the patient's history.
 282 | 						</AlertDialogDescription>
 283 | 					</AlertDialogHeader>
 284 | 					<AlertDialogFooter>
 285 | 						<AlertDialogCancel disabled={isProcessing}>Cancel</AlertDialogCancel>
 286 | 						<AlertDialogAction
 287 | 							disabled={isProcessing}
 288 | 							onClick={handleNoShow}
 289 | 						>
 290 | 							{isProcessing ? "Processing..." : "Mark as No Show"}
 291 | 						</AlertDialogAction>
 292 | 					</AlertDialogFooter>
 293 | 				</AlertDialogContent>
 294 | 			</AlertDialog>
 295 | 
 296 | 			{/* Reschedule Dialog */}
 297 | 			<Dialog
 298 | 				onOpenChange={setShowRescheduleDialog}
 299 | 				open={showRescheduleDialog}
 300 | 			>
 301 | 				<DialogContent>
 302 | 					<DialogHeader>
 303 | 						<DialogTitle>Reschedule Appointment</DialogTitle>
 304 | 						<DialogDescription>
 305 | 							Select a new date and time for the appointment with {appointment.patientName}.
 306 | 						</DialogDescription>
 307 | 					</DialogHeader>
 308 | 					<div className='space-y-4 py-4'>
 309 | 						<div className='space-y-2'>
 310 | 							<Label htmlFor='reschedule-date'>New Date *</Label>
 311 | 							<input
 312 | 								className='w-full rounded-md border p-2'
 313 | 								id='reschedule-date'
 314 | 								min={new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0]}
 315 | 								onChange={e => setRescheduleDate(e.target.value)}
 316 | 								type='date'
 317 | 								value={rescheduleDate}
 318 | 							/>
 319 | 						</div>
 320 | 						<div className='space-y-2'>
 321 | 							<Label htmlFor='reschedule-time'>New Time *</Label>
 322 | 							<input
 323 | 								className='w-full rounded-md border p-2'
 324 | 								id='reschedule-time'
 325 | 								onChange={e => setRescheduleTime(e.target.value)}
 326 | 								step='900'
 327 | 								type='time'
 328 | 								value={rescheduleTime}
 329 | 							/>
 330 | 						</div>
 331 | 					</div>
 332 | 					<DialogFooter>
 333 | 						<Button
 334 | 							disabled={isProcessing}
 335 | 							onClick={() => setShowRescheduleDialog(false)}
 336 | 							variant='outline'
 337 | 						>
 338 | 							Cancel
 339 | 						</Button>
 340 | 						<Button
 341 | 							disabled={isProcessing || !rescheduleDate || !rescheduleTime}
 342 | 							onClick={handleReschedule}
 343 | 						>
 344 | 							{isProcessing ? "Processing..." : "Confirm Reschedule"}
 345 | 						</Button>
 346 | 					</DialogFooter>
 347 | 				</DialogContent>
 348 | 			</Dialog>
 349 | 		</>
 350 | 	);
 351 | }

```

`components/appointments/columns.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/table/AppointmentColumns.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { DataTableColumnHeader } from "@clinic/ui/components/data-table/DataTableColumnHeader";
   4 | import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/avatar";
   5 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
   6 | import { Checkbox } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/checkbox";
   7 | import type { ColumnDef } from "@tanstack/react-table";
   8 | import { format } from "date-fns";
   9 | import { CalendarIcon, ClockIcon, PhoneIcon, VideoIcon } from "lucide-react";
  10 | import { getInitials } from
  11 | @clinic
  12 | /ui/bil / utils;
  13 | ";
  14 | 
  15 | import { AppointmentTableRowActions } from "./AppointmentTableRowActions";
  16 | 
  17 | export interface Appointment {
  18 | 	id: string;
  19 | 	patientId: string;
  20 | 	patientName: string;
  21 | 	patientImage?: string;
  22 | 	patientPhone?: string;
  23 | 	doctorId: string;
  24 | 	doctorName: string;
  25 | 	doctorSpecialty?: string;
  26 | 	doctorColorCode?: string;
  27 | 	appointmentDate: Date;
  28 | 	duration?: number;
  29 | 	type: string;
  30 | 	status: "SCHEDULED" | "PENDING" | "COMPLETED" | "CANCELLED" | "NO_SHOW";
  31 | 	serviceName?: string;
  32 | 	servicePrice?: number;
  33 | 	notes?: string;
  34 | }
  35 | 
  36 | const getStatusVariant = (status: Appointment["status"]): "default" | "secondary" | "destructive" | "outline" => {
  37 | 	switch (status) {
  38 | 		case "SCHEDULED":
  39 | 			return "default";
  40 | 		case "PENDING":
  41 | 			return "outline";
  42 | 		case "COMPLETED":
  43 | 			return "secondary";
  44 | 		case "CANCELLED":
  45 | 			return "destructive";
  46 | 		case "NO_SHOW":
  47 | 			return "outline";
  48 | 		default:
  49 | 			return "secondary";
  50 | 	}
  51 | };
  52 | 
  53 | const getStatusLabel = (status: Appointment["status"]): string => {
  54 | 	switch (status) {
  55 | 		case "SCHEDULED":
  56 | 			return "Scheduled";
  57 | 		case "PENDING":
  58 | 			return "Pending";
  59 | 		case "COMPLETED":
  60 | 			return "Completed";
  61 | 		case "CANCELLED":
  62 | 			return "Cancelled";
  63 | 		case "NO_SHOW":
  64 | 			return "No Show";
  65 | 		default:
  66 | 			return status;
  67 | 	}
  68 | };
  69 | 
  70 | const getAppointmentTypeIcon = (type: string) => {
  71 | 	const lowerType = type?.toLowerCase() || "";
  72 | 	if (lowerType.includes("video") || lowerType.includes("telehealth")) {
  73 | 		return <VideoIcon className='h-3 w-3' />;
  74 | 	}
  75 | 	if (lowerType.includes("phone")) {
  76 | 		return <PhoneIcon className='h-3 w-3' />;
  77 | 	}
  78 | 	return <CalendarIcon className='h-3 w-3' />;
  79 | };
  80 | 
  81 | export const appointmentColumns: ColumnDef<Appointment>[] = [
  82 | 	{
  83 | 		id: "select",
  84 | 		header: ({ table }) => (
  85 | 			<Checkbox
  86 | 				aria-label='Select all'
  87 | 				checked={table.getIsAllPageRowsSelected() || (table.getIsSomePageRowsSelected() && "indeterminate")}
  88 | 				onCheckedChange={value => table.toggleAllPageRowsSelected(!!value)}
  89 | 			/>
  90 | 		),
  91 | 		cell: ({ row }) => (
  92 | 			<Checkbox
  93 | 				aria-label='Select row'
  94 | 				checked={row.getIsSelected()}
  95 | 				onCheckedChange={value => row.toggleSelected(!!value)}
  96 | 			/>
  97 | 		),
  98 | 		enableSorting: false,
  99 | 		enableHiding: false
 100 | 	},
 101 | 	{
 102 | 		accessorKey: "patientName",
 103 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
 104 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
 105 | 				column={column}
 106 | 				title='Patient'
 107 | 			/>
 108 | 		),
 109 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 110 | 			const appointment = row.original;
 111 | 			const initials = getInitials(appointment.patientName);
 112 | 			return (
 113 | 				<div className='flex items-center gap-3'>
 114 | 					<Avatar className='h-8 w-8'>
 115 | 						{appointment.patientImage ? (
 116 | 							<AvatarImage
 117 | 								alt={appointment.patientName}
 118 | 								src={appointment.patientImage}
 119 | 							/>
 120 | 						) : null}
 121 | 						<AvatarFallback>{initials}</AvatarFallback>
 122 | 					</Avatar>
 123 | 					<div>
 124 | 						<div className='font-medium'>{appointment.patientName}</div>
 125 | 						{appointment.patientPhone && (
 126 | 							<div className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>{appointment.patientPhone}</div>
 127 | 						)}
 128 | 					</div>
 129 | 				</div>
 130 | 			);
 131 | 		},
 132 | 		filterFn: (row, _id, value) => {
 133 | 			const patientName = row.getValue("patientName") as string;
 134 | 			return patientName?.toLowerCase().includes(String(value).toLowerCase()) ?? false;
 135 | 		}
 136 | 	},
 137 | 	{
 138 | 		accessorKey: "doctorName",
 139 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
 140 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
 141 | 				column={column}
 142 | 				title='Doctor'
 143 | 			/>
 144 | 		),
 145 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 146 | 			const appointment = row.original;
 147 | 			return (
 148 | 				<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 149 | 					{appointment.doctorColorCode && (
 150 | 						<div
 151 | 							className='h-2 w-2 rounded-full'
 152 | 							style={{ backgroundColor: appointment.doctorColorCode }}
 153 | 						/>
 154 | 					)}
 155 | 					<div>
 156 | 						<div className='font-medium'>Dr. {appointment.doctorName}</div>
 157 | 						{appointment.doctorSpecialty && (
 158 | 							<div className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>{appointment.doctorSpecialty}</div>
 159 | 						)}
 160 | 					</div>
 161 | 				</div>
 162 | 			);
 163 | 		}
 164 | 	},
 165 | 	{
 166 | 		accessorKey: "appointmentDate",
 167 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
 168 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
 169 | 				column={column}
 170 | 				title='Date & Time'
 171 | 			/>
 172 | 		),
 173 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 174 | 			const date = row.getValue("appointmentDate") as Date;
 175 | 			return (
 176 | 				<div>
 177 | 					<div className='font-medium'>{format(date, "MMM d, yyyy")}</div>
 178 | 					<div className='flex items-center gap-1 text-muted-foreground text-sm'>
 179 | 						<ClockIcon className='h-3 w-3' />
 180 | 						{format(date, "h:mm a")}
 181 | 						{row.original.duration && <span className='text-xs'>({row.original.duration} min)</span>}
 182 | 					</div>
 183 | 				</div>
 184 | 			);
 185 | 		},
 186 | 		sortingFn: "datetime"
 187 | 	},
 188 | 	{
 189 | 		accessorKey: "type",
 190 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
 191 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
 192 | 				column={column}
 193 | 				title='Type'
 194 | 			/>
 195 | 		),
 196 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 197 | 			const type = row.getValue("type") as string;
 198 | 			return (
 199 | 				<div className='flex items-center gap-1'>
 200 | 					{getAppointmentTypeIcon(type)}
 201 | 					<span className='capitalize'>{type?.toLowerCase() || "Standard"}</span>
 202 | 				</div>
 203 | 			);
 204 | 		},
 205 | 		filterFn: (row, id, value) => {
 206 | 			return value.includes(row.getValue(id));
 207 | 		}
 208 | 	},
 209 | 	{
 210 | 		accessorKey: "serviceName",
 211 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
 212 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
 213 | 				column={column}
 214 | 				title='Service'
 215 | 			/>
 216 | 		),
 217 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 218 | 			const serviceName = row.getValue("serviceName") as string;
 219 | 			const price = row.original.servicePrice;
 220 | 			return (
 221 | 				<div>
 222 | 					<div className='text-sm'>{serviceName || "General Consultation"}</div>
 223 | 					{price && <div className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>${price}</div>}
 224 | 				</div>
 225 | 			);
 226 | 		}
 227 | 	},
 228 | 	{
 229 | 		accessorKey: "status",
 230 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
 231 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
 232 | 				column={column}
 233 | 				title='Status'
 234 | 			/>
 235 | 		),
 236 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 237 | 			const status = row.getValue("status") as Appointment["status"];
 238 | 			return <Badge variant={getStatusVariant(status)}>{getStatusLabel(status)}</Badge>;
 239 | 		},
 240 | 		filterFn: (row, id, value) => {
 241 | 			return value.includes(row.getValue(id));
 242 | 		}
 243 | 	},
 244 | 	{
 245 | 		id: "actions",
 246 | 		cell: ({ row }) => <AppointmentTableRowActions row={row} />
 247 | 	}
 248 | ];
 249 | 
 250 | export const columns = appointmentColumns;

```

`components/auth/forgot-password-view.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/features/auth/components/forgot-password-view.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   4 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   5 | import { Input } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/input";
   6 | import { Label } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/label";
   7 | import { useNavigate } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   8 | import { useState } from "react";
   9 | import { toast } from "sonner";
  10 | 
  11 | import { authClient } from "@/lib/auth-client";
  12 | 
  13 | export default function ForgotPasswordViewPage() {
  14 | 	const navigate = useNavigate();
  15 | 	const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  16 | 	const [email, setEmail] = useState("");
  17 | 	const [isSubmitted, setIsSubmitted] = useState(false);
  18 | 
  19 | 	const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
  20 | 		e.preventDefault();
  21 | 		setIsLoading(true);
  22 | 
  23 | 		try {
  24 | 			const { data, error } = await authClient.requestPasswordReset({
  25 | 				email,
  26 | 				redirectTo: `${window.location.origin}/auth/reset-password`
  27 | 			});
  28 | 
  29 | 			if (error) {
  30 | 				toast.error(error.message || "Failed to send reset email");
  31 | 				return;
  32 | 			}
  33 | 
  34 | 			if (data) setIsSubmitted(true);
  35 | 			toast.success("Password reset email sent! Check your inbox.");
  36 | 		} catch (error) {
  37 | 			console.error("Forgot password error:", error);
  38 | 			toast.error("An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.");
  39 | 		} finally {
  40 | 			setIsLoading(false);
  41 | 		}
  42 | 	};
  43 | 
  44 | 	return (
  45 | 		<Card>
  46 | 			<CardHeader>
  47 | 				<CardTitle>Reset password</CardTitle>
  48 | 				<CardDescription>
  49 | 					Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password
  50 | 				</CardDescription>
  51 | 			</CardHeader>
  52 | 
  53 | 			{!isSubmitted ? (
  54 | 				<form onSubmit={handleSubmit}>
  55 | 					<CardContent className='space-y-4'>
  56 | 						<div className='space-y-2'>
  57 | 							<Label htmlFor='email'>Email</Label>
  58 | 							<Input
  59 | 								id='email'
  60 | 								onChange={e => setEmail(e.target.value)}
  61 | 								placeholder='parent@example.com'
  62 | 								required
  63 | 								type='email'
  64 | 								value={email}
  65 | 							/>
  66 | 						</div>
  67 | 					</CardContent>
  68 | 
  69 | 					<CardFooter className='flex flex-col gap-4'>
  70 | 						<Button
  71 | 							className='w-full'
  72 | 							disabled={isLoading}
  73 | 							type='submit'
  74 | 						>
  75 | 							{isLoading ? "Sending..." : "Send reset link"}
  76 | 						</Button>
  77 | 
  78 | 						<button
  79 | 							className='text-center text-sm text-teal-600 hover:underline'
  80 | 							onClick={() => navigate({ to: "/login" })}
  81 | 							type='button'
  82 | 						>
  83 | 							Back to sign in
  84 | 						</button>
  85 | 					</CardFooter>
  86 | 				</form>
  87 | 			) : (
  88 | 				<CardContent className='space-y-4 text-center'>
  89 | 					<div className='rounded-full bg-green-100 p-3 text-green-600'>
  90 | 						<svg
  91 | 							className='mx-auto h-6 w-6'
  92 | 							fill='none'
  93 | 							stroke='currentColor'
  94 | 							viewBox='0 0 24 24'
  95 | 						>
  96 | 							<title>Email Sent</title>
  97 | 							<path
  98 | 								d='M3 8l7.89 5.26a2 2 0 002.22 0L21 8M5 19h14a2 2 0 002-2V7a2 2 0 00-2-2H5a2 2 0 00-2 2v10a2 2 0 002 2z'
  99 | 								strokeLinecap='round'
 100 | 								strokeLinejoin='round'
 101 | 								strokeWidth={2}
 102 | 							/>
 103 | 						</svg>
 104 | 					</div>
 105 | 					<h3 className='font-semibold text-lg'>Check your email</h3>
 106 | 					<p className='text-gray-600 text-sm'>
 107 | 						We've sent a password reset link to {email}. Please check your inbox.
 108 | 					</p>
 109 | 					<Button
 110 | 						className='mt-4'
 111 | 						onClick={() => navigate({ to: "/sign-in" })}
 112 | 						variant='outline'
 113 | 					>
 114 | 						Return to sign in
 115 | 					</Button>
 116 | 				</CardContent>
 117 | 			)}
 118 | 		</Card>
 119 | 	);
 120 | }

```

`components/auth/signin-view.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/features/auth/components/sign-in-view.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   4 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   5 | import { Input } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/input";
   6 | import { Label } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/label";
   7 | import { useNavigate } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   8 | import { Eye, EyeOff, Heart } from "lucide-react";
   9 | import { useState } from "react";
  10 | import { toast } from "sonner";
  11 | 
  12 | import { authClient } from "@/lib/auth-client";
  13 | 
  14 | export default function SignInViewPage() {
  15 | 	const navigate = useNavigate();
  16 | 	const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  17 | 	const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false);
  18 | 	const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
  19 | 		email: "",
  20 | 		password: ""
  21 | 	});
  22 | 
  23 | 	const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
  24 | 		e.preventDefault();
  25 | 		setIsLoading(true);
  26 | 
  27 | 		try {
  28 | 			const result = await authClient.signIn.email({
  29 | 				email: formData.email,
  30 | 				password: formData.password,
  31 | 				callbackURL: "/dashboard"
  32 | 			});
  33 | 
  34 | 			if (result.error) {
  35 | 				toast.error(result.error.message || "Invalid email or password");
  36 | 				return;
  37 | 			}
  38 | 
  39 | 			toast.success("Welcome back!");
  40 | 			navigate({ to: "/dashboard" });
  41 | 		} catch (error) {
  42 | 			console.error("Sign in error:", error);
  43 | 			toast.error("An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.");
  44 | 		} finally {
  45 | 			setIsLoading(false);
  46 | 		}
  47 | 	};
  48 | 
  49 | 	return (
  50 | 		<Card className='border-0 shadow-none lg:border lg:shadow-sm'>
  51 | 			<CardHeader className='space-y-2 text-center'>
  52 | 				<div className='mx-auto flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-teal-100 lg:hidden'>
  53 | 					<Heart className='h-6 w-6 text-teal-600' />
  54 | 				</div>
  55 | 				<CardTitle className='font-bold text-2xl'>Welcome back</CardTitle>
  56 | 				<CardDescription>Sign in to your account to manage your child's health</CardDescription>
  57 | 			</CardHeader>
  58 | 
  59 | 			<form onSubmit={handleSubmit}>
  60 | 				<CardContent className='space-y-4'>
  61 | 					<div className='space-y-2'>
  62 | 						<Label htmlFor='email'>Email</Label>
  63 | 						<Input
  64 | 							autoComplete='email'
  65 | 							id='email'
  66 | 							onChange={e => setFormData({ ...formData, email: e.target.value })}
  67 | 							placeholder='parent@example.com'
  68 | 							required
  69 | 							type='email'
  70 | 							value={formData.email}
  71 | 						/>
  72 | 					</div>
  73 | 
  74 | 					<div className='space-y-2'>
  75 | 						<Label htmlFor='password'>Password</Label>
  76 | 						<div className='relative'>
  77 | 							<Input
  78 | 								autoComplete='current-password'
  79 | 								id='password'
  80 | 								onChange={e => setFormData({ ...formData, password: e.target.value })}
  81 | 								placeholder='••••••••'
  82 | 								required
  83 | 								type={showPassword ? "text" : "password"}
  84 | 								value={formData.password}
  85 | 							/>
  86 | 							<button
  87 | 								className='absolute top-1/2 right-3 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'
  88 | 								onClick={() => setShowPassword(!showPassword)}
  89 | 								type='button'
  90 | 							>
  91 | 								{showPassword ? <EyeOff className='h-4 w-4' /> : <Eye className='h-4 w-4' />}
  92 | 							</button>
  93 | 						</div>
  94 | 					</div>
  95 | 
  96 | 					<div className='flex items-center justify-between'>
  97 | 						<label className='flex items-center gap-2 text-sm'>
  98 | 							<input
  99 | 								className='rounded border-gray-300'
 100 | 								type='checkbox'
 101 | 							/>
 102 | 							<span className='text-gray-600'>Remember me</span>
 103 | 						</label>
 104 | 						<button
 105 | 							className='text-sm text-teal-600 hover:underline'
 106 | 							onClick={() => navigate({ to: "/forgot-password" })}
 107 | 							type='button'
 108 | 						>
 109 | 							Forgot password?
 110 | 						</button>
 111 | 					</div>
 112 | 				</CardContent>
 113 | 
 114 | 				<CardFooter className='flex flex-col gap-4'>
 115 | 					<Button
 116 | 						className='w-full'
 117 | 						disabled={isLoading}
 118 | 						type='submit'
 119 | 					>
 120 | 						{isLoading ? (
 121 | 							<span className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 122 | 								<span className='h-4 w-4 animate-spin rounded-full border-2 border-white border-t-transparent' />
 123 | 								Signing in...
 124 | 							</span>
 125 | 						) : (
 126 | 							"Sign In"
 127 | 						)}
 128 | 					</Button>
 129 | 
 130 | 					<p className='text-center text-gray-600 text-sm'>
 131 | 						Don't have an account?{" "}
 132 | 						<button
 133 | 							className='font-medium text-teal-600 hover:underline'
 134 | 							onClick={() => navigate({ to: "/sign-up" })}
 135 | 							type='button'
 136 | 						>
 137 | 							Create an account
 138 | 						</button>
 139 | 					</p>
 140 | 
 141 | 					{/* Optional: Demo credentials for testing */}
 142 | 					<div className='mt-4 rounded-lg bg-gray-50 p-3 text-center'>
 143 | 						<p className='text-gray-500 text-xs'>Demo Credentials</p>
 144 | 						<p className='mt-1 text-gray-400 text-xs'>

 146 | 							<br />
 147 | 							Password: demo123
 148 | 						</p>
 149 | 					</div>
```

`components/auth/signup-view.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/features/auth/components/sign-up-view.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   4 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   5 | import { Input } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/input";
   6 | import { Label } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/label";
   7 | import { useNavigate } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   8 | import { Eye, EyeOff, User } from "lucide-react";
   9 | import { useState } from "react";
  10 | import { toast } from "sonner";
  11 | import { z } from "zod";
  12 | 
  13 | import { authClient } from "@/lib/auth-client";
  14 | 
  15 | const signUpSchema = z
  16 | 	.object({
  17 | 		name: z.string().min(2, "Name must be at least 2 characters"),
  18 | 		email: z.email("Invalid email address"),
  19 | 		password: z.string().min(6, "Password must be at least 6 characters"),
  20 | 		confirmPassword: z.string()
  21 | 	})
  22 | 	.refine(data => data.password === data.confirmPassword, {
  23 | 		message: "Passwords don't match",
  24 | 		path: ["confirmPassword"]
  25 | 	});
  26 | 
  27 | type SignUpFormData = {
  28 | 	name: string;
  29 | 	email: string;
  30 | 	password: string;
  31 | 	confirmPassword: string;
  32 | 	role?: "parent" | "doctor" | "staff";
  33 | 	inviteCode?: string;
  34 | };
  35 | 
  36 | export default function SignUpViewPage() {
  37 | 	const navigate = useNavigate();
  38 | 	const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  39 | 	const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false);
  40 | 	const [showConfirmPassword, setShowConfirmPassword] = useState(false);
  41 | 	const [formData, setFormData] = useState<SignUpFormData>({
  42 | 		name: "",
  43 | 		email: "",
  44 | 		password: "",
  45 | 		confirmPassword: "",
  46 | 		role: "parent"
  47 | 	});
  48 | 	const [errors, setErrors] = useState<Record<string, string>>({});
  49 | 
  50 | 	const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
  51 | 		e.preventDefault();
  52 | 		setIsLoading(true);
  53 | 		setErrors({});
  54 | 
  55 | 		// Validate form
  56 | 		const result = signUpSchema.safeParse(formData);
  57 | 		if (!result.success) {
  58 | 			const fieldErrors: Record<string, string> = {};
  59 | 			result.error.issues.forEach(issue => {
  60 | 				if (issue.path[0]) {
  61 | 					fieldErrors[issue.path[0] as string] = issue.message;
  62 | 				}
  63 | 			});
  64 | 			setErrors(fieldErrors);
  65 | 			setIsLoading(false);
  66 | 			return;
  67 | 		}
  68 | 
  69 | 		try {
  70 | 			const { confirmPassword, ...signUpData } = formData;
  71 | 
  72 | 			const { data, error } = await authClient.signUp.email({
  73 | 				email: signUpData.email,
  74 | 				password: signUpData.password,
  75 | 				name: signUpData.name,
  76 | 				// role and inviteCode are not standard signUp fields
  77 | 				// Use callbackURL to redirect after sign up
  78 | 				callbackURL: "/auth/sign-in"
  79 | 			});
  80 | 
  81 | 			if (error) {
  82 | 				toast.error(error.message || "Failed to create account");
  83 | 				return;
  84 | 			}
  85 | 
  86 | 			if (data) toast.success("Account created successfully! Please sign in.");
  87 | 			navigate({ to: "/sign-in" });
  88 | 		} catch (error) {
  89 | 			console.error("Sign up error:", error);
  90 | 			toast.error("An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.");
  91 | 		} finally {
  92 | 			setIsLoading(false);
  93 | 		}
  94 | 	};
  95 | 
  96 | 	return (
  97 | 		<Card className='border-0 shadow-none lg:border lg:shadow-sm'>
  98 | 			<CardHeader className='space-y-2 text-center'>
  99 | 				<CardTitle className='font-bold text-2xl'>Create an account</CardTitle>
 100 | 				<CardDescription>Join Smart Clinic to manage your child's healthcare journey</CardDescription>
 101 | 			</CardHeader>
 102 | 
 103 | 			<form onSubmit={handleSubmit}>
 104 | 				<CardContent className='space-y-4'>
 105 | 					<div className='space-y-2'>
 106 | 						<Label htmlFor='name'>Full Name</Label>
 107 | 						<div className='relative'>
 108 | 							<User className='absolute top-1/2 left-3 h-4 w-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400' />
 109 | 							<Input
 110 | 								className='pl-10'
 111 | 								id='name'
 112 | 								onChange={e => setFormData({ ...formData, name: e.target.value })}
 113 | 								placeholder='John Doe'
 114 | 								required
 115 | 								value={formData.name}
 116 | 							/>
 117 | 						</div>
 118 | 						{errors.name && <p className='text-red-500 text-sm'>{errors.name}</p>}
 119 | 					</div>
 120 | 
 121 | 					<div className='space-y-2'>
 122 | 						<Label htmlFor='email'>Email</Label>
 123 | 						<Input
 124 | 							autoComplete='email'
 125 | 							id='email'
 126 | 							onChange={e => setFormData({ ...formData, email: e.target.value })}
 127 | 							placeholder='parent@example.com'
 128 | 							required
 129 | 							type='email'
 130 | 							value={formData.email}
 131 | 						/>
 132 | 						{errors.email && <p className='text-red-500 text-sm'>{errors.email}</p>}
 133 | 					</div>
 134 | 
 135 | 					<div className='space-y-2'>
 136 | 						<Label htmlFor='password'>Password</Label>
 137 | 						<div className='relative'>
 138 | 							<Input
 139 | 								autoComplete='new-password'
 140 | 								id='password'
 141 | 								onChange={e => setFormData({ ...formData, password: e.target.value })}
 142 | 								placeholder='••••••••'
 143 | 								required
 144 | 								type={showPassword ? "text" : "password"}
 145 | 								value={formData.password}
 146 | 							/>
 147 | 							<button
 148 | 								className='absolute top-1/2 right-3 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'
 149 | 								onClick={() => setShowPassword(!showPassword)}
 150 | 								type='button'
 151 | 							>
 152 | 								{showPassword ? <EyeOff className='h-4 w-4' /> : <Eye className='h-4 w-4' />}
 153 | 							</button>
 154 | 						</div>
 155 | 						{errors.password && <p className='text-red-500 text-sm'>{errors.password}</p>}
 156 | 					</div>
 157 | 
 158 | 					<div className='space-y-2'>
 159 | 						<Label htmlFor='confirmPassword'>Confirm Password</Label>
 160 | 						<div className='relative'>
 161 | 							<Input
 162 | 								id='confirmPassword'
 163 | 								onChange={e => setFormData({ ...formData, confirmPassword: e.target.value })}
 164 | 								placeholder='••••••••'
 165 | 								required
 166 | 								type={showConfirmPassword ? "text" : "password"}
 167 | 								value={formData.confirmPassword}
 168 | 							/>
 169 | 							<button
 170 | 								className='absolute top-1/2 right-3 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'
 171 | 								onClick={() => setShowConfirmPassword(!showConfirmPassword)}
 172 | 								type='button'
 173 | 							>
 174 | 								{showConfirmPassword ? <EyeOff className='h-4 w-4' /> : <Eye className='h-4 w-4' />}
 175 | 							</button>
 176 | 						</div>
 177 | 						{errors.confirmPassword && <p className='text-red-500 text-sm'>{errors.confirmPassword}</p>}
 178 | 					</div>
 179 | 
 180 | 					{/* Optional: Invite code for staff/doctors */}
 181 | 					{formData.role !== "parent" && (
 182 | 						<div className='space-y-2'>
 183 | 							<Label htmlFor='inviteCode'>Invite Code</Label>
 184 | 							<Input
 185 | 								id='inviteCode'
 186 | 								onChange={e => setFormData({ ...formData, inviteCode: e.target.value })}
 187 | 								placeholder='Enter your invite code'
 188 | 								value={formData.inviteCode}
 189 | 							/>
 190 | 							<p className='text-gray-500 text-xs'>
 191 | 								Staff and doctors require an invite code to register
 192 | 							</p>
 193 | 						</div>
 194 | 					)}
 195 | 				</CardContent>
 196 | 
 197 | 				<CardFooter className='flex flex-col gap-4'>
 198 | 					<Button
 199 | 						className='w-full'
 200 | 						disabled={isLoading}
 201 | 						type='submit'
 202 | 					>
 203 | 						{isLoading ? (
 204 | 							<span className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 205 | 								<span className='h-4 w-4 animate-spin rounded-full border-2 border-white border-t-transparent' />
 206 | 								Creating account...
 207 | 							</span>
 208 | 						) : (
 209 | 							"Create Account"
 210 | 						)}
 211 | 					</Button>
 212 | 
 213 | 					<p className='text-center text-gray-600 text-sm'>
 214 | 						Already have an account?{" "}
 215 | 						<button
 216 | 							className='font-medium text-teal-600 hover:underline'
 217 | 							onClick={() => navigate({ to: "/sign-in" })}
 218 | 							type='button'
 219 | 						>
 220 | 							Sign in
 221 | 						</button>
 222 | 					</p>
 223 | 
 224 | 					<p className='text-center text-gray-400 text-xs'>
 225 | 						By creating an account, you agree to our{" "}
 226 | 						<button
 227 | 							className='text-teal-600 hover:underline'
 228 | 							type='button'
 229 | 						>
 230 | 							Terms of Service
 231 | 						</button>{" "}
 232 | 						and{" "}
 233 | 						<button
 234 | 							className='text-teal-600 hover:underline'
 235 | 							type='button'
 236 | 						>
 237 | 							Privacy Policy
 238 | 						</button>
 239 | 					</p>
 240 | 				</CardFooter>
 241 | 			</form>
 242 | 		</Card>
 243 | 	);
 244 | }
```
