`components/billing/PaymentForm.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/forms/payment-form.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
   4 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   5 | import { Calendar } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/calendar";
   6 | import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   7 | import { Label } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/label";
   8 | import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/popover";
   9 | import { Separator } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/separator";
  10 | import { useAppForm, useFormFields } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/tanstack-form";
  11 | import { useMutation, useQuery, useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
  12 | import { useSelector } from "@tanstack/react-store";
  13 | import { format } from "date-fns";
  14 | import type Decimal from "decimal.js";
  15 | import {
  16 | 	Banknote,
  17 | 	Calendar as CalendarIcon,
  18 | 	CreditCard,
  19 | 	DollarSign,
  20 | 	FileText,
  21 | 	Landmark,
  22 | 	Printer,
  23 | 	Receipt,
  24 | 	Smartphone,
  25 | 	User,
  26 | 	Wallet
  27 | } from "lucide-react";
  28 | import * as React from "react";
  29 | import { toast } from "sonner";
  30 | import * as z from "zod";
  31 | 
  32 | import { cn } from "#/lib/utils";
  33 | import { orpc } from "@/utils/orpc";
  34 | 
  35 | import { type AppointmentTypeEnum, PaymentSchema } from "../../schemas";
  36 | import { toNumber } from "../../utils";
  37 | 
  38 | // Payment Form Schema
  39 | const paymentFormSchema = PaymentSchema.pick({
  40 | 	patientId: true,
  41 | 	appointmentId: true,
  42 | 	amount: true,
  43 | 	paymentMethod: true,
  44 | 	status: true,
  45 | 	paymentDate: true,
  46 | 	discount: true,
  47 | 	insurance: true,
  48 | 	insuranceId: true,
  49 | 	notes: true,
  50 | 	receiptNumber: true
  51 | });
  52 | 
  53 | type PaymentFormValues = z.infer<typeof paymentFormSchema>;
  54 | 
  55 | // Payment methods with icons
  56 | const paymentMethods = [
  57 | 	{ value: "CASH", label: "Cash", icon: Banknote },
  58 | 	{ value: "CARD", label: "Card", icon: CreditCard },
  59 | 	{ value: "INSURANCE", label: "Insurance", icon: Wallet },
  60 | 	{ value: "BANK_TRANSFER", label: "Bank Transfer", icon: Landmark },
  61 | 	{ value: "MOBILE_MONEY", label: "Mobile Money", icon: Smartphone }
  62 | ];
  63 | 
  64 | // Receipt methods
  65 | 
  66 | type PaymentFormProps = {
  67 | 	initialData?: Partial<PaymentFormValues>;
  68 | 	appointmentId?: string;
  69 | 	patientId?: string;
  70 | 	onCancel?: () => void;
  71 | 	onSuccess?: () => void;
  72 | 	readOnly?: boolean;
  73 | };
  74 | 
  75 | export function PaymentForm({
  76 | 	initialData,
  77 | 	appointmentId,
  78 | 	patientId: presetPatientId,
  79 | 	onSuccess,
  80 | 	onCancel,
  81 | 	readOnly = false
  82 | }: PaymentFormProps) {
  83 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
  84 | 	const [selectedAppointment, setSelectedAppointment] = React.useState<{
  85 | 		id: string;
  86 | 		patientId: string;
  87 | 		appointmentDate: Date;
  88 | 		amount: number;
  89 | 	} | null>(null);
  90 | 
  91 | 	// Fetch patients for dropdown
  92 | 	const { data: patientsData, isLoading: patientsLoading } = useQuery(
  93 | 		orpc.patient.list.queryOptions({
  94 | 			input: { search: "", page: 1, limit: 50 },
  95 | 			enabled: !presetPatientId
  96 | 		})
  97 | 	);
  98 | 
  99 | 	// Fetch appointments for a patient
 100 | 	const { data: appointmentsData, isLoading: appointmentsLoading } = useQuery({
 101 | 		...orpc.appointment.list.queryOptions({
 102 | 			input: {
 103 | 				page: 1,
 104 | 				limit: 50,
 105 | 				patientId: presetPatientId,
 106 | 				status: "COMPLETED"
 107 | 			}
 108 | 		}),
 109 | 		enabled: !!presetPatientId
 110 | 	});
 111 | 
 112 | 	// Create payment mutation
 113 | 	const { mutate: createPayment, isPending: isCreatePending } = useMutation(
 114 | 		orpc.payment.create.mutationOptions({
 115 | 			onSuccess: () => {
 116 | 				toast.success("Payment recorded successfully");
 117 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ["billing"] });
 118 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: orpc.appointment.key() });
 119 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: orpc.patient.key() });
 120 | 				onSuccess?.();
 121 | 			},
 122 | 			onError: (error: Error) => {
 123 | 				console.error(error);
 124 | 				toast.error(error.message || "Failed to process payment");
 125 | 			}
 126 | 		})
 127 | 	);
 128 | 
 129 | 	// Generate receipt mutation
 130 | 	const { mutate: _generateReceipt, isPending: isReceiptPending } = useMutation({
 131 | 		mutationFn: async (paymentId: string) => {
 132 | 			const response = await fetch(`/api/payments/${paymentId}/receipt`, {
 133 | 				method: "POST"
 134 | 			});
 135 | 			if (!response.ok) throw new Error("Failed to generate receipt");
 136 | 			return response.json();
 137 | 		},
 138 | 		onSuccess: data => {
 139 | 			toast.success("Receipt generated");
 140 | 			if (data.url) {
 141 | 				window.open(data.url, "_blank");
 142 | 			}
 143 | 		},
 144 | 		onError: () => {
 145 | 			toast.error("Failed to generate receipt");
 146 | 		}
 147 | 	});
 148 | 
 149 | 	const [activePatientId, setActivePatientId] = React.useState<string>(
 150 | 		initialData?.patientId ?? presetPatientId ?? ""
 151 | 	);
 152 | 
 153 | 	// Stable default receipt number
 154 | 	const defaultReceiptNumber = React.useMemo(() => `INV-${Date.now()}`, []);
 155 | 
 156 | 	const form = useAppForm({
 157 | 		defaultValues: {
 158 | 			patientId: initialData?.patientId ?? presetPatientId ?? "",
 159 | 			appointmentId: initialData?.appointmentId ?? appointmentId ?? "",
 160 | 			amount: initialData?.amount ?? 0,
 161 | 			paymentMethod: initialData?.paymentMethod ?? "CASH",
 162 | 			status: initialData?.status ?? "PAID",
 163 | 			paymentDate: initialData?.paymentDate ?? new Date(),
 164 | 			discount: initialData?.discount ?? 0,
 165 | 			insurance: initialData?.insurance ?? "",
 166 | 			insuranceId: initialData?.insuranceId ?? "",
 167 | 			notes: initialData?.notes ?? "",
 168 | 			receiptNumber: initialData?.receiptNumber ?? Number(defaultReceiptNumber.replace(/\D/g, ""))
 169 | 		} satisfies PaymentFormValues,
 170 | 		validators: {},
 171 | 		onSubmit: async ({ value }) => {
 172 | 			// Calculate final amount after discount
 173 | 			const finalAmount = value.amount * (1 - value.discount / 100);
 174 | 			if (value.patientId !== activePatientId) {
 175 | 				setActivePatientId(value.patientId);
 176 | 			}
 177 | 
 178 | 			createPayment({
 179 | 				...value,
 180 | 				amount: finalAmount
 181 | 			});
 182 | 		}
 183 | 	});
 184 | 
 185 | 	const formValues = useSelector(form.store, s => s.values);
 186 | 
 187 | 	// Sync local state for queries when form value changes
 188 | 	React.useEffect(() => {
 189 | 		if (formValues.patientId !== activePatientId) {
 190 | 			setActivePatientId(formValues.patientId);
 191 | 		}
 192 | 	}, [formValues.patientId, activePatientId]);
 193 | 
 194 | 	// Auto-fill amount when appointment is selected
 195 | 	React.useEffect(() => {
 196 | 		if (formValues.appointmentId && appointmentsData?.appointments) {
 197 | 			const appointment = appointmentsData.appointments.find(
 198 | 				(a: { id: string }) => a.id === formValues.appointmentId
 199 | 			);
 200 | 			if (appointment && appointment.appointmentPrice !== formValues.amount) {
 201 | 				form.setFieldValue("amount", appointment.appointmentPrice ?? 0);
 202 | 				setSelectedAppointment({
 203 | 					id: appointment.id,
 204 | 					patientId: appointment.patientId,
 205 | 					appointmentDate: appointment.appointmentDate,
 206 | 					amount: appointment.appointmentPrice ?? 0
 207 | 				});
 208 | 			}
 209 | 		}
 210 | 	}, [formValues.appointmentId, appointmentsData, form, formValues.amount]);
 211 | 
 212 | 	const { FormSelectField, FormTextField, FormTextareaField } = useFormFields<PaymentFormValues>();
 213 | 
 214 | 	const patients = patientsData?.patients ?? [];
 215 | 
 216 | 	// Format currency
 217 | 	const formatCurrency = (amount: number) => {
 218 | 		return new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
 219 | 			style: "currency",
 220 | 			currency: "USD"
 221 | 		}).format(amount);
 222 | 	};
 223 | 
 224 | 	const finalAmount = formValues.amount * (1 - (formValues.discount || 0) / 100);
 225 | 
 226 | 	return (
 227 | 		<Card className='mx-auto w-full max-w-4xl'>
 228 | 			<CardHeader>
 229 | 				<CardTitle className='flex items-center gap-2 font-bold text-2xl'>
 230 | 					<Receipt className='h-6 w-6' />
 231 | 					{initialData?.receiptNumber ? "Edit Payment" : "Process Payment"}
 232 | 				</CardTitle>
 233 | 				<p className='text-muted-foreground'>Record payment and generate receipt for patient</p>
 234 | 			</CardHeader>
 235 | 			<CardContent>
 236 | 				<form.AppForm>
 237 | 					<form.Form className='space-y-6'>
 238 | 						{/* Patient & Appointment Selection */}
 239 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 240 | 							<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 241 | 								<User className='h-5 w-5' />
 242 | 								Payment Information
 243 | 							</h3>
 244 | 							<Separator />
 245 | 							<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2'>
 246 | 								{presetPatientId ? (
 247 | 									<FormTextField
 248 | 										label='Patient ID'
 249 | 										name='patientId'
 250 | 										type='text'
 251 | 									/>
 252 | 								) : (
 253 | 									<FormSelectField
 254 | 										label='Patient'
 255 | 										name='patientId'
 256 | 										options={patients.map(
 257 | 											(p: { id: string; firstName: string; lastName: string }) => ({
 258 | 												value: p.id,
 259 | 												label: `${p.firstName} ${p.lastName}`
 260 | 											})
 261 | 										)}
 262 | 										placeholder={patientsLoading ? "Loading..." : "Select patient"}
 263 | 										required
 264 | 										validators={{
 265 | 											onBlur: z.string().min(1, "Please select a patient")
 266 | 										}}
 267 | 									/>
 268 | 								)}
 269 | 
 270 | 								<FormSelectField
 271 | 									disabled={readOnly || !formValues.patientId}
 272 | 									label='Appointment (Optional)'
 273 | 									name='appointmentId'
 274 | 									options={
 275 | 										appointmentsData?.appointments?.map(
 276 | 											(a: { id: string; appointmentDate: Date; appointmentPrice: number }) => ({
 277 | 												value: a.id,
 278 | 												label: `${format(new Date(a.appointmentDate), "MMM dd, yyyy")} - ${formatCurrency(a.appointmentPrice ?? 0)}`
 279 | 											})
 280 | 										) ?? []
 281 | 									}
 282 | 									placeholder={
 283 | 										appointmentsLoading
 284 | 											? "Loading appointments..."
 285 | 											: !formValues.patientId
 286 | 												? "Select patient first"
 287 | 												: "Select appointment (optional)"
 288 | 									}
 289 | 								/>
 290 | 							</div>
 291 | 
 292 | 							{selectedAppointment && (
 293 | 								<div className='rounded-lg bg-muted p-3'>
 294 | 									<div className='flex flex-wrap justify-between gap-2'>
 295 | 										<div>
 296 | 											<span className='font-medium text-sm'>Selected Appointment:</span>
 297 | 											<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>
 298 | 												{format(selectedAppointment.appointmentDate, "PPP")}
 299 | 											</p>
 300 | 										</div>
 301 | 										<div>
 302 | 											<span className='font-medium text-sm'>Appointment Amount:</span>
 303 | 											<p className='font-semibold'>
 304 | 												{formatCurrency(selectedAppointment.amount)}
 305 | 											</p>
 306 | 										</div>
 307 | 									</div>
 308 | 								</div>
 309 | 							)}
 310 | 						</div>
 311 | 
 312 | 						{/* Payment Details */}
 313 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 314 | 							<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 315 | 								<DollarSign className='h-5 w-5' />
 316 | 								Payment Details
 317 | 							</h3>
 318 | 							<Separator />
 319 | 							<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2'>
 320 | 								<FormTextField
 321 | 									disabled={readOnly}
 322 | 									label='Amount'
 323 | 									min={0.01}
 324 | 									name='amount'
 325 | 									placeholder='0.00'
 326 | 									required
 327 | 									step={0.01}
 328 | 									type='number'
 329 | 									validators={{
 330 | 										onBlur: z.number().min(0.01, "Amount must be greater than 0")
 331 | 									}}
 332 | 								/>
 333 | 
 334 | 								<FormTextField
 335 | 									disabled={readOnly}
 336 | 									label='Discount (%)'
 337 | 									max={100}
 338 | 									min={0}
 339 | 									name='discount'
 340 | 									placeholder='0'
 341 | 									step={1}
 342 | 									type='number'
 343 | 								/>
 344 | 
 345 | 								<FormSelectField
 346 | 									disabled={readOnly}
 347 | 									label='Payment Method'
 348 | 									name='paymentMethod'
 349 | 									options={paymentMethods.map(m => ({
 350 | 										value: m.value,
 351 | 										label: m.label
 352 | 									}))}
 353 | 									placeholder='Select payment method'
 354 | 									required
 355 | 								/>
 356 | 
 357 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 358 | 									<Label>Payment Date *</Label>
 359 | 									<form.AppField name='paymentDate'>
 360 | 										{field => (
 361 | 											<Popover>
 362 | 												<PopoverTrigger asChild>
 363 | 													<Button
 364 | 														className={cn(
 365 | 															"w-full justify-start text-left font-normal",
 366 | 															!field.state.value && "text-muted-foreground"
 367 | 														)}
 368 | 														disabled={readOnly}
 369 | 														variant='outline'
 370 | 													>
 371 | 														<CalendarIcon className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 372 | 														{field.state.value
 373 | 															? format(field.state.value, "PPP")
 374 | 															: "Select date"}
 375 | 													</Button>
 376 | 												</PopoverTrigger>
 377 | 												<PopoverContent className='w-auto p-0'>
 378 | 													<Calendar
 379 | 														mode='single'
 380 | 														onSelect={date => date && field.handleChange(date)}
 381 | 														selected={field.state.value}
 382 | 													/>
 383 | 												</PopoverContent>
 384 | 											</Popover>
 385 | 										)}
 386 | 									</form.AppField>
 387 | 								</div>
 388 | 
 389 | 								<FormTextField
 390 | 									disabled={readOnly}
 391 | 									label='Receipt Number'
 392 | 									name='receiptNumber'
 393 | 									placeholder='INV-0001'
 394 | 								/>
 395 | 
 396 | 								<FormSelectField
 397 | 									disabled={readOnly}
 398 | 									label='Payment Status'
 399 | 									name='status'
 400 | 									options={[
 401 | 										{ value: "PAID", label: "Paid" },
 402 | 										{ value: "PARTIAL", label: "Partial" },
 403 | 										{ value: "PENDING", label: "Pending" },
 404 | 										{ value: "REFUNDED", label: "Refunded" }
 405 | 									]}
 406 | 								/>
 407 | 							</div>
 408 | 
 409 | 							{/* Amount Summary */}
 410 | 							<div className='rounded-lg bg-muted p-4'>
 411 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 412 | 									<div className='flex justify-between'>
 413 | 										<span className='text-muted-foreground'>Subtotal:</span>
 414 | 										<span>{formatCurrency(formValues.amount)}</span>
 415 | 									</div>
 416 | 									{formValues.discount > 0 && (
 417 | 										<div className='flex justify-between text-green-600'>
 418 | 											<span>Discount ({formValues.discount}%):</span>
 419 | 											<span>
 420 | 												-{formatCurrency(formValues.amount * (formValues.discount / 100))}
 421 | 											</span>
 422 | 										</div>
 423 | 									)}
 424 | 									<Separator />
 425 | 									<div className='flex justify-between font-bold text-lg'>
 426 | 										<span>Total:</span>
 427 | 										<span>{formatCurrency(finalAmount)}</span>
 428 | 									</div>
 429 | 								</div>
 430 | 							</div>
 431 | 						</div>
 432 | 
 433 | 						{/* Insurance Information (conditional) */}
 434 | 						{formValues.paymentMethod === "CASH" && (
 435 | 							<div className='space-y-4'>
 436 | 								<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 437 | 									<Wallet className='h-5 w-5' />
 438 | 									Insurance Information
 439 | 								</h3>
 440 | 								<Separator />
 441 | 								<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2'>
 442 | 									<FormTextField
 443 | 										disabled={readOnly}
 444 | 										label='Insurance Provider'
 445 | 										name='insurance'
 446 | 										placeholder='e.g., Blue Cross, Medicare'
 447 | 									/>
 448 | 									<FormTextField
 449 | 										disabled={readOnly}
 450 | 										label='Insurance ID / Policy Number'
 451 | 										name='insuranceId'
 452 | 										placeholder='Policy number'
 453 | 									/>
 454 | 								</div>
 455 | 							</div>
 456 | 						)}
 457 | 
 458 | 						{/* Receipt Settings */}
 459 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 460 | 							<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 461 | 								<Printer className='h-5 w-5' />
 462 | 								Receipt Settings
 463 | 							</h3>
 464 | 							<Separator />
 465 | 						</div>
 466 | 
 467 | 						{/* Notes */}
 468 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 469 | 							<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 470 | 								<FileText className='h-5 w-5' />
 471 | 								Additional Notes
 472 | 							</h3>
 473 | 							<Separator />
 474 | 							<FormTextareaField
 475 | 								disabled={readOnly}
 476 | 								label='Notes'
 477 | 								name='notes'
 478 | 								placeholder='Any additional notes about this payment...'
 479 | 								rows={3}
 480 | 							/>
 481 | 						</div>
 482 | 
 483 | 						{/* Status Display */}
 484 | 						{initialData?.status && (
 485 | 							<div className='flex items-center gap-2 rounded-lg bg-muted p-3'>
 486 | 								<span className='font-medium text-sm'>Payment Status:</span>
 487 | 								<Badge
 488 | 									className={cn(
 489 | 										initialData.status === "PAID" && "bg-green-500",
 490 | 										initialData.status === "PARTIAL" && "bg-yellow-500",
 491 | 										initialData.status === "UNPAID" && "bg-blue-500",
 492 | 										initialData.status === "REFUNDED" && "bg-red-500"
 493 | 									)}
 494 | 								>
 495 | 									{initialData.status}
 496 | 								</Badge>
 497 | 							</div>
 498 | 						)}
 499 | 
 500 | 						{/* Actions */}
 501 | 						<Separator />
 502 | 						<div className='flex justify-end gap-4'>
 503 | 							{onCancel && (
 504 | 								<Button
 505 | 									disabled={isCreatePending || isReceiptPending}
 506 | 									onClick={onCancel}
 507 | 									type='button'
 508 | 									variant='outline'
 509 | 								>
 510 | 									Cancel
 511 | 								</Button>
 512 | 							)}
 513 | 							{!readOnly && (
 514 | 								<form.SubmitButton
 515 | 									className='min-w-30'
 516 | 									disabled={isCreatePending}
 517 | 								>
 518 | 									{isCreatePending ? "Processing..." : "Process Payment"}
 519 | 								</form.SubmitButton>
 520 | 							)}
 521 | 						</div>
 522 | 					</form.Form>
 523 | 				</form.AppForm>
 524 | 			</CardContent>
 525 | 		</Card>
 526 | 	);
 527 | }
 528 | 
 529 | // Quick payment form for checkout
 530 | type QuickPaymentFormProps = {
 531 | 	amount: number;
 532 | 	patientId: string;
 533 | 	appointmentId?: string;
 534 | 	onSuccess?: () => void;
 535 | 	onCancel?: () => void;
 536 | };
 537 | 
 538 | export function QuickPaymentForm({ amount, patientId, appointmentId, onSuccess, onCancel }: QuickPaymentFormProps) {
 539 | 	return (
 540 | 		<PaymentForm
 541 | 			initialData={{ amount, patientId, appointmentId }}
 542 | 			onCancel={onCancel}
 543 | 			onSuccess={onSuccess}
 544 | 		/>
 545 | 	);
 546 | }
 547 | 
 548 | // Invoice Form
 549 | const invoiceFormSchema = z.object({
 550 | 	patientId: z.string().min(1, "Please select a patient"),
 551 | 	appointmentIds: z.array(z.string()).min(1, "Select at least one appointment"),
 552 | 	invoiceDate: z.date(),
 553 | 	dueDate: z.date(),
 554 | 	notes: z.string().optional(),
 555 | 	applyDiscount: z.boolean().default(false),
 556 | 	discountPercentage: z.number().min(0).max(100).default(0),
 557 | 	discountAmount: z.number().min(0).default(0),
 558 | 	taxRate: z.number().min(0).max(100).default(0),
 559 | 	sendToPatient: z.boolean().default(true)
 560 | });
 561 | 
 562 | type InvoiceFormValues = z.infer<typeof invoiceFormSchema>;
 563 | 
 564 | type InvoiceFormProps = {
 565 | 	patientId?: string;
 566 | 	onCancel?: () => void;
 567 | 	onSuccess?: () => void;
 568 | };
 569 | 
 570 | export function InvoiceForm({ patientId: presetPatientId, onSuccess, onCancel }: InvoiceFormProps) {
 571 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
 572 | 
 573 | 	// Fetch patient
 574 | 	const { data: patientData, isLoading: patientLoading } = useQuery({
 575 | 		...orpc.patient.getById.queryOptions({
 576 | 			input: { id: presetPatientId ?? "" }
 577 | 		}),
 578 | 		enabled: !!presetPatientId
 579 | 	});
 580 | 
 581 | 	// Fetch unpaid appointments for patient
 582 | 	const { data: appointmentsData, isLoading: appointmentsLoading } = useQuery({
 583 | 		...orpc.appointment.list.queryOptions({
 584 | 			input: {
 585 | 				page: 1,
 586 | 				limit: 100,
 587 | 				patientId: patientData?.id,
 588 | 				status: "COMPLETED"
 589 | 			}
 590 | 		}),
 591 | 		enabled: !!patientData?.id
 592 | 	});
 593 | 
 594 | 	// Create invoice mutation
 595 | 	const { mutate: createInvoice, isPending } = useMutation(
 596 | 		orpc.payment.createInvoice.mutationOptions({
 597 | 			onSuccess: () => {
 598 | 				toast.success("Invoice created successfully");
 599 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ["billing"] });
 600 | 				onSuccess?.();
 601 | 			},
 602 | 			onError: (error: Error) => {
 603 | 				toast.error(error.message || "Failed to create invoice");
 604 | 			}
 605 | 		})
 606 | 	);
 607 | 
 608 | 	const form = useAppForm({
 609 | 		defaultValues: {
 610 | 			patientId: presetPatientId ?? "",
 611 | 			appointmentIds: [] as string[],
 612 | 			invoiceDate: new Date(),
 613 | 			dueDate: new Date(Date.now() + 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000),
 614 | 			notes: "",
 615 | 			applyDiscount: false,
 616 | 			discountPercentage: 0,
 617 | 			discountAmount: 0,
 618 | 			taxRate: 0,
 619 | 			sendToPatient: true
 620 | 		} satisfies InvoiceFormValues,
 621 | 		validators: {},
 622 | 		onSubmit: async ({ value }) => {
 623 | 			createInvoice({
 624 | 				patientId: value.patientId,
 625 | 				appointmentId: value.appointmentIds[0] || "",
 626 | 				dueDate: value.dueDate,
 627 | 				notes: value.notes,
 628 | 				items: selectedAppointments.map(
 629 | 					(a: { appointmentDate: string | number | Date; appointmentPrice: number }) => ({
 630 | 						serviceId: "GENERAL", // Default or derived service ID
 631 | 						description: `Appointment on ${format(new Date(a.appointmentDate), "PPP")}`,
 632 | 						quantity: 1,
 633 | 						unitPrice: a.appointmentPrice ?? 0
 634 | 					})
 635 | 				)
 636 | 			});
 637 | 		}
 638 | 	});
 639 | 
 640 | 	const formValues = useSelector(form.store, s => s.values);
 641 | 
 642 | 	// Calculate totals
 643 | 	const selectedAppointments =
 644 | 		appointmentsData?.appointments?.filter((a: { id: string }) => formValues.appointmentIds.includes(a.id)) ?? [];
 645 | 
 646 | 	const subtotal = selectedAppointments.reduce(
 647 | 		(sum: number, a: { appointmentPrice: number }) => sum + (a.appointmentPrice ?? 0),
 648 | 		0
 649 | 	);
 650 | 
 651 | 	const discountValue = formValues.applyDiscount
 652 | 		? formValues.discountAmount > 0
 653 | 			? formValues.discountAmount
 654 | 			: subtotal * (formValues.discountPercentage / 100)
 655 | 		: 0;
 656 | 
 657 | 	const taxAmount = (subtotal - discountValue) * (formValues.taxRate / 100);
 658 | 	const total = subtotal - discountValue + taxAmount;
 659 | 
 660 | 	const formatCurrency = (amount: number) => {
 661 | 		return new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
 662 | 			style: "currency",
 663 | 			currency: "USD"
 664 | 		}).format(amount);
 665 | 	};
 666 | 
 667 | 	const { FormSelectField, FormTextareaField, FormSwitchField, FormTextField } = useFormFields<InvoiceFormValues>();
 668 | 
 669 | 	return (
 670 | 		<Card className='mx-auto w-full max-w-4xl'>
 671 | 			<CardHeader>
 672 | 				<CardTitle className='flex items-center gap-2 font-bold text-2xl'>
 673 | 					<FileText className='h-6 w-6' />
 674 | 					Create Invoice
 675 | 				</CardTitle>
 676 | 				<p className='text-muted-foreground'>Generate an invoice for patient appointments</p>
 677 | 			</CardHeader>
 678 | 			<CardContent>
 679 | 				<form.AppForm>
 680 | 					<form.Form className='space-y-6'>
 681 | 						{/* Patient Information */}
 682 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 683 | 							<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 684 | 								<User className='h-5 w-5' />
 685 | 								Patient Information
 686 | 							</h3>
 687 | 							<Separator />
 688 | 							{patientLoading ? (
 689 | 								<div>Loading patient information...</div>
 690 | 							) : patientData ? (
 691 | 								<div className='rounded-lg bg-muted p-4'>
 692 | 									<div className='grid grid-cols-2 gap-4'>
 693 | 										<div>
 694 | 											<div className='font-medium text-sm'>Patient Name</div>
 695 | 											<div>
 696 | 												{patientData.firstName} {patientData.lastName}
 697 | 											</div>
 698 | 										</div>
 699 | 										<div>
 700 | 											<div className='font-medium text-sm'>Email</div>
 701 | 											<div>{patientData.email || "Not provided"}</div>
 702 | 										</div>
 703 | 										<div>
 704 | 											<div className='font-medium text-sm'>Phone</div>
 705 | 											<div>{patientData.phone || "Not provided"}</div>
 706 | 										</div>
 707 | 										<div>
 708 | 											<div className='font-medium text-sm'>MRN</div>
 709 | 											<div>{patientData.mrn || "Not assigned"}</div>
 710 | 										</div>
 711 | 									</div>
 712 | 								</div>
 713 | 							) : (
 714 | 								<FormSelectField
 715 | 									label='Patient'
 716 | 									name='patientId'
 717 | 									options={[]}
 718 | 									placeholder='Select patient'
 719 | 									required
 720 | 								/>
 721 | 							)}
 722 | 						</div>
 723 |

 729 | 							</h3>

 735 | 										{field => (

 739 | 														className={cn(

 741 | 															!field.state.value && "text-muted-foreground"
 742 | 														)}

 744 | 													>
 745 | 														<CalendarIcon className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 746 | 														{field.state.value
 747 | 															? format(field.state.value, "PPP")
 748 | 															: "Select date"}
 749 | 													</Button>
 750 | 												</PopoverTrigger>
 751 | 												<PopoverContent className='w-auto p-0'>
 752 | 													<Calendar
 753 | 														mode='single'
 754 | 														onSelect={date => date && field.handleChange(date)}
 755 | 														selected={field.state.value}
 756 | 													/>
 757 | 												</PopoverContent>
 758 | 											</Popover>
 759 | 										)}
 760 | 									</form.AppField>
 761 | 								</div>
 762 | 
 763 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 764 | 									<Label>Due Date *</Label>

 766 | 										{field => (
 767 | 											<Popover>
 768 | 												<PopoverTrigger asChild>
 769 | 													<Button
 770 | 														className={cn(
 771 | 															"w-full justify-start text-left font-normal",
 772 | 															!field.state.value && "text-muted-foreground"
 773 | 														)}
 774 | 														variant='outline'
 775 | 													>
 776 | 														<CalendarIcon className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 777 | 														{field.state.value
 778 | 															? format(field.state.value, "PPP")
 779 | 															: "Select date"}

 788 | 													/>
 789 | 												</PopoverContent>
 790 | 											</Popover>
 791 | 										)}

 800 | 								<Receipt className='h-5 w-5' />
 801 | 								Appointments to Invoice
 802 | 							</h3>
 803 | 							<Separator />
 804 | 
 805 | 							{appointmentsLoading ? (
 806 | 								<div>Loading appointments...</div>
 807 | 							) : (
 808 | 								<form.AppField name='appointmentIds'>
 809 | 									{field => {
 810 | 										const selectedIds = field.state.value || [];
 811 | 										const appointments = appointmentsData?.appointments ?? [];
 812 | 
 813 | 										if (appointments.length === 0) {
 814 | 											return (
 815 | 												<div className='py-8 text-center text-muted-foreground'>
 816 | 													<Receipt className='mx-auto mb-2 h-12 w-12 opacity-50' />
 817 | 													<p>No unpaid appointments found for this patient</p>
 818 | 												</div>
 819 | 											);
 820 | 										}
 821 | 
 822 | 										return (
 823 | 											<div className='space-y-3'>
 824 | 												{appointments.map(
 825 | 													(appointment: {
 826 | 														id: string | undefined;
 827 | 														appointmentDate: Date;
 828 | 														doctor: { name: string };
 829 | 														type: string | AppointmentTypeEnum;
 830 | 														appointmentPrice: Decimal | number;

 833 | 															className={cn(
 834 | 																"flex cursor-pointer items-center justify-between rounded-lg border p-4 transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary",
 835 | 																selectedIds.includes(appointment.id ?? "")
 836 | 																	? "border-primary bg-primary/5"
 837 | 																	: "hover:bg-muted/50"
 838 | 															)}
 839 | 															key={appointment.id}
 840 | 															onClick={() => {
 841 | 																if (selectedIds.includes(appointment.id ?? "")) {
 842 | 																	field.handleChange(
 843 | 																		selectedIds.filter(
 844 | 																			(id: string) => id !== appointment.id
 845 | 																		)
 846 | 																	);
 847 | 																} else {
 848 | 																	field.handleChange([
 849 | 																		...selectedIds,
 850 | 																		appointment.id ?? ""
 851 | 																	]);
 852 | 																}
 853 | 															}}
 854 | 															onKeyDown={e => {
 855 | 																if (e.key === "Enter" || e.key === " ") {
 856 | 																	e.preventDefault();
 857 | 																	if (selectedIds.includes(appointment.id ?? "")) {
 858 | 																		field.handleChange(
 859 | 																			selectedIds.filter(
 860 | 																				(id: string) => id !== appointment.id
 861 | 																			)
 862 | 																		);
 863 | 																	} else {
 864 | 																		field.handleChange([
 865 | 																			...(selectedIds ?? ""),
 866 | 																			appointment.id ?? ""
 867 | 																		]);
 868 | 																	}
 869 | 																}
 870 | 															}}
 871 | 															type='button'
 872 | 														>
 873 | 															<div>
 874 | 																<div className='font-medium'>
 875 | 																	{format(
 876 | 																		new Date(appointment.appointmentDate),
 877 | 																		"PPP"
 878 | 																	)}
 879 | 																</div>
 880 | 																<div className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>
 881 | 																	Dr. {appointment.doctor?.name} - {appointment.type}
 882 | 																</div>
 883 | 															</div>
 884 | 															<div className='font-semibold'>
 885 | 																{formatCurrency(
 886 | 																	toNumber(appointment.appointmentPrice) ?? 0
 887 | 																)}
 888 | 															</div>
 889 | 														</button>
 890 | 													)
 891 | 												)}
 892 | 											</div>
 893 | 										);
 894 | 									}}
 895 | 								</form.AppField>
 896 | 							)}
 897 | 						</div>
 898 | 
 899 | 						{/* Discount & Tax */}

 903 | 								Discount & Tax
 904 | 							</h3>
 905 | 							<Separator />
 906 |

 909 | 								name='applyDiscount'
 910 | 							/>
 911 | 
 912 | 							{formValues.applyDiscount && (

 915 | 										label='Discount Percentage (%)'

 917 | 										min={0}

 923 | 										label='Discount Amount'
 924 | 										min={0}
 925 | 										name='discountAmount'
 926 | 										step={0.01}
 927 | 										type='number'
 928 | 									/>
 929 | 								</div>
 930 | 							)}
 931 | 
 932 | 							<FormTextField
 933 | 								label='Tax Rate (%)'
 934 | 								max={100}
 935 | 								min={0}
 936 | 								name='taxRate'
 937 | 								step={0.1}
 938 | 								type='number'
 939 | 							/>
 940 | 						</div>
 941 | 
 942 | 						{/* Invoice Summary */}
 943 | 						{formValues.appointmentIds.length > 0 && (
 944 | 							<div className='space-y-4'>
 945 | 								<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 946 | 									<DollarSign className='h-5 w-5' />
 947 | 									Invoice Summary
 948 | 								</h3>
 949 | 								<Separator />
 950 | 								<div className='rounded-lg bg-muted p-4'>
 951 | 									<div className='space-y-2'>
 952 | 										<div className='flex justify-between'>
 953 | 											<span className='text-muted-foreground'>Subtotal:</span>
 954 | 											<span>{formatCurrency(subtotal)}</span>
 955 | 										</div>
 956 | 										{discountValue > 0 && (
 957 | 											<div className='flex justify-between text-green-600'>
 958 | 												<span>Discount:</span>
 959 | 												<span>-{formatCurrency(discountValue)}</span>
 960 | 											</div>
 961 | 										)}
 962 | 										{formValues.taxRate > 0 && (
 963 | 											<div className='flex justify-between'>

 965 | 													Tax ({formValues.taxRate}%):
 966 | 												</span>

 982 | 							label='Invoice Notes'

 985 | 							rows={3}
 986 | 						/>
 987 |

1000 | 									disabled={isPending}
1001 | 									onClick={onCancel}
1002 | 									type='button'
1003 | 									variant='outline'
1004 | 								>
1005 | 									Cancel
1006 | 								</Button>
1007 | 							)}

1009 | 								{isPending ? "Creating..." : "Create Invoice"}
1010 | 							</form.SubmitButton>
1011 | 						</div>
1012 | 					</form.Form>
1013 | 				</form.AppForm>
1014 | 			</CardContent>
1015 | 		</Card>
1016 | 	);
1017 | }
1018 | 
1019 | // Receipt Viewer Component
1020 | type ReceiptViewerProps = {
1021 | 	paymentId: string;
1022 | 	onClose?: () => void;
1023 | };
1024 | 
1025 | export function ReceiptViewer({ paymentId, onClose: _onClose }: ReceiptViewerProps) {
1026 | 	const { data: payment, isLoading } = useQuery({
1027 | 		queryKey: ["payment", paymentId],
1028 | 		queryFn: async () => {
1029 | 			const response = await fetch(`/api/payments/${paymentId}`);
1030 | 			if (!response.ok) throw new Error("Failed to fetch payment");
1031 | 			return response.json();
1032 | 		}
1033 | 	});
1034 | 
1035 | 	if (isLoading) {
1036 | 		return (
1037 | 			<Card>
1038 | 				<CardContent className='py-8 text-center'>Loading receipt...</CardContent>
1039 | 			</Card>
1040 | 		);
1041 | 	}
1042 | 
1043 | 	if (!payment) {
1044 | 		return (
1045 | 			<Card>
1046 | 				<CardContent className='py-8 text-center text-red-500'>Payment not found</CardContent>
1047 | 			</Card>
1048 | 		);
1049 | 	}
1050 | 
1051 | 	const formatCurrency = (amount: number) => {
1052 | 		return new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
1053 | 			style: "currency",
1054 | 			currency: "USD"
1055 | 		}).format(amount);
1056 | 	};
1057 | 
1058 | 	return (
1059 | 		<Card className='mx-auto max-w-2xl'>
1060 | 			<CardHeader className='text-center'>
1061 | 				<CardTitle className='font-bold text-2xl'>Payment Receipt</CardTitle>
1062 | 				<p className='text-muted-foreground'>Receipt #{payment.receiptNumber}</p>
1063 | 			</CardHeader>
1064 | 			<CardContent className='space-y-6'>
1065 | 				<div className='flex justify-between border-b pb-4'>
1066 | 					<div>
1067 | 						<p className='font-medium'>Patient:</p>
1068 | 						<p>
1069 | 							{payment.patient?.firstName} {payment.patient?.lastName}
1070 | 						</p>
1071 | 					</div>
1072 | 					<div className='text-right'>
1073 | 						<p className='font-medium'>Date:</p>
1074 | 						<p>{format(new Date(payment.paymentDate), "PPP")}</p>
1075 | 					</div>
1076 | 				</div>
1077 | 
1078 | 				<div className='space-y-2'>
1079 | 					<div className='flex justify-between'>
1080 | 						<span>Amount Paid:</span>
1081 | 						<span className='font-bold'>{formatCurrency(payment.amountPaid ?? payment.amount)}</span>
1082 | 					</div>
1083 | 					{payment.discount > 0 && (
1084 | 						<div className='flex justify-between text-green-600'>
1085 | 							<span>Discount:</span>
1086 | 							<span>-{formatCurrency(payment.discount)}</span>
1087 | 						</div>
1088 | 					)}
1089 | 					<div className='flex justify-between'>
1090 | 						<span>Payment Method:</span>
1091 | 						<span className='capitalize'>{payment.paymentMethod?.toLowerCase()}</span>
1092 | 					</div>
1093 | 					<div className='flex justify-between'>
1094 | 						<span>Status:</span>
1095 | 						<Badge
1096 | 							className={cn(
1097 | 								payment.status === "PAID" && "bg-green-500",
1098 | 								payment.status === "PARTIAL" && "bg-yellow-500"
1099 | 							)}
1100 | 						>
1101 | 							{payment.status}
1102 | 						</Badge>
1103 | 					</div>
1104 | 				</div>
1105 | 
1106 | 				{payment.notes && (
1107 | 					<>
1108 | 						<Separator />
1109 | 						<div>
1110 | 							<p className='font-medium'>Notes:</p>
1111 | 							<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>{payment.notes}</p>
1112 | 						</div>
1113 | 					</>
1114 | 				)}
1115 | 
1116 | 				<Separator />
1117 | 				<div className='text-center text-muted-foreground text-sm'>
1118 | 					<p>Thank you for your payment!</p>
1119 | 					<p>For questions, please contact the clinic.</p>
1120 | 				</div>
1121 | 			</CardContent>
1122 | 		</Card>
1123 | 	);
1124 | }
```

`components/billing/columns.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { DataTableColumnHeader } from "@clinic/ui/components/data-table/DataTableColumnHeader";
   2 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
   3 | import { Checkbox } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/checkbox";
   4 | import type { ColumnDef } from "@tanstack/react-table";
   5 | import { format } from "date-fns";
   6 | 
   7 | export interface BillingTransaction {
   8 | 	id: string;
   9 | 	patientId: string;
  10 | 	patientName: string;
  11 | 	amount: number;
  12 | 	date: Date;
  13 | 	type: "INVOICE" | "PAYMENT";
  14 | 	status: "PAID" | "PENDING" | "OVERDUE" | "CANCELLED";
  15 | 	description?: string;
  16 | }
  17 | 
  18 | const getStatusVariant = (status: BillingTransaction["status"]) => {
  19 | 	switch (status) {
  20 | 		case "PAID":
  21 | 			return "default";
  22 | 		case "PENDING":
  23 | 			return "secondary";
  24 | 		case "OVERDUE":
  25 | 			return "destructive";
  26 | 		case "CANCELLED":
  27 | 			return "outline";
  28 | 		default:
  29 | 			return "secondary";
  30 | 	}
  31 | };
  32 | 
  33 | export const columns: ColumnDef<BillingTransaction>[] = [
  34 | 	{
  35 | 		id: "select",
  36 | 		header: ({ table }) => (
  37 | 			<Checkbox
  38 | 				aria-label='Select all'
  39 | 				checked={table.getIsAllPageRowsSelected() || (table.getIsSomePageRowsSelected() && "indeterminate")}
  40 | 				onCheckedChange={value => table.toggleAllPageRowsSelected(!!value)}
  41 | 			/>
  42 | 		),
  43 | 		cell: ({ row }) => (
  44 | 			<Checkbox
  45 | 				aria-label='Select row'
  46 | 				checked={row.getIsSelected()}
  47 | 				onCheckedChange={value => row.toggleSelected(!!value)}
  48 | 			/>
  49 | 		),
  50 | 		enableSorting: false,
  51 | 		enableHiding: false
  52 | 	},
  53 | 	{
  54 | 		accessorKey: "date",
  55 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
  56 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
  57 | 				column={column}
  58 | 				title='Date'
  59 | 			/>
  60 | 		),
  61 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
  62 | 			const date = new Date(row.getValue("date"));
  63 | 			return <div className='font-medium'>{format(date, "MMM dd, yyyy")}</div>;
  64 | 		}
  65 | 	},
  66 | 	{
  67 | 		accessorKey: "patientName",
  68 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
  69 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
  70 | 				column={column}
  71 | 				title='Patient'
  72 | 			/>
  73 | 		),
  74 | 		cell: ({ row }) => <div className='font-medium'>{row.getValue("patientName")}</div>
  75 | 	},
  76 | 	{
  77 | 		accessorKey: "type",
  78 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
  79 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
  80 | 				column={column}
  81 | 				title='Type'
  82 | 			/>
  83 | 		),
  84 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
  85 | 			const type = row.getValue("type") as string;
  86 | 			return (
  87 | 				<Badge
  88 | 					className='capitalize'
  89 | 					variant='outline'
  90 | 				>
  91 | 					{type.toLowerCase()}
  92 | 				</Badge>
  93 | 			);
  94 | 		}
  95 | 	},
  96 | 	{
  97 | 		accessorKey: "amount",
  98 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
  99 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
 100 | 				column={column}
 101 | 				title='Amount'
 102 | 			/>
 103 | 		),
 104 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 105 | 			const amount = Number.parseFloat(row.getValue("amount"));
 106 | 			const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
 107 | 				style: "currency",
 108 | 				currency: "USD"
 109 | 			}).format(amount);
 110 | 			return <div className='font-medium'>{formatted}</div>;
 111 | 		}
 112 | 	},
 113 | 	{
 114 | 		accessorKey: "status",
 115 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
 116 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
 117 | 				column={column}
 118 | 				title='Status'
 119 | 			/>
 120 | 		),
 121 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 122 | 			const status = row.getValue("status") as BillingTransaction["status"];
 123 | 			return <Badge variant={getStatusVariant(status)}>{status.charAt(0) + status.slice(1).toLowerCase()}</Badge>;
 124 | 		}
 125 | 	}
 126 | ];

```

`components/date-range-picker.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/reports/date-range-picker.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   4 | import { Calendar } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/calendar";
   5 | import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/popover";
   6 | import { format } from "date-fns";
   7 | import { CalendarIcon } from "lucide-react";
   8 | import { useState } from "react";
   9 | import type { DateRange } from "react-day-picker";
  10 | 
  11 | interface DateRangePickerProps {
  12 | 	value?: DateRange;
  13 | 	onChange?: (range: DateRange | undefined) => void;
  14 | 	dateRange?: { from: Date; to: Date };
  15 | 	setDateRange?: (range: { from: Date; to: Date }) => void;
  16 | }
  17 | 
  18 | export function DateRangePicker({ value, onChange, dateRange, setDateRange }: DateRangePickerProps) {
  19 | 	// Support both prop patterns
  20 | 	const externalFrom = value?.from || dateRange?.from;
  21 | 	const externalTo = value?.to || dateRange?.to;
  22 | 
  23 | 	const [tempDate, setTempDate] = useState<DateRange | undefined>({
  24 | 		from: externalFrom,
  25 | 		to: externalTo
  26 | 	});
  27 | 
  28 | 	const handleApply = () => {
  29 | 		if (tempDate?.from && tempDate?.to) {
  30 | 			if (onChange) {
  31 | 				onChange(tempDate);
  32 | 			} else if (setDateRange) {
  33 | 				setDateRange({ from: tempDate.from, to: tempDate.to });
  34 | 			}
  35 | 		}
  36 | 	};
  37 | 
  38 | 	const handleCancel = () => {
  39 | 		setTempDate({
  40 | 			from: externalFrom,
  41 | 			to: externalTo
  42 | 		});
  43 | 	};
  44 | 
  45 | 	const presets = [
  46 | 		{ label: "Last 7 days", days: 7 },
  47 | 		{ label: "Last 30 days", days: 30 },
  48 | 		{ label: "Last 90 days", days: 90 },
  49 | 		{ label: "Last 12 months", days: 365 }
  50 | 	];
  51 | 
  52 | 	const displayFrom = externalFrom || new Date();
  53 | 	const displayTo = externalTo || new Date();
  54 | 
  55 | 	return (
  56 | 		<Popover>
  57 | 			<PopoverTrigger asChild>
  58 | 				<Button
  59 | 					className='gap-2'
  60 | 					variant='outline'
  61 | 				>
  62 | 					<CalendarIcon className='h-4 w-4' />
  63 | 					{format(displayFrom, "MMM d, yyyy")} - {format(displayTo, "MMM d, yyyy")}
  64 | 				</Button>
  65 | 			</PopoverTrigger>
  66 | 			<PopoverContent
  67 | 				align='start'
  68 | 				className='w-auto p-0'
  69 | 			>
  70 | 				<div className='flex'>
  71 | 					<div className='border-r p-3'>
  72 | 						<p className='mb-2 font-medium text-sm'>Quick Select</p>
  73 | 						<div className='flex flex-col gap-1'>
  74 | 							{presets.map(preset => (
  75 | 								<Button
  76 | 									className='justify-start'
  77 | 									key={preset.days}
  78 | 									onClick={() => {
  79 | 										const to = new Date();
  80 | 										const from = new Date();
  81 | 										from.setDate(from.getDate() - preset.days);
  82 | 										const newRange = { from, to };
  83 | 										setTempDate(newRange);
  84 | 										if (onChange) {
  85 | 											onChange(newRange);
  86 | 										} else if (setDateRange) {
  87 | 											setDateRange({ from: newRange.from, to: newRange.to });
  88 | 										}
  89 | 									}}
  90 | 									size='sm'
  91 | 									variant='ghost'
  92 | 								>
  93 | 									{preset.label}
  94 | 								</Button>
  95 | 							))}
  96 | 						</div>
  97 | 					</div>
  98 | 					<div className='p-3'>
  99 | 						<Calendar
 100 | 							mode='range'
 101 | 							numberOfMonths={2}
 102 | 							onSelect={setTempDate}
 103 | 							selected={tempDate}
 104 | 						/>
 105 | 						<div className='mt-3 flex justify-end gap-2'>
 106 | 							<Button
 107 | 								onClick={handleCancel}
 108 | 								size='sm'
 109 | 								variant='outline'
 110 | 							>
 111 | 								Cancel
 112 | 							</Button>
 113 | 							<Button
 114 | 								onClick={handleApply}
 115 | 								size='sm'
 116 | 							>
 117 | 								Apply
 118 | 							</Button>
 119 | 						</div>
 120 | 					</div>
 121 | 				</div>
 122 | 			</PopoverContent>
 123 | 		</Popover>
 124 | 	);
 125 | }

```

```tsx
  21 | import { orpc } from "@/utils/orpc";
  22 | 
  23 | // Doctor specialties for dropdown
  24 | const doctorSpecialties = [
  25 | 	{ value: "Pediatrician", label: "Pediatrician" },
  26 | 	{ value: "Cardiologist", label: "Cardiologist" },

  42 | 	{ value: "INACTIVE", label: "Inactive" },
  43 | 	{ value: "PENDING", label: "Pending" },
  44 | 	{ value: "SUSPENDED", label: "Suspended" }
  45 | ];
  46 | 
  47 | // Doctor Form Schema
  48 | const doctorFormSchema = z.object({
  49 | 	id: z.string().optional(),
  50 | 	name: z.string().min(1, "Doctor name is required"),
  51 | 	email: z.email("Invalid email address").min(1, "Email is required"),
  52 | 	phone: z.string().optional(),
  53 | 	specialty: z.string().min(1, "Please select a specialty"),
  54 | 	status: z.enum(["ACTIVE", "INACTIVE", "PENDING", "SUSPENDED"]).default("PENDING"),
  55 | 	isActive: z.boolean().default(true),
  56 | 	bio: z.string().optional(),
  57 | 	education: z.string().optional(),
  58 | 	experience: z.string().optional(),
  59 | 	licenseNumber: z.string().optional(),
  60 | 	npiNumber: z.string().optional(),
  61 | 	joiningDate: z.date().optional(),
  62 | 	colorCode: z.string().optional(),
  63 | 	image: z.string().optional(),
  64 | 	address: z.string().optional(),
  65 | 	city: z.string().optional(),
  66 | 	state: z.string().optional(),
  67 | 	zipCode: z.string().optional()
  68 | });
  69 | 
  70 | type DoctorFormValues = z.infer<typeof doctorFormSchema>;
  71 | 
  72 | type DoctorFormProps = {
  73 | 	initialData?: Partial<DoctorFormValues> & { id?: string };
  74 | 	onCancel?: () => void;
  75 | 	onSuccess?: () => void;
  76 | 	readOnly?: boolean;
  77 | };
  78 | 
  79 | export function DoctorForm({ initialData, onSuccess, onCancel, readOnly = false }: DoctorFormProps) {
  80 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
  81 | 	const isEditing = !!initialData?.id;
  82 | 
  83 | 	// Create doctor mutation
  84 | 	const { mutate: createDoctor, isPending: isCreatePending } = useMutation(
  85 | 		orpc.doctor.create.mutationOptions({
  86 | 			onSuccess: () => {
  87 | 				toast.success("Doctor added successfully");
  88 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: orpc.doctor.key() });
  89 | 				onSuccess?.();
  90 | 			},
  91 | 			onError: (error: Error) => {
  92 | 				console.error(error);
  93 | 				toast.error(error.message || "Failed to add doctor");
  94 | 			}
  95 | 		})
  96 | 	);
  97 | 
  98 | 	// Update doctor mutation
  99 | 	const { mutate: updateDoctor, isPending: isUpdatePending } = useMutation(
 100 | 		orpc.doctor.update.mutationOptions({
 101 | 			onSuccess: () => {
 102 | 				toast.success("Doctor updated successfully");
 103 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: orpc.doctor.key() });
 104 | 				onSuccess?.();
 105 | 			},
 106 | 			onError: (error: Error) => {
 107 | 				console.error(error);
 108 | 				toast.error(error.message || "Failed to update doctor");
 109 | 			}
 110 | 		})
 111 | 	);
 112 | 
 113 | 	const isPending = isCreatePending || isUpdatePending;
 114 | 
 115 | 	const form = useAppForm({
 116 | 		defaultValues: {
 117 | 			id: initialData?.id ?? generateId(),
 118 | 			name: initialData?.name ?? "",
 119 | 			email: initialData?.email ?? "",
 120 | 			phone: initialData?.phone ?? "",
 121 | 			specialty: initialData?.specialty ?? "",
 122 | 			status: (initialData?.status as "ACTIVE" | "INACTIVE" | "PENDING" | "SUSPENDED") ?? "PENDING",
 123 | 			isActive: initialData?.isActive ?? true,
 124 | 			bio: initialData?.bio ?? "",
 125 | 			education: initialData?.education ?? "",
 126 | 			experience: initialData?.experience ?? "",
 127 | 			licenseNumber: initialData?.licenseNumber ?? "",
 128 | 			npiNumber: initialData?.npiNumber ?? "",
 129 | 			joiningDate: initialData?.joiningDate ? new Date(initialData.joiningDate) : undefined,
 130 | 			colorCode: initialData?.colorCode ?? "#3b82f6",
 131 | 			image: initialData?.image ?? "",
 132 | 			address: initialData?.address ?? "",
 133 | 			city: initialData?.city ?? "",
 134 | 			state: initialData?.state ?? "",
 135 | 			zipCode: initialData?.zipCode ?? ""
 136 | 		} satisfies DoctorFormValues,
 137 | 		validators: {},
 138 | 		onSubmit: async ({ value }) => {
 139 | 			const doctorCreatePayload: CreateDoctorInput = {
 140 | 				userId: null,
 141 | 				specialty: value.specialty,
 142 | 				department: value.specialty || null,
 143 | 				appointmentPrice: 0,
 144 | 				availableFromTime: "09:00",
 145 | 				availableToTime: "17:00",
 146 | 				isActive: value.status === "ACTIVE",
 147 | 				img: value.image || null,
 148 | 				type: "FULL",
 149 | 				colorCode: value.colorCode || "#3b82f6",
 150 | 				availabilityStatus: "AVAILABLE",
 151 | 				availableFromWeekDay: 1,
 152 | 				availableToWeekDay: 5
 153 | 			};
 154 | 
 155 | 			const doctorUpdatePayload: UpdateDoctorInput = {
 156 | 				id: initialData?.id ?? generateId(),
 157 | 				...doctorCreatePayload,
 158 | 				status: value.status as Status
 159 | 			};
 160 | 
 161 | 			if (isEditing && initialData?.id) {
 162 | 				updateDoctor(doctorUpdatePayload);
 163 | 			} else {
 164 | 				createDoctor(doctorCreatePayload);
 165 | 			}
 166 | 		}
 167 | 	});
 168 | 
 169 | 	const formValues = useSelector(form.store, s => s.values);
 170 | 	const { FormSelectField, FormTextField, FormTextareaField } = useFormFields<DoctorFormValues>();
 171 | 
 172 | 	return (
 173 | 		<Card className='mx-auto w-full max-w-4xl'>
 174 | 			<CardHeader>
 175 | 				<CardTitle className='flex items-center gap-2 font-bold text-2xl'>
 176 | 					<Stethoscope className='h-6 w-6' />
 177 | 					{isEditing ? "Edit Doctor" : "Add New Doctor"}
 178 | 				</CardTitle>
 179 | 				<p className='text-muted-foreground'>
 180 | 					{isEditing
 181 | 						? "Update physician or specialist information"
 182 | 						: "Register a new physician or specialist to the clinic"}
 183 | 				</p>
 184 | 			</CardHeader>
 185 | 			<CardContent>
 186 | 				<form.AppForm>
 187 | 					<form.Form className='space-y-6'>
 188 | 						{/* Basic Information */}
 189 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 190 | 							<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 191 | 								<User className='h-5 w-5' />
 192 | 								Basic Information
 193 | 							</h3>
 194 | 							<Separator />
 195 | 							<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2'>
 196 | 								<FormTextField
 197 | 									disabled={readOnly}
 198 | 									label='Full Name'
 199 | 									name='name'
 200 | 									placeholder='e.g., Dr. Sarah Johnson'
 201 | 									required
 202 | 									validators={{
 203 | 										onBlur: z.string().min(1, "Doctor name is required")
 204 | 									}}
 205 | 								/>
 206 | 
 207 | 								<FormTextField
 208 | 									disabled={readOnly}
 209 | 									label='Email Address'
 210 | 									name='email'
 211 | 									placeholder='doctor@clinic.com'
 212 | 									required
 213 | 									type='email'
 214 | 									validators={{
 215 | 										onBlur: z.email("Invalid email address")
 216 | 									}}
 217 | 								/>
 218 | 
 219 | 								<FormTextField
 220 | 									disabled={readOnly}
 221 | 									label='Phone Number'
 222 | 									name='phone'
 223 | 									placeholder='+1 (555) 123-4567'
 224 | 									type='tel'
 225 | 								/>
 226 |

 228 | 									label='Specialty'

 231 | 									placeholder='Select specialty'

 233 | 									validators={{
 234 | 										onBlur: z.string().min(1, "Please select a specialty")
 235 | 									}}
 236 | 								/>
 237 | 
 238 | 								<FormSelectField
 239 | 									label='Status'
 240 | 									name='status'
 241 | 									options={doctorStatuses}
 242 | 									placeholder='Select status'
 243 | 									required
 244 | 								/>

 246 | 								{/* Color Picker for Calendar */}

 321 | 											</Popover>
 322 | 										)}
 323 | 									</form.AppField>
 324 | 								</div>

 333 | 						</div>

 347 | 									placeholder='Medical school, residency, fellowships...'
 348 | 									rows={2}
 349 | 								/>

 352 | 									disabled={readOnly}

 354 | 									name='bio'
 355 | 									placeholder='Brief biography for patient portal and directory...'
 356 | 									rows={3}
 357 | 								/>
 358 | 							</div>
 359 | 						</div>
 360 | 
 361 | 						{/* Address Information */}
 362 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 363 | 							<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 364 | 								<User className='h-5 w-5' />
 365 | 								Address Information
 366 | 							</h3>
 367 | 							<Separator />
 368 | 							<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2'>
 369 | 								<FormTextField
 370 | 									disabled={readOnly}
 371 | 									label='Address'
 372 | 									name='address'
 373 | 									placeholder='Street address'
 374 | 								/>
 375 | 
 376 | 								<FormTextField
 377 | 									disabled={readOnly}
 378 | 									label='City'
 379 | 									name='city'
 380 | 									placeholder='City'
 381 | 								/>
 382 | 
 383 | 								<FormTextField
 384 | 									disabled={readOnly}
 385 | 									label='State'
 386 | 									name='state'
 387 | 									placeholder='State'
 388 | 								/>
 389 | 
 390 | 								<FormTextField
 391 | 									disabled={readOnly}
 392 | 									label='ZIP Code'
 393 | 									name='zipCode'
 394 | 									placeholder='ZIP code'
 395 | 								/>
 396 | 							</div>
 397 | 						</div>
 398 | 
 399 | 						{/* Status Display for existing doctors */}
 400 | 						{isEditing && initialData?.status && (
 401 | 							<div className='flex items-center gap-2 rounded-lg bg-muted p-3'>
 402 | 								<span className='font-medium text-sm'>Current Status:</span>
 403 | 								<span
 404 | 									className={cn(
 405 | 										"rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 font-medium text-xs",
 406 | 										initialData.status === "ACTIVE" && "bg-green-100 text-green-700",
 407 | 										initialData.status === "INACTIVE" && "bg-gray-100 text-gray-700",
 408 | 										initialData.status === "PENDING" && "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700",
 409 | 										initialData.status === "SUSPENDED" && "bg-red-100 text-red-700"
 410 | 									)}
 411 | 								>
 412 | 									{initialData.status.charAt(0) + initialData.status.slice(1).toLowerCase()}
 413 | 								</span>
 414 | 							</div>
 415 | 						)}
 416 | 
 417 | 						{/* Actions */}
 418 | 						{!readOnly && (
 419 | 							<>
 420 | 								<Separator />
 421 | 								<div className='flex justify-end gap-4'>
 422 | 									{onCancel && (
 423 | 										<Button
 424 | 											disabled={isPending}
 425 | 											onClick={onCancel}
 426 | 											type='button'
 427 | 											variant='outline'
 428 | 										>
 429 | 											Cancel
 430 | 										</Button>
 431 | 									)}
 432 | 									<form.SubmitButton
 433 | 										className='min-w-30'
 434 | 										disabled={isPending}
 435 | 									>
 436 | 										{isPending
 437 | 											? isEditing
 438 | 												? "Updating..."
 439 | 												: "Adding..."
 440 | 											: isEditing
 441 | 												? "Update Doctor"
 442 | 												: "Add Doctor"}
 443 | 									</form.SubmitButton>
 444 | 								</div>
 445 | 							</>
 446 | 						)}
 447 | 					</form.Form>
 448 | 				</form.AppForm>
 449 | 			</CardContent>
 450 | 		</Card>
 451 | 	);
 452 | }
 453 | 
 454 | // Quick doctor registration form for onboarding
 455 | type QuickDoctorFormProps = {
 456 | 	onCancel?: () => void;
 457 | 	onSuccess?: () => void;
 458 | };
 459 | 
 460 | export function QuickDoctorForm({ onSuccess, onCancel }: QuickDoctorFormProps) {
 461 | 	return (
 462 | 		<DoctorForm
 463 | 			onCancel={onCancel}
 464 | 			onSuccess={onSuccess}
 465 | 		/>
 466 | 	);
 467 | }

```

`components/doctors/DoctorsTableRowActions.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/doctors/DoctorsTableRowActions.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   4 | import {
   5 | 	DropdownMenu,
   6 | 	DropdownMenuContent,
   7 | 	DropdownMenuItem,
   8 | 	DropdownMenuSeparator,
   9 | 	DropdownMenuShortcut,
  10 | 	DropdownMenuTrigger
  11 | } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/dropdown-menu";
  12 | import { DotsHorizontalIcon } from "@radix-ui/react-icons";
  13 | import { useMutation, useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
  14 | import { useRouter } from "@tanstack/react-router";
  15 | import type { Row } from "@tanstack/react-table";
  16 | import { toast } from "sonner";
  17 | 
  18 | import { orpc } from "@/utils/orpc";
  19 | 
  20 | import type { Status } from "../../schemas";
  21 | 
  22 | interface DataTableRowActionsProps<TData> {
  23 | 	row: Row<TData>;
  24 | }
  25 | 
  26 | export function DoctorsTableRowActions<TData>({ row }: DataTableRowActionsProps<TData>) {
  27 | 	const router = useRouter();
  28 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
  29 | 	const doctor = row.original as { id: string; name: string; email: string };
  30 | 
  31 | 	const updateDoctorStatus = useMutation(
  32 | 		orpc.doctor.update.mutationOptions({
  33 | 			onSuccess: () => {
  34 | 				toast.success("Doctor status updated successfully");
  35 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: orpc.doctor.key() });
  36 | 				router.invalidate();
  37 | 			},
  38 | 			onError: (error: Error) => {
  39 | 				toast.error(error.message || "Failed to update doctor status");
  40 | 			}
  41 | 		})
  42 | 	);
  43 | 
  44 | 	const deleteDoctor = useMutation(
  45 | 		orpc.doctor.delete.mutationOptions({
  46 | 			onSuccess: () => {
  47 | 				toast.success(`Doctor ${doctor.name} has been removed`);
  48 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: orpc.doctor.key() });
  49 | 				router.invalidate();
  50 | 			},
  51 | 			onError: (error: Error) => {
  52 | 				toast.error(error.message || "Failed to delete doctor");
  53 | 			}
  54 | 		})
  55 | 	);
  56 | 
  57 | 	const handleStatusChange = (status: string, isActive: boolean) => {
  58 | 		updateDoctorStatus.mutate({
  59 | 			id: doctor.id,
  60 | 
  61 | 			status: status as Status,
  62 | 			isActive
  63 | 		});
  64 | 	};
  65 | 
  66 | 	const handleDelete = () => {
  67 | 		if (confirm(`Are you sure you want to delete Dr. ${doctor.name}?`)) {
  68 | 			deleteDoctor.mutate({ id: doctor.id });
  69 | 		}
  70 | 	};
  71 | 
  72 | 	return (
  73 | 		<DropdownMenu>
  74 | 			<DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
  75 | 				<Button
  76 | 					className='flex h-8 w-8 p-0 data-[state=open]:bg-muted'
  77 | 					variant='ghost'
  78 | 				>
  79 | 					<DotsHorizontalIcon className='h-4 w-4' />
  80 | 					<span className='sr-only'>Open menu</span>
  81 | 				</Button>
  82 | 			</DropdownMenuTrigger>
  83 | 			<DropdownMenuContent
  84 | 				align='end'
  85 | 				className='w-[160px]'
  86 | 			>
  87 | 				<DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => router.navigate({ to: `/dashboard/doctors/${doctor.id}` })}>
  88 | 					View details
  89 | 				</DropdownMenuItem>
  90 | 				<DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => router.navigate({ to: `/dashboard/doctors/${doctor.id}/edit` })}>
  91 | 					Edit doctor
  92 | 				</DropdownMenuItem>
  93 | 				<DropdownMenuSeparator />
  94 | 				<DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleStatusChange("ACTIVE", true)}>Set as Active</DropdownMenuItem>
  95 | 				<DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleStatusChange("INACTIVE", false)}>
  96 | 					Set as Inactive
  97 | 				</DropdownMenuItem>
  98 | 				<DropdownMenuItem
  99 | 					className='text-destructive'
 100 | 					onClick={() => handleStatusChange("SUSPENDED", false)}
 101 | 				>
 102 | 					Suspend
 103 | 				</DropdownMenuItem>
 104 | 				<DropdownMenuSeparator />
 105 | 				<DropdownMenuItem
 106 | 					className='text-destructive'
 107 | 					onClick={handleDelete}
 108 | 				>
 109 | 					Delete doctor
 110 | 					<DropdownMenuShortcut>⌘⌫</DropdownMenuShortcut>
 111 | 				</DropdownMenuItem>
 112 | 			</DropdownMenuContent>
 113 | 		</DropdownMenu>
 114 | 	);
 115 | }

```

`components/doctors/columns.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/doctors/columns.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { DataTableColumnHeader } from "@clinic/ui/components/data-table/DataTableColumnHeader";
   4 | import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/avatar";
   5 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
   6 | import { Checkbox } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/checkbox";
   7 | import type { ColumnDef } from "@tanstack/react-table";
   8 | 
   9 | import { DoctorsTableRowActions } from "./DoctorsTableRowActions";
  10 | 
  11 | export interface Doctor {
  12 | 	id: string;
  13 | 	name: string;
  14 | 	email: string;
  15 | 	specialty: string;
  16 | 	isActive: boolean;
  17 | 	status: string;
  18 | 	phone: string;
  19 | 	image?: string;
  20 | 	createdAt: Date;
  21 | 	updatedAt: Date;
  22 | }
  23 | 
  24 | export const doctorColumns: ColumnDef<Doctor>[] = [
  25 | 	{
  26 | 		id: "select",
  27 | 		header: ({ table }) => (
  28 | 			<Checkbox
  29 | 				aria-label='Select all'
  30 | 				checked={table.getIsAllPageRowsSelected() || (table.getIsSomePageRowsSelected() && "indeterminate")}
  31 | 				className='translate-y-[2px]'
  32 | 				onCheckedChange={value => table.toggleAllPageRowsSelected(!!value)}
  33 | 			/>
  34 | 		),
  35 | 		cell: ({ row }) => (
  36 | 			<Checkbox
  37 | 				aria-label='Select row'
  38 | 				checked={row.getIsSelected()}
  39 | 				className='translate-y-[2px]'
  40 | 				onCheckedChange={value => row.toggleSelected(!!value)}
  41 | 			/>
  42 | 		),
  43 | 		enableSorting: false,
  44 | 		enableHiding: false
  45 | 	},
  46 | 	{
  47 | 		id: "doctor",
  48 | 		accessorFn: row => ({
  49 | 			name: row.name,
  50 | 			email: row.email,
  51 | 			image: row.image,
  52 | 			specialty: row.specialty
  53 | 		}),
  54 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
  55 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
  56 | 				column={column}
  57 | 				title='Doctor'
  58 | 			/>
  59 | 		),
  60 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
  61 | 			const doctor = row.original;
  62 | 			const initials = doctor.name
  63 | 				.split(" ")
  64 | 				.map(n => n[0])
  65 | 				.join("")
  66 | 				.toUpperCase()
  67 | 				.slice(0, 2);
  68 | 
  69 | 			return (
  70 | 				<div className='flex items-center gap-3'>
  71 | 					<Avatar className='h-8 w-8'>
  72 | 						{doctor.image && (
  73 | 							<AvatarImage
  74 | 								alt={doctor.name}
  75 | 								src={doctor.image}
  76 | 							/>
  77 | 						)}
  78 | 						<AvatarFallback>{initials}</AvatarFallback>
  79 | 					</Avatar>
  80 | 					<div className='flex flex-col'>
  81 | 						<span className='font-medium'>{doctor.name}</span>
  82 | 						<span className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>{doctor.specialty}</span>
  83 | 					</div>
  84 | 				</div>
  85 | 			);
  86 | 		},
  87 | 		filterFn: (row, _id, value) => {
  88 | 			const doctor = row.original;
  89 | 			return (
  90 | 				doctor.name.toLowerCase().includes(value.toLowerCase()) ||
  91 | 				doctor.specialty.toLowerCase().includes(value.toLowerCase()) ||
  92 | 				doctor.email.toLowerCase().includes(value.toLowerCase())
  93 | 			);
  94 | 		}
  95 | 	},
  96 | 	{
  97 | 		accessorKey: "email",
  98 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
  99 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
 100 | 				column={column}
 101 | 				title='Email'
 102 | 			/>
 103 | 		),
 104 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 105 | 			const email = row.getValue("email") as string;
 106 | 			return <div className='text-muted-foreground'>{email}</div>;
 107 | 		}
 108 | 	},
 109 | 	{
 110 | 		accessorKey: "phone",
 111 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
 112 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
 113 | 				column={column}
 114 | 				title='Phone'
 115 | 			/>
 116 | 		),
 117 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 118 | 			const phone = row.getValue("phone") as string;
 119 | 			return <div>{phone || "—"}</div>;
 120 | 		}
 121 | 	},
 122 | 	{
 123 | 		accessorKey: "status",
 124 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
 125 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
 126 | 				column={column}
 127 | 				title='Status'
 128 | 			/>
 129 | 		),
 130 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 131 | 			const status = row.getValue("status") as string;
 132 | 			const isActive = row.original.isActive;
 133 | 
 134 | 			let variant: "default" | "secondary" | "destructive" | "outline" = "secondary";
 135 | 			let label = status;
 136 | 
 137 | 			if (isActive && status === "ACTIVE") {
 138 | 				variant = "default";
 139 | 				label = "Active";
 140 | 			} else if (status === "INACTIVE") {
 141 | 				variant = "secondary";
 142 | 				label = "Inactive";
 143 | 			} else if (status === "PENDING") {
 144 | 				variant = "outline";
 145 | 				label = "Pending";
 146 | 			} else if (status === "SUSPENDED") {
 147 | 				variant = "destructive";
 148 | 				label = "Suspended";
 149 | 			}
 150 | 
 151 | 			return <Badge variant={variant}>{label}</Badge>;
 152 | 		},
 153 | 		filterFn: (row, id, value) => {
 154 | 			return value.includes(row.getValue(id));
 155 | 		}
 156 | 	},
 157 | 	{
 158 | 		accessorKey: "createdAt",
 159 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
 160 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
 161 | 				column={column}
 162 | 				title='Joined'
 163 | 			/>
 164 | 		),
 165 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 166 | 			const date = new Date(row.getValue("createdAt"));
 167 | 			return <div>{date.toLocaleDateString()}</div>;
 168 | 		}
 169 | 	},
 170 | 	{
 171 | 		id: "actions",
 172 | 		cell: ({ row }) => <DoctorsTableRowActions row={row} />
 173 | 	}
 174 | ];
 175 | 
 176 | // Doctor specialties for filtering
 177 | export const doctorSpecialties = [
 178 | 	{ label: "Pediatrician", value: "Pediatrician" },
 179 | 	{ label: "Cardiologist", value: "Cardiologist" },
 180 | 	{ label: "Neurologist", value: "Neurologist" },
 181 | 	{ label: "Dermatologist", value: "Dermatologist" },
 182 | 	{ label: "Orthopedic", value: "Orthopedic" },
 183 | 	{ label: "ENT", value: "ENT" },
 184 | 	{ label: "Ophthalmologist", value: "Ophthalmologist" },
 185 | 	{ label: "Psychiatrist", value: "Psychiatrist" }
 186 | ];
 187 | 
 188 | export const doctorStatuses = [
 189 | 	{ label: "Active", value: "ACTIVE" },
 190 | 	{ label: "Inactive", value: "INACTIVE" },
 191 | 	{ label: "Pending", value: "PENDING" },
 192 | 	{ label: "Suspended", value: "SUSPENDED" }
 193 | ];
 194 | 
 195 | // Default export alias for routes that import `columns`
 196 | export const columns = doctorColumns;

```

`components/encounters/Encounter.table.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/encounters/EncounterTable.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { DataTable } from "@clinic/ui/components/data-table/DataTable";
   4 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
   5 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   6 | import { Link } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   7 | import type { ColumnDef } from "@tanstack/react-table";
   8 | import { format } from "date-fns";
   9 | import { Eye } from "lucide-react";
  10 | 
  11 | export type Encounter = {
  12 | 	id: string;
  13 | 	patientName: string;
  14 | 	patientId: string;
  15 | 	date: string;
  16 | 	type: string;
  17 | 	diagnosis: string;
  18 | 	status: string;
  19 | 	doctorName?: string;
  20 | };
  21 | 
  22 | const typeLabels: Record<string, string> = {
  23 | 	INITIAL: "Initial",
  24 | 	FOLLOW_UP: "Follow-up",
  25 | 	EMERGENCY: "Emergency",
  26 | 	ROUTINE: "Routine",
  27 | 	CHRONIC: "Chronic",
  28 | 	POST_OP: "Post-op"
  29 | };
  30 | 
  31 | const statusColors: Record<string, string> = {
  32 | 	ACTIVE: "bg-green-500",
  33 | 	COMPLETED: "bg-blue-500",
  34 | 	FOLLOW_UP: "bg-yellow-500",
  35 | 	CANCELLED: "bg-red-500",
  36 | 	PENDING: "bg-orange-500"
  37 | };
  38 | 
  39 | export const encounterColumns: ColumnDef<Encounter>[] = [
  40 | 	{
  41 | 		accessorKey: "patientName",
  42 | 		header: "Patient",
  43 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
  44 | 			const encounter = row.original;
  45 | 			return (
  46 | 				<Link
  47 | 					className='font-medium hover:underline'
  48 | 					params={{ id: encounter.patientId }}
  49 | 					to='/dashboard/patients/$id'
  50 | 				>
  51 | 					{encounter.patientName}
  52 | 				</Link>
  53 | 			);
  54 | 		}
  55 | 	},
  56 | 	{
  57 | 		accessorKey: "date",
  58 | 		header: "Date",
  59 | 		cell: ({ row }) => format(new Date(row.original.date), "PPP")
  60 | 	},
  61 | 	{
  62 | 		accessorKey: "type",
  63 | 		header: "Type",
  64 | 		cell: ({ row }) => typeLabels[row.original.type] || row.original.type
  65 | 	},
  66 | 	{
  67 | 		accessorKey: "diagnosis",
  68 | 		header: "Diagnosis",
  69 | 		cell: ({ row }) => <span className='block max-w-md truncate'>{row.original.diagnosis}</span>
  70 | 	},
  71 | 	{
  72 | 		accessorKey: "doctorName",
  73 | 		header: "Doctor",
  74 | 		cell: ({ row }) => row.original.doctorName || "—"
  75 | 	},
  76 | 	{
  77 | 		accessorKey: "status",
  78 | 		header: "Status",
  79 | 		cell: ({ row }) => (
  80 | 			<Badge className={statusColors[row.original.status] || "bg-gray-500"}>{row.original.status}</Badge>
  81 | 		)
  82 | 	},
  83 | 	{
  84 | 		id: "actions",
  85 | 		cell: ({ row }) => (
  86 | 			<Button
  87 | 				asChild
  88 | 				size='sm'
  89 | 				variant='ghost'
  90 | 			>
  91 | 				<Link
  92 | 					params={{ id: row.original.id }}
  93 | 					to='/dashboard/encounters/$id'
  94 | 				>
  95 | 					<Eye className='h-4 w-4' />
  96 | 				</Link>
  97 | 			</Button>
  98 | 		)
  99 | 	}
 100 | ];
 101 | 
 102 | interface EncounterTableProps {
 103 | 	data: Encounter[];
 104 | 	isLoading?: boolean;
 105 | }
 106 | 
 107 | export function EncounterTable({ data, isLoading }: EncounterTableProps) {
 108 | 	const statusOptions = [
 109 | 		{ label: "Active", value: "ACTIVE" },
 110 | 		{ label: "Completed", value: "COMPLETED" },
 111 | 		{ label: "Follow Up", value: "FOLLOW_UP" },
 112 | 		{ label: "Cancelled", value: "CANCELLED" },
 113 | 		{ label: "Pending", value: "PENDING" }
 114 | 	];
 115 | 
 116 | 	const typeOptions = [
 117 | 		{ label: "Initial Consultation", value: "INITIAL" },
 118 | 		{ label: "Follow-up", value: "FOLLOW_UP" },
 119 | 		{ label: "Emergency", value: "EMERGENCY" },
 120 | 		{ label: "Routine Checkup", value: "ROUTINE" },
 121 | 		{ label: "Chronic Disease Management", value: "CHRONIC" },
 122 | 		{ label: "Post-operative", value: "POST_OP" }
 123 | 	];
 124 | 
 125 | 	if (isLoading) {
 126 | 		return (
 127 | 			<div className='flex h-64 items-center justify-center'>
 128 | 				<div className='text-muted-foreground'>Loading encounters...</div>
 129 | 			</div>
 130 | 		);
 131 | 	}
 132 | 
 133 | 	return (
 134 | 		<DataTable
 135 | 			columns={encounterColumns}
 136 | 			config={{
 137 | 				searchColumn: "patientName",
 138 | 				searchPlaceholder: "Search patients...",
 139 | 				facetedFilters: [
 140 | 					{ column: "status", title: "Status", options: statusOptions },
 141 | 					{ column: "type", title: "Type", options: typeOptions }
 142 | 				]
 143 | 			}}
 144 | 			data={data}
 145 | 		/>
 146 | 	);
 147 | }

```

`components/encounters/EncounterForm.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/forms/encounter-form.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
   4 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   5 | import { Calendar } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/calendar";
   6 | import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   7 | import { Input } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/input";
   8 | import { Label } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/label";
   9 | import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/popover";
  10 | import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/select";
  11 | import { Separator } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/separator";
  12 | import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/tabs";
  13 | import { useAppForm, useFormFields } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/tanstack-form";
  14 | import { Textarea } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/textarea";
  15 | import { useStore } from "@tanstack/react-form";
  16 | import { useMutation, useQuery, useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
  17 | import { format } from "date-fns";
  18 | import type Decimal from "decimal.js";
  19 | import { Activity, CalendarIcon, ClipboardList, Pill, TestTube, User } from "lucide-react";
  20 | import * as React from "react";
  21 | import { toast } from "sonner";
  22 | import * as z from "zod";
  23 | 
  24 | import { cn } from "@clinic/ui/lib/utils";
  25 | import { orpc } from "@/utils/orpc";
  26 | 
  27 | // Schema for encounter form — matches CreateEncounterSchema input exactly
  28 | const encounterFormSchema = z.object({
  29 | 	// Patient & Doctor Info
  30 | 	patientId: z.string().min(1, "Please select a patient"),
  31 | 	doctorId: z.string().min(1, "Please select a doctor"),
  32 | 	clinicId: z.string(),
  33 | 	appointmentId: z.string(),
  34 | 
  35 | 	// Diagnosis Information
  36 | 	diagnosisDate: z.date(),
  37 | 	type: z.string().min(1, "Please select encounter type"),
  38 | 	diagnosis: z.string().min(1, "Please enter a diagnosis"),
  39 | 	symptoms: z.string().min(1, "Please describe the symptoms"),
  40 | 	treatment: z.string(),
  41 | 	notes: z.string(),
  42 | 
  43 | 	// Prescribed Medications (as JSON string)
  44 | 	prescribedMedications: z.string(),
  45 | 	followUpPlan: z.string(),
  46 | 
  47 | 	// Vital Signs Section
  48 | 	vitalSigns: z.object({
  49 | 		bodyTemperature: z.number().optional(),
  50 | 		systolic: z.number().optional(),
  51 | 		diastolic: z.number().optional(),
  52 | 		heartRate: z.number().optional(),
  53 | 		respiratoryRate: z.number().optional(),
  54 | 		oxygenSaturation: z.number().optional(),
  55 | 		notes: z.string().optional()
  56 | 	}),
  57 | 
  58 | 	// Lab Tests Section
  59 | 	labTests: z.array(
  60 | 		z.object({
  61 | 			serviceId: z.string(),
  62 | 			testDate: z.date(),
  63 | 			notes: z.string().optional()
  64 | 		})
  65 | 	),
  66 | 
  67 | 	// Prescriptions Section
  68 | 	prescriptions: z.array(
  69 | 		z.object({
  70 | 			medicationName: z.string(),
  71 | 			instructions: z.string(),
  72 | 			dosageValue: z.number(),
  73 | 			dosageUnit: z.string(),
  74 | 			frequency: z.string(),
  75 | 			duration: z.string()
  76 | 		})
  77 | 	),
  78 | 
  79 | 	status: z.string()
  80 | });
  81 | 
  82 | type EncounterFormValues = z.infer<typeof encounterFormSchema>;
  83 | 
  84 | const encounterTypes = [
  85 | 	{ value: "INITIAL", label: "Initial Consultation" },
  86 | 	{ value: "FOLLOW_UP", label: "Follow-up" },
  87 | 	{ value: "EMERGENCY", label: "Emergency" },
  88 | 	{ value: "ROUTINE", label: "Routine Checkup" },
  89 | 	{ value: "CHRONIC", label: "Chronic Disease Management" },
  90 | 	{ value: "POST_OP", label: "Post-operative" }
  91 | ];
  92 | 
  93 | const dosageUnits = [
  94 | 	{ value: "mg", label: "mg" },
  95 | 	{ value: "g", label: "g" },
  96 | 	{ value: "mcg", label: "mcg" },
  97 | 	{ value: "mL", label: "mL" },
  98 | 	{ value: "tablet", label: "Tablet" },
  99 | 	{ value: "capsule", label: "Capsule" },
 100 | 	{ value: "drop", label: "Drop" },
 101 | 	{ value: "inhalation", label: "Inhalation" }
 102 | ];
 103 | 
 104 | const frequencies = [
 105 | 	{ value: "ONCE_DAILY", label: "Once daily" },
 106 | 	{ value: "TWICE_DAILY", label: "Twice daily" },
 107 | 	{ value: "THREE_TIMES_DAILY", label: "Three times daily" },
 108 | 	{ value: "FOUR_TIMES_DAILY", label: "Four times daily" },
 109 | 	{ value: "EVERY_4_HOURS", label: "Every 4 hours" },
 110 | 	{ value: "EVERY_6_HOURS", label: "Every 6 hours" },
 111 | 	{ value: "EVERY_8_HOURS", label: "Every 8 hours" },
 112 | 	{ value: "AS_NEEDED", label: "As needed" },
 113 | 	{ value: "BEFORE_MEALS", label: "Before meals" },
 114 | 	{ value: "AFTER_MEALS", label: "After meals" },
 115 | 	{ value: "AT_BEDTIME", label: "At bedtime" }
 116 | ];
 117 | 
 118 | type EncounterFormProps = {
 119 | 	appointmentId?: string;
 120 | 	initialData?: Partial<EncounterFormValues>;
 121 | 	onCancel?: () => void;
 122 | 	onSuccess?: () => void;
 123 | 	patientId?: string;
 124 | };
 125 | 
 126 | export function EncounterForm({ initialData, patientId, appointmentId, onSuccess, onCancel }: EncounterFormProps) {
 127 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
 128 | 	const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = React.useState("diagnosis");
 129 | 
 130 | 	// Fetch patients for dropdown
 131 | 	const { data: patientsData, isLoading: patientsLoading } = useQuery(
 132 | 		orpc.patient.list.queryOptions({
 133 | 			input: { search: "" }
 134 | 		})
 135 | 	);
 136 | 
 137 | 	// Fetch doctors for dropdown
 138 | 	const { data: doctorsData, isLoading: doctorsLoading } = useQuery(
 139 | 		orpc.doctor.list.queryOptions({
 140 | 			input: { search: "" }
 141 | 		})
 142 | 	);
 143 | 
 144 | 	// Fetch services for lab tests
 145 | 	const { data: servicesData, isLoading: servicesLoading } = useQuery(
 146 | 		orpc.service.list.queryOptions({
 147 | 			input: { search: "" }
 148 | 		})
 149 | 	);
 150 | 
 151 | 	// Create encounter mutation
 152 | 	const { mutate: createEncounter, isPending: isCreatePending } = useMutation(
 153 | 		orpc.diagnosis.create.mutationOptions({
 154 | 			onSuccess: () => {
 155 | 				toast.success("Encounter recorded successfully");
 156 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 157 | 					queryKey: orpc.diagnosis.key()
 158 | 				});
 159 | 				onSuccess?.();
 160 | 			},
 161 | 			onError(error: Error) {
```
