```tsx
 162 | 				console.error(error);
 163 | 				toast.error(error.message || "Failed to record encounter");
 164 | 			}
 165 | 		})
 166 | 	);
 167 | 
 168 | 	const form = useAppForm({
 169 | 		defaultValues: {
 170 | 			patientId: initialData?.patientId ?? patientId ?? "",
 171 | 			doctorId: initialData?.doctorId ?? "",
 172 | 			clinicId: initialData?.clinicId ?? "",
 173 | 			appointmentId: initialData?.appointmentId ?? appointmentId ?? "",
 174 | 			diagnosisDate: initialData?.diagnosisDate ?? new Date(),
 175 | 			type: initialData?.type ?? "INITIAL",
 176 | 			diagnosis: initialData?.diagnosis ?? "",
 177 | 			symptoms: initialData?.symptoms ?? "",
 178 | 			treatment: initialData?.treatment ?? "",
 179 | 			notes: initialData?.notes ?? "",
 180 | 			prescribedMedications: initialData?.prescribedMedications ?? "",
 181 | 			followUpPlan: initialData?.followUpPlan ?? "",
 182 | 			vitalSigns: initialData?.vitalSigns ?? {
 183 | 				bodyTemperature: undefined,
 184 | 				systolic: undefined,
 185 | 				diastolic: undefined,
 186 | 				heartRate: undefined,
 187 | 				respiratoryRate: undefined,
 188 | 				oxygenSaturation: undefined,
 189 | 				notes: ""
 190 | 			},
 191 | 			labTests: initialData?.labTests ?? [],
 192 | 			prescriptions: initialData?.prescriptions ?? [],
 193 | 			status: initialData?.status ?? "ACTIVE"
 194 | 		} as EncounterFormValues,
 195 | 		validators: {},
 196 | 		onSubmit: async ({ value }) => {
 197 | 			createEncounter({
 198 | 				patientId: value.patientId,
 199 | 				doctorId: value.doctorId,
 200 | 				appointmentId: value.appointmentId,
 201 | 				date: value.diagnosisDate,
 202 | 				type: value.type,
 203 | 				diagnosis: value.diagnosis,
 204 | 				treatment: value.treatment,
 205 | 				notes: value.notes,
 206 | 				symptoms: value.symptoms,
 207 | 				prescribedMedications: value.prescribedMedications,
 208 | 				followUpPlan: value.followUpPlan,
 209 | 				medicalId: ""
 210 | 			});
 211 | 		}
 212 | 	});
 213 | 
 214 | 	const formValues = useStore(form.store, s => s.values);
 215 | 	const { FormSelectField, FormTextField, FormTextareaField } = useFormFields<EncounterFormValues>();
 216 | 
 217 | 	// Add lab test handler
 218 | 	const addLabTest = () => {
 219 | 		const currentTests = formValues.labTests ?? [];
 220 | 		form.setFieldValue("labTests", [
 221 | 			...currentTests,
 222 | 			{
 223 | 				serviceId: "",
 224 | 				testDate: new Date(),
 225 | 				notes: ""
 226 | 			}
 227 | 		]);
 228 | 	};
 229 | 
 230 | 	const removeLabTest = (index: number) => {
 231 | 		const currentTests = formValues.labTests ?? [];
 232 | 		form.setFieldValue(
 233 | 			"labTests",
 234 | 			currentTests.filter((_, i) => i !== index)
 235 | 		);
 236 | 	};
 237 | 
 238 | 	// Add prescription handler
 239 | 	const addPrescription = () => {
 240 | 		const currentPrescriptions = formValues.prescriptions ?? [];
 241 | 		form.setFieldValue("prescriptions", [
 242 | 			...currentPrescriptions,
 243 | 			{
 244 | 				medicationName: "",
 245 | 				instructions: "",
 246 | 				dosageValue: 0,
 247 | 				dosageUnit: "mg",
 248 | 				frequency: "ONCE_DAILY",
 249 | 				duration: ""
 250 | 			}
 251 | 		]);
 252 | 	};
 253 | 
 254 | 	const removePrescription = (index: number) => {
 255 | 		const currentPrescriptions = formValues.prescriptions ?? [];
 256 | 		form.setFieldValue(
 257 | 			"prescriptions",
 258 | 			currentPrescriptions.filter((_, i) => i !== index)
 259 | 		);
 260 | 	};
 261 | 
 262 | 	return (
 263 | 		<Card className='mx-auto w-full max-w-5xl'>
 264 | 			<CardHeader>
 265 | 				<CardTitle className='font-bold text-2xl'>
 266 | 					{initialData?.patientId ? "Edit Encounter" : "New Patient Encounter"}
 267 | 				</CardTitle>
 268 | 				<p className='text-muted-foreground'>Record diagnosis, treatment, vitals, and prescriptions</p>
 269 | 			</CardHeader>
 270 | 			<CardContent>
 271 | 				<form.AppForm>
 272 | 					<form.Form className='space-y-6'>
 273 | 						{/* Patient & Doctor Selection */}
 274 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 275 | 							<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 276 | 								<User className='h-5 w-5' />
 277 | 								Patient & Doctor Information
 278 | 							</h3>
 279 | 							<Separator />
 280 | 							<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2'>
 281 | 								<FormSelectField
 282 | 									label='Patient'
 283 | 									name='patientId'
 284 | 									options={
 285 | 										patientsData?.patients?.map(
 286 | 											(p: { id: string; firstName: string; lastName: string }) => {
 287 | 												return {
 288 | 													value: p.id,
 289 | 													label: `${p.firstName} ${p.lastName}`
 290 | 												};
 291 | 											}
 292 | 										) ?? []
 293 | 									}
 294 | 									placeholder={patientsLoading ? "Loading..." : "Select patient"}
 295 | 									required
 296 | 									validators={{
 297 | 										onBlur: z.string().min(1, "Please select a patient")
 298 | 									}}
 299 | 								/>
 300 | 
 301 | 								<FormSelectField
 302 | 									label='Doctor'
 303 | 									name='doctorId'
 304 | 									options={
 305 | 										doctorsData?.doctors?.map(
 306 | 											(d: { id: string; name: string; specialty: string }) => {
 307 | 												return {
 308 | 													value: d.id,
 309 | 													label: `Dr. ${d.name} - ${d.specialty || "General"}`
 310 | 												};
 311 | 											}
 312 | 										) ?? []
 313 | 									}
 314 | 									placeholder={doctorsLoading ? "Loading..." : "Select doctor"}
 315 | 									required
 316 | 									validators={{
 317 | 										onBlur: z.string().min(1, "Please select a doctor")
 318 | 									}}
 319 | 								/>
 320 | 							</div>
 321 | 
 322 | 							{appointmentId && (
 323 | 								<div className='rounded-lg bg-muted p-3'>
 324 | 									<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>
 325 | 										Linked to appointment: <span className='font-medium'>{appointmentId}</span>
 326 | 									</p>
 327 | 								</div>
 328 | 							)}
 329 | 						</div>
 330 | 
 331 | 						<Tabs
 332 | 							className='w-full'
 333 | 							onValueChange={setActiveTab}
 334 | 							value={activeTab}
 335 | 						>
 336 | 							<TabsList className='grid w-full grid-cols-4'>
 337 | 								<TabsTrigger
 338 | 									className='flex items-center gap-2'
 339 | 									value='diagnosis'
 340 | 								>
 341 | 									<ClipboardList className='h-4 w-4' />
 342 | 									Diagnosis
 343 | 								</TabsTrigger>
 344 | 								<TabsTrigger
 345 | 									className='flex items-center gap-2'
 346 | 									value='vitals'
 347 | 								>
 348 | 									<Activity className='h-4 w-4' />
 349 | 									Vital Signs
 350 | 								</TabsTrigger>
 351 | 								<TabsTrigger
 352 | 									className='flex items-center gap-2'
 353 | 									value='labs'
 354 | 								>
 355 | 									<TestTube className='h-4 w-4' />
 356 | 									Lab Tests
 357 | 								</TabsTrigger>
 358 | 								<TabsTrigger
 359 | 									className='flex items-center gap-2'
 360 | 									value='prescriptions'
 361 | 								>
 362 | 									<Pill className='h-4 w-4' />
 363 | 									Prescriptions
 364 | 								</TabsTrigger>
 365 | 							</TabsList>
 366 | 
 367 | 							{/* Diagnosis Tab */}
 368 | 							<TabsContent
 369 | 								className='mt-6 space-y-6'
 370 | 								value='diagnosis'
 371 | 							>
 372 | 								<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2'>
 373 | 									{/* Diagnosis Date */}
 374 | 									<form.AppField name='diagnosisDate'>
 375 | 										{field => (
 376 | 											<div className='space-y-2'>
 377 | 												<Label>Encounter Date *</Label>
 378 | 												<Popover>
 379 | 													<PopoverTrigger asChild>
 380 | 														<Button
 381 | 															className={cn(
 382 | 																"w-full justify-start text-left font-normal",
 383 | 																!field.state.value && "text-muted-foreground"
 384 | 															)}
 385 | 															variant='outline'
 386 | 														>
 387 | 															<CalendarIcon className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 388 | 															{field.state.value
 389 | 																? format(field.state.value, "PPP")
 390 | 																: "Pick a date"}
 391 | 														</Button>
 392 | 													</PopoverTrigger>
 393 | 													<PopoverContent
 394 | 														align='start'
 395 | 														className='w-auto p-0'
 396 | 													>
 397 | 														<Calendar
 398 | 															mode='single'
 399 | 															onSelect={date => field.handleChange(date as Date)}
 400 | 															selected={field.state.value}
 401 | 														/>
 402 | 													</PopoverContent>
 403 | 												</Popover>
 404 | 											</div>
 405 | 										)}
 406 | 									</form.AppField>
 407 | 
 408 | 									<FormSelectField
 409 | 										label='Encounter Type'
 410 | 										name='type'
 411 | 										options={encounterTypes}
 412 | 										placeholder='Select type'
 413 | 										required
 414 | 									/>
 415 | 								</div>
 416 | 
 417 | 								<FormTextField
 418 | 									label='Diagnosis'
 419 | 									name='diagnosis'
 420 | 									placeholder='Enter diagnosis (e.g., Acute Pharyngitis, Hypertension)'
 421 | 									required
 422 | 								/>
 423 | 
 424 | 								<FormTextareaField
 425 | 									label='Symptoms'
 426 | 									name='symptoms'
 427 | 									placeholder="Describe the patient's symptoms..."
 428 | 									required
 429 | 									rows={3}
 430 | 								/>
 431 | 
 432 | 								<FormTextareaField
 433 | 									label='Treatment Plan'
 434 | 									name='treatment'
 435 | 									placeholder='Describe the recommended treatment plan...'
 436 | 									rows={3}
 437 | 								/>
 438 | 
 439 | 								<FormTextareaField
 440 | 									label='Additional Notes'
 441 | 									name='notes'
 442 | 									placeholder='Any additional notes or observations...'
 443 | 									rows={2}
 444 | 								/>
 445 | 
 446 | 								<FormTextareaField
 447 | 									label='Follow-up Plan'
 448 | 									name='followUpPlan'
 449 | 									placeholder='Recommended follow-up schedule...'
 450 | 									rows={2}
 451 | 								/>
 452 | 							</TabsContent>
 453 | 
 454 | 							{/* Vital Signs Tab */}
 455 | 							<TabsContent
 456 | 								className='mt-6 space-y-6'
 457 | 								value='vitals'
 458 | 							>
 459 | 								<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3'>
 460 | 									<FormTextField
 461 | 										label='Body Temperature (°C)'
 462 | 										name='vitalSigns.bodyTemperature'
 463 | 										placeholder='e.g., 36.5'
 464 | 										step={0.1}
 465 | 										type='number'
 466 | 									/>
 467 | 
 468 | 									<div className='space-y-2'>
 469 | 										<Label>Blood Pressure</Label>
 470 | 										<div className='grid grid-cols-2 gap-2'>
 471 | 											<FormTextField
 472 | 												label=''
 473 | 												name='vitalSigns.systolic'
 474 | 												placeholder='Systolic'
 475 | 												type='number'
 476 | 											/>
 477 | 											<FormTextField
 478 | 												label=''
 479 | 												name='vitalSigns.diastolic'
 480 | 												placeholder='Diastolic'
 481 | 												type='number'
 482 | 											/>
 483 | 										</div>
 484 | 									</div>
 485 | 
 486 | 									<FormTextField
 487 | 										label='Heart Rate (bpm)'
 488 | 										name='vitalSigns.heartRate'
 489 | 										placeholder='e.g., 72'
 490 | 										type='number'
 491 | 									/>
 492 | 
 493 | 									<FormTextField
 494 | 										label='Respiratory Rate (breaths/min)'
 495 | 										name='vitalSigns.respiratoryRate'
 496 | 										placeholder='e.g., 16'
 497 | 										type='number'
 498 | 									/>
 499 | 
 500 | 									<FormTextField
 501 | 										label='Oxygen Saturation (%)'
 502 | 										max={100}
 503 | 										min={0}
 504 | 										name='vitalSigns.oxygenSaturation'
 505 | 										placeholder='e.g., 98'
 506 | 										type='number'
 507 | 									/>
 508 | 
 509 | 									<FormTextareaField
 510 | 										label='Vital Signs Notes'
 511 | 										name='vitalSigns.notes'
 512 | 										placeholder='Additional notes about vital signs...'
 513 | 										rows={2}
 514 | 									/>
 515 | 								</div>
 516 | 							</TabsContent>
 517 | 
 518 | 							{/* Lab Tests Tab */}
 519 | 							<TabsContent
 520 | 								className='mt-6 space-y-6'
 521 | 								value='labs'
 522 | 							>
 523 | 								<div className='space-y-4'>
 524 | 									{formValues.labTests?.map((_, index) => (
 525 | 										<Card
 526 | 											className='relative'
 527 | 											key={_.notes?.toString()}
 528 | 										>
 529 | 											<CardContent className='pt-6'>
 530 | 												<Button
 531 | 													className='absolute top-2 right-2'
 532 | 													onClick={() => removeLabTest(index)}
 533 | 													size='sm'
 534 | 													type='button'
 535 | 													variant='ghost'
 536 | 												>
 537 | 													✕
 538 | 												</Button>
 539 | 												<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2'>
 540 | 													<Select
 541 | 														onValueChange={value => {
 542 | 															const tests = [...(formValues.labTests ?? [])];
 543 | 															tests[index] = {
 544 | 																...tests[index],
 545 | 																serviceId: value
 546 | 															};
 547 | 															form.setFieldValue("labTests", tests);
 548 | 														}}
 549 | 														value={formValues.labTests?.[index]?.serviceId ?? ""}
 550 | 													>
 551 | 														<SelectTrigger>
 552 | 															<SelectValue
 553 | 																placeholder={
 554 | 																	servicesLoading ? "Loading..." : "Select lab test"
 555 | 																}
 556 | 															/>
 557 | 														</SelectTrigger>
 558 | 														<SelectContent>
 559 | 															{servicesData?.services
 560 | 																?.filter(
 561 | 																	(s: { category: string | null }) =>
 562 | 																		s.category === "LAB_TEST"
 563 | 																)
 564 | 																?.map(
 565 | 																	(service: {
 566 | 																		id: string;
 567 | 																		serviceName: string | null;
 568 | 																		price: Decimal | null;
 569 | 																	}) => (
 570 | 																		<SelectItem
 571 | 																			key={service.id}
 572 | 																			value={service.id}
 573 | 																		>
 574 | 																			{service.serviceName} - $
 575 | 																			{String(service.price)}
 576 | 																		</SelectItem>
 577 | 																	)
 578 | 																)}
 579 | 														</SelectContent>
 580 | 													</Select>
 581 | 
 582 | 													<div className='space-y-2'>
 583 | 														<Label>Test Date</Label>
 584 | 														<Popover>
 585 | 															<PopoverTrigger asChild>
 586 | 																<Button
 587 | 																	className='w-full justify-start text-left font-normal'
 588 | 																	variant='outline'
 589 | 																>
 590 | 																	<CalendarIcon className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 591 | 																	{formValues.labTests?.[index]?.testDate
 592 | 																		? format(
 593 | 																				formValues.labTests[index].testDate ??
 594 | 																					new Date(),
 595 | 																				"PPP"
 596 | 																			)
 597 | 																		: "Select date"}
 598 | 																</Button>
 599 | 															</PopoverTrigger>
 600 | 															<PopoverContent className='w-auto p-0'>
 601 | 																<Calendar
 602 | 																	mode='single'
 603 | 																	onSelect={date => {
 604 | 																		const tests = [...(formValues.labTests ?? [])];
 605 | 																		tests[index] = {
 606 | 																			...tests[index],
 607 | 																			testDate: date as Date
 608 | 																		};
 609 | 																		form.setFieldValue("labTests", tests);
 610 | 																	}}
 611 | 																	selected={formValues.labTests?.[index]?.testDate}
 612 | 																/>
 613 | 															</PopoverContent>
 614 | 														</Popover>
 615 | 													</div>
 616 | 
 617 | 													<div className='md:col-span-2'>
 618 | 														<Textarea
 619 | 															onChange={e => {
 620 | 																const tests = [...(formValues.labTests ?? [])];
 621 | 																tests[index] = {
 622 | 																	...tests[index],
 623 | 																	notes: e.target.value
 624 | 																};
 625 | 																form.setFieldValue("labTests", tests);
 626 | 															}}
 627 | 															placeholder='Test notes...'
 628 | 															value={formValues.labTests?.[index]?.notes ?? ""}
 629 | 														/>
 630 | 													</div>
 631 | 												</div>
 632 | 											</CardContent>
 633 | 										</Card>
 634 | 									))}
 635 | 
 636 | 									<Button
 637 | 										className='w-full'
 638 | 										onClick={addLabTest}
 639 | 										type='button'
 640 | 										variant='outline'
 641 | 									>
 642 | 										+ Add Lab Test
 643 | 									</Button>
 644 | 								</div>
 645 | 							</TabsContent>
 646 | 
 647 | 							{/* Prescriptions Tab */}
 648 | 							<TabsContent
 649 | 								className='mt-6 space-y-6'
 650 | 								value='prescriptions'
 651 | 							>
 652 | 								<div className='space-y-4'>
 653 | 									{formValues.prescriptions?.map((_, index) => (
 654 | 										<Card
 655 | 											className='relative'
 656 | 											key={_.medicationName.toString()}
 657 | 										>
 658 | 											<CardContent className='pt-6'>
 659 | 												<Button
 660 | 													className='absolute top-2 right-2'
 661 | 													onClick={() => removePrescription(index)}
 662 | 													size='sm'
 663 | 													type='button'
 664 | 													variant='ghost'
 665 | 												>
 666 | 													✕
 667 | 												</Button>
 668 | 												<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2'>
 669 | 													<Input
 670 | 														onChange={e => {
 671 | 															const prescriptions = [...(formValues.prescriptions ?? [])];
 672 | 															prescriptions[index] = {
 673 | 																...prescriptions[index],
 674 | 																medicationName: e.target.value
 675 | 															};
 676 | 															form.setFieldValue("prescriptions", prescriptions);
 677 | 														}}
 678 | 														placeholder='Medication name'
 679 | 														value={formValues.prescriptions?.[index]?.medicationName ?? ""}
 680 | 													/>
 681 | 
 682 | 													<div className='grid grid-cols-2 gap-2'>
 683 | 														<Input
 684 | 															onChange={e => {
 685 | 																const prescriptions = [
 686 | 																	...(formValues.prescriptions ?? [])
 687 | 																];
 688 | 																prescriptions[index] = {
 689 | 																	...prescriptions[index],
 690 | 																	dosageValue: Number.parseFloat(e.target.value)
 691 | 																};
 692 | 																form.setFieldValue("prescriptions", prescriptions);
 693 | 															}}
 694 | 															placeholder='Dosage'
 695 | 															type='number'
 696 | 															value={formValues.prescriptions?.[index]?.dosageValue ?? 0}
 697 | 														/>
 698 | 														<Select
 699 | 															onValueChange={value => {
 700 | 																const prescriptions = [
 701 | 																	...(formValues.prescriptions ?? [])
 702 | 																];
 703 | 																prescriptions[index] = {
 704 | 																	...prescriptions[index],
 705 | 																	dosageUnit: value
 706 | 																};
 707 | 																form.setFieldValue("prescriptions", prescriptions);
 708 | 															}}
 709 | 															value={
 710 | 																formValues.prescriptions?.[index]?.dosageUnit ?? "mg"
 711 | 															}
 712 | 														>
 713 | 															<SelectTrigger>
 714 | 																<SelectValue />
 715 | 															</SelectTrigger>
 716 | 															<SelectContent>
 717 | 																{dosageUnits.map(unit => (
 718 | 																	<SelectItem
 719 | 																		key={unit.value}
 720 | 																		value={unit.value}
 721 | 																	>
 722 | 																		{unit.label}
 723 | 																	</SelectItem>
 724 | 																))}
 725 | 															</SelectContent>
 726 | 														</Select>
 727 | 													</div>
 728 | 
 729 | 													<Select
 730 | 														onValueChange={value => {
 731 | 															const prescriptions = [...(formValues.prescriptions ?? [])];
 732 | 															prescriptions[index] = {
 733 | 																...prescriptions[index],
 734 | 																frequency: value
 735 | 															};
 736 | 															form.setFieldValue("prescriptions", prescriptions);
 737 | 														}}
 738 | 														value={
 739 | 															formValues.prescriptions?.[index]?.frequency ?? "ONCE_DAILY"
 740 | 														}
 741 | 													>
 742 | 														<SelectTrigger>
 743 | 															<SelectValue />
 744 | 														</SelectTrigger>
 745 | 														<SelectContent>
 746 | 															{frequencies.map(freq => (
 747 | 																<SelectItem
 748 | 																	key={freq.value}
 749 | 																	value={freq.value}
 750 | 																>
 751 | 																	{freq.label}
 752 | 																</SelectItem>
 753 | 															))}
 754 | 														</SelectContent>
 755 | 													</Select>
 756 | 
 757 | 													<Input
 758 | 														onChange={e => {
 759 | 															const prescriptions = [...(formValues.prescriptions ?? [])];
 760 | 															prescriptions[index] = {
 761 | 																...prescriptions[index],
 762 | 																duration: e.target.value
 763 | 															};
 764 | 															form.setFieldValue("prescriptions", prescriptions);
 765 | 														}}
 766 | 														placeholder='Duration (e.g., 7 days)'
 767 | 														value={formValues.prescriptions?.[index]?.duration ?? ""}
 768 | 													/>
 769 | 
 770 | 													<div className='md:col-span-2'>
 771 | 														<Textarea
 772 | 															onChange={e => {
 773 | 																const prescriptions = [
 774 | 																	...(formValues.prescriptions ?? [])
 775 | 																];
 776 | 																prescriptions[index] = {
 777 | 																	...prescriptions[index],
 778 | 																	instructions: e.target.value
 779 | 																};
 780 | 																form.setFieldValue("prescriptions", prescriptions);
 781 | 															}}
 782 | 															placeholder='Instructions (e.g., Take with food)'
 783 | 															value={
 784 | 																formValues.prescriptions?.[index]?.instructions ?? ""
 785 | 															}
 786 | 														/>
 787 | 													</div>
 788 | 												</div>
 789 | 											</CardContent>
 790 | 										</Card>
 791 | 									))}
 792 | 
 793 | 									<Button
 794 | 										className='w-full'
 795 | 										onClick={addPrescription}
 796 | 										type='button'
 797 | 										variant='outline'
 798 | 									>
 799 | 										+ Add Prescription
 800 | 									</Button>
 801 | 								</div>
 802 | 							</TabsContent>
 803 | 						</Tabs>
 804 | 
 805 | 						{/* Status Badge Display */}
 806 | 						{formValues.status && (
 807 | 							<div className='flex items-center gap-2 rounded-lg bg-muted p-3'>
 808 | 								<span className='font-medium text-sm'>Status:</span>
 809 | 								<Badge
 810 | 									className={cn(
 811 | 										formValues.status === "ACTIVE" && "bg-green-500",
 812 | 										formValues.status === "COMPLETED" && "bg-blue-500",
 813 | 										formValues.status === "FOLLOW_UP" && "bg-yellow-500"
 814 | 									)}
 815 | 								>
 816 | 									{formValues.status}
 817 | 								</Badge>
 818 | 							</div>
 819 | 						)}
 820 | 
 821 | 						{/* Actions */}
 822 | 						<Separator />
 823 | 						<div className='flex justify-end gap-4'>
 824 | 							{onCancel && (
 825 | 								<Button
 826 | 									disabled={isCreatePending}
 827 | 									onClick={onCancel}
 828 | 									type='button'
 829 | 									variant='outline'
 830 | 								>
 831 | 									Cancel
 832 | 								</Button>
 833 | 							)}
 834 | 							<form.SubmitButton
 835 | 								className='min-w-30'
 836 | 								disabled={isCreatePending}
 837 | 							>
 838 | 								{isCreatePending
 839 | 									? "Saving..."
 840 | 									: initialData?.patientId
 841 | 										? "Update Encounter"
 842 | 										: "Save Encounter"}
 843 | 							</form.SubmitButton>
 844 | 						</div>
 845 | 					</form.Form>
 846 | 				</form.AppForm>
 847 | 			</CardContent>
 848 | 		</Card>
 849 | 	);
 850 | }

```

`components/encounters/RowActions.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/encounters/EncounterTableRowActions.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import {
   4 | 	AlertDialog,
   5 | 	AlertDialogAction,
   6 | 	AlertDialogCancel,
   7 | 	AlertDialogContent,
   8 | 	AlertDialogDescription,
   9 | 	AlertDialogFooter,
  10 | 	AlertDialogHeader,
  11 | 	AlertDialogTitle
  12 | } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/alert-dialog";
  13 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
  14 | import {
  15 | 	Dialog,
  16 | 	DialogContent,
  17 | 	DialogDescription,
  18 | 	DialogFooter,
  19 | 	DialogHeader,
  20 | 	DialogTitle
  21 | } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/dialog";
  22 | import {
  23 | 	DropdownMenu,
  24 | 	DropdownMenuContent,
  25 | 	DropdownMenuItem,
  26 | 	DropdownMenuLabel,
  27 | 	DropdownMenuSeparator,
  28 | 	DropdownMenuShortcut,
  29 | 	DropdownMenuSub,
  30 | 	DropdownMenuSubContent,
  31 | 	DropdownMenuSubTrigger,
  32 | 	DropdownMenuTrigger
  33 | } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/dropdown-menu";
  34 | import { DotsHorizontalIcon } from "@radix-ui/react-icons";
  35 | import { useMutation, useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
  36 | import { useNavigate } from "@tanstack/react-router";
  37 | import type { Row } from "@tanstack/react-table";
  38 | import { useState } from "react";
  39 | import { toast } from "sonner";
  40 | 
  41 | import { orpc } from "@/utils/orpc";
  42 | 
  43 | import type { Encounter } from "./column";
  44 | 
  45 | interface EncounterTableRowActionsProps {
  46 | 	row: Row<Encounter>;
  47 | }
  48 | 
  49 | export function EncounterTableRowActions({ row }: EncounterTableRowActionsProps) {
  50 | 	const encounter = row.original;
  51 | 	const navigate = useNavigate();
  52 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
  53 | 	const [showDeleteDialog, setShowDeleteDialog] = useState(false);
  54 | 	const [showCompleteDialog, setShowCompleteDialog] = useState(false);
  55 | 	const [isDeleting, setIsDeleting] = useState(false);
  56 | 	const [isUpdating, setIsUpdating] = useState(false);
  57 | 
  58 | 	const updateStatusMutation = useMutation(
  59 | 		orpc.diagnosis.update.mutationOptions({
  60 | 			onSuccess: () => {
  61 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ["encounters"] });
  62 | 				toast.success("Encounter status updated successfully");
  63 | 			},
  64 | 			onError: (error: Error) => {
  65 | 				toast.error("Failed to update encounter status", {
  66 | 					description: error.message
  67 | 				});
  68 | 			}
  69 | 		})
  70 | 	);
  71 | 
  72 | 	const deleteMutation = useMutation(
  73 | 		orpc.diagnosis.delete.mutationOptions({
  74 | 			onSuccess: () => {
  75 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ["encounters"] });
  76 | 				toast.success("Encounter deleted successfully");
  77 | 				setShowDeleteDialog(false);
  78 | 			},
  79 | 			onError: (error: Error) => {
  80 | 				toast.error("Failed to delete encounter", {
  81 | 					description: error.message
  82 | 				});
  83 | 			},
  84 | 			onSettled: () => {
  85 | 				setIsDeleting(false);
  86 | 			}
  87 | 		})
  88 | 	);
  89 | 
  90 | 	const handleStatusChange = async (status: Encounter["status"]) => {
  91 | 		setIsUpdating(true);
  92 | 		try {
  93 | 			await updateStatusMutation.mutateAsync({
  94 | 				id: encounter.id,
  95 | 				status
  96 | 			});
  97 | 		} finally {
  98 | 			setIsUpdating(false);
  99 | 		}
 100 | 	};
 101 | 
 102 | 	const handleDelete = async () => {
 103 | 		setIsDeleting(true);
 104 | 		await deleteMutation.mutateAsync({ id: encounter.id });
 105 | 	};
 106 | 
 107 | 	const handleViewDetails = () => {
 108 | 		navigate({
 109 | 			to: "/dashboard/encounters/$id",
 110 | 			params: { id: encounter.id }
 111 | 		});
 112 | 	};
 113 | 
 114 | 	const handleEdit = () => {
 115 | 		navigate({
 116 | 			to: "/dashboard/encounters/$id/edit",
 117 | 			params: { id: encounter.id }
 118 | 		});
 119 | 	};
 120 | 
 121 | 	const handleViewPatient = () => {
 122 | 		navigate({
 123 | 			to: "/dashboard/patients/$id",
 124 | 			params: { id: encounter.patientId }
 125 | 		});
 126 | 	};
 127 | 
 128 | 	return (
 129 | 		<>
 130 | 			<DropdownMenu>
 131 | 				<DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
 132 | 					<Button
 133 | 						className='flex h-8 w-8 p-0 data-[state=open]:bg-muted'
 134 | 						variant='ghost'
 135 | 					>
 136 | 						<DotsHorizontalIcon className='h-4 w-4' />
 137 | 						<span className='sr-only'>Open menu</span>
 138 | 					</Button>
 139 | 				</DropdownMenuTrigger>
 140 | 				<DropdownMenuContent
 141 | 					align='end'
 142 | 					className='w-40'
 143 | 				>
 144 | 					<DropdownMenuLabel>Actions</DropdownMenuLabel>
 145 | 					<DropdownMenuItem onClick={handleViewDetails}>View details</DropdownMenuItem>
 146 | 					<DropdownMenuItem onClick={handleEdit}>Edit encounter</DropdownMenuItem>
 147 | 					<DropdownMenuItem onClick={handleViewPatient}>View patient</DropdownMenuItem>
 148 | 
 149 | 					{encounter.status !== "COMPLETED" && (
 150 | 						<DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => setShowCompleteDialog(true)}>
 151 | 							Mark as completed
 152 | 							<DropdownMenuShortcut>✓</DropdownMenuShortcut>
 153 | 						</DropdownMenuItem>
 154 | 					)}
 155 | 
 156 | 					<DropdownMenuSeparator />
 157 | 
 158 | 					<DropdownMenuSub>
 159 | 						<DropdownMenuSubTrigger>Change status</DropdownMenuSubTrigger>
 160 | 						<DropdownMenuSubContent>
 161 | 							<DropdownMenuItem
 162 | 								disabled={encounter.status === "PENDING" || isUpdating}
 163 | 								onClick={() => handleStatusChange("PENDING")}
 164 | 							>
 165 | 								Pending
 166 | 							</DropdownMenuItem>
 167 | 							<DropdownMenuItem
 168 | 								disabled={encounter.status === "CANCELLED" || isUpdating}
 169 | 								onClick={() => handleStatusChange("CANCELLED")}
 170 | 							>
 171 | 								Cancel
 172 | 							</DropdownMenuItem>
 173 | 							<DropdownMenuItem
 174 | 								disabled={encounter.status === "COMPLETED" || isUpdating}
 175 | 								onClick={() => handleStatusChange("COMPLETED")}
 176 | 							>
 177 | 								Completed
 178 | 							</DropdownMenuItem>
 179 | 							<DropdownMenuItem
 180 | 								className='text-destructive'
 181 | 								disabled={encounter.status === "CANCELLED" || isUpdating}
 182 | 								onClick={() => handleStatusChange("CANCELLED")}
 183 | 							>
 184 | 								Cancelled
 185 | 							</DropdownMenuItem>
 186 | 						</DropdownMenuSubContent>
 187 | 					</DropdownMenuSub>
 188 | 
 189 | 					<DropdownMenuSeparator />
 190 | 
 191 | 					<DropdownMenuItem
 192 | 						className='text-destructive focus:text-destructive'
 193 | 						onClick={() => setShowDeleteDialog(true)}
 194 | 					>
 195 | 						Delete encounter
 196 | 						<DropdownMenuShortcut>⌘⌫</DropdownMenuShortcut>
 197 | 					</DropdownMenuItem>
 198 | 				</DropdownMenuContent>
 199 | 			</DropdownMenu>
 200 | 
 201 | 			{/* Complete Encounter Dialog */}
 202 | 			<Dialog
 203 | 				onOpenChange={setShowCompleteDialog}
 204 | 				open={showCompleteDialog}
 205 | 			>
 206 | 				<DialogContent>
 207 | 					<DialogHeader>
 208 | 						<DialogTitle>Complete Encounter</DialogTitle>
 209 | 						<DialogDescription>
 210 | 							Mark this encounter as completed. This will also update the associated medical record
 211 | 							status.
 212 | 						</DialogDescription>
 213 | 					</DialogHeader>
 214 | 					<DialogFooter>
 215 | 						<Button
 216 | 							onClick={() => setShowCompleteDialog(false)}
 217 | 							variant='outline'
 218 | 						>
 219 | 							Cancel
 220 | 						</Button>
 221 | 						<Button
 222 | 							disabled={isUpdating}
 223 | 							onClick={async () => {
 224 | 								await handleStatusChange("COMPLETED");
 225 | 								setShowCompleteDialog(false);
 226 | 							}}
 227 | 						>
 228 | 							{isUpdating ? "Updating..." : "Confirm"}
 229 | 						</Button>
 230 | 					</DialogFooter>
 231 | 				</DialogContent>
 232 | 			</Dialog>
 233 | 
 234 | 			{/* Delete Confirmation Dialog */}
 235 | 			<AlertDialog
 236 | 				onOpenChange={setShowDeleteDialog}
 237 | 				open={showDeleteDialog}
 238 | 			>
 239 | 				<AlertDialogContent>
 240 | 					<AlertDialogHeader>
 241 | 						<AlertDialogTitle>Are you absolutely sure?</AlertDialogTitle>
 242 | 						<AlertDialogDescription>
 243 | 							This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the encounter for patient{" "}
 244 | 							{encounter.patientName} from the system.
 245 | 						</AlertDialogDescription>
 246 | 					</AlertDialogHeader>
 247 | 					<AlertDialogFooter>
 248 | 						<AlertDialogCancel disabled={isDeleting}>Cancel</AlertDialogCancel>
 249 | 						<AlertDialogAction
 250 | 							className='bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/90'
 251 | 							disabled={isDeleting}
 252 | 							onClick={handleDelete}
 253 | 						>
 254 | 							{isDeleting ? "Deleting..." : "Delete"}
 255 | 						</AlertDialogAction>
 256 | 					</AlertDialogFooter>
 257 | 				</AlertDialogContent>
 258 | 			</AlertDialog>
 259 | 		</>
 260 | 	);
 261 | }

```

`components/encounters/column.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/encounters/columns.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { DataTableColumnHeader } from "@clinic/ui/components/data-table/DataTableColumnHeader";
   4 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
   5 | import { Checkbox } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/checkbox";
   6 | import type { ColumnDef } from "@tanstack/react-table";
   7 | import { format } from "date-fns";
   8 | 
   9 | import { EncounterTableRowActions } from "./RowActions";
  10 | 
  11 | export interface Encounter {
  12 | 	id: string;
  13 | 	patientId: string;
  14 | 	patientName?: string;
  15 | 	doctorId: string;
  16 | 	doctorName?: string;
  17 | 	diagnosis: string | null;
  18 | 	symptoms: string | null;
  19 | 	treatment: string | null;
  20 | 	type: string | null;
  21 | 	status: "PENDING" | "COMPLETED" | "CANCELLED";
  22 | 	date: Date;
  23 | 	followUpPlan: string | null;
  24 | 	createdAt: Date;
  25 | 	updatedAt: Date;
  26 | }
  27 | 
  28 | const getStatusVariant = (status: Encounter["status"]) => {
  29 | 	switch (status) {
  30 | 		case "COMPLETED":
  31 | 			return "default";
  32 | 		case "PENDING":
  33 | 			return "secondary";
  34 | 		case "CANCELLED":
  35 | 			return "destructive";
  36 | 		default:
  37 | 			return "secondary";
  38 | 	}
  39 | };
  40 | 
  41 | export const encounterColumns: ColumnDef<Encounter>[] = [
  42 | 	{
  43 | 		id: "select",
  44 | 		header: ({ table }) => (
  45 | 			<Checkbox
  46 | 				aria-label='Select all'
  47 | 				checked={table.getIsAllPageRowsSelected() || (table.getIsSomePageRowsSelected() && "indeterminate")}
  48 | 				onCheckedChange={value => table.toggleAllPageRowsSelected(!!value)}
  49 | 			/>
  50 | 		),
  51 | 		cell: ({ row }) => (
  52 | 			<Checkbox
  53 | 				aria-label='Select row'
  54 | 				checked={row.getIsSelected()}
  55 | 				onCheckedChange={value => row.toggleSelected(!!value)}
  56 | 			/>
  57 | 		),
  58 | 		enableSorting: false,
  59 | 		enableHiding: false
  60 | 	},
  61 | 	{
  62 | 		accessorKey: "date",
  63 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
  64 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
  65 | 				column={column}
  66 | 				title='Date'
  67 | 			/>
  68 | 		),
  69 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
  70 | 			const date = row.getValue("date") as Date;
  71 | 			return <div className='font-medium'>{format(date, "MMM dd, yyyy")}</div>;
  72 | 		}
  73 | 	},
  74 | 	{
  75 | 		accessorKey: "patientName",
  76 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
  77 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
  78 | 				column={column}
  79 | 				title='Patient'
  80 | 			/>
  81 | 		),
  82 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
  83 | 			const patientName = row.getValue("patientName") as string;
  84 | 			return <div className='font-medium'>{patientName || "Unknown"}</div>;
  85 | 		},
  86 | 		filterFn: (row, _id, value) => {
  87 | 			const patientName = row.getValue("patientName") as string;
  88 | 			return patientName?.toLowerCase().includes(value.toLowerCase()) ?? false;
  89 | 		}
  90 | 	},
  91 | 	{
  92 | 		accessorKey: "doctorName",
  93 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
  94 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
  95 | 				column={column}
  96 | 				title='Doctor'
  97 | 			/>
  98 | 		),
  99 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 100 | 			const doctorName = row.getValue("doctorName") as string;
 101 | 			return <div>{doctorName || "Unassigned"}</div>;
 102 | 		}
 103 | 	},
 104 | 	{
 105 | 		accessorKey: "diagnosis",
 106 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
 107 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
 108 | 				column={column}
 109 | 				title='Diagnosis'
 110 | 			/>
 111 | 		),
 112 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 113 | 			const diagnosis = row.getValue("diagnosis") as string;
 114 | 			return (
 115 | 				<div
 116 | 					className='max-w-50 truncate'
 117 | 					title={diagnosis || undefined}
 118 | 				>
 119 | 					{diagnosis || "—"}
 120 | 				</div>
 121 | 			);
 122 | 		}
 123 | 	},
 124 | 	{
 125 | 		accessorKey: "type",
 126 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
 127 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
 128 | 				column={column}
 129 | 				title='Type'
 130 | 			/>
 131 | 		),
 132 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 133 | 			const type = row.getValue("type") as string;
 134 | 			return <Badge variant='outline'>{type || "General"}</Badge>;
 135 | 		},
 136 | 		filterFn: (row, id, value) => {
 137 | 			return value.includes(row.getValue(id));
 138 | 		}
 139 | 	},
 140 | 	{
 141 | 		accessorKey: "status",
 142 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
 143 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
 144 | 				column={column}
 145 | 				title='Status'
 146 | 			/>
 147 | 		),
 148 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 149 | 			const status = row.getValue("status") as Encounter["status"];
 150 | 			return <Badge variant={getStatusVariant(status)}>{status}</Badge>;
 151 | 		},
 152 | 		filterFn: (row, id, value) => {
 153 | 			return value.includes(row.getValue(id));
 154 | 		}
 155 | 	},
 156 | 	{
 157 | 		id: "actions",
 158 | 		cell: ({ row }) => <EncounterTableRowActions row={row} />
 159 | 	}
 160 | ];
 161 | 
 162 | // Default export alias for routes that import `columns`
 163 | export const columns = encounterColumns;

```

`components/encounters/tableWithtoolbar.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/encounters/EncounterTableWithToolbar.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   4 | import { Input } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/input";
   5 | import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/select";
   6 | import { CalendarIcon, DownloadIcon, FileTextIcon, PlusIcon, ReloadIcon } from "@radix-ui/react-icons";
   7 | import { useState } from "react";
   8 | import type { DateRange } from "react-day-picker";
   9 | 
  10 | import { DateRangePicker } from "../date-range-picker";
  11 | import type { Encounter as TableEncounter } from "./Encounter.table";
  12 | import { EncounterTable } from "./Encounter.table";
  13 | 
  14 | export interface EncounterFilters {
  15 | 	status?: string;
  16 | 	type?: string;
  17 | 	dateRange?: DateRange;
  18 | 	search?: string;
  19 | }
  20 | 
  21 | interface EncounterTableWithToolbarProps {
  22 | 	data: TableEncounter[];
  23 | 	isLoading?: boolean;
  24 | 	onRefresh?: () => void;
  25 | 	onExport?: (data: TableEncounter[]) => void;
  26 | 	onCreateClick?: () => void;
  27 | 	onFilterChange?: (filters: EncounterFilters) => void;
  28 | }
  29 | 
  30 | export function EncounterTableWithToolbar({
  31 | 	data,
  32 | 	isLoading,
  33 | 	onRefresh,
  34 | 	onExport,
  35 | 	onCreateClick,
  36 | 	onFilterChange
  37 | }: EncounterTableWithToolbarProps) {
  38 | 	const [filters, setFilters] = useState<EncounterFilters>({});
  39 | 
  40 | 	const handleFilterChange = (newFilters: Partial<EncounterFilters>) => {
  41 | 		const updated = { ...filters, ...newFilters };
  42 | 		setFilters(updated);
  43 | 		onFilterChange?.(updated);
  44 | 	};
  45 | 
  46 | 	const handleExport = () => {
  47 | 		if (onExport) {
  48 | 			onExport(data);
  49 | 		} else {
  50 | 			// Default export to CSV
  51 | 			const csv = convertToCSV(data);
  52 | 			const blob = new Blob([csv], { type: "text/csv" });
  53 | 			const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  54 | 			const a = document.createElement("a");
  55 | 			a.href = url;
  56 | 			a.download = `encounters-${new Date().toISOString()}.csv`;
  57 | 			a.click();
  58 | 			URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  59 | 		}
  60 | 	};
  61 | 
  62 | 	const convertToCSV = (data: TableEncounter[]) => {
  63 | 		const headers = ["Date", "Patient", "Doctor", "Diagnosis", "Type", "Status"];
  64 | 		const rows = data.map(encounter => [
  65 | 			new Date(encounter.date).toLocaleDateString(),
  66 | 			encounter.patientName || "",
  67 | 			encounter.doctorName || "",
  68 | 			encounter.diagnosis || "",
  69 | 			encounter.type || "",
  70 | 			encounter.status
  71 | 		]);
  72 | 		return [headers, ...rows].map(row => row.join(",")).join("\n");
  73 | 	};
  74 | 
  75 | 	// Filter data based on current filters
  76 | 	const filteredData = data.filter(encounter => {
  77 | 		// Search filter
  78 | 		if (filters.search) {
  79 | 			const searchLower = filters.search.toLowerCase();
  80 | 			const patientMatch = (encounter.patientName || "").toLowerCase().includes(searchLower) ?? "";
  81 | 			const diagnosisMatch = (encounter.diagnosis || "").toLowerCase().includes(searchLower);
  82 | 			if (!patientMatch && !diagnosisMatch) return false;
  83 | 		}
  84 | 
  85 | 		// Status filter
  86 | 		if (filters.status && filters.status !== "all" && encounter.status !== filters.status) {
  87 | 			return false;
  88 | 		}
  89 | 
  90 | 		// Type filter
  91 | 		if (filters.type && filters.type !== "all" && encounter.type !== filters.type) {
  92 | 			return false;
  93 | 		}
  94 | 
  95 | 		// Date range filter
  96 | 		if (filters.dateRange?.from && filters.dateRange?.to) {
  97 | 			const encounterDate = new Date(encounter.date);
  98 | 			if (encounterDate < filters.dateRange.from || encounterDate > filters.dateRange.to) {
  99 | 				return false;
 100 | 			}
 101 | 		}
 102 | 
 103 | 		return true;
 104 | 	});
 105 | 
 106 | 	return (
 107 | 		<div className='space-y-4'>
 108 | 			{/* Toolbar */}
 109 | 			<div className='flex flex-col gap-4 sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:justify-between'>
 110 | 				<div className='flex flex-1 flex-wrap items-center gap-2'>
 111 | 					<div className='relative flex-1 sm:max-w-xs'>
 112 | 						<Input
 113 | 							className='pl-8'
 114 | 							onChange={e => handleFilterChange({ search: e.target.value })}
 115 | 							placeholder='Search encounters...'
 116 | 							value={filters.search || ""}
 117 | 						/>
 118 | 					</div>
 119 | 
 120 | 					<Select
 121 | 						onValueChange={value =>
 122 | 							handleFilterChange({
 123 | 								status: value === "all" ? undefined : value
 124 | 							})
 125 | 						}
 126 | 						value={filters.status || "all"}
 127 | 					>
 128 | 						<SelectTrigger className='w-32'>
 129 | 							<SelectValue placeholder='All status' />
 130 | 						</SelectTrigger>
 131 | 						<SelectContent>
 132 | 							<SelectItem value='all'>All status</SelectItem>
 133 | 							<SelectItem value='PENDING'>Pending</SelectItem>
 134 | 							<SelectItem value='ACTIVE'>Active</SelectItem>
 135 | 							<SelectItem value='COMPLETED'>Completed</SelectItem>
 136 | 							<SelectItem value='CANCELLED'>Cancelled</SelectItem>
 137 | 						</SelectContent>
 138 | 					</Select>
 139 | 
 140 | 					<Select
 141 | 						onValueChange={value => handleFilterChange({ type: value === "all" ? undefined : value })}
 142 | 						value={filters.type || "all"}
 143 | 					>
 144 | 						<SelectTrigger className='w-32'>
 145 | 							<SelectValue placeholder='All types' />
 146 | 						</SelectTrigger>
 147 | 						<SelectContent>
 148 | 							<SelectItem value='all'>All types</SelectItem>
 149 | 							<SelectItem value='INITIAL'>Initial Consultation</SelectItem>
 150 | 							<SelectItem value='FOLLOW_UP'>Follow-up</SelectItem>
 151 | 							<SelectItem value='EMERGENCY'>Emergency</SelectItem>
 152 | 							<SelectItem value='ROUTINE'>Routine Checkup</SelectItem>
 153 | 							<SelectItem value='CHRONIC'>Chronic Disease</SelectItem>
 154 | 							<SelectItem value='POST_OP'>Post-operative</SelectItem>
 155 | 						</SelectContent>
 156 | 					</Select>
 157 | 
 158 | 					<DateRangePicker
 159 | 						onChange={(range: DateRange | undefined) => handleFilterChange({ dateRange: range })}
 160 | 						value={filters.dateRange}
 161 | 					/>
 162 | 				</div>
 163 | 
 164 | 				<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 165 | 					{onRefresh && (
 166 | 						<Button
 167 | 							onClick={onRefresh}
 168 | 							size='sm'
 169 | 							variant='outline'
 170 | 						>
 171 | 							<ReloadIcon className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 172 | 							Refresh
 173 | 						</Button>
 174 | 					)}
 175 | 					<Button
 176 | 						onClick={handleExport}
 177 | 						size='sm'
 178 | 						variant='outline'
 179 | 					>
 180 | 						<DownloadIcon className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 181 | 						Export
 182 | 					</Button>
 183 | 					{onCreateClick && (
 184 | 						<Button
 185 | 							onClick={onCreateClick}
 186 | 							size='sm'
 187 | 						>
 188 | 							<PlusIcon className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 189 | 							New Encounter
 190 | 						</Button>
 191 | 					)}
 192 | 				</div>
 193 | 			</div>
 194 | 
 195 | 			{/* Stats Summary */}
 196 | 			<div className='grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-4'>
 197 | 				<div className='rounded-lg border bg-card p-3'>
 198 | 					<div className='flex items-center gap-2 text-muted-foreground text-sm'>
 199 | 						<FileTextIcon className='h-4 w-4' />
 200 | 						Total Encounters
 201 | 					</div>
 202 | 					<div className='font-bold text-2xl'>{filteredData.length}</div>
 203 | 				</div>
 204 | 				<div className='rounded-lg border bg-card p-3'>
 205 | 					<div className='flex items-center gap-2 text-muted-foreground text-sm'>
 206 | 						<div className='h-2 w-2 rounded-full bg-yellow-500' />
 207 | 						Active
 208 | 					</div>
 209 | 					<div className='font-bold text-2xl'>
 210 | 						{filteredData.filter(e => e.status === "COMPLETED").length}
 211 | 					</div>
 212 | 				</div>
 213 | 				<div className='rounded-lg border bg-card p-3'>
 214 | 					<div className='flex items-center gap-2 text-muted-foreground text-sm'>
 215 | 						<div className='h-2 w-2 rounded-full bg-green-500' />
 216 | 						Completed
 217 | 					</div>
 218 | 					<div className='font-bold text-2xl'>
 219 | 						{filteredData.filter(e => e.status === "COMPLETED").length}
 220 | 					</div>
 221 | 				</div>
 222 | 				<div className='rounded-lg border bg-card p-3'>
 223 | 					<div className='flex items-center gap-2 text-muted-foreground text-sm'>
 224 | 						<CalendarIcon className='h-4 w-4' />
 225 | 						This Month
 226 | 					</div>
 227 | 					<div className='font-bold text-2xl'>
 228 | 						{
 229 | 							filteredData.filter(e => {
 230 | 								const now = new Date();
 231 | 								const encounterDate = new Date(e.date);
 232 | 								return (
 233 | 									encounterDate.getMonth() === now.getMonth() &&
 234 | 									encounterDate.getFullYear() === now.getFullYear()
 235 | 								);
 236 | 							}).length
 237 | 						}
 238 | 					</div>
 239 | 				</div>
 240 | 			</div>
 241 | 
 242 | 			{/* Table */}
 243 | 			<EncounterTable
 244 | 				data={filteredData}
 245 | 				isLoading={isLoading}
 246 | 			/>
 247 | 		</div>
 248 | 	);
 249 | }

```

`components/forms/Appointment-form.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/forms/appointment-form.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
   4 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   5 | import { Calendar } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/calendar";
   6 | import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   7 | import { Input } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/input";
   8 | import { Label } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/label";
   9 | import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/popover";
  10 | import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/select";
  11 | import { Separator } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/separator";
  12 | import { Textarea } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/textarea";
  13 | import { useMutation, useQuery, useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
  14 | import { useSelector } from "@tanstack/react-store";
  15 | import { format } from "date-fns";
  16 | import { Activity, Calendar as CalendarIcon, Stethoscope, User } from "lucide-react";
  17 | import * as React from "react";
  18 | import { toast } from "sonner";
  19 | import * as z from "zod";
  20 | 
  21 | import { cn } from "#/lib/utils";
  22 | import { useAppForm, useFormFields } from "@/components/forms/tanstack-form";
  23 | import { orpc } from "@/utils/orpc";
  24 | 
  25 | import { type AppointmentStatus, AppointmentStatusSchema, type AppointmentTypeEnum } from "../../schemas";
  26 | 
  27 | // Schema for appointment form — only the fields the form collects
  28 | const appointmentFormSchema = z.object({
  29 | 	patientId: z.string().min(1, "Please select a patient"),
  30 | 	doctorId: z.string().min(1, "Please select a doctor"),
  31 | 	appointmentDate: z.date(),
  32 | 	startTime: z.string().min(1, "Please select a start time"),
  33 | 	endTime: z.string(),
  34 | 	type: z.string().min(1).catch("CONSULTATION"),
  35 | 	status: AppointmentStatusSchema,
  36 | 	note: z.string(),
  37 | 	duration: z.number().min(15).max(120),
  38 | 	isVirtual: z.boolean(),
  39 | 	sendReminder: z.boolean(),
  40 | 	reminderMethod: z.string()
  41 | });
  42 | 
  43 | type AppointmentFormValues = z.infer<typeof appointmentFormSchema>;
  44 | 
  45 | // Time slots (30-minute intervals)
  46 | const timeSlots = Array.from({ length: 24 }, (_, i) => {
  47 | 	const hour = Math.floor(i / 2);
  48 | 	const minute = (i % 2) * 30;
  49 | 	const time = `${hour.toString().padStart(2, "0")}:${minute.toString().padStart(2, "0")}`;
  50 | 	return {
  51 | 		value: time,
  52 | 		label: format(new Date().setHours(hour, minute), "h:mm a")
  53 | 	};
  54 | });
  55 | 
  56 | const appointmentTypes = [
  57 | 	{ value: "CHECKUP", label: "Checkup" },
  58 | 	{ value: "FOLLOW_UP", label: "Follow-up" },
  59 | 	{ value: "CONSULTATION", label: "Consultation" },
  60 | 	{ value: "EMERGENCY", label: "Emergency" },
  61 | 	{ value: "VACCINATION", label: "Vaccination" },
  62 | 	{ value: "LAB_TEST", label: "Lab Test" }
  63 | ];
  64 | 
  65 | type AppointmentFormProps = {
  66 | 	defaultPatientId?: string;
  67 | 	defaultDoctorId?: string;
  68 | 	initialData?: Partial<AppointmentFormValues>;
  69 | 	onCancel?: () => void;
  70 | 	onSuccess?: () => void;
  71 | };
  72 | 
  73 | export function AppointmentForm({
  74 | 	defaultPatientId,
  75 | 	defaultDoctorId,
  76 | 	initialData,
  77 | 	onSuccess,
  78 | 	onCancel
  79 | }: AppointmentFormProps) {
  80 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
  81 | 
  82 | 	// Fetch patients for dropdown
  83 | 	const { data: patientsData, isLoading: patientsLoading } = useQuery(
  84 | 		orpc.patient.list.queryOptions({
  85 | 			input: { search: "" }
  86 | 		})
  87 | 	);
  88 | 
  89 | 	// Fetch doctors for dropdown
  90 | 	const { data: doctorsData, isLoading: doctorsLoading } = useQuery(
  91 | 		orpc.doctor.list.queryOptions({
  92 | 			input: { search: "" }
  93 | 		})
  94 | 	);
  95 | 
  96 | 	// Create appointment mutation
  97 | 	const { mutate: createAppointment, isPending: isCreatePending } = useMutation(
  98 | 		orpc.appointment.create.mutationOptions({
  99 | 			onSuccess: () => {
 100 | 				toast.success("Appointment created successfully");
 101 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 102 | 					queryKey: orpc.appointment.key()
 103 | 				});
 104 | 				onSuccess?.();
 105 | 			},
 106 | 			onError(error) {
 107 | 				console.error(error);
 108 | 				toast.error(error.message || "Failed to create appointment");
 109 | 			}
 110 | 		})
 111 | 	);
 112 | 
 113 | 	const form = useAppForm({
 114 | 		defaultValues: {
 115 | 			patientId: initialData?.patientId ?? defaultPatientId ?? "",
 116 | 			doctorId: initialData?.doctorId ?? defaultDoctorId ?? "",
 117 | 			appointmentDate: initialData?.appointmentDate ?? new Date(),
 118 | 			startTime: initialData?.startTime ?? "09:00",
 119 | 			endTime: initialData?.endTime ?? "09:30",
 120 | 			type: initialData?.type ?? "CONSULTATION",
 121 | 			status: initialData?.status ?? "PENDING",
 122 | 			note: initialData?.note ?? "",
 123 | 			duration: initialData?.duration ?? 30,
 124 | 			isVirtual: initialData?.isVirtual ?? false,
 125 | 			sendReminder: initialData?.sendReminder ?? true,
 126 | 			reminderMethod: initialData?.reminderMethod ?? "EMAIL"
 127 | 		} satisfies AppointmentFormValues,
 128 | 		validators: {
 129 | 			onSubmit: appointmentFormSchema
 130 | 		},
 131 | 		onSubmit: async ({ value }) => {
 132 | 			const appointmentDateTime = new Date(value.appointmentDate);
 133 | 			const [startHour = 0, startMinute = 0] = value.startTime.split(":").map(Number);
 134 | 			appointmentDateTime.setHours(startHour, startMinute);
 135 | 
 136 | 			createAppointment({
 137 | 				doctorId: value.doctorId,
 138 | 				patientId: value.patientId,
 139 | 				appointmentDate: appointmentDateTime,
 140 | 				type: value.type as AppointmentTypeEnum,
 141 | 				note: value.note,
 142 | 				time: value.startTime,
 143 | 				duration: value.duration,
 144 | 				serviceId: "",
 145 | 				reason: ""
 146 | 			});
 147 | 		}
 148 | 	});
 149 | 
 150 | 	const formValues = useSelector(form.store, s => s.values);
 151 | 
 152 | 	// Auto-calculate end time based on start time and duration
 153 | 	React.useEffect(() => {
 154 | 		if (formValues.startTime && formValues.duration) {
 155 | 			const [hours = 0, minutes = 0] = formValues.startTime.split(":").map(Number);
 156 | 			const totalMinutes = hours * 60 + minutes + formValues.duration;
 157 | 			const endHours = Math.floor(totalMinutes / 60);
 158 | 			const endMinutes = totalMinutes % 60;
 159 | 			const endTime = `${endHours.toString().padStart(2, "0")}:${endMinutes.toString().padStart(2, "0")}`;
 160 | 			if (endTime !== formValues.endTime) {
 161 | 				form.setFieldValue("endTime", endTime);
 162 | 			}
 163 | 		}
 164 | 	}, [formValues.startTime, formValues.duration, formValues.endTime, form]);
 165 | 
 166 | 	const { FormSelectField, FormTextField, FormSwitchField, FormTextareaField } =
 167 | 		useFormFields<AppointmentFormValues>();
 168 | 
 169 | 	return (
 170 | 		<Card className='mx-auto w-full max-w-4xl'>
 171 | 			<CardHeader>
 172 | 				<CardTitle className='font-bold text-2xl'>
 173 | 					{initialData?.patientId ? "Edit Appointment" : "Schedule New Appointment"}
 174 | 				</CardTitle>
 175 | 				<p className='text-muted-foreground'>Fill in the details to schedule a patient appointment</p>
 176 | 			</CardHeader>
 177 | 			<CardContent>
 178 | 				<form.AppForm>
 179 | 					<form.Form className='space-y-6'>
 180 | 						{/* Patient & Doctor Selection */}
 181 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 182 | 							<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 183 | 								<User className='h-5 w-5' />
 184 | 								Patient & Doctor Information
 185 | 							</h3>
 186 | 							<Separator />
 187 | 							<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2'>
 188 | 								<FormSelectField
 189 | 									label='Patient'
 190 | 									name='patientId'
 191 | 									options={
 192 | 										patientsData?.patients.map(
 193 | 											(p: { id: string; firstName: string; lastName: string }) => {
 194 | 												return {
 195 | 													value: p.id,
 196 | 													label: `${p.firstName} ${p.lastName}`
 197 | 												};
 198 | 											}
 199 | 										) ?? []
 200 | 									}
 201 | 									placeholder={patientsLoading ? "Loading..." : "Select patient"}
 202 | 									required
 203 | 									validators={{
 204 | 										onBlur: z.string().min(1, "Please select a patient")
 205 | 									}}
 206 | 								/>
 207 | 
 208 | 								<FormSelectField
 209 | 									label='Doctor'
 210 | 									name='doctorId'
 211 | 									options={
 212 | 										doctorsData?.doctors?.map(
 213 | 											(d: { id: string; name: string; specialty: string }) => {
 214 | 												return {
 215 | 													value: d.id,
 216 | 													label: `${d.name} - ${d.specialty || "General"}`
 217 | 												};
 218 | 											}
 219 | 										) ?? []
 220 | 									}
 221 | 									placeholder={doctorsLoading ? "Loading..." : "Select doctor"}
 222 | 									required
 223 | 									validators={{
 224 | 										onBlur: z.string().min(1, "Please select a doctor")
 225 | 									}}
 226 | 								/>
 227 | 							</div>
 228 | 						</div>
 229 | 
 230 | 						{/* Date & Time */}
 231 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 232 | 							<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 233 | 								<CalendarIcon className='h-5 w-5' />
 234 | 								Date & Time
 235 | 							</h3>
 236 | 							<Separator />
 237 | 							<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-3'>
 238 | 								{/* Date Picker */}
 239 | 								<form.AppField name='appointmentDate'>
 240 | 									{field => (
 241 | 										<div className='space-y-2'>
 242 | 											<Label>Appointment Date *</Label>
 243 | 											<Popover>
 244 | 												<PopoverTrigger asChild>
 245 | 													<Button
 246 | 														className={cn(
 247 | 															"w-full justify-start text-left font-normal",
 248 | 															!field.state.value && "text-muted-foreground"
 249 | 														)}
 250 | 														variant='outline'
 251 | 													>
 252 | 														<CalendarIcon className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 253 | 														{field.state.value ? (
 254 | 															format(field.state.value, "PPP")
 255 | 														) : (
 256 | 															<span>Pick a date</span>
 257 | 														)}
 258 | 													</Button>
 259 | 												</PopoverTrigger>
 260 | 												<PopoverContent
 261 | 													align='start'
 262 | 													className='w-auto p-0'
 263 | 												>
 264 | 													<Calendar
 265 | 														disabled={date => date < new Date()}
 266 | 														mode='single'
 267 | 														onSelect={date => field.handleChange(date as Date)}
 268 | 														required={false}
 269 | 														selected={field.state.value}
 270 | 													/>
 271 | 												</PopoverContent>
 272 | 											</Popover>
 273 | 											{field.state.meta.isTouched && field.state.meta.errors.length > 0 && (
 274 | 												<p className='text-red-500 text-sm'>
 275 | 													{field.state.meta.errors.join(", ")}
 276 | 												</p>
 277 | 											)}
 278 | 										</div>
 279 | 									)}
 280 | 								</form.AppField>
 281 | 
 282 | 								<FormSelectField
 283 | 									label='Start Time'
 284 | 									name='startTime'
 285 | 									options={timeSlots}
 286 | 									placeholder='Select start time'
 287 | 									required
 288 | 									validators={{
 289 | 										onBlur: z.string().min(1, "Please select start time")
 290 | 									}}
 291 | 								/>
 292 | 
 293 | 								<FormTextField
 294 | 									label='Duration (minutes)'
 295 | 									max={120}
 296 | 									min={15}
 297 | 									name='duration'
 298 | 									placeholder='30'
 299 | 									required
 300 | 									step={15}
 301 | 									type='number'
 302 | 									validators={{
 303 | 										onBlur: z.number().min(15, "Minimum 15 minutes").max(120, "Maximum 120 minutes")
 304 | 									}}
 305 | 								/>
 306 | 							</div>
 307 | 							<div className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>
 308 | 								End time:{" "}
 309 | 								{formValues.endTime
 310 | 									? format(
 311 | 											new Date().setHours(
 312 | 												Number.parseInt(formValues.endTime.split(":")[0] ?? "", 10),
 313 | 												Number.parseInt(formValues.endTime.split(":")[1] ?? "", 10)
 314 | 											),
 315 | 											"h:mm a"
 316 | 										)
 317 | 									: "Not set"}
 318 | 							</div>
 319 | 						</div>
 320 | 
 321 | 						{/* Appointment Details */}
 322 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 323 | 							<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 324 | 								<Stethoscope className='h-5 w-5' />
 325 | 								Appointment Details
 326 | 							</h3>
 327 | 							<Separator />
 328 | 							<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2'>
 329 | 								<FormSelectField
 330 | 									label='Appointment Type'
 331 | 									name='type'
 332 | 									options={appointmentTypes.map(t => {
 333 | 										return {
 334 | 											value: t.value,
 335 | 											label: t.label
 336 | 										};
 337 | 									})}
 338 | 									placeholder='Select type'
 339 | 									required
 340 | 								/>
 341 | 
 342 | 								<FormSwitchField
 343 | 									description='Conduct appointment via video call'
 344 | 									label='Virtual Appointment'
 345 | 									name='isVirtual'
 346 | 								/>
 347 | 
 348 | 								<FormSwitchField
 349 | 									description='Send appointment reminder to patient'
 350 | 									label='Send Reminder'
 351 | 									name='sendReminder'
 352 | 								/>
 353 | 							</div>
 354 | 
 355 | 							{/* Reminder Method (conditional) */}
 356 | 							{formValues.sendReminder && (
 357 | 								<div className='mt-4'>
 358 | 									<FormSelectField
 359 | 										label='Reminder Method'
 360 | 										name='reminderMethod'
 361 | 										options={[
 362 | 											{ value: "EMAIL", label: "Email" },
 363 | 											{ value: "SMS", label: "SMS" },
 364 | 											{ value: "BOTH", label: "Both" }
 365 | 										]}
 366 | 									/>
 367 | 								</div>
 368 | 							)}
 369 | 						</div>
 370 | 
 371 | 						{/* Medical Information */}
 372 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 373 | 							<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 374 | 								<Activity className='h-5 w-5' />
 375 | 								Medical Information
 376 | 							</h3>
 377 | 							<Separator />
 378 | 							<FormTextareaField
 379 | 								label='Notes'
 380 | 								name='note'
 381 | 								placeholder='Any relevant information...'
 382 | 								rows={3}
 383 | 							/>
 384 | 						</div>
 385 | 
 386 | 						{/* Status Badge Display */}
 387 | 						{formValues.status && (
 388 | 							<div className='flex items-center gap-2 rounded-lg bg-muted p-3'>
 389 | 								<span className='font-medium text-sm'>Status:</span>
 390 | 								<Badge
 391 | 									className={cn(
 392 | 										formValues.status === "SCHEDULED" && "bg-green-500",
 393 | 										formValues.status === "PENDING" && "bg-yellow-500",
 394 | 										formValues.status === "COMPLETED" && "bg-blue-500",
 395 | 										formValues.status === "CANCELLED" && "bg-red-500",
 396 | 										formValues.status === "NO_SHOW" && "bg-gray-500"
 397 | 									)}
 398 | 								>
 399 | 									{formValues.status}
 400 | 								</Badge>
 401 | 							</div>
 402 | 						)}
 403 | 
 404 | 						{/* Actions */}
 405 | 						<Separator />
 406 | 						<div className='flex justify-end gap-4'>
 407 | 							{onCancel && (
 408 | 								<Button
 409 | 									disabled={isCreatePending}
 410 | 									onClick={onCancel}
 411 | 									type='button'
 412 | 									variant='outline'
 413 | 								>
 414 | 									Cancel
 415 | 								</Button>
 416 | 							)}
 417 | 							<form.SubmitButton
 418 | 								className='min-w-30'
 419 | 								disabled={isCreatePending}
 420 | 							>
 421 | 								{isCreatePending
 422 | 									? "Scheduling..."
 423 | 									: initialData?.patientId
 424 | 										? "Update"
 425 | 										: "Schedule Appointment"}
 426 | 							</form.SubmitButton>
 427 | 						</div>
 428 | 					</form.Form>
 429 | 				</form.AppForm>
 430 | 			</CardContent>
 431 | 		</Card>
 432 | 	);
 433 | }
 434 | 
 435 | // Quick appointment form with fewer fields
 436 | type QuickAppointmentFormProps = {
 437 | 	doctorId?: string;
 438 | 	onSuccess?: () => void;
 439 | 	patientId?: string;
 440 | };
 441 | 
 442 | export function QuickAppointmentForm({ patientId, doctorId, onSuccess }: QuickAppointmentFormProps) {
 443 | 	return (
 444 | 		<AppointmentForm
 445 | 			initialData={{ patientId, doctorId }}
 446 | 			onSuccess={onSuccess}
 447 | 		/>
 448 | 	);
 449 | }
 450 | 
 451 | // Appointment reschedule form
 452 | type RescheduleFormProps = {
 453 | 	appointmentId: string;
 454 | 	currentDate: Date;
 455 | 	onCancel?: () => void;
 456 | 	onSuccess?: () => void;
 457 | };
 458 | 
 459 | export function RescheduleAppointmentForm({ appointmentId, currentDate, onSuccess, onCancel }: RescheduleFormProps) {
 460 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
 461 | 
 462 | 	// Use updateAppointmentStatus since there's no dedicated reschedule procedure
 463 | 	const { mutate: updateStatus, isPending } = useMutation(
 464 | 		orpc.appointment.updateStatus.mutationOptions({
 465 | 			onSuccess: () => {
 466 | 				toast.success("Appointment rescheduled successfully");
 467 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 468 | 					queryKey: orpc.appointment.key()
 469 | 				});
 470 | 				onSuccess?.();
 471 | 			},
 472 | 			onError: (error: Error) => {
 473 | 				toast.error(error.message || "Failed to reschedule appointment");
 474 | 			}
 475 | 		})
 476 | 	);
 477 | 
 478 | 	const form = useAppForm({
 479 | 		defaultValues: {
 480 | 			appointmentId,
 481 | 			appointmentDate: currentDate,
 482 | 			startTime: "09:00",
 483 | 			duration: 30,
 484 | 			reason: ""
 485 | 		},
 486 | 		onSubmit: async ({ value }) => {
 487 | 			// Update status to CONFIRMED as a reschedule confirmation
 488 | 			updateStatus({
 489 | 				id: value.appointmentId,
 490 | 				status: "SCHEDULED" as AppointmentStatus // Adjusted to match schema enums
 491 | 			} as { id: string; status: AppointmentStatus });
 492 | 		}
 493 | 	});
 494 | 
 495 | 	return (
 496 | 		<Card>
 497 | 			<CardHeader>
 498 | 				<CardTitle>Reschedule Appointment</CardTitle>
 499 | 			</CardHeader>
 500 | 			<CardContent>
 501 | 				<form.AppForm>
 502 | 					<form.Form className='space-y-4'>
 503 | 						<form.AppField name='appointmentDate'>
 504 | 							{field => (
 505 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 506 | 									<Label>New Date</Label>
 507 | 									<Popover>
 508 | 										<PopoverTrigger asChild>
 509 | 											<Button
 510 | 												className='w-full justify-start'
 511 | 												variant='outline'
 512 | 											>
 513 | 												<CalendarIcon className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 514 | 												{field.state.value ? format(field.state.value, "PPP") : "Select date"}
 515 | 											</Button>
 516 | 										</PopoverTrigger>
 517 | 										<PopoverContent className='w-auto p-0'>
 518 | 											<Calendar
 519 | 												disabled={date => date < new Date()}
 520 | 												mode='single'
 521 | 												onSelect={date => field.handleChange(date as Date)}
 522 | 												required={false}
 523 | 												selected={field.state.value}
 524 | 											/>
 525 | 										</PopoverContent>
 526 | 									</Popover>
 527 | 								</div>
 528 | 							)}
 529 | 						</form.AppField>
 530 | 
 531 | 						<div className='grid grid-cols-2 gap-4'>
 532 | 							<form.AppField name='startTime'>
 533 | 								{field => (
 534 | 									<div className='space-y-2'>
 535 | 										<Label>Start Time</Label>
 536 | 										<Select
 537 | 											onValueChange={field.handleChange}
 538 | 											value={field.state.value}
 539 | 										>
 540 | 											<SelectTrigger>
 541 | 												<SelectValue />
 542 | 											</SelectTrigger>
 543 | 											<SelectContent>
 544 | 												{timeSlots.map(slot => (
 545 | 													<SelectItem
 546 | 														key={slot.value}
 547 | 														value={slot.value}
 548 | 													>
 549 | 														{slot.label}
 550 | 													</SelectItem>
 551 | 												))}
 552 | 											</SelectContent>
 553 | 										</Select>
 554 | 									</div>
 555 | 								)}
 556 | 							</form.AppField>
 557 | 
 558 | 							<form.AppField name='duration'>
 559 | 								{field => (
 560 | 									<div className='space-y-2'>
 561 | 										<Label>Duration (minutes)</Label>
 562 | 										<Input
 563 | 											max={120}
 564 | 											min={15}
 565 | 											onChange={e => field.handleChange(Number.parseInt(e.target.value, 10))}
 566 | 											step={15}
 567 | 											type='number'
 568 | 											value={field.state.value}
 569 | 										/>
 570 | 									</div>
 571 | 								)}
 572 | 							</form.AppField>
 573 | 						</div>
 574 | 
 575 | 						<form.AppField name='reason'>
 576 | 							{field => (
 577 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 578 | 									<Label>Reason for Rescheduling</Label>
 579 | 									<Textarea
 580 | 										onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 581 | 										placeholder='Please provide a reason...'
 582 | 										rows={3}
 583 | 										value={field.state.value}
 584 | 									/>
 585 | 								</div>
 586 | 							)}
 587 | 						</form.AppField>
 588 | 
 589 | 						<div className='flex justify-end gap-4'>
 590 | 							<Button
 591 | 								disabled={isPending}
 592 | 								onClick={onCancel}
 593 | 								type='button'
 594 | 								variant='outline'
 595 | 							>
 596 | 								Cancel
 597 | 							</Button>
 598 | 							<form.SubmitButton disabled={isPending}>
 599 | 								{isPending ? "Rescheduling..." : "Confirm Reschedule"}
 600 | 							</form.SubmitButton>
 601 | 						</div>
 602 | 					</form.Form>
 603 | 				</form.AppForm>
 604 | 			</CardContent>
 605 | 		</Card>
 606 | 	);
 607 | }

```

`components/forms/demo-form.tsx`:

```tsx
  35 | // Schema (form-level safety net — onSubmit catches anything field-level missed)
  36 | const demoFormSchema = z.object({
  37 | 	name: z.string().min(2, "Name must be at least 2 characters"),
  38 | 	email: z.email("Invalid email address"),
  39 | 	age: z.number().min(18, "Must be at least 18 years old"),

  43 | 	bio: z.string().min(10, "Bio must be at least 10 characters"),
  44 | 	country: z.string().min(1, "Please select a country"),
  45 | 	framework: z.string().min(1, "Please select a framework"),
  46 | 	interests: z.array(z.string()).min(1, "Select at least one interest"),
  47 | 	gender: z.string().min(1, "Please select gender"),
  48 | 	newsletter: z.boolean(),

  50 | 	birthDate: z.date().optional(),
  51 | 	dateRange: z.any().optional(),
```
