  96 | 
  97 | function ComboboxField({
  98 | 	value,
  99 | 	onChange,
 100 | 	onBlur,
 101 | 	isTouched,
 102 | 	isValid
 103 | }: {
 104 | 	value: string;
 105 | 	onChange: (val: string) => void;
 106 | 	onBlur: () => void;
 107 | 	isTouched: boolean;
 108 | 	isValid: boolean;
 109 | }) {
 110 | 	const [open, setOpen] = React.useState(false);
 111 | 	const selected = frameworkOptions.find(o => o.value === value);
 112 | 	return (
 113 | 		<Popover
 114 | 			onOpenChange={setOpen}
 115 | 			open={open}
 116 | 		>
 117 | 			<PopoverTrigger asChild>
 118 | 				<Button
 119 | 					aria-controls='framework-listbox'
 120 | 					aria-expanded={open}
 121 | 					aria-invalid={isTouched && !isValid}
 122 | 					className='w-full justify-between font-normal'
 123 | 					onBlur={onBlur}
 124 | 					role='combobox'
 125 | 					variant='outline'
 126 | 				>
 127 | 					{selected?.label ?? "Search frameworks..."}
 128 | 					<Icons.chevronsUpDown className='ml-2 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 opacity-50' />
 129 | 				</Button>
 130 | 			</PopoverTrigger>
 131 | 			<PopoverContent className='w-[--radix-popover-trigger-width] p-0'>
 132 | 				<Command>
 133 | 					<CommandInput placeholder='Search...' />
 134 | 					<CommandList>
 135 | 						<CommandEmpty>No framework found.</CommandEmpty>
 136 | 						<CommandGroup>
 137 | 							{frameworkOptions.map(opt => (
 138 | 								<CommandItem
 139 | 									key={opt.value}
 140 | 									onSelect={val => {
 141 | 										onChange(val);
 142 | 										setOpen(false);
 143 | 									}}
 144 | 									value={opt.value}
 145 | 								>
 146 | 									<Icons.check
 147 | 										className={cn(
 148 | 											"mr-2 h-4 w-4",
 149 | 											value === opt.value ? "opacity-100" : "opacity-0"
 150 | 										)}
 151 | 									/>
 152 | 									{opt.label}
 153 | 								</CommandItem>
 154 | 							))}
 155 | 						</CommandGroup>
 156 | 					</CommandList>
 157 | 				</Command>
 158 | 			</PopoverContent>
 159 | 		</Popover>
 160 | 	);
 161 | }
 162 | 
 163 | function TagsField({
 164 | 	values,
 165 | 	onPush,
 166 | 	onRemove
 167 | }: {
 168 | 	values: string[];
 169 | 	onPush: (val: string) => void;
 170 | 	onRemove: (idx: number) => void;
 171 | }) {
 172 | 	const [tagInput, setTagInput] = React.useState("");
 173 | 
 174 | 	const addTag = () => {
 175 | 		const tag = tagInput.trim();
 176 | 		if (tag && !values.includes(tag)) {
 177 | 			onPush(tag);
 178 | 			setTagInput("");
 179 | 		}
 180 | 	};
 181 | 
 182 | 	return (
 183 | 		<>
 184 | 			<div className='flex gap-2'>
 185 | 				<Input
 186 | 					onChange={e => setTagInput(e.target.value)}
 187 | 					onKeyDown={e => {
 188 | 						if (e.key === "Enter") {
 189 | 							e.preventDefault();
 190 | 							addTag();
 191 | 						}
 192 | 					}}
 193 | 					placeholder='Type and press Enter...'
 194 | 					value={tagInput}
 195 | 				/>
 196 | 				<Button
 197 | 					onClick={addTag}
 198 | 					type='button'
 199 | 					variant='secondary'
 200 | 				>
 201 | 					Add
 202 | 				</Button>
 203 | 			</div>
 204 | 			{values.length > 0 && (
 205 | 				<div className='flex flex-wrap gap-2'>
 206 | 					{values.map((tag, idx) => (
 207 | 						<Badge
 208 | 							className='gap-1'
 209 | 							key={tag}
 210 | 							variant='secondary'
 211 | 						>
 212 | 							{tag}
 213 | 							<button
 214 | 								className='ml-0.5 hover:text-destructive'
 215 | 								onClick={() => onRemove(idx)}
 216 | 								type='button'
 217 | 							>
 218 | 								<Icons.close className='h-3 w-3' />
 219 | 							</button>
 220 | 						</Badge>
 221 | 					))}
 222 | 				</div>
 223 | 			)}
 224 | 		</>
 225 | 	);
 226 | }
 227 | 
 228 | function SectionTitle({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
 229 | 	return (
 230 | 		<div className='space-y-1'>
 231 | 			<Separator />
 232 | 			<h3 className='pt-2 font-medium text-muted-foreground text-sm uppercase tracking-wide'>{children}</h3>
 233 | 		</div>
 234 | 	);
 235 | }
 236 | 
 237 | // ─── Form ───
 238 | 
 239 | type DemoFormValues = {
 240 | 	name: string;
 241 | 	email: string;
 242 | 	age: number;
 243 | 	password: string;
 244 | 	phone: string;
 245 | 	website: string;
 246 | 	bio: string;
 247 | 	country: string;
 248 | 	framework: string;
 249 | 	interests: string[];
 250 | 	gender: string;
 251 | 	newsletter: boolean;
 252 | 	rating: number;
 253 | 	birthDate?: Date;
 254 | 	dateRange?: DateRange;
 255 | 	eventTime?: string;
 256 | 	favoriteColor?: string;
 257 | 	otp: string;
 258 | 	formatting?: string[];
 259 | 	tags: string[];
 260 | 	terms: boolean;
 261 | 	avatar?: File[];
 262 | };
 263 | 
 264 | export default function DemoForm() {
 265 | 	const form = useAppForm({
 266 | 		defaultValues: {
 267 | 			name: "",
 268 | 			email: "",
 269 | 			age: 18,
 270 | 			password: "",
 271 | 			phone: "",
 272 | 			website: "",
 273 | 			bio: "",
 274 | 			country: "",
 275 | 			framework: "",
 276 | 			interests: [],
 277 | 			gender: "",
 278 | 			newsletter: false,
 279 | 			rating: 5,
 280 | 			birthDate: undefined,
 281 | 			dateRange: undefined,
 282 | 			eventTime: "",
 283 | 			favoriteColor: "#6366f1",
 284 | 			otp: "",
 285 | 			formatting: [],
 286 | 			tags: [],
 287 | 			terms: false,
 288 | 			avatar: []
 289 | 		} as DemoFormValues,
 290 | 		validators: {
 291 | 			// Form-level safety net — catches anything field-level validators missed
 292 | 			onSubmit: demoFormSchema
 293 | 		},
 294 | 		onSubmit: () => {
 295 | 			alert("Form submitted successfully!");
 296 | 		}
 297 | 	});
 298 | 
 299 | 	const {
 300 | 		FormTextField,
 301 | 		FormTextareaField,
 302 | 		FormSelectField,
 303 | 		FormSwitchField,
 304 | 		FormRadioGroupField,
 305 | 		FormSliderField,
 306 | 		FormFileUploadField
 307 | 	} = useFormFields<DemoFormValues>();
 308 | 
 309 | 	const formValues = useSelector(form.store, s => s.values);
 310 | 
 311 | 	return (
 312 | 		<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 xl:grid-cols-[1fr_320px]'>
 313 | 			<Card>
 314 | 				<CardHeader>
 315 | 					<CardTitle className='font-bold text-2xl'>All Form Inputs Demo</CardTitle>
 316 | 					<p className='text-muted-foreground'>
 317 | 						Every possible form input — built with TanStack Form + shadcn/ui
 318 | 					</p>
 319 | 				</CardHeader>
 320 | 				<CardContent>
 321 | 					<form.AppForm>
 322 | 						<form.Form className='space-y-6'>
 323 | 							{/* ─── TEXT INPUTS (flat pattern + field-level onBlur validation) ─── */}
 324 | 							<SectionTitle>Text Inputs</SectionTitle>
 325 | 
 326 | 							<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2'>
 327 | 								<FormTextField
 328 | 									label='Full Name'
 329 | 									name='name'
 330 | 									placeholder='John Doe'
 331 | 									required
 332 | 									validators={{
 333 | 										onBlur: z.string().min(2, "Name must be at least 2 characters")
 334 | 									}}
 335 | 								/>
 336 | 								{/* Async validation: simulated server-side email check */}
 337 | 								<FormTextField
 338 | 									label='Email'
 339 | 									name='email'
 340 | 									placeholder='john@example.com'
 341 | 									required
 342 | 									type='email'
 343 | 									validators={{
 344 | 										onBlur: z.email("Invalid email address"),
 345 | 										onChangeAsync: async ({ value }: { value: string }) => {
 346 | 											if (!value || value.length < 3) return undefined;
 347 | 											// Simulated server check — replace with real API call
 348 | 											await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500));
 349 | 											if (value === "taken@example.com") {
 350 | 												return "This email is already registered";
 351 | 											}
 352 | 											return undefined;
 353 | 										},
 354 | 										onChangeAsyncDebounceMs: 500
 355 | 									}}
 356 | 								/>
 357 | 								<FormTextField
 358 | 									label='Password'
 359 | 									name='password'
 360 | 									placeholder='Min 8 characters'
 361 | 									required
 362 | 									type='password'
 363 | 									validators={{
 364 | 										onBlur: z.string().min(8, "Password must be at least 8 characters")
 365 | 									}}
 366 | 								/>
 367 | 								<FormTextField
 368 | 									label='Age'
 369 | 									max={100}
 370 | 									min={18}
 371 | 									name='age'
 372 | 									placeholder='18'
 373 | 									required
 374 | 									type='number'
 375 | 									validators={{
 376 | 										onBlur: z.number().min(18, "Must be at least 18 years old")
 377 | 									}}
 378 | 								/>
 379 | 								<FormTextField
 380 | 									label='Phone'
 381 | 									name='phone'
 382 | 									placeholder='+1 (555) 000-0000'
 383 | 									required
 384 | 									type='tel'
 385 | 									validators={{
 386 | 										onBlur: z.string().min(10, "Phone must be at least 10 digits")
 387 | 									}}
 388 | 								/>

 390 | 									label='Website'

 394 | 								/>
 395 | 							</div>

 458 | 
 459 | 							{/* Checkbox Group — array mode, needs AppField */}
 460 | 							<form.AppField
 461 | 								mode='array'
 462 | 								name='interests'
 463 | 							>
 464 | 								{field => {
 465 | 									const values: string[] = field.state.value || [];
 466 | 									return (
 467 | 										<field.FieldSet>
 468 | 											<field.FieldLabel>Interests *</field.FieldLabel>
 469 | 											<FieldDescription>Select all that apply</FieldDescription>
 470 | 											<div className='grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 md:grid-cols-3'>
 471 | 												{interestOptions.map(opt => (
 472 | 													<div
 473 | 														className='flex items-center space-x-2'
 474 | 														key={opt.value}
 475 | 													>
 476 | 														<Checkbox
 477 | 															checked={values.includes(opt.value)}
 478 | 															id={`interests-${opt.value}`}
 479 | 															onCheckedChange={(checked: boolean) => {

 481 | 																	field.pushValue(opt.value);
 482 | 																} else {
 483 | 																	const idx = values.indexOf(opt.value);
 484 | 																	if (idx > -1) field.removeValue(idx);
 485 | 																}
 486 | 															}}
 487 | 														/>

 489 | 													</div>
 490 | 												))}
 491 | 											</div>

```

`components/forms/form-context.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | /** biome-ignore-all lint/suspicious/noExplicitAny: <ok> */
   2 | 
   3 | import {
   4 | 	Field as DefaultField,
   5 | 	FieldError as DefaultFieldError,
   6 | 	FieldSet as DefaultFieldSet,
   7 | 	type fieldVariants
   8 | } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/field";
   9 | import { Label } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/label";
  10 | import { Textarea as ShadcnTextarea } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/textarea";
  11 | import type { AnyFieldApi, DeepKeys } from "@tanstack/form-core";
  12 | import { createFormHookContexts } from "@tanstack/react-form";
  13 | import { useSelector } from "@tanstack/react-store";
  14 | import type { VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority";
  15 | import * as React from "react";
  16 | import { cn } from
  17 | @clinic
  18 | /ui/bil / utils;
  19 | ";
  20 | 
  21 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  22 | // 1. Contextso
  23 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  24 | 
  25 | const { fieldContext, formContext, useFieldContext: _useFieldContext, useFormContext } = createFormHookContexts();
  26 | 
  27 | type FormItemContextValue = {
  28 | 	id: string;
  29 | };
  30 | 
  31 | const FormItemContext = React.createContext<FormItemContextValue>({} as FormItemContextValue);
  32 | 
  33 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  34 | // 2. Enhanced useFieldContext
  35 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  36 | 
  37 | const useFieldContext = () => {
  38 | 	const { id } = React.useContext(FormItemContext);
  39 | 	const fieldCtx = _useFieldContext();
  40 | 
  41 | 	if (!fieldCtx) {
  42 | 		throw new Error("useFieldContext should be used within <AppField>");
  43 | 	}
  44 | 
  45 | 	const { name, store, ...rest } = fieldCtx;
  46 | 	const errors = useSelector(store, state => state.meta.errors);
  47 | 
  48 | 	return {
  49 | 		id,
  50 | 		name,
  51 | 		formItemId: `${id}-form-item`,
  52 | 		formDescriptionId: `${id}-form-item-description`,
  53 | 		formMessageId: `${id}-form-item-message`,
  54 | 		errors,
  55 | 		store,
  56 | 		...rest
  57 | 	};
  58 | };
  59 | function SelectField({ label, children, disabled }: { label: string; children: React.ReactNode; disabled?: boolean }) {
  60 | 	const field = useFieldContext();
  61 | 
  62 | 	return (
  63 | 		<div className='space-y-1'>
  64 | 			<label
  65 | 				className='block font-medium text-gray-700 text-sm'
  66 | 				htmlFor={field.formItemId}
  67 | 			>
  68 | 				{label}
  69 | 			</label>
  70 | 			<select
  71 | 				className='w-full rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 focus:border-blue-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500'
  72 | 				disabled={disabled}
  73 | 				id={field.formItemId}
  74 | 				onBlur={field.handleBlur}
  75 | 				onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
  76 | 				value={useSelector(field.store, state => state.value) as string}
  77 | 			>
  78 | 				{children}
  79 | 			</select>
  80 | 			{field.errors.length > 0 && <p className='text-red-600 text-sm'>{field.errors.join(", ")}</p>}
  81 | 		</div>
  82 | 	);
  83 | }
  84 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  85 | // 3. Structural field components
  86 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  87 | 
  88 | function FieldSet({ className, children, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"fieldset">) {
  89 | 	const id = React.useId();
  90 | 
  91 | 	return (
  92 | 		<FormItemContext.Provider value={{ id }}>
  93 | 			<DefaultFieldSet
  94 | 				className={cn("grid gap-1", className)}
  95 | 				{...props}
  96 | 			>
  97 | 				{children}
  98 | 			</DefaultFieldSet>
  99 | 		</FormItemContext.Provider>
 100 | 	);
 101 | }
 102 | 
 103 | function Field({ children, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof DefaultField> & VariantProps<typeof fieldVariants>) {
 104 | 	const { errors, formItemId, formDescriptionId, formMessageId, store } = useFieldContext();
 105 | 	const form = useFormContext();
 106 | 	const isTouched = useSelector(store, state => state.meta.isTouched);
 107 | 	// Show errors after user interaction OR after first submit attempt
 108 | 	const hasSubmitted = useSelector(form.store, s => s.submissionAttempts > 0);
 109 | 	const hasVisibleErrors = errors.length > 0 && (isTouched || hasSubmitted);
 110 | 
 111 | 	return (
 112 | 		<DefaultField
 113 | 			aria-describedby={hasVisibleErrors ? `${formDescriptionId} ${formMessageId}` : `${formDescriptionId}`}
 114 | 			aria-invalid={hasVisibleErrors}
 115 | 			data-invalid={hasVisibleErrors}
 116 | 			id={formItemId}
 117 | 			{...props}
 118 | 		>
 119 | 			{children}
 120 | 		</DefaultField>
 121 | 	);
 122 | }
 123 | 
 124 | function FieldError({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"p">) {
 125 | 	const { errors, formMessageId, store } = useFieldContext();
 126 | 	const form = useFormContext();
 127 | 	const isTouched = useSelector(store, state => state.meta.isTouched);
 128 | 	const hasSubmitted = useSelector(form.store, s => s.submissionAttempts > 0);
 129 | 	if (!(errors.length > 0 && (isTouched || hasSubmitted))) return null;
 130 | 	return (
 131 | 		<DefaultFieldError
 132 | 			className={cn("text-destructive text-sm", className)}
 133 | 			data-slot='form-message'
 134 | 			id={formMessageId}
 135 | 			{...props}
 136 | 			errors={errors}
 137 | 		/>
 138 | 	);
 139 | }
 140 | 
 141 | function ErrorMessages({ errors }: { errors: Array<string | { message: string }> }) {
 142 | 	return (
 143 | 		<>
 144 | 			{errors.map(error => (
 145 | 				<div
 146 | 					className='mt-1 font-bold text-red-500'
 147 | 					key={typeof error === "string" ? error : error.message}
 148 | 				>
 149 | 					{typeof error === "string" ? error : error.message}
 150 | 				</div>
 151 | 			))}
 152 | 		</>
 153 | 	);
 154 | }
 155 | 
 156 | function TextArea({ label, rows = 3 }: { label: string; rows?: number }) {
 157 | 	const field = useFieldContext();
 158 | 	const errors = useSelector(field.store, state => state.meta.errors);
 159 | 
 160 | 	return (
 161 | 		<div>
 162 | 			<Label
 163 | 				className='mb-2 font-bold text-xl'
 164 | 				htmlFor={label}
 165 | 			>
 166 | 				{label}
 167 | 			</Label>
 168 | 			<ShadcnTextarea
 169 | 				id={label}
 170 | 				onBlur={field.handleBlur}
 171 | 				onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 172 | 				rows={rows}
 173 | 				value={useSelector(field.store, state => state.value) as string}
 174 | 			/>
 175 | 			{useSelector(field.store, state => state.meta.isTouched) && <ErrorMessages errors={errors} />}
 176 | 		</div>
 177 | 	);
 178 | }
 179 | 
 180 | /**
 181 |  * Renders form-level validation errors (cross-field errors).
 182 |  * Place inside form.AppForm to show errors from form-level validators.
 183 |  *
 184 |  * @example
 185 |  * ```tsx
 186 |  * <form.AppForm>
 187 |  *   <form.Form>
 188 |  *     <FormErrors />
 189 |  *     ...fields...
 190 |  *   </form.Form>
 191 |  * </form.AppForm>
 192 |  * ```
 193 |  */
 194 | function FormErrors({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"div">) {
 195 | 	const form = useFormContext();
 196 | 	return (
 197 | 		<form.Subscribe selector={state => state.errors}>
 198 | 			{errors => {
 199 | 				if (errors.length === 0) return null;
 200 | 				return (
 201 | 					<div
 202 | 						className={cn("rounded-md border bg-destructive/10 p-3 text-destructive text-sm", className)}
 203 | 						role='alert'
 204 | 						{...props}
 205 | 					>
 206 | 						<ul className='list-disc space-y-1 pl-4'>
 207 | 							{errors.map((error, i) => (
 208 | 								<li key={error.message || i}>{String(error)}</li>
 209 | 							))}
 210 | 						</ul>
 211 | 					</div>
 212 | 				);
 213 | 			}}
 214 | 		</form.Subscribe>
 215 | 	);
 216 | }
 217 | 
 218 | /**
 219 |  * Scrolls to the first field with a validation error.
 220 |  * Call after a failed form.handleSubmit() to guide the user to the problem.
 221 |  *
 222 |  * @example
 223 |  * ```tsx
 224 |  * onSubmit: ({ value }) => { ... },
 225 |  * onSubmitInvalid: () => scrollToFirstError(),
 226 |  * ```
 227 |  */
 228 | function scrollToFirstError() {
 229 | 	// Fields with errors have data-invalid="true" set by the FormField component
 230 | 	requestAnimationFrame(() => {
 231 | 		const firstError = document.querySelector('[data-invalid="true"]');
 232 | 		if (firstError) {
 233 | 			firstError.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "center" });
 234 | 			// Focus the first focusable element within the error field
 235 | 			const focusable = firstError.querySelector<HTMLElement>("input, textarea, select, button, [tabindex]");
 236 | 			focusable?.focus({ preventScroll: true });
 237 | 		}
 238 | 	});
 239 | }
 240 | 
 241 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 242 | // 4. Field-level configuration types
 243 | //
 244 | //    These mirror TanStack Form's field options that get forwarded to
 245 | //    form.Field when using the flat FormXxxField pattern via createFormField.
 246 | //    Validator values accept Zod schemas (StandardSchemaV1) or plain functions.
 247 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 248 | 
 249 | /** Field-level validators forwarded to form.Field */
 250 | type FieldValidatorConfig = {
 251 | 	/** Sync validator — runs when the field loses focus. Accepts a function or Zod schema. */
 252 | 	onBlur?: unknown;
 253 | 	/** Async validator — runs on blur. */
 254 | 	onBlurAsync?: unknown;
 255 | 	/** Debounce (ms) for onBlurAsync. */
 256 | 	onBlurAsyncDebounceMs?: number;
 257 | 	/** Re-run onBlur/onBlurAsync when these other fields blur. */
 258 | 	onBlurListenTo?: string[];
 259 | 	/** Sync validator — runs on every value change. Accepts a function or Zod schema. */
 260 | 	onChange?: unknown;
 261 | 	/** Async validator — runs on value change (debounced). */
 262 | 	onChangeAsync?: unknown;
 263 | 	/** Debounce (ms) for onChangeAsync. */
 264 | 	onChangeAsyncDebounceMs?: number;
 265 | 	/** Re-run onChange/onChangeAsync when these other fields change (linked validation). */
 266 | 	onChangeListenTo?: string[];
 267 | 	/** Sync validator — runs on field mount. */
 268 | 	onMount?: unknown;
 269 | 	/** Sync validator — runs on form submission. */
 270 | 	onSubmit?: unknown;
 271 | 	/** Async validator — runs on form submission. */
 272 | 	onSubmitAsync?: unknown;
 273 | };
 274 | 
 275 | /** Field-level side-effect listeners forwarded to form.Field */
 276 | type FieldListenerConfig = {
 277 | 	/** Fires when the field loses focus. */
 278 | 	onBlur?: (props: { value: unknown; fieldApi: AnyFieldApi }) => void;
 279 | 	/** Debounce (ms) for the onBlur listener. */
 280 | 	onBlurDebounceMs?: number;
 281 | 	/** Fires after the field value changes. Use for side effects (e.g., resetting dependent fields). */
 282 | 	onChange?: (props: { value: unknown; fieldApi: AnyFieldApi }) => void;
 283 | 	/** Debounce (ms) for the onChange listener. */
 284 | 	onChangeDebounceMs?: number;
 285 | 	/** Fires when the field mounts. */
 286 | 	onMount?: (props: { value: unknown; fieldApi: AnyFieldApi }) => void;
 287 | 	/** Fires on form submission. */
 288 | 	onSubmit?: (props: { value: unknown; fieldApi: AnyFieldApi }) => void;
 289 | };
 290 | 
 291 | /**
 292 |  * Configuration forwarded to TanStack Form's form.Field component.
 293 |  * Use with createFormField composed components (FormTextField, etc.)
 294 |  * to enable field-level validation, async validation, and side-effect listeners.
 295 |  *
 296 |  * For type-safe field names, use form.AppField render-prop pattern instead.
 297 |  */
 298 | type FieldConfig = {
 299 | 	/** Default debounce (ms) for all async validators on this field. */
 300 | 	asyncDebounceMs?: number;
 301 | 	/** Default value for this field (useful for dynamically added fields). */
 302 | 	defaultValue?: unknown;
 303 | 	/** Side-effect listeners (onChange, onBlur, onMount, onSubmit). */
 304 | 	listeners?: FieldListenerConfig;
 305 | 	/** Set to 'array' for array fields (enables pushValue, removeValue, etc.). */
 306 | 	mode?: "value" | "array";
 307 | 	/** Field-level validators (onBlur, onChange, onSubmit + async variants). */
 308 | 	validators?: FieldValidatorConfig;
 309 | };
 310 | 
 311 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 312 | // 5. createFormField — lifts a field component into a flat form-level component
 313 | //
 314 | //    Forwards TanStack Form's field-level config (validators, listeners)
 315 | //    to form.Field while keeping the ergonomic flat API.
 316 | //
 317 | //    For type-safe field names, use form.AppField render-prop pattern.
 318 | //    The flat FormXxxField pattern trades name type-safety for ergonomics.
 319 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 320 | 
 321 | type FormFieldSlot = React.ComponentType<{
 322 | 	name: string;
 323 | 	validators?: FieldValidatorConfig;
 324 | 	asyncDebounceMs?: number;
 325 | 	listeners?: FieldListenerConfig;
 326 | 	mode?: "value" | "array";
 327 | 	defaultValue?: unknown;
 328 | 	children: (fieldApi: AnyFieldApi) => React.ReactNode;
 329 | }>;
 330 | 
 331 | function createFormField<P extends object>(FieldComponent: React.ComponentType<P>) {
 332 | 	function ComposedFormField({
 333 | 		name,
 334 | 		validators,
 335 | 		asyncDebounceMs,
 336 | 		listeners,
 337 | 		mode,
 338 | 		defaultValue,
 339 | 		...props
 340 | 	}: { name: string } & FieldConfig &
 341 | 		Omit<P, "name" | "validators" | "asyncDebounceMs" | "listeners" | "mode" | "defaultValue">) {
 342 | 		const form = useFormContext();
 343 | 		const FieldSlot = form.Field as unknown as FormFieldSlot;
 344 | 		return (
 345 | 			<FieldSlot
 346 | 				asyncDebounceMs={asyncDebounceMs}
 347 | 				defaultValue={defaultValue}
 348 | 				listeners={listeners}
 349 | 				mode={mode}
 350 | 				name={name}
 351 | 				validators={validators}
 352 | 			>
 353 | 				{fieldApi => (
 354 | 					<fieldContext.Provider value={fieldApi as AnyFieldApi}>
 355 | 						<FieldComponent {...(props as unknown as P)} />
 356 | 					</fieldContext.Provider>
 357 | 				)}
 358 | 			</FieldSlot>
 359 | 		);
 360 | 	}
 361 | 	ComposedFormField.displayName = `FormField(${FieldComponent.displayName ?? FieldComponent.name})`;
 362 | 	return ComposedFormField;
 363 | }
 364 | 
 365 | function DateField({ label, min }: { label: string; min?: string }) {
 366 | 	const field = useFieldContext();
 367 | 	const value = useSelector(field.store, state => state.value);
 368 | 
 369 | 	return (
 370 | 		<div className='space-y-1'>
 371 | 			<Label htmlFor={field.formItemId}>{label}</Label>
 372 | 			<input
 373 | 				className='w-full rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 focus:border-blue-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500'
 374 | 				id={field.formItemId}
 375 | 				min={min}
 376 | 				onBlur={field.handleBlur}
 377 | 				onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 378 | 				type='date'
 379 | 				value={
 380 | 					value instanceof Date
 381 | 						? value.toISOString().split("T")[0]
 382 | 						: (value as string | number | readonly string[]) || ""
 383 | 				}
 384 | 			/>
 385 | 			{field.errors.length > 0 && <p className='text-red-600 text-sm'>{field.errors.join(", ")}</p>}
 386 | 		</div>
 387 | 	);
 388 | }
 389 | 
 390 | function TimeField({ label }: { label: string }) {
 391 | 	const field = useFieldContext();
 392 | 	const value = useSelector(field.store, state => state.value);
 393 | 
 394 | 	return (
 395 | 		<div className='space-y-1'>
 396 | 			<Label htmlFor={field.formItemId}>{label}</Label>
 397 | 			<input
 398 | 				className='w-full rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 focus:border-blue-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500'
 399 | 				id={field.formItemId}
 400 | 				onBlur={field.handleBlur}
 401 | 				onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 402 | 				type='time'
 403 | 				value={(value as string | number | readonly string[]) || ""}
 404 | 			/>
 405 | 			{field.errors.length > 0 && <p className='text-red-600 text-sm'>{field.errors.join(", ")}</p>}
 406 | 		</div>
 407 | 	);
 408 | }
 409 | 
 410 | function NumberField({ label, min, max, step }: { label: string; min?: number; max?: number; step?: number }) {
 411 | 	const field = useFieldContext();
 412 | 	const value = useSelector(field.store, state => state.value);
 413 | 
 414 | 	return (
 415 | 		<div className='space-y-1'>
 416 | 			<Label htmlFor={field.formItemId}>{label}</Label>
 417 | 			<input
 418 | 				className='w-full rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 focus:border-blue-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500'
 419 | 				id={field.formItemId}
 420 | 				max={max}
 421 | 				min={min}
 422 | 				onBlur={field.handleBlur}
 423 | 				onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.valueAsNumber)}
 424 | 				step={step}
 425 | 				type='number'
 426 | 				value={(value as string | number | readonly string[]) ?? ""}
 427 | 			/>
 428 | 			{field.errors.length > 0 && <p className='text-red-600 text-sm'>{field.errors.join(", ")}</p>}
 429 | 		</div>
 430 | 	);
 431 | }
 432 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 433 | // 6. Type-safe field name utilities
 434 | //
 435 | //    Standalone FormXxxField components have `name: string` by default because
 436 | //    they don't know which form they'll be used in at definition time.
 437 | //
 438 | //    These utilities narrow `name` to the form's actual field paths using
 439 | //    TanStack Form's DeepKeys<TValues>, giving full autocomplete + type errors.
 440 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 441 | 
 442 | /**
 443 |  * Narrows a composed field component's `name` prop to `DeepKeys<TValues>`.
 444 |  * Used internally by useFormFields and typedField.
 445 |  */
 446 | type WithTypedName<C, TValues> =
 447 | 	C extends React.ComponentType<infer P>
 448 | 		? P extends { name: string }
 449 | 			? React.ComponentType<Omit<P, "name"> & { name: DeepKeys<TValues> & string }>
 450 | 			: C
 451 | 		: C;
 452 | 
 453 | /**
 454 |  * Narrows any single composed field component's `name` prop to type-safe field paths.
 455 |  * Use for custom fields not included in useFormFields.
 456 |  *
 457 |  * @example
 458 |  * ```tsx
 459 |  * const narrow = typedField<MyFormValues>();
 460 |  * const TypedDatePicker = narrow(FormDatePickerField);
 461 |  * <TypedDatePicker name="birthDate" />  // ✅ type-safe
 462 |  * ```
 463 |  */
 464 | function typedField<TValues extends Record<string, unknown>>() {
 465 | 	return <C extends React.ComponentType<{ name: string }>>(Component: C): WithTypedName<C, TValues> =>
 466 | 		Component as WithTypedName<C, TValues>;
 467 | }
 468 | 
 469 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 470 | // 7. Exports
 471 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 472 | 
 473 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 474 | // 7. Exports
 475 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 476 | 
 477 | export type { FieldConfig, FieldListenerConfig, FieldValidatorConfig, WithTypedName };
 478 | export {
 479 | 	createFormField,
 480 | 	DateField,
 481 | 	Field,
 482 | 	Field as FormField,
 483 | 	FieldError,
 484 | 	FieldError as FormFieldError,
 485 | 	FieldSet,
 486 | 	FieldSet as FormFieldSet,
 487 | 	FormErrors,
 488 | 	fieldContext,
 489 | 	formContext,
 490 | 	NumberField,
 491 | 	SelectField,
 492 | 	scrollToFirstError,
 493 | 	TextArea,
 494 | 	TimeField,
 495 | 	typedField,
 496 | 	useFieldContext,
 497 | 	useFormContext
 498 | };

```

`components/forms/medicalRecord-form.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/forms/medical-record-form.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   4 | import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   5 | import { Input } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/input";
   6 | import { Label } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/label";
   7 | import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/select";
   8 | import { Textarea } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/textarea";
   9 | import { useMutation, useQuery, useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
  10 | import { format } from "date-fns";
  11 | import { toast } from "sonner";
  12 | import { z } from "zod";
  13 | 
  14 | import { useAppForm } from "@/components/forms/tanstack-form";
  15 | import { orpc } from "@/utils/orpc";
  16 | 
  17 | import { MedicalRecordsSchema, type PatientType } from "../../schemas";
  18 | 
  19 | const MedicalRecordCreateSchema = MedicalRecordsSchema.pick({
  20 | 	patientId: true,
  21 | 	appointmentId: true,
  22 | 	doctorId: true,
  23 | 	clinicId: true,
  24 | 	diagnosis: true,
  25 | 	symptoms: true,
  26 | 	treatmentPlan: true,
  27 | 	labRequest: true,
  28 | 	notes: true,
  29 | 	attachments: true,
  30 | 	followUpDate: true,
  31 | 	deletedAt: true,
  32 | 	isDeleted: true,
  33 | 	createdAt: true,
  34 | 	updatedAt: true
  35 | }).extend({
  36 | 	status: z.enum(["ACTIVE", "COMPLETED", "FOLLOW_UP"]).default("ACTIVE"),
  37 | 	diagnosisDate: z.date().optional(),
  38 | 	medications: z.string().nullable().optional()
  39 | });
  40 | 
  41 | type MedicalRecordFormValues = z.infer<typeof MedicalRecordCreateSchema>;
  42 | 
  43 | type MedicalRecordFormProps = {
  44 | 	appointmentId?: string;
  45 | 	initialData?: Partial<MedicalRecordFormValues>;
  46 | 	onCancel?: () => void;
  47 | 	onSuccess?: () => void;
  48 | 	patientId?: string;
  49 | };
  50 | 
  51 | export function MedicalRecordForm({
  52 | 	initialData,
  53 | 	patientId,
  54 | 	appointmentId,
  55 | 	onSuccess,
  56 | 	onCancel
  57 | }: MedicalRecordFormProps) {
  58 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
  59 | 
  60 | 	// Fetch patients for dropdown
  61 | 	const { data: patientsData, isLoading: patientsLoading } = useQuery(
  62 | 		orpc.patient.list.queryOptions({
  63 | 			input: { search: "", page: 1, pageSize: 100 }
  64 | 		})
  65 | 	);
  66 | 
  67 | 	// Create medical record mutation
  68 | 	const { mutate: createRecord, isPending } = useMutation(
  69 | 		orpc.medicalRecord.create.mutationOptions({
  70 | 			onSuccess: () => {
  71 | 				toast.success("Medical record created successfully");
  72 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: orpc.medicalRecord.key() });
  73 | 				onSuccess?.();
  74 | 			},
  75 | 			onError: (error: Error) => {
  76 | 				console.error("Error creating medical record:", error);
  77 | 				toast.error(error.message || "Failed to create medical record");
  78 | 			}
  79 | 		})
  80 | 	);
  81 | 
  82 | 	const form = useAppForm({
  83 | 		defaultValues: {
  84 | 			clinicId: initialData?.clinicId ?? "",
  85 | 			patientId: patientId ?? initialData?.patientId ?? "",
  86 | 			appointmentId: appointmentId ?? initialData?.appointmentId ?? "",
  87 | 			doctorId: initialData?.doctorId ?? "",
  88 | 			diagnosis: initialData?.diagnosis ?? "",
  89 | 			notes: initialData?.notes ?? null,
  90 | 			diagnosisDate: initialData?.diagnosisDate ?? new Date(),
  91 | 			symptoms: initialData?.symptoms ?? null,
  92 | 			treatmentPlan: initialData?.treatmentPlan ?? "",
  93 | 			labRequest: initialData?.labRequest ?? null,
  94 | 			attachments: initialData?.attachments ?? null,
  95 | 			followUpDate: initialData?.followUpDate ?? null,
  96 | 			deletedAt: initialData?.deletedAt ?? null,
  97 | 			isDeleted: false,
  98 | 			status: "ACTIVE" as MedicalRecordFormValues["status"],
  99 | 			createdAt: initialData?.createdAt ?? new Date(),
 100 | 			updatedAt: initialData?.updatedAt ?? new Date()
 101 | 		} satisfies MedicalRecordFormValues,
 102 | 		onSubmit: async ({ value }) => {
 103 | 			const record = {
 104 | 				patientId: value.patientId,
 105 | 				appointmentId: value.appointmentId,
 106 | 				doctorId: value.doctorId || undefined,
 107 | 				clinicId: value.clinicId,
 108 | 				diagnosis: value.diagnosis || undefined,
 109 | 				symptoms: value.symptoms || undefined,
 110 | 				treatmentPlan: value.treatmentPlan || undefined,
 111 | 				notes: value.notes || undefined,
 112 | 				diagnosisDate: value.diagnosisDate ?? new Date(),
 113 | 				labRequest: value.labRequest || undefined,
 114 | 				attachments: value.attachments || undefined,
 115 | 				followUpDate: value.followUpDate || undefined,
 116 | 				status: value.status,
 117 | 				createdAt: value.createdAt,
 118 | 				updatedAt: value.updatedAt ?? new Date()
 119 | 			};
 120 | 			createRecord(record);
 121 | 		}
 122 | 	});
 123 | 
 124 | 	const patients = patientsData?.patients ?? [];
 125 | 
 126 | 	return (
 127 | 		<Card className='mx-auto w-full max-w-3xl'>
 128 | 			<CardHeader>
 129 | 				<CardTitle className='font-bold text-2xl'>Create Medical Record</CardTitle>
 130 | 				<p className='text-muted-foreground'>Record clinical findings, diagnosis, and treatment plans.</p>
 131 | 			</CardHeader>
 132 | 			<CardContent>
 133 | 				<form.AppForm>
 134 | 					<form.Form className='space-y-6'>
 135 | 						{/* Patient & Appointment */}
 136 | 						<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2'>
 137 | 							{/* Patient Selection */}
 138 | 							<form.AppField name='patientId'>
 139 | 								{field => (
 140 | 									<div className='space-y-2'>
 141 | 										<Label htmlFor={field.name}>
 142 | 											Patient <span className='text-destructive'>*</span>
 143 | 										</Label>
 144 | 										<Select
 145 | 											disabled={!!patientId || patientsLoading}
 146 | 											onValueChange={field.handleChange}
 147 | 											value={field.state.value ?? ""}
 148 | 										>
 149 | 											<SelectTrigger id={field.name}>
 150 | 												<SelectValue placeholder='Select patient' />
 151 | 											</SelectTrigger>
 152 | 											<SelectContent>
 153 | 												{(patients as PatientType[]).map(patient => (
 154 | 													<SelectItem
 155 | 														key={patient.id}
 156 | 														value={patient.id}
 157 | 													>
 158 | 														{patient.firstName} {patient.lastName} ({patient.email})
 159 | 													</SelectItem>
 160 | 												))}
 161 | 											</SelectContent>
 162 | 										</Select>
 163 | 										{field.state.meta.errors.length > 0 && (
 164 | 											<p className='text-destructive text-sm'>
 165 | 												{field.state.meta.errors.join(", ")}
 166 | 											</p>
 167 | 										)}
 168 | 									</div>
 169 | 								)}
 170 | 							</form.AppField>
 171 | 
 172 | 							{/* Appointment ID (optional) */}
 173 | 							<form.AppField name='appointmentId'>
 174 | 								{field => (
 175 | 									<div className='space-y-2'>
 176 | 										<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Appointment (Optional)</Label>
 177 | 										<Input
 178 | 											disabled={!!appointmentId}
 179 | 											id={field.name}
 180 | 											onBlur={field.handleBlur}
 181 | 											onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 182 | 											placeholder='Appointment ID'
 183 | 											value={field.state.value ?? ""}
 184 | 										/>
 185 | 									</div>
 186 | 								)}
 187 | 							</form.AppField>
 188 | 						</div>
 189 | 
 190 | 						{/* Diagnosis */}
 191 | 						<form.AppField name='diagnosis'>
 192 | 							{field => (
 193 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 194 | 									<Label htmlFor={field.name}>
 195 | 										Diagnosis <span className='text-destructive'>*</span>
 196 | 									</Label>
 197 | 									<Textarea
 198 | 										id={field.name}
 199 | 										onBlur={field.handleBlur}
 200 | 										onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 201 | 										placeholder='Enter primary diagnosis...'
 202 | 										rows={3}
 203 | 										value={field.state.value ?? ""}
 204 | 									/>
 205 | 									{field.state.meta.errors.length > 0 && (
 206 | 										<p className='text-destructive text-sm'>{field.state.meta.errors.join(", ")}</p>
 207 | 									)}
 208 | 								</div>
 209 | 							)}
 210 | 						</form.AppField>
 211 | 
 212 | 						{/* Treatment Plan */}
 213 | 						<form.AppField name='treatmentPlan'>
 214 | 							{field => (
 215 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 216 | 									<Label htmlFor={field.name}>
 217 | 										Treatment Plan <span className='text-destructive'>*</span>
 218 | 									</Label>
 219 | 									<Textarea
 220 | 										id={field.name}
 221 | 										onBlur={field.handleBlur}
 222 | 										onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 223 | 										placeholder='Describe the treatment provided...'
 224 | 										rows={3}
 225 | 										value={field.state.value ?? ""}
 226 | 									/>
 227 | 									{field.state.meta.errors.length > 0 && (
 228 | 										<p className='text-destructive text-sm'>{field.state.meta.errors.join(", ")}</p>
 229 | 									)}
 230 | 								</div>
 231 | 							)}
 232 | 						</form.AppField>
 233 | 
 234 | 						{/* Symptoms */}
 235 | 						<form.AppField name='symptoms'>
 236 | 							{field => (
 237 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 238 | 									<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Symptoms</Label>
 239 | 									<Textarea
 240 | 										id={field.name}
 241 | 										onBlur={field.handleBlur}
 242 | 										onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 243 | 										placeholder='Describe patient symptoms...'
 244 | 										rows={2}
 245 | 										value={field.state.value ?? ""}
 246 | 									/>
 247 | 								</div>
 248 | 							)}
 249 | 						</form.AppField>
 250 | 
 251 | 						{/* Additional Notes */}
 252 | 						<form.AppField name='notes'>
 253 | 							{field => (
 254 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 255 | 									<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Additional Notes</Label>
 256 | 									<Textarea
 257 | 										id={field.name}
 258 | 										onBlur={field.handleBlur}
 259 | 										onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 260 | 										placeholder='Any extra observations or follow-up instructions...'
 261 | 										rows={2}
 262 | 										value={field.state.value ?? ""}
 263 | 									/>
 264 | 								</div>
 265 | 							)}
 266 | 						</form.AppField>
 267 | 
 268 | 						{/* Follow-up Date */}
 269 | 						<form.AppField name='followUpDate'>
 270 | 							{field => (
 271 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 272 | 									<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Follow-up Date (Optional)</Label>
 273 | 									<Input
 274 | 										id={field.name}
 275 | 										onBlur={field.handleBlur}
 276 | 										onChange={e =>
 277 | 											field.handleChange(e.target.value ? new Date(e.target.value) : null)
 278 | 										}
 279 | 										type='date'
 280 | 										value={
 281 | 											field.state.value ? format(new Date(field.state.value), "yyyy-MM-dd") : ""
 282 | 										}
 283 | 									/>
 284 | 								</div>
 285 | 							)}
 286 | 						</form.AppField>
 287 | 
 288 | 						{/* Status */}
 289 | 						<form.AppField name='status'>
 290 | 							{field => (
 291 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 292 | 									<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Status</Label>
 293 | 									<Select
 294 | 										onValueChange={value =>
 295 | 											field.handleChange(value as MedicalRecordFormValues["status"])
 296 | 										}
 297 | 										value={field.state.value ?? "ACTIVE"}
 298 | 									>
 299 | 										<SelectTrigger id={field.name}>
 300 | 											<SelectValue placeholder='Select status' />
 301 | 										</SelectTrigger>
 302 | 										<SelectContent>
 303 | 											<SelectItem value='ACTIVE'>Active</SelectItem>
 304 | 											<SelectItem value='COMPLETED'>Completed</SelectItem>
 305 | 											<SelectItem value='FOLLOW_UP'>Follow-up Required</SelectItem>
 306 | 										</SelectContent>
 307 | 									</Select>
 308 | 								</div>
 309 | 							)}
 310 | 						</form.AppField>
 311 | 
 312 | 						{/* Actions */}
 313 | 						<div className='flex justify-end gap-4 pt-4'>
 314 | 							{onCancel && (
 315 | 								<Button
 316 | 									disabled={isPending}
 317 | 									onClick={onCancel}
 318 | 									type='button'
 319 | 									variant='outline'
 320 | 								>
 321 | 									Cancel
 322 | 								</Button>
 323 | 							)}
 324 | 							<form.SubmitButton disabled={isPending}>
 325 | 								{isPending ? "Saving..." : "Save Record"}
 326 | 							</form.SubmitButton>
 327 | 						</div>
 328 | 					</form.Form>
 329 | 				</form.AppForm>
 330 | 			</CardContent>
 331 | 		</Card>
 332 | 	);
 333 | }

```

`components/forms/tanstack-form.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | /**
   2 |  * tanstack-form.tsx — Main entry point for the form system.
   3 |  *
   4 |  * Provides useAppForm, useFormFields, Form, SubmitButton, StepButton,
   5 |  * withForm, and withFieldGroup. See docs/forms.md for full usage guide.
   6 |  */
   7 | 
   8 | import { Button, type buttonVariants } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   9 | import {
  10 | 	FieldContent,
  11 | 	FieldDescription,
  12 | 	FieldGroup,
  13 | 	FieldLabel,
  14 | 	FieldLegend,
  15 | 	FieldSeparator,
  16 | 	FieldTitle
  17 | } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/field";
  18 | import {
  19 | 	CheckboxField,
  20 | 	FileUploadField,
  21 | 	FormCheckboxField,
  22 | 	FormFileUploadField,
  23 | 	FormRadioGroupField,
  24 | 	FormSelectField,
  25 | 	FormSliderField,
  26 | 	FormSwitchField,
  27 | 	FormTextareaField,
  28 | 	FormTextField,
  29 | 	RadioGroupField,
  30 | 	SelectField,
  31 | 	SliderField,
  32 | 	SwitchField,
  33 | 	TextareaField,
  34 | 	TextField
  35 | } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/fields/index";
  36 | import { InputGroup, InputGroupAddon, InputGroupInput } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/input-group";
  37 | import { createFormHook } from "@tanstack/react-form";
  38 | import type { VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority";
  39 | import * as React from "react";
  40 | 
  41 | import { cn } from "#/lib/utils";
  42 | 
  43 | import {
  44 | 	FormField,
  45 | 	FormFieldError,
  46 | 	FormFieldSet,
  47 | 	fieldContext,
  48 | 	formContext,
  49 | 	TextArea,
  50 | 	useFormContext,
  51 | 	type WithTypedName
  52 | } from "./form-context";
  53 | 
  54 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  55 | // Form-level components (used as form.ComponentName)
  56 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  57 | 
  58 | function Form({
  59 | 	children,
  60 | 	...props
  61 | }: Omit<React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<"form">, "onSubmit" | "noValidate"> & {
  62 | 	children?: React.ReactNode;
  63 | }) {
  64 | 	const form = useFormContext();
  65 | 	const handleSubmit = React.useCallback(
  66 | 		(e: React.FormEvent<HTMLFormElement>) => {
  67 | 			e.preventDefault();
  68 | 			e.stopPropagation();
  69 | 			form.handleSubmit();
  70 | 		},
  71 | 		[form]
  72 | 	);
  73 | 	return (
  74 | 		<form
  75 | 			className={cn("mx-auto flex w-full flex-col gap-2 p-2 md:p-5", props.className)}
  76 | 			noValidate
  77 | 			onSubmit={handleSubmit}
  78 | 			{...props}
  79 | 		>
  80 | 			{children}
  81 | 		</form>
  82 | 	);
  83 | }
  84 | 
  85 | function SubmitButton({
  86 | 	children,
  87 | 	className,
  88 | 	size,
  89 | 	...props
  90 | }: React.ComponentProps<"button"> & VariantProps<typeof buttonVariants>) {
  91 | 	const form = useFormContext();
  92 | 	return (
  93 | 		<form.Subscribe selector={state => [state.canSubmit, state.isSubmitting] as const}>
  94 | 			{([canSubmit]) => (
  95 | 				<Button
  96 | 					className={className}
  97 | 					disabled={!canSubmit}
  98 | 					size={size}
  99 | 					type='submit'
 100 | 					{...props}
 101 | 				>
 102 | 					{children}
 103 | 				</Button>
 104 | 			)}
 105 | 		</form.Subscribe>
 106 | 	);
 107 | }
 108 | 
 109 | function SubscribeButton({ label }: { label: string }) {
 110 | 	const form = useFormContext();
 111 | 	return (
 112 | 		<form.Subscribe selector={state => state.isSubmitting}>
 113 | 			{isSubmitting => (
 114 | 				<Button
 115 | 					disabled={isSubmitting}
 116 | 					type='submit'
 117 | 				>
 118 | 					{label}
 119 | 				</Button>
 120 | 			)}
 121 | 		</form.Subscribe>
 122 | 	);
 123 | }
 124 | function StepButton({
 125 | 	label,
 126 | 	handleMovement,
 127 | 	...props
 128 | }: React.ComponentProps<"button"> &
 129 | 	VariantProps<typeof buttonVariants> & {
 130 | 		label: React.ReactNode | string;
 131 | 		handleMovement: () => void;
 132 | 	}) {
 133 | 	return (
 134 | 		<Button
 135 | 			onClick={handleMovement}
 136 | 			size='sm'
 137 | 			type='button'
 138 | 			variant='ghost'
 139 | 			{...props}
 140 | 		>
 141 | 			{label}
 142 | 		</Button>
 143 | 	);
 144 | }
 145 | 
 146 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 147 | // Hook creation
 148 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 149 | 
 150 | const { useAppForm, withForm, withFieldGroup } = createFormHook({
 151 | 	fieldContext,
 152 | 	formContext,
 153 | 	fieldComponents: {
 154 | 		// Structural (for custom fields via AppField escape hatch)
 155 | 		Field: FormField,
 156 | 		FieldError: FormFieldError,
 157 | 		FieldSet: FormFieldSet,
 158 | 		FieldContent,
 159 | 		FieldDescription,
 160 | 		FieldGroup,
 161 | 		TextArea,
 162 | 		FieldLabel,
 163 | 		FieldLegend,
 164 | 		FieldSeparator,
 165 | 		FieldTitle,
 166 | 		InputGroup,
 167 | 		InputGroupAddon,
 168 | 		InputGroupInput,
 169 | 		// Base field components (for AppField render-prop pattern)
 170 | 		TextField,
 171 | 		TextareaField,
 172 | 		SelectField,
 173 | 		CheckboxField,
 174 | 		SwitchField,
 175 | 		RadioGroupField,
 176 | 		SliderField,
 177 | 		FileUploadField
 178 | 	},
 179 | 	formComponents: {
 180 | 		// Layout & actions
 181 | 		Form,
 182 | 		SubmitButton,
 183 | 		StepButton,
 184 | 		SubscribeButton,
 185 | 		FieldLegend,
 186 | 		FieldDescription,
 187 | 		FieldSeparator,
 188 | 		// Composed field components (flat API — convenience pattern)
 189 | 		// These allow form.TextField, form.SelectField, etc.
 190 | 		// For type-safe field names, use form.AppField render-prop instead.
 191 | 		TextField: FormTextField,
 192 | 		TextareaField: FormTextareaField,
 193 | 		SelectField: FormSelectField,
 194 | 		CheckboxField: FormCheckboxField,
 195 | 		SwitchField: FormSwitchField,
 196 | 		RadioGroupField: FormRadioGroupField,
 197 | 		SliderField: FormSliderField,
 198 | 		FileUploadField: FormFileUploadField
 199 | 	}
 200 | });
 201 | 
 202 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 203 | // Type-safe field names — useFormFields
 204 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 205 | 
 206 | /**
 207 |  * Returns all composed field components with type-safe `name` props.
 208 |  * Pass your form's value type (or `z.infer<typeof schema>`) to narrow names.
 209 |  *
 210 |  * @example
 211 |  * ```tsx
 212 |  * type FormValues = z.infer<typeof mySchema>;
 213 |  * const form = useAppForm({ defaultValues: {...} as FormValues, ... });
 214 |  * const { FormTextField, FormSelectField } = useFormFields<FormValues>();
 215 |  *
 216 |  * <FormTextField name="email" />  // ✅ autocomplete + type check
 217 |  * <FormTextField name="typo" />   // ❌ TypeScript error!
 218 |  * ```
 219 |  */
 220 | function useFormFields<TValues extends Record<string, unknown>>() {
 221 | 	type Typed<C> = WithTypedName<C, TValues>;
 222 | 	return {
 223 | 		FormTextField: FormTextField as unknown as Typed<typeof FormTextField>,
 224 | 		FormTextareaField: FormTextareaField as unknown as Typed<typeof FormTextareaField>,
 225 | 		FormSelectField: FormSelectField as unknown as Typed<typeof FormSelectField>,
 226 | 		FormCheckboxField: FormCheckboxField as unknown as Typed<typeof FormCheckboxField>,
 227 | 		FormSwitchField: FormSwitchField as unknown as Typed<typeof FormSwitchField>,
 228 | 		FormRadioGroupField: FormRadioGroupField as unknown as Typed<typeof FormRadioGroupField>,
 229 | 		FormSliderField: FormSliderField as unknown as Typed<typeof FormSliderField>,
 230 | 		FormFileUploadField: FormFileUploadField as unknown as Typed<typeof FormFileUploadField>
 231 | 	};
 232 | }
 233 | 
 234 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 235 | // Exports
 236 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 237 | 
 238 | export type {
 239 | 	FieldConfig,
 240 | 	FieldListenerConfig,
 241 | 	FieldValidatorConfig,
 242 | 	WithTypedName
 243 | } from "./form-context";
 244 | export {
 245 | 	createFormField,
 246 | 	FormErrors,
 247 | 	FormField,
 248 | 	FormFieldError,
 249 | 	FormFieldSet,
 250 | 	scrollToFirstError,
 251 | 	typedField,
 252 | 	useFieldContext,
 253 | 	useFormContext
 254 | } from "./form-context";
 255 | 
 256 | export { useAppForm, useFormFields, withFieldGroup, withForm };

```
