```tsx
 169 | 			hcMean: 44.5,
 170 | 			hcSD: 1.1
 171 | 		},
 172 | 		"12": {
 173 | 			weightMean: 8.9,
 174 | 			weightSD: 1.0,
 175 | 			heightMean: 74.0,
 176 | 			heightSD: 2.4,
 177 | 			hcMean: 45.5,
 178 | 			hcSD: 1.1
 179 | 		},
 180 | 		"18": {
 181 | 			weightMean: 10.5,
 182 | 			weightSD: 1.1,
 183 | 			heightMean: 81.0,
 184 | 			heightSD: 2.7,
 185 | 			hcMean: 47.0,
 186 | 			hcSD: 1.1
 187 | 		},
 188 | 		"24": {
 189 | 			weightMean: 11.5,
 190 | 			weightSD: 1.2,
 191 | 			heightMean: 86.0,
 192 | 			heightSD: 2.9,
 193 | 			hcMean: 48.0,
 194 | 			hcSD: 1.0
 195 | 		}
 196 | 	}
 197 | };
 198 | 
 199 | const getClosestAgeMonth = (ageMonths: number): string => {
 200 | 	const ages = [0, 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24];
 201 | 	let closest = ages[0];
 202 | 	for (const age of ages) {
 203 | 		if (Math.abs(age - ageMonths) < Math.abs(closest - ageMonths)) {
 204 | 			closest = age;
 205 | 		}
 206 | 	}
 207 | 	return closest.toString();
 208 | };
 209 | 
 210 | const calculateZScore = (value: number, mean: number, sd: number): number => {
 211 | 	if (sd === 0) return 0;
 212 | 	return (value - mean) / sd;
 213 | };
 214 | 
 215 | const getZScoreInterpretation = (
 216 | 	zScore: number | null | undefined,
 217 | 	type: "weight" | "height" | "bmi" | "hc"
 218 | ): string => {
 219 | 	if (zScore === null || zScore === undefined) return "Not available";
 220 | 
 221 | 	if (type === "weight") {
 222 | 		if (zScore < -3) return "Severely Underweight";
 223 | 		if (zScore < -2) return "Underweight";
 224 | 		if (zScore <= 1) return "Normal";
 225 | 		if (zScore <= 2) return "Overweight";
 226 | 		return "Obese";
 227 | 	}
 228 | 
 229 | 	if (type === "height") {
 230 | 		if (zScore < -3) return "Severely Stunted";
 231 | 		if (zScore < -2) return "Stunted";
 232 | 		if (zScore <= 1) return "Normal";
 233 | 		if (zScore <= 2) return "Tall";
 234 | 		return "Very Tall";
 235 | 	}
 236 | 
 237 | 	if (type === "bmi") {
 238 | 		if (zScore < -3) return "Severely Thin";
 239 | 		if (zScore < -2) return "Thin";
 240 | 		if (zScore <= 1) return "Normal";
 241 | 		if (zScore <= 2) return "Overweight";
 242 | 		return "Obese";
 243 | 	}
 244 | 
 245 | 	if (type === "hc") {
 246 | 		if (zScore < -3) return "Severely Microcephalic";
 247 | 		if (zScore < -2) return "Microcephalic";
 248 | 		if (zScore <= 2) return "Normal";
 249 | 		return "Macrocephalic";
 250 | 	}
 251 | 
 252 | 	return "Unknown";
 253 | };
 254 | 
 255 | const getZScoreColor = (zScore: number | null | undefined): string => {
 256 | 	if (zScore === null || zScore === undefined) return "bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 dark:bg-gray-800 dark:text-gray-400";
 257 | 	if (zScore >= -2 && zScore <= 2) return "bg-green-100 text-green-700 dark:bg-green-900 dark:text-green-300";
 258 | 	if (zScore < -2) return "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 dark:bg-yellow-900 dark:text-yellow-300";
 259 | 	return "bg-red-100 text-red-700 dark:bg-red-900 dark:text-red-300";
 260 | };
 261 | 
 262 | // ============================================
 263 | // Main Component
 264 | // ============================================
 265 | 
 266 | export function GrowthRecordForm({ initialData, patientId, onCancel, onSuccess, redirectTo }: GrowthRecordFormProps) {
 267 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
 268 | 	const navigate = useNavigate();
 269 | 
 270 | 	// Form state
 271 | 	const [selectedDate, setSelectedDate] = React.useState<Date>(initialData?.date || new Date());
 272 | 	const [weight, setWeight] = React.useState<string>(initialData?.weight?.toString() || "");
 273 | 	const [height, setHeight] = React.useState<string>(initialData?.height?.toString() || "");
 274 | 	const [headCircumference, setHeadCircumference] = React.useState<string>(
 275 | 		initialData?.headCircumference?.toString() || ""
 276 | 	);
 277 | 	const [notes, setNotes] = React.useState<string>(initialData?.notes || "");
 278 | 	const [selectedPatientId, setSelectedPatientId] = React.useState<string>(initialData?.patientId || patientId || "");
 279 | 
 280 | 	// Fetch patients list
 281 | 	const { data: patientsData, isLoading: patientsLoading } = useQuery(
 282 | 		orpc.patient.list.queryOptions({
 283 | 			input: { search: "", page: 1, pageSize: 100 }
 284 | 		})
 285 | 	);
 286 | 
 287 | 	// Fetch selected patient details
 288 | 	const { data: selectedPatient, isLoading: patientLoading } = useQuery({
 289 | 		...orpc.patient.getById.queryOptions({
 290 | 			input: { id: selectedPatientId }
 291 | 		}),
 292 | 		enabled: !!selectedPatientId
 293 | 	});
 294 | 
 295 | 	// Calculate age
 296 | 	const ageInfo = React.useMemo(() => {
 297 | 		if (!selectedPatient?.dateOfBirth || !selectedDate) return null;
 298 | 
 299 | 		const dob = new Date(selectedPatient.dateOfBirth);
 300 | 		const measureDate = new Date(selectedDate);
 301 | 
 302 | 		const ageInDays = Math.floor((measureDate.getTime() - dob.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
 303 | 		const ageInMonths = ageInDays / 30.44;
 304 | 
 305 | 		return {
 306 | 			ageDays: ageInDays,
 307 | 			ageMonths: Math.round(ageInMonths * 10) / 10,
 308 | 			ageYears: Math.floor(ageInMonths / 12),
 309 | 			ageMonthsInt: Math.floor(ageInMonths)
 310 | 		};
 311 | 	}, [selectedPatient?.dateOfBirth, selectedDate]);
 312 | 
 313 | 	// Calculate BMI
 314 | 	const bmi = React.useMemo(() => {
 315 | 		const weightNum = Number.parseFloat(weight);
 316 | 		const heightNum = Number.parseFloat(height);
 317 | 		if (!Number.isNaN(weightNum) && !Number.isNaN(heightNum) && heightNum > 0) {
 318 | 			const heightInMeters = heightNum / 100;
 319 | 			const calculatedBMI = weightNum / (heightInMeters * heightInMeters);
 320 | 			return Math.round(calculatedBMI * 10) / 10;
 321 | 		}
 322 | 		return null;
 323 | 	}, [weight, height]);
 324 | 
 325 | 	// Calculate Z-Scores
 326 | 	const zScores = React.useMemo(() => {
 327 | 		if (!selectedPatient?.gender || !ageInfo || ageInfo.ageMonths > 240) {
 328 | 			return {
 329 | 				weightForAge: null,
 330 | 				heightForAge: null,
 331 | 				hcForAge: null,
 332 | 				bmiForAge: null
 333 | 			};
 334 | 		}
 335 | 
 336 | 		const gender = selectedPatient.gender;
 337 | 		const ageKey = getClosestAgeMonth(ageInfo.ageMonths);
 338 | 		const ref = WHO_REFERENCES[gender]?.[ageKey];
 339 | 
 340 | 		if (!ref) {
 341 | 			return {
 342 | 				weightForAge: null,
 343 | 				heightForAge: null,
 344 | 				hcForAge: null,
 345 | 				bmiForAge: null
 346 | 			};
 347 | 		}
 348 | 
 349 | 		const weightNum = Number.parseFloat(weight);
 350 | 		const heightNum = Number.parseFloat(height);
 351 | 		const hcNum = Number.parseFloat(headCircumference);
 352 | 
 353 | 		return {
 354 | 			weightForAge: !Number.isNaN(weightNum) ? calculateZScore(weightNum, ref.weightMean, ref.weightSD) : null,
 355 | 			heightForAge: !Number.isNaN(heightNum) ? calculateZScore(heightNum, ref.heightMean, ref.heightSD) : null,
 356 | 			hcForAge: !Number.isNaN(hcNum) ? calculateZScore(hcNum, ref.hcMean, ref.hcSD) : null,
 357 | 			bmiForAge: bmi ? calculateZScore(bmi, 18.5, 3.0) : null // Simplified BMI reference
 358 | 		};
 359 | 	}, [selectedPatient?.gender, ageInfo, weight, height, headCircumference, bmi]);
 360 | 
 361 | 	// Create growth record mutation
 362 | 	const { mutate: createGrowthRecord, isPending: isSubmitting } = useMutation(
 363 | 		orpc.growth.record.mutationOptions({
 364 | 			onSuccess: () => {
 365 | 				toast.success("Growth record saved successfully");
 366 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: orpc.growth.key() });
 367 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 368 | 					queryKey: orpc.patient.getById.queryKey({
 369 | 						input: { id: selectedPatientId }
 370 | 					})
 371 | 				});
 372 | 
 373 | 				if (onSuccess) {
 374 | 					onSuccess();
 375 | 				} else if (redirectTo) {
 376 | 					navigate({
 377 | 						to: redirectTo,
 378 | 						search: { patientId: selectedPatientId }
 379 | 					});
 380 | 				}
 381 | 			},
 382 | 			onError: (error: Error) => {
 383 | 				console.error(error);
 384 | 				toast.error(error.message || "Failed to save growth record");
 385 | 			}
 386 | 		})
 387 | 	);
 388 | 
 389 | 	const handleSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
 390 | 		e.preventDefault();
 391 | 
 392 | 		if (!selectedPatientId) {
 393 | 			toast.error("Please select a patient");
 394 | 			return;
 395 | 		}
 396 | 
 397 | 		const weightNum = weight ? Number.parseFloat(weight) : undefined;
 398 | 		const heightNum = height ? Number.parseFloat(height) : undefined;
 399 | 		const hcNum = headCircumference ? Number.parseFloat(headCircumference) : undefined;
 400 | 
 401 | 		if (!weightNum && !heightNum && !hcNum) {
 402 | 			toast.error("Please provide at least one measurement (weight, height, or head circumference)");
 403 | 			return;
 404 | 		}
 405 | 
 406 | 		createGrowthRecord({
 407 | 			patientId: selectedPatientId,
 408 | 			date: selectedDate,
 409 | 			weight: weightNum,
 410 | 			height: heightNum,
 411 | 			headCircumference: hcNum,
 412 | 			notes: notes || undefined
 413 | 		});
 414 | 	};
 415 | 
 416 | 	const isLoading = patientsLoading || patientLoading;
 417 | 
 418 | 	return (
 419 | 		<Card className='mx-auto w-full max-w-4xl'>
 420 | 			<CardHeader>
 421 | 				<CardTitle className='flex items-center gap-2 font-bold text-2xl'>
 422 | 					<Baby className='h-6 w-6' />
 423 | 					Growth & Development Record
 424 | 				</CardTitle>
 425 | 				<p className='text-muted-foreground'>Record anthropometric measurements and track growth percentiles</p>
 426 | 			</CardHeader>
 427 | 			<CardContent>
 428 | 				<form
 429 | 					className='space-y-6'
 430 | 					onSubmit={handleSubmit}
 431 | 				>
 432 | 					{/* Patient Selection */}
 433 | 					<div className='space-y-4'>
 434 | 						<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 435 | 							<User className='h-5 w-5' />
 436 | 							Patient Information
 437 | 						</h3>
 438 | 						<Separator />
 439 | 
 440 | 						<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2'>
 441 | 							<div className='space-y-2'>
 442 | 								<Label htmlFor='patientId'>Patient *</Label>
 443 | 								<select
 444 | 									className='flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:font-medium file:text-sm placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50'
 445 | 									id='patientId'
 446 | 									onChange={e => setSelectedPatientId(e.target.value)}
 447 | 									required
 448 | 									value={selectedPatientId}
 449 | 								>
 450 | 									<option value=''>Select a patient</option>
 451 | 									{patientsData?.patients?.map(
 452 | 										(patient: {
 453 | 											id: string | undefined;
 454 | 											firstName: string | undefined;
 455 | 											lastName: string | undefined;
 456 | 											dateOfBirth: Date;
 457 | 										}) => (
 458 | 											<option
 459 | 												key={patient.id}
 460 | 												value={patient.id}
 461 | 											>
 462 | 												{patient.firstName} {patient.lastName} -{" "}
 463 | 												{format(new Date(patient.dateOfBirth), "MMM dd, yyyy")}
 464 | 											</option>
 465 | 										)
 466 | 									)}
 467 | 								</select>
 468 | 								{patientsLoading && <Skeleton className='h-10 w-full' />}
 469 | 							</div>
 470 | 
 471 | 							<div className='space-y-2'>
 472 | 								<Label>Gender</Label>
 473 | 								<Input
 474 | 									disabled
 475 | 									value={
 476 | 										selectedPatient?.gender === "MALE"
 477 | 											? "Male"
 478 | 											: selectedPatient?.gender === "FEMALE"
 479 | 												? "Female"
 480 | 												: "—"
 481 | 									}
 482 | 								/>
 483 | 							</div>
 484 | 						</div>
 485 | 
 486 | 						{selectedPatient && ageInfo && (
 487 | 							<div className='rounded-lg bg-muted p-3 text-sm'>
 488 | 								<div className='grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 md:grid-cols-4'>
 489 | 									<div>
 490 | 										<span className='font-medium'>Date of Birth:</span>
 491 | 										<p>{format(new Date(selectedPatient.dateOfBirth), "PPP")}</p>
 492 | 									</div>
 493 | 									<div>
 494 | 										<span className='font-medium'>Age:</span>
 495 | 										<p>
 496 | 											{ageInfo.ageYears > 0 && `${ageInfo.ageYears}y `}
 497 | 											{Math.floor(ageInfo.ageMonths % 12)}m {ageInfo.ageDays % 30}d
 498 | 										</p>
 499 | 									</div>
 500 | 									<div>
 501 | 										<span className='font-medium'>Age (months):</span>
 502 | 										<p>{ageInfo.ageMonths.toFixed(1)} months</p>
 503 | 									</div>
 504 | 									<div>
 505 | 										<span className='font-medium'>Age (days):</span>
 506 | 										<p>{ageInfo.ageDays} days</p>
 507 | 									</div>
 508 | 								</div>
 509 | 							</div>
 510 | 						)}
 511 | 					</div>
 512 | 
 513 | 					{/* Measurement Date */}
 514 | 					<div className='space-y-4'>
 515 | 						<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 516 | 							<CalendarIcon className='h-5 w-5' />
 517 | 							Measurement Date
 518 | 						</h3>
 519 | 						<Separator />
 520 | 						<div className='space-y-2'>
 521 | 							<Label>Measurement Date *</Label>
 522 | 							<Popover>
 523 | 								<PopoverTrigger asChild>
 524 | 									<Button
 525 | 										className={cn(
 526 | 											"w-full justify-start text-left font-normal",
 527 | 											!selectedDate && "text-muted-foreground"
 528 | 										)}
 529 | 										variant='outline'
 530 | 									>
 531 | 										<CalendarIcon className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 532 | 										{selectedDate ? format(selectedDate, "PPP") : "Pick a date"}
 533 | 									</Button>
 534 | 								</PopoverTrigger>
 535 | 								<PopoverContent
 536 | 									align='start'
 537 | 									className='w-auto p-0'
 538 | 								>
 539 | 									<Calendar
 540 | 										mode='single'
 541 | 										onSelect={date => date && setSelectedDate(date)}
 542 | 										selected={selectedDate}
 543 | 									/>
 544 | 								</PopoverContent>
 545 | 							</Popover>
 546 | 						</div>
 547 | 					</div>
 548 | 
 549 | 					{/* Anthropometric Measurements */}
 550 | 					<div className='space-y-4'>
 551 | 						<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 552 | 							<Ruler className='h-5 w-5' />
 553 | 							Body Measurements
 554 | 						</h3>
 555 | 						<Separator />
 556 | 						<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-3'>
 557 | 							<div className='relative space-y-2'>
 558 | 								<Label htmlFor='weight'>Weight (kg)</Label>
 559 | 								<div className='relative'>
 560 | 									<Input
 561 | 										id='weight'
 562 | 										onChange={e => setWeight(e.target.value)}
 563 | 										placeholder='e.g., 12.5'
 564 | 										step='0.01'
 565 | 										type='number'
 566 | 										value={weight}
 567 | 									/>
 568 | 									<Weight className='absolute top-1/2 right-3 h-4 w-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-muted-foreground' />
 569 | 								</div>
 570 | 							</div>
 571 | 
 572 | 							<div className='relative space-y-2'>
 573 | 								<Label htmlFor='height'>Height / Length (cm)</Label>
 574 | 								<div className='relative'>
 575 | 									<Input
 576 | 										id='height'
 577 | 										onChange={e => setHeight(e.target.value)}
 578 | 										placeholder='e.g., 85.0'
 579 | 										step='0.1'
 580 | 										type='number'
 581 | 										value={height}
 582 | 									/>
 583 | 									<Ruler className='absolute top-1/2 right-3 h-4 w-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-muted-foreground' />
 584 | 								</div>
 585 | 							</div>
 586 | 
 587 | 							<div className='relative space-y-2'>
 588 | 								<Label htmlFor='headCircumference'>Head Circumference (cm)</Label>
 589 | 								<div className='relative'>
 590 | 									<Input
 591 | 										id='headCircumference'
 592 | 										onChange={e => setHeadCircumference(e.target.value)}
 593 | 										placeholder='e.g., 45.0'
 594 | 										step='0.1'
 595 | 										type='number'
 596 | 										value={headCircumference}
 597 | 									/>
 598 | 									<Activity className='absolute top-1/2 right-3 h-4 w-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-muted-foreground' />
 599 | 								</div>
 600 | 							</div>
 601 | 						</div>
 602 | 
 603 | 						{bmi && (
 604 | 							<div className='rounded-lg bg-blue-50 p-3 text-blue-700 dark:bg-blue-950 dark:text-blue-300'>
 605 | 								<span className='font-medium'>BMI:</span> {bmi} kg/m²
 606 | 							</div>
 607 | 						)}
 608 | 					</div>
 609 | 
 610 | 					{/* Z-Score Results */}
 611 | 					{selectedPatient?.gender && ageInfo && ageInfo.ageMonths <= 24 && (
 612 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 613 | 							<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 614 | 								<Activity className='h-5 w-5' />
 615 | 								WHO Growth Standards (Z-Scores)
 616 | 							</h3>
 617 | 							<Separator />
 618 | 							<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2'>
 619 | 								{weight && zScores.weightForAge !== null && (
 620 | 									<div className={cn("rounded-lg p-3", getZScoreColor(zScores.weightForAge))}>
 621 | 										<p className='font-medium'>Weight-for-Age</p>
 622 | 										<p className='font-bold text-2xl'>Z-Score: {zScores.weightForAge.toFixed(2)}</p>
 623 | 										<p className='text-sm'>
 624 | 											{getZScoreInterpretation(zScores.weightForAge, "weight")}
 625 | 										</p>
 626 | 									</div>
 627 | 								)}
 628 | 
 629 | 								{height && zScores.heightForAge !== null && (
 630 | 									<div className={cn("rounded-lg p-3", getZScoreColor(zScores.heightForAge))}>
 631 | 										<p className='font-medium'>Height-for-Age</p>
 632 | 										<p className='font-bold text-2xl'>Z-Score: {zScores.heightForAge.toFixed(2)}</p>
 633 | 										<p className='text-sm'>
 634 | 											{getZScoreInterpretation(zScores.heightForAge, "height")}
 635 | 										</p>
 636 | 									</div>
 637 | 								)}
 638 | 
 639 | 								{bmi && zScores.bmiForAge !== null && (
 640 | 									<div className={cn("rounded-lg p-3", getZScoreColor(zScores.bmiForAge))}>
 641 | 										<p className='font-medium'>BMI-for-Age</p>
 642 | 										<p className='font-bold text-2xl'>Z-Score: {zScores.bmiForAge.toFixed(2)}</p>
 643 | 										<p className='text-sm'>{getZScoreInterpretation(zScores.bmiForAge, "bmi")}</p>
 644 | 									</div>
 645 | 								)}
 646 | 
 647 | 								{headCircumference && zScores.hcForAge !== null && (
 648 | 									<div className={cn("rounded-lg p-3", getZScoreColor(zScores.hcForAge))}>
 649 | 										<p className='font-medium'>Head Circumference-for-Age</p>
 650 | 										<p className='font-bold text-2xl'>Z-Score: {zScores.hcForAge.toFixed(2)}</p>
 651 | 										<p className='text-sm'>{getZScoreInterpretation(zScores.hcForAge, "hc")}</p>
 652 | 									</div>
 653 | 								)}
 654 | 							</div>
 655 | 						</div>
 656 | 					)}
 657 | 
 658 | 					{/* Notes */}
 659 | 					<div className='space-y-4'>
 660 | 						<h3 className='font-semibold text-lg'>Additional Notes</h3>
 661 | 						<Separator />
 662 | 						<Textarea
 663 | 							onChange={e => setNotes(e.target.value)}
 664 | 							placeholder='Any observations, concerns, or recommendations...'
 665 | 							rows={3}
 666 | 							value={notes}
 667 | 						/>
 668 | 					</div>
 669 | 
 670 | 					{/* Actions */}
 671 | 					<Separator />
 672 | 					<div className='flex justify-end gap-4'>
 673 | 						{onCancel && (
 674 | 							<Button
 675 | 								disabled={isSubmitting}
 676 | 								onClick={onCancel}
 677 | 								type='button'
 678 | 								variant='outline'
 679 | 							>
 680 | 								Cancel
 681 | 							</Button>
 682 | 						)}
 683 | 						<Button
 684 | 							className='min-w-[120px]'
 685 | 							disabled={isSubmitting || !selectedPatientId || isLoading}
 686 | 							type='submit'
 687 | 						>
 688 | 							{isSubmitting
 689 | 								? "Saving..."
 690 | 								: initialData?.patientId
 691 | 									? "Update Record"
 692 | 									: "Save Growth Record"}
 693 | 						</Button>
 694 | 					</div>
 695 | 				</form>
 696 | 			</CardContent>
 697 | 		</Card>
 698 | 	);
 699 | }
 700 | 
 701 | // ============================================
 702 | // Quick Entry Component
 703 | // ============================================
 704 | 
 705 | interface QuickGrowthRecordProps {
 706 | 	patientId: string;
 707 | 	onSuccess?: () => void;
 708 | }
 709 | 
 710 | export function QuickGrowthRecord({ patientId, onSuccess }: QuickGrowthRecordProps) {
 711 | 	return (
 712 | 		<GrowthRecordForm
 713 | 			onSuccess={onSuccess}
 714 | 			patientId={patientId}
 715 | 		/>
 716 | 	);
 717 | }
 718 | 
 719 | // ============================================
 720 | // Growth History Component
 721 | // ============================================
 722 | 
 723 | interface GrowthHistoryProps {
 724 | 	patientId: string;
 725 | }
 726 | 
 727 | export function GrowthHistory({ patientId }: GrowthHistoryProps) {
 728 | 	const { data: growthRecords, isLoading } = useQuery({
 729 | 		...orpc.growth.list.queryOptions({
 730 | 			input: { patientId, page: 1, pageSize: 50 }
 731 | 		}),
 732 | 		enabled: !!patientId
 733 | 	});
 734 | 
 735 | 	if (isLoading) {
 736 | 		return (
 737 | 			<div className='space-y-3'>
 738 | 				<Skeleton className='h-20 w-full' />
 739 | 				<Skeleton className='h-20 w-full' />
 740 | 				<Skeleton className='h-20 w-full' />
 741 | 			</div>
 742 | 		);
 743 | 	}
 744 | 
 745 | 	if (!growthRecords?.records?.length) {
 746 | 		return (
 747 | 			<div className='flex flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-lg border border-dashed p-8 text-center'>
 748 | 				<Baby className='mb-2 h-10 w-10 text-muted-foreground' />
 749 | 				<p className='text-muted-foreground'>No growth records found</p>
 750 | 				<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Record the first measurement to start tracking growth</p>
 751 | 			</div>
 752 | 		);
 753 | 	}
 754 | 
 755 | 	return (
 756 | 		<div className='space-y-3'>
 757 | 			{growthRecords.records.map(
 758 | 				(record: {
 759 | 					id: string;
 760 | 					date: string;
 761 | 					weight: number | null;
 762 | 					height: number | null;
 763 | 					headCircumference: number | null;
 764 | 					growthStatus: string | null;
 765 | 				}) => (
 766 | 					<div
 767 | 						className='flex items-center justify-between rounded-lg border p-4'
 768 | 						key={record.id}
 769 | 					>
 770 | 						<div className='space-y-1'>
 771 | 							<p className='font-medium'>{format(new Date(record.date), "PPP")}</p>
 772 | 							<div className='flex gap-4 text-muted-foreground text-sm'>
 773 | 								{record.weight && <span>Weight: {record.weight} kg</span>}
 774 | 								{record.height && <span>Height: {record.height} cm</span>}
 775 | 								{record.headCircumference && <span>Head Circ: {record.headCircumference} cm</span>}
 776 | 							</div>
 777 | 						</div>
 778 | 						{record.growthStatus && (
 779 | 							<div
 780 | 								className={cn(
 781 | 									"rounded-full px-3 py-1 font-medium text-xs",
 782 | 									record.growthStatus === "NORMAL" && "bg-green-100 text-green-700",
 783 | 									record.growthStatus === "UNDERWEIGHT" && "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700",
 784 | 									record.growthStatus === "OVERWEIGHT" && "bg-orange-100 text-orange-700",
 785 | 									record.growthStatus === "OBESE" && "bg-red-100 text-red-700",
 786 | 									record.growthStatus === "STUNTED" && "bg-purple-100 text-purple-700"
 787 | 								)}
 788 | 							>
 789 | 								{record.growthStatus}
 790 | 							</div>
 791 | 						)}
 792 | 					</div>
 793 | 				)
 794 | 			)}
 795 | 		</div>
 796 | 	);
 797 | }

```

`components/growth/growth-chart.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/growth/growth-chart.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   4 | import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/select";
   5 | import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/tabs";
   6 | import { useQuery } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   7 | import { useState } from "react";
   8 | import { CartesianGrid, Legend, Line, LineChart, ResponsiveContainer, Tooltip, XAxis, YAxis } from "recharts";
   9 | 
  10 | import { orpc } from "@/utils/orpc";
  11 | 
  12 | interface GrowthChartProps {
  13 | 	patientId: string;
  14 | 	data?: {
  15 | 		date: string;
  16 | 		value: number;
  17 | 		zScore?: number;
  18 | 		percentile?: number;
  19 | 		ageMonths?: number;
  20 | 		ageDays?: number;
  21 | 	}[];
  22 | }
  23 | 
  24 | type MeasurementType = "WEIGHT" | "HEIGHT" | "BMI" | "HEAD_CIRCUMFERENCE";
  25 | 
  26 | export function GrowthChart({ patientId }: GrowthChartProps) {
  27 | 	const [measurementType, setMeasurementType] = useState<MeasurementType>("WEIGHT");
  28 | 	const [timeRange, setTimeRange] = useState<"6m" | "1y" | "2y" | "all">("1y");
  29 | 
  30 | 	const { data: chartData, isLoading } = useQuery(
  31 | 		orpc.growth.getChart.queryOptions({
  32 | 			input: {
  33 | 				patientId,
  34 | 				measurementType,
  35 | 				fromDate: getDateFromRange(timeRange),
  36 | 				toDate: new Date()
  37 | 			}
  38 | 		})
  39 | 	);
  40 | 
  41 | 	const { data: patient } = useQuery(orpc.patient.getById.queryOptions({ input: { id: patientId } }));
  42 | 
  43 | 	const getMeasurementLabel = (type: MeasurementType) => {
  44 | 		switch (type) {
  45 | 			case "WEIGHT":
  46 | 				return "Weight (kg)";
  47 | 			case "HEIGHT":
  48 | 				return "Height (cm)";
  49 | 			case "BMI":
  50 | 				return "BMI (kg/m²)";
  51 | 			case "HEAD_CIRCUMFERENCE":
  52 | 				return "Head Circumference (cm)";
  53 | 		}
  54 | 	};
  55 | 
  56 | 	const getColor = (type: MeasurementType) => {
  57 | 		switch (type) {
  58 | 			case "WEIGHT":
  59 | 				return "#3b82f6";
  60 | 			case "HEIGHT":
  61 | 				return "#10b981";
  62 | 			case "BMI":
  63 | 				return "#f59e0b";
  64 | 			case "HEAD_CIRCUMFERENCE":
  65 | 				return "#8b5cf6";
  66 | 		}
  67 | 	};
  68 | 
  69 | 	if (isLoading) {
  70 | 		return (
  71 | 			<Card>
  72 | 				<CardContent className='flex h-[400px] items-center justify-center'>
  73 | 					<div className='text-muted-foreground'>Loading growth chart...</div>
  74 | 				</CardContent>
  75 | 			</Card>
  76 | 		);
  77 | 	}
  78 | 
  79 | 	return (
  80 | 		<Card>
  81 | 			<CardHeader>
  82 | 				<div className='flex items-center justify-between'>
  83 | 					<div>
  84 | 						<CardTitle>Growth Chart</CardTitle>
  85 | 						<CardDescription>
  86 | 							{patient?.firstName} {patient?.lastName} - Growth tracking over time
  87 | 						</CardDescription>
  88 | 					</div>
  89 | 					<div className='flex gap-2'>
  90 | 						<Select
  91 | 							onValueChange={(v: "6m" | "1y" | "2y" | "all") => setTimeRange(v)}
  92 | 							value={timeRange}
  93 | 						>
  94 | 							<SelectTrigger className='w-[100px]'>
  95 | 								<SelectValue />
  96 | 							</SelectTrigger>
  97 | 							<SelectContent>
  98 | 								<SelectItem value='6m'>Last 6 months</SelectItem>
  99 | 								<SelectItem value='1y'>Last year</SelectItem>
 100 | 								<SelectItem value='2y'>Last 2 years</SelectItem>
 101 | 								<SelectItem value='all'>All time</SelectItem>
 102 | 							</SelectContent>
 103 | 						</Select>
 104 | 					</div>
 105 | 				</div>
 106 | 			</CardHeader>
 107 | 			<CardContent>
 108 | 				<Tabs
 109 | 					onValueChange={v => setMeasurementType(v as MeasurementType)}
 110 | 					value={measurementType}
 111 | 				>
 112 | 					<TabsList className='mb-4'>
 113 | 						<TabsTrigger value='WEIGHT'>Weight</TabsTrigger>
 114 | 						<TabsTrigger value='HEIGHT'>Height</TabsTrigger>
 115 | 						<TabsTrigger value='BMI'>BMI</TabsTrigger>
 116 | 						<TabsTrigger value='HEAD_CIRCUMFERENCE'>Head Circumference</TabsTrigger>
 117 | 					</TabsList>
 118 | 
 119 | 					<ResponsiveContainer
 120 | 						height={400}
 121 | 						width='100%'
 122 | 					>
 123 | 						<LineChart data={chartData}>
 124 | 							<CartesianGrid strokeDasharray='3 3' />
 125 | 							<XAxis
 126 | 								dataKey='date'
 127 | 								tickFormatter={date => new Date(date).toLocaleDateString()}
 128 | 							/>
 129 | 							<YAxis
 130 | 								label={{
 131 | 									value: getMeasurementLabel(measurementType),
 132 | 									angle: -90,
 133 | 									position: "insideLeft"
 134 | 								}}
 135 | 							/>
 136 | 							<Tooltip
 137 | 								formatter={value => [
 138 | 									typeof value === "number" ? value.toFixed(1) : String(value ?? ""),
 139 | 									getMeasurementLabel(measurementType)
 140 | 								]}
 141 | 								labelFormatter={date => new Date(date).toLocaleDateString()}
 142 | 							/>
 143 | 							<Legend />
 144 | 							<Line
 145 | 								activeDot={{ r: 6 }}
 146 | 								dataKey='value'
 147 | 								dot={{ r: 4 }}
 148 | 								name='Actual'
 149 | 								stroke={getColor(measurementType)}
 150 | 								strokeWidth={2}
 151 | 								type='monotone'
 152 | 							/>
 153 | 							{chartData && (
 154 | 								<Line
 155 | 									dataKey='zScore'
 156 | 									name='Z-Score'
 157 | 									stroke='#ef4444'
 158 | 									strokeDasharray='5 5'
 159 | 									strokeWidth={1}
 160 | 									type='monotone'
 161 | 								/>
 162 | 							)}
 163 | 						</LineChart>
 164 | 					</ResponsiveContainer>
 165 | 				</Tabs>
 166 | 			</CardContent>
 167 | 		</Card>
 168 | 	);
 169 | }
 170 | 
 171 | function getDateFromRange(range: "6m" | "1y" | "2y" | "all"): Date | undefined {
 172 | 	const date = new Date();
 173 | 	switch (range) {
 174 | 		case "6m":
 175 | 			date.setMonth(date.getMonth() - 6);
 176 | 			return date;
 177 | 		case "1y":
 178 | 			date.setFullYear(date.getFullYear() - 1);
 179 | 			return date;
 180 | 		case "2y":
 181 | 			date.setFullYear(date.getFullYear() - 2);
 182 | 			return date;
 183 | 		default:
 184 | 			return undefined;
 185 | 	}
 186 | }

```

`components/growth/growth-predictions.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/growth/growth-predictions.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
   4 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   5 | import { Progress } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/progress";
   6 | import { useQuery } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   7 | import { Activity, TrendingDown, TrendingUp } from "lucide-react";
   8 | import { Area, CartesianGrid, ComposedChart, Legend, ResponsiveContainer, Tooltip, XAxis, YAxis } from "recharts";
   9 | import type { NameType, ValueType } from "recharts/types/component/DefaultTooltipContent";
  10 | 
  11 | import { orpc } from "#/orpc/client";
  12 | 
  13 | interface GrowthPredictionsProps {
  14 | 	patientId: string;
  15 | }
  16 | 
  17 | type PercentileRecord = {
  18 | 	date: Date;
  19 | 	weight?: number | null;
  20 | 	height?: number | null;
  21 | 	headCircumference?: number | null;
  22 | 	bmi?: number | null;
  23 | 	weightForAgeZ?: number | null;
  24 | 	heightForAgeZ?: number | null;
  25 | 	bmiForAgeZ?: number | null;
  26 | 	ageDays?: number | null;
  27 | 	ageMonths?: number | null;
  28 | 	percentile?: number | null;
  29 | };
  30 | 
  31 | function classifyZScore(z: number | null | undefined): {
  32 | 	label: string;
  33 | 	variant: "default" | "secondary" | "outline" | "destructive";
  34 | } {
  35 | 	if (z == null) return { label: "No data", variant: "secondary" };
  36 | 	if (z < -3) return { label: "Severely low", variant: "destructive" };
  37 | 	if (z < -2) return { label: "Low", variant: "destructive" };
  38 | 	if (z <= 1) return { label: "Normal", variant: "default" };
  39 | 	if (z <= 2) return { label: "High", variant: "outline" };
  40 | 	return { label: "Very high", variant: "destructive" };
  41 | }
  42 | 
  43 | function ZScoreRow({ label, z }: { label: string; z: number | null | undefined }) {
  44 | 	const { label: statusLabel, variant } = classifyZScore(z);
  45 | 	const pct = z != null ? Math.min(100, Math.max(0, ((z + 3) / 6) * 100)) : 0;
  46 | 
  47 | 	return (
  48 | 		<div className='space-y-1'>
  49 | 			<div className='flex items-center justify-between text-sm'>
  50 | 				<span className='text-muted-foreground'>{label}</span>
  51 | 				<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
  52 | 					{z != null && (
  53 | 						<span className='font-mono text-xs'>
  54 | 							Z = {z > 0 ? "+" : ""}
  55 | 							{z.toFixed(2)}
  56 | 						</span>
  57 | 					)}
  58 | 					<Badge variant={variant}>{statusLabel}</Badge>
  59 | 				</div>
  60 | 			</div>
  61 | 			<Progress
  62 | 				className='h-1.5'
  63 | 				value={pct}
  64 | 			/>
  65 | 		</div>
  66 | 	);
  67 | }
  68 | 
  69 | export function GrowthPredictions({ patientId }: GrowthPredictionsProps) {
  70 | 	const { data, isLoading } = useQuery(orpc.growth.getAnalytics.queryOptions({ input: { patientId } }));
  71 | 
  72 | 	if (isLoading) {
  73 | 		return (
  74 | 			<Card>
  75 | 				<CardContent className='flex h-48 items-center justify-center'>
  76 | 					<div className='flex flex-col items-center gap-2'>
  77 | 						<Activity className='size-8 animate-pulse text-muted-foreground' />
  78 | 						<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Loading growth analytics…</p>
  79 | 					</div>
  80 | 				</CardContent>
  81 | 			</Card>
  82 | 		);
  83 | 	}
  84 | 
  85 | 	const records = (data && "analytics" in data ? data.analytics : null) as PercentileRecord[] | null | undefined;
  86 | 
  87 | 	if (!records || records.length === 0) {
  88 | 		return (
  89 | 			<Card>
  90 | 				<CardContent className='flex h-48 flex-col items-center justify-center gap-3'>
  91 | 					<Activity className='size-10 text-muted-foreground' />
  92 | 					<p className='text-center text-muted-foreground text-sm'>
  93 | 						No growth records found.
  94 | 						<br />
  95 | 						Record at least one measurement to see analytics.
  96 | 					</p>
  97 | 				</CardContent>
  98 | 			</Card>
  99 | 		);
 100 | 	}
 101 | 
 102 | 	// Sort ascending for chart
 103 | 	const sorted = [...records].sort((a, b) => new Date(a.date).getTime() - new Date(b.date).getTime());
 104 | 
 105 | 	const latest = sorted[sorted.length - 1] ?? "";
 106 | 	const first = sorted[0] ?? "";
 107 | 
 108 | 	// Compute simple velocity (kg/month, cm/month) between first and last
 109 | 	const daysDiff = Math.max(
 110 | 		1,
 111 | 		(new Date(latest.date).getTime() - new Date(first.date).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)
 112 | 	);
 113 | 	const monthsDiff = daysDiff / 30.44;
 114 | 
 115 | 	const weightVelocity =
 116 | 		first.weight != null && latest.weight != null ? ((latest.weight - first.weight) / monthsDiff).toFixed(2) : null;
 117 | 
 118 | 	const heightVelocity =
 119 | 		first.height != null && latest.height != null ? ((latest.height - first.height) / monthsDiff).toFixed(2) : null;
 120 | 
 121 | 	// Chart data
 122 | 	const chartData = sorted.map(r => ({
 123 | 		date: new Date(r.date).toLocaleDateString(),
 124 | 		weight: r.weight ?? null,
 125 | 		height: r.height ?? null,
 126 | 		headCircumference: r.headCircumference ?? null,
 127 | 		bmi: r.bmi != null ? Number(Number(r.bmi).toFixed(1)) : null,
 128 | 		percentile: r.percentile ?? null
 129 | 	}));
 130 | 
 131 | 	// Percentile distribution
 132 | 	const withPercentile = records.filter(r => r.percentile != null);
 133 | 	const avgPercentile =
 134 | 		withPercentile.length > 0
 135 | 			? withPercentile.reduce((s, r) => s + (r.percentile ?? 0), 0) / withPercentile.length
 136 | 			: null;
 137 | 
 138 | 	return (
 139 | 		<div className='space-y-6'>
 140 | 			{/* Summary cards */}
 141 | 			<div className='grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4'>
 142 | 				<Card>
 143 | 					<CardHeader className='pb-2'>
 144 | 						<CardTitle className='font-medium text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Measurements</CardTitle>
 145 | 					</CardHeader>
 146 | 					<CardContent>
 147 | 						<p className='font-bold text-2xl'>{records.length}</p>
 148 | 						<p className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>total records</p>
 149 | 					</CardContent>
 150 | 				</Card>
 151 | 
 152 | 				<Card>
 153 | 					<CardHeader className='pb-2'>
 154 | 						<CardTitle className='font-medium text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Weight velocity</CardTitle>
 155 | 					</CardHeader>
 156 | 					<CardContent>
 157 | 						{weightVelocity != null ? (
 158 | 							<div className='flex items-center gap-1'>
 159 | 								{Number(weightVelocity) >= 0 ? (
 160 | 									<TrendingUp className='size-4 text-green-500' />
 161 | 								) : (
 162 | 									<TrendingDown className='size-4 text-red-500' />
 163 | 								)}
 164 | 								<p className='font-bold text-2xl'>{weightVelocity}</p>
 165 | 								<p className='self-end pb-0.5 text-muted-foreground text-xs'>kg/mo</p>
 166 | 							</div>
 167 | 						) : (
 168 | 							<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>—</p>
 169 | 						)}
 170 | 					</CardContent>
 171 | 				</Card>
 172 | 
 173 | 				<Card>
 174 | 					<CardHeader className='pb-2'>
 175 | 						<CardTitle className='font-medium text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Height velocity</CardTitle>
 176 | 					</CardHeader>
 177 | 					<CardContent>
 178 | 						{heightVelocity != null ? (
 179 | 							<div className='flex items-center gap-1'>
 180 | 								{Number(heightVelocity) >= 0 ? (
 181 | 									<TrendingUp className='size-4 text-green-500' />
 182 | 								) : (
 183 | 									<TrendingDown className='size-4 text-red-500' />
 184 | 								)}
 185 | 								<p className='font-bold text-2xl'>{heightVelocity}</p>
 186 | 								<p className='self-end pb-0.5 text-muted-foreground text-xs'>cm/mo</p>
 187 | 							</div>
 188 | 						) : (
 189 | 							<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>—</p>
 190 | 						)}
 191 | 					</CardContent>
 192 | 				</Card>
 193 | 
 194 | 				<Card>
 195 | 					<CardHeader className='pb-2'>
 196 | 						<CardTitle className='font-medium text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Avg. percentile</CardTitle>
 197 | 					</CardHeader>
 198 | 					<CardContent>
 199 | 						{avgPercentile != null ? (
 200 | 							<>
 201 | 								<p className='font-bold text-2xl'>
 202 | 									{avgPercentile.toFixed(0)}
 203 | 									<span className='font-normal text-base'>th</span>
 204 | 								</p>
 205 | 								<Progress
 206 | 									className='mt-1 h-1.5'
 207 | 									value={avgPercentile}
 208 | 								/>
 209 | 							</>
 210 | 						) : (
 211 | 							<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>—</p>
 212 | 						)}
 213 | 					</CardContent>
 214 | 				</Card>
 215 | 			</div>
 216 | 
 217 | 			{/* Growth chart */}
 218 | 			<Card>
 219 | 				<CardHeader>
 220 | 					<CardTitle>Growth Trend</CardTitle>
 221 | 					<CardDescription>Weight and height over {records.length} measurements</CardDescription>
 222 | 				</CardHeader>
 223 | 				<CardContent>
 224 | 					<ResponsiveContainer
 225 | 						height={360}
 226 | 						width='100%'
 227 | 					>
 228 | 						<ComposedChart
 229 | 							data={chartData}
 230 | 							margin={{ top: 4, right: 24, left: 0, bottom: 4 }}
 231 | 						>
 232 | 							<CartesianGrid
 233 | 								className='stroke-border'
 234 | 								strokeDasharray='3 3'
 235 | 							/>
 236 | 							<XAxis
 237 | 								axisLine={false}
 238 | 								dataKey='date'
 239 | 								tick={{ fontSize: 11 }}
 240 | 								tickLine={false}
 241 | 							/>
 242 | 							<YAxis
 243 | 								axisLine={false}
 244 | 								label={{
 245 | 									value: "Weight (kg)",
 246 | 									angle: -90,
 247 | 									position: "insideLeft",
 248 | 									style: { fontSize: 11 }
 249 | 								}}
 250 | 								tick={{ fontSize: 11 }}
 251 | 								tickLine={false}
 252 | 								yAxisId='weight'
 253 | 							/>
 254 | 							<YAxis
 255 | 								axisLine={false}
 256 | 								label={{
 257 | 									value: "Height (cm)",
 258 | 									angle: 90,
 259 | 									position: "insideRight",
 260 | 									style: { fontSize: 11 }
 261 | 								}}
 262 | 								orientation='right'
 263 | 								tick={{ fontSize: 11 }}
 264 | 								tickLine={false}
 265 | 								yAxisId='height'
 266 | 							/>
 267 | 							<Tooltip
 268 | 								formatter={(
 269 | 									value: ValueType | undefined,
 270 | 									name: NameType | undefined
 271 | 								): [string, string] => [
 272 | 									typeof value === "number" ? value.toFixed(1) : String(value ?? "—"),
 273 | 									String(name ?? "")
 274 | 								]}
 275 | 							/>
 276 | 							<Legend wrapperStyle={{ fontSize: 12 }} />
 277 | 							<Area
 278 | 								connectNulls
 279 | 								dataKey='weight'
 280 | 								dot={{ r: 3 }}
 281 | 								fill='#3b82f6'
 282 | 								fillOpacity={0.15}
 283 | 								name='Weight (kg)'
 284 | 								stroke='#3b82f6'
 285 | 								strokeWidth={2}
 286 | 								type='monotone'
 287 | 								yAxisId='weight'
 288 | 							/>
 289 | 							<Area
 290 | 								connectNulls
 291 | 								dataKey='height'
 292 | 								dot={{ r: 3 }}
 293 | 								fill='#10b981'
 294 | 								fillOpacity={0.15}
 295 | 								name='Height (cm)'
 296 | 								stroke='#10b981'
 297 | 								strokeWidth={2}
 298 | 								type='monotone'
 299 | 								yAxisId='height'
 300 | 							/>
 301 | 						</ComposedChart>
 302 | 					</ResponsiveContainer>
 303 | 				</CardContent>
 304 | 			</Card>
 305 | 
 306 | 			{/* Latest Z-scores */}
 307 | 			<Card>
 308 | 				<CardHeader>
 309 | 					<CardTitle>Latest Z-Score Classification</CardTitle>
 310 | 					<CardDescription>
 311 | 						Based on most recent measurement — {new Date(latest.date).toLocaleDateString()}
 312 | 					</CardDescription>
 313 | 				</CardHeader>
 314 | 				<CardContent className='space-y-4'>
 315 | 					<ZScoreRow
 316 | 						label='Weight-for-age'
 317 | 						z={latest.weightForAgeZ}
 318 | 					/>
 319 | 					<ZScoreRow
 320 | 						label='Height-for-age'
 321 | 						z={latest.heightForAgeZ}
 322 | 					/>
 323 | 					<ZScoreRow
 324 | 						label='BMI-for-age'
 325 | 						z={latest.bmiForAgeZ}
 326 | 					/>
 327 | 				</CardContent>
 328 | 			</Card>
 329 | 
 330 | 			{/* Percentile history */}
 331 | 			{withPercentile.length > 0 && (
 332 | 				<Card>
 333 | 					<CardHeader>
 334 | 						<CardTitle>Percentile History</CardTitle>
 335 | 						<CardDescription>BMI percentile at each recorded measurement</CardDescription>
 336 | 					</CardHeader>
 337 | 					<CardContent>
 338 | 						<ResponsiveContainer
 339 | 							height={200}
 340 | 							width='100%'
 341 | 						>
 342 | 							<ComposedChart
 343 | 								data={chartData}
 344 | 								margin={{ top: 4, right: 16, left: 0, bottom: 4 }}
 345 | 							>
 346 | 								<CartesianGrid
 347 | 									className='stroke-border'
 348 | 									strokeDasharray='3 3'
 349 | 								/>
 350 | 								<XAxis
 351 | 									axisLine={false}
 352 | 									dataKey='date'
 353 | 									tick={{ fontSize: 11 }}
 354 | 									tickLine={false}
 355 | 								/>
 356 | 								<YAxis
 357 | 									axisLine={false}
 358 | 									domain={[0, 100]}
 359 | 									label={{
 360 | 										value: "Percentile",
 361 | 										angle: -90,
 362 | 										position: "insideLeft",
 363 | 										style: { fontSize: 11 }
 364 | 									}}
 365 | 									tick={{ fontSize: 11 }}
 366 | 									tickLine={false}
 367 | 									yAxisId='pct'
 368 | 								/>
 369 | 								<Tooltip
 370 | 									formatter={(value: ValueType | undefined): [string, string] => [
 371 | 										`${typeof value === "number" ? value.toFixed(0) : "—"}th`,
 372 | 										"Percentile"
 373 | 									]}
 374 | 								/>
 375 | 								<Area
 376 | 									connectNulls
 377 | 									dataKey='percentile'
 378 | 									dot={{ r: 3 }}
 379 | 									fill='#8b5cf6'
 380 | 									fillOpacity={0.2}
 381 | 									name='Percentile'
 382 | 									stroke='#8b5cf6'
 383 | 									strokeWidth={2}
 384 | 									type='monotone'
 385 | 									yAxisId='pct'
 386 | 								/>
 387 | 							</ComposedChart>
 388 | 						</ResponsiveContainer>
 389 | 					</CardContent>
 390 | 				</Card>
 391 | 			)}
 392 | 
 393 | 			{/* Disclaimer */}
 394 | 			<p className='text-center text-muted-foreground text-xs'>
 395 | 				Growth analytics are based on recorded measurements and WHO reference standards. Always combine with
 396 | 				clinical assessment.
 397 | 			</p>
 398 | 		</div>
 399 | 	);
 400 | }

```

`components/growth/growth-summary-card.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/growth/growth-summary-card.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   4 | import { TrendingDown, TrendingUp } from "lucide-react";
   5 | 
   6 | interface GrowthSummaryCardProps {
   7 | 	weight: number;
   8 | 	height: number;
   9 | 	weightPercentile: number;
  10 | 	heightPercentile: number;
  11 | 	trend?: "up" | "down";
  12 | }
  13 | 
  14 | export function GrowthSummaryCard({
  15 | 	weight,
  16 | 	height,
  17 | 	weightPercentile,
  18 | 	heightPercentile,
  19 | 	trend = "up"
  20 | }: GrowthSummaryCardProps) {
  21 | 	return (
  22 | 		<Card>
  23 | 			<CardHeader className='pb-2'>
  24 | 				<CardTitle className='font-medium text-sm'>Latest Measurements</CardTitle>
  25 | 			</CardHeader>
  26 | 			<CardContent>
  27 | 				<div className='space-y-3'>
  28 | 					<div>
  29 | 						<div className='flex items-center justify-between'>
  30 | 							<span className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Weight</span>
  31 | 							<span className='font-bold text-2xl'>{weight} kg</span>
  32 | 						</div>
  33 | 						<div className='mt-1 flex items-center justify-between'>
  34 | 							<span className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>{weightPercentile}th percentile</span>
  35 | 							{trend === "up" ? (
  36 | 								<TrendingUp className='size-3 text-green-600' />
  37 | 							) : (
  38 | 								<TrendingDown className='size-3 text-red-600' />
  39 | 							)}
  40 | 						</div>
  41 | 					</div>
  42 | 					<div>
  43 | 						<div className='flex items-center justify-between'>
  44 | 							<span className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Height</span>
  45 | 							<span className='font-bold text-2xl'>{height} cm</span>
  46 | 						</div>
  47 | 						<div className='mt-1 text-muted-foreground text-xs'>{heightPercentile}th percentile</div>
  48 | 					</div>
  49 | 				</div>
  50 | 			</CardContent>
  51 | 		</Card>
  52 | 	);
  53 | }
```

`components/growth/percentile-calculator.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/growth/percentile-calculator.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
   4 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   5 | import { Progress } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/progress";
   6 | import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/table";
   7 | import { useQuery } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   8 | import { AlertCircle, TrendingDown, TrendingUp } from "lucide-react";
   9 | 
  10 | import { orpc } from "@/utils/orpc";
  11 | 
  12 | interface PercentileCalculatorProps {
  13 | 	patientId: string;
  14 | 	data?: {
  15 | 		ageMonths: number;
  16 | 		ageDays: number;
  17 | 		lastMeasurement?: {
  18 | 			weight?: number;
  19 | 			height?: number;
  20 | 			headCircumference?: number;
  21 | 			bmi?: number;
  22 | 			date: string | Date;
  23 | 		};
  24 | 		classifications: Record<string, { percentile?: number; zScore?: number; classification?: string }>;
  25 | 		growthVelocity?: { weightPerMonth?: number; heightPerMonth?: number };
  26 | 	};
  27 | }
  28 | 
  29 | interface GrowthPercentileData {
  30 | 	ageMonths: number;
  31 | 	ageDays: number;
  32 | 	lastMeasurement?: {
  33 | 		weight?: number;
  34 | 		height?: number;
  35 | 		headCircumference?: number;
  36 | 		bmi?: number;
  37 | 		date: string | Date;
  38 | 	};
  39 | 	classifications: Record<
  40 | 		string,
  41 | 		{
  42 | 			percentile?: number;
  43 | 			zScore?: number;
  44 | 			classification?: string;
  45 | 		}
  46 | 	>;
  47 | 	growthVelocity?: {
  48 | 		weightPerMonth?: number;
  49 | 		heightPerMonth?: number;
  50 | 	};
  51 | }
  52 | 
  53 | export function PercentileCalculator({ patientId }: PercentileCalculatorProps) {
  54 | 	const { data: rawData, isLoading } = useQuery(orpc.growth.getAnalytics.queryOptions({ input: { patientId } }));
  55 | 
  56 | 	const percentileData = rawData as unknown as GrowthPercentileData;
  57 | 
  58 | 	const { data: patient } = useQuery(orpc.patient.getById.queryOptions({ input: { id: patientId } }));
  59 | 
  60 | 	const getPercentileColor = (percentile: number | null) => {
  61 | 		if (!percentile) return "bg-gray-500";
  62 | 		if (percentile < 5) return "bg-red-500";
  63 | 		if (percentile < 15) return "bg-orange-500";
  64 | 		if (percentile < 85) return "bg-green-500";
  65 | 		if (percentile < 95) return "bg-yellow-500";
  66 | 		return "bg-red-500";
  67 | 	};
  68 | 
  69 | 	const getClassificationBadge = (classification: string) => {
  70 | 		switch (classification) {
  71 | 			case "SEVERELY_UNDERWEIGHT":
  72 | 			case "SEVERELY_STUNTED":
  73 | 				return <Badge variant='destructive'>Severe</Badge>;
  74 | 			case "UNDERWEIGHT":
  75 | 			case "STUNTED":
  76 | 				return <Badge variant='destructive'>Below Normal</Badge>;
  77 | 			case "NORMAL":
  78 | 				return <Badge variant='default'>Normal</Badge>;
  79 | 			case "OVERWEIGHT":
  80 | 			case "TALL":
  81 | 				return <Badge variant='outline'>Above Normal</Badge>;
  82 | 			case "OBESE":
  83 | 			case "VERY_TALL":
  84 | 				return <Badge variant='destructive'>High</Badge>;
  85 | 			default:
  86 | 				return <Badge variant='secondary'>No Data</Badge>;
  87 | 		}
  88 | 	};
  89 | 
  90 | 	const getTrendIcon = (trend?: "up" | "down") => {
  91 | 		if (trend === "up") return <TrendingUp className='size-4 text-green-600' />;
  92 | 		if (trend === "down") return <TrendingDown className='size-4 text-red-600' />;
  93 | 		return null;
  94 | 	};
  95 | 
  96 | 	if (isLoading) {
  97 | 		return (
  98 | 			<Card>
  99 | 				<CardContent className='flex h-100 items-center justify-center'>
 100 | 					<div className='text-muted-foreground'>Calculating percentiles...</div>
 101 | 				</CardContent>
 102 | 			</Card>
 103 | 		);
 104 | 	}
 105 | 
 106 | 	if (!percentileData || !("classifications" in percentileData)) {
 107 | 		return (
 108 | 			<Card>
 109 | 				<CardContent className='flex h-100 flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4'>
 110 | 					<AlertCircle className='size-12 text-muted-foreground' />
 111 | 					<p className='text-center text-muted-foreground'>
 112 | 						No growth measurements found for this patient.
 113 | 						<br />
 114 | 						Please record growth measurements to see percentile calculations.
 115 | 					</p>
 116 | 				</CardContent>
 117 | 			</Card>
 118 | 		);
 119 | 	}
 120 | 
 121 | 	const velocity = percentileData.growthVelocity;
 122 | 
 123 | 	const metrics = [
 124 | 		{
 125 | 			name: "Weight",
 126 | 			value: percentileData.lastMeasurement?.weight,
 127 | 			unit: "kg",
 128 | 			percentile: percentileData.classifications?.weight?.percentile,
 129 | 			zScore: percentileData.classifications?.weight?.zScore,
 130 | 			classification: percentileData.classifications?.weight?.classification,
 131 | 			trend: "up" as const
 132 | 		},
 133 | 		{
 134 | 			name: "Height",
 135 | 			value: percentileData.lastMeasurement?.height,
 136 | 			unit: "cm",
 137 | 			zScore: percentileData.classifications?.height?.zScore,
 138 | 			classification: percentileData.classifications?.height?.classification,
 139 | 			trend: "up" as const
 140 | 		},
 141 | 		{
 142 | 			name: "Head Circumference",
 143 | 			value: percentileData.lastMeasurement?.headCircumference,
 144 | 			unit: "cm",
 145 | 			zScore: percentileData.classifications?.headCircumference?.zScore,
 146 | 			classification: percentileData.classifications?.headCircumference?.classification,
 147 | 			trend: "down" as const
 148 | 		},
 149 | 		{
 150 | 			name: "BMI",
 151 | 			value: percentileData.lastMeasurement?.bmi,
 152 | 			unit: "kg/m²",
 153 | 			zScore: percentileData.classifications?.bmi?.zScore,
 154 | 			classification: percentileData.classifications?.bmi?.classification,
 155 | 			trend: "up" as const
 156 | 		}
 157 | 	];
 158 | 
 159 | 	return (
 160 | 		<div className='space-y-6'>
 161 | 			{/* Patient Age Info */}
 162 | 			<Card>
 163 | 				<CardHeader>
 164 | 					<CardTitle>Patient Information</CardTitle>
 165 | 					<CardDescription>
 166 | 						Age: {percentileData.ageMonths} months ({percentileData.ageDays} days)
 167 | 					</CardDescription>
 168 | 				</CardHeader>
 169 | 				<CardContent>
 170 | 					<div className='grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2'>
 171 | 						<div>
 172 | 							<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Date of Birth</p>
 173 | 							<p className='font-medium'>
 174 | 								{patient?.dateOfBirth ? new Date(patient.dateOfBirth).toLocaleDateString() : "N/A"}
 175 | 							</p>
 176 | 						</div>
 177 | 						<div>
 178 | 							<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Last Measurement</p>
 179 | 							<p className='font-medium'>
 180 | 								{percentileData.lastMeasurement?.date
 181 | 									? new Date(percentileData.lastMeasurement.date).toLocaleDateString()
 182 | 									: "N/A"}
 183 | 							</p>
 184 | 						</div>
 185 | 					</div>
 186 | 				</CardContent>
 187 | 			</Card>
 188 | 
 189 | 			{/* WHO Growth Standards */}
 190 | 			<Card>
 191 | 				<CardHeader>
 192 | 					<CardTitle>WHO Growth Standards</CardTitle>
 193 | 					<CardDescription>Percentile rankings based on WHO Child Growth Standards</CardDescription>
 194 | 				</CardHeader>
 195 | 				<CardContent>
 196 | 					<Table>
 197 | 						<TableHeader>
 198 | 							<TableRow>
 199 | 								<TableHead>Metric</TableHead>
 200 | 								<TableHead>Value</TableHead>
 201 | 								<TableHead>Percentile</TableHead>
 202 | 								<TableHead>Z-Score</TableHead>
 203 | 								<TableHead>Classification</TableHead>
 204 | 								<TableHead>Trend</TableHead>
 205 | 							</TableRow>
 206 | 						</TableHeader>
 207 | 						<TableBody>
 208 | 							{metrics.map(metric => (
 209 | 								<TableRow key={metric.name}>
 210 | 									<TableCell className='font-medium'>{metric.name}</TableCell>
 211 | 									<TableCell>{metric.value ? `${metric.value} ${metric.unit}` : "—"}</TableCell>
 212 | 									<TableCell>
 213 | 										{metric.percentile !== undefined && metric.percentile !== null ? (
 214 | 											<div className='space-y-1'>
 215 | 												<span className='font-medium'>{metric.percentile}th</span>
 216 | 												<Progress
 217 | 													className={`h-1 ${getPercentileColor(metric.percentile)}`}
 218 | 													value={metric.percentile}
 219 | 												/>
 220 | 											</div>
 221 | 										) : (
 222 | 											"—"
 223 | 										)}
 224 | 									</TableCell>
 225 | 									<TableCell>
 226 | 										{metric.zScore !== undefined && metric.zScore !== null
 227 | 											? metric.zScore.toFixed(2)
 228 | 											: "—"}
 229 | 									</TableCell>
 230 | 									<TableCell>{getClassificationBadge(metric.classification || "NO_DATA")}</TableCell>
 231 | 									<TableCell>{getTrendIcon(metric.trend)}</TableCell>
 232 | 								</TableRow>
 233 | 							))}
 234 | 						</TableBody>
 235 | 					</Table>
 236 | 				</CardContent>
 237 | 			</Card>
 238 | 
 239 | 			{/* Growth Velocity */}
 240 | 			<Card>
 241 | 				<CardHeader>
 242 | 					<CardTitle>Growth Velocity</CardTitle>
 243 | 					<CardDescription>Rate of change between measurements</CardDescription>
 244 | 				</CardHeader>
 245 | 				<CardContent>
 246 | 					<div className='grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2'>
 247 | 						<div className='rounded-lg border p-4'>
 248 | 							<div className='mb-2 flex items-center justify-between'>
 249 | 								<span className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Weight Gain</span>
 250 | 								<TrendingUp className='size-4 text-green-600' />
 251 | 							</div>
 252 | 							<div className='font-bold text-2xl'>
 253 | 								{velocity?.weightPerMonth?.toFixed(2) || "—"} kg/month
 254 | 							</div>
 255 | 							<p className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>Expected: 0.2-0.5 kg/month for age</p>
 256 | 						</div>
 257 | 						<div className='rounded-lg border p-4'>
 258 | 							<div className='mb-2 flex items-center justify-between'>
 259 | 								<span className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Height Growth</span>
 260 | 								<TrendingUp className='size-4 text-green-600' />
 261 | 							</div>
 262 | 							<div className='font-bold text-2xl'>
 263 | 								{velocity?.heightPerMonth?.toFixed(2) || "—"} cm/month
 264 | 							</div>
 265 | 							<p className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>Expected: 0.5-1.0 cm/month for age</p>
 266 | 						</div>
 267 | 					</div>
 268 | 				</CardContent>
 269 | 			</Card>
 270 | 
 271 | 			{/* Clinical Recommendations */}
 272 | 			{(percentileData.classifications.weight?.classification !== "NORMAL" ||
 273 | 				percentileData.classifications.height?.classification !== "NORMAL") && (
 274 | 				<Card className='border-yellow-200 bg-yellow-50'>
 275 | 					<CardHeader>
 276 | 						<CardTitle className='flex items-center gap-2 text-yellow-900'>
 277 | 							<AlertCircle className='size-5' />
 278 | 							Clinical Recommendations
 279 | 						</CardTitle>
 280 | 					</CardHeader>
 281 | 					<CardContent>
 282 | 						<ul className='space-y-2 text-yellow-800'>
 283 | 							{percentileData.classifications.weight?.classification !== "NORMAL" && (
 284 | 								<li>• Schedule follow-up for weight monitoring in 1-2 weeks</li>
 285 | 							)}
 286 | 							{percentileData.classifications.height?.classification !== "NORMAL" && (
 287 | 								<li>• Evaluate nutritional status and consider dietary consultation</li>
 288 | 							)}
 289 | 							{percentileData.classifications.headCircumference?.classification !== "NORMAL" && (
 290 | 								<li>• Monitor head circumference growth closely</li>
 291 | 							)}
 292 | 							<li>• Review growth chart at next well-child visit</li>
 293 | 						</ul>
 294 | 					</CardContent>
 295 | 				</Card>
 296 | 			)}
 297 | 		</div>
 298 | 	);
 299 | }
```

`components/immunizations/ImmunizationsTableRowActions.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/immunizations/ImmunizationsTableRowActions.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   4 | import {
   5 | 	DropdownMenu,
   6 | 	DropdownMenuContent,
   7 | 	DropdownMenuItem,
   8 | 	DropdownMenuLabel,
   9 | 	DropdownMenuSeparator,
  10 | 	DropdownMenuTrigger
  11 | } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/dropdown-menu";
  12 | import { useMutation, useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
  13 | import { Link } from "@tanstack/react-router";
  14 | import type { Row } from "@tanstack/react-table";
  15 | import { MoreHorizontal } from "lucide-react";
  16 | import { toast } from "sonner";
  17 | 
  18 | import { orpc } from "@/utils/orpc";
  19 | 
  20 | interface Immunization {
  21 | 	id: string;
  22 | 	patientId: string;
  23 | 	patientName: string;
  24 | 	vaccine: string;
  25 | 	date: Date;
  26 | 	dose: string;
  27 | 	status: string;
  28 | }
  29 | 
  30 | interface ImmunizationsTableRowActionsProps<TData> {
  31 | 	row: Row<TData>;
  32 | }
  33 | 
  34 | export function ImmunizationsTableRowActions<TData>({ row }: ImmunizationsTableRowActionsProps<TData>) {
  35 | 	const immunization = row.original as Immunization;
  36 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
  37 | 
  38 | 	const { mutate: deleteImmunization, isPending } = useMutation(
  39 | 		orpc.immunization.delete.mutationOptions({
  40 | 			onSuccess: () => {
  41 | 				toast.success("Immunization record deleted successfully");
  42 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({
  43 | 					queryKey: orpc.immunization.key()
  44 | 				});
  45 | 			},
  46 | 			onError: (error: Error) => {
  47 | 				toast.error(error.message || "Failed to delete immunization record");
  48 | 			}
  49 | 		})
  50 | 	);
  51 | 
  52 | 	const handleDelete = () => {
  53 | 		if (confirm(`Are you sure you want to delete this immunization record for ${immunization.patientName}?`)) {
  54 | 			deleteImmunization({ id: immunization.id });
  55 | 		}
  56 | 	};
  57 | 
  58 | 	return (
  59 | 		<DropdownMenu>
  60 | 			<DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
  61 | 				<Button
  62 | 					className='h-8 w-8 p-0'
  63 | 					variant='ghost'
  64 | 				>
  65 | 					<span className='sr-only'>Open menu</span>
  66 | 					<MoreHorizontal className='h-4 w-4' />
  67 | 				</Button>
  68 | 			</DropdownMenuTrigger>
  69 | 			<DropdownMenuContent align='end'>
  70 | 				<DropdownMenuLabel>Actions</DropdownMenuLabel>
  71 | 				<DropdownMenuItem asChild>
  72 | 					<Link
  73 | 						params={{ id: immunization.id }}
  74 | 						to='/dashboard/immunizations/$id'
  75 | 					>
  76 | 						View Details
  77 | 					</Link>
  78 | 				</DropdownMenuItem>
  79 | 				<DropdownMenuItem asChild>
  80 | 					<Link
  81 | 						params={{ id: immunization.id }}
  82 | 						to='/dashboard/immunizations/$id/edit'
  83 | 					>
  84 | 						Edit Record
  85 | 					</Link>
  86 | 				</DropdownMenuItem>
  87 | 				<DropdownMenuItem asChild>
  88 | 					<Link
  89 | 						params={{ id: immunization.patientId }}
  90 | 						to='/dashboard/patients/$id'
  91 | 					>
  92 | 						View Patient
  93 | 					</Link>
  94 | 				</DropdownMenuItem>
  95 | 				<DropdownMenuSeparator />
  96 | 				<DropdownMenuItem
  97 | 					className='text-red-600 focus:text-red-600'
  98 | 					disabled={isPending}
  99 | 					onClick={handleDelete}
 100 | 				>
 101 | 					{isPending ? "Deleting..." : "Delete"}
 102 | 				</DropdownMenuItem>
 103 | 			</DropdownMenuContent>
 104 | 		</DropdownMenu>
 105 | 	);
 106 | }

```

`components/immunizations/columns.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/immunizations/columns.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { DataTableColumnHeader } from "@clinic/ui/components/data-table/DataTableColumnHeader";
   4 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
   5 | import { Checkbox } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/checkbox";
   6 | import type { ColumnDef, ColumnMeta, Row, Table } from "@tanstack/react-table";
   7 | 
   8 | import { ImmunizationsTableRowActions } from "./ImmunizationsTableRowActions";
   9 | 
  10 | interface Immunization {
  11 | 	id: string;
  12 | 	patientId: string;
  13 | 	patientName: string;
  14 | 	vaccine: string;
  15 | 	date: Date;
  16 | 	dose: string;
  17 | 	lotNumber: string;
  18 | 	administeredByStaffId: string;
  19 | 	administeredByName: string;
  20 | 	notes?: string;
  21 | 	status: "COMPLETED" | "PENDING" | "OVERDUE" | "SCHEDULED";
  22 | 	createdAt: Date;
  23 | }
  24 | 
  25 | type ImmunizationColumnMeta = ColumnMeta<Immunization, unknown> & {
  26 | 	className?: string;
  27 | };
  28 | 
  29 | type ImmunizationColumnDef = ColumnDef<Immunization> & {
  30 | 	meta?: ImmunizationColumnMeta;
  31 | };
  32 | 
  33 | // Helper function for date comparison
  34 | function isUpcomingDate(date: Date): boolean {
  35 | 	const today = new Date();
  36 | 	today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
  37 | 	return date > today;
  38 | }
  39 | 
  40 | // Status configuration for better maintainability
  41 | const STATUS_CONFIG = {
  42 | 	COMPLETED: { variant: "default" as const, label: "Completed" },
  43 | 	PENDING: { variant: "outline" as const, label: "Pending" },
  44 | 	OVERDUE: { variant: "destructive" as const, label: "Overdue" },
  45 | 	SCHEDULED: { variant: "secondary" as const, label: "Scheduled" }
  46 | } as const;
  47 | 
  48 | export const immunizationColumns: ImmunizationColumnDef[] = [
  49 | 	{
  50 | 		id: "select",
  51 | 		header: ({ table }: { table: Table<Immunization> }) => (
  52 | 			<Checkbox
  53 | 				aria-label='Select all'
  54 | 				checked={table.getIsAllPageRowsSelected() || (table.getIsSomePageRowsSelected() && "indeterminate")}
  55 | 				className='translate-y-0.5'
  56 | 				onCheckedChange={value => table.toggleAllPageRowsSelected(!!value)}
  57 | 			/>
  58 | 		),
  59 | 		cell: ({ row }) => (
  60 | 			<Checkbox
  61 | 				aria-label='Select row'
  62 | 				checked={row.getIsSelected()}
  63 | 				className='translate-y-0.5'
  64 | 				onCheckedChange={value => row.toggleSelected(!!value)}
  65 | 			/>
  66 | 		),
  67 | 		enableSorting: false,
  68 | 		enableHiding: false,
  69 | 		// Add size meta for better column width control
  70 | 		meta: { className: "w-10" }
  71 | 	},
  72 | 	{
  73 | 		accessorKey: "patientName",
  74 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
  75 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
  76 | 				column={column}
  77 | 				title='Patient'
  78 | 			/>
  79 | 		),
  80 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
  81 | 			const patientName = row.getValue("patientName") as string;
  82 | 			return <div className='font-medium'>{patientName}</div>;
  83 | 		}, // Explicitly type row
  84 | 		filterFn: (row: Row<Immunization>, id: string, value: string) => {
  85 | 			const cellValue = row.getValue(id) as string;
  86 | 			return cellValue.toLowerCase().includes(String(value).toLowerCase());
  87 | 		},
  88 | 		// Add sorting for patient name
  89 | 		sortingFn: (rowA: Row<Immunization>, rowB: Row<Immunization>, columnId: string) => {
  90 | 			const a = rowA.getValue(columnId) as string;
  91 | 			const b = rowB.getValue(columnId) as string;
  92 | 			return a.localeCompare(b);
  93 | 		},
  94 | 		meta: { className: "min-w-[150px]" }
  95 | 	},
  96 | 	{
  97 | 		accessorKey: "vaccine",
  98 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
  99 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader // Explicitly type column
 100 | 				column={column}
 101 | 				title='Vaccine'
 102 | 			/>
 103 | 		),
 104 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 105 | 			const vaccine = row.getValue("vaccine") as string;
 106 | 			return <div className='font-medium'>{vaccine}</div>;
 107 | 		},
 108 | 		filterFn: (row, id, value) => {
 109 | 			return value.includes(row.getValue(id));
 110 | 		},
 111 | 		meta: { className: "min-w-[120px]" }
 112 | 	},
 113 | 	{
 114 | 		accessorKey: "dose",
 115 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
 116 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
 117 | 				column={column}
 118 | 				title='Dose'
 119 | 			/>
 120 | 		),
 121 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 122 | 			const dose = row.getValue("dose") as string;
 123 | 			return <Badge variant='outline'>{dose}</Badge>;
 124 | 		}, // Explicitly type row
 125 | 		meta: { className: "w-[80px]" }
 126 | 	},
 127 | 	{
 128 | 		accessorKey: "date", // Explicitly type column
 129 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
 130 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
 131 | 				column={column}
 132 | 				title='Date Administered'
 133 | 			/>
 134 | 		),
 135 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 136 | 			const date = new Date(row.getValue("date"));
 137 | 			const isUpcoming = isUpcomingDate(date);
 138 | 			const formattedDate = date.toLocaleDateString(undefined, {
 139 | 				year: "numeric",
 140 | 				month: "short",
 141 | 				day: "numeric"
 142 | 			});
 143 | 
 144 | 			return (
 145 | 				<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 146 | 					<span className={isUpcoming ? "text-amber-600" : ""}>{formattedDate}</span>
 147 | 					{isUpcoming && (
 148 | 						<Badge
 149 | 							className='border-amber-600 text-amber-600'
 150 | 							variant='outline'
 151 | 						>
 152 | 							Scheduled
 153 | 						</Badge>
 154 | 					)}
 155 | 				</div>
 156 | 			);
 157 | 		},
 158 | 		sortingFn: (rowA: Row<Immunization>, rowB: Row<Immunization>, columnId: string) => {
 159 | 			const a = new Date(rowA.getValue(columnId));
 160 | 			const b = new Date(rowB.getValue(columnId));
 161 | 			return a.getTime() - b.getTime();
 162 | 		}, // Explicitly type parameters
 163 | 		meta: { className: "min-w-[160px]" }
 164 | 	},
 165 | 	{
 166 | 		accessorKey: "status",
 167 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
 168 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
 169 | 				column={column}
 170 | 				title='Status'
 171 | 			/>
 172 | 		),
 173 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 174 | 			const status = row.getValue("status") as keyof typeof STATUS_CONFIG;
 175 | 			const config = STATUS_CONFIG[status] || {
 176 | 				variant: "secondary" as const,
 177 | 				label: status
 178 | 			};
 179 | 
 180 | 			return <Badge variant={config.variant}>{config.label}</Badge>;
 181 | 		},
 182 | 		filterFn: (row: Row<Immunization>, id: string, value: string[]) => {
 183 | 			return value.includes(row.getValue(id) as string);
 184 | 		}, // Explicitly type parameters
 185 | 		meta: { className: "w-[110px]" }
 186 | 	},
 187 | 	{
 188 | 		accessorKey: "administeredByName",
 189 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
 190 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
 191 | 				column={column}
 192 | 				title='Administered By'
 193 | 			/>
 194 | 		),
 195 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 196 | 			const name = row.getValue("administeredByName") as string;
 197 | 			return <div className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>{name || "—"}</div>;
 198 | 		}, // Explicitly type row
 199 | 		meta: { className: "min-w-[120px]" }
 200 | 	},
 201 | 	{
 202 | 		accessorKey: "lotNumber",
 203 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
 204 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
 205 | 				column={column}
 206 | 				title='Lot #'
 207 | 			/>
 208 | 		),
 209 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 210 | 			const lotNumber = row.getValue("lotNumber") as string;
 211 | 			return <div className='font-mono text-sm'>{lotNumber || "—"}</div>;
 212 | 		}, // Explicitly type row
 213 | 		meta: { className: "w-[100px]" }
 214 | 	},
 215 | 	{
 216 | 		id: "actions",
 217 | 		cell: ({ row }) => <ImmunizationsTableRowActions row={row} />,
 218 | 		meta: { className: "w-[50px]" }
 219 | 	}
 220 | ];
 221 | 
 222 | // Vaccine options for filtering - extracted from actual data or API
 223 | export const vaccineOptions = [
 224 | 	{ label: "BCG", value: "BCG" },
 225 | 	{ label: "Hepatitis B", value: "Hepatitis B" },
 226 | 	{ label: "DPT", value: "DPT" },
 227 | 	{ label: "Polio", value: "Polio" },
 228 | 	{ label: "MMR", value: "MMR" },
 229 | 	{ label: "Hib", value: "Hib" },
 230 | 	{ label: "PCV", value: "PCV" },
 231 | 	{ label: "Rotavirus", value: "Rotavirus" },
 232 | 	{ label: "Influenza", value: "Influenza" },
 233 | 	{ label: "Varicella", value: "Varicella" },
 234 | 	{ label: "HPV", value: "HPV" },
 235 | 	{ label: "Tdap", value: "Tdap" },
 236 | 	{ label: "Meningococcal", value: "Meningococcal" }
 237 | ] as const;
 238 | 
 239 | export const immunizationStatuses = [
 240 | 	{ label: "Completed", value: "COMPLETED" },
 241 | 	{ label: "Pending", value: "PENDING" },
 242 | 	{ label: "Overdue", value: "OVERDUE" },
 243 | 	{ label: "Scheduled", value: "SCHEDULED" }
 244 | ] as const;
 245 | 
 246 | // Type for status values
 247 | export type ImmunizationStatus = (typeof immunizationStatuses)[number]["value"];
 248 | 
 249 | // Default export alias for routes that import `columns`
 250 | export const columns = immunizationColumns;
```
