`components/immunizations/immunization-form.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/immunizations/ImmunizationForm.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   4 | import { Calendar } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/calendar";
   5 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   6 | import { Input } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/input";
   7 | import { Label } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/label";
   8 | import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/popover";
   9 | import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/select";
  10 | import { Textarea } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/textarea";
  11 | import { cn } from "@clinic/ui/lib/utils";
  12 | import { useForm } from "@tanstack/react-form";
  13 | import { useMutation, useQuery, useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
  14 | import { useRouter } from "@tanstack/react-router";
  15 | import { toast } from "sonner";
  16 | import { z } from "zod";
  17 | 
  18 | import { orpc } from "@/utils/orpc";
  19 | 
  20 | const immunizationSchema = z.object({
  21 | 	patientId: z.string().min(1, "Patient is required"),
  22 | 	vaccine: z.string().min(1, "Vaccine name is required"),
  23 | 	date: z.date({ error: "Date is required" }),
  24 | 	dose: z.string().min(1, "Dose number is required"),
  25 | 	lotNumber: z.string().optional(),
  26 | 	administeredByStaffId: z.string().optional(),
  27 | 	notes: z.string().optional(),
  28 | 	batchId: z.string().optional()
  29 | });
  30 | 
  31 | type ImmunizationFormValues = z.infer<typeof immunizationSchema>;
  32 | 
  33 | interface ImmunizationFormProps {
  34 | 	patientId?: string;
  35 | 	initialData?: Partial<ImmunizationFormValues>;
  36 | 	onSuccess?: () => void;
  37 | 	clinicId: string;
  38 | 	onCancel?: () => void;
  39 | }
  40 | 
  41 | export function ImmunizationForm({
  42 | 	initialData,
  43 | 	patientId: initialPatientId,
  44 | 	onSuccess,
  45 | 	onCancel
  46 | }: ImmunizationFormProps) {
  47 | 	const router = useRouter();
  48 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
  49 | 
  50 | 	// Fetch patients for dropdown
  51 | 	const { data: patientsData } = useQuery(
  52 | 		orpc.patient.list.queryOptions({
  53 | 			input: { search: "" }
  54 | 		})
  55 | 	);
  56 | 
  57 | 	// Fetch doctors/staff for dropdown
  58 | 	const { data: doctorsData } = useQuery(
  59 | 		orpc.doctors.list.queryOptions({
  60 | 			input: { search: "" }
  61 | 		})
  62 | 	);
  63 | 
  64 | 	// Fetch vaccine inventory if available
  65 | 	const { data: inventoryData } = useQuery(
  66 | 		orpc.immunizations.list.queryOptions({ input: { search: "" } })
  67 | 	);
  68 | 
  69 | 	const { mutateAsync: recordImmunization, isPending } = useMutation(
  70 | 		orpc.immunizations.record.mutationOptions({
  71 | 			onSuccess: () => {
  72 | 				toast.success("Immunization recorded successfully");
  73 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: orpc.immunizations.key() });
  74 | 				router.invalidate();
  75 | 				onSuccess?.();
  76 | 			},
  77 | 			onError: (error: Error) => {
  78 | 				toast.error(error.message || "Failed to record immunization");
  79 | 			}
  80 | 		})
  81 | 	);
  82 | 
  83 | 	const form = useForm({
  84 | 		defaultValues: {
  85 | 			patientId: initialPatientId || "",
  86 | 			vaccine: initialData?.vaccine || "",
  87 | 			date: initialData?.date || new Date(),
  88 | 			dose: initialData?.dose || "",
  89 | 			lotNumber: initialData?.lotNumber || "",
  90 | 			administeredByStaffId: initialData?.administeredByStaffId || "",
  91 | 			notes: initialData?.notes || "",
  92 | 			batchId: initialData?.batchId || ""
  93 | 		} as ImmunizationFormValues,
  94 | 		onSubmit: async ({ value }) => {
  95 | 			await recordImmunization({
  96 | 				patientId: value.patientId,
  97 | 				vaccineName: value.vaccine,
  98 | 				date: value.date,
  99 | 				dose: value.dose ?? "",
 100 | 				lotNumber: value.lotNumber || '',
 101 | 				administeredByStaffId: value.administeredByStaffId || '',
 102 | 				notes: value.notes || ''
 103 | 			});
 104 | 		},
 105 | 		validators: {
 106 | 			onSubmit: immunizationSchema
 107 | 		}
 108 | 	});
 109 | 
 110 | 	const patients = patientsData?.patients || [];
 111 | 	const staff = doctorsData?.doctors || [];
 112 | 	// Define an interface for inventory items if a global schema doesn't exist
 113 | 	interface InventoryItem {
 114 | 		id: string;
 115 | 		vaccineName: string;
 116 | 		lotNumber: string;
 117 | 		quantity: number;
 118 | 	}
 119 | 	const inventory = (inventoryData as any)?.items || [];
 120 | 
 121 | 	return (
 122 | 		<Card>
 123 | 			<CardHeader>
 124 | 				<CardTitle>Record Immunization</CardTitle>
 125 | 				<CardDescription>Document vaccine administration for pediatric patient</CardDescription>
 126 | 			</CardHeader>
 127 | 			<CardContent>
 128 | 				<form
 129 | 					className='space-y-6'
 130 | 					onSubmit={e => {
 131 | 						e.preventDefault();
 132 | 						e.stopPropagation();
 133 | 						form.handleSubmit();
 134 | 					}}
 135 | 				>
 136 | 					{/* Patient Selection */}
 137 | 					<form.Field name='patientId'>
 138 | 						{field => (
 139 | 							<div className='space-y-2'>
 140 | 								<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Patient *</Label>
 141 | 								<Select
 142 | 									disabled={!!initialPatientId}
 143 | 									onValueChange={value => field.handleChange(value)}
 144 | 									value={field.state.value}
 145 | 								>
 146 | 									<SelectTrigger
 147 | 										className={cn(field.state.meta.errors.length > 0 && "border-destructive")}
 148 | 										id={field.name}
 149 | 									>
 150 | 										<SelectValue placeholder='Select patient' />
 151 | 									</SelectTrigger>
 152 | 									<SelectContent>
 153 | 										{(patients).map(patient => (
 154 | 											<SelectItem
 155 | 												key={patient.id}
 156 | 												value={patient.id}
 157 | 											>
 158 | 												{patient.firstName} {patient.lastName}
 159 | 											</SelectItem>
 160 | 										))}
 161 | 									</SelectContent>
 162 | 								</Select>
 163 | 								{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
 164 | 									<p
 165 | 										className='text-destructive text-sm'
 166 | 										key={error?.message}
 167 | 									>
 168 | 										{error?.message}
 169 | 									</p>
 170 | 								))}
 171 | 							</div>
 172 | 						)}
 173 | 					</form.Field>
 174 | 
 175 | 					{/* Vaccine Selection */}
 176 | 					<div className='grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2'>
 177 | 						<form.Field name='vaccine'>
 178 | 							{field => (
 179 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 180 | 									<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Vaccine *</Label>
 181 | 									<Select
 182 | 										onValueChange={value => field.handleChange(value)}
 183 | 										value={field.state.value}
 184 | 									>
 185 | 										<SelectTrigger
 186 | 											className={cn(field.state.meta.errors.length > 0 && "border-destructive")}
 187 | 											id={field.name}
 188 | 										>
 189 | 											<SelectValue placeholder='Select vaccine' />
 190 | 										</SelectTrigger>
 191 | 										<SelectContent>
 192 | 											{vaccineOptions.map(vaccine => (
 193 | 												<SelectItem
 194 | 													key={vaccine.value}
 195 | 													value={vaccine.value}
 196 | 												>
 197 | 													{vaccine.label}
 198 | 												</SelectItem>
 199 | 											))}
 200 | 										</SelectContent>
 201 | 									</Select>
 202 | 									{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
 203 | 										<p
 204 | 											className='text-destructive text-sm'
 205 | 											key={error?.message}
 206 | 										>
 207 | 											{error?.message}
 208 | 										</p>
 209 | 									))}
 210 | 								</div>
 211 | 							)}
 212 | 						</form.Field>
 213 | 
 214 | 						{/* Dose Number */}
 215 | 						<form.Field name='dose'>
 216 | 							{field => (
 217 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 218 | 									<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Dose Number *</Label>
 219 | 									<Select
 220 | 										onValueChange={value => field.handleChange(value)}
 221 | 										value={field.state.value}
 222 | 									>
 223 | 										<SelectTrigger
 224 | 											className={cn(field.state.meta.errors.length > 0 && "border-destructive")}
 225 | 											id={field.name}
 226 | 										>
 227 | 											<SelectValue placeholder='Select dose' />
 228 | 										</SelectTrigger>
 229 | 										<SelectContent>
 230 | 											<SelectItem value='1'>1st Dose</SelectItem>
 231 | 											<SelectItem value='2'>2nd Dose</SelectItem>
 232 | 											<SelectItem value='3'>3rd Dose</SelectItem>
 233 | 											<SelectItem value='4'>4th Dose</SelectItem>
 234 | 											<SelectItem value='5'>5th Dose</SelectItem>
 235 | 											<SelectItem value='Booster'>Booster</SelectItem>
 236 | 										</SelectContent>
 237 | 									</Select>
 238 | 									{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
 239 | 										<p
 240 | 											className='text-destructive text-sm'
 241 | 											key={error?.message}
 242 | 										>
 243 | 											{error?.message}
 244 | 										</p>
 245 | 									))}
 246 | 								</div>
 247 | 							)}
 248 | 						</form.Field>
 249 | 					</div>
 250 | 
 251 | 					{/* Date and Lot Number */}
 252 | 					<div className='grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2'>
 253 | 						<form.Field name='date'>
 254 | 							{field => (
 255 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 256 | 									<Label>Administration Date *</Label>
 257 | 									<Popover>
 258 | 										<PopoverTrigger asChild>
 259 | 											<Button
 260 | 												className={cn(
 261 | 													"w-full justify-start text-left font-normal",
 262 | 													!field.state.value && "text-muted-foreground",
 263 | 													field.state.meta.errors.length > 0 && "border-destructive"
 264 | 												)}
 265 | 												variant='outline'
 266 | 											>
 267 | 												{field.state.value ? (
 268 | 													field.state.value.toLocaleDateString()
 269 | 												) : (
 270 | 													<span>Pick a date</span>
 271 | 												)}
 272 | 											</Button>
 273 | 										</PopoverTrigger>
 274 | 										<PopoverContent className='w-auto p-0'>
 275 | 											<Calendar
 276 | 												mode='single'
 277 | 												onSelect={date => field.handleChange(date || new Date())}
 278 | 												selected={field.state.value}
 279 | 											/>
 280 | 										</PopoverContent>
 281 | 									</Popover>
 282 | 									{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
 283 | 										<p
 284 | 											className='text-destructive text-sm'
 285 | 											key={error?.message}
 286 | 										>
 287 | 											{error?.message}
 288 | 										</p>
 289 | 									))}
 290 | 								</div>
 291 | 							)}
 292 | 						</form.Field>
 293 | 
 294 | 						<form.Field name='lotNumber'>
 295 | 							{field => (
 296 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 297 | 									<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Lot Number</Label>
 298 | 									<Input
 299 | 										id={field.name}
 300 | 										onBlur={field.handleBlur}
 301 | 										onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 302 | 										placeholder='e.g., VAC-2024-001'
 303 | 										value={field.state.value}
 304 | 									/>
 305 | 									{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
 306 | 										<p
 307 | 											className='text-destructive text-sm'
 308 | 											key={error?.message}
 309 | 										>
 310 | 											{error?.message}
 311 | 										</p>
 312 | 									))}
 313 | 								</div>
 314 | 							)}
 315 | 						</form.Field>
 316 | 					</div>
 317 | 
 318 | 					{/* Batch ID (Inventory) */}
 319 | 					<form.Field name='batchId'>
 320 | 						{field => (
 321 | 							<div className='space-y-2'>
 322 | 								<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Inventory Batch (Optional)</Label>
 323 | 								<Select
 324 | 									onValueChange={value => field.handleChange(value)}
 325 | 									value={field.state.value}
 326 | 								>
 327 | 									<SelectTrigger id={field.name}>
 328 | 										<SelectValue placeholder='Select from inventory' />
 329 | 									</SelectTrigger>
 330 | 									<SelectContent>
 331 | 										{inventory.map((item: InventoryItem) => (
 332 | 											<SelectItem
 333 | 												key={item.id}
 334 | 												value={item.id}
 335 | 											>
 336 | 												{item.vaccineName} - Lot: {item.lotNumber} (Qty: {item.quantity})
 337 | 											</SelectItem>
 338 | 										))}
 339 | 									</SelectContent>
 340 | 								</Select>
 341 | 							</div>
 342 | 						)}
 343 | 					</form.Field>
 344 | 
 345 | 					{/* Administered By */}
 346 | 					<form.Field name='administeredByStaffId'>
 347 | 						{field => (
 348 | 							<div className='space-y-2'>
 349 | 								<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Administered By</Label>
 350 | 								<Select
 351 | 									onValueChange={value => field.handleChange(value)}
 352 | 									value={field.state.value}
 353 | 								>
 354 | 									<SelectTrigger id={field.name}>
 355 | 										<SelectValue placeholder='Select staff member' />
 356 | 									</SelectTrigger>
 357 | 									<SelectContent>
 358 | 										{(staff).map(staffMember => (
 359 | 											<SelectItem
 360 | 												key={staffMember.id}
 361 | 												value={staffMember.id}
 362 | 											>
 363 | 												{staffMember.name || `${staffMember.name ?? ""}`.trim()}
 364 | 											</SelectItem>
 365 | 										))}
 366 | 									</SelectContent>
 367 | 								</Select>
 368 | 							</div>
 369 | 						)}
 370 | 					</form.Field>
 371 | 
 372 | 					{/* Notes */}
 373 | 					<form.Field name='notes'>
 374 | 						{field => (
 375 | 							<div className='space-y-2'>
 376 | 								<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Notes</Label>
 377 | 								<Textarea
 378 | 									id={field.name}
 379 | 									onBlur={field.handleBlur}
 380 | 									onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 381 | 									placeholder='Any additional notes about the immunization...'
 382 | 									rows={3}
 383 | 									value={field.state.value}
 384 | 								/>
 385 | 								{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
 386 | 									<p
 387 | 										className='text-destructive text-sm'
 388 | 										key={error?.message}
 389 | 									>
 390 | 										{error?.message}
 391 | 									</p>
 392 | 								))}
 393 | 							</div>
 394 | 						)}
 395 | 					</form.Field>
 396 | 
 397 | 					{/* Form Actions */}
 398 | 					<div className='flex justify-end gap-3'>
 399 | 						{onCancel && (
 400 | 							<Button
 401 | 								onClick={onCancel}
 402 | 								type='button'
 403 | 								variant='outline'
 404 | 							>
 405 | 								Cancel
 406 | 							</Button>
 407 | 						)}
 408 | 						<form.Subscribe>
 409 | 							{state => (
 410 | 								<Button
 411 | 									disabled={!state.canSubmit || state.isSubmitting || isPending}
 412 | 									type='submit'
 413 | 								>
 414 | 									{state.isSubmitting || isPending ? "Recording..." : "Record Immunization"}
 415 | 								</Button>
 416 | 							)}
 417 | 						</form.Subscribe>
 418 | 					</div>
 419 | 				</form>
 420 | 			</CardContent>
 421 | 		</Card>
 422 | 	);
 423 | }
 424 | 
 425 | // Vaccine options for the form
 426 | const vaccineOptions = [
 427 | 	{ value: "BCG", label: "BCG" },
 428 | 	{ value: "Hepatitis B", label: "Hepatitis B" },
 429 | 	{ value: "DPT", label: "DPT" },
 430 | 	{ value: "Polio", label: "Polio (OPV/IPV)" },
 431 | 	{ value: "MMR", label: "MMR" },
 432 | 	{ value: "Hib", label: "Hib" },
 433 | 	{ value: "PCV", label: "Pneumococcal (PCV)" },
 434 | 	{ value: "Rotavirus", label: "Rotavirus" },
 435 | 	{ value: "Influenza", label: "Influenza" },
 436 | 	{ value: "Varicella", label: "Varicella (Chickenpox)" },
 437 | 	{ value: "HPV", label: "HPV" },
 438 | 	{ value: "Tdap", label: "Tdap" },
 439 | 	{ value: "Meningococcal", label: "Meningococcal" },
 440 | 	{ value: "COVID-19", label: "COVID-19" }
 441 | ];

```

`components/labs/columns.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/labs/columns.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { DataTableColumnHeader } from "@clinic/ui/components/data-table/DataTableColumnHeader";
   4 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
   5 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   6 | import {
   7 | 	DropdownMenu,
   8 | 	DropdownMenuContent,
   9 | 	DropdownMenuItem,
  10 | 	DropdownMenuLabel,
  11 | 	DropdownMenuSeparator,
  12 | 	DropdownMenuTrigger
  13 | } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/dropdown-menu";
  14 | import { cn } from "@clinic/ui/lib/utils";
  15 | import type { ColumnDef } from "@tanstack/react-table";
  16 | import { format } from "date-fns";
  17 | import { Download, Eye, FileText, MoreHorizontal } from "lucide-react";
  18 | export type LabTest = {
  19 | 	id: string;
  20 | 	patientId: string;
  21 | 	patientName: string;
  22 | 	testName: string;
  23 | 	category: string;
  24 | 	orderedBy: string;
  25 | 	orderedDate: Date;
  26 | 	status: "pending" | "in-progress" | "completed" | "cancelled";
  27 | 	result?: {
  28 | 		value: string;
  29 | 		unit: string;
  30 | 		referenceRange: string;
  31 | 		abnormal: boolean;
  32 | 		critical: boolean;
  33 | 	};
  34 | 	resultDate?: Date;
  35 | 	uploadedBy?: string;
  36 | 	notes?: string;
  37 | };
  38 | 
  39 | export const columns: ColumnDef<LabTest>[] = [
  40 | 	{
  41 | 		accessorKey: "testName",
  42 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
  43 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
  44 | 				column={column}
  45 | 				title='Test Name'
  46 | 			/>
  47 | 		),
  48 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
  49 | 			const test = row.original;
  50 | 			return (
  51 | 				<div className='flex flex-col'>
  52 | 					<span className='font-medium'>{test.testName}</span>
  53 | 					<span className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>{test.category}</span>
  54 | 				</div>
  55 | 			);
  56 | 		}
  57 | 	},
  58 | 	{
  59 | 		accessorKey: "patientName",
  60 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
  61 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
  62 | 				column={column}
  63 | 				title='Patient'
  64 | 			/>
  65 | 		),
  66 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
  67 | 			return <div className='font-medium'>{row.original.patientName}</div>;
  68 | 		}
  69 | 	},
  70 | 	{
  71 | 		accessorKey: "orderedBy",
  72 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
  73 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
  74 | 				column={column}
  75 | 				title='Ordered By'
  76 | 			/>
  77 | 		),
  78 | 		cell: ({ row }) => row.original.orderedBy
  79 | 	},
  80 | 	{
  81 | 		accessorKey: "orderedDate",
  82 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
  83 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
  84 | 				column={column}
  85 | 				title='Ordered Date'
  86 | 			/>
  87 | 		),
  88 | 		cell: ({ row }) => format(new Date(row.original.orderedDate), "MMM dd, yyyy")
  89 | 	},
  90 | 	{
  91 | 		accessorKey: "status",
  92 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
  93 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
  94 | 				column={column}
  95 | 				title='Status'
  96 | 			/>
  97 | 		),
  98 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
  99 | 			const status = row.original.status;
 100 | 			const variants = {
 101 | 				pending: { variant: "outline" as const, label: "Pending" },
 102 | 				"in-progress": { variant: "secondary" as const, label: "In Progress" },
 103 | 				completed: { variant: "default" as const, label: "Completed" },
 104 | 				cancelled: { variant: "secondary" as const, label: "Cancelled" }
 105 | 			};
 106 | 			const { variant, label } = variants[status];
 107 | 			return <Badge variant={variant}>{label}</Badge>;
 108 | 		}
 109 | 	},
 110 | 	{
 111 | 		accessorKey: "result",
 112 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
 113 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
 114 | 				column={column}
 115 | 				title='Result'
 116 | 			/>
 117 | 		),
 118 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 119 | 			const result = row.original.result;
 120 | 			if (!result) return <span className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>—</span>;
 121 | 
 122 | 			return (
 123 | 				<div className='flex flex-col'>
 124 | 					<span
 125 | 						className={cn(
 126 | 							"font-medium",
 127 | 							result.critical && "font-bold text-red-600",
 128 | 							result.abnormal && !result.critical && "text-yellow-600"
 129 | 						)}
 130 | 					>
 131 | 						{result.value} {result.unit}
 132 | 					</span>
 133 | 					<span className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>Ref: {result.referenceRange}</span>
 134 | 				</div>
 135 | 			);
 136 | 		}
 137 | 	},
 138 | 	{
 139 | 		id: "actions",
 140 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 141 | 			const test = row.original;
 142 | 
 143 | 			return (
 144 | 				<DropdownMenu>
 145 | 					<DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
 146 | 						<Button
 147 | 							className='h-8 w-8 p-0'
 148 | 							variant='ghost'
 149 | 						>
 150 | 							<span className='sr-only'>Open menu</span>
 151 | 							<MoreHorizontal className='h-4 w-4' />
 152 | 						</Button>
 153 | 					</DropdownMenuTrigger>
 154 | 					<DropdownMenuContent align='end'>
 155 | 						<DropdownMenuLabel>Actions</DropdownMenuLabel>
 156 | 						<DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => navigator.clipboard.writeText(test.id)}>
 157 | 							Copy ID
 158 | 						</DropdownMenuItem>
 159 | 						<DropdownMenuSeparator />
 160 | 						<DropdownMenuItem>
 161 | 							<Eye className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 162 | 							View Details
 163 | 						</DropdownMenuItem>
 164 | 						{test.status !== "completed" && (
 165 | 							<DropdownMenuItem>
 166 | 								<FileText className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 167 | 								Enter Results
 168 | 							</DropdownMenuItem>
 169 | 						)}
 170 | 						{test.result && (
 171 | 							<DropdownMenuItem>
 172 | 								<Download className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 173 | 								Download Report
 174 | 							</DropdownMenuItem>
 175 | 						)}
 176 | 					</DropdownMenuContent>
 177 | 				</DropdownMenu>
 178 | 			);
 179 | 		}
 180 | 	}
 181 | ];

```

`components/labs/lab-order-form.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/labs/lab-order-form.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   4 | import { Calendar } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/calendar";
   5 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   6 | import { Input } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/input";
   7 | import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/popover";
   8 | import { Textarea } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/textarea";
   9 | import { cn } from "@clinic/ui/lib/utils";
  10 | import { useForm } from "@tanstack/react-form";
  11 | import { format } from "date-fns";
  12 | import { CalendarIcon } from "lucide-react";
  13 | import { z } from "zod";
  14 | 
  15 | const labOrderSchema = z.object({
  16 | 	patientId: z.string().min(1, "Patient is required"),
  17 | 	testName: z.string().min(1, "Test name is required"),
  18 | 	category: z.string().min(1, "Category is required"),
  19 | 	priority: z.enum(["routine", "urgent", "stat"]),
  20 | 	orderedDate: z.date(),
  21 | 	notes: z.string().optional()
  22 | });
  23 | 
  24 | type LabOrderFormValues = z.infer<typeof labOrderSchema>;
  25 | 
  26 | interface LabOrderFormProps {
  27 | 	onSubmit: (data: LabOrderFormValues) => void;
  28 | 	isLoading?: boolean;
  29 | }
  30 | 
  31 | const testCategories = [
  32 | 	{ value: "hematology", label: "Hematology" },
  33 | 	{ value: "chemistry", label: "Chemistry" },
  34 | 	{ value: "microbiology", label: "Microbiology" },
  35 | 	{ value: "immunology", label: "Immunology" },
  36 | 	{ value: "urinalysis", label: "Urinalysis" },
  37 | 	{ value: "pathology", label: "Pathology" },
  38 | 	{ value: "genetics", label: "Genetics" }
  39 | ];
  40 | 
  41 | const commonTests = {
  42 | 	hematology: ["CBC", "Hemoglobin", "WBC Count", "Platelet Count", "Blood Smear"],
  43 | 	chemistry: [
  44 | 		"Basic Metabolic Panel",
  45 | 		"Comprehensive Metabolic Panel",
  46 | 		"Liver Function Tests",
  47 | 		"Renal Function Panel",
  48 | 		"Lipid Panel",
  49 | 		"Thyroid Function Tests"
  50 | 	],
  51 | 	microbiology: ["Blood Culture", "Urine Culture", "Throat Swab", "Stool Culture", "CSF Analysis"],
  52 | 	immunology: ["IgG/IgM/IgA Levels", "Allergy Panel", "Autoimmune Panel", "C3/C4 Complement"],
  53 | 	urinalysis: ["Urinalysis Complete", "Microscopic Analysis", "Urine Culture"],
  54 | 	pathology: ["Biopsy", "Cytology", "Histopathology"],
  55 | 	genetics: ["Karyotype", "Genetic Screening", "Newborn Screening"]
  56 | };
  57 | 
  58 | export function LabOrderForm({ onSubmit, isLoading }: LabOrderFormProps) {
  59 | 	const form = useForm({
  60 | 		defaultValues: {
  61 | 			patientId: "",
  62 | 			testName: "",
  63 | 			category: "",
  64 | 			priority: "routine" as LabOrderFormValues["priority"],
  65 | 			orderedDate: new Date(),
  66 | 			notes: ""
  67 | 		},
  68 | 
  69 | 		validators: {},
  70 | 		onSubmit: ({ value }) => {
  71 | 			onSubmit(value);
  72 | 		}
  73 | 	});
  74 | 
  75 | 	return (
  76 | 		<Card>
  77 | 			<CardHeader>
  78 | 				<CardTitle>Order Laboratory Test</CardTitle>
  79 | 				<CardDescription>Enter test details and patient information to place a lab order</CardDescription>
  80 | 			</CardHeader>
  81 | 			<form
  82 | 				onSubmit={e => {
  83 | 					e.preventDefault();
  84 | 					e.stopPropagation();
  85 | 					form.handleSubmit();
  86 | 				}}
  87 | 			>
  88 | 				<CardContent className='space-y-4'>
  89 | 					<form.Field name='patientId'>
  90 | 						{field => (
  91 | 							<div className='space-y-2'>
  92 | 								<label
  93 | 									className='font-medium text-sm'
  94 | 									htmlFor={field.name}
  95 | 								>
  96 | 									Patient *
  97 | 								</label>
  98 | 								<Input
  99 | 									id={field.name}
 100 | 									onBlur={field.handleBlur}
 101 | 									onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 102 | 									placeholder='Search patient by name or ID'
 103 | 									value={field.state.value}
 104 | 								/>
 105 | 								{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
 106 | 									<p
 107 | 										className='text-destructive text-sm'
 108 | 										key={error}
 109 | 									>
 110 | 										{error}
 111 | 									</p>
 112 | 								))}
 113 | 							</div>
 114 | 						)}
 115 | 					</form.Field>
 116 | 
 117 | 					<div className='grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2'>
 118 | 						<form.Field name='category'>
 119 | 							{field => (
 120 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 121 | 									<label
 122 | 										className='font-medium text-sm'
 123 | 										htmlFor={field.name}
 124 | 									>
 125 | 										Test Category *
 126 | 									</label>
 127 | 									<select
 128 | 										className='w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2'
 129 | 										id={field.name}
 130 | 										onBlur={field.handleBlur}
 131 | 										onChange={e => {
 132 | 											field.handleChange(e.target.value);
 133 | 											form.getFieldValue("testName") && form.setFieldValue("testName", "");
 134 | 										}}
 135 | 										value={field.state.value}
 136 | 									>
 137 | 										<option value=''>Select category</option>
 138 | 										{testCategories.map(cat => (
 139 | 											<option
 140 | 												key={cat.value}
 141 | 												value={cat.value}
 142 | 											>
 143 | 												{cat.label}
 144 | 											</option>
 145 | 										))}
 146 | 									</select>
 147 | 									{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
 148 | 										<p
 149 | 											className='text-destructive text-sm'
 150 | 											key={error}
 151 | 										>
 152 | 											{error}
 153 | 										</p>
 154 | 									))}
 155 | 								</div>
 156 | 							)}
 157 | 						</form.Field>
 158 | 
 159 | 						<form.Field name='testName'>
 160 | 							{field => (
 161 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 162 | 									<label
 163 | 										className='font-medium text-sm'
 164 | 										htmlFor={field.name}
 165 | 									>
 166 | 										Test Name *
 167 | 									</label>
 168 | 									<select
 169 | 										className='w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2'
 170 | 										disabled={!form.getFieldValue("category")}
 171 | 										id={field.name}
 172 | 										onBlur={field.handleBlur}
 173 | 										onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 174 | 										value={field.state.value}
 175 | 									>
 176 | 										<option value=''>Select test</option>
 177 | 										{form.getFieldValue("category") &&
 178 | 											commonTests[
 179 | 												form.getFieldValue("category") as keyof typeof commonTests
 180 | 											]?.map(test => (
 181 | 												<option
 182 | 													key={test}
 183 | 													value={test}
 184 | 												>
 185 | 													{test}
 186 | 												</option>
 187 | 											))}
 188 | 									</select>
 189 | 									{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
 190 | 										<p
 191 | 											className='text-destructive text-sm'
 192 | 											key={error}
 193 | 										>
 194 | 											{error}
 195 | 										</p>
 196 | 									))}
 197 | 								</div>
 198 | 							)}
 199 | 						</form.Field>
 200 | 					</div>
 201 | 
 202 | 					<form.Field name='priority'>
 203 | 						{field => (
 204 | 							<div className='space-y-2'>
 205 | 								<label
 206 | 									className='font-medium text-sm'
 207 | 									htmlFor={field.name}
 208 | 								>
 209 | 									Priority *
 210 | 								</label>
 211 | 								<select
 212 | 									className='w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2'
 213 | 									id={field.name}
 214 | 									onBlur={field.handleBlur}
 215 | 									onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value as LabOrderFormValues["priority"])}
 216 | 									value={field.state.value}
 217 | 								>
 218 | 									<option value='routine'>Routine (24-48 hours)</option>
 219 | 									<option value='urgent'>Urgent (4-8 hours)</option>
 220 | 									<option value='stat'>STAT (1-2 hours)</option>
 221 | 								</select>
 222 | 								{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
 223 | 									<p
 224 | 										className='text-destructive text-sm'
 225 | 										key={error}
 226 | 									>
 227 | 										{error}
 228 | 									</p>
 229 | 								))}
 230 | 							</div>
 231 | 						)}
 232 | 					</form.Field>
 233 | 
 234 | 					<form.Field name='orderedDate'>
 235 | 						{field => (
 236 | 							<div className='space-y-2'>
 237 | 								<label
 238 | 									className='font-medium text-sm'
 239 | 									htmlFor={field.name}
 240 | 								>
 241 | 									Order Date *
 242 | 								</label>
 243 | 								<Popover>
 244 | 									<PopoverTrigger asChild>
 245 | 										<Button
 246 | 											className={cn(
 247 | 												"w-full justify-start text-left font-normal",
 248 | 												!field.state.value && "text-muted-foreground"
 249 | 											)}
 250 | 											variant='outline'
 251 | 										>
 252 | 											<CalendarIcon className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 253 | 											{field.state.value ? (
 254 | 												format(field.state.value, "PPP")
 255 | 											) : (
 256 | 												<span>Pick a date</span>
 257 | 											)}
 258 | 										</Button>
 259 | 									</PopoverTrigger>
 260 | 									<PopoverContent className='w-auto p-0'>
 261 | 										<Calendar
 262 | 											mode='single'
 263 | 											onSelect={date => field.handleChange(date || new Date())}
 264 | 											selected={field.state.value}
 265 | 										/>
 266 | 									</PopoverContent>
 267 | 								</Popover>
 268 | 								{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
 269 | 									<p
 270 | 										className='text-destructive text-sm'
 271 | 										key={error}
 272 | 									>
 273 | 										{error}
 274 | 									</p>
 275 | 								))}
 276 | 							</div>
 277 | 						)}
 278 | 					</form.Field>
 279 | 
 280 | 					<form.Field name='notes'>
 281 | 						{field => (
 282 | 							<div className='space-y-2'>
 283 | 								<label
 284 | 									className='font-medium text-sm'
 285 | 									htmlFor={field.name}
 286 | 								>
 287 | 									Clinical Notes
 288 | 								</label>
 289 | 								<Textarea
 290 | 									id={field.name}
 291 | 									onBlur={field.handleBlur}
 292 | 									onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 293 | 									placeholder='Add relevant clinical information for the lab...'
 294 | 									rows={3}
 295 | 									value={field.state.value}
 296 | 								/>
 297 | 								{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
 298 | 									<p
 299 | 										className='text-destructive text-sm'
 300 | 										key={error}
 301 | 									>
 302 | 										{error}
 303 | 									</p>
 304 | 								))}
 305 | 							</div>
 306 | 						)}
 307 | 					</form.Field>
 308 | 				</CardContent>
 309 | 
 310 | 				<CardFooter className='flex justify-end gap-2'>
 311 | 					<form.Subscribe>
 312 | 						{state => (
 313 | 							<>
 314 | 								<Button
 315 | 									onClick={() => window.history.back()}
 316 | 									type='button'
 317 | 									variant='outline'
 318 | 								>
 319 | 									Cancel
 320 | 								</Button>
 321 | 								<Button
 322 | 									disabled={!state.canSubmit || state.isSubmitting || isLoading}
 323 | 									type='submit'
 324 | 								>
 325 | 									{state.isSubmitting || isLoading ? "Ordering..." : "Order Test"}
 326 | 								</Button>
 327 | 							</>
 328 | 						)}
 329 | 					</form.Subscribe>
 330 | 				</CardFooter>
 331 | 			</form>
 332 | 		</Card>
 333 | 	);
 334 | }

```

`components/labs/lab-result-upload.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/labs/lab-result-upload.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   4 | import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   5 | import { Input } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/input";
   6 | import { Label } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/label";
   7 | import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/select";
   8 | import { Textarea } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/textarea";
   9 | import { z } from "zod";
  10 | 
  11 | import { FileUploader } from "@clinic/ui/components/file-uploader";
  12 | import { useAppForm } from "@/components/forms/tanstack-form";
  13 | 
  14 | const labResultSchema = z.object({
  15 | 	labTestId: z.string().min(1, "Lab test is required"),
  16 | 	resultValue: z.string().min(1, "Result value is required"),
  17 | 	unit: z.string().min(1, "Unit is required"),
  18 | 	referenceRange: z.string().min(1, "Reference range is required"),
  19 | 	interpretation: z.enum(["normal", "abnormal", "critical"]),
  20 | 	notes: z.string().optional(),
  21 | 	attachments: z.array(z.instanceof(File)).optional().default([])
  22 | });
  23 | 
  24 | type LabResultFormValues = z.infer<typeof labResultSchema>;
  25 | 
  26 | interface LabResultUploadProps {
  27 | 	onSubmit: (data: LabResultFormValues) => void;
  28 | 	isLoading?: boolean;
  29 | 	labTests?: Array<{ id: string; testName: string; patientName: string }>;
  30 | }
  31 | 
  32 | export function LabResultUpload({ onSubmit, isLoading, labTests = [] }: LabResultUploadProps) {
  33 | 	const form = useAppForm({
  34 | 		defaultValues: {
  35 | 			labTestId: "",
  36 | 			resultValue: "",
  37 | 			unit: "",
  38 | 			referenceRange: "",
  39 | 			interpretation: "normal" as "normal" | "abnormal" | "critical",
  40 | 			notes: "",
  41 | 			attachments: []
  42 | 		} as LabResultFormValues,
  43 | 		validators: {},
  44 | 		onSubmit: ({ value }) => {
  45 | 			onSubmit(value);
  46 | 		}
  47 | 	});
  48 | 
  49 | 	return (
  50 | 		<Card className='mx-auto w-full max-w-3xl'>
  51 | 			<CardHeader>
  52 | 				<CardTitle>Upload Lab Results</CardTitle>
  53 | 				<CardDescription>Enter test results and upload supporting documents</CardDescription>
  54 | 			</CardHeader>
  55 | 			<form.AppForm>
  56 | 				<form.Form>
  57 | 					<CardContent className='space-y-4'>
  58 | 						<form.AppField name='labTestId'>
  59 | 							{field => (
  60 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
  61 | 									<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Lab Test *</Label>
  62 | 									<Select
  63 | 										onValueChange={value => field.handleChange(value)}
  64 | 										value={field.state.value}
  65 | 									>
  66 | 										<SelectTrigger>
  67 | 											<SelectValue placeholder='Select lab test' />
  68 | 										</SelectTrigger>
  69 | 										<SelectContent>
  70 | 											{labTests.map(test => (
  71 | 												<SelectItem
  72 | 													key={test.id}
  73 | 													value={test.id}
  74 | 												>
  75 | 													{test.testName} - {test.patientName}
  76 | 												</SelectItem>
  77 | 											))}
  78 | 										</SelectContent>
  79 | 									</Select>
  80 | 									{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
  81 | 										<p
  82 | 											className='text-destructive text-sm'
  83 | 											key={String(error)}
  84 | 										>
  85 | 											{String(error)}
  86 | 										</p>
  87 | 									))}
  88 | 								</div>
  89 | 							)}
  90 | 						</form.AppField>
  91 | 
  92 | 						<div className='grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2'>
  93 | 							<form.AppField name='resultValue'>
  94 | 								{field => (
  95 | 									<div className='space-y-2'>
  96 | 										<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Result Value *</Label>
  97 | 										<Input
  98 | 											id={field.name}
  99 | 											onBlur={field.handleBlur}
 100 | 											onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 101 | 											placeholder='e.g., 12.5'
 102 | 											value={field.state.value}
 103 | 										/>
 104 | 										{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
 105 | 											<p
 106 | 												className='text-destructive text-sm'
 107 | 												key={String(error)}
 108 | 											>
 109 | 												{String(error)}
 110 | 											</p>
 111 | 										))}
 112 | 									</div>
 113 | 								)}
 114 | 							</form.AppField>
 115 | 
 116 | 							<form.AppField name='unit'>
 117 | 								{field => (
 118 | 									<div className='space-y-2'>
 119 | 										<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Unit *</Label>
 120 | 										<Input
 121 | 											id={field.name}
 122 | 											onBlur={field.handleBlur}
 123 | 											onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 124 | 											placeholder='e.g., g/dL, mg/L, IU/mL'
 125 | 											value={field.state.value}
 126 | 										/>
 127 | 										{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
 128 | 											<p
 129 | 												className='text-destructive text-sm'
 130 | 												key={String(error)}
 131 | 											>
 132 | 												{String(error)}
 133 | 											</p>
 134 | 										))}
 135 | 									</div>
 136 | 								)}
 137 | 							</form.AppField>
 138 | 						</div>
 139 | 
 140 | 						<form.AppField name='referenceRange'>
 141 | 							{field => (
 142 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 143 | 									<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Reference Range *</Label>
 144 | 									<Input
 145 | 										id={field.name}
 146 | 										onBlur={field.handleBlur}
 147 | 										onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 148 | 										placeholder='e.g., 10.0-15.0'
 149 | 										value={field.state.value}
 150 | 									/>
 151 | 									{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
 152 | 										<p
 153 | 											className='text-destructive text-sm'
 154 | 											key={String(error)}
 155 | 										>
 156 | 											{String(error)}
 157 | 										</p>
 158 | 									))}
 159 | 								</div>
 160 | 							)}
 161 | 						</form.AppField>
 162 | 
 163 | 						<form.AppField name='interpretation'>
 164 | 							{field => (
 165 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 166 | 									<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Interpretation *</Label>
 167 | 									<Select
 168 | 										onValueChange={value =>
 169 | 											field.handleChange(value as LabResultFormValues["interpretation"])
 170 | 										}
 171 | 										value={field.state.value}
 172 | 									>
 173 | 										<SelectTrigger>
 174 | 											<SelectValue placeholder='Select interpretation' />
 175 | 										</SelectTrigger>
 176 | 										<SelectContent>
 177 | 											<SelectItem value='normal'>Normal</SelectItem>
 178 | 											<SelectItem value='abnormal'>Abnormal</SelectItem>
 179 | 											<SelectItem value='critical'>Critical</SelectItem>
 180 | 										</SelectContent>
 181 | 									</Select>
 182 | 									{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
 183 | 										<p
 184 | 											className='text-destructive text-sm'
 185 | 											key={String(error)}
 186 | 										>
 187 | 											{String(error)}
 188 | 										</p>
 189 | 									))}
 190 | 								</div>
 191 | 							)}
 192 | 						</form.AppField>
 193 | 
 194 | 						<form.AppField name='notes'>
 195 | 							{field => (
 196 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 197 | 									<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Clinical Notes</Label>
 198 | 									<Textarea
 199 | 										id={field.name}
 200 | 										onBlur={field.handleBlur}
 201 | 										onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 202 | 										placeholder='Add any additional notes or comments...'
 203 | 										rows={3}
 204 | 										value={field.state.value}
 205 | 									/>
 206 | 									{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
 207 | 										<p
 208 | 											className='text-destructive text-sm'
 209 | 											key={String(error)}
 210 | 										>
 211 | 											{String(error)}
 212 | 										</p>
 213 | 									))}
 214 | 								</div>
 215 | 							)}
 216 | 						</form.AppField>
 217 | 
 218 | 						<form.AppField name='attachments'>
 219 | 							{field => (
 220 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 221 | 									<Label>Supporting Documents</Label>
 222 | 									<FileUploader
 223 | 										accept={{
 224 | 											"application/pdf": [".pdf"],
 225 | 											"image/jpeg": [".jpg", ".jpeg"],
 226 | 											"image/png": [".png"]
 227 | 										}}
 228 | 										maxFiles={5}
 229 | 										maxSize={5 * 1024 * 1024}
 230 | 										onValueChange={field.handleChange} // 5MB
 231 | 										value={field.state.value}
 232 | 									/>
 233 | 									{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
 234 | 										<p
 235 | 											className='text-destructive text-sm'
 236 | 											key={String(error)}
 237 | 										>
 238 | 											{String(error)}
 239 | 										</p>
 240 | 									))}
 241 | 								</div>
 242 | 							)}
 243 | 						</form.AppField>
 244 | 					</CardContent>
 245 | 
 246 | 					<CardFooter className='flex justify-end gap-2'>
 247 | 						<form.Subscribe>
 248 | 							{state => (
 249 | 								<>
 250 | 									<Button
 251 | 										onClick={() => window.history.back()}
 252 | 										type='button'
 253 | 										variant='outline'
 254 | 									>
 255 | 										Cancel
 256 | 									</Button>
 257 | 									<Button
 258 | 										disabled={!state.canSubmit || state.isSubmitting || isLoading}
 259 | 										type='submit'
 260 | 									>
 261 | 										{state.isSubmitting || isLoading ? "Uploading..." : "Upload Results"}
 262 | 									</Button>
 263 | 								</>
 264 | 							)}
 265 | 						</form.Subscribe>
 266 | 					</CardFooter>
 267 | 				</form.Form>
 268 | 			</form.AppForm>
 269 | 		</Card>
 270 | 	);
 271 | }
```
