`components/nutrition/breastfeeding-tracker.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/nutrition/breastfeeding-tracker.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
   4 | import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   5 | import { Progress } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/progress";
   6 | import { format } from "date-fns";
   7 | import { AlertCircle, Baby, Calendar, CheckCircle, Clock, Milk, TrendingUp } from "lucide-react";
   8 | import { Area, AreaChart, CartesianGrid, ResponsiveContainer, Tooltip, XAxis, YAxis } from "recharts";
   9 | 
  10 | interface BreastfeedingRecord {
  11 | 	id: string;
  12 | 	patientId: string;
  13 | 	feedingDate: Date;
  14 | 	leftDuration?: number;
  15 | 	rightDuration?: number;
  16 | 	totalDuration: number;
  17 | 	notes?: string;
  18 | }
  19 | 
  20 | interface BreastfeedingStats {
  21 | 	todayTotal: number;
  22 | 	weeklyAverage: number;
  23 | 	totalSessions: number;
  24 | 	averageDuration: number;
  25 | }
  26 | 
  27 | interface BreastfeedingTrackerProps {
  28 | 	patientId: string;
  29 | 	data?: {
  30 | 		records: BreastfeedingRecord[];
  31 | 		stats: BreastfeedingStats;
  32 | 		weeklyData: Array<{ date: string; duration: number }>;
  33 | 	};
  34 | 	loading?: boolean;
  35 | }
  36 | 
  37 | export function BreastfeedingTracker({ data, loading }: BreastfeedingTrackerProps) {
  38 | 	if (loading) {
  39 | 		return (
  40 | 			<Card>
  41 | 				<CardHeader>
  42 | 					<CardTitle>Breastfeeding Tracker</CardTitle>
  43 | 				</CardHeader>
  44 | 				<CardContent>
  45 | 					<div className='py-8 text-center text-muted-foreground'>Loading breastfeeding data...</div>
  46 | 				</CardContent>
  47 | 			</Card>
  48 | 		);
  49 | 	}
  50 | 
  51 | 	const records = data?.records || [];
  52 | 	const stats = data?.stats || {
  53 | 		todayTotal: 0,
  54 | 		weeklyAverage: 0,
  55 | 		totalSessions: 0,
  56 | 		averageDuration: 0
  57 | 	};
  58 | 	const weeklyData = data?.weeklyData || [];
  59 | 
  60 | 	// Calculate goal progress (assuming 8 sessions per day as target for infants)
  61 | 	const dailyGoal = 8;
  62 | 	const todayProgress = Math.min((stats.todayTotal / dailyGoal) * 100, 100);
  63 | 
  64 | 	const getFeedingTimeOfDay = (date: Date) => {
  65 | 		const hour = new Date(date).getHours();
  66 | 		if (hour < 12) return "Morning";
  67 | 		if (hour < 17) return "Afternoon";
  68 | 		return "Evening";
  69 | 	};
  70 | 
  71 | 	return (
  72 | 		<div className='space-y-6'>
  73 | 			{/* Stats Cards */}
  74 | 			<div className='grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-4'>
  75 | 				<Card>
  76 | 					<CardContent className='pt-6'>
  77 | 						<div className='text-center'>
  78 | 							<Milk className='mx-auto mb-2 h-6 w-6 text-pink-500' />
  79 | 							<div className='font-bold text-2xl'>{stats.todayTotal}</div>
  80 | 							<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Feedings Today</p>
  81 | 							<Progress
  82 | 								className='mt-2 h-1'
  83 | 								value={todayProgress}
  84 | 							/>
  85 | 							<p className='mt-1 text-muted-foreground text-xs'>Goal: {dailyGoal} feedings/day</p>
  86 | 						</div>
  87 | 					</CardContent>
  88 | 				</Card>
  89 | 
  90 | 				<Card>
  91 | 					<CardContent className='pt-6'>
  92 | 						<div className='text-center'>
  93 | 							<Clock className='mx-auto mb-2 h-6 w-6 text-blue-500' />
  94 | 							<div className='font-bold text-2xl'>{stats.averageDuration || 0} min</div>
  95 | 							<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Avg. Duration</p>
  96 | 						</div>
  97 | 					</CardContent>
  98 | 				</Card>
  99 | 
 100 | 				<Card>
 101 | 					<CardContent className='pt-6'>
 102 | 						<div className='text-center'>
 103 | 							<TrendingUp className='mx-auto mb-2 h-6 w-6 text-green-500' />
 104 | 							<div className='font-bold text-2xl'>{stats.weeklyAverage || 0}</div>
 105 | 							<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Daily Avg (7 days)</p>
 106 | 						</div>
 107 | 					</CardContent>
 108 | 				</Card>
 109 | 
 110 | 				<Card>
 111 | 					<CardContent className='pt-6'>
 112 | 						<div className='text-center'>
 113 | 							<Baby className='mx-auto mb-2 h-6 w-6 text-purple-500' />
 114 | 							<div className='font-bold text-2xl'>{stats.totalSessions || 0}</div>
 115 | 							<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Total Sessions</p>
 116 | 						</div>
 117 | 					</CardContent>
 118 | 				</Card>
 119 | 			</div>
 120 | 
 121 | 			{/* Weekly Trend Chart */}
 122 | 			{weeklyData.length > 0 && (
 123 | 				<Card>
 124 | 					<CardHeader>
 125 | 						<CardTitle className='text-base'>Weekly Feeding Trend</CardTitle>
 126 | 					</CardHeader>
 127 | 					<CardContent>
 128 | 						<ResponsiveContainer
 129 | 							height={250}
 130 | 							width='100%'
 131 | 						>
 132 | 							<AreaChart data={weeklyData}>
 133 | 								<CartesianGrid strokeDasharray='3 3' />
 134 | 								<XAxis
 135 | 									dataKey='date'
 136 | 									tickFormatter={date => format(new Date(date), "EEE")}
 137 | 								/>
 138 | 								<YAxis />
 139 | 								<Tooltip
 140 | 									formatter={value => [`${value} min`, "Total Duration"]}
 141 | 									labelFormatter={date => format(new Date(date), "MMM dd, yyyy")}
 142 | 								/>
 143 | 								<Area
 144 | 									dataKey='duration'
 145 | 									fill='#fbcfe8'
 146 | 									name='Feeding Duration'
 147 | 									stroke='#ec4899'
 148 | 									type='monotone'
 149 | 								/>
 150 | 							</AreaChart>
 151 | 						</ResponsiveContainer>
 152 | 					</CardContent>
 153 | 				</Card>
 154 | 			)}
 155 | 
 156 | 			{/* Feeding Records List */}
 157 | 			<Card>
 158 | 				<CardHeader>
 159 | 					<CardTitle className='text-base'>Recent Feeding Sessions</CardTitle>
 160 | 				</CardHeader>
 161 | 				<CardContent>
 162 | 					{records.length === 0 ? (
 163 | 						<div className='py-12 text-center'>
 164 | 							<Milk className='mx-auto mb-3 h-12 w-12 text-muted-foreground' />
 165 | 							<p className='text-muted-foreground'>No breastfeeding records yet</p>
 166 | 						</div>
 167 | 					) : (
 168 | 						<div className='space-y-3'>
 169 | 							{records.map(record => (
 170 | 								<div
 171 | 									className='flex items-center justify-between rounded-lg border p-4'
 172 | 									key={record.id}
 173 | 								>
 174 | 									<div className='flex items-center gap-4'>
 175 | 										<div className='flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-pink-100'>
 176 | 											<Milk className='h-5 w-5 text-pink-600' />
 177 | 										</div>
 178 | 										<div>
 179 | 											<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 180 | 												<Badge variant='outline'>
 181 | 													{getFeedingTimeOfDay(record.feedingDate)}
 182 | 												</Badge>
 183 | 												<span className='font-medium'>{record.totalDuration} minutes</span>
 184 | 											</div>
 185 | 											<div className='flex gap-3 text-muted-foreground text-sm'>
 186 | 												{record.leftDuration !== undefined && (
 187 | 													<span>Left: {record.leftDuration} min</span>
 188 | 												)}
 189 | 												{record.rightDuration !== undefined && (
 190 | 													<span>Right: {record.rightDuration} min</span>
 191 | 												)}
 192 | 											</div>
 193 | 											{record.notes && (
 194 | 												<p className='mt-1 text-muted-foreground text-xs'>{record.notes}</p>
 195 | 											)}
 196 | 										</div>
 197 | 									</div>
 198 | 									<div className='flex flex-col items-end'>
 199 | 										<div className='flex items-center gap-1 text-muted-foreground text-xs'>
 200 | 											<Calendar className='h-3 w-3' />
 201 | 											{format(new Date(record.feedingDate), "MMM dd, yyyy")}
 202 | 										</div>
 203 | 										<div className='flex items-center gap-1 text-muted-foreground text-xs'>
 204 | 											<Clock className='h-3 w-3' />
 205 | 											{format(new Date(record.feedingDate), "h:mm a")}
 206 | 										</div>
 207 | 									</div>
 208 | 								</div>
 209 | 							))}
 210 | 						</div>
 211 | 					)}
 212 | 				</CardContent>
 213 | 			</Card>
 214 | 
 215 | 			{/* Tips Card */}
 216 | 			<Card className='border-pink-200 bg-pink-50'>
 217 | 				<CardHeader>
 218 | 					<CardTitle className='flex items-center gap-2 text-base text-pink-800'>
 219 | 						<AlertCircle className='h-5 w-5' />
 220 | 						Breastfeeding Tips
 221 | 					</CardTitle>
 222 | 				</CardHeader>
 223 | 				<CardContent>
 224 | 					<ul className='space-y-2 text-pink-700 text-sm'>
 225 | 						<li className='flex items-start gap-2'>
 226 | 							<CheckCircle className='mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0' />
 227 | 							<span>Aim for 8-12 feedings per day for newborns</span>
 228 | 						</li>
 229 | 						<li className='flex items-start gap-2'>
 230 | 							<CheckCircle className='mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0' />
 231 | 							<span>Watch for hunger cues like rooting or sucking on hands</span>
 232 | 						</li>
 233 | 						<li className='flex items-start gap-2'>
 234 | 							<CheckCircle className='mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0' />
 235 | 							<span>Alternate which breast you start with each feeding</span>
 236 | 						</li>
 237 | 						<li className='flex items-start gap-2'>
 238 | 							<CheckCircle className='mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0' />
 239 | 							<span>Track wet and dirty diapers - 6+ per day indicates good intake</span>
 240 | 						</li>
 241 | 					</ul>
 242 | 				</CardContent>
 243 | 			</Card>
 244 | 		</div>
 245 | 	);
 246 | }

```

`components/nutrition/feeding-history.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/nutrition/feeding-history.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
   4 | import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   5 | import { format } from "date-fns";
   6 | import { Baby, Clock, Droplet, Milk, Utensils, Waves } from "lucide-react";
   7 | import { Area, AreaChart, CartesianGrid, ResponsiveContainer, Tooltip, XAxis, YAxis } from "recharts";
   8 | 
   9 | interface FeedingRecord {
  10 | 	id: string;
  11 | 	feedingTime: Date;
  12 | 	feedingType: "breastfeeding" | "formula" | "mixed";
  13 | 	duration?: number;
  14 | 	amount?: number;
  15 | 	foodType?: string;
  16 | 	notes?: string;
  17 | }
  18 | 
  19 | interface FeedingHistoryProps {
  20 | 	data?: FeedingRecord[];
  21 | 	loading?: boolean;
  22 | }
  23 | 
  24 | function getFeedingIcon(type: string) {
  25 | 	switch (type) {
  26 | 		case "breastfeeding":
  27 | 			return <Milk className='h-4 w-4 text-pink-500' />;
  28 | 		case "formula":
  29 | 			return <Droplet className='h-4 w-4 text-blue-500' />;
  30 | 		case "mixed":
  31 | 			return <Waves className='h-4 w-4 text-purple-500' />;
  32 | 		default:
  33 | 			return <Baby className='h-4 w-4 text-gray-500' />;
  34 | 	}
  35 | }
  36 | 
  37 | function getFeedingLabel(type: string) {
  38 | 	switch (type) {
  39 | 		case "breastfeeding":
  40 | 			return "Breastfeeding";
  41 | 		case "formula":
  42 | 			return "Formula";
  43 | 		case "mixed":
  44 | 			return "Mixed Feeding";
  45 | 		default:
  46 | 			return type;
  47 | 	}
  48 | }
  49 | 
  50 | function getFeedingDetails(record: FeedingRecord) {
  51 | 	switch (record.feedingType) {
  52 | 		case "breastfeeding":
  53 | 			return `${record.duration || 0} min`;
  54 | 		case "formula":
  55 | 			return `${record.amount || 0} mL`;
  56 | 		case "mixed":
  57 | 			return `${record.duration || 0} min + ${record.amount || 0} mL`;
  58 | 		default:
  59 | 			return "";
  60 | 	}
  61 | }
  62 | 
  63 | export function FeedingHistory({ data, loading }: FeedingHistoryProps) {
  64 | 	if (loading) {
  65 | 		return <div className='py-8 text-center text-muted-foreground'>Loading feeding history...</div>;
  66 | 	}
  67 | 
  68 | 	if (!data || data.length === 0) {
  69 | 		return (
  70 | 			<div className='py-12 text-center'>
  71 | 				<Baby className='mx-auto mb-3 h-12 w-12 text-muted-foreground' />
  72 | 				<p className='text-muted-foreground'>No feeding logs recorded yet</p>
  73 | 				<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Click "Log Feeding" to start tracking</p>
  74 | 			</div>
  75 | 		);
  76 | 	}
  77 | 
  78 | 	// Calculate daily feeding stats for chart
  79 | 	const dailyStats = data.reduce(
  80 | 		(acc, record) => {
  81 | 			const date = format(new Date(record.feedingTime), "yyyy-MM-dd");
  82 | 			if (!acc[date]) {
  83 | 				acc[date] = {
  84 | 					date,
  85 | 					breastfeedings: 0,
  86 | 					formulaAmount: 0,
  87 | 					solidFeedings: 0
  88 | 				};
  89 | 			}
  90 | 
  91 | 			if (record.feedingType === "breastfeeding") {
  92 | 				acc[date].breastfeedings++;
  93 | 			} else if (record.feedingType === "formula") {
  94 | 				acc[date].formulaAmount += record.amount || 0;
  95 | 			}
  96 | 
  97 | 			return acc;
  98 | 		},
  99 | 		{} as Record<
 100 | 			string,
 101 | 			{
 102 | 				date: string;
 103 | 				breastfeedings: number;
 104 | 				formulaAmount: number;
 105 | 				solidFeedings: number;
 106 | 			}
 107 | 		>
 108 | 	);
 109 | 
 110 | 	const chartData = Object.values(dailyStats).slice(-14); // Last 14 days
 111 | 
 112 | 	// Calculate today's stats
 113 | 	const today = format(new Date(), "yyyy-MM-dd");
 114 | 	const todayFeedings = data.filter(record => format(new Date(record.feedingTime), "yyyy-MM-dd") === today);
 115 | 
 116 | 	const todayStats = {
 117 | 		totalFeedings: todayFeedings.length,
 118 | 		breastfeedings: todayFeedings.filter(r => r.feedingType === "breastfeeding").length,
 119 | 		formulaAmount: todayFeedings
 120 | 			.filter(r => r.feedingType === "formula")
 121 | 			.reduce((sum, r) => sum + (r.amount || 0), 0),
 122 | 		mixedFeedings: todayFeedings.filter(r => r.feedingType === "mixed").length
 123 | 	};
 124 | 
 125 | 	return (
 126 | 		<div className='space-y-6'>
 127 | 			{/* Today's Summary */}
 128 | 			<div className='grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-4'>
 129 | 				<Card>
 130 | 					<CardContent className='pt-6'>
 131 | 						<div className='text-center'>
 132 | 							<Baby className='mx-auto mb-2 h-6 w-6 text-muted-foreground' />
 133 | 							<div className='font-bold text-2xl'>{todayStats.totalFeedings}</div>
 134 | 							<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Total Feedings Today</p>
 135 | 						</div>
 136 | 					</CardContent>
 137 | 				</Card>
 138 | 				<Card>
 139 | 					<CardContent className='pt-6'>
 140 | 						<div className='text-center'>
 141 | 							<Milk className='mx-auto mb-2 h-6 w-6 text-pink-500' />
 142 | 							<div className='font-bold text-2xl'>{todayStats.breastfeedings}</div>
 143 | 							<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Breastfeeding Sessions</p>
 144 | 						</div>
 145 | 					</CardContent>
 146 | 				</Card>
 147 | 				<Card>
 148 | 					<CardContent className='pt-6'>
 149 | 						<div className='text-center'>
 150 | 							<Droplet className='mx-auto mb-2 h-6 w-6 text-blue-500' />
 151 | 							<div className='font-bold text-2xl'>{todayStats.formulaAmount} mL</div>
 152 | 							<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Formula Today</p>
 153 | 						</div>
 154 | 					</CardContent>
 155 | 				</Card>
 156 | 				<Card>
 157 | 					<CardContent className='pt-6'>
 158 | 						<div className='text-center'>
 159 | 							<Utensils className='mx-auto mb-2 h-6 w-6 text-orange-500' />
 160 | 							<div className='font-bold text-2xl'>{todayStats.mixedFeedings}</div>
 161 | 							<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Solid Food Meals</p>
 162 | 						</div>
 163 | 					</CardContent>
 164 | 				</Card>
 165 | 			</div>
 166 | 
 167 | 			{/* Trend Chart */}
 168 | 			{chartData.length > 1 && (
 169 | 				<Card>
 170 | 					<CardHeader>
 171 | 						<CardTitle className='text-base'>Feeding Trends (Last 14 Days)</CardTitle>
 172 | 					</CardHeader>
 173 | 					<CardContent>
 174 | 						<ResponsiveContainer
 175 | 							height={250}
 176 | 							width='100%'
 177 | 						>
 178 | 							<AreaChart data={chartData}>
 179 | 								<CartesianGrid strokeDasharray='3 3' />
 180 | 								<XAxis
 181 | 									dataKey='date'
 182 | 									tickFormatter={date => format(new Date(date), "MM/dd")}
 183 | 								/>
 184 | 								<YAxis yAxisId='left' />
 185 | 								<YAxis
 186 | 									orientation='right'
 187 | 									yAxisId='right'
 188 | 								/>
 189 | 								<Tooltip labelFormatter={date => format(new Date(date), "MMM dd, yyyy")} />
 190 | 								<Area
 191 | 									dataKey='breastfeedings'
 192 | 									fill='#fbcfe8'
 193 | 									name='Breastfeedings'
 194 | 									stroke='#ec4899'
 195 | 									type='monotone'
 196 | 									yAxisId='left'
 197 | 								/>
 198 | 								<Area
 199 | 									dataKey='mixedFeedings'
 200 | 									fill='#fed7aa'
 201 | 									name='Mixed Meals'
 202 | 									stroke='#f97316'
 203 | 									type='monotone'
 204 | 									yAxisId='left'
 205 | 								/>
 206 | 								<Area
 207 | 									dataKey='formulaAmount'
 208 | 									fill='#bfdbfe'
 209 | 									name='Formula (mL)'
 210 | 									stroke='#3b82f6'
 211 | 									type='monotone'
 212 | 									yAxisId='right'
 213 | 								/>
 214 | 							</AreaChart>
 215 | 						</ResponsiveContainer>
 216 | 					</CardContent>
 217 | 				</Card>
 218 | 			)}
 219 | 
 220 | 			{/* Feeding History List */}
 221 | 			<Card>
 222 | 				<CardHeader>
 223 | 					<CardTitle className='text-base'>Feeding History</CardTitle>
 224 | 				</CardHeader>
 225 | 				<CardContent>
 226 | 					<div className='space-y-3'>
 227 | 						{data
 228 | 							.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.feedingTime).getTime() - new Date(a.feedingTime).getTime())
 229 | 							.slice(0, 20)
 230 | 							.map(record => (
 231 | 								<div
 232 | 									className='flex items-center justify-between rounded-lg border p-4'
 233 | 									key={record.id}
 234 | 								>
 235 | 									<div className='flex items-center gap-4'>
 236 | 										<div className='flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-gray-100'>
 237 | 											{getFeedingIcon(record.feedingType)}
 238 | 										</div>
 239 | 										<div>
 240 | 											<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 241 | 												<Badge variant='outline'>{getFeedingLabel(record.feedingType)}</Badge>
 242 | 												<span className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>
 243 | 													{getFeedingDetails(record)}
 244 | 												</span>
 245 | 											</div>
 246 | 											<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>
 247 | 												<Clock className='mr-1 inline h-3 w-3' />
 248 | 												{format(new Date(record.feedingTime), "h:mm a")}
 249 | 											</p>
 250 | 											{record.notes && (
 251 | 												<p className='mt-1 text-muted-foreground text-xs'>{record.notes}</p>
 252 | 											)}
 253 | 										</div>
 254 | 									</div>
 255 | 									<div className='text-right text-muted-foreground text-xs'>
 256 | 										{format(new Date(record.feedingTime), "MMM dd, yyyy")}
 257 | 									</div>
 258 | 								</div>
 259 | 							))}
 260 | 					</div>
 261 | 				</CardContent>
 262 | 			</Card>
 263 | 		</div>
 264 | 	);
 265 | }

```

`components/nutrition/feeding-log-form.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/nutrition/feeding-log-form.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   4 | import { Calendar } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/calendar";
   5 | import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   6 | import { Input } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/input";
   7 | import { Label } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/label";
   8 | import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/popover";
   9 | import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/select";
  10 | import { Textarea } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/textarea";
  11 | import { cn } from "@clinic/ui/lib/utils";
  12 | import { useForm } from "@tanstack/react-form";
  13 | import { format } from "date-fns";
  14 | import { CalendarIcon, Droplet, Milk } from "lucide-react";
  15 | import { toast } from "sonner";
  16 | import { z } from "zod";
  17 | 
  18 | const feedingLogSchema = z.object({
  19 | 	patientId: z.string().min(1, "Patient is required"),
  20 | 	feedingTime: z.date(),
  21 | 	feedingType: z.enum(["breastfeeding", "formula", "mixed"]),
  22 | 	duration: z.number().optional(), // minutes for breastfeeding
  23 | 	amount: z.number().optional(), // oz/ml for formula
  24 | 	foodType: z.string().optional(), // for solids
  25 | 	notes: z.string().optional()
  26 | });
  27 | 
  28 | type FeedingLogFormValues = z.infer<typeof feedingLogSchema>;
  29 | 
  30 | interface FeedingLogFormProps {
  31 | 	patientId: string;
  32 | 	onSubmit: (data: FeedingLogFormValues) => void;
  33 | 	initialData?: Partial<FeedingLogFormValues>;
  34 | 	onCancel?: () => void;
  35 | }
  36 | 
  37 | const feedingTypes = [
  38 | 	{ value: "breastfeeding", label: "Breastfeeding", icon: Milk },
  39 | 	{ value: "formula", label: "Formula", icon: Droplet },
  40 | 	{ value: "mixed", label: "Mixed Feeding", icon: Droplet }
  41 | ];
  42 | 
  43 | export function FeedingLogForm({ patientId, onSubmit, initialData, onCancel }: FeedingLogFormProps) {
  44 | 	const form = useForm({
  45 | 		defaultValues: {
  46 | 			patientId: initialData?.patientId ?? patientId,
  47 | 			feedingTime: initialData?.feedingTime ?? new Date(),
  48 | 			feedingType: initialData?.feedingType ?? "breastfeeding",
  49 | 			duration: initialData?.duration,
  50 | 			amount: initialData?.amount,
  51 | 			foodType: initialData?.foodType ?? "",
  52 | 			notes: initialData?.notes ?? ""
  53 | 		} as FeedingLogFormValues,
  54 | 		validators: {
  55 | 			onSubmit: feedingLogSchema
  56 | 		},
  57 | 		onSubmit: async ({ value }) => {
  58 | 			onSubmit(value);
  59 | 			toast.success("Feeding log saved successfully");
  60 | 		}
  61 | 	});
  62 | 
  63 | 	return (
  64 | 		<Card>
  65 | 			<CardHeader>
  66 | 				<CardTitle>Log Feeding</CardTitle>
  67 | 			</CardHeader>
  68 | 			<CardContent>
  69 | 				<form
  70 | 					className='space-y-4'
  71 | 					onSubmit={e => {
  72 | 						e.preventDefault();
  73 | 						e.stopPropagation();
  74 | 						form.handleSubmit();
  75 | 					}}
  76 | 				>
  77 | 					{/* Feeding Time */}
  78 | 					<form.Field name='feedingTime'>
  79 | 						{field => (
  80 | 							<div className='space-y-2'>
  81 | 								<Label>Feeding Time *</Label>
  82 | 								<Popover>
  83 | 									<PopoverTrigger asChild>
  84 | 										<Button
  85 | 											className={cn(
  86 | 												"w-full justify-start text-left font-normal",
  87 | 												!field.state.value && "text-muted-foreground"
  88 | 											)}
  89 | 											variant='outline'
  90 | 										>
  91 | 											<CalendarIcon className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
  92 | 											{field.state.value
  93 | 												? format(field.state.value, "PPP p")
  94 | 												: "Select date and time"}
  95 | 										</Button>
  96 | 									</PopoverTrigger>
  97 | 									<PopoverContent className='w-auto p-0'>
  98 | 										<Calendar
  99 | 											mode='single'
 100 | 											onSelect={date => {
 101 | 												if (date) {
 102 | 													const current = field.state.value || new Date();
 103 | 													date.setHours(current.getHours(), current.getMinutes());
 104 | 													field.handleChange(date);
 105 | 												}
 106 | 											}}
 107 | 											selected={field.state.value}
 108 | 										/>
 109 | 										<div className='border-t p-3'>
 110 | 											<Input
 111 | 												onChange={e => {
 112 | 													const [hours, minutes] = e.target.value.split(":").map(Number);
 113 | 													const newDate = field.state.value || new Date();
 114 | 													newDate.setHours(hours || 0, minutes || 0);
 115 | 													field.handleChange(newDate);
 116 | 												}}
 117 | 												type='time'
 118 | 												value={field.state.value ? format(field.state.value, "HH:mm") : ""}
 119 | 											/>
 120 | 										</div>
 121 | 									</PopoverContent>
 122 | 								</Popover>
 123 | 								{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
 124 | 									<p
 125 | 										className='text-destructive text-sm'
 126 | 										key={String(error)}
 127 | 									>
 128 | 										{String(error)}
 129 | 									</p>
 130 | 								))}
 131 | 							</div>
 132 | 						)}
 133 | 					</form.Field>
 134 | 
 135 | 					{/* Feeding Type */}
 136 | 					<form.Field name='feedingType'>
 137 | 						{field => (
 138 | 							<div className='space-y-2'>
 139 | 								<Label>Feeding Type *</Label>
 140 | 								<Select
 141 | 									onValueChange={value =>
 142 | 										field.handleChange(value as FeedingLogFormValues["feedingType"])
 143 | 									}
 144 | 									value={field.state.value}
 145 | 								>
 146 | 									<SelectTrigger>
 147 | 										<SelectValue placeholder='Select feeding type' />
 148 | 									</SelectTrigger>
 149 | 									<SelectContent>
 150 | 										{feedingTypes.map(type => (
 151 | 											<SelectItem
 152 | 												key={type.value}
 153 | 												value={type.value}
 154 | 											>
 155 | 												<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 156 | 													<type.icon className='h-4 w-4' />
 157 | 													{type.label}
 158 | 												</div>
 159 | 											</SelectItem>
 160 | 										))}
 161 | 									</SelectContent>
 162 | 								</Select>
 163 | 								{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
 164 | 									<p
 165 | 										className='text-destructive text-sm'
 166 | 										key={String(error)}
 167 | 									>
 168 | 										{String(error)}
 169 | 									</p>
 170 | 								))}
 171 | 							</div>
 172 | 						)}
 173 | 					</form.Field>
 174 | 
 175 | 					{/* Conditional Fields based on feeding type */}
 176 | 					<form.Field name='feedingType'>
 177 | 						{typeField => {
 178 | 							const feedingType = typeField.state.value;
 179 | 
 180 | 							return (
 181 | 								<>
 182 | 									{feedingType === "breastfeeding" && (
 183 | 										<form.Field name='duration'>
 184 | 											{field => (
 185 | 												<div className='space-y-2'>
 186 | 													<Label>Duration (minutes)</Label>
 187 | 													<Input
 188 | 														onChange={e =>
 189 | 															field.handleChange(
 190 | 																Number.parseInt(e.target.value, 10) || undefined
 191 | 															)
 192 | 														}
 193 | 														placeholder='e.g., 15'
 194 | 														type='number'
 195 | 														value={field.state.value || ""}
 196 | 													/>
 197 | 													{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
 198 | 														<p
 199 | 															className='text-destructive text-sm'
 200 | 															key={String(error)}
 201 | 														>
 202 | 															{String(error)}
 203 | 														</p>
 204 | 													))}
 205 | 												</div>
 206 | 											)}
 207 | 										</form.Field>
 208 | 									)}
 209 | 
 210 | 									{feedingType === "formula" && (
 211 | 										<form.Field name='amount'>
 212 | 											{field => (
 213 | 												<div className='space-y-2'>
 214 | 													<Label>Amount (oz/mL)</Label>
 215 | 													<Input
 216 | 														onChange={e =>
 217 | 															field.handleChange(
 218 | 																Number.parseFloat(e.target.value) || undefined
 219 | 															)
 220 | 														}
 221 | 														placeholder='e.g., 4'
 222 | 														step='0.5'
 223 | 														type='number'
 224 | 														value={field.state.value || ""}
 225 | 													/>
 226 | 													{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
 227 | 														<p
 228 | 															className='text-destructive text-sm'
 229 | 															key={String(error)}
 230 | 														>
 231 | 															{String(error)}
 232 | 														</p>
 233 | 													))}
 234 | 												</div>
 235 | 											)}
 236 | 										</form.Field>
 237 | 									)}
 238 | 
 239 | 									{feedingType === "mixed" && (
 240 | 										<form.Field name='foodType'>
 241 | 											{field => (
 242 | 												<div className='space-y-2'>
 243 | 													<Label>Food Type</Label>
 244 | 													<Input
 245 | 														onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 246 | 														placeholder='e.g., Applesauce, Rice cereal'
 247 | 														value={field.state.value}
 248 | 													/>
 249 | 													{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
 250 | 														<p
 251 | 															className='text-destructive text-sm'
 252 | 															key={String(error)}
 253 | 														>
 254 | 															{String(error)}
 255 | 														</p>
 256 | 													))}
 257 | 												</div>
 258 | 											)}
 259 | 										</form.Field>
 260 | 									)}
 261 | 
 262 | 									{feedingType === "mixed" && (
 263 | 										<div className='grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2'>
 264 | 											<form.Field name='duration'>
 265 | 												{field => (
 266 | 													<div className='space-y-2'>
 267 | 														<Label>Breastfeeding Duration (min)</Label>
 268 | 														<Input
 269 | 															onChange={e =>
 270 | 																field.handleChange(
 271 | 																	Number.parseInt(e.target.value, 10) || undefined
 272 | 																)
 273 | 															}
 274 | 															placeholder='e.g., 10'
 275 | 															type='number'
 276 | 															value={field.state.value || ""}
 277 | 														/>
 278 | 													</div>
 279 | 												)}
 280 | 											</form.Field>
 281 | 											<form.Field name='amount'>
 282 | 												{field => (
 283 | 													<div className='space-y-2'>
 284 | 														<Label>Formula Amount (oz/mL)</Label>
 285 | 														<Input
 286 | 															onChange={e =>
 287 | 																field.handleChange(
 288 | 																	Number.parseFloat(e.target.value) || undefined
 289 | 																)
 290 | 															}
 291 | 															placeholder='e.g., 2'
 292 | 															step='0.5'
 293 | 															type='number'
 294 | 															value={field.state.value || ""}
 295 | 														/>
 296 | 													</div>
 297 | 												)}
 298 | 											</form.Field>
 299 | 										</div>
 300 | 									)}
 301 | 								</>
 302 | 							);
 303 | 						}}
 304 | 					</form.Field>
 305 | 
 306 | 					{/* Notes */}
 307 | 					<form.Field name='notes'>
 308 | 						{field => (
 309 | 							<div className='space-y-2'>
 310 | 								<Label>Notes</Label>
 311 | 								<Textarea
 312 | 									onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 313 | 									placeholder='Any observations or additional notes...'
 314 | 									rows={3}
 315 | 									value={field.state.value}
 316 | 								/>
 317 | 								{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
 318 | 									<p
 319 | 										className='text-destructive text-sm'
 320 | 										key={String(error)}
 321 | 									>
 322 | 										{String(error)}
 323 | 									</p>
 324 | 								))}
 325 | 							</div>
 326 | 						)}
 327 | 					</form.Field>
 328 | 
 329 | 					{/* Actions */}
 330 | 					<div className='flex justify-end gap-4 pt-4'>
 331 | 						{onCancel && (
 332 | 							<Button
 333 | 								onClick={onCancel}
 334 | 								type='button'
 335 | 								variant='outline'
 336 | 							>
 337 | 								Cancel
 338 | 							</Button>
 339 | 						)}
 340 | 						<form.Subscribe>
 341 | 							{state => (
 342 | 								<Button
 343 | 									disabled={state.isSubmitting}
 344 | 									type='submit'
 345 | 								>
 346 | 									{state.isSubmitting ? "Saving..." : "Save Feeding Log"}
 347 | 								</Button>
 348 | 							)}
 349 | 						</form.Subscribe>
 350 | 					</div>
 351 | 				</form>
 352 | 			</CardContent>
 353 | 		</Card>
 354 | 	);
 355 | }

```

`components/nutrition/nutrition-assessment.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/nutrition/nutrition-assessment.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
   4 | import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   5 | import { Progress } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/progress";
   6 | import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/tabs";
   7 | import { format } from "date-fns";
   8 | import {
   9 | 	Activity,
  10 | 	AlertCircle,
  11 | 	Apple,
  12 | 	Award,
  13 | 	Baby,
  14 | 	CheckCircle,
  15 | 	Droplet,
  16 | 	TrendingDown,
  17 | 	TrendingUp,
  18 | 	Utensils
  19 | } from "lucide-react";
  20 | 
  21 | interface NutritionalStatus {
  22 | 	height: number;
  23 | 	weight: number;
  24 | 	bmi: number;
  25 | 	weightPercentile: number;
  26 | 	heightPercentile: number;
  27 | 	bmiPercentile: number;
  28 | 	classification: "normal" | "underweight" | "overweight" | "obese" | "stunted";
  29 | }
  30 | 
  31 | interface DietaryIntake {
  32 | 	foodGroup: string;
  33 | 	currentIntake: number;
  34 | 	recommendedIntake: number;
  35 | 	unit: string;
  36 | 	status: "adequate" | "inadequate" | "excessive";
  37 | }
  38 | 
  39 | interface FeedingPattern {
  40 | 	type: "breastfeeding" | "formula" | "mixed";
  41 | 	frequency: number;
  42 | 	amount?: number;
  43 | 	notes?: string;
  44 | }
  45 | 
  46 | interface NutritionAssessmentData {
  47 | 	patientId: string;
  48 | 	assessmentDate: Date;
  49 | 	nutritionalStatus: NutritionalStatus;
  50 | 	dietaryIntakes: DietaryIntake[];
  51 | 	feedingPattern: FeedingPattern[];
  52 | 	recommendations: string[];
  53 | 	riskFactors: string[];
  54 | 	followUpDate?: Date;
  55 | }
  56 | 
  57 | interface NutritionAssessmentProps {
  58 | 	patientId: string;
  59 | 	data?: {
  60 | 		currentAssessment: NutritionAssessmentData;
  61 | 		history: NutritionAssessmentData[];
  62 | 	};
  63 | 	loading?: boolean;
  64 | }
  65 | 
  66 | const classificationColors = {
  67 | 	normal: "bg-green-500",
  68 | 	underweight: "bg-yellow-500",
  69 | 	overweight: "bg-orange-500",
  70 | 	obese: "bg-red-500",
  71 | 	stunted: "bg-red-500"
  72 | };
  73 | 
  74 | const classificationLabels = {
  75 | 	normal: "Normal Weight",
  76 | 	underweight: "Underweight",
  77 | 	overweight: "Overweight",
  78 | 	obese: "Obese",
  79 | 	stunted: "Stunted Growth"
  80 | };
  81 | 
  82 | const foodGroupIcons = {
  83 | 	Grains: <Utensils className='h-4 w-4' />,
  84 | 	Protein: <Award className='h-4 w-4' />,
  85 | 	Vegetables: <Apple className='h-4 w-4' />,
  86 | 	Fruits: <Apple className='h-4 w-4' />,
  87 | 	Dairy: <Droplet className='h-4 w-4' />
  88 | };
  89 | 
  90 | const statusColors = {
  91 | 	adequate: "text-green-600",
  92 | 	inadequate: "text-red-600",
  93 | 	excessive: "text-orange-600"
  94 | };
  95 | 
  96 | const statusLabels = {
  97 | 	adequate: "Adequate",
  98 | 	inadequate: "Inadequate",
  99 | 	excessive: "Excessive"
 100 | };
 101 | 
 102 | export function NutritionAssessment({ data, loading }: NutritionAssessmentProps) {
 103 | 	if (loading) {
 104 | 		return (
 105 | 			<Card>
 106 | 				<CardHeader>
 107 | 					<CardTitle>Nutrition Assessment</CardTitle>
 108 | 				</CardHeader>
 109 | 				<CardContent>
 110 | 					<div className='py-8 text-center text-muted-foreground'>Loading nutrition assessment...</div>
 111 | 				</CardContent>
 112 | 			</Card>
 113 | 		);
 114 | 	}
 115 | 
 116 | 	const currentAssessment = data?.currentAssessment;
 117 | 	const history = data?.history || [];
 118 | 
 119 | 	if (!currentAssessment) {
 120 | 		return (
 121 | 			<Card>
 122 | 				<CardHeader>
 123 | 					<CardTitle>Nutrition Assessment</CardTitle>
 124 | 				</CardHeader>
 125 | 				<CardContent>
 126 | 					<div className='py-12 text-center'>
 127 | 						<Apple className='mx-auto mb-3 h-12 w-12 text-muted-foreground' />
 128 | 						<p className='text-muted-foreground'>No nutrition assessment available</p>
 129 | 						<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>
 130 | 							Please record growth measurements to see assessment
 131 | 						</p>
 132 | 					</div>
 133 | 				</CardContent>
 134 | 			</Card>
 135 | 		);
 136 | 	}
 137 | 
 138 | 	const status = currentAssessment.nutritionalStatus;
 139 | 	const getTrendIcon = (value: number, previousValue?: number) => {
 140 | 		if (!previousValue) return null;
 141 | 		if (value > previousValue) return <TrendingUp className='h-3 w-3 text-green-600' />;
 142 | 		if (value < previousValue) return <TrendingDown className='h-3 w-3 text-red-600' />;
 143 | 		return null;
 144 | 	};
 145 | 
 146 | 	const previousAssessment = history[0];
 147 | 
 148 | 	return (
 149 | 		<Tabs
 150 | 			className='space-y-4'
 151 | 			defaultValue='overview'
 152 | 		>
 153 | 			<TabsList>
 154 | 				<TabsTrigger value='overview'>Overview</TabsTrigger>
 155 | 				<TabsTrigger value='dietary'>Dietary Intake</TabsTrigger>
 156 | 				<TabsTrigger value='history'>History</TabsTrigger>
 157 | 				<TabsTrigger value='recommendations'>Recommendations</TabsTrigger>
 158 | 			</TabsList>
 159 | 
 160 | 			<TabsContent value='overview'>
 161 | 				<div className='space-y-6'>
 162 | 					{/* Growth Status Card */}
 163 | 					<Card>
 164 | 						<CardHeader>
 165 | 							<CardTitle className='text-base'>Growth Status</CardTitle>
 166 | 						</CardHeader>
 167 | 						<CardContent>
 168 | 							<div className='grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-4'>
 169 | 								<div className='text-center'>
 170 | 									<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Weight</p>
 171 | 									<p className='font-bold text-2xl'>{status.weight} kg</p>
 172 | 									<div className='mt-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-1'>
 173 | 										<span className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>
 174 | 											{status.weightPercentile}th percentile
 175 | 										</span>
 176 | 										{getTrendIcon(
 177 | 											status.weightPercentile,
 178 | 											previousAssessment?.nutritionalStatus.weightPercentile
 179 | 										)}
 180 | 									</div>
 181 | 								</div>
 182 | 								<div className='text-center'>
 183 | 									<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Height</p>
 184 | 									<p className='font-bold text-2xl'>{status.height} cm</p>
 185 | 									<div className='mt-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-1'>
 186 | 										<span className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>
 187 | 											{status.heightPercentile}th percentile
 188 | 										</span>
 189 | 										{getTrendIcon(
 190 | 											status.heightPercentile,
 191 | 											previousAssessment?.nutritionalStatus.heightPercentile
 192 | 										)}
 193 | 									</div>
 194 | 								</div>
 195 | 								<div className='text-center'>
 196 | 									<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>BMI</p>
 197 | 									<p className='font-bold text-2xl'>{status.bmi}</p>
 198 | 									<div className='mt-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-1'>
 199 | 										<span className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>
 200 | 											{status.bmiPercentile}th percentile
 201 | 										</span>
 202 | 										{getTrendIcon(
 203 | 											status.bmiPercentile,
 204 | 											previousAssessment?.nutritionalStatus.bmiPercentile
 205 | 										)}
 206 | 									</div>
 207 | 								</div>
 208 | 								<div className='text-center'>
 209 | 									<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Classification</p>
 210 | 									<Badge className={`mt-1 ${classificationColors[status.classification]} text-white`}>
 211 | 										{classificationLabels[status.classification]}
 212 | 									</Badge>
 213 | 								</div>
 214 | 							</div>
 215 | 						</CardContent>
 216 | 					</Card>
 217 | 
 218 | 					{/* Feeding Pattern Card */}
 219 | 					<Card>
 220 | 						<CardHeader>
 221 | 							<CardTitle className='text-base'>Current Feeding Pattern</CardTitle>
 222 | 						</CardHeader>
 223 | 						<CardContent>
 224 | 							<div className='space-y-3'>
 225 | 								{currentAssessment.feedingPattern.map(pattern => (
 226 | 									<div
 227 | 										className='flex items-center justify-between border-b pb-3'
 228 | 										key={pattern.amount}
 229 | 									>
 230 | 										<div className='flex items-center gap-3'>
 231 | 											<Baby className='h-5 w-5 text-muted-foreground' />
 232 | 											<div>
 233 | 												<p className='font-medium capitalize'>{pattern.type}</p>
 234 | 												<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>
 235 | 													{pattern.frequency} times/day
 236 | 													{pattern.amount && ` • ${pattern.amount} mL`}
 237 | 												</p>
 238 | 											</div>
 239 | 										</div>
 240 | 										{pattern.notes && (
 241 | 											<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>{pattern.notes}</p>
 242 | 										)}
 243 | 									</div>
 244 | 								))}
 245 | 							</div>
 246 | 						</CardContent>
 247 | 					</Card>
 248 | 
 249 | 					{/* Risk Factors */}
 250 | 					{currentAssessment.riskFactors.length > 0 && (
 251 | 						<Card className='border-yellow-200 bg-yellow-50'>
 252 | 							<CardHeader>
 253 | 								<CardTitle className='flex items-center gap-2 text-base text-yellow-800'>
 254 | 									<AlertCircle className='h-5 w-5' />
 255 | 									Risk Factors
 256 | 								</CardTitle>
 257 | 							</CardHeader>
 258 | 							<CardContent>
 259 | 								<ul className='space-y-1'>
 260 | 									{currentAssessment.riskFactors.map(risk => (
 261 | 										<li
 262 | 											className='flex items-start gap-2 text-sm text-yellow-700'
 263 | 											key={risk.toString()}
 264 | 										>
 265 | 											<span className='mt-1.5 h-1.5 w-1.5 rounded-full bg-yellow-500' />
 266 | 											{risk}
 267 | 										</li>
 268 | 									))}
 269 | 								</ul>
 270 | 							</CardContent>
 271 | 						</Card>
 272 | 					)}
 273 | 				</div>
 274 | 			</TabsContent>
 275 | 
 276 | 			<TabsContent value='dietary'>
 277 | 				<Card>
 278 | 					<CardHeader>
 279 | 						<CardTitle className='text-base'>Dietary Intake Assessment</CardTitle>
 280 | 					</CardHeader>
 281 | 					<CardContent>
 282 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 283 | 							{currentAssessment.dietaryIntakes.map(intake => (
 284 | 								<div key={intake.foodGroup}>
 285 | 									<div className='mb-2 flex items-center justify-between'>
 286 | 										<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 287 | 											{foodGroupIcons[intake.foodGroup as keyof typeof foodGroupIcons] || (
 288 | 												<Utensils className='h-4 w-4' />
 289 | 											)}
 290 | 											<span className='font-medium'>{intake.foodGroup}</span>
 291 | 										</div>
 292 | 										<Badge
 293 | 											className={statusColors[intake.status]}
 294 | 											variant='outline'
 295 | 										>
 296 | 											{statusLabels[intake.status]}
 297 | 										</Badge>
 298 | 									</div>
 299 | 									<div className='flex items-center gap-4'>
 300 | 										<div className='flex-1'>
 301 | 											<Progress
 302 | 												className='h-2'
 303 | 												value={(intake.currentIntake / intake.recommendedIntake) * 100}
 304 | 											/>
 305 | 										</div>
 306 | 										<span className='whitespace-nowrap text-muted-foreground text-sm'>
 307 | 											{intake.currentIntake} / {intake.recommendedIntake} {intake.unit}
 308 | 										</span>
 309 | 									</div>
 310 | 									<p className='mt-1 text-muted-foreground text-xs'>
 311 | 										Recommended daily intake for age group
 312 | 									</p>
 313 | 								</div>
 314 | 							))}
 315 | 						</div>
 316 | 					</CardContent>
 317 | 				</Card>
 318 | 			</TabsContent>
 319 | 
 320 | 			<TabsContent value='history'>
 321 | 				<Card>
 322 | 					<CardHeader>
 323 | 						<CardTitle className='text-base'>Assessment History</CardTitle>
 324 | 					</CardHeader>
 325 | 					<CardContent>
 326 | 						{history.length === 0 ? (
 327 | 							<div className='py-8 text-center text-muted-foreground'>No previous assessments found</div>
 328 | 						) : (
 329 | 							<div className='space-y-4'>
 330 | 								{history.map(assessment => (
 331 | 									<div
 332 | 										className='rounded-lg border p-4'
 333 | 										key={assessment.patientId}
 334 | 									>
 335 | 										<div className='mb-3 flex items-center justify-between'>
 336 | 											<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 337 | 												<Activity className='h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground' />
 338 | 												<span className='font-medium'>
 339 | 													{format(new Date(assessment.assessmentDate), "MMM dd, yyyy")}
 340 | 												</span>
 341 | 											</div>
 342 | 											<Badge
 343 | 												className={
 344 | 													classificationColors[assessment.nutritionalStatus.classification]
 345 | 												}
 346 | 											>
 347 | 												{classificationLabels[assessment.nutritionalStatus.classification]}
 348 | 											</Badge>
 349 | 										</div>
 350 | 										<div className='grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 text-center text-sm'>
 351 | 											<div>
 352 | 												<p className='text-muted-foreground'>Weight</p>
 353 | 												<p className='font-medium'>{assessment.nutritionalStatus.weight} kg</p>
 354 | 												<p className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>
 355 | 													{assessment.nutritionalStatus.weightPercentile}th %ile
 356 | 												</p>
 357 | 											</div>
 358 | 											<div>
 359 | 												<p className='text-muted-foreground'>Height</p>
 360 | 												<p className='font-medium'>{assessment.nutritionalStatus.height} cm</p>
 361 | 												<p className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>
 362 | 													{assessment.nutritionalStatus.heightPercentile}th %ile
 363 | 												</p>
 364 | 											</div>
 365 | 											<div>
 366 | 												<p className='text-muted-foreground'>BMI</p>
 367 | 												<p className='font-medium'>{assessment.nutritionalStatus.bmi}</p>
 368 | 												<p className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>
 369 | 													{assessment.nutritionalStatus.bmiPercentile}th %ile
 370 | 												</p>
 371 | 											</div>
 372 | 										</div>
 373 | 									</div>
 374 | 								))}
 375 | 							</div>
 376 | 						)}
 377 | 					</CardContent>
 378 | 				</Card>
 379 | 			</TabsContent>
 380 | 
 381 | 			<TabsContent value='recommendations'>
 382 | 				<Card className='border-green-200 bg-green-50'>
 383 | 					<CardHeader>
 384 | 						<CardTitle className='flex items-center gap-2 text-base text-green-800'>
 385 | 							<CheckCircle className='h-5 w-5' />
 386 | 							Nutrition Recommendations
 387 | 						</CardTitle>
 388 | 					</CardHeader>
 389 | 					<CardContent>
 390 | 						<ul className='space-y-3'>
 391 | 							{currentAssessment.recommendations.map(rec => (
 392 | 								<li
 393 | 									className='flex items-start gap-2 text-green-700'
 394 | 									key={rec.toString()}
 395 | 								>
 396 | 									<CheckCircle className='mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0' />
 397 | 									<span>{rec}</span>
 398 | 								</li>
 399 | 							))}
 400 | 						</ul>
 401 | 
 402 | 						{currentAssessment.followUpDate && (
 403 | 							<div className='mt-6 rounded-lg border border-green-200 bg-green-100 p-4'>
 404 | 								<p className='flex items-center gap-2 text-green-800 text-sm'>
 405 | 									<AlertCircle className='h-4 w-4' />
 406 | 									Follow-up Assessment Recommended:{" "}
 407 | 									{format(new Date(currentAssessment.followUpDate), "MMM dd, yyyy")}
 408 | 								</p>
 409 | 							</div>
 410 | 						)}
 411 | 					</CardContent>
 412 | 				</Card>
 413 | 			</TabsContent>
 414 | 		</Tabs>
 415 | 	);
 416 | }

```

`components/patient/PatientAllergyList.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // components/patient/PatientAllergyList.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
   4 | import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   5 | import { Skeleton } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/skeleton";
   6 | import { useQuery } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   7 | import { AlertCircle, AlertTriangle, Bell, Info } from "lucide-react";
   8 | import type { Key, ReactNode, ReactPortal } from "react";
   9 | 
  10 | import { orpc } from "@/utils/orpc";
  11 | 
  12 | interface PatientAllergyListProps {
  13 | 	patientId: string;
  14 | }
  15 | 
  16 | export function PatientAllergyList({ patientId }: PatientAllergyListProps) {
  17 | 	const { data: patient, isLoading } = useQuery(
  18 | 		orpc.patient.getById.queryOptions({
  19 | 			input: { id: patientId }
  20 | 		})
  21 | 	);
  22 | 
  23 | 	if (isLoading) {
  24 | 		return <AllergyListSkeleton />;
  25 | 	}
  26 | 
  27 | 	const allergies = patient?.allergies;
  28 | 	const medicalConditions = patient?.medicalConditions;
  29 | 
  30 | 	if (!allergies && !medicalConditions) {
  31 | 		return (
  32 | 			<Card className='border-green-200 bg-green-50'>
  33 | 				<CardContent className='flex items-center gap-3 pt-6'>
  34 | 					<CheckCircle className='h-5 w-5 text-green-600' />
  35 | 					<div>
  36 | 						<p className='font-medium text-green-800'>No Known Allergies</p>
  37 | 						<p className='text-green-700 text-sm'>No allergies or medical conditions reported</p>
  38 | 					</div>
  39 | 				</CardContent>
  40 | 			</Card>
  41 | 		);
  42 | 	}
  43 | 
  44 | 	const allergyList =
  45 | 		allergies
  46 | 			?.split(/[;,]/)
  47 | 			.map((a: string) => a.trim())
  48 | 			.filter((a: string) => a) || [];
  49 | 
  50 | 	const conditionList =
  51 | 		medicalConditions
  52 | 			?.split(/[;,]/)
  53 | 			.map((c: string) => c.trim())
  54 | 			.filter((c: string) => c) || [];
  55 | 
  56 | 	const getSeverityBadge = (allergy: string) => {
  57 | 		const lower = allergy.toLowerCase();
  58 | 		if (lower.includes("penicillin") || lower.includes("antibiotic")) {
  59 | 			return { variant: "destructive" as const, icon: AlertTriangle };
  60 | 		}
  61 | 		if (lower.includes("latex") || lower.includes("iodine")) {
  62 | 			return { variant: "default" as const, icon: AlertCircle };
  63 | 		}
  64 | 		return { variant: "secondary" as const, icon: Info };
  65 | 	};
  66 | 
  67 | 	return (
  68 | 		<Card>
  69 | 			<CardHeader>
  70 | 				<CardTitle className='flex items-center gap-2'>
  71 | 					<Bell className='h-5 w-5' />
  72 | 					Allergies & Medical Conditions
  73 | 				</CardTitle>
  74 | 			</CardHeader>
  75 | 			<CardContent className='space-y-6'>
  76 | 				{/* Allergies Section */}
  77 | 				{allergyList.length > 0 && (
  78 | 					<div>
  79 | 						<h4 className='mb-3 font-semibold text-red-600'>Allergies</h4>
  80 | 						<div className='flex flex-wrap gap-2'>
  81 | 							{allergyList.map((allergy: string | undefined, index: Key | null | undefined) => {
  82 | 								const { variant, icon: Icon } = getSeverityBadge(allergy ?? " ");
  83 | 								return (
  84 | 									<Badge
  85 | 										className='flex items-center gap-1'
  86 | 										key={index}
  87 | 										variant={variant}
  88 | 									>
  89 | 										<Icon className='h-3 w-3' />
  90 | 										{allergy}
  91 | 									</Badge>
  92 | 								);
  93 | 							})}
  94 | 						</div>
  95 | 					</div>
  96 | 				)}
  97 | 
  98 | 				{/* Medical Conditions Section */}
  99 | 				{conditionList.length > 0 && (
 100 | 					<div>
 101 | 						<h4 className='mb-3 font-semibold text-yellow-600'>Medical Conditions</h4>
 102 | 						<div className='flex flex-wrap gap-2'>
 103 | 							{conditionList.map(
 104 | 								(
 105 | 									condition:
 106 | 										| string
 107 | 										| number
 108 | 										| bigint
 109 | 										| boolean
 110 | 										| Iterable<ReactNode>
 111 | 										| ReactPortal
 112 | 										| Promise<
 113 | 												| string
 114 | 												| number
 115 | 												| bigint
 116 | 												| boolean
 117 | 												| ReactPortal
 118 | 												| Iterable<ReactNode>
 119 | 												| null
 120 | 												| undefined
 121 | 										  >
 122 | 										| null
 123 | 										| undefined,
 124 | 									index: Key | null | undefined
 125 | 								) => (
 126 | 									<Badge
 127 | 										className='flex items-center gap-1'
 128 | 										key={index}
 129 | 										variant='outline'
 130 | 									>
 131 | 										<AlertCircle className='h-3 w-3' />
 132 | 										{condition}
 133 | 									</Badge>
 134 | 								)
 135 | 							)}
 136 | 						</div>
 137 | 					</div>
 138 | 				)}
 139 | 
 140 | 				{/* Medical History */}
 141 | 				{patient?.medicalHistory && (
 142 | 					<div className='rounded-lg bg-muted p-4'>
 143 | 						<h4 className='mb-2 font-semibold text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Medical History</h4>
 144 | 						<p className='text-sm'>{patient.medicalHistory}</p>
 145 | 					</div>
 146 | 				)}
 147 | 			</CardContent>
 148 | 		</Card>
 149 | 	);
 150 | }
 151 | 
 152 | function AllergyListSkeleton() {
 153 | 	return (
 154 | 		<Card>
 155 | 			<CardHeader>
 156 | 				<Skeleton className='h-6 w-48' />
 157 | 			</CardHeader>
 158 | 			<CardContent className='space-y-4'>
 159 | 				<Skeleton className='h-4 w-24' />
 160 | 				<div className='flex gap-2'>
 161 | 					<Skeleton className='h-6 w-20' />
 162 | 					<Skeleton className='h-6 w-24' />
 163 | 					<Skeleton className='h-6 w-16' />
 164 | 				</div>
 165 | 				<Skeleton className='h-4 w-24' />
 166 | 				<div className='flex gap-2'>
 167 | 					<Skeleton className='h-6 w-28' />
 168 | 					<Skeleton className='h-6 w-20' />
 169 | 				</div>
 170 | 			</CardContent>
 171 | 		</Card>
 172 | 	);
 173 | }
 174 | 
 175 | // Helper component for check circle (not exported from lucide-react in this context)
 176 | function CheckCircle(props: React.SVGProps<SVGSVGElement>) {
 177 | 	return (
 178 | 		<svg
 179 | 			{...props}
 180 | 			fill='none'
 181 | 			stroke='currentColor'
 182 | 			strokeLinecap='round'
 183 | 			strokeLinejoin='round'
 184 | 			strokeWidth='2'
 185 | 			viewBox='0 0 24 24'
 186 | 		>
 187 | 			<title>check</title>
 188 | 			<path d='M22 11.08V12a10 10 0 1 1-5.93-9.14' />
 189 | 			<polyline points='22 4 12 14.01 9 11.01' />
 190 | 		</svg>
 191 | 	);
 192 | }
```

`components/patient/PatientBillingSummary.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // components/patient/PatientBillingSummary.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   4 | import { Skeleton } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/skeleton";
   5 | import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/table";
   6 | import { useQuery } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   7 | import { format } from "date-fns";
   8 | import { CreditCard, DollarSign, FileText, TrendingUp, Wallet } from "lucide-react";
   9 | 
  10 | import { toNumber } from "@/utils/decimal";
  11 | import { orpc } from "@/utils/orpc";
  12 | 
  13 | import type { PaymentType } from "../../schemas";
  14 | 
  15 | interface PatientBillingSummaryProps {
  16 | 	patientId: string;
  17 | }
  18 | 
  19 | export function PatientBillingSummary({ patientId }: PatientBillingSummaryProps) {
  20 | 	const { data: billingHistory, isLoading } = useQuery(
  21 | 		orpc.payment.getPatientHistory.queryOptions({
  22 | 			input: { patientId }
  23 | 		})
  24 | 	);
  25 | 
  26 | 	if (isLoading) {
  27 | 		return <BillingSummarySkeleton />;
  28 | 	}
  29 | 
  30 | 	const summary = billingHistory?.summary;
  31 | 	const payments = billingHistory?.payments || [];
  32 | 
  33 | 	const formatCurrency = (amount: number) => {
  34 | 		return new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
  35 | 			style: "currency",
  36 | 			currency: "USD"
  37 | 		}).format(amount);
  38 | 	};
  39 | 
  40 | 	const getStatusBadge = (status: string) => {
  41 | 		switch (status) {
  42 | 			case "PAID":
  43 | 				return <span className='rounded-full bg-green-100 px-2 py-0.5 text-green-700 text-xs'>Paid</span>;
  44 | 			case "PARTIAL":
  45 | 				return <span className='rounded-full bg-yellow-100 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs text-yellow-700'>Partial</span>;
  46 | 			case "REFUNDED":
  47 | 				return <span className='rounded-full bg-red-100 px-2 py-0.5 text-red-700 text-xs'>Refunded</span>;
  48 | 			default:
  49 | 				return <span className='rounded-full bg-gray-100 px-2 py-0.5 text-gray-700 text-xs'>Pending</span>;
  50 | 		}
  51 | 	};
  52 | 
  53 | 	return (
  54 | 		<div className='space-y-6'>
  55 | 			{/* Summary Cards */}
  56 | 			<div className='grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-4'>
  57 | 				<Card>
  58 | 					<CardContent className='pt-6'>
  59 | 						<div className='flex items-center justify-between'>
  60 | 							<div>
  61 | 								<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Total Paid</p>
  62 | 								<p className='font-bold text-2xl'>{formatCurrency(summary?.totalPaid || 0)}</p>
  63 | 							</div>
  64 | 							<DollarSign className='h-8 w-8 text-green-500' />
  65 | 						</div>
  66 | 					</CardContent>
  67 | 				</Card>
  68 | 
  69 | 				<Card>
  70 | 					<CardContent className='pt-6'>
  71 | 						<div className='flex items-center justify-between'>
  72 | 							<div>
  73 | 								<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Total Discount</p>
  74 | 								<p className='font-bold text-2xl'>{formatCurrency(summary?.totalDiscount || 0)}</p>
  75 | 							</div>
  76 | 							<TrendingUp className='h-8 w-8 text-blue-500' />
  77 | 						</div>
  78 | 					</CardContent>
  79 | 				</Card>
  80 | 
  81 | 				<Card>
  82 | 					<CardContent className='pt-6'>
  83 | 						<div className='flex items-center justify-between'>
  84 | 							<div>
  85 | 								<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Transactions</p>
  86 | 								<p className='font-bold text-2xl'>{summary?.totalTransactions || 0}</p>
  87 | 							</div>
  88 | 							<CreditCard className='h-8 w-8 text-purple-500' />
  89 | 						</div>
  90 | 					</CardContent>
  91 | 				</Card>
  92 | 
  93 | 				<Card>
  94 | 					<CardContent className='pt-6'>
  95 | 						<div className='flex items-center justify-between'>
  96 | 							<div>
  97 | 								<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Outstanding</p>
  98 | 								<p className='font-bold text-2xl text-yellow-600'>
  99 | 									{formatCurrency(summary?.totalPaid || 0)}
 100 | 								</p>
 101 | 							</div>
 102 | 							<Wallet className='h-8 w-8 text-yellow-500' />
 103 | 						</div>
 104 | 					</CardContent>
 105 | 				</Card>
 106 | 			</div>
 107 | 
 108 | 			{/* Payment History Table */}
 109 | 			<Card>
 110 | 				<CardHeader>
 111 | 					<CardTitle className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 112 | 						<FileText className='h-5 w-5' />
 113 | 						Payment History
 114 | 					</CardTitle>
 115 | 				</CardHeader>
 116 | 				<CardContent>
 117 | 					{payments.length === 0 ? (
 118 | 						<div className='py-8 text-center text-muted-foreground'>No payment records found</div>
 119 | 					) : (
 120 | 						<Table>
 121 | 							<TableHeader>
 122 | 								<TableRow>
 123 | 									<TableHead>Receipt #</TableHead>
 124 | 									<TableHead>Date</TableHead>
 125 | 									<TableHead>Amount</TableHead>
 126 | 									<TableHead>Discount</TableHead>
 127 | 									<TableHead>Method</TableHead>
 128 | 									<TableHead>Status</TableHead>
 129 | 								</TableRow>
 130 | 							</TableHeader>
 131 | 							<TableBody>
 132 | 								{payments.map((payment: PaymentType) => (
 133 | 									<TableRow key={payment.id}>
 134 | 										<TableCell className='font-mono text-sm'>{payment.receiptNumber}</TableCell>
 135 | 										<TableCell>
 136 | 											{payment.paymentDate
 137 | 												? format(new Date(payment.paymentDate), "MMM dd, yyyy")
 138 | 												: "—"}
 139 | 										</TableCell>
 140 | 										<TableCell>{formatCurrency(toNumber(payment.amountPaid))}</TableCell>
 141 | 										<TableCell>{formatCurrency(toNumber(payment.discount))}</TableCell>
 142 | 										<TableCell className='capitalize'>
 143 | 											{payment.paymentMethod?.toLowerCase()}
 144 | 										</TableCell>
 145 | 										<TableCell>{getStatusBadge(payment.status)}</TableCell>
 146 | 									</TableRow>
 147 | 								))}
 148 | 							</TableBody>
 149 | 						</Table>
 150 | 					)}
 151 | 				</CardContent>
 152 | 			</Card>
 153 | 		</div>
 154 | 	);
 155 | }
 156 | 
 157 | function BillingSummarySkeleton() {
 158 | 	return (
 159 | 		<div className='space-y-6'>
 160 | 			<div className='grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-4'>
 161 | 				{[1, 2, 3, 4].map(i => (
 162 | 					<Skeleton
 163 | 						className='h-28'
 164 | 						key={i}
 165 | 					/>
 166 | 				))}
 167 | 			</div>
 168 | 			<Skeleton className='h-64' />
 169 | 		</div>
 170 | 	);
 171 | }
```

`components/patient/PatientForm.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/forms/patient-form.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
   4 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   5 | import { Calendar as CalendarComponent } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/calendar";
   6 | import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   7 | import { Label } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/label";
   8 | import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/popover";
   9 | import { Separator } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/separator";
  10 | import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/tabs";
  11 | import { useMutation, useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
  12 | import { useSelector } from "@tanstack/react-store";
  13 | import { format } from "date-fns";
  14 | import { AlertCircle, Calendar as CalendarIcon, Heart, Phone, User, Users } from "lucide-react";
  15 | import * as React from "react";
  16 | import { toast } from "sonner";
  17 | import * as z from "zod";
  18 | import { cn } from
  19 | @clinic
  20 | /ui/bil / utils;
  21 | ";
  22 | 
  23 | import { calculateAge } from "@/utils";
  24 | import { orpc } from "@/utils/orpc";
  25 | 
  26 | import { useAppForm, useFormFields } from "../ui/tanstack-form";
  27 | 
  28 | // Schema for patient form - only user-editable fields
  29 | const patientFormSchema = z.object({
  30 | 	firstName: z.string().min(1, "First name is required"),
  31 | 	lastName: z.string().min(1, "Last name is required"),
  32 | 	email: z.email().or(z.literal("")),
  33 | 	phone: z.string(),
  34 | 	dateOfBirth: z.date(),
  35 | 	gender: z.enum(["MALE", "FEMALE"]),
  36 | 	maritalStatus: z.enum(["SINGLE", "MARRIED", "DIVORCED", "WIDOWED"]).or(z.undefined()),
  37 | 	address: z.string(),
  38 | 	emergencyContactName: z.string(),
  39 | 	emergencyContactNumber: z.string(),
  40 | 	relation: z.string(),
  41 | 	bloodGroup: z
  42 | 		.enum([
  43 | 			"A_POSITIVE",
  44 | 			"A_NEGATIVE",
  45 | 			"B_POSITIVE",
  46 | 			"B_NEGATIVE",
  47 | 			"O_POSITIVE",
  48 | 			"O_NEGATIVE",
  49 | 			"AB_POSITIVE",
  50 | 			"AB_NEGATIVE"
  51 | 		])
  52 | 		.or(z.undefined()),
  53 | 	role: z.literal("PATIENT"),
  54 | 	allergies: z.string(),
  55 | 	medicalConditions: z.string(),
  56 | 	medicalHistory: z.string(),
  57 | 	nutritionalStatus: z.enum(["NORMAL", "UNDERWEIGHT", "OVERWEIGHT", "OBESCE"]),
  58 | 	status: z.enum(["ACTIVE", "INACTIVE"]),
  59 | 	colorCode: z.string(),
  60 | 	image: z.string(),
  61 | 	guardianName: z.string(),
  62 | 	guardianPhone: z.string(),
  63 | 	guardianEmail: z.string(),
  64 | 	guardianRelation: z.string(),
  65 | 	isPrimaryGuardian: z.boolean()
  66 | });
  67 | 
  68 | type PatientFormValues = z.infer<typeof patientFormSchema>;
  69 | 
  70 | const genderOptions = [
  71 | 	{ value: "MALE", label: "Male" },
  72 | 	{ value: "FEMALE", label: "Female" }
  73 | ];
  74 | 
  75 | const maritalStatusOptions = [
  76 | 	{ value: "SINGLE", label: "Single" },
  77 | 	{ value: "MARRIED", label: "Married" },
  78 | 	{ value: "DIVORCED", label: "Divorced" },
  79 | 	{ value: "WIDOWED", label: "Widowed" }
  80 | ];
  81 | 
  82 | const bloodGroupOptions = [
  83 | 	{ value: "A_POSITIVE", label: "A+" },
  84 | 	{ value: "A_NEGATIVE", label: "A-" },
  85 | 	{ value: "B_POSITIVE", label: "B+" },
  86 | 	{ value: "B_NEGATIVE", label: "B-" },
  87 | 	{ value: "O_POSITIVE", label: "O+" },
  88 | 	{ value: "O_NEGATIVE", label: "O-" },
  89 | 	{ value: "AB_POSITIVE", label: "AB+" },
  90 | 	{ value: "AB_NEGATIVE", label: "AB-" }
  91 | ];
  92 | 
  93 | const statusOptions = [
  94 | 	{ value: "ACTIVE", label: "Active", color: "bg-green-500" },
  95 | 	{ value: "INACTIVE", label: "Inactive", color: "bg-gray-500" }
  96 | ];
  97 | 
  98 | type PatientFormProps = {
  99 | 	clinicId?: string;
 100 | 	initialData?: Partial<PatientFormValues> & {
 101 | 		id?: string;
 102 | 		userId?: string;
 103 | 		createdAt?: Date;
 104 | 		clinicId?: string;
 105 | 	};
 106 | 	onCancel?: () => void;
 107 | 	onSuccess?: () => void;
 108 | 	userId?: string;
 109 | };
 110 | 
 111 | export function PatientForm({ initialData, onSuccess, onCancel, userId }: PatientFormProps) {
 112 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
 113 | 
 114 | 	// Create patient mutation
 115 | 	const { mutate: createPatient, isPending: isCreatePending } = useMutation(
 116 | 		orpc.patient.create.mutationOptions({
 117 | 			onSuccess: () => {
 118 | 				toast.success("Patient created successfully");
 119 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 120 | 					queryKey: orpc.patient.key()
 121 | 				});
 122 | 				onSuccess?.();
 123 | 			},
 124 | 			onError(error: Error) {
 125 | 				console.error(error);
 126 | 				toast.error(error.message || "Failed to create patient");
 127 | 			}
 128 | 		})
 129 | 	);
 130 | 
 131 | 	// Update patient mutation
 132 | 	const { mutate: updatePatient, isPending: isUpdatePending } = useMutation(
 133 | 		orpc.patient.update.mutationOptions({
 134 | 			onSuccess: () => {
 135 | 				toast.success("Patient updated successfully");
 136 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 137 | 					queryKey: orpc.patient.key()
 138 | 				});
 139 | 				onSuccess?.();
 140 | 			},
 141 | 			onError(error: Error) {
 142 | 				console.error(error);
 143 | 				toast.error(error.message || "Failed to update patient");
 144 | 			}
 145 | 		})
 146 | 	);
 147 | 
 148 | 	const isEditing = !!initialData?.id;
 149 | 	const isPending = isCreatePending || isUpdatePending;
 150 | 
 151 | 	const form = useAppForm({
 152 | 		defaultValues: {
 153 | 			firstName: initialData?.firstName ?? "",
 154 | 			lastName: initialData?.lastName ?? "",
 155 | 			email: initialData?.email ?? "",
 156 | 			role: "PATIENT",
 157 | 			phone: initialData?.phone ?? "",
 158 | 			dateOfBirth: initialData?.dateOfBirth ? new Date(initialData.dateOfBirth) : new Date(),
 159 | 			gender: (initialData?.gender as "MALE" | "FEMALE") ?? "MALE",
 160 | 			maritalStatus: initialData?.maritalStatus,
 161 | 			address: initialData?.address ?? "",
 162 | 			emergencyContactName: initialData?.emergencyContactName ?? "",
 163 | 			emergencyContactNumber: initialData?.emergencyContactNumber ?? "",
 164 | 			relation: initialData?.relation ?? "",
 165 | 			bloodGroup:
 166 | 				(initialData?.bloodGroup as
 167 | 					| "A_POSITIVE"
 168 | 					| "A_NEGATIVE"
 169 | 					| "B_POSITIVE"
 170 | 					| "B_NEGATIVE"
 171 | 					| "O_POSITIVE"
 172 | 					| "O_NEGATIVE"
 173 | 					| "AB_POSITIVE"
 174 | 					| "AB_NEGATIVE"
 175 | 					| undefined) ?? undefined,
 176 | 			allergies: initialData?.allergies ?? "",
 177 | 			medicalConditions: initialData?.medicalConditions ?? "",
 178 | 			medicalHistory: initialData?.medicalHistory ?? "",
 179 | 			nutritionalStatus: initialData?.nutritionalStatus ?? "NORMAL",
 180 | 			status: (initialData?.status as "ACTIVE" | "INACTIVE") ?? "ACTIVE",
 181 | 			colorCode: initialData?.colorCode ?? "",
 182 | 			image: initialData?.image ?? "",
 183 | 			guardianName: initialData?.guardianName ?? "",
 184 | 			guardianPhone: initialData?.guardianPhone ?? "",
 185 | 			guardianEmail: initialData?.guardianEmail ?? "",
 186 | 			guardianRelation: initialData?.guardianRelation ?? "",
 187 | 			isPrimaryGuardian: initialData?.isPrimaryGuardian ?? false
 188 | 		},
 189 | 		validators: {
 190 | 			onSubmit: patientFormSchema
 191 | 		},
 192 | 		onSubmit: async ({ value }: { value: PatientFormValues }) => {
 193 | 			const patientData = {
 194 | 				id: initialData?.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
 195 | 				userId: userId ?? initialData?.userId ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
 196 | 				clinicId: initialData?.clinicId ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
 197 | 				firstName: value.firstName,
 198 | 				lastName: value.lastName,
 199 | 				email: value.email || null,
 200 | 				role: "patient" as const,
 201 | 				phone: value.phone || null,
 202 | 				dateOfBirth: value.dateOfBirth,
 203 | 				gender: value.gender,
 204 | 				maritalStatus: value.maritalStatus ?? null,
 205 | 				address: value.address || null,
 206 | 				emergencyContactName: value.emergencyContactName || null,
 207 | 				emergencyContactNumber: value.emergencyContactNumber || null,
 208 | 				relation: value.relation || null,
 209 | 				bloodGroup: value.bloodGroup ?? null,
 210 | 				allergies: value.allergies || null,
 211 | 				medicalConditions: value.medicalConditions || null,

 215 | 				colorCode: value.colorCode || null,
 216 | 				image: value.image || null,
 217 | 				isActive: value.status === "ACTIVE",
 218 | 				isDeleted: false,
 219 | 				updatedById: null,
 220 | 				createdAt: initialData?.createdAt ?? new Date(),
 221 | 				updatedAt: new Date()
 222 | 			};
 223 | 
 224 | 			if (isEditing) {
 225 | 				updatePatient(patientData);
 226 | 			} else {
 227 | 				createPatient(patientData);
 228 | 			}
 229 | 		}
 230 | 	});
 231 |

 601 | // Quick patient registration form (minimal fields)
 602 | type QuickPatientFormProps = {
 603 | 	clinicId?: string;
 604 | 	onCancel?: () => void;
 605 | 	onSuccess?: (patientId: string) => void;
 606 | };
 607 | 
 608 | export function QuickPatientForm({ onSuccess, onCancel }: QuickPatientFormProps) {
 609 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
 610 | 
 611 | 	const { mutate: createPatient, isPending } = useMutation(
 612 | 		orpc.patient.create.mutationOptions({
 613 | 			onSuccess: data => {
 614 | 				toast.success("Patient created successfully");
 615 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 616 | 					queryKey: orpc.patient.key()
 617 | 				});
 618 | 				onSuccess?.(data.id);
 619 | 			},
 620 | 			onError(error: Error) {
 621 | 				console.error(error);
 622 | 				toast.error(error.message || "Failed to create patient");
 623 | 			}
 624 | 		})
 625 | 	);
 626 | 
 627 | 	const form = useAppForm({
 628 | 		defaultValues: {
 629 | 			firstName: "",
 630 | 			lastName: "",
 631 | 			phone: "",
 632 | 			dateOfBirth: new Date(),
 633 | 			gender: "MALE" as "MALE" | "FEMALE"
 634 | 		},
 635 | 		validators: {
 636 | 			onSubmit: z.object({
 637 | 				firstName: z.string().min(1, "First name required"),
 638 | 				lastName: z.string().min(1, "Last name required"),
 639 | 				phone: z.string(),
 640 | 				dateOfBirth: z.date(),
 641 | 				gender: z.enum(["MALE", "FEMALE"])
 642 | 			})
 643 | 		},
 644 | 		onSubmit: async ({ value }) => {
 645 | 			createPatient({
 646 | 				firstName: value.firstName,
 647 | 				lastName: value.lastName,
 648 | 				phone: value.phone || null,
 649 | 				dateOfBirth: value.dateOfBirth,
 650 | 				gender: value.gender,
 651 | 				email: null,
 652 | 				maritalStatus: null,
 653 | 				address: null,
 654 | 				emergencyContactName: null,
 655 | 				emergencyContactNumber: null,
 656 | 				relation: null,
 657 | 				bloodGroup: null,
 658 | 				allergies: null,
 659 | 				medicalConditions: null,
 660 | 				medicalHistory: null,
 661 | 				nutritionalStatus: null,
 662 | 				colorCode: null,
 663 | 				image: null
 664 | 			});
 665 | 		}
 666 | 	});
 667 | 
 668 | 	const { FormTextField, FormSelectField } = useFormFields();
 669 | 
 670 | 	return (
 671 | 		<Card>
 672 | 			<CardHeader>
 673 | 				<CardTitle className='font-bold text-xl'>Quick Register Patient</CardTitle>
 674 | 			</CardHeader>
 675 | 			<CardContent>
 676 | 				<form.AppForm>
 677 | 					<form.Form className='space-y-4'>
 678 | 						<div className='grid grid-cols-2 gap-4'>
 679 | 							<FormTextField
 680 | 								label='First Name'
 681 | 								name='firstName'
 682 | 								placeholder='First name'
 683 | 								required
 684 | 							/>
 685 | 							<FormTextField
 686 | 								label='Last Name'
 687 | 								name='lastName'
 688 | 								placeholder='Last name'
 689 | 								required
 690 | 							/>
 691 | 						</div>
 692 | 
 693 | 						<form.AppField name='dateOfBirth'>
 694 | 							{field => (
 695 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 696 | 									<Label>Date of Birth</Label>
 697 | 									<Popover>
 698 | 										<PopoverTrigger asChild>
 699 | 											<Button
 700 | 												className='w-full justify-start'
 701 | 												variant='outline'
 702 | 											>
 703 | 												<CalendarIcon className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 704 | 												{field.state.value ? format(field.state.value, "PPP") : "Select date"}
 705 | 											</Button>
 706 | 										</PopoverTrigger>
 707 | 										<PopoverContent className='w-auto p-0'>
 708 | 											<CalendarComponent
 709 | 												mode='single'
 710 | 												onSelect={date => field.handleChange(date as Date)}
 711 | 												selected={field.state.value}
 712 | 											/>
 713 | 										</PopoverContent>
 714 | 									</Popover>
 715 | 								</div>
 716 | 							)}
 717 | 						</form.AppField>
 718 | 
 719 | 						<FormSelectField
 720 | 							label='Gender'
```
