
`components/patient/PatientGrowthTimeline.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // components/patient/PatientGrowthTimeline.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
   4 | import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   5 | import { Skeleton } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/skeleton";
   6 | import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/tabs";
   7 | import { useQuery } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   8 | import { format } from "date-fns";
   9 | import { Activity, Ruler, Weight } from "lucide-react";
  10 | import { CartesianGrid, Legend, Line, LineChart, ResponsiveContainer, Tooltip, XAxis, YAxis } from "recharts";
  11 | import type { ValueType } from "recharts/types/component/DefaultTooltipContent";
  12 | 
  13 | import type { GrowthRecordType } from "@/schemas";
  14 | import { toNumber } from "@/utils/decimal";
  15 | import { orpc } from "@/utils/orpc";
  16 | 
  17 | interface PatientGrowthTimelineProps {
  18 | 	patientId: string;
  19 | }
  20 | 
  21 | export function PatientGrowthTimeline({ patientId }: PatientGrowthTimelineProps) {
  22 | 	const { data: growthRecords, isLoading } = useQuery(
  23 | 		orpc.growth.list.queryOptions({
  24 | 			input: { patientId, page: 1, pageSize: 50 }
  25 | 		})
  26 | 	);
  27 | 
  28 | 	if (isLoading) {
  29 | 		return <GrowthTimelineSkeleton />;
  30 | 	}
  31 | 
  32 | 	const records = growthRecords?.records || [];
  33 | 
  34 | 	const chartData = records
  35 | 		.map((record: GrowthRecordType) => ({
  36 | 			date: format(new Date(record.date), "MMM dd, yyyy"),
  37 | 			ageMonths: record.ageMonths,
  38 | 			weight: toNumber(record.weight),
  39 | 			height: toNumber(record.height),
  40 | 			headCircumference: toNumber(record.headCircumference),
  41 | 			bmi: toNumber(record.bmi),
  42 | 			growthStatus: record.growthStatus
  43 | 		}))
  44 | 		.sort(
  45 | 			(a: { ageMonths: number | null }, b: { ageMonths: number | null }) =>
  46 | 				(a.ageMonths || 0) - (b.ageMonths || 0)
  47 | 		);
  48 | 
  49 | 	const latest = chartData[chartData.length - 1];
  50 | 	const first = chartData[0];
  51 | 
  52 | 	const calculateVelocity = () => {
  53 | 		if (!latest || !first || chartData.length < 2) return null;
  54 | 		const monthsDiff = (latest.ageMonths || 0) - (first.ageMonths || 0);
  55 | 		if (monthsDiff <= 0) return null;
  56 | 
  57 | 		return {
  58 | 			weightPerMonth: ((latest.weight || 0) - (first.weight || 0)) / monthsDiff,
  59 | 			heightPerMonth: ((latest.height || 0) - (first.height || 0)) / monthsDiff
  60 | 		};
  61 | 	};
  62 | 
  63 | 	const velocity = calculateVelocity();
  64 | 
  65 | 	return (
  66 | 		<div className='space-y-6'>
  67 | 			{/* Summary Cards */}
  68 | 			<div className='grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-4'>
  69 | 				<Card>
  70 | 					<CardContent className='pt-6'>
  71 | 						<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
  72 | 							<Weight className='h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground' />
  73 | 							<div>
  74 | 								<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Latest Weight</p>
  75 | 								<p className='font-bold text-2xl'>{latest?.weight || "—"} kg</p>
  76 | 							</div>
  77 | 						</div>
  78 | 					</CardContent>
  79 | 				</Card>
  80 | 
  81 | 				<Card>
  82 | 					<CardContent className='pt-6'>
  83 | 						<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
  84 | 							<Ruler className='h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground' />
  85 | 							<div>
  86 | 								<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Latest Height</p>
  87 | 								<p className='font-bold text-2xl'>{latest?.height || "—"} cm</p>
  88 | 							</div>
  89 | 						</div>
  90 | 					</CardContent>
  91 | 				</Card>
  92 | 
  93 | 				<Card>
  94 | 					<CardContent className='pt-6'>
  95 | 						<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
  96 | 							<Activity className='h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground' />
  97 | 							<div>
  98 | 								<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Growth Velocity</p>
  99 | 								<p className='font-bold text-2xl'>
 100 | 									{velocity?.weightPerMonth?.toFixed(2) || "—"} kg/mo
 101 | 								</p>
 102 | 							</div>
 103 | 						</div>
 104 | 					</CardContent>
 105 | 				</Card>
 106 | 
 107 | 				<Card>
 108 | 					<CardContent className='pt-6'>
 109 | 						<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 110 | 							<Activity className='h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground' />
 111 | 							<div>
 112 | 								<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Current Status</p>
 113 | 								<Badge
 114 | 									variant={
 115 | 										latest?.growthStatus === "NORMAL"
 116 | 											? "default"
 117 | 											: latest?.growthStatus === "UNDERWEIGHT"
 118 | 												? "destructive"
 119 | 												: "secondary"
 120 | 									}
 121 | 								>
 122 | 									{latest?.growthStatus?.toLowerCase() || "No data"}
 123 | 								</Badge>
 124 | 							</div>
 125 | 						</div>
 126 | 					</CardContent>
 127 | 				</Card>
 128 | 			</div>
 129 | 
 130 | 			{/* Growth Charts */}
 131 | 			<Card>
 132 | 				<CardHeader>
 133 | 					<CardTitle>Growth Tracking</CardTitle>
 134 | 				</CardHeader>
 135 | 				<CardContent>
 136 | 					<Tabs defaultValue='weight'>
 137 | 						<TabsList>
 138 | 							<TabsTrigger value='weight'>Weight (kg)</TabsTrigger>
 139 | 							<TabsTrigger value='height'>Height (cm)</TabsTrigger>
 140 | 							<TabsTrigger value='head'>Head Circumference (cm)</TabsTrigger>
 141 | 							<TabsTrigger value='bmi'>BMI</TabsTrigger>
 142 | 						</TabsList>
 143 | 
 144 | 						<TabsContent value='weight'>
 145 | 							<GrowthChart
 146 | 								color='#3b82f6'
 147 | 								data={chartData}
 148 | 								dataKey='weight'
 149 | 								unit='kg'
 150 | 							/>
 151 | 						</TabsContent>
 152 | 
 153 | 						<TabsContent value='height'>
 154 | 							<GrowthChart
 155 | 								color='#10b981'
 156 | 								data={chartData}
 157 | 								dataKey='height'
 158 | 								unit='cm'
 159 | 							/>
 160 | 						</TabsContent>
 161 | 
 162 | 						<TabsContent value='head'>
 163 | 							<GrowthChart
 164 | 								color='#8b5cf6'
 165 | 								data={chartData}
 166 | 								dataKey='headCircumference'
 167 | 								unit='cm'
 168 | 							/>
 169 | 						</TabsContent>
 170 | 
 171 | 						<TabsContent value='bmi'>
 172 | 							<GrowthChart
 173 | 								color='#f59e0b'
 174 | 								data={chartData}
 175 | 								dataKey='bmi'
 176 | 								unit='kg/m²'
 177 | 							/>
 178 | 						</TabsContent>
 179 | 					</Tabs>
 180 | 				</CardContent>
 181 | 			</Card>
 182 | 		</div>
 183 | 	);
 184 | }
 185 | 
 186 | interface GrowthChartProps {
 187 | 	data: Array<{
 188 | 		date: string;
 189 | 		[key: string]: string | number | null | undefined;
 190 | 	}>;
 191 | 	dataKey: string;
 192 | 	color: string;
 193 | 	unit: string;
 194 | }
 195 | 
 196 | function GrowthChart({ data, dataKey, color, unit }: GrowthChartProps) {
 197 | 	const hasData = data.some(item => item[dataKey] !== undefined && item[dataKey] !== null);
 198 | 
 199 | 	if (!hasData) {
 200 | 		return (
 201 | 			<div className='flex h-[300px] items-center justify-center text-muted-foreground'>
 202 | 				No growth data available
 203 | 			</div>
 204 | 		);
 205 | 	}
 206 | 
 207 | 	return (
 208 | 		<ResponsiveContainer
 209 | 			height={350}
 210 | 			width='100%'
 211 | 		>
 212 | 			<LineChart data={data}>
 213 | 				<CartesianGrid strokeDasharray='3 3' />
 214 | 				<XAxis dataKey='date' />
 215 | 				<YAxis label={{ value: unit, angle: -90, position: "insideLeft" }} />
 216 | 				<Tooltip
 217 | 					formatter={(value: ValueType | undefined) => [`${value} ${unit}`, dataKey]}
 218 | 					labelFormatter={label => `Date: ${label}`}
 219 | 				/>
 220 | 				<Legend />
 221 | 				<Line
 222 | 					activeDot={{ r: 6 }}
 223 | 					dataKey={dataKey}
 224 | 					dot={{ r: 4 }}
 225 | 					stroke={color}
 226 | 					strokeWidth={2}
 227 | 					type='monotone'
 228 | 				/>
 229 | 			</LineChart>
 230 | 		</ResponsiveContainer>
 231 | 	);
 232 | }
 233 | 
 234 | function GrowthTimelineSkeleton() {
 235 | 	return (
 236 | 		<div className='space-y-6'>
 237 | 			<div className='grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-4'>
 238 | 				{[1, 2, 3, 4].map(i => (
 239 | 					<Skeleton
 240 | 						className='h-28'
 241 | 						key={i}
 242 | 					/>
 243 | 				))}
 244 | 			</div>
 245 | 			<Skeleton className='h-[450px]' />
 246 | 		</div>
 247 | 	);
 248 | }

```

`components/patient/PatientImmunizations.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // components/patient/PatientImmunizations.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
   4 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   5 | import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   6 | import { Skeleton } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/skeleton";
   7 | import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/table";
   8 | import { useQuery } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   9 | import { format } from "date-fns";
  10 | import { Syringe } from "lucide-react";
  11 | 
  12 | import { orpc } from "@/utils/orpc";
  13 | 
  14 | import type { ImmunizationType } from "../../schemas";
  15 | 
  16 | interface PatientImmunizationsProps {
  17 | 	patientId: string;
  18 | }
  19 | 
  20 | export function PatientImmunizations({ patientId }: PatientImmunizationsProps) {
  21 | 	const { data: immunizations, isLoading } = useQuery(
  22 | 		orpc.immunization.listPatient.queryOptions({
  23 | 			input: { patientId, status: "COMPLETED", page: 1, pageSize: 50 }
  24 | 		})
  25 | 	);
  26 | 
  27 | 	const getStatusVariant = (status: string) => {
  28 | 		switch (status) {
  29 | 			case "COMPLETED":
  30 | 				return "default";
  31 | 			case "PENDING":
  32 | 				return "secondary";
  33 | 			case "OVERDUE":
  34 | 				return "destructive";
  35 | 			default:
  36 | 				return "outline";
  37 | 		}
  38 | 	};
  39 | 
  40 | 	if (isLoading) {
  41 | 		return <ImmunizationsSkeleton />;
  42 | 	}
  43 | 
  44 | 	if (!immunizations?.immunizations?.length) {
  45 | 		return (
  46 | 			<Card>
  47 | 				<CardContent className='flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-12'>
  48 | 					<Syringe className='mb-3 h-12 w-12 text-muted-foreground' />
  49 | 					<p className='text-muted-foreground'>No immunization records found</p>
  50 | 					<Button
  51 | 						className='mt-4'
  52 | 						variant='outline'
  53 | 					>
  54 | 						Record Immunization
  55 | 					</Button>
  56 | 				</CardContent>
  57 | 			</Card>
  58 | 		);
  59 | 	}
  60 | 
  61 | 	return (
  62 | 		<Card>
  63 | 			<CardHeader>
  64 | 				<CardTitle className='flex items-center gap-2'>
  65 | 					<Syringe className='h-5 w-5' />
  66 | 					Immunization History
  67 | 				</CardTitle>
  68 | 			</CardHeader>
  69 | 			<CardContent>
  70 | 				<Table>
  71 | 					<TableHeader>
  72 | 						<TableRow>
  73 | 							<TableHead>Vaccine</TableHead>
  74 | 							<TableHead>Date</TableHead>
  75 | 							<TableHead>Dose</TableHead>
  76 | 							<TableHead>Lot Number</TableHead>
  77 | 							<TableHead>Administered By</TableHead>
  78 | 							<TableHead>Status</TableHead>
  79 | 						</TableRow>
  80 | 					</TableHeader>
  81 | 					<TableBody>
  82 | 						{immunizations.immunizations.map((imm: ImmunizationType) => (
  83 | 							<TableRow key={imm.id}>
  84 | 								<TableCell className='font-medium'>{imm.vaccine}</TableCell>
  85 | 								<TableCell>{format(new Date(imm.date), "MMM dd, yyyy")}</TableCell>
  86 | 								<TableCell>{imm.dose || "—"}</TableCell>
  87 | 								<TableCell className='font-mono text-sm'>{imm.lotNumber || "—"}</TableCell>
  88 | 								<TableCell>{(imm.administeredBy as { name?: string })?.name || "—"}</TableCell>
  89 | 								<TableCell>
  90 | 									<Badge variant={getStatusVariant(imm.status || "PENDING")}>
  91 | 										{imm.status?.toLowerCase() || "pending"}
  92 | 									</Badge>
  93 | 								</TableCell>
  94 | 							</TableRow>
  95 | 						))}
  96 | 					</TableBody>
  97 | 				</Table>
  98 | 			</CardContent>
  99 | 		</Card>
 100 | 	);
 101 | }
 102 | 
 103 | function ImmunizationsSkeleton() {
 104 | 	return (
 105 | 		<Card>
 106 | 			<CardHeader>
 107 | 				<Skeleton className='h-6 w-40' />
 108 | 			</CardHeader>
 109 | 			<CardContent>
 110 | 				<div className='space-y-3'>
 111 | 					{[1, 2, 3].map(i => (
 112 | 						<Skeleton
 113 | 							className='h-12 w-full'
 114 | 							key={i}
 115 | 						/>
 116 | 					))}
 117 | 				</div>
 118 | 			</CardContent>
 119 | 		</Card>
 120 | 	);
 121 | }
```

`components/patient/PatientLabResults.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // components/patient/PatientLabResults.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
   4 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   5 | import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   6 | import { Skeleton } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/skeleton";
   7 | import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/table";
   8 | import { useQuery } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   9 | import { format } from "date-fns";
  10 | import { AlertCircle, AlertTriangle, CheckCircle, Eye, FlaskConical } from "lucide-react";
  11 | 
  12 | import type { LabTestType } from "@/schemas";
  13 | import { orpc } from "@/utils/orpc";
  14 | 
  15 | interface PatientLabResultsProps {
  16 | 	patientId: string;
  17 | }
  18 | 
  19 | interface LabTestWithResult extends LabTestType {
  20 | 	resultData?: {
  21 | 		value: string;
  22 | 		unit: string;
  23 | 		referenceRange: string;
  24 | 		abnormal: boolean;
  25 | 		critical: boolean;
  26 | 	};
  27 | }
  28 | 
  29 | export function PatientLabResults({ patientId }: PatientLabResultsProps) {
  30 | 	const { data: labTests, isLoading } = useQuery(
  31 | 		orpc.medicalRecord.listLabsByPatient.queryOptions({
  32 | 			input: { patientId }
  33 | 		})
  34 | 	);
  35 | 
  36 | 	const getStatusIcon = (status: string | null | undefined) => {
  37 | 		switch (status?.toLowerCase()) {
  38 | 			case "completed":
  39 | 				return <CheckCircle className='h-4 w-4 text-green-500' />;
  40 | 			case "pending":
  41 | 				return <AlertCircle className='h-4 w-4 text-yellow-500' />;
  42 | 			case "cancelled":
  43 | 				return <AlertTriangle className='h-4 w-4 text-red-500' />;
  44 | 			default:
  45 | 				return <FlaskConical className='h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground' />;
  46 | 		}
  47 | 	};
  48 | 
  49 | 	const parseResult = (result: string | null): LabTestWithResult["resultData"] => {
  50 | 		if (!result) return undefined;
  51 | 		try {
  52 | 			// If result is stored as JSON string
  53 | 			const parsed = JSON.parse(result);
  54 | 			return {
  55 | 				value: parsed.value || result,
  56 | 				unit: parsed.unit || "",
  57 | 				referenceRange: parsed.referenceRange || "",
  58 | 				abnormal: parsed.abnormal || false,
  59 | 				critical: parsed.critical || false
  60 | 			};
  61 | 		} catch {
  62 | 			// If result is plain text
  63 | 			return {
  64 | 				value: result,
  65 | 				unit: "",
  66 | 				referenceRange: "",
  67 | 				abnormal: false,
  68 | 				critical: false
  69 | 			};
  70 | 		}
  71 | 	};
  72 | 
  73 | 	const getResultInterpretation = (result: string | null) => {
  74 | 		const parsed = parseResult(result);
  75 | 		if (!parsed) return null;
  76 | 		if (parsed.critical) {
  77 | 			return { text: "Critical", variant: "destructive" as const };
  78 | 		}
  79 | 		if (parsed.abnormal) {
  80 | 			return { text: "Abnormal", variant: "outline" as const };
  81 | 		}
  82 | 		return { text: "Normal", variant: "secondary" as const };
  83 | 	};
  84 | 
  85 | 	if (isLoading) {
  86 | 		return <LabResultsSkeleton />;
  87 | 	}
  88 | 
  89 | 	const tests = (labTests as unknown as LabTestType[]) || [];
  90 | 
  91 | 	if (tests.length === 0) {
  92 | 		return (
  93 | 			<Card>
  94 | 				<CardContent className='flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-12'>
  95 | 					<FlaskConical className='mb-3 h-12 w-12 text-muted-foreground' />
  96 | 					<p className='text-muted-foreground'>No lab test records found</p>
  97 | 				</CardContent>
  98 | 			</Card>
  99 | 		);
 100 | 	}
 101 | 
 102 | 	return (
 103 | 		<Card>
 104 | 			<CardHeader>
 105 | 				<CardTitle className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 106 | 					<FlaskConical className='h-5 w-5' />
 107 | 					Lab Test Results
 108 | 				</CardTitle>
 109 | 			</CardHeader>
 110 | 			<CardContent>
 111 | 				<Table>
 112 | 					<TableHeader>
 113 | 						<TableRow>
 114 | 							<TableHead>Test Name</TableHead>
 115 | 							<TableHead>Ordered Date</TableHead>
 116 | 							<TableHead>Result</TableHead>
 117 | 							<TableHead>Status</TableHead>
 118 | 							<TableHead>Actions</TableHead>
 119 | 						</TableRow>
 120 | 					</TableHeader>
 121 | 					<TableBody>
 122 | 						{tests.map((test: LabTestType) => {
 123 | 							const resultData = parseResult(test.result);
 124 | 							const interpretation = getResultInterpretation(test.result);
 125 | 							return (
 126 | 								<TableRow key={test.id}>
 127 | 									<TableCell className='font-medium'>{test.testName || "—"}</TableCell>
 128 | 									<TableCell>
 129 | 										{test.testDate ? format(new Date(test.testDate), "MMM dd, yyyy") : "—"}
 130 | 									</TableCell>
 131 | 									<TableCell>
 132 | 										{resultData ? (
 133 | 											<div className='space-y-1'>
 134 | 												<span
 135 | 													className={
 136 | 														resultData.critical
 137 | 															? "font-bold text-red-600"
 138 | 															: resultData.abnormal
 139 | 																? "text-yellow-600"
 140 | 																: ""
 141 | 													}
 142 | 												>
 143 | 													{resultData.value} {resultData.unit}
 144 | 												</span>
 145 | 												{resultData.referenceRange && (
 146 | 													<div className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>
 147 | 														Ref: {resultData.referenceRange}
 148 | 													</div>
 149 | 												)}
 150 | 											</div>
 151 | 										) : (
 152 | 											<span className='text-muted-foreground'>—</span>
 153 | 										)}
 154 | 									</TableCell>
 155 | 									<TableCell>
 156 | 										<div className='flex items-center gap-1'>
 157 | 											{getStatusIcon(test.status)}
 158 | 											<span className='text-sm capitalize'>
 159 | 												{test.status?.toLowerCase() || "pending"}
 160 | 											</span>
 161 | 											{interpretation && (
 162 | 												<Badge
 163 | 													className='ml-2'
 164 | 													variant={interpretation.variant}
 165 | 												>
 166 | 													{interpretation.text}
 167 | 												</Badge>
 168 | 											)}
 169 | 										</div>
 170 | 									</TableCell>
 171 | 									<TableCell>
 172 | 										<Button
 173 | 											size='sm'
 174 | 											variant='ghost'
 175 | 										>
 176 | 											<Eye className='h-4 w-4' />
 177 | 										</Button>
 178 | 									</TableCell>
 179 | 								</TableRow>
 180 | 							);
 181 | 						})}
 182 | 					</TableBody>
 183 | 				</Table>
 184 | 			</CardContent>
 185 | 		</Card>
 186 | 	);
 187 | }
 188 | 
 189 | function LabResultsSkeleton() {
 190 | 	return (
 191 | 		<Card>
 192 | 			<CardHeader>
 193 | 				<Skeleton className='h-6 w-40' />
 194 | 			</CardHeader>
 195 | 			<CardContent>
 196 | 				<div className='space-y-3'>
 197 | 					{[1, 2, 3].map(i => (
 198 | 						<Skeleton
 199 | 							className='h-16 w-full'
 200 | 							key={i}
 201 | 						/>
 202 | 					))}
 203 | 				</div>
 204 | 			</CardContent>
 205 | 		</Card>
 206 | 	);
 207 | }

```

`components/patient/PatientMedicalSummary.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // components/patient/PatientMedicalSummary.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Card, CardContent } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   4 | import { Skeleton } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/skeleton";
   5 | import { useQuery } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   6 | import { format } from "date-fns";
   7 | import { Activity, Calendar, FileText, Pill, Syringe, Users } from "lucide-react";
   8 | 
   9 | import type { PrescriptionType } from "@/schemas";
  10 | import { orpc } from "@/utils/orpc";
  11 | 
  12 | interface PatientMedicalSummaryProps {
  13 | 	patientId: string;
  14 | }
  15 | 
  16 | export function PatientMedicalSummary({ patientId }: PatientMedicalSummaryProps) {
  17 | 	const { data: patient, isLoading: patientLoading } = useQuery(
  18 | 		orpc.patient.getById.queryOptions({
  19 | 			input: { id: patientId }
  20 | 		})
  21 | 	);
  22 | 
  23 | 	const { data: medicalRecordStats } = useQuery({
  24 | 		...orpc.medicalRecord.list.queryOptions({
  25 | 			input: { patientId, page: 1, pageSize: 1 }
  26 | 		}),
  27 | 		enabled: !!patientId
  28 | 	});
  29 | 
  30 | 	const { data: growthStats } = useQuery({
  31 | 		...orpc.growth.getStatistics.queryOptions({
  32 | 			input: { patientId }
  33 | 		}),
  34 | 		enabled: !!patientId
  35 | 	});
  36 | 
  37 | 	if (patientLoading) {
  38 | 		return <MedicalSummarySkeleton />;
  39 | 	}
  40 | 
  41 | 	const summaryItems = [
  42 | 		{
  43 | 			icon: <Users className='h-4 w-4' />,
  44 | 			label: "Guardians",
  45 | 			value: (patient?.guardians as unknown[])?.length || 0,
  46 | 			unit: "contact(s)"
  47 | 		},
  48 | 		{
  49 | 			icon: <FileText className='h-4 w-4' />,
  50 | 			label: "Medical Records",
  51 | 			value: medicalRecordStats?.pagination?.total || 0,
  52 | 			unit: "record(s)"
  53 | 		},
  54 | 		{
  55 | 			icon: <Syringe className='h-4 w-4' />,
  56 | 			label: "Immunizations",
  57 | 			value: patient?.immunizations?.length || 0,
  58 | 			unit: "given"
  59 | 		},
  60 | 		{
  61 | 			icon: <Pill className='h-4 w-4' />,
  62 | 			label: "Active Prescriptions",
  63 | 			value: (patient?.prescriptions as PrescriptionType[])?.filter(p => p.status === "active").length || 0,
  64 | 			unit: "active"
  65 | 		},
  66 | 		{
  67 | 			icon: <Activity className='h-4 w-4' />,
  68 | 			label: "Growth Records",
  69 | 			value: growthStats?.totalRecords || 0,
  70 | 			unit: "measurement(s)"
  71 | 		},
  72 | 		{
  73 | 			icon: <Calendar className='h-4 w-4' />,
  74 | 			label: "Last Visit",
  75 | 			value: patient?.appointments?.[0]?.appointmentDate
  76 | 				? format(new Date(patient.appointments[0].appointmentDate), "MMM dd, yyyy")
  77 | 				: "No visits",
  78 | 			unit: ""
  79 | 		}
  80 | 	];
  81 | 
  82 | 	return (
  83 | 		<div className='grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3'>
  84 | 			{summaryItems.map((item, index) => (
  85 | 				<Card key={index}>
  86 | 					<CardContent className='pt-6'>
  87 | 						<div className='flex items-center gap-3'>
  88 | 							<div className='flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-primary/10'>
  89 | 								{item.icon}
  90 | 							</div>
  91 | 							<div>
  92 | 								<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>{item.label}</p>
  93 | 								<p className='font-bold text-2xl'>{item.value}</p>
  94 | 								{item.unit && <p className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>{item.unit}</p>}
  95 | 							</div>
  96 | 						</div>
  97 | 					</CardContent>
  98 | 				</Card>
  99 | 			))}
 100 | 
 101 | 			{/* Blood Group Card */}
 102 | 			<Card>
 103 | 				<CardContent className='pt-6'>
 104 | 					<div className='flex items-center gap-3'>
 105 | 						<div className='flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-red-100'>
 106 | 							<span className='font-bold text-red-600 text-sm'>🩸</span>
 107 | 						</div>
 108 | 						<div>
 109 | 							<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Blood Group</p>
 110 | 							<p className='font-bold text-2xl'>
 111 | 								{patient?.bloodGroup?.replace("_", "+") || "Not recorded"}
 112 | 							</p>
 113 | 						</div>
 114 | 					</div>
 115 | 				</CardContent>
 116 | 			</Card>
 117 | 
 118 | 			{/* Last Updated Card */}
 119 | 			<Card>
 120 | 				<CardContent className='pt-6'>
 121 | 					<div className='flex items-center gap-3'>
 122 | 						<div className='flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-green-100'>
 123 | 							<Calendar className='h-5 w-5 text-green-600' />
 124 | 						</div>
 125 | 						<div>
 126 | 							<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>Last Updated</p>
 127 | 							<p className='font-semibold'>
 128 | 								{patient?.updatedAt ? format(new Date(patient.updatedAt), "MMM dd, yyyy") : "N/A"}
 129 | 							</p>
 130 | 						</div>
 131 | 					</div>
 132 | 				</CardContent>
 133 | 			</Card>
 134 | 		</div>
 135 | 	);
 136 | }
 137 | 
 138 | function MedicalSummarySkeleton() {
 139 | 	return (
 140 | 		<div className='grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3'>
 141 | 			{[1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8].map(i => (
 142 | 				<Skeleton
 143 | 					className='h-28'
 144 | 					key={i}
 145 | 				/>
 146 | 			))}
 147 | 		</div>
 148 | 	);
 149 | }

```

`components/patient/PatientPrescriptions.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // components/patient/PatientPrescriptions.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
   4 | import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   5 | import { Skeleton } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/skeleton";
   6 | import { useQuery } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   7 | import { format } from "date-fns";
   8 | import { AlertTriangle, Calendar, Clock, Pill } from "lucide-react";
   9 | 
  10 | import type { PrescribedItemType, PrescriptionType } from "@/schemas";
  11 | import { orpc } from "@/utils/orpc";
  12 | 
  13 | interface PatientPrescriptionsProps {
  14 | 	patientId: string;
  15 | }
  16 | 
  17 | export function PatientPrescriptions({ patientId }: PatientPrescriptionsProps) {
  18 | 	const { data: prescriptions, isLoading } = useQuery(
  19 | 		orpc.prescription.list.queryOptions({
  20 | 			input: { patientId, page: 1, pageSize: 20 }
  21 | 		})
  22 | 	);
  23 | 
  24 | 	const isExpiringSoon = (endDate: Date | null) => {
  25 | 		if (!endDate) return false;
  26 | 		const daysUntilExpiry = Math.ceil((new Date(endDate).getTime() - Date.now()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  27 | 		return daysUntilExpiry <= 7 && daysUntilExpiry > 0;
  28 | 	};
  29 | 
  30 | 	if (isLoading) {
  31 | 		return <PrescriptionsSkeleton />;
  32 | 	}
  33 | 
  34 | 	if (!prescriptions?.prescriptions?.length) {
  35 | 		return (
  36 | 			<Card>
  37 | 				<CardContent className='flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-12'>
  38 | 					<Pill className='mb-3 h-12 w-12 text-muted-foreground' />
  39 | 					<p className='text-muted-foreground'>No prescriptions found</p>
  40 | 				</CardContent>
  41 | 			</Card>
  42 | 		);
  43 | 	}
  44 | 
  45 | 	return (
  46 | 		<Card>
  47 | 			<CardHeader>
  48 | 				<CardTitle className='flex items-center gap-2'>
  49 | 					<Pill className='h-5 w-5' />
  50 | 					Active & Recent Prescriptions
  51 | 				</CardTitle>
  52 | 			</CardHeader>
  53 | 			<CardContent>
  54 | 				<div className='space-y-4'>
  55 | 					{prescriptions.prescriptions.map((prescription: PrescriptionType) => (
  56 | 						<div
  57 | 							className='rounded-lg border p-4 transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50'
  58 | 							key={prescription.id}
  59 | 						>
  60 | 							<div className='flex flex-col gap-3 sm:flex-row sm:items-start sm:justify-between'>
  61 | 								<div className='flex-1'>
  62 | 									<div className='flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2'>
  63 | 										<h4 className='font-semibold'>
  64 | 											{prescription.medicationName || "Medication Prescription"}
  65 | 										</h4>
  66 | 										<Badge variant={prescription.status === "active" ? "default" : "secondary"}>
  67 | 											{prescription.status}
  68 | 										</Badge>
  69 | 										{isExpiringSoon(prescription.endDate) && (
  70 | 											<Badge
  71 | 												className='gap-1'
  72 | 												variant='destructive'
  73 | 											>
  74 | 												<AlertTriangle className='h-3 w-3' />
  75 | 												Expiring Soon
  76 | 											</Badge>
  77 | 										)}
  78 | 									</div>
  79 | 
  80 | 									{prescription.prescribedItems && prescription.prescribedItems.length > 0 && (
  81 | 										<div className='mt-2 space-y-1'>
  82 | 											{(prescription.prescribedItems as PrescribedItemType[]).map(item => (
  83 | 												<div
  84 | 													className='text-sm'
  85 | 													key={item.id}
  86 | 												>
  87 | 													<span className='font-medium'>
  88 | 														{item.drugName || (item.drug as { name?: string })?.name}
  89 | 													</span>
  90 | 													<span className='text-muted-foreground'>
  91 | 														{" "}
  92 | 														- {item.dosageValue} {item.dosageUnit}
  93 | 													</span>
  94 | 													<span className='text-muted-foreground'> • {item.frequency}</span>
  95 | 												</div>
  96 | 											))}
  97 | 										</div>
  98 | 									)}
  99 | 
 100 | 									{prescription.instructions && (
 101 | 										<p className='mt-2 text-muted-foreground text-sm'>
 102 | 											{prescription.instructions}
 103 | 										</p>
 104 | 									)}
 105 | 								</div>
 106 | 
 107 | 								<div className='flex flex-col items-start gap-1 text-muted-foreground text-xs sm:items-end'>
 108 | 									<div className='flex items-center gap-1'>
 109 | 										<Calendar className='h-3 w-3' />
 110 | 										<span>Issued: {format(new Date(prescription.issuedDate), "MMM dd, yyyy")}</span>
 111 | 									</div>
 112 | 									{prescription.endDate && (
 113 | 										<div className='flex items-center gap-1'>
 114 | 											<Clock className='h-3 w-3' />
 115 | 											<span>
 116 | 												Expires: {format(new Date(prescription.endDate), "MMM dd, yyyy")}
 117 | 											</span>
 118 | 										</div>
 119 | 									)}
 120 | 								</div>
 121 | 							</div>
 122 | 						</div>
 123 | 					))}
 124 | 				</div>
 125 | 			</CardContent>
 126 | 		</Card>
 127 | 	);
 128 | }
 129 | 
 130 | function PrescriptionsSkeleton() {
 131 | 	return (
 132 | 		<Card>
 133 | 			<CardHeader>
 134 | 				<Skeleton className='h-6 w-40' />
 135 | 			</CardHeader>
 136 | 			<CardContent className='space-y-4'>
 137 | 				{[1, 2, 3].map(i => (
 138 | 					<Skeleton
 139 | 						className='h-32 w-full'
 140 | 						key={i}
 141 | 					/>
 142 | 				))}
 143 | 			</CardContent>
 144 | 		</Card>
 145 | 	);
 146 | }

```

`components/patient/PatientVitalHistory.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // components/patient/PatientVitalHistory.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   4 | import { Skeleton } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/skeleton";
   5 | import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/tabs";
   6 | import { useQuery } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   7 | import { format } from "date-fns";
   8 | import { Activity, Heart, Thermometer, Wind } from "lucide-react";
   9 | import { CartesianGrid, Line, LineChart, ResponsiveContainer, Tooltip, XAxis, YAxis } from "recharts";
  10 | import type { ValueType } from "recharts/types/component/DefaultTooltipContent";
  11 | 
  12 | import type { VitalSignsType } from "@/schemas";
  13 | import { orpc } from "@/utils/orpc";
  14 | 
  15 | interface PatientVitalHistoryProps {
  16 | 	patientId: string;
  17 | }
  18 | 
  19 | export function PatientVitalHistory({ patientId }: PatientVitalHistoryProps) {
  20 | 	const { data: vitalSigns, isLoading } = useQuery(
  21 | 		orpc.vitalSigns.listByPatient.queryOptions({
  22 | 			input: { patientId, page: 1, pageSize: 50 }
  23 | 		})
  24 | 	);
  25 | 
  26 | 	if (isLoading) {
  27 | 		return <VitalHistorySkeleton />;
  28 | 	}
  29 | 
  30 | 	const vitals = (vitalSigns?.vitalSigns as VitalSignsType[]) || [];
  31 | 
  32 | 	const chartData = vitals
  33 | 		.map(v => ({
  34 | 			date: format(new Date(v.recordedAt), "MMM dd"),
  35 | 			temperature: v.bodyTemperature,
  36 | 			heartRate: v.heartRate,
  37 | 			respiratoryRate: v.respiratoryRate,
  38 | 			oxygenSaturation: v.oxygenSaturation,
  39 | 			systolic: v.systolic,
  40 | 			diastolic: v.diastolic
  41 | 		}))
  42 | 		.reverse();
  43 | 
  44 | 	const latest = vitals[0];
  45 | 
  46 | 	return (
  47 | 		<div className='space-y-6'>
  48 | 			{/* Latest Vital Signs Cards */}
  49 | 			<div className='grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-5'>
  50 | 				<VitalCard
  51 | 					icon={<Thermometer className='h-4 w-4' />}
  52 | 					label='Temperature'
  53 | 					unit='°C'
  54 | 					value={latest?.bodyTemperature ? `${latest.bodyTemperature}°C` : "—"}
  55 | 				/>
  56 | 				<VitalCard
  57 | 					icon={<Heart className='h-4 w-4' />}
  58 | 					label='Heart Rate'
  59 | 					unit='bpm'
  60 | 					value={latest?.heartRate ? `${latest.heartRate}` : "—"}
  61 | 				/>
  62 | 				<VitalCard
  63 | 					icon={<Wind className='h-4 w-4' />}
  64 | 					label='Respiratory Rate'
  65 | 					unit='/min'
  66 | 					value={latest?.respiratoryRate ? `${latest.respiratoryRate}` : "—"}
  67 | 				/>
  68 | 				<VitalCard
  69 | 					icon={<Activity className='h-4 w-4' />}
  70 | 					label='O₂ Saturation'
  71 | 					unit='%'
  72 | 					value={latest?.oxygenSaturation ? `${latest.oxygenSaturation}%` : "—"}
  73 | 				/>
  74 | 				<VitalCard
  75 | 					icon={<Activity className='h-4 w-4' />}
  76 | 					label='Blood Pressure'
  77 | 					unit='mmHg'
  78 | 					value={latest?.systolic && latest?.diastolic ? `${latest.systolic}/${latest.diastolic}` : "—"}
  79 | 				/>
  80 | 			</div>
  81 | 
  82 | 			{/* Trend Charts */}
  83 | 			<Card>
  84 | 				<CardHeader>
  85 | 					<CardTitle>Vital Signs Trends</CardTitle>
  86 | 				</CardHeader>
  87 | 				<CardContent>
  88 | 					<Tabs defaultValue='heartRate'>
  89 | 						<TabsList>
  90 | 							<TabsTrigger value='heartRate'>Heart Rate</TabsTrigger>
  91 | 							<TabsTrigger value='temperature'>Temperature</TabsTrigger>
  92 | 							<TabsTrigger value='respiratory'>Respiratory Rate</TabsTrigger>
  93 | 							<TabsTrigger value='oxygen'>O₂ Saturation</TabsTrigger>
  94 | 						</TabsList>
  95 | 
  96 | 						<TabsContent value='heartRate'>
  97 | 							<VitalChart
  98 | 								color='#ef4444'
  99 | 								data={chartData}
 100 | 								dataKey='heartRate'
 101 | 								unit='bpm'
 102 | 							/>
 103 | 						</TabsContent>
 104 | 
 105 | 						<TabsContent value='temperature'>
 106 | 							<VitalChart
 107 | 								color='#3b82f6'
 108 | 								data={chartData}
 109 | 								dataKey='temperature'
 110 | 								unit='°C'
 111 | 							/>
 112 | 						</TabsContent>
 113 | 
 114 | 						<TabsContent value='respiratory'>
 115 | 							<VitalChart
 116 | 								color='#10b981'
 117 | 								data={chartData}
 118 | 								dataKey='respiratoryRate'
 119 | 								unit='/min'
 120 | 							/>
 121 | 						</TabsContent>
 122 | 
 123 | 						<TabsContent value='oxygen'>
 124 | 							<VitalChart
 125 | 								color='#8b5cf6'
 126 | 								data={chartData}
 127 | 								dataKey='oxygenSaturation'
 128 | 								unit='%'
 129 | 							/>
 130 | 						</TabsContent>
 131 | 					</Tabs>
 132 | 				</CardContent>
 133 | 			</Card>
 134 | 		</div>
 135 | 	);
 136 | }
 137 | 
 138 | interface VitalCardProps {
 139 | 	icon: React.ReactNode;
 140 | 	label: string;
 141 | 	value: string;
 142 | 	unit: string;
 143 | }
 144 | 
 145 | function VitalCard({ icon, label, value, unit }: VitalCardProps) {
 146 | 	return (
 147 | 		<Card>
 148 | 			<CardContent className='pt-6'>
 149 | 				<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 150 | 					{icon}
 151 | 					<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>{label}</p>
 152 | 				</div>
 153 | 				<p className='mt-2 font-bold text-2xl'>{value}</p>
 154 | 				<p className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>{unit}</p>
 155 | 			</CardContent>
 156 | 		</Card>
 157 | 	);
 158 | }
 159 | 
 160 | interface VitalChartProps {
 161 | 	data: Array<{
 162 | 		date: string;
 163 | 		[key: string]: string | number | null | undefined;
 164 | 	}>;
 165 | 	dataKey: string;
 166 | 	color: string;
 167 | 	unit: string;
 168 | }
 169 | 
 170 | function VitalChart({ data, dataKey, color, unit }: VitalChartProps) {
 171 | 	const hasData = data.some(item => item[dataKey] !== undefined && item[dataKey] !== null);
 172 | 
 173 | 	if (!hasData) {
 174 | 		return (
 175 | 			<div className='flex h-75 items-center justify-center text-muted-foreground'>
 176 | 				No data available for this metric
 177 | 			</div>
 178 | 		);
 179 | 	}
 180 | 
 181 | 	return (
 182 | 		<ResponsiveContainer
 183 | 			height={300}
 184 | 			width='100%'
 185 | 		>
 186 | 			<LineChart data={data}>
 187 | 				<CartesianGrid strokeDasharray='3 3' />
 188 | 				<XAxis dataKey='date' />
 189 | 				<YAxis label={{ value: unit, angle: -90, position: "insideLeft" }} />
 190 | 				<Tooltip
 191 | 					formatter={(value: ValueType | undefined) => [`${value} ${unit}`, dataKey]}
 192 | 					labelFormatter={label => `Date: ${label}`}
 193 | 				/>
 194 | 				<Line
 195 | 					activeDot={{ r: 6 }}
 196 | 					dataKey={dataKey}
 197 | 					dot={{ r: 3 }}
 198 | 					stroke={color}
 199 | 					strokeWidth={2}
 200 | 					type='monotone'
 201 | 				/>
 202 | 			</LineChart>
 203 | 		</ResponsiveContainer>
 204 | 	);
 205 | }
 206 | 
 207 | function VitalHistorySkeleton() {
 208 | 	return (
 209 | 		<div className='space-y-6'>
 210 | 			<div className='grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-5'>
 211 | 				{[1, 2, 3, 4, 5].map(i => (
 212 | 					<Skeleton
 213 | 						className='h-28'
 214 | 						key={i}
 215 | 					/>
 216 | 				))}
 217 | 			</div>
 218 | 			<Skeleton className='h-100' />
 219 | 		</div>
 220 | 	);
 221 | }

```

`components/patient/columns.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/patients/columns.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { DataTableColumnHeader } from "@clinic/ui/components/data-table/DataTableColumnHeader";
   4 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
   5 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   6 | import { Checkbox } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/checkbox";
   7 | import {
   8 | 	DropdownMenu,
   9 | 	DropdownMenuContent,
  10 | 	DropdownMenuItem,
  11 | 	DropdownMenuSeparator,
  12 | 	DropdownMenuTrigger
  13 | } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/dropdown-menu";
  14 | import { DotsHorizontalIcon } from "@radix-ui/react-icons";
  15 | import { useRouter } from "@tanstack/react-router";
  16 | import type { ColumnDef } from "@tanstack/react-table";
  17 | 
  18 | export interface Patient {
  19 | 	id: string;
  20 | 	firstName: string;
  21 | 	lastName: string;
  22 | 	dateOfBirth: string;
  23 | 	gender: string;
  24 | 	parentName?: string;
  25 | 	phone?: string;
  26 | 	status?: string;
  27 | 	createdAt: Date;
  28 | }
  29 | 
  30 | function PatientRowActions({ patient }: { patient: Patient }) {
  31 | 	const router = useRouter();
  32 | 	return (
  33 | 		<DropdownMenu>
  34 | 			<DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
  35 | 				<Button
  36 | 					className='flex h-8 w-8 p-0 data-[state=open]:bg-muted'
  37 | 					variant='ghost'
  38 | 				>
  39 | 					<DotsHorizontalIcon className='h-4 w-4' />
  40 | 					<span className='sr-only'>Open menu</span>
  41 | 				</Button>
  42 | 			</DropdownMenuTrigger>
  43 | 			<DropdownMenuContent
  44 | 				align='end'
  45 | 				className='w-40'
  46 | 			>
  47 | 				<DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => router.navigate({ to: `/dashboard/patients/${patient.id}` })}>
  48 | 					View profile
  49 | 				</DropdownMenuItem>
  50 | 				<DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => router.navigate({ to: "/dashboard/patients/edit" })}>
  51 | 					Edit patient
  52 | 				</DropdownMenuItem>
  53 | 				<DropdownMenuSeparator />
  54 | 				<DropdownMenuItem
  55 | 					onClick={() =>
  56 | 						router.navigate({
  57 | 							to: "/dashboard/immunizations",
  58 | 							search: { patientId: patient.id }
  59 | 						})
  60 | 					}
  61 | 				>
  62 | 					View immunizations
  63 | 				</DropdownMenuItem>
  64 | 				<DropdownMenuItem
  65 | 					onClick={() =>
  66 | 						router.navigate({
  67 | 							to: "/dashboard/encounters",
  68 | 							search: { patientId: patient.id }
  69 | 						})
  70 | 					}
  71 | 				>
  72 | 					View encounters
  73 | 				</DropdownMenuItem>
  74 | 			</DropdownMenuContent>
  75 | 		</DropdownMenu>
  76 | 	);
  77 | }
  78 | 
  79 | function calculateAge(dob: string): string {
  80 | 	const ms = Date.now() - new Date(dob).getTime();
  81 | 	const months = Math.floor(ms / (30.44 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000));
  82 | 	if (months < 24) return `${months}mo`;
  83 | 	return `${Math.floor(months / 12)}yr`;
  84 | }
  85 | 
  86 | export const patientColumns: ColumnDef<Patient>[] = [
  87 | 	{
  88 | 		id: "select",
  89 | 		header: ({ table }) => (
  90 | 			<Checkbox
  91 | 				aria-label='Select all'
  92 | 				checked={table.getIsAllPageRowsSelected() || (table.getIsSomePageRowsSelected() && "indeterminate")}
  93 | 				className='translate-y-0.5'
  94 | 				onCheckedChange={value => table.toggleAllPageRowsSelected(!!value)}
  95 | 			/>
  96 | 		),
  97 | 		cell: ({ row }) => (
  98 | 			<Checkbox
  99 | 				aria-label='Select row'
 100 | 				checked={row.getIsSelected()}
 101 | 				className='translate-y-[2px]'
 102 | 				onCheckedChange={value => row.toggleSelected(!!value)}
 103 | 			/>
 104 | 		),
 105 | 		enableSorting: false,
 106 | 		enableHiding: false
 107 | 	},
 108 | 	{
 109 | 		id: "name",
 110 | 		accessorFn: row => `${row.firstName} ${row.lastName}`,
 111 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
 112 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
 113 | 				column={column}
 114 | 				title='Patient'
 115 | 			/>
 116 | 		),
 117 | 		cell: ({ row }) => (
 118 | 			<div className='font-medium'>
 119 | 				{row.original.firstName} {row.original.lastName}
 120 | 			</div>
 121 | 		),
 122 | 		filterFn: (row, _id, value) => {
 123 | 			const name = `${row.original.firstName} ${row.original.lastName}`;
 124 | 			return name.toLowerCase().includes(value.toLowerCase());
 125 | 		}
 126 | 	},
 127 | 	{
 128 | 		accessorKey: "dateOfBirth",
 129 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
 130 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
 131 | 				column={column}
 132 | 				title='Age'
 133 | 			/>
 134 | 		),
 135 | 		cell: ({ row }) => <div>{calculateAge(row.getValue("dateOfBirth"))}</div>
 136 | 	},
 137 | 	{
 138 | 		accessorKey: "gender",
 139 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
 140 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
 141 | 				column={column}
 142 | 				title='Gender'
 143 | 			/>
 144 | 		),
 145 | 		cell: ({ row }) => <div className='capitalize'>{(row.getValue("gender") as string)?.toLowerCase()}</div>
 146 | 	},
 147 | 	{
 148 | 		accessorKey: "parentName",
 149 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
 150 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
 151 | 				column={column}
 152 | 				title='Parent / Guardian'
 153 | 			/>
 154 | 		),
 155 | 		cell: ({ row }) => <div className='text-muted-foreground'>{row.getValue("parentName") || "—"}</div>
 156 | 	},
 157 | 	{
 158 | 		accessorKey: "phone",
 159 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
 160 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
 161 | 				column={column}
 162 | 				title='Contact'
 163 | 			/>
 164 | 		),
 165 | 		cell: ({ row }) => <div>{row.getValue("phone") || "—"}</div>
 166 | 	},
 167 | 	{
 168 | 		accessorKey: "status",
 169 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
 170 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
 171 | 				column={column}
 172 | 				title='Status'
 173 | 			/>
 174 | 		),
 175 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 176 | 			const status = (row.getValue("status") as string) || "ACTIVE";
 177 | 			return (
 178 | 				<Badge variant={status === "ACTIVE" ? "default" : "secondary"}>
 179 | 					{status.charAt(0) + status.slice(1).toLowerCase()}
 180 | 				</Badge>
 181 | 			);
 182 | 		}
 183 | 	},
 184 | 	{
 185 | 		id: "actions",
 186 | 		cell: ({ row }) => <PatientRowActions patient={row.original} />
 187 | 	}
 188 | ];
 189 | 
 190 | export const columns = patientColumns;

```

`components/patient/patient-filters.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/patients/patient-filters.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   4 | import {
   5 | 	DropdownMenu,
   6 | 	DropdownMenuCheckboxItem,
   7 | 	DropdownMenuContent,
   8 | 	DropdownMenuLabel,
   9 | 	DropdownMenuSeparator,
  10 | 	DropdownMenuTrigger
  11 | } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/dropdown-menu";
  12 | import { SlidersHorizontal } from "lucide-react";
  13 | 
  14 | interface PatientFiltersProps {
  15 | 	filters: Record<string, unknown>;
  16 | 	setFilters: (filters: Record<string, unknown>) => void;
  17 | }
  18 | 
  19 | const genderOptions = [
  20 | 	{ label: "Male", value: "MALE" },
  21 | 	{ label: "Female", value: "FEMALE" }
  22 | ];
  23 | 
  24 | const statusOptions = [
  25 | 	{ label: "Active", value: "ACTIVE" },
  26 | 	{ label: "Inactive", value: "INACTIVE" }
  27 | ];
  28 | 
  29 | export function PatientFilters({ filters, setFilters }: PatientFiltersProps) {
  30 | 	const toggleFilter = (key: string, value: string) => {
  31 | 		const current = (filters[key] as string[]) || [];
  32 | 		const updated = current.includes(value) ? current.filter(v => v !== value) : [...current, value];
  33 | 		setFilters({ ...filters, [key]: updated.length ? updated : undefined });
  34 | 	};
  35 | 
  36 | 	const isChecked = (key: string, value: string) => {
  37 | 		const current = (filters[key] as string[]) || [];
  38 | 		return current.includes(value);
  39 | 	};
  40 | 
  41 | 	return (
  42 | 		<DropdownMenu>
  43 | 			<DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
  44 | 				<Button
  45 | 					className='gap-2'
  46 | 					variant='outline'
  47 | 				>
  48 | 					<SlidersHorizontal className='h-4 w-4' />
  49 | 					Filters
  50 | 				</Button>
  51 | 			</DropdownMenuTrigger>
  52 | 			<DropdownMenuContent
  53 | 				align='end'
  54 | 				className='w-48'
  55 | 			>
  56 | 				<DropdownMenuLabel>Gender</DropdownMenuLabel>
  57 | 				{genderOptions.map(opt => (
  58 | 					<DropdownMenuCheckboxItem
  59 | 						checked={isChecked("gender", opt.value)}
  60 | 						key={opt.value}
  61 | 						onCheckedChange={() => toggleFilter("gender", opt.value)}
  62 | 					>
  63 | 						{opt.label}
  64 | 					</DropdownMenuCheckboxItem>
  65 | 				))}
  66 | 				<DropdownMenuSeparator />
  67 | 				<DropdownMenuLabel>Status</DropdownMenuLabel>
  68 | 				{statusOptions.map(opt => (
  69 | 					<DropdownMenuCheckboxItem
  70 | 						checked={isChecked("status", opt.value)}
  71 | 						key={opt.value}
  72 | 						onCheckedChange={() => toggleFilter("status", opt.value)}
  73 | 					>
  74 | 						{opt.label}
  75 | 					</DropdownMenuCheckboxItem>
  76 | 				))}
  77 | 			</DropdownMenuContent>
  78 | 		</DropdownMenu>
  79 | 	);
  80 | }

```

`components/patient/patient-table.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // components/table/patients-table.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import {
   4 | 	AlertDialog,
   5 | 	AlertDialogAction,
   6 | 	AlertDialogCancel,
   7 | 	AlertDialogContent,
   8 | 	AlertDialogDescription,
   9 | 	AlertDialogFooter,
  10 | 	AlertDialogHeader,
  11 | 	AlertDialogTitle,
  12 | 	AlertDialogTrigger
  13 | } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/alert-dialog";
  14 | import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/avatar";
  15 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
  16 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
  17 | import { compareItems, type RankingInfo, rankItem } from "@tanstack/match-sorter-utils";
  18 | import { useMutation, useQuery, useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
  19 | import { Link, useNavigate } from "@tanstack/react-router";
  20 | import {
  21 | 	type Column,
  22 | 	type ColumnDef,
  23 | 	type ColumnFiltersState,
  24 | 	type FilterFn,
  25 | 	flexRender,
  26 | 	getCoreRowModel,
  27 | 	getFilteredRowModel,
  28 | 	getPaginationRowModel,
  29 | 	getSortedRowModel,
  30 | 	type SortingFn,
  31 | 	sortingFns,
  32 | 	useReactTable
  33 | } from "@tanstack/react-table";
  34 | import { format } from "date-fns";
  35 | import { EyeIcon, PencilIcon, PlusIcon, Trash2 } from "lucide-react";
  36 | import React, { useCallback } from "react";
  37 | import { toast } from "sonner";
  38 | 
  39 | import { orpc } from "#/orpc/client";
  40 | import { calculateAge, getInitials } from "@/utils";
  41 | 
  42 | import type { PatientType } from "../../schemas";
  43 | 
  44 | // Define a custom fuzzy filter function
  45 | const fuzzyFilter: FilterFn<PatientType> = (row, columnId, value, addMeta) => {
  46 | 	const itemRank = rankItem(row.getValue(columnId), value);
  47 | 	addMeta({ itemRank });
  48 | 	return itemRank.passed;
  49 | };
  50 | 
  51 | // Define a custom fuzzy sort function
  52 | const fuzzySort: SortingFn<PatientType> = (rowA, rowB, columnId) => {
  53 | 	let dir = 0;
  54 | 	const metaA = rowA.columnFiltersMeta[columnId] as { itemRank?: RankingInfo } | undefined;
  55 | 	const metaB = rowB.columnFiltersMeta[columnId] as { itemRank?: RankingInfo } | undefined;
  56 | 	if (metaA && metaB) {
  57 | 		const itemRankA = metaA.itemRank;
  58 | 		const itemRankB = metaB.itemRank;
  59 | 		if (itemRankA && itemRankB) {
  60 | 			dir = compareItems(itemRankA, itemRankB);
  61 | 		}
  62 | 	}
  63 | 	return dir === 0 ? sortingFns.alphanumeric(rowA, rowB, columnId) : dir;
  64 | };
  65 | 
  66 | type PatientsTableProps = {
  67 | 	clinicId: string;
  68 | 	onEdit?: (patient: PatientType) => void;
  69 | };
  70 | 
  71 | function getStatusBadge(status: string | null | undefined, isActive: boolean) {
  72 | 	const variant = isActive ? "default" : "secondary";
  73 | 	return (
  74 | 		<Badge
  75 | 			className='capitalize'
  76 | 			variant={variant}
  77 | 		>
  78 | 			{status?.toLowerCase() ?? (isActive ? "active" : "inactive")}
  79 | 		</Badge>
  80 | 	);
  81 | }
  82 | 
  83 | function DebouncedInput({
  84 | 	value: initialValue,
  85 | 	onChange,
  86 | 	debounce = 500,
  87 | 	...props
  88 | }: {
  89 | 	value: string | number;
  90 | 	onChange: (value: string | number) => void;
  91 | 	debounce?: number;
  92 | } & Omit<React.InputHTMLAttributes<HTMLInputElement>, "onChange">) {
  93 | 	const [value, setValue] = React.useState(initialValue);
  94 | 
  95 | 	React.useEffect(() => {
  96 | 		setValue(initialValue);
  97 | 	}, [initialValue]);
  98 | 
  99 | 	React.useEffect(() => {
 100 | 		const timeout = setTimeout(() => {
 101 | 			onChange(value);
 102 | 		}, debounce);
 103 | 		return () => clearTimeout(timeout);
 104 | 	}, [value, onChange, debounce]);
 105 | 
 106 | 	return (
 107 | 		<input
 108 | 			{...props}
 109 | 			onChange={e => setValue(e.target.value)}
 110 | 			value={value}
 111 | 		/>
 112 | 	);
 113 | }
 114 | 
 115 | export function PatientsTable({ onEdit }: PatientsTableProps) {
 116 | 	const navigate = useNavigate();
 117 | 
 118 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
 119 | 	const rerender = React.useReducer(() => {
 120 | 		return {};
 121 | 	}, {})[1];
 122 | 
 123 | 	const [columnFilters, setColumnFilters] = React.useState<ColumnFiltersState>([]);
 124 | 	const [globalFilter, setGlobalFilter] = React.useState("");
 125 | 
 126 | 	// Fetch patients using oRPC
 127 | 	const { data, isLoading } = useQuery({
 128 | 		queryKey: orpc.patient.list.key({ input: { page: 1, pageSize: 10 } }),
 129 | 		queryFn: () => orpc.patient.list.call({ page: 1, pageSize: 10 })
 130 | 	});
 131 | 
 132 | 	const deletePatientMutation = useMutation({
 133 | 		mutationFn: (input: { id: string }) => orpc.patient.delete.call(input),
 134 | 		onSuccess: () => {
 135 | 			toast.success("Patient deleted successfully");
 136 | 			void queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 137 | 				queryKey: orpc.patient.list.key({})
 138 | 			});
 139 | 		},
 140 | 		onError: error => {
 141 | 			console.error(error);
 142 | 			toast.error("Failed to delete patient");
 143 | 		}
 144 | 	});
 145 | 
 146 | 	const handleEdit = useCallback(
 147 | 		(patient: PatientType) => {
 148 | 			// Use navigate instead of window.location.href
 149 | 			return void navigate({
 150 | 				to: "/dashboard/patients/$id/edit",
 151 | 				params: { id: patient.id ?? "" },
 152 | 				search: { returnTo: "/dashboard/patients" }
 153 | 			});
 154 | 		},
 155 | 		[navigate]
 156 | 	);
 157 | 
 158 | 	const columns = React.useMemo<ColumnDef<PatientType>[]>(
 159 | 		() => [
 160 | 			{
 161 | 				accessorFn: row => `${row.firstName} ${row.lastName}`,
 162 | 				id: "fullName",
 163 | 				header: "Patient Name",
 164 | 				cell: ({ row }) => {
 165 | 					const patient = row.original;
 166 | 					return (
 167 | 						<div className='flex items-center gap-3'>
 168 | 							<Avatar className='h-8 w-8'>
 169 | 								{patient.image ? (
 170 | 									<AvatarImage
 171 | 										alt={patient.firstName}
 172 | 										src={patient.image}
 173 | 									/>
 174 | 								) : null}
 175 | 								<AvatarFallback>
 176 | 									{getInitials(`${patient.firstName} ${patient.lastName}`)}
 177 | 								</AvatarFallback>
 178 | 							</Avatar>
 179 | 							<div>
 180 | 								<div className='font-medium'>
 181 | 									{patient.firstName} {patient.lastName}
 182 | 								</div>
 183 | 								<div className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>
 184 | 									{patient.email ?? patient.phone ?? "No contact"}
 185 | 								</div>
 186 | 							</div>
 187 | 						</div>
 188 | 					);
 189 | 				},
 190 | 				filterFn: fuzzyFilter,
 191 | 				sortingFn: fuzzySort
 192 | 			},
 193 | 			{
 194 | 				accessorKey: "dateOfBirth",
 195 | 				header: "Date of Birth",
 196 | 				cell: ({ row }) => (row.original.dateOfBirth ? format(new Date(row.original.dateOfBirth), "PPP") : "—"),
 197 | 				sortingFn: "datetime"
 198 | 			},
 199 | 			{
 200 | 				id: "age",
 201 | 				header: "Age",
 202 | 				cell: ({ row }) =>
 203 | 					row.original.dateOfBirth ? `${calculateAge(new Date(row.original.dateOfBirth))}yr` : "—"
 204 | 			},
 205 | 			{
 206 | 				accessorKey: "gender",
 207 | 				header: "Gender",
 208 | 				cell: ({ row }) => row.original.gender?.toLowerCase() ?? "not specified"
 209 | 			},
 210 | 			{
 211 | 				accessorKey: "bloodGroup",
 212 | 				header: "Blood Type",
 213 | 				cell: ({ row }) => row.original.bloodGroup ?? "—"
 214 | 			},
 215 | 			{
 216 | 				accessorKey: "status",
 217 | 				header: "Status",
 218 | 				cell: ({ row }) => getStatusBadge(row.original.status, row.original.status === "ACTIVE")
 219 | 			},
 220 | 			{
 221 | 				id: "actions",
 222 | 				header: "Actions",
 223 | 				cell: ({ row }) => {
 224 | 					const patient = row.original;
 225 | 					return (
 226 | 						<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 227 | 							<Link
 228 | 								params={{ id: patient.id }}
 229 | 								search={prev => prev}
 230 | 								to='/dashboard/patients/$id'
 231 | 							>
 232 | 								<Button
 233 | 									aria-label='View patient'
 234 | 									size='sm'
 235 | 									variant='ghost'
 236 | 								>
 237 | 									<EyeIcon className='h-4 w-4' />
 238 | 								</Button>
 239 | 							</Link>
 240 | 							<Button
 241 | 								aria-label='Edit patient'
 242 | 								onClick={() => onEdit?.(patient) ?? handleEdit(patient)}
 243 | 								size='sm'
 244 | 								variant='ghost'
 245 | 							>
 246 | 								<PencilIcon className='h-4 w-4' />
 247 | 							</Button>
 248 | 							<AlertDialog>
 249 | 								<AlertDialogTrigger asChild>
 250 | 									<Button
 251 | 										aria-label='Delete patient'
 252 | 										size='sm'
 253 | 										variant='ghost'
 254 | 									>
 255 | 										<Trash2 className='h-4 w-4' />
 256 | 									</Button>
 257 | 								</AlertDialogTrigger>
 258 | 								<AlertDialogContent>
 259 | 									<AlertDialogHeader>
 260 | 										<AlertDialogTitle>Delete Patient</AlertDialogTitle>
 261 | 										<AlertDialogDescription>
 262 | 											Are you sure you want to delete {patient.firstName} {patient.lastName}? This
 263 | 											action cannot be undone.
 264 | 										</AlertDialogDescription>
 265 | 									</AlertDialogHeader>
 266 | 									<AlertDialogFooter>
 267 | 										<AlertDialogCancel>Cancel</AlertDialogCancel>
 268 | 										<AlertDialogAction
 269 | 											className='bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground'
 270 | 											onClick={() => deletePatientMutation.mutate({ id: patient.id })}
 271 | 										>
 272 | 											Delete
 273 | 										</AlertDialogAction>
 274 | 									</AlertDialogFooter>
 275 | 								</AlertDialogContent>
 276 | 							</AlertDialog>
 277 | 						</div>
 278 | 					);
 279 | 				}
 280 | 			}
 281 | 		],
 282 | 		[deletePatientMutation, handleEdit, onEdit]
 283 | 	);
 284 | 
 285 | 	const patients = (data?.patients ?? []) as PatientType[];
 286 | 
 287 | 	const table = useReactTable<PatientType>({
 288 | 		data: patients,
 289 | 		columns,
 290 | 		filterFns: {
 291 | 			fuzzy: fuzzyFilter
 292 | 		},
 293 | 		state: {
 294 | 			columnFilters,
 295 | 			globalFilter
 296 | 		},
 297 | 		onColumnFiltersChange: setColumnFilters,
 298 | 		onGlobalFilterChange: setGlobalFilter,
 299 | 		globalFilterFn: fuzzyFilter,
 300 | 		getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel(),
 301 | 		getFilteredRowModel: getFilteredRowModel(),
 302 | 		getSortedRowModel: getSortedRowModel(),
 303 | 		getPaginationRowModel: getPaginationRowModel(),
 304 | 		debugTable: true,
 305 | 		debugHeaders: true,
 306 | 		debugColumns: false
 307 | 	});
 308 | 
 309 | 	// Apply fuzzy sort when the fullName column is being filtered
 310 | 	React.useEffect(() => {
 311 | 		const state = table.getState();
 312 | 		const currentFilters = state.columnFilters;
 313 | 		const currentSorting = state.sorting;
 314 | 		if (currentFilters[0]?.id === "fullName" && currentSorting[0]?.id !== "fullName") {
 315 | 			table.setSorting([{ id: "fullName", desc: false }]);
 316 | 		}
 317 | 	}, [table]);
 318 | 
 319 | 	if (isLoading) {
 320 | 		return <div className='flex justify-center p-8'>Loading patients...</div>;
 321 | 	}
 322 | 
 323 | 	return (
 324 | 		<div className='w-full space-y-4'>
 325 | 			<div className='flex items-center justify-between'>
 326 | 				<DebouncedInput
 327 | 					className='max-w-sm flex-1 rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm'
 328 | 					onChange={value => setGlobalFilter(String(value))}
 329 | 					placeholder='Search all columns...'
 330 | 					value={globalFilter ?? ""}
 331 | 				/>
 332 | 				<Button asChild>
 333 | 					<Link to='/dashboard/patients/new'>
 334 | 						<PlusIcon className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 335 | 						Add Patient
 336 | 					</Link>
 337 | 				</Button>
 338 | 			</div>
 339 | 
 340 | 			<div className='rounded-md border'>
 341 | 				<div className='overflow-x-auto'>
 342 | 					<table className='w-full text-sm'>
 343 | 						<thead className='bg-muted/50'>
 344 | 							{table.getHeaderGroups().map(headerGroup => (
 345 | 								<tr key={headerGroup.id}>
 346 | 									{headerGroup.headers.map(header => (
 347 | 										<th
 348 | 											className='px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium'
 349 | 											colSpan={header.colSpan}
 350 | 											key={header.id}
 351 | 										>
 352 | 											{header.isPlaceholder ? null : (
 353 | 												<>
 354 | 													<div
 355 | 														{...{
 356 | 															className: header.column.getCanSort()
 357 | 																? "cursor-pointer select-none hover:text-blue-400 transition-colors"
 358 | 																: "",
 359 | 															onClick: header.column.getToggleSortingHandler()
 360 | 														}}
 361 | 													>
 362 | 														{flexRender(
 363 | 															header.column.columnDef.header,
 364 | 															header.getContext()
 365 | 														)}
 366 | 														{{
 367 | 															asc: " 🔼",
 368 | 															desc: " 🔽"
 369 | 														}[header.column.getIsSorted() as string] ?? null}
 370 | 													</div>
 371 | 													{header.column.getCanFilter() && (
 372 | 														<div className='mt-2'>
 373 | 															<Filter column={header.column} />
 374 | 														</div>
 375 | 													)}
 376 | 												</>
 377 | 											)}
 378 | 										</th>
 379 | 									))}
 380 | 								</tr>
 381 | 							))}
 382 | 						</thead>
 383 | 						<tbody className='divide-y'>
 384 | 							{table.getRowModel().rows.map(row => (
 385 | 								<tr
 386 | 									className='cursor-pointer transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50'
 387 | 									key={row.id}
 388 | 									onClick={() => {
 389 | 										void navigate({
 390 | 											to: "/dashboard/patients/$id",
 391 | 											params: { id: row.original.id }
 392 | 										});
 393 | 									}}
 394 | 								>
 395 | 									{row.getVisibleCells().map(cell => (
 396 | 										<td
 397 | 											className='px-4 py-3'
 398 | 											key={cell.id}
 399 | 										>
 400 | 											{flexRender(cell.column.columnDef.cell, cell.getContext())}
 401 | 										</td>
 402 | 									))}
 403 | 								</tr>
 404 | 							))}
 405 | 							{table.getRowModel().rows.length === 0 && (
 406 | 								<tr>
 407 | 									<td
 408 | 										className='h-24 text-center'
 409 | 										colSpan={columns.length}
 410 | 									>
 411 | 										No patients found.
 412 | 									</td>
 413 | 								</tr>
 414 | 							)}
 415 | 						</tbody>
 416 | 					</table>
 417 | 				</div>
 418 | 			</div>
 419 | 
 420 | 			<div className='flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-2'>
 421 | 				<div className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>
 422 | 					Showing {table.getRowModel().rows.length} of {table.getPrePaginationRowModel().rows.length} patients
 423 | 				</div>
 424 | 				<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 425 | 					<Button
 426 | 						disabled={!table.getCanPreviousPage()}
 427 | 						onClick={() => table.setPageIndex(0)}
 428 | 						size='sm'
 429 | 						variant='outline'
 430 | 					>
 431 | 						{"<<"}
 432 | 					</Button>
 433 | 					<Button
 434 | 						disabled={!table.getCanPreviousPage()}
 435 | 						onClick={() => table.previousPage()}
 436 | 						size='sm'
 437 | 						variant='outline'
 438 | 					>
 439 | 						{"<"}
 440 | 					</Button>
 441 | 					<span className='text-sm'>
 442 | 						Page {table.getState().pagination.pageIndex + 1} of {table.getPageCount()}
 443 | 					</span>
 444 | 					<Button
 445 | 						disabled={!table.getCanNextPage()}
 446 | 						onClick={() => table.nextPage()}
 447 | 						size='sm'
 448 | 						variant='outline'
 449 | 					>
 450 | 						{">"}
 451 | 					</Button>
 452 | 					<Button
 453 | 						disabled={!table.getCanNextPage()}
 454 | 						onClick={() => table.setPageIndex(table.getPageCount() - 1)}
 455 | 						size='sm'
 456 | 						variant='outline'
 457 | 					>
 458 | 						{">>"}
 459 | 					</Button>
 460 | 					<select
 461 | 						className='rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-2 py-1 text-sm'
 462 | 						onChange={e => table.setPageSize(Number(e.target.value))}
 463 | 						value={table.getState().pagination.pageSize}
 464 | 					>
 465 | 						{[10, 20, 30, 40, 50].map(pageSize => (
 466 | 							<option
 467 | 								key={pageSize}
 468 | 								value={pageSize}
 469 | 							>
 470 | 								Show {pageSize}
 471 | 							</option>
 472 | 						))}
 473 | 					</select>
 474 | 				</div>
 475 | 			</div>
 476 | 
 477 | 			<div className='flex gap-2'>
 478 | 				<Button
 479 | 					onClick={() => rerender()}
 480 | 					size='sm'
 481 | 					variant='outline'
 482 | 				>
 483 | 					Force Rerender
 484 | 				</Button>
 485 | 			</div>
 486 | 
 487 | 			<pre className='mt-4 overflow-auto rounded-md bg-muted p-4 text-xs'>
 488 | 				{JSON.stringify(
 489 | 					{
 490 | 						columnFilters: table.getState().columnFilters,
 491 | 						globalFilter: table.getState().globalFilter
 492 | 					},
 493 | 					null,
 494 | 					2
 495 | 				)}
 496 | 			</pre>
 497 | 		</div>
 498 | 	);
 499 | }
 500 | function Filter({ column }: { column: Column<PatientType, unknown> }) {
 501 | 	const columnFilterValue = column.getFilterValue();
 502 | 
 503 | 	return (
 504 | 		<DebouncedInput
 505 | 			className='w-full rounded-md border border-gray-600 bg-gray-700 px-2 py-1 text-white outline-none focus:border-transparent focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500'
 506 | 			onChange={value => column.setFilterValue(value)}
 507 | 			placeholder={"Search..."}
 508 | 			type='text'
 509 | 			value={(columnFilterValue ?? "") as string}
 510 | 		/>
 511 | 	);
 512 | }

```

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/prescriptions/columns.tsx

  67 | 				aria-label='Select all'
  68 | 				checked={table.getIsAllPageRowsSelected() || (table.getIsSomePageRowsSelected() && "indeterminate")}
  69 | 				onCheckedChange={value => table.toggleAllPageRowsSelected(!!value)}
  70 | 			/>
  71 | 		),

  74 | 				aria-label='Select row'
  75 | 				checked={row.getIsSelected()}

  77 | 			/>
  78 | 		),

  80 | 		enableHiding: false
  81 | 	},
  82 | 	{
  83 | 		accessorKey: "patientName",
  84 | 		header: "Patient",
  85 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
  86 | 			const patient = row.original.patientName;
  87 | 			return (
  88 | 				<div>
  89 | 					<div className='font-medium'>{patient}</div>
  90 | 					<div className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>ID: {row.original.patientId.slice(0, 8)}</div>
  91 | 				</div>
  92 | 			);
  93 | 		}
  94 | 	},
  95 | 	{
  96 | 		accessorKey: "medicationName",
  97 | 		header: "Medication",
  98 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
  99 | 			return (
 100 | 				<div>
 101 | 					<div className='font-medium'>{row.original.medicationName}</div>
 102 | 					<div className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>
 103 | 						{row.original.dosage} • {row.original.frequency}
 104 | 					</div>
 105 | 				</div>
 106 | 			);
 107 | 		}
 108 | 	},
 109 | 	{
 110 | 		accessorKey: "doctorName",
 111 | 		header: "Prescribed By",
 112 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 113 | 			return (
 114 | 				<div>
 115 | 					<div className='text-sm'>{row.original.doctorName}</div>
 116 | 					<div className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>ID: {row.original.doctorId.slice(0, 8)}</div>
 117 | 				</div>
 118 | 			);
 119 | 		}
 120 | 	},
 121 | 	{
 122 | 		accessorKey: "startDate",
 123 | 		header: "Start Date",
 124 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 125 | 			const date = row.original.startDate;
 126 | 			return <div className='text-sm'>{format(new Date(date), "MMM d, yyyy")}</div>;
 127 | 		}
 128 | 	},
 129 | 	{
 130 | 		accessorKey: "endDate",
 131 | 		header: "End Date",
 132 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 133 | 			const date = row.original.endDate;
 134 | 			if (!date) return <div className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>No end date</div>;
 135 | 			const isExpired = new Date(date) < new Date();
 136 | 			return (
 137 | 				<div className={`text-sm ${isExpired ? "text-red-600" : ""}`}>
 138 | 					{format(new Date(date), "MMM d, yyyy")}
 139 | 					{isExpired && (
 140 | 						<Badge
 141 | 							className='ml-2'
 142 | 							variant='destructive'
 143 | 						>
 144 | 							Expired
 145 | 						</Badge>
 146 | 					)}
 147 | 				</div>
 148 | 			);
 149 | 		}
 150 | 	},
 151 | 	{
 152 | 		accessorKey: "refillsRemaining",
 153 | 		header: "Refills",
 154 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 155 | 			const refills = row.original.refillsRemaining;
 156 | 			return (
 157 | 				<Badge variant={refills > 0 ? "default" : "secondary"}>
 158 | 					{refills} refill{refills !== 1 ? "s" : ""} remaining
 159 | 				</Badge>
 160 | 			);
 161 | 		}
 162 | 	},
 163 | 	{
 164 | 		accessorKey: "status",
 165 | 		header: "Status",
 166 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 167 | 			const status = row.original.status;
 168 | 			return <Badge className={statusColors[status]}>{statusLabels[status]}</Badge>;
 169 | 		}
 170 | 	},
 171 | 	{
 172 | 		id: "actions",
 173 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 174 | 			const prescription = row.original;
 175 | 
 176 | 			return (
 177 | 				<DropdownMenu>
 178 | 					<DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
 179 | 						<Button
 180 | 							className='h-8 w-8 p-0'
 181 | 							variant='ghost'
 182 | 						>
 183 | 							<span className='sr-only'>Open menu</span>
 184 | 							<MoreHorizontal className='h-4 w-4' />
 185 | 						</Button>
 186 | 					</DropdownMenuTrigger>
 187 | 					<DropdownMenuContent align='end'>
 188 | 						<DropdownMenuLabel>Actions</DropdownMenuLabel>
 189 | 						<DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => console.log("View", prescription.id)}>
 190 | 							<Eye className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 191 | 							View Details
 192 | 						</DropdownMenuItem>
 193 | 						<DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => console.log("Edit", prescription.id)}>
 194 | 							<Edit className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 195 | 							Edit Prescription
 196 | 						</DropdownMenuItem>
 197 | 						<DropdownMenuSeparator />
 198 | 						{prescription.status === "active" && (
 199 | 							<DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => console.log("Complete", prescription.id)}>
 200 | 								<CheckCircle className='mr-2 h-4 w-4 text-green-600' />
 201 | 								Mark as Completed
 202 | 							</DropdownMenuItem>
 203 | 						)}
 204 | 						<DropdownMenuItem
 205 | 							className='text-red-600'
 206 | 							onClick={() => console.log("Cancel", prescription.id)}
 207 | 						>
 208 | 							<XCircle className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 209 | 							Cancel Prescription
 210 | 						</DropdownMenuItem>
 211 | 						<DropdownMenuSeparator />
 212 | 						<DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => console.log("Delete", prescription.id)}>
 213 | 							<Trash2 className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 214 | 							Delete
 215 | 						</DropdownMenuItem>
 216 | 					</DropdownMenuContent>
 217 | 				</DropdownMenu>
 218 | 			);
 219 | 		}
 220 | 	}
 221 | ];
```
