`components/prescriptions/prescription-form.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/forms/PrescriptionForm.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
   4 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   5 | import { Calendar } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/calendar";
   6 | import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   7 | import { Input } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/input";
   8 | import { Label } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/label";
   9 | import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/popover";
  10 | import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/select";
  11 | import { Separator } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/separator";
  12 | import { Textarea } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/textarea";
  13 | import { useMutation, useQuery, useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
  14 | import { useSelector } from "@tanstack/react-store";
  15 | import { format } from "date-fns";
  16 | import { CalendarIcon, FileText, Pill, Plus, Stethoscope, Trash2, User } from "lucide-react";
  17 | import { toast } from "sonner";
  18 | import * as z from "zod";
  19 | 
  20 | import { cn } from "#/lib/utils";
  21 | import { useAppForm, useFormFields } from "@/components/forms/tanstack-form";
  22 | import { generateId } from "@/lib/id";
  23 | import type { DoctorType, DosageUnit, PatientType, PrescribedItemType } from "@/schemas";
  24 | import { orpc } from "@/utils/orpc";
  25 | 
  26 | // Schema for a single prescribed item (medication)
  27 | const prescribedItemSchema = z.object({
  28 | 	id: z.string().or(z.undefined()),
  29 | 	drugId: z.string().min(1, "Please select a medication"),
  30 | 	encounterId: z.string().or(z.undefined()),
  31 | 	drugName: z.string().or(z.undefined()),
  32 | 	dosageValue: z.number().min(0.1, "Dosage is required"),
  33 | 	dosageUnit: z.string().min(1, "Unit is required"),
  34 | 	frequency: z.string().min(1, "Frequency is required"),
  35 | 	duration: z.string().min(1, "Duration is required"),
  36 | 	instructions: z.string().or(z.undefined()),
  37 | 	drugRoute: z.string().or(z.undefined())
  38 | });
  39 | 
  40 | const PrescriptionFormSchema = z.object({
  41 | 	id: z.string().min(1, "Prescription ID is required"),
  42 | 	patientId: z.string().min(1, "Please select a patient"),
  43 | 	doctorId: z.string().min(1, "Please select a doctor"),
  44 | 	medicalRecordId: z.string().min(1, "Medical record is required"),
  45 | 	encounterId: z.string().min(1, "Encounter is required"),
  46 | 	clinicId: z.string().or(z.undefined()),
  47 | 	issuedDate: z.date(),
  48 | 	endDate: z.date().or(z.undefined()),
  49 | 	status: z.enum(["active", "completed", "discontinued", "expired"]),
  50 | 	diagnosis: z.string().or(z.undefined()),
  51 | 	notes: z.string().or(z.undefined()),
  52 | 	prescribedItems: z.array(prescribedItemSchema).min(1, "At least one medication is required")
  53 | });
  54 | 
  55 | // Form values type that matches the component's needs
  56 | type PrescriptionFormValues = {
  57 | 	id: string;
  58 | 	patientId: string;
  59 | 	doctorId: string;
  60 | 	medicalRecordId: string;
  61 | 	encounterId: string;
  62 | 	clinicId?: string;
  63 | 	issuedDate: Date;
  64 | 	endDate?: Date;
  65 | 	status: "active" | "completed" | "discontinued" | "expired";
  66 | 	diagnosis?: string;
  67 | 	notes?: string;
  68 | 	prescribedItems: Array<{
  69 | 		id?: string;
  70 | 		drugId: string;
  71 | 		encounterId?: string;
  72 | 		drugName?: string;
  73 | 		dosageValue: number;
  74 | 		dosageUnit: string;
  75 | 		frequency: string;
  76 | 		duration: string;
  77 | 		instructions?: string;
  78 | 		drugRoute?: string;
  79 | 	}>;
  80 | };
  81 | 
  82 | type Drug = {
  83 | 	id: string;
  84 | 	name: string;
  85 | };
  86 | 
  87 | // Common dosage units
  88 | const dosageUnits = [
  89 | 	{ value: "mg", label: "mg" },
  90 | 	{ value: "mcg", label: "mcg" },
  91 | 	{ value: "g", label: "g" },
  92 | 	{ value: "mL", label: "mL" },
  93 | 	{ value: "tsp", label: "tsp" },
  94 | 	{ value: "tbsp", label: "tbsp" },
  95 | 	{ value: "drop", label: "drop" },
  96 | 	{ value: "puff", label: "puff" },
  97 | 	{ value: "tablet", label: "tablet" },
  98 | 	{ value: "capsule", label: "capsule" }
  99 | ];
 100 | 
 101 | // Common frequencies
 102 | const frequencies = [
 103 | 	{ value: "ONCE", label: "Once" },
 104 | 	{ value: "BID", label: "Twice daily (BID)" },
 105 | 	{ value: "TID", label: "Three times daily (TID)" },
 106 | 	{ value: "QID", label: "Four times daily (QID)" },
 107 | 	{ value: "Q4H", label: "Every 4 hours" },
 108 | 	{ value: "Q6H", label: "Every 6 hours" },
 109 | 	{ value: "Q8H", label: "Every 8 hours" },
 110 | 	{ value: "Q12H", label: "Every 12 hours" },
 111 | 	{ value: "QD", label: "Once daily" },
 112 | 	{ value: "QOD", label: "Every other day" },
 113 | 	{ value: "PRN", label: "As needed (PRN)" },
 114 | 	{ value: "STAT", label: "Immediately (STAT)" }
 115 | ];
 116 | 
 117 | // Common routes of administration
 118 | const drugRoutes = [
 119 | 	{ value: "ORAL", label: "Oral" },
 120 | 	{ value: "IV", label: "Intravenous (IV)" },
 121 | 	{ value: "IM", label: "Intramuscular (IM)" },
 122 | 	{ value: "SC", label: "Subcutaneous (SC)" },
 123 | 	{ value: "TOPICAL", label: "Topical" },
 124 | 	{ value: "INHALATION", label: "Inhalation" },
 125 | 	{ value: "RECTAL", label: "Rectal" },
 126 | 	{ value: "OPHTHALMIC", label: "Ophthalmic" },
 127 | 	{ value: "OTIC", label: "Otic" },
 128 | 	{ value: "NASAL", label: "Nasal" }
 129 | ];
 130 | 
 131 | // Duration options
 132 | const durations = [
 133 | 	{ value: "1 day", label: "1 day" },
 134 | 	{ value: "3 days", label: "3 days" },
 135 | 	{ value: "5 days", label: "5 days" },
 136 | 	{ value: "7 days", label: "7 days" },
 137 | 	{ value: "10 days", label: "10 days" },
 138 | 	{ value: "14 days", label: "14 days" },
 139 | 	{ value: "21 days", label: "21 days" },
 140 | 	{ value: "30 days", label: "30 days" },
 141 | 	{ value: "60 days", label: "60 days" },
 142 | 	{ value: "90 days", label: "90 days" }
 143 | ];
 144 | 
 145 | type PrescriptionFormProps = {
 146 | 	doctorId?: string;
 147 | 	encounterId?: string;
 148 | 	initialData?: Partial<PrescriptionFormValues>;
 149 | 	medicalRecordId?: string;
 150 | 	onCancel?: () => void;
 151 | 	onSuccess?: () => void;
 152 | 	patientId?: string;
 153 | 	readOnly?: boolean;
 154 | };
 155 | 
 156 | export function PrescriptionForm({
 157 | 	initialData,
 158 | 	patientId: presetPatientId,
 159 | 	doctorId: presetDoctorId,
 160 | 	medicalRecordId: presetMedicalRecordId,
 161 | 	encounterId: presetEncounterId,
 162 | 	onSuccess,
 163 | 	onCancel,
 164 | 	readOnly = false
 165 | }: PrescriptionFormProps) {
 166 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
 167 | 
 168 | 	// Fetch patients for dropdown
 169 | 	const { data: patientsData, isLoading: patientsLoading } = useQuery(
 170 | 		orpc.patient.list.queryOptions({
 171 | 			input: { search: "" },
 172 | 			enabled: !presetPatientId
 173 | 		})
 174 | 	);
 175 | 
 176 | 	// Fetch doctors for dropdown
 177 | 	const { data: doctorsData, isLoading: doctorsLoading } = useQuery(
 178 | 		orpc.doctor.list.queryOptions({
 179 | 			input: { search: "" },
 180 | 			enabled: !presetDoctorId
 181 | 		})
 182 | 	);
 183 | 
 184 | 	// Fetch drugs for the medication dropdown
 185 | 	const { data: drugsData, isLoading: drugsLoading } = useQuery(
 186 | 		orpc.prescription.listDrugs.queryOptions({
 187 | 			input: { search: "" }
 188 | 		})
 189 | 	);
 190 | 
 191 | 	// Create prescription mutation
 192 | 	const { mutate: createPrescription, isPending: isCreatePending } = useMutation(
 193 | 		orpc.prescription.create.mutationOptions({
 194 | 			onSuccess: () => {
 195 | 				toast.success("Prescription created successfully");
 196 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: orpc.prescription.key() });
 197 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: orpc.patient.key() });
 198 | 				onSuccess?.();
 199 | 			},
 200 | 			onError: (error: Error) => {
 201 | 				console.error(error);
 202 | 				toast.error(error.message || "Failed to create prescription");
 203 | 			}
 204 | 		})
 205 | 	);
 206 | 
 207 | 	// Update prescription mutation
 208 | 	const { mutate: updatePrescription, isPending: isUpdatePending } = useMutation(
 209 | 		orpc.prescription.update.mutationOptions({
 210 | 			onSuccess: () => {
 211 | 				toast.success("Prescription updated successfully");
 212 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: orpc.prescription.key() });
 213 | 				onSuccess?.();
 214 | 			},
 215 | 			onError: (error: Error) => {
 216 | 				console.error(error);
 217 | 				toast.error(error.message || "Failed to update prescription");
 218 | 			}
 219 | 		})
 220 | 	);
 221 | 
 222 | 	const isPending = isCreatePending || isUpdatePending;
 223 | 
 224 | 	const form = useAppForm({
 225 | 		defaultValues: {
 226 | 			id: initialData?.id ?? generateId(),
 227 | 			patientId: presetPatientId ?? initialData?.patientId ?? "",
 228 | 			doctorId: presetDoctorId ?? initialData?.doctorId ?? "",
 229 | 			encounterId: presetEncounterId ?? initialData?.encounterId ?? "",
 230 | 			medicalRecordId: presetMedicalRecordId ?? initialData?.medicalRecordId ?? "",
 231 | 			clinicId: initialData?.clinicId ?? undefined,
 232 | 			issuedDate: initialData?.issuedDate ?? new Date(),
 233 | 			endDate: initialData?.endDate,
 234 | 			status: (initialData?.status as "active" | "completed" | "discontinued" | "expired") || "active",
 235 | 			diagnosis: initialData?.diagnosis,
 236 | 			notes: initialData?.notes,
 237 | 			prescribedItems: initialData?.prescribedItems ?? []
 238 | 		},
 239 | 		validators: {
 240 | 			onSubmit: PrescriptionFormSchema
 241 | 		},
 242 | 		onSubmit: async ({ value }) => {
 243 | 			if (initialData?.id) {
 244 | 				updatePrescription({
 245 | 					id: initialData.id,
 246 | 					status: value.status
 247 | 				});
 248 | 			} else {
 249 | 				createPrescription({
 250 | 					medicalRecordId: value.medicalRecordId,
 251 | 					patientId: value.patientId,
 252 | 					doctorId: value.doctorId || "",
 253 | 					encounterId: value.encounterId,
 254 | 					prescribedItems: value.prescribedItems.map(item => {
 255 | 						return {
 256 | 							drugId: item.drugId,
 257 | 							encounterId: item.encounterId ?? undefined,
 258 | 							drugName: item.drugName ?? undefined,
 259 | 							dosageValue: item.dosageValue,
 260 | 							dosageUnit: item.dosageUnit.toUpperCase() as DosageUnit,
 261 | 							frequency: item.frequency,
 262 | 							duration: item.duration,
 263 | 							drugRoute: item.drugRoute,
 264 | 							instructions: item.instructions ?? undefined
 265 | 						} as unknown as PrescribedItemType;
 266 | 					})
 267 | 				});
 268 | 			}
 269 | 		}
 270 | 	});
 271 | 
 272 | 	const formValues = useSelector(form.store, s => s.values);
 273 | 
 274 | 	// Add a new medication item
 275 | 	const addMedication = () => {
 276 | 		const newItem = {
 277 | 			drugId: "",
 278 | 			dosageValue: 0,
 279 | 			dosageUnit: "mg",
 280 | 			frequency: "BID",
 281 | 			duration: "7 days",
 282 | 			instructions: "",
 283 | 			drugRoute: "ORAL"
 284 | 		};
 285 | 		form.setFieldValue("prescribedItems", [...formValues.prescribedItems, newItem]);
 286 | 	};
 287 | 
 288 | 	// Remove a medication item
 289 | 	const removeMedication = (index: number) => {
 290 | 		const newItems = [...formValues.prescribedItems];
 291 | 		newItems.splice(index, 1);
 292 | 		form.setFieldValue("prescribedItems", newItems);
 293 | 	};
 294 | 
 295 | 	// Update a medication item
 296 | 	const updateMedication = (
 297 | 		index: number,
 298 | 		field: keyof PrescriptionFormValues["prescribedItems"][0],
 299 | 		value: unknown
 300 | 	) => {
 301 | 		const newItems = [...formValues.prescribedItems];
 302 | 		newItems[index] = { ...newItems[index], [field]: value };
 303 | 
 304 | 		// If drugId changed, look up drug name
 305 | 		if (field === "drugId" && typeof value === "string") {
 306 | 			const selectedDrug = drugsData?.drugs?.find((d: Drug) => d.id === value);
 307 | 			if (selectedDrug) {
 308 | 				newItems[index].drugName = selectedDrug.name;
 309 | 			}
 310 | 		}
 311 | 
 312 | 		form.setFieldValue("prescribedItems", newItems);
 313 | 	};
 314 | 
 315 | 	const { FormSelectField, FormTextareaField } = useFormFields<PrescriptionFormValues>();
 316 | 
 317 | 	// Determine if patient/doctor selects should be disabled
 318 | 
 319 | 	return (
 320 | 		<Card className='mx-auto w-full max-w-5xl'>
 321 | 			<CardHeader>
 322 | 				<CardTitle className='flex items-center gap-2 font-bold text-2xl'>
 323 | 					<Pill className='h-6 w-6' />
 324 | 					{initialData?.id ? "Edit Prescription" : "New Prescription"}
 325 | 				</CardTitle>
 326 | 				<p className='text-muted-foreground'>Create a prescription with medications and instructions</p>
 327 | 			</CardHeader>
 328 | 			<CardContent>
 329 | 				<form.AppForm>
 330 | 					<form.Form className='space-y-6'>
 331 | 						{/* Patient & Doctor Selection */}
 332 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 333 | 							<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 334 | 								<User className='h-5 w-5' />
 335 | 								Patient & Doctor Information
 336 | 							</h3>
 337 | 							<Separator />
 338 | 							<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2'>
 339 | 								<FormSelectField
 340 | 									label='Patient'
 341 | 									name='patientId'
 342 | 									options={
 343 | 										(patientsData?.patients as PatientType[])?.map(p => {
 344 | 											return {
 345 | 												value: p.id,
 346 | 												label: `${p.firstName} ${p.lastName}${p.dateOfBirth ? ` (${format(p.dateOfBirth, "MM/dd/yyyy")})` : ""}`
 347 | 											};
 348 | 										}) ?? []
 349 | 									}
 350 | 									placeholder={patientsLoading ? "Loading..." : "Select patient"}
 351 | 									required
 352 | 									validators={{
 353 | 										onBlur: z.string().min(1, "Please select a patient")
 354 | 									}}
 355 | 								/>
 356 | 
 357 | 								<FormSelectField
 358 | 									label='Doctor'
 359 | 									name='doctorId'
 360 | 									options={
 361 | 										(doctorsData?.doctors as DoctorType[])?.map(d => {
 362 | 											return {
 363 | 												value: d.id,
 364 | 												label: `${d.name} - ${d.specialty || "General"}`
 365 | 											};
 366 | 										}) ?? []
 367 | 									}
 368 | 									placeholder={doctorsLoading ? "Loading..." : "Select doctor"}
 369 | 									required
 370 | 									validators={{
 371 | 										onBlur: z.string().min(1, "Please select a doctor")
 372 | 									}}
 373 | 								/>
 374 | 							</div>
 375 | 						</div>
 376 | 
 377 | 						{/* Prescription Details */}
 378 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 379 | 							<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 380 | 								<FileText className='h-5 w-5' />
 381 | 								Prescription Details
 382 | 							</h3>
 383 | 							<Separator />
 384 | 							<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-3'>
 385 | 								{/* Issued Date */}
 386 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 387 | 									<Label>Issue Date *</Label>
 388 | 									<form.AppField name='issuedDate'>
 389 | 										{field => (
 390 | 											<Popover>
 391 | 												<PopoverTrigger asChild>
 392 | 													<Button
 393 | 														className={cn(
 394 | 															"w-full justify-start text-left font-normal",
 395 | 															!field.state.value && "text-muted-foreground"
 396 | 														)}
 397 | 														disabled={readOnly}
 398 | 														variant='outline'
 399 | 													>
 400 | 														<CalendarIcon className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 401 | 														{field.state.value
 402 | 															? format(field.state.value, "PPP")
 403 | 															: "Select date"}
 404 | 													</Button>
 405 | 												</PopoverTrigger>
 406 | 												<PopoverContent className='w-auto p-0'>
 407 | 													<Calendar
 408 | 														mode='single'
 409 | 														onSelect={date => date && field.handleChange(date)}
 410 | 														selected={field.state.value}
 411 | 													/>
 412 | 												</PopoverContent>
 413 | 											</Popover>
 414 | 										)}
 415 | 									</form.AppField>
 416 | 								</div>
 417 | 
 418 | 								{/* End Date */}
 419 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 420 | 									<Label>End Date (Optional)</Label>
 421 | 									<form.AppField name='endDate'>
 422 | 										{field => (
 423 | 											<Popover>
 424 | 												<PopoverTrigger asChild>
 425 | 													<Button
 426 | 														className={cn(
 427 | 															"w-full justify-start text-left font-normal",
 428 | 															!field.state.value && "text-muted-foreground"
 429 | 														)}
 430 | 														disabled={readOnly}
 431 | 														variant='outline'
 432 | 													>
 433 | 														<CalendarIcon className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 434 | 														{field.state.value
 435 | 															? format(field.state.value, "PPP")
 436 | 															: "Select date"}
 437 | 													</Button>
 438 | 												</PopoverTrigger>
 439 | 												<PopoverContent className='w-auto p-0'>
 440 | 													<Calendar
 441 | 														mode='single'
 442 | 														onSelect={date => field.handleChange(date ?? undefined)}
 443 | 														selected={field.state.value}
 444 | 													/>
 445 | 												</PopoverContent>
 446 | 											</Popover>
 447 | 										)}
 448 | 									</form.AppField>
 449 | 								</div>
 450 | 
 451 | 								{/* Status */}
 452 | 								<FormSelectField
 453 | 									label='Status'
 454 | 									name='status'
 455 | 									options={[
 456 | 										{ value: "active", label: "Active" },
 457 | 										{ value: "completed", label: "Completed" },
 458 | 										{ value: "discontinued", label: "Discontinued" },
 459 | 										{ value: "expired", label: "Expired" }
 460 | 									]}
 461 | 								/>
 462 | 							</div>
 463 | 
 464 | 							{/* Diagnosis */}
 465 | 							<FormTextareaField
 466 | 								disabled={readOnly}
 467 | 								label='Diagnosis / Clinical Notes'
 468 | 								name='diagnosis'
 469 | 								placeholder='Enter diagnosis or clinical notes...'
 470 | 								rows={3}
 471 | 							/>
 472 | 
 473 | 							{/* General Notes */}
 474 | 							<FormTextareaField
 475 | 								disabled={readOnly}
 476 | 								label='Additional Notes'
 477 | 								name='notes'
 478 | 								placeholder='Any additional instructions or notes for the patient...'
 479 | 								rows={2}
 480 | 							/>
 481 | 						</div>
 482 | 
 483 | 						{/* Medications Section */}
 484 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 485 | 							<div className='flex items-center justify-between'>
 486 | 								<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 487 | 									<Stethoscope className='h-5 w-5' />
 488 | 									Medications
 489 | 								</h3>
 490 | 								{!readOnly && (
 491 | 									<Button
 492 | 										onClick={addMedication}
 493 | 										size='sm'
 494 | 										type='button'
 495 | 										variant='outline'
 496 | 									>
 497 | 										<Plus className='mr-1 h-4 w-4' />
 498 | 										Add Medication
 499 | 									</Button>
 500 | 								)}
 501 | 							</div>
 502 | 							<Separator />
 503 | 
 504 | 							{formValues.prescribedItems.length === 0 ? (
 505 | 								<div className='py-8 text-center text-muted-foreground'>
 506 | 									<Pill className='mx-auto mb-2 h-12 w-12 opacity-50' />
 507 | 									<p>No medications added yet</p>
 508 | 									{!readOnly && (
 509 | 										<Button
 510 | 											className='mt-2'
 511 | 											onClick={addMedication}
 512 | 											size='sm'
 513 | 											type='button'
 514 | 											variant='outline'
 515 | 										>
 516 | 											Add Medication
 517 | 										</Button>
 518 | 									)}
 519 | 								</div>
 520 | 							) : (
 521 | 								<div className='space-y-4'>
 522 | 									{formValues.prescribedItems.map((item, index) => (
 523 | 										<Card
 524 | 											className='relative'
 525 | 											key={item.id ?? index}
 526 | 										>
 527 | 											<CardContent className='pt-6'>
 528 | 												{!readOnly && (
 529 | 													<Button
 530 | 														className='absolute top-2 right-2'
 531 | 														onClick={() => removeMedication(index)}
 532 | 														size='icon'
 533 | 														type='button'
 534 | 														variant='ghost'
 535 | 													>
 536 | 														<Trash2 className='h-4 w-4 text-red-500' />
 537 | 													</Button>
 538 | 												)}
 539 | 
 540 | 												<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4'>
 541 | 													{/* Medication (Drug) */}
 542 | 													<div className='space-y-2 md:col-span-2'>
 543 | 														<Label>Medication *</Label>
 544 | 														<Select
 545 | 															disabled={readOnly}
 546 | 															onValueChange={value =>
 547 | 																updateMedication(index, "drugId", value)
 548 | 															}
 549 | 															value={item.drugId}
 550 | 														>
 551 | 															<SelectTrigger>
 552 | 																<SelectValue
 553 | 																	placeholder={
 554 | 																		drugsLoading
 555 | 																			? "Loading..."
 556 | 																			: "Select medication"
 557 | 																	}
 558 | 																/>
 559 | 															</SelectTrigger>
 560 | 															<SelectContent>
 561 | 																{drugsData?.drugs?.map((drug: Drug) => (
 562 | 																	<SelectItem
 563 | 																		key={drug.id}
 564 | 																		value={drug.id}
 565 | 																	>
 566 | 																		{drug.name}
 567 | 																	</SelectItem>
 568 | 																))}
 569 | 															</SelectContent>
 570 | 														</Select>
 571 | 													</div>
 572 | 
 573 | 													{/* Dosage Value */}
 574 | 													<div className='space-y-2'>
 575 | 														<Label>Dosage *</Label>
 576 | 														<Input
 577 | 															disabled={readOnly}
 578 | 															onChange={e =>
 579 | 																updateMedication(
 580 | 																	index,
 581 | 																	"dosageValue",
 582 | 																	Number.parseFloat(e.target.value) || 0
 583 | 																)
 584 | 															}
 585 | 															placeholder='e.g., 500'
 586 | 															step='any'
 587 | 															type='number'
 588 | 															value={item.dosageValue ?? ""}
 589 | 														/>
 590 | 													</div>
 591 | 
 592 | 													{/* Dosage Unit */}
 593 | 													<div className='space-y-2'>
 594 | 														<Label>Unit *</Label>
 595 | 														<Select
 596 | 															disabled={readOnly}
 597 | 															onValueChange={value =>
 598 | 																updateMedication(index, "dosageUnit", value)
 599 | 															}
 600 | 															value={item.dosageUnit}
 601 | 														>
 602 | 															<SelectTrigger>
 603 | 																<SelectValue />
 604 | 															</SelectTrigger>
 605 | 															<SelectContent>
 606 | 																{dosageUnits.map(unit => (
 607 | 																	<SelectItem
 608 | 																		key={unit.value}
 609 | 																		value={unit.value}
 610 | 																	>
 611 | 																		{unit.label}
 612 | 																	</SelectItem>
 613 | 																))}
 614 | 															</SelectContent>
 615 | 														</Select>
 616 | 													</div>
 617 | 
 618 | 													{/* Frequency */}
 619 | 													<div className='space-y-2'>
 620 | 														<Label>Frequency *</Label>
 621 | 														<Select
 622 | 															disabled={readOnly}
 623 | 															onValueChange={value =>
 624 | 																updateMedication(index, "frequency", value)
 625 | 															}
 626 | 															value={item.frequency}
 627 | 														>
 628 | 															<SelectTrigger>
 629 | 																<SelectValue />
 630 | 															</SelectTrigger>
 631 | 															<SelectContent>
 632 | 																{frequencies.map(freq => (
 633 | 																	<SelectItem
 634 | 																		key={freq.value}
 635 | 																		value={freq.value}
 636 | 																	>
 637 | 																		{freq.label}
 638 | 																	</SelectItem>
 639 | 																))}
 640 | 															</SelectContent>
 641 | 														</Select>
 642 | 													</div>
 643 | 
 644 | 													{/* Duration */}
 645 | 													<div className='space-y-2'>
 646 | 														<Label>Duration *</Label>
 647 | 														<Select
 648 | 															disabled={readOnly}
 649 | 															onValueChange={value =>
 650 | 																updateMedication(index, "duration", value)
 651 | 															}
 652 | 															value={item.duration}
 653 | 														>
 654 | 															<SelectTrigger>
 655 | 																<SelectValue />
 656 | 															</SelectTrigger>
 657 | 															<SelectContent>
 658 | 																{durations.map(dur => (
 659 | 																	<SelectItem
 660 | 																		key={dur.value}
 661 | 																		value={dur.value}
 662 | 																	>
 663 | 																		{dur.label}
 664 | 																	</SelectItem>
 665 | 																))}
 666 | 															</SelectContent>
 667 | 														</Select>
 668 | 													</div>
 669 | 
 670 | 													{/* Route */}
 671 | 													<div className='space-y-2'>
 672 | 														<Label>Route</Label>
 673 | 														<Select
 674 | 															disabled={readOnly}
 675 | 															onValueChange={value =>
 676 | 																updateMedication(index, "drugRoute", value)
 677 | 															}
 678 | 															value={item.drugRoute ?? "ORAL"}
 679 | 														>
 680 | 															<SelectTrigger>
 681 | 																<SelectValue />
 682 | 															</SelectTrigger>
 683 | 															<SelectContent>
 684 | 																{drugRoutes.map(route => (
 685 | 																	<SelectItem
 686 | 																		key={route.value}
 687 | 																		value={route.value}
 688 | 																	>
 689 | 																		{route.label}
 690 | 																	</SelectItem>
 691 | 																))}
 692 | 															</SelectContent>
 693 | 														</Select>
 694 | 													</div>
 695 | 
 696 | 													{/* Instructions - full width */}
 697 | 													<div className='space-y-2 md:col-span-4'>
 698 | 														<Label>Special Instructions</Label>
 699 | 														<Textarea
 700 | 															disabled={readOnly}
 701 | 															onChange={e =>
 702 | 																updateMedication(index, "instructions", e.target.value)
 703 | 															}
 704 | 															placeholder='e.g., Take with food, avoid alcohol...'
 705 | 															rows={2}
 706 | 															value={item.instructions ?? ""}
 707 | 														/>
 708 | 													</div>
 709 | 												</div>
 710 | 											</CardContent>
 711 | 										</Card>
 712 | 									))}
 713 | 								</div>
 714 | 							)}
 715 | 						</div>
 716 | 
 717 | 						{/* Status Display for existing prescriptions */}
 718 | 						{initialData?.status && (
 719 | 							<div className='flex items-center gap-2 rounded-lg bg-muted p-3'>
 720 | 								<span className='font-medium text-sm'>Prescription Status:</span>
 721 | 								<Badge
 722 | 									className={cn(
 723 | 										initialData.status === "active" && "bg-green-500",
 724 | 										initialData.status === "completed" && "bg-blue-500",
 725 | 										initialData.status === "discontinued" && "bg-red-500",
 726 | 										initialData.status === "expired" && "bg-gray-500"
 727 | 									)}
 728 | 								>
 729 | 									{initialData.status.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + initialData.status.slice(1)}
 730 | 								</Badge>
 731 | 							</div>
 732 | 						)}
 733 | 
 734 | 						{/* Actions */}
 735 | 						<Separator />
 736 | 						<div className='flex justify-end gap-4'>
 737 | 							{onCancel && (
 738 | 								<Button
 739 | 									disabled={isPending}
 740 | 									onClick={onCancel}
 741 | 									type='button'
 742 | 									variant='outline'
 743 | 								>
 744 | 									Cancel
 745 | 								</Button>
 746 | 							)}
 747 | 							{!readOnly && (
 748 | 								<form.SubmitButton
 749 | 									className='min-w-30'
 750 | 									disabled={isPending}
 751 | 								>
 752 | 									{isPending
 753 | 										? initialData?.id
 754 | 											? "Updating..."
 755 | 											: "Creating..."
 756 | 										: initialData?.id
 757 | 											? "Update Prescription"
 758 | 											: "Create Prescription"}
 759 | 								</form.SubmitButton>
 760 | 							)}
 761 | 						</div>
 762 | 					</form.Form>
 763 | 				</form.AppForm>
 764 | 			</CardContent>
 765 | 		</Card>
 766 | 	);
 767 | }
 768 | 
 769 | // Simplified version for quick prescription entry
 770 | type QuickPrescriptionFormProps = {
 771 | 	doctorId: string;
 772 | 	encounterId?: string;
 773 | 	medicalRecordId?: string;
 774 | 	onSuccess?: () => void;
 775 | 	patientId: string;
 776 | };
 777 | 
 778 | export function QuickPrescriptionForm({
 779 | 	patientId,
 780 | 	doctorId,
 781 | 	medicalRecordId,
 782 | 	encounterId,
 783 | 	onSuccess
 784 | }: QuickPrescriptionFormProps) {
 785 | 	return (
 786 | 		<PrescriptionForm
 787 | 			doctorId={doctorId}
 788 | 			encounterId={encounterId}
 789 | 			medicalRecordId={medicalRecordId}
 790 | 			onSuccess={onSuccess}
 791 | 			patientId={patientId}
 792 | 		/>
 793 | 	);
 794 | }
 795 | 
 796 | // Prescription view component (read-only)
 797 | type PrescriptionViewProps = {
 798 | 	onClose?: () => void;
 799 | 	prescriptionId: string;
 800 | };
 801 | 
 802 | export function PrescriptionView({ prescriptionId, onClose }: PrescriptionViewProps) {
 803 | 	const { data: prescription, isLoading } = useQuery(
 804 | 		orpc.prescription.getById.queryOptions({
 805 | 			input: { id: prescriptionId }
 806 | 		})
 807 | 	);
 808 | 
 809 | 	if (isLoading) {
 810 | 		return (
 811 | 			<Card>
 812 | 				<CardContent className='py-8 text-center'>Loading prescription...</CardContent>
 813 | 			</Card>
 814 | 		);
 815 | 	}
 816 | 
 817 | 	if (!prescription) {
 818 | 		return (
 819 | 			<Card>
 820 | 				<CardContent className='py-8 text-center text-red-500'>Prescription not found</CardContent>
 821 | 			</Card>
 822 | 		);
 823 | 	}
 824 | 
 825 | 	// Get prescribed items from the response
 826 | 	const prescribedItems = prescription.prescribedItems ?? [];
 827 | 
 828 | 	return (
 829 | 		<PrescriptionForm
 830 | 			initialData={
 831 | 				prescription
 832 | 					? {
 833 | 							id: prescription.id,
 834 | 							patientId: prescription.patientId,
 835 | 							doctorId: prescription.doctorId ?? "",
 836 | 							medicalRecordId: prescription.medicalRecordId,
 837 | 							encounterId: prescription.encounterId,
 838 | 							clinicId: prescription.clinicId ?? undefined,
 839 | 							issuedDate: new Date(prescription.issuedDate),
 840 | 							endDate: prescription.endDate ? new Date(prescription.endDate) : undefined,
 841 | 							status: prescription.status as "active" | "completed" | "discontinued" | "expired",
 842 | 							diagnosis: prescription.diagnosis ?? undefined,
 843 | 							notes: prescription.notes ?? undefined,
 844 | 							prescribedItems: (prescribedItems as PrescribedItemType[]).map(item => {
 845 | 								return {
 846 | 									id: item.id,
 847 | 									drugId: item.drugId, // Direct access, not item.drug?.id
 848 | 									dosageValue: item.dosageValue,
 849 | 									dosageUnit: item.dosageUnit,
 850 | 									frequency: item.frequency,
 851 | 									duration: item.duration,
 852 | 									instructions: item.instructions ?? undefined,
 853 | 									drugRoute: item.drugRoute ?? undefined
 854 | 								};
 855 | 							})
 856 | 						}
 857 | 					: undefined
 858 | 			}
 859 | 			onCancel={onClose}
 860 | 			readOnly
 861 | 		/>
 862 | 	);
 863 | }

```

`components/prescriptions/prescription-table.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/prescriptions/prescription-table.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   4 | import { Input } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/input";
   5 | import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/select";
   6 | import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/table";
   7 | import {
   8 | 	type ColumnDef,
   9 | 	flexRender,
  10 | 	getCoreRowModel,
  11 | 	getFilteredRowModel,
  12 | 	getPaginationRowModel,
  13 | 	getSortedRowModel,
  14 | 	useReactTable
  15 | } from "@tanstack/react-table";
  16 | import { ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, Filter, Search } from "lucide-react";
  17 | import { useState } from "react";
  18 | 
  19 | import type { Prescription } from "./columns";
  20 | 
  21 | interface PrescriptionTableProps {
  22 | 	data: Prescription[];
  23 | 	columns: ColumnDef<Prescription>[];
  24 | 	loading?: boolean;
  25 | 	onStatusUpdate?: (id: string, status: Prescription["status"]) => Promise<void>;
  26 | }
  27 | 
  28 | export function PrescriptionTable({ data, columns, loading, onStatusUpdate: _onStatusUpdate }: PrescriptionTableProps) {
  29 | 	const [globalFilter, setGlobalFilter] = useState("");
  30 | 	const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState<string>("all");
  31 | 
  32 | 	const filteredData = data.filter(item => {
  33 | 		const matchesSearch =
  34 | 			globalFilter === "" ||
  35 | 			item.patientName?.toLowerCase().includes(globalFilter.toLowerCase()) ||
  36 | 			item.medicationName?.toLowerCase().includes(globalFilter.toLowerCase()) ||
  37 | 			item.doctorName?.toLowerCase().includes(globalFilter.toLowerCase());
  38 | 
  39 | 		const matchesStatus = statusFilter === "all" || item.status === statusFilter;
  40 | 
  41 | 		return matchesSearch && matchesStatus;
  42 | 	});
  43 | 
  44 | 	const table = useReactTable({
  45 | 		data: filteredData,
  46 | 		columns,
  47 | 		getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel(),
  48 | 		getPaginationRowModel: getPaginationRowModel(),
  49 | 		getSortedRowModel: getSortedRowModel(),
  50 | 		getFilteredRowModel: getFilteredRowModel(),
  51 | 		initialState: {
  52 | 			pagination: {
  53 | 				pageSize: 10
  54 | 			}
  55 | 		}
  56 | 	});
  57 | 
  58 | 	if (loading) {
  59 | 		return (
  60 | 			<div className='space-y-4'>
  61 | 				<div className='h-12 animate-pulse rounded bg-gray-100' />
  62 | 				{[...Array(5)].map(_ => (
  63 | 					<div
  64 | 						className='h-16 animate-pulse rounded bg-gray-50'
  65 | 						key={_.toString()}
  66 | 					/>
  67 | 				))}
  68 | 			</div>
  69 | 		);
  70 | 	}
  71 | 
  72 | 	return (
  73 | 		<div className='space-y-4'>
  74 | 			{/* Filters */}
  75 | 			<div className='flex flex-col gap-4 sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:justify-between'>
  76 | 				<div className='relative max-w-sm flex-1'>
  77 | 					<Search className='absolute top-1/2 left-3 size-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400' />
  78 | 					<Input
  79 | 						className='pl-9'
  80 | 						onChange={e => setGlobalFilter(e.target.value)}
  81 | 						placeholder='Search by patient, medication, or doctor...'
  82 | 						value={globalFilter}
  83 | 					/>
  84 | 				</div>
  85 | 				<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
  86 | 					<Filter className='size-4 text-gray-400' />
  87 | 					<Select
  88 | 						onValueChange={setStatusFilter}
  89 | 						value={statusFilter}
  90 | 					>
  91 | 						<SelectTrigger className='w-45'>
  92 | 							<SelectValue placeholder='Filter by status' />
  93 | 						</SelectTrigger>
  94 | 						<SelectContent>
  95 | 							<SelectItem value='all'>All Status</SelectItem>
  96 | 							<SelectItem value='active'>Active</SelectItem>
  97 | 							<SelectItem value='completed'>Completed</SelectItem>
  98 | 							<SelectItem value='cancelled'>Cancelled</SelectItem>
  99 | 							<SelectItem value='expired'>Expired</SelectItem>
 100 | 							<SelectItem value='on_hold'>On Hold</SelectItem>
 101 | 						</SelectContent>
 102 | 					</Select>
 103 | 				</div>
 104 | 			</div>
 105 | 
 106 | 			{/* Table */}
 107 | 			<div className='rounded-md border'>
 108 | 				<Table>
 109 | 					<TableHeader>
 110 | 						{table.getHeaderGroups().map(headerGroup => (
 111 | 							<TableRow key={headerGroup.id}>
 112 | 								{headerGroup.headers.map(header => (
 113 | 									<TableHead key={header.id}>
 114 | 										{header.isPlaceholder
 115 | 											? null
 116 | 											: flexRender(header.column.columnDef.header, header.getContext())}
 117 | 									</TableHead>
 118 | 								))}
 119 | 							</TableRow>
 120 | 						))}
 121 | 					</TableHeader>
 122 | 					<TableBody>
 123 | 						{table.getRowModel().rows?.length ? (
 124 | 							table.getRowModel().rows.map(row => (
 125 | 								<TableRow
 126 | 									className='cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-50'
 127 | 									data-state={row.getIsSelected() && "selected"}
 128 | 									key={row.id}
 129 | 								>
 130 | 									{row.getVisibleCells().map(cell => (
 131 | 										<TableCell key={cell.id}>
 132 | 											{flexRender(cell.column.columnDef.cell, cell.getContext())}
 133 | 										</TableCell>
 134 | 									))}
 135 | 								</TableRow>
 136 | 							))
 137 | 						) : (
 138 | 							<TableRow>
 139 | 								<TableCell
 140 | 									className='h-24 text-center'
 141 | 									colSpan={columns.length}
 142 | 								>
 143 | 									No prescriptions found.
 144 | 								</TableCell>
 145 | 							</TableRow>
 146 | 						)}
 147 | 					</TableBody>
 148 | 				</Table>
 149 | 			</div>
 150 | 
 151 | 			{/* Pagination */}
 152 | 			<div className='flex items-center justify-between'>
 153 | 				<div className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>
 154 | 					Showing {table.getState().pagination.pageIndex * table.getState().pagination.pageSize + 1} to{" "}
 155 | 					{Math.min(
 156 | 						(table.getState().pagination.pageIndex + 1) * table.getState().pagination.pageSize,
 157 | 						table.getFilteredRowModel().rows.length
 158 | 					)}{" "}
 159 | 					of {table.getFilteredRowModel().rows.length} results
 160 | 				</div>
 161 | 				<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 162 | 					<Button
 163 | 						disabled={!table.getCanPreviousPage()}
 164 | 						onClick={() => table.previousPage()}
 165 | 						size='sm'
 166 | 						variant='outline'
 167 | 					>
 168 | 						<ChevronLeft className='size-4' />
 169 | 					</Button>
 170 | 					<div className='flex items-center gap-1'>
 171 | 						{Array.from({ length: Math.min(5, table.getPageCount()) }, (_, i) => {
 172 | 							const pageNumber = i + 1;
 173 | 							return (
 174 | 								<Button
 175 | 									className='w-8'
 176 | 									key={pageNumber}
 177 | 									onClick={() => table.setPageIndex(pageNumber - 1)}
 178 | 									size='sm'
 179 | 									variant={
 180 | 										table.getState().pagination.pageIndex + 1 === pageNumber ? "default" : "outline"
 181 | 									}
 182 | 								>
 183 | 									{pageNumber}
 184 | 								</Button>
 185 | 							);
 186 | 						})}
 187 | 						{table.getPageCount() > 5 && <span className='px-2'>...</span>}
 188 | 						{table.getPageCount() > 5 && (
 189 | 							<Button
 190 | 								className='w-8'
 191 | 								onClick={() => table.setPageIndex(table.getPageCount() - 1)}
 192 | 								size='sm'
 193 | 								variant='outline'
 194 | 							>
 195 | 								{table.getPageCount()}
 196 | 							</Button>
 197 | 						)}
 198 | 					</div>
 199 | 					<Button
 200 | 						disabled={!table.getCanNextPage()}
 201 | 						onClick={() => table.nextPage()}
 202 | 						size='sm'
 203 | 						variant='outline'
 204 | 					>
 205 | 						<ChevronRight className='size-4' />
 206 | 					</Button>
 207 | 				</div>
 208 | 			</div>
 209 | 		</div>
 210 | 	);
 211 | }

```

`components/reports/clinical-report.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/reports/clinical-report.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Activity, Calendar, Download, Printer, TrendingUp } from "lucide-react";
   4 | import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from "react";
   5 | 
   6 | interface ClinicalData {
   7 | 	totalPatients: number;
   8 | 	averageFormsCompleted: number;
   9 | 	completionRate: number;
  10 | 	popularFormTypes: Array<{ name: string; count: number }>;
  11 | 	dailySubmissions: Array<{ date: string; count: number }>;
  12 | }
  13 | 
  14 | interface ClinicalReportProps {
  15 | 	dateRange?: { from: Date; to: Date };
  16 | }
  17 | 
  18 | export function ClinicalReport({ dateRange }: ClinicalReportProps) {
  19 | 	const [data, setData] = useState<ClinicalData | null>(null);
  20 | 	const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  21 | 
  22 | 	const fetchClinicalData = useCallback(async () => {
  23 | 		setLoading(true);
  24 | 		try {
  25 | 			// Simulate API call - replace with actual API
  26 | 			await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));
  27 | 			console.log("Fetching clinical data for range:", dateRange);
  28 | 
  29 | 			// Mock data
  30 | 			setData({
  31 | 				totalPatients: 1247,
  32 | 				averageFormsCompleted: 3.4,
  33 | 				completionRate: 78.5,
  34 | 				popularFormTypes: [
  35 | 					{ name: "Patient Intake", count: 342 },
  36 | 					{ name: "Medical History", count: 298 },
  37 | 					{ name: "Consent Form", count: 267 },
  38 | 					{ name: "Follow-up Survey", count: 189 }
  39 | 				],
  40 | 				dailySubmissions: [
  41 | 					{ date: "2024-01-01", count: 45 },
  42 | 					{ date: "2024-01-02", count: 52 },
  43 | 					{ date: "2024-01-03", count: 48 },
  44 | 					{ date: "2024-01-04", count: 61 },
  45 | 					{ date: "2024-01-05", count: 55 }
  46 | 				]
  47 | 			});
  48 | 		} catch (error) {
  49 | 			console.error("Error fetching clinical data:", error);
  50 | 		} finally {
  51 | 			setLoading(false);
  52 | 		}
  53 | 	}, [dateRange]);
  54 | 
  55 | 	useEffect(() => {
  56 | 		fetchClinicalData();
  57 | 	}, [fetchClinicalData]);
  58 | 
  59 | 	const handleExport = () => {
  60 | 		console.log("Exporting clinical report...");
  61 | 	};
  62 | 
  63 | 	const handlePrint = () => {
  64 | 		window.print();
  65 | 	};
  66 | 
  67 | 	if (loading) {
  68 | 		return (
  69 | 			<div className='animate-pulse space-y-6'>
  70 | 				<div className='h-8 w-1/3 rounded bg-slate-700' />
  71 | 				<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 md:grid-cols-3'>
  72 | 					{[1, 2, 3].map(i => (
  73 | 						<div
  74 | 							className='h-32 rounded-2xl bg-slate-800/50'
  75 | 							key={i}
  76 | 						/>
  77 | 					))}
  78 | 				</div>
  79 | 			</div>
  80 | 		);
  81 | 	}
  82 | 
  83 | 	if (!data) return null;
  84 | 
  85 | 	const maxCount = Math.max(...data.dailySubmissions.map(d => d.count));
  86 | 
  87 | 	return (
  88 | 		<div className='space-y-6'>
  89 | 			{/* Header */}
  90 | 			<div className='flex items-center justify-between'>
  91 | 				<div>
  92 | 					<h2 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-bold text-2xl text-white'>

  94 | 							className='text-cyan-400'
  95 | 							size={24}
  96 | 						/>
  97 | 						Clinical Report
  98 | 					</h2>
  99 | 					<p className='mt-1 text-slate-400 text-sm'>Patient engagement and form completion analytics</p>
 100 | 				</div>

 102 | 					<button
 103 | 						className='flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-slate-600/50 bg-slate-700/50 px-4 py-2 text-white transition-colors hover:bg-slate-700'

 112 | 						onClick={handlePrint}
 113 | 						type='button'
 114 | 					>

 116 | 						Print
 117 | 					</button>

 120 |

 137 | 					</div>
 138 | 				</div>
 139 |

 146 | 								size={18}
 147 | 							/>
 148 | 						</div>

 151 | 					<div className='mt-2 text-slate-400 text-sm'>forms per patient</div>
 152 | 				</div>

 154 | 				<div className='rounded-2xl border border-cyan-500/20 bg-linear-to-br from-cyan-500/10 to-blue-500/10 p-6'>

 156 | 						<span className='text-slate-400 text-sm'>Completion Rate</span>

 158 | 							<TrendingUp
 159 | 								className='text-cyan-400'
 160 | 								size={18}
 161 | 							/>
 162 | 						</div>
 163 | 					</div>
 164 | 					<div className='font-bold text-3xl text-white'>{data.completionRate}%</div>
 165 | 					<div className='mt-2 flex items-center gap-1 text-emerald-400 text-sm'>
 166 | 						<TrendingUp size={14} />
 167 | 						+5.2% from last month
 168 | 					</div>
 169 | 				</div>
 170 | 			</div>
 171 | 
 172 | 			{/* Popular Form Types */}
 173 | 			<div className='rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/50 bg-slate-800/50 p-6 backdrop-blur-sm'>
 174 | 				<h3 className='mb-4 font-semibold text-lg text-white'>Most Used Form Types</h3>
 175 | 				<div className='space-y-3'>
 176 | 					{data.popularFormTypes.map(type => (
 177 | 						<div key={type.name}>
 178 | 							<div className='mb-1 flex items-center justify-between text-sm'>
 179 | 								<span className='text-slate-300'>{type.name}</span>

 185 | 									style={{
 186 | 										width: `${(type.count / data.popularFormTypes[0].count) * 100}%`
 187 | 									}}
 188 | 								/>
 189 | 							</div>
 190 | 						</div>
 191 | 					))}
 192 | 				</div>

 194 |

 199 | 					{data.dailySubmissions.map(day => (

 201 | 							className='flex flex-1 flex-col items-center gap-2'
 202 | 							key={day.date}
 203 | 						>
 204 | 							<div
 205 | 								className='w-full cursor-pointer rounded-t-lg bg-linear-to-t from-cyan-500 to-blue-600 transition-all duration-500 hover:opacity-80'
 206 | 								style={{ height: `${(day.count / maxCount) * 200}px` }}
 207 | 							/>
 208 | 							<span className='text-slate-500 text-xs'>
 209 | 								{new Date(day.date).toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
 210 | 									weekday: "short"
 211 | 								})}
 212 | 							</span>
 213 | 							<span className='font-medium text-cyan-400 text-xs'>{day.count}</span>
 214 | 						</div>
 215 | 					))}
 216 | 				</div>
 217 | 			</div>
 218 | 		</div>
 219 | 	);
```

`components/reports/financial-report.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/reports/financial-report.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { DollarSign, Download, PieChart, Printer, TrendingDown, TrendingUp } from "lucide-react";
   4 | import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from "react";
   5 | 
   6 | interface FinancialData {
   7 | 	totalRevenue: number;
   8 | 	totalExpenses: number;
   9 | 	netProfit: number;
  10 | 	profitMargin: number;
  11 | 	revenueBySource: Array<{ source: string; amount: number }>;
  12 | 	monthlyData: Array<{ month: string; revenue: number; expenses: number }>;
  13 | }
  14 | 
  15 | interface FinancialReportProps {
  16 | 	dateRange?: { from: Date; to: Date };
  17 | }
  18 | 
  19 | export function FinancialReport({ dateRange }: FinancialReportProps) {
  20 | 	const [data, setData] = useState<FinancialData | null>(null);
  21 | 	const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  22 | 
  23 | 	const fetchFinancialData = useCallback(async () => {
  24 | 		setLoading(true);
  25 | 		try {
  26 | 			await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));
  27 | 			console.log("Fetching financial data for range:", dateRange);
  28 | 
  29 | 			setData({
  30 | 				totalRevenue: 28450,
  31 | 				totalExpenses: 18230,
  32 | 				netProfit: 10220,
  33 | 				profitMargin: 35.9,
  34 | 				revenueBySource: [
  35 | 					{ source: "Consultations", amount: 12450 },
  36 | 					{ source: "Treatments", amount: 8900 },
  37 | 					{ source: "Lab Services", amount: 4500 },
  38 | 					{ source: "Other", amount: 2600 }
  39 | 				],
  40 | 				monthlyData: [
  41 | 					{ month: "Jan", revenue: 5200, expenses: 3800 },
  42 | 					{ month: "Feb", revenue: 5800, expenses: 4100 },
  43 | 					{ month: "Mar", revenue: 6100, expenses: 4300 },
  44 | 					{ month: "Apr", revenue: 5900, expenses: 4200 },
  45 | 					{ month: "May", revenue: 5450, expenses: 3830 }
  46 | 				]
  47 | 			});
  48 | 		} catch (error) {
  49 | 			console.error("Error fetching financial data:", error);
  50 | 		} finally {
  51 | 			setLoading(false);
  52 | 		}
  53 | 	}, [dateRange]);
  54 | 
  55 | 	useEffect(() => {
  56 | 		fetchFinancialData();
  57 | 	}, [fetchFinancialData]);
  58 | 
  59 | 	const formatCurrency = (amount: number) => {
  60 | 		return new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
  61 | 			style: "currency",
  62 | 			currency: "USD"
  63 | 		}).format(amount);
  64 | 	};
  65 | 
  66 | 	if (loading) {
  67 | 		return (
  68 | 			<div className='animate-pulse space-y-6'>
  69 | 				<div className='h-8 w-1/3 rounded bg-slate-700' />
  70 | 				<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 md:grid-cols-4'>
  71 | 					{[1, 2, 3, 4].map(i => (
  72 | 						<div
  73 | 							className='h-32 rounded-2xl bg-slate-800/50'
  74 | 							key={i}
  75 | 						/>
  76 | 					))}
  77 | 				</div>
  78 | 			</div>
  79 | 		);
  80 | 	}
  81 | 
  82 | 	if (!data) return null;
  83 | 
  84 | 	const maxAmount = Math.max(...data.revenueBySource.map(s => s.amount));
  85 | 
  86 | 	return (
  87 | 		<div className='space-y-6'>
  88 | 			{/* Header */}
  89 | 			<div className='flex items-center justify-between'>
  90 | 				<div>
  91 | 					<h2 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-bold text-2xl text-white'>
  92 | 						<DollarSign
  93 | 							className='text-emerald-400'
  94 | 							size={24}
  95 | 						/>
  96 | 						Financial Report
  97 | 					</h2>
  98 | 					<p className='mt-1 text-slate-400 text-sm'>Revenue, expenses, and profitability analysis</p>
  99 | 				</div>
 100 | 				<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 101 | 					<button
```

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/reports/operational-report.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { CheckCircle, Clock, Download, Printer, Settings, TrendingUp, XCircle } from "lucide-react";
   4 | import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from "react";
   5 | 
   6 | interface OperationalData {
   7 | 	totalForms: number;
   8 | 	averageCompletionTime: number;
   9 | 	responseRate: number;
  10 | 	pendingReviews: number;
  11 | 	formCompletionByType: Array<{
  12 | 		type: string;
  13 | 		completed: number;
  14 | 		total: number;
  15 | 	}>;
  16 | 	dailyActivity: Array<{ hour: string; submissions: number }>;
  17 | }
  18 | 
  19 | interface OperationalReportProps {
  20 | 	dateRange?: { from: Date; to: Date };
  21 | }
  22 | 
  23 | export function OperationalReport({ dateRange }: OperationalReportProps) {
  24 | 	const [data, setData] = useState<OperationalData | null>(null);
  25 | 	const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  26 | 
  27 | 	const fetchOperationalData = useCallback(async () => {
  28 | 		setLoading(true);
  29 | 		try {
  30 | 			await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));
  31 | 			console.log("Fetching operational data for range:", dateRange);
  32 | 			setData({
  33 | 				totalForms: 1247,
  34 | 				averageCompletionTime: 4.2,
  35 | 				responseRate: 78.5,
  36 | 				pendingReviews: 23,
  37 | 				formCompletionByType: [
  38 | 					{ type: "Patient Intake", completed: 342, total: 400 },
  39 | 					{ type: "Medical History", completed: 298, total: 350 },
  40 | 					{ type: "Consent Form", completed: 267, total: 300 },
  41 | 					{ type: "Follow-up Survey", completed: 189, total: 250 }

  52 | 					{ hour: "5 PM", submissions: 38 }
  53 | 				]
  54 | 			});
  55 | 		} catch (error) {
  56 | 			console.error("Error fetching operational data:", error);
  57 | 		} finally {
  58 | 			setLoading(false);
  59 | 		}
  60 | 	}, [dateRange]);
  61 | 
  62 | 	useEffect(() => {
  63 | 		fetchOperationalData();
  64 | 	}, [fetchOperationalData]);
  65 | 
  66 | 	if (loading) {
  67 | 		return (
  68 | 			<div className='animate-pulse space-y-6'>
  69 | 				<div className='h-8 w-1/3 rounded bg-slate-700' />
  70 | 				<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 md:grid-cols-4'>
  71 | 					{[1, 2, 3, 4].map(i => (
  72 | 						<div
  73 | 							className='h-32 rounded-2xl bg-slate-800/50'
  74 | 							key={i}
  75 | 						/>
  76 | 					))}
  77 | 				</div>
  78 | 			</div>
  79 | 		);
  80 | 	}
  81 | 
  82 | 	if (!data) return null;
  83 | 
  84 | 	const maxSubmissions = Math.max(...data.dailyActivity.map(a => a.submissions));
  85 | 
  86 | 	return (
  87 | 		<div className='space-y-6'>
  88 | 			{/* Header */}
  89 | 			<div className='flex items-center justify-between'>
  90 | 				<div>
  91 | 					<h2 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-bold text-2xl text-white'>
  92 | 						<Settings
  93 | 							className='text-purple-400'
  94 | 							size={24}
  95 | 						/>
  96 | 						Operational Report
  97 | 					</h2>
  98 | 					<p className='mt-1 text-slate-400 text-sm'>System performance and workflow efficiency metrics</p>
  99 | 				</div>
 100 | 				<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 101 | 					<button
 102 | 						className='flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-slate-600/50 bg-slate-700/50 px-4 py-2 text-white transition-colors hover:bg-slate-700'
 103 | 						type='button'
 104 | 					>
 105 | 						<Download size={16} />
 106 | 						Export
 107 | 					</button>
 108 | 					<button
 109 | 						className='flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-slate-600/50 bg-slate-700/50 px-4 py-2 text-white transition-colors hover:bg-slate-700'
 110 | 						type='button'
 111 | 					>
 112 | 						<Printer size={16} />
 113 | 						Print
 114 | 					</button>
 115 | 				</div>
 116 | 			</div>
 117 |

 119 | 			<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 md:grid-cols-4'>
```

```tsx
  50 | 				label='Search'
  51 | 				source='q'
  52 | 			/>,
  53 | 			<SelectInput
  54 | 				choices={GENDER_CHOICES}
  55 | 				key='gender'
  56 | 				source='gender'
  57 | 			/>,
  58 | 			<SelectInput
  59 | 				choices={STATUS_CHOICES}
  60 | 				key='status'
  61 | 				source='status'
  62 | 			/>
  63 | 		]}
  64 | 	>
  65 | 		<DataTable>
  66 | 			<DataTable.Col
  67 | 				label='MRN'
  68 | 				source='id'
  69 | 			/>
  70 | 			<DataTable.Col source='firstName' />
  71 | 			<DataTable.Col source='lastName' />
  72 | 			<DataTable.Col source='email' />
  73 | 			<DataTable.Col source='phone' />
  74 | 			<DataTable.Col source='gender' />
  75 | 			<DataTable.Col
  76 | 				label='DOB'
  77 | 				source='dateOfBirth'
  78 | 			/>
  79 | 			<DataTable.Col source='status' />
  80 | 			<DataTable.Col
  81 | 				label='Registered'
  82 | 				source='createdAt'
  83 | 			/>
  84 | 		</DataTable>
  85 | 	</List>
  86 | );
  87 | 
  88 | export const PatientCreate = () => (
  89 | 	<Create>
  90 | 		<SimpleForm>
  91 | 			<TextInput
  92 | 				required
  93 | 				source='firstName'
  94 | 			/>
  95 | 			<TextInput
  96 | 				required
  97 | 				source='lastName'
  98 | 			/>
  99 | 			<TextInput
 100 | 				source='email'
 101 | 				type='email'
 102 | 			/>
 103 | 			<TextInput source='phone' />
 104 | 			<DateInput
 105 | 				required
 106 | 				source='dateOfBirth'
 107 | 			/>
 108 | 			<SelectInput
 109 | 				choices={GENDER_CHOICES}
 110 | 				source='gender'
 111 | 			/>
 112 | 			<SelectInput
 113 | 				choices={BLOOD_GROUP_CHOICES}
 114 | 				source='bloodGroup'
 115 | 			/>
 116 | 			<TextInput
 117 | 				multiline
 118 | 				source='address'
 119 | 			/>
 120 | 			<TextInput
 121 | 				multiline
 122 | 				source='allergies'
 123 | 			/>
 124 | 			<TextInput
 125 | 				multiline
 126 | 				source='medicalConditions'
 127 | 			/>
 128 | 			<SelectInput
 129 | 				choices={STATUS_CHOICES}
 130 | 				defaultValue='ACTIVE'
 131 | 				source='status'
 132 | 			/>
 133 | 			<TextInput
 134 | 				label='Medical Record Number'
 135 | 				source='mrn'
 136 | 			/>
 137 | 			<TextInput source='emergencyContactName' />
 138 | 			<TextInput source='emergencyContactNumber' />
 139 | 		</SimpleForm>
 140 | 	</Create>
 141 | );
 142 | 
 143 | export const PatientEdit = () => (
 144 | 	<Edit>
 145 | 		<SimpleForm>
 146 | 			<TextInput
 147 | 				required
 148 | 				source='firstName'
 149 | 			/>
 150 | 			<TextInput
 151 | 				required
 152 | 				source='lastName'
 153 | 			/>
 154 | 			<TextInput
 155 | 				source='email'
 156 | 				type='email'
 157 | 			/>
 158 | 			<TextInput source='phone' />
 159 | 			<DateInput
 160 | 				required
 161 | 				source='dateOfBirth'
 162 | 			/>
 163 | 			<SelectInput
 164 | 				choices={GENDER_CHOICES}
 165 | 				source='gender'
 166 | 			/>
 167 | 			<SelectInput
 168 | 				choices={BLOOD_GROUP_CHOICES}
 169 | 				source='bloodGroup'
 170 | 			/>
 171 | 			<TextInput
 172 | 				multiline
 173 | 				source='address'
 174 | 			/>
 175 | 			<TextInput
 176 | 				multiline
 177 | 				source='allergies'
 178 | 			/>
 179 | 			<TextInput
 180 | 				multiline
 181 | 				source='medicalConditions'
 182 | 			/>
 183 | 			<SelectInput
 184 | 				choices={STATUS_CHOICES}
 185 | 				source='status'
 186 | 			/>
 187 | 			<TextInput source='emergencyContactName' />
 188 | 			<TextInput source='emergencyContactNumber' />
 189 | 		</SimpleForm>
 190 | 	</Edit>
 191 | );
 192 | 
 193 | export const PatientShow = () => (
 194 | 	<Show>
 195 | 		<div className='flex flex-col gap-8 p-4'>
 196 | 			<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 md:grid-cols-2'>
 197 | 				<div className='flex flex-col gap-4'>
 198 | 					<h3 className='font-bold text-lg'>Summary</h3>
 199 | 					<TextField source='firstName' />
 200 | 					<TextField source='lastName' />
 201 | 					<EmailField source='email' />
 202 | 					<TextField source='phone' />
 203 | 					<RecordField
 204 | 						label='Date of Birth'
 205 | 						source='dateOfBirth'
 206 | 					>
 207 | 						<DateField source='dateOfBirth' />
 208 | 					</RecordField>
 209 | 					<TextField source='gender' />
 210 | 					<TextField source='bloodGroup' />
 211 | 					<TextField source='status' />
 212 | 				</div>
 213 | 
 214 | 				<div className='flex flex-col gap-4'>
 215 | 					<h3 className='font-bold text-lg'>Medical Info</h3>
 216 | 					<TextField source='allergies' />
 217 | 					<TextField source='medicalConditions' />
 218 | 					<TextField source='medicalHistory' />
 219 | 				</div>
 220 | 			</div>
 221 | 
 222 | 			<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 md:grid-cols-2'>
 223 | 				<div className='flex flex-col gap-4'>
 224 | 					<h3 className='font-bold text-lg'>Contact</h3>
 225 | 					<TextField source='address' />
 226 | 					<TextField source='emergencyContactName' />
 227 | 					<TextField source='emergencyContactNumber' />
 228 | 				</div>
 229 | 
 230 | 				<div className='flex flex-col gap-4'>
 231 | 					<h3 className='font-bold text-lg'>Statistics</h3>
 232 | 					<RecordField
 233 | 						label='Registered'
 234 | 						source='createdAt'
 235 | 					>
 236 | 						<DateField source='createdAt' />
 237 | 					</RecordField>
 238 | 					<RecordField
 239 | 						label='Last Updated'
 240 | 						source='updatedAt'
 241 | 					>
 242 | 						<DateField source='updatedAt' />
 243 | 					</RecordField>
 244 | 				</div>
 245 | 			</div>
 246 | 		</div>
 247 | 	</Show>
 248 | );

```

`components/search-dropdown.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { Input } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/input";
   2 | import { ScrollArea } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/scroll-area";
   3 | import { useQuery } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   4 | import { Link, useParams, useRouter } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   5 | import { Building2, Calendar, FileText, Pill, Search, Stethoscope, User, X } from "lucide-react";
   6 | import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
   7 | 
   8 | import { cn } from
   9 | @clinic
  10 | /ui/bil / utils;
  11 | ";
  12 | 
  13 | // Types for search results
  14 | type SearchResultType = "patient" | "doctor" | "appointment" | "prescription" | "medicalRecord" | "clinic";
  15 | 
  16 | interface SearchResult {
  17 | 	id: string;
  18 | 	name: string;
  19 | 	type: SearchResultType;
  20 | 	href: string;
  21 | 	subtitle?: string;
  22 | 	icon?: React.ReactNode;
  23 | 	metadata?: Record<string, unknown>;
  24 | }
  25 | 
  26 | interface PatientSearchResponse {
  27 | 	id: string;
  28 | 	firstName: string;
  29 | 	lastName: string;
  30 | 	mrn?: string;
  31 | 	dateOfBirth?: string;
  32 | 	phone?: string;
  33 | 	email?: string;
  34 | }
  35 | 
  36 | interface DoctorSearchResponse {
  37 | 	id: string;
  38 | 	name: string;
  39 | 	specialty?: string;
  40 | 	department?: string;
  41 | 	email?: string;
  42 | 	phone?: string;
  43 | }
  44 | 
  45 | interface AppointmentSearchResponse {
  46 | 	id: string;
  47 | 	appointmentDate: string;
  48 | 	status: string;
  49 | 	type?: string;
  50 | 	time?: string;
  51 | 	doctorId: string;
  52 | 	doctor?: { name: string };
  53 | }
  54 | 
  55 | interface PrescriptionSearchResponse {
  56 | 	id: string;
  57 | 	status: string;
  58 | 	issuedDate: string;
  59 | 	patient?: { firstName: string; lastName: string };
  60 | 	prescribedItems?: unknown[];
  61 | }
  62 | 
  63 | interface MedicalRecordSearchResponse {
  64 | 	id: string;
  65 | 	diagnosis?: string;
  66 | 	status: string;
  67 | 	createdAt: string;
  68 | 	doctorId: string;
  69 | }
  70 | 
  71 | interface ClinicSearchResponse {
  72 | 	id: string;
  73 | 	name: string;
  74 | 	address?: string;
  75 | 	phone?: string;
  76 | 	email?: string;
  77 | }
  78 | 
  79 | // Map result type to icon and color
  80 | const getResultIcon = (type: SearchResultType) => {
  81 | 	switch (type) {
  82 | 		case "patient":
  83 | 			return <User className='h-4 w-4 text-blue-500' />;
  84 | 		case "doctor":
  85 | 			return <Stethoscope className='h-4 w-4 text-green-500' />;
  86 | 		case "appointment":
  87 | 			return <Calendar className='h-4 w-4 text-purple-500' />;
  88 | 		case "prescription":
  89 | 			return <Pill className='h-4 w-4 text-orange-500' />;
  90 | 		case "medicalRecord":
  91 | 			return <FileText className='h-4 w-4 text-red-500' />;
  92 | 		case "clinic":
  93 | 			return <Building2 className='h-4 w-4 text-gray-500' />;
  94 | 		default:
  95 | 			return <Search className='h-4 w-4' />;
  96 | 	}
  97 | };
  98 | 
  99 | export default function SearchDropdownComponent() {
 100 | 	const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState("");
 101 | 	const [debouncedSearchTerm, setDebouncedSearchTerm] = useState("");
 102 | 	const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
 103 | 	const [highlightedIndex, setHighlightedIndex] = useState(-1);
 104 | 
 105 | 	const router = useRouter();
 106 | 	const inputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);
 107 | 	const dropdownRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
 108 | 
 109 | 	// Get current clinic from URL params or context
 110 | 	const params = useParams({ strict: false }) as {
 111 | 		clinicId?: string;
 112 | 		patientId?: string;
 113 | 		doctorId?: string;
 114 | 	};
 115 | 	const clinicId = params.clinicId || localStorage.getItem("currentClinicId");
 116 | 
 117 | 	// Debounce search term
 118 | 	useEffect(() => {
 119 | 		const timer = setTimeout(() => {
 120 | 			setDebouncedSearchTerm(searchTerm);
 121 | 		}, 300);
 122 | 
 123 | 		return () => clearTimeout(timer);
 124 | 	}, [searchTerm]);
 125 | 
 126 | 	// Search across multiple entities using your backend API
 127 | 	const { data, isLoading, isError } = useQuery<{ results: SearchResult[]; total: number }>({
 128 | 		queryKey: ["global-search", debouncedSearchTerm, clinicId],
 129 | 		queryFn: async () => {
 130 | 			if (!debouncedSearchTerm || debouncedSearchTerm.length < 2) {
 131 | 				return { results: [], total: 0 };
 132 | 			}
 133 | 
 134 | 			// Parallel search across different entities
 135 | 			const [patients, doctors, appointments, prescriptions, medicalRecords, clinics] = await Promise.all([
 136 | 				// Search patients
 137 | 				fetch(`/api/patients/search?clinicId=${clinicId}&q=${encodeURIComponent(debouncedSearchTerm)}`).catch(
 138 | 					() => ({ json: () => [] })
 139 | 				),
 140 | 				// Search doctors
 141 | 				fetch(`/api/doctors/search?clinicId=${clinicId}&q=${encodeURIComponent(debouncedSearchTerm)}`).catch(
 142 | 					() => ({ json: () => [] })
 143 | 				),
 144 | 				// Search appointments
 145 | 				fetch(
 146 | 					`/api/appointments/search?clinicId=${clinicId}&q=${encodeURIComponent(debouncedSearchTerm)}`
 147 | 				).catch(() => ({ json: () => [] })),
 148 | 				// Search prescriptions
 149 | 				fetch(
 150 | 					`/api/prescriptions/search?clinicId=${clinicId}&q=${encodeURIComponent(debouncedSearchTerm)}`
 151 | 				).catch(() => ({ json: () => [] })),
 152 | 				// Search medical records
 153 | 				fetch(
 154 | 					`/api/medical-records/search?clinicId=${clinicId}&q=${encodeURIComponent(debouncedSearchTerm)}`
 155 | 				).catch(() => ({ json: () => [] })),
 156 | 				// Search clinics (only if user has admin role or no clinic context)
 157 | 				!clinicId
 158 | 					? fetch(`/api/clinics/search?q=${encodeURIComponent(debouncedSearchTerm)}`).catch(() => ({
 159 | 							json: () => []
 160 | 						}))
 161 | 					: Promise.resolve({ json: () => [] })
 162 | 			]);
 163 | 
 164 | 			const patientsData: PatientSearchResponse[] = (await patients.json?.()) ?? [];
 165 | 			const doctorsData: DoctorSearchResponse[] = (await doctors.json?.()) ?? [];
 166 | 			const appointmentsData: AppointmentSearchResponse[] = (await appointments.json?.()) ?? [];
 167 | 			const prescriptionsData: PrescriptionSearchResponse[] = (await prescriptions.json?.()) ?? [];
 168 | 			const medicalRecordsData: MedicalRecordSearchResponse[] = (await medicalRecords.json?.()) ?? [];
 169 | 			const clinicsData: ClinicSearchResponse[] = (await clinics.json?.()) ?? [];
 170 | 
 171 | 			// Transform results into consistent format
 172 | 			const results: SearchResult[] = [
 173 | 				...patientsData.map(p => ({
 174 | 					id: p.id,
 175 | 					name: `${p.firstName} ${p.lastName}`,
 176 | 					type: "patient" as const,
 177 | 					href: `/dashboard/${clinicId}/patients/${p.id}`,
 178 | 					subtitle: `MRN: ${p.mrn || "N/A"} • DOB: ${p.dateOfBirth ? new Date(p.dateOfBirth).toLocaleDateString() : "N/A"}`,
 179 | 					metadata: { mrn: p.mrn, phone: p.phone, email: p.email }
 180 | 				})),
 181 | 				...doctorsData.map(d => ({
 182 | 					id: d.id,
 183 | 					name: d.name,
 184 | 					type: "doctor" as const,
 185 | 					href: `/dashboard/${clinicId}/doctors/${d.id}`,
 186 | 					subtitle: `${d.specialty || "General"} • ${d.department || "N/A"}`,
 187 | 					metadata: { specialty: d.specialty, email: d.email, phone: d.phone }
 188 | 				})),
 189 | 				...appointmentsData.map(a => ({
 190 | 					id: a.id,
 191 | 					name: `Appointment with ${a.doctor?.name || "Doctor"} on ${new Date(a.appointmentDate).toLocaleDateString()}`,
 192 | 					type: "appointment" as const,
 193 | 					href: `/dashboard/${clinicId}/appointments/${a.id}`,
 194 | 					subtitle: `${a.status} • ${a.type || "General"} • ${a.time || ""}`,
 195 | 					metadata: { status: a.status, date: a.appointmentDate, doctorId: a.doctorId }
 196 | 				})),
 197 | 				...prescriptionsData.map(p => ({
 198 | 					id: p.id,
 199 | 					name: `Prescription for ${p.patient?.firstName} ${p.patient?.lastName}`,
 200 | 					type: "prescription" as const,
 201 | 					href: `/dashboard/${clinicId}/prescriptions/${p.id}`,
 202 | 					subtitle: `${p.status} • Issued: ${new Date(p.issuedDate).toLocaleDateString()}`,
 203 | 					metadata: { status: p.status, issuedDate: p.issuedDate, items: p.prescribedItems?.length }
 204 | 				})),
 205 | 				...medicalRecordsData.map(m => ({
 206 | 					id: m.id,
 207 | 					name: `Medical Record - ${m.diagnosis?.substring(0, 50) || "Visit"}`,
 208 | 					type: "medicalRecord" as const,
 209 | 					href: `/dashboard/${clinicId}/medical-records/${m.id}`,
 210 | 					subtitle: `${m.status} • ${new Date(m.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}`,
 211 | 					metadata: { diagnosis: m.diagnosis, doctorId: m.doctorId }
 212 | 				})),
 213 | 				...clinicsData.map(c => ({
 214 | 					id: c.id,
 215 | 					name: c.name,
 216 | 					type: "clinic" as const,
 217 | 					href: `/dashboard/${c.id}`,
 218 | 					subtitle: `${c.address || "No address"} • ${c.phone || "No phone"}`,
 219 | 					metadata: { address: c.address, phone: c.phone, email: c.email }
 220 | 				}))
 221 | 			];
 222 | 
 223 | 			// Sort results by relevance (you can customize this)
 224 | 			results.sort((a, b) => {
 225 | 				const aExact = a.name.toLowerCase().includes(debouncedSearchTerm.toLowerCase());
 226 | 				const bExact = b.name.toLowerCase().includes(debouncedSearchTerm.toLowerCase());
 227 | 				if (aExact && !bExact) return -1;
 228 | 				if (!aExact && bExact) return 1;
 229 | 				return 0;
 230 | 			});
 231 | 
 232 | 			return { results, total: results.length };
 233 | 		},
 234 | 		enabled: debouncedSearchTerm.length >= 2,
 235 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 30, // 30 seconds
 236 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 // 1 minute
 237 | 	});
 238 | 
 239 | 	const results = data?.results ?? [];
 240 | 	const hasResults = results.length > 0;
 241 | 
 242 | 	// Handle keyboard navigation
 243 | 	const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
 244 | 		if (e.key === "ArrowDown") {
 245 | 			e.preventDefault();
 246 | 			setHighlightedIndex(prev => (prev < results.length - 1 ? prev + 1 : 0));
 247 | 		} else if (e.key === "ArrowUp") {
 248 | 			e.preventDefault();
 249 | 			setHighlightedIndex(prev => (prev > 0 ? prev - 1 : results.length - 1));
 250 | 		} else if (e.key === "Enter" && highlightedIndex >= 0 && results[highlightedIndex]) {
 251 | 			e.preventDefault();
 252 | 			router.navigate({ to: results[highlightedIndex].href });
 253 | 			setSearchTerm("");
 254 | 			setIsOpen(false);
 255 | 			inputRef.current?.blur();
 256 | 		} else if (e.key === "Escape") {
 257 | 			setIsOpen(false);
 258 | 			inputRef.current?.blur();
 259 | 		}
 260 | 	};
 261 | 
 262 | 	// Close dropdown when clicking outside
 263 | 	useEffect(() => {
 264 | 		const handleClickOutside = (event: MouseEvent) => {
 265 | 			if (dropdownRef.current && !dropdownRef.current.contains(event.target as Node)) {
 266 | 				setIsOpen(false);
 267 | 				setHighlightedIndex(-1);
 268 | 			}
 269 | 		};
 270 | 
 271 | 		document.addEventListener("mousedown", handleClickOutside);
 272 | 		return () => document.removeEventListener("mousedown", handleClickOutside);
 273 | 	}, []);
 274 | 
 275 | 	// Open dropdown when typing
 276 | 	useEffect(() => {
 277 | 		if (searchTerm.length >= 2) {
 278 | 			setIsOpen(true);
 279 | 			setHighlightedIndex(-1);
 280 | 		} else {
 281 | 			setIsOpen(false);
 282 | 		}
 283 | 	}, [searchTerm]);
 284 | 
 285 | 	return (
 286 | 		<div
 287 | 			className='relative w-full max-w-md font-sans'
 288 | 			ref={dropdownRef}
 289 | 		>
 290 | 			<div className='relative'>
 291 | 				<Search className='absolute top-1/2 left-3 h-4 w-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-muted-foreground' />
 292 | 				<Input
 293 | 					autoCapitalize='off'
 294 | 					autoCorrect='off'
 295 | 					className='pr-10 pl-9 font-sans'
 296 | 					onChange={e => {
 297 | 						setSearchTerm(e.target.value);
 298 | 					}}
 299 | 					onFocus={() => {
 300 | 						if (searchTerm.length >= 2 && results.length > 0) {
 301 | 							setIsOpen(true);
 302 | 						}
 303 | 					}}
 304 | 					onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
 305 | 					placeholder='Search patients, doctors, appointments...'
 306 | 					ref={inputRef}
 307 | 					type='text'
 308 | 					value={searchTerm}
 309 | 				/>
 310 | 				{searchTerm && (
 311 | 					<button
 312 | 						className='absolute top-1/2 right-3 -translate-y-1/2 text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground'
 313 | 						onClick={() => {
 314 | 							setSearchTerm("");
 315 | 							setIsOpen(false);
 316 | 							inputRef.current?.focus();
 317 | 						}}
 318 | 						type='button'
 319 | 					>
 320 | 						<X className='h-4 w-4' />
 321 | 					</button>
 322 | 				)}
 323 | 			</div>
 324 | 
 325 | 			{isOpen && (
 326 | 				<div className='absolute z-50 mt-1 w-full rounded-md border bg-white shadow-lg'>
 327 | 					<ScrollArea className='max-h-100'>
 328 | 						{isLoading ? (
 329 | 							<div className='flex items-center justify-center py-8'>
 330 | 								<div className='h-6 w-6 animate-spin rounded-full border-2 border-primary border-t-transparent' />
 331 | 							</div>
 332 | 						) : isError ? (
 333 | 							<div className='py-8 text-center text-red-500 text-sm'>
 334 | 								Failed to load results. Please try again.
 335 | 							</div>
 336 | 						) : !hasResults ? (
 337 | 							<div className='py-8 text-center text-muted-foreground text-sm'>
 338 | 								No results found for "{debouncedSearchTerm}"
 339 | 							</div>
 340 | 						) : (
 341 | 							<div className='py-2'>
 342 | 								{results.map((result, index) => (
 343 | 									<Link
 344 | 										key={`${result.type}-${result.id}`}
 345 | 										onClick={() => {
 346 | 											setSearchTerm("");
 347 | 											setIsOpen(false);
 348 | 											inputRef.current?.blur();
 349 | 										}}
 350 | 										preload='intent'
 351 | 										to={result.href}
 352 | 									>
 353 | 										<div
 354 | 											aria-selected={index === highlightedIndex}
 355 | 											className={cn(
 356 | 												"flex cursor-pointer items-start gap-3 px-4 py-3 transition-colors",
 357 | 												index === highlightedIndex && "bg-accent"
 358 | 											)}
 359 | 											onMouseEnter={() => setHighlightedIndex(index)}
 360 | 											role='option'
 361 | 											tabIndex={0}
 362 | 										>
 363 | 											<div className='mt-0.5 shrink-0'>{getResultIcon(result.type)}</div>
 364 | 											<div className='min-w-0 flex-1'>
 365 | 												<div className='font-medium text-sm'>{result.name}</div>
 366 | 												{result.subtitle && (
 367 | 													<div className='mt-0.5 truncate text-muted-foreground text-xs'>
 368 | 														{result.subtitle}
 369 | 													</div>
 370 | 												)}
 371 | 												<div className='mt-0.5 text-primary/70 text-xs capitalize'>
 372 | 													{result.type}
 373 | 												</div>
 374 | 											</div>
 375 | 										</div>
 376 | 									</Link>
 377 | 								))}
 378 | 							</div>
 379 | 						)}
 380 | 					</ScrollArea>
 381 | 				</div>
 382 | 			)}
 383 | 		</div>
 384 | 	);
 385 | }

```

`components/sign-in-form.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   2 | import { Input } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/input";
   3 | import { Label } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/label";
   4 | import { useForm } from "@tanstack/react-form";
   5 | import { useNavigate } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   6 | import { toast } from "sonner";
   7 | import z from "zod";
   8 | 
   9 | import { authClient } from "@/lib/auth-client";
  10 | 
  11 | import Loader from "./loader";
  12 | 
  13 | export default function SignInForm({ onSwitchToSignUp }: { onSwitchToSignUp: () => void }) {
  14 | 	const navigate = useNavigate({
  15 | 		from: "/"
  16 | 	});
  17 | 	const { isPending } = authClient.useSession();
  18 | 
  19 | 	const form = useForm({
  20 | 		defaultValues: {
  21 | 			email: "",
  22 | 			password: ""
  23 | 		},
  24 | 		onSubmit: async ({ value }) => {
  25 | 			await authClient.signIn.email(
  26 | 				{
  27 | 					email: value.email,
  28 | 					password: value.password
  29 | 				},
  30 | 				{
  31 | 					onSuccess: () => {
  32 | 						navigate({
  33 | 							to: "/dashboard"
  34 | 						});
  35 | 						toast.success("Sign in successful");
  36 | 					},
  37 | 					onError: error => {
  38 | 						toast.error(error.error.message || error.error.statusText);
  39 | 					}
  40 | 				}
  41 | 			);
  42 | 		},
  43 | 		validators: {
  44 | 			onSubmit: z.object({
  45 | 				email: z.email("Invalid email address"),
  46 | 				password: z.string().min(8, "Password must be at least 8 characters")
  47 | 			})
  48 | 		}
  49 | 	});
  50 | 
  51 | 	if (isPending) {
  52 | 		return <Loader />;
  53 | 	}
  54 | 
  55 | 	return (
  56 | 		<div className='mx-auto mt-10 w-full max-w-md p-6'>
  57 | 			<h1 className='mb-6 text-center font-bold text-3xl'>Welcome Back</h1>
  58 | 
  59 | 			<form
  60 | 				className='space-y-4'
  61 | 				onSubmit={e => {
  62 | 					e.preventDefault();
  63 | 					e.stopPropagation();
  64 | 					form.handleSubmit();
  65 | 				}}
  66 | 			>
  67 | 				<div>
  68 | 					<form.Field name='email'>
  69 | 						{field => (
  70 | 							<div className='space-y-2'>
  71 | 								<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Email</Label>
  72 | 								<Input
  73 | 									id={field.name}
  74 | 									name={field.name}
  75 | 									onBlur={field.handleBlur}
  76 | 									onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
  77 | 									type='email'
  78 | 									value={field.state.value}
  79 | 								/>
  80 | 								{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
  81 | 									<p
  82 | 										className='text-red-500'
  83 | 										key={error?.message}
  84 | 									>
  85 | 										{error?.message}
  86 | 									</p>
  87 | 								))}
  88 | 							</div>
  89 | 						)}
  90 | 					</form.Field>
  91 | 				</div>
  92 | 
  93 | 				<div>
  94 | 					<form.Field name='password'>
  95 | 						{field => (
  96 | 							<div className='space-y-2'>
  97 | 								<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Password</Label>
  98 | 								<Input
  99 | 									id={field.name}
 100 | 									name={field.name}
 101 | 									onBlur={field.handleBlur}
 102 | 									onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 103 | 									type='password'
 104 | 									value={field.state.value}
 105 | 								/>
 106 | 								{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
 107 | 									<p
 108 | 										className='text-red-500'
 109 | 										key={error?.message}
 110 | 									>
 111 | 										{error?.message}
 112 | 									</p>
 113 | 								))}
 114 | 							</div>
 115 | 						)}
 116 | 					</form.Field>
 117 | 				</div>
 118 | 
 119 | 				<form.Subscribe>
 120 | 					{state => (
 121 | 						<Button
 122 | 							className='w-full'
 123 | 							disabled={!state.canSubmit || state.isSubmitting}
 124 | 							type='submit'
 125 | 						>
 126 | 							{state.isSubmitting ? "Submitting..." : "Sign In"}
 127 | 						</Button>
 128 | 					)}
 129 | 				</form.Subscribe>
 130 | 			</form>
 131 | 
 132 | 			<div className='mt-4 text-center'>
 133 | 				<Button
 134 | 					className='text-indigo-600 hover:text-indigo-800'
 135 | 					onClick={onSwitchToSignUp}
 136 | 					variant='link'
 137 | 				>
 138 | 					Need an account? Sign Up
 139 | 				</Button>
 140 | 			</div>
 141 | 		</div>
 142 | 	);
 143 | }
```
