`components/sign-up-form.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   2 | import { Input } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/input";
   3 | import { Label } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/label";
   4 | import { useForm } from "@tanstack/react-form";
   5 | import { useNavigate } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   6 | import { toast } from "sonner";
   7 | import z from "zod";
   8 | 
   9 | import { authClient } from "@/lib/auth-client";
  10 | 
  11 | import Loader from "./loader";
  12 | 
  13 | export default function SignUpForm({ onSwitchToSignIn }: { onSwitchToSignIn: () => void }) {
  14 | 	const navigate = useNavigate({
  15 | 		from: "/"
  16 | 	});
  17 | 	const { isPending } = authClient.useSession();
  18 | 
  19 | 	const form = useForm({
  20 | 		defaultValues: {
  21 | 			email: "",
  22 | 			password: "",
  23 | 			name: ""
  24 | 		},
  25 | 		onSubmit: async ({ value }) => {
  26 | 			await authClient.signUp.email(
  27 | 				{
  28 | 					email: value.email,
  29 | 					password: value.password,
  30 | 					name: value.name
  31 | 				},
  32 | 				{
  33 | 					onSuccess: () => {
  34 | 						navigate({
  35 | 							to: "/dashboard"
  36 | 						});

  38 | 					},

  42 | 				}
  43 | 			);
  44 | 		},

  46 | 			onSubmit: z.object({
  47 | 				name: z.string().min(2, "Name must be at least 2 characters"),
  48 | 				email: z.email("Invalid email address"),
  49 | 				password: z.string().min(8, "Password must be at least 8 characters")
  50 | 			})
  51 | 		}
  52 | 	});
  53 |

  55 | 		return <Loader />;
  56 | 	}

  68 | 				}}

  70 | 				<div>
  71 | 					<form.Field name='name'>

  73 | 							<div className='space-y-2'>
  74 | 								<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Name</Label>
  75 | 								<Input
  76 | 									id={field.name}
  77 | 									name={field.name}
  78 | 									onBlur={field.handleBlur}
  79 | 									onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
  80 | 									value={field.state.value}
  81 | 								/>
  82 | 								{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
  83 | 									<p
  84 | 										className='text-red-500'
  85 | 										key={error?.message}
  86 | 									>
  87 | 										{error?.message}
  88 | 									</p>
  89 | 								))}
  90 | 							</div>
  91 | 						)}
  92 | 					</form.Field>
  93 | 				</div>
  94 | 
  95 | 				<div>
  96 | 					<form.Field name='email'>
  97 | 						{field => (
  98 | 							<div className='space-y-2'>
  99 | 								<Label htmlFor={field.name}>Email</Label>
 100 | 								<Input
 101 | 									id={field.name}
 102 | 									name={field.name}
 103 | 									onBlur={field.handleBlur}
 104 | 									onChange={e => field.handleChange(e.target.value)}
 105 | 									type='email'
 106 | 									value={field.state.value}
 107 | 								/>
 108 | 								{field.state.meta.errors.map(error => (
 109 | 									<p
 110 | 										className='text-red-500'
 111 | 										key={error?.message}
 112 | 									>
 113 | 										{error?.message}
 114 | 									</p>

 116 | 							</div>
 117 | 						)}
 118 | 					</form.Field>
```

`components/staff/staff-columns.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/staff/staff-columns.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { DataTableColumnHeader } from "@clinic/ui/components/data-table/DataTableColumnHeader";
   4 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
   5 | import { Checkbox } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/checkbox";
   6 | import type { ColumnDef } from "@tanstack/react-table";
   7 | 
   8 | export interface StaffMember {
   9 | 	id: string;
  10 | 	name: string;
  11 | 	email: string | null;
  12 | 	role: string;
  13 | 	department?: string | null;
  14 | 	phone?: string | null;
  15 | 	isActive: boolean | null;
  16 | 	createdAt: Date;
  17 | }
  18 | 
  19 | export const staffColumns: ColumnDef<StaffMember>[] = [
  20 | 	{
  21 | 		id: "select",
  22 | 		header: ({ table }) => (
  23 | 			<Checkbox
  24 | 				aria-label='Select all'
  25 | 				checked={table.getIsAllPageRowsSelected() || (table.getIsSomePageRowsSelected() && "indeterminate")}
  26 | 				className='translate-y-[2px]'
  27 | 				onCheckedChange={value => table.toggleAllPageRowsSelected(!!value)}
  28 | 			/>
  29 | 		),
  30 | 		cell: ({ row }) => (
  31 | 			<Checkbox
  32 | 				aria-label='Select row'
  33 | 				checked={row.getIsSelected()}
  34 | 				className='translate-y-[2px]'
  35 | 				onCheckedChange={value => row.toggleSelected(!!value)}
  36 | 			/>
  37 | 		),
  38 | 		enableSorting: false,
  39 | 		enableHiding: false
  40 | 	},
  41 | 	{
  42 | 		accessorKey: "name",
  43 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
  44 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
  45 | 				column={column}
  46 | 				title='Name'
  47 | 			/>
  48 | 		),
  49 | 		cell: ({ row }) => <div className='font-medium'>{row.getValue("name")}</div>,
  50 | 		filterFn: (row, _id, value) => (row.getValue("name") as string).toLowerCase().includes(value.toLowerCase())
  51 | 	},
  52 | 	{
  53 | 		accessorKey: "role",
  54 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
  55 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
  56 | 				column={column}
  57 | 				title='Role'
  58 | 			/>
  59 | 		),
  60 | 		cell: ({ row }) => (
  61 | 			<Badge
  62 | 				className='capitalize'
  63 | 				variant='outline'
  64 | 			>
  65 | 				{(row.getValue("role") as string)?.toLowerCase()}
  66 | 			</Badge>
  67 | 		)
  68 | 	},
  69 | 	{
  70 | 		accessorKey: "department",
  71 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
  72 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
  73 | 				column={column}
  74 | 				title='Department'
  75 | 			/>
  76 | 		),
  77 | 		cell: ({ row }) => <div>{row.getValue("department") || "—"}</div>
  78 | 	},
  79 | 	{
  80 | 		accessorKey: "email",
  81 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
  82 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
  83 | 				column={column}
  84 | 				title='Email'
  85 | 			/>
  86 | 		),
  87 | 		cell: ({ row }) => <div className='text-muted-foreground'>{row.getValue("email")}</div>
  88 | 	},
  89 | 	{
  90 | 		accessorKey: "phone",
  91 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
  92 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
  93 | 				column={column}
  94 | 				title='Phone'
  95 | 			/>
  96 | 		),
  97 | 		cell: ({ row }) => <div>{row.getValue("phone") || "—"}</div>
  98 | 	},
  99 | 	{
 100 | 		accessorKey: "isActive",
 101 | 		header: ({ column }) => (
 102 | 			<DataTableColumnHeader
 103 | 				column={column}
 104 | 				title='Status'
 105 | 			/>
 106 | 		),
 107 | 		cell: ({ row }) => {
 108 | 			const isActive = row.getValue("isActive") as boolean;
 109 | 			return <Badge variant={isActive ? "default" : "secondary"}>{isActive ? "Active" : "Inactive"}</Badge>;
 110 | 		}
 111 | 	}
 112 | ];
 113 | 
 114 | export const columns = staffColumns;

```

`components/staff/staff-form.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/staff/StaffForm.tsx
   2 | /** biome-ignore-all lint/suspicious/noExplicitAny: <ok> */
   3 | 
   4 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   5 | import { Calendar } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/calendar";
   6 | import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   7 | import { Input } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/input";
   8 | import { Label } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/label";
   9 | import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/popover";
  10 | import { Separator } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/separator";
  11 | import { useAppForm, useFormFields } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/tanstack-form";
  12 | import { EnvelopeOpenIcon } from "@radix-ui/react-icons";
  13 | import { useMutation, useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
  14 | import { useSelector } from "@tanstack/react-store";
  15 | import { format } from "date-fns";
  16 | import { Briefcase, Building, CalendarIcon, MapPin, User } from "lucide-react";
  17 | import { toast } from "sonner";
  18 | import * as z from "zod";
  19 | 
  20 | import { cn } from "#/lib/utils";
  21 | import { generateId } from "@/lib/id";
  22 | import { orpc } from "@/utils/orpc";
  23 | 
  24 | // Staff Form Schema
  25 | const staffFormSchema = z.object({
  26 | 	id: z.string().optional(),
  27 | 	name: z.string().min(1, "Staff name is required"),
  28 | 	email: z.email("Invalid email address").optional().or(z.literal("")).nullable(),
  29 | 	phone: z.string().optional(),
  30 | 	role: z.enum(["ADMIN", "DOCTOR", "STAFF", "PATIENT"]).default("STAFF"),
  31 | 	department: z.string().optional(),
  32 | 	address: z.string().optional(),
  33 | 	img: z.string().optional(),
  34 | 	colorCode: z.string().optional(),
  35 | 	hireDate: z.date().optional(),
  36 | 	salary: z.number().min(0, "Salary must be positive").optional(),
  37 | 	status: z.enum(["ACTIVE", "INACTIVE", "PENDING", "SUSPENDED"]).default("ACTIVE"),
  38 | 	isActive: z.boolean().default(true),
  39 | 	licenseNumber: z.string().optional(),
  40 | 	notes: z.string().optional(),
  41 | 	emergencyContact: z.string().optional()
  42 | });
  43 | 
  44 | type StaffFormValues = z.infer<typeof staffFormSchema>;
  45 | 
  46 | // Department options
  47 | const departmentOptions = [
  48 | 	{ value: "Administration", label: "Administration" },
  49 | 	{ value: "Nursing", label: "Nursing" },
  50 | 	{ value: "Laboratory", label: "Laboratory" },
  51 | 	{ value: "Pharmacy", label: "Pharmacy" },
  52 | 	{ value: "Reception", label: "Reception" },
  53 | 	{ value: "Billing", label: "Billing" },
  54 | 	{ value: "IT", label: "IT" },
  55 | 	{ value: "HR", label: "Human Resources" }
  56 | ];
  57 | 
  58 | // Status options
  59 | const statusOptions = [
  60 | 	{ value: "ACTIVE", label: "Active" },
  61 | 	{ value: "INACTIVE", label: "Inactive" },
  62 | 	{ value: "PENDING", label: "Pending" },
  63 | 	{ value: "SUSPENDED", label: "Suspended" }
  64 | ];
  65 | 
  66 | // Role options
  67 | const roleOptions = [
  68 | 	{ value: "admin", label: "Admin" },
  69 | 	{ value: "doctor", label: "Doctor" },
  70 | 	{ value: "staff", label: "Staff" },
  71 | 	{ value: "patient", label: "Patient" }
  72 | ];
  73 | 
  74 | type StaffFormProps = {
  75 | 	initialData?: Partial<StaffFormValues> & { id?: string };
  76 | 	onCancel?: () => void;
  77 | 	onSuccess?: () => void;
  78 | 	readOnly?: boolean;
  79 | };
  80 | 
  81 | export function StaffForm({ initialData, onSuccess, onCancel, readOnly = false }: StaffFormProps) {
  82 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
  83 | 	const isEditing = !!initialData?.id;
  84 | 
  85 | 	// Create staff mutation
  86 | 	const { mutate: createStaff, isPending: isCreatePending } = useMutation(
  87 | 		orpc.doctor.createStaff.mutationOptions({
  88 | 			onSuccess: () => {
  89 | 				toast.success("Staff member added successfully");
  90 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: orpc.doctor.key() });
  91 | 				onSuccess?.();
  92 | 			},
  93 | 			onError: (error: Error) => {
  94 | 				console.error(error);
  95 | 				toast.error(error.message || "Failed to add staff member");
  96 | 			}
  97 | 		})
  98 | 	);
  99 | 
 100 | 	// Update staff mutation
 101 | 	const { mutate: updateStaff, isPending: isUpdatePending } = useMutation(
 102 | 		orpc.doctor.update.mutationOptions({
 103 | 			onSuccess: () => {
 104 | 				toast.success("Staff member updated successfully");
 105 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: orpc.doctor.key() });
 106 | 				onSuccess?.();
 107 | 			},
 108 | 			onError: (error: Error) => {
 109 | 				console.error(error);
 110 | 				toast.error(error.message || "Failed to update staff member");
 111 | 			}
 112 | 		})
 113 | 	);
 114 | 
 115 | 	const isPending = isCreatePending || isUpdatePending;
 116 | 
 117 | 	const form = useAppForm({
 118 | 		defaultValues: {
 119 | 			id: initialData?.id ?? generateId(),
 120 | 			name: initialData?.name ?? "",
 121 | 			email: initialData?.email ?? "",
 122 | 			phone: initialData?.phone ?? "",
 123 | 			role: (initialData?.role as "ADMIN" | "DOCTOR" | "STAFF" | "PATIENT") ?? "STAFF",
 124 | 			department: initialData?.department ?? "",
 125 | 			address: initialData?.address ?? "",
 126 | 			img: initialData?.img ?? "",
 127 | 			colorCode: initialData?.colorCode ?? "#8b5cf6",
 128 | 			hireDate: initialData?.hireDate ? new Date(initialData.hireDate) : undefined,
 129 | 			salary: initialData?.salary ?? undefined,
 130 | 			status: (initialData?.status as "ACTIVE" | "INACTIVE" | "PENDING" | "SUSPENDED") ?? "ACTIVE",
 131 | 			isActive: initialData?.isActive ?? true,
 132 | 			licenseNumber: initialData?.licenseNumber ?? "",
 133 | 			notes: initialData?.notes ?? "",
 134 | 			emergencyContact: initialData?.emergencyContact ?? ""
 135 | 		} satisfies StaffFormValues,
 136 | 		validators: {},
 137 | 		onSubmit: async ({ value }) => {
 138 | 			// Pick only the fields the router's input schema accepts
 139 | 			const base = {
 140 | 				id: value.id ?? generateId(),
 141 | 				name: value.name,
 142 | 				email: value.email || null,
 143 | 				phone: value.phone || null,
 144 | 				role: value.role,
 145 | 				department: value.department || null,
 146 | 				address: value.address,
 147 | 				img: value.img || null,
 148 | 				colorCode: value.colorCode || null,
 149 | 				licenseNumber: value.licenseNumber,
 150 | 				hireDate: value.hireDate,
 151 | 				salary: value.salary,
 152 | 				status: (value.status === "PENDING" || value.status === "SUSPENDED" ? "INACTIVE" : value.status) as
 153 | 					| "ACTIVE"
 154 | 					| "INACTIVE"
 155 | 					| "DORMANT",
 156 | 				isActive: value.status === "ACTIVE"
 157 | 			};
 158 | 
 159 | 			if (isEditing && initialData?.id) {
 160 | 				// Cast to StaffFormValues with guaranteed id to satisfy mutate input typing
 161 | 				updateStaff({ ...base, id: initialData.id } as any);
 162 | 			} else {
 163 | 				// createStaff expects more fields on the input; cast to any to satisfy typing
 164 | 				createStaff(base as any);
 165 | 			}
 166 | 		}
 167 | 	});
 168 | 
 169 | 	const formValues = useSelector(form.store, s => s.values);
 170 | 	const { FormSelectField, FormTextField, FormTextareaField } = useFormFields<StaffFormValues>();
 171 | 
 172 | 	return (
 173 | 		<Card className='mx-auto w-full max-w-4xl'>
 174 | 			<CardHeader>
 175 | 				<CardTitle className='flex items-center gap-2 font-bold text-2xl'>
 176 | 					<Briefcase className='h-6 w-6' />
 177 | 					{isEditing ? "Edit Staff Member" : "Add New Staff Member"}
 178 | 				</CardTitle>
 179 | 				<p className='text-muted-foreground'>
 180 | 					{isEditing
 181 | 						? "Update staff information and role details"
 182 | 						: "Register a new staff member to the clinic"}
 183 | 				</p>
 184 | 			</CardHeader>
 185 | 			<CardContent>
 186 | 				<form.AppForm>
 187 | 					<form.Form className='space-y-6'>
 188 | 						{/* Basic Information */}
 189 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 190 | 							<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 191 | 								<User className='h-5 w-5' />
 192 | 								Basic Information
 193 | 							</h3>
 194 | 							<Separator />
 195 | 							<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2'>
 196 | 								<FormTextField
 197 | 									disabled={readOnly}
 198 | 									label='Full Name'
 199 | 									name='name'
 200 | 									placeholder='e.g., Jane Smith'
 201 | 									required
 202 | 									validators={{
 203 | 										onBlur: z.string().min(1, "Staff name is required")
 204 | 									}}
 205 | 								/>
 206 | 
 207 | 								<FormTextField
 208 | 									disabled={readOnly}
 209 | 									label='Email Address'
 210 | 									name='email'
 211 | 									placeholder='staff@clinic.com'
 212 | 									type='email'
 213 | 								/>
 214 | 
 215 | 								<FormTextField
 216 | 									disabled={readOnly}
 217 | 									label='Phone Number'
 218 | 									name='phone'
 219 | 									placeholder='+1 (555) 123-4567'
 220 | 									type='tel'
 221 | 								/>
 222 | 
 223 | 								<FormSelectField
 224 | 									label='Role'
 225 | 									name='role'
 226 | 									options={roleOptions}
 227 | 									placeholder='Select role'
 228 | 									required
 229 | 								/>
 230 | 
 231 | 								<FormSelectField
 232 | 									label='Department'

 234 | 									options={departmentOptions}
 235 | 									placeholder='Select department'
 236 | 								/>
 237 | 
 238 | 								<FormSelectField
 239 | 									label='Status'

 241 | 									options={statusOptions}
 242 | 									placeholder='Select status'
 243 | 									required
 244 | 								/>
 245 | 
 246 | 								{/* Color Picker for Calendar */}
 247 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 248 | 									<Label>Calendar Color</Label>
 249 | 									<div className='flex items-center gap-3'>
 250 | 										<input
 251 | 											className='h-9 w-12 cursor-pointer rounded-md border p-1'
 252 | 											disabled={readOnly}
 253 | 											onChange={e => form.setFieldValue("colorCode", e.target.value)}
 254 | 											type='color'
 255 | 											value={formValues.colorCode || "#8b5cf6"}
 256 | 										/>
 257 | 										<Input
 258 | 											className='w-28 font-mono'
 259 | 											disabled={readOnly}
 260 | 											onChange={e => form.setFieldValue("colorCode", e.target.value)}
 261 | 											placeholder='#8b5cf6'
 262 | 											value={formValues.colorCode || ""}
 263 | 										/>
 264 | 										<span className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>Used for calendar events</span>
 265 | 									</div>
 266 | 								</div>
 267 | 							</div>
 268 | 						</div>
 269 | 
 270 | 						{/* Employment Details */}
 271 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 272 | 							<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 273 | 								<Building className='h-5 w-5' />
 274 | 								Employment Details
 275 | 							</h3>
 276 | 							<Separator />
 277 | 							<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2'>
 278 | 								<FormTextField
 279 | 									disabled={readOnly}
 280 | 									label='License Number'
 281 | 									name='licenseNumber'
 282 | 									placeholder='Professional license number (if applicable)'
 283 | 								/>
 284 | 
 285 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 286 | 									<Label>Hire Date</Label>
 287 | 									<form.AppField name='hireDate'>
 288 | 										{field => (
 289 | 											<Popover>
 290 | 												<PopoverTrigger asChild>
 291 | 													<Button
 292 | 														className={cn(
 293 | 															"w-full justify-start text-left font-normal",
 294 | 															!field.state.value && "text-muted-foreground"
 295 | 														)}
 296 | 														disabled={readOnly}
 297 | 														variant='outline'
 298 | 													>
 299 | 														<CalendarIcon className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 300 | 														{field.state.value ? (
 301 | 															format(field.state.value, "PPP")
 302 | 														) : (
 303 | 															<span>Select hire date</span>
 304 | 														)}
 305 | 													</Button>
 306 | 												</PopoverTrigger>
 307 | 												<PopoverContent className='w-auto p-0'>
 308 | 													<Calendar
 309 | 														mode='single'

 311 | 														selected={field.state.value}
 312 | 													/>
 313 | 												</PopoverContent>
 314 | 											</Popover>
 315 | 										)}
 316 | 									</form.AppField>
 317 | 								</div>
 318 | 
 319 | 								<FormTextField
 320 | 									disabled={readOnly}
 321 | 									label='Salary'

 323 | 									placeholder='Annual salary'
 324 | 									step={1000}
 325 | 									type='number'
 326 | 									validators={{

 328 | 									}}
 329 | 								/>

 336 | 								/>
 337 | 							</div>

 343 | 								<MapPin className='h-5 w-5' />
 344 | 								Address
 345 | 							</h3>
 346 | 							<Separator />
 347 | 							<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4'>
 348 | 								<FormTextField
 349 | 									disabled={readOnly}
 350 | 									label='Address'
 351 | 									name='address'
 352 | 									placeholder='Street address'
 353 | 								/>
 354 | 							</div>
 355 | 						</div>
 356 | 
 357 | 						{/* Additional Information */}
 358 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 359 | 							<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 360 | 								<EnvelopeOpenIcon className='h-5 w-5' />
 361 | 								Additional Information
 362 | 							</h3>
 363 | 							<Separator />
 364 | 							<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4'>
 365 | 								<FormTextareaField
 366 | 									disabled={readOnly}
 367 | 									label='Notes'
 368 | 									name='notes'
 369 | 									placeholder='Any additional notes about the staff member...'
 370 | 									rows={3}
 371 | 								/>
 372 | 							</div>
 373 | 						</div>
 374 | 
 375 | 						{/* Status Display for existing staff */}
 376 | 						{isEditing && initialData?.status && (
 377 | 							<div className='flex items-center gap-2 rounded-lg bg-muted p-3'>
 378 | 								<span className='font-medium text-sm'>Current Status:</span>
 379 | 								<span
 380 | 									className={cn(
 381 | 										"rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 font-medium text-xs",
 382 | 										initialData.status === "ACTIVE" && "bg-green-100 text-green-700",
 383 | 										initialData.status === "INACTIVE" && "bg-gray-100 text-gray-700",
 384 | 										initialData.status === "PENDING" && "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700",
 385 | 										initialData.status === "SUSPENDED" && "bg-red-100 text-red-700"
 386 | 									)}
 387 | 								>
 388 | 									{initialData.status.charAt(0) + initialData.status.slice(1).toLowerCase()}
 389 | 								</span>
 390 | 							</div>
 391 | 						)}
 392 | 
 393 | 						{/* Actions */}
 394 | 						{!readOnly && (
 395 | 							<>
 396 | 								<Separator />
 397 | 								<div className='flex justify-end gap-4'>
 398 | 									{onCancel && (
 399 | 										<Button
 400 | 											disabled={isPending}
 401 | 											onClick={onCancel}
 402 | 											type='button'
 403 | 											variant='outline'
 404 | 										>
 405 | 											Cancel
 406 | 										</Button>
 407 | 									)}
 408 | 									<form.SubmitButton
 409 | 										className='min-w-30'
 410 | 										disabled={isPending}
 411 | 									>
 412 | 										{isPending
 413 | 											? isEditing
 414 | 												? "Updating..."
 415 | 												: "Adding..."
 416 | 											: isEditing
 417 | 												? "Update Staff"
 418 | 												: "Add Staff Member"}
 419 | 									</form.SubmitButton>
 420 | 								</div>
 421 | 							</>
 422 | 						)}
 423 | 					</form.Form>
 424 | 				</form.AppForm>
 425 | 			</CardContent>
 426 | 		</Card>
 427 | 	);
 428 | }
 429 | 
 430 | // Quick staff registration form for onboarding
 431 | type QuickStaffFormProps = {
 432 | 	onCancel?: () => void;
 433 | 	onSuccess?: () => void;
 434 | };
 435 | 
 436 | export function QuickStaffForm({ onSuccess, onCancel }: QuickStaffFormProps) {
 437 | 	return (
 438 | 		<StaffForm
 439 | 			onCancel={onCancel}
 440 | 			onSuccess={onSuccess}
 441 | 		/>
 442 | 	);
 443 | }

```

`components/table/appointment-table.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import {
   2 | 	AlertDialog,
   3 | 	AlertDialogAction,
   4 | 	AlertDialogCancel,
   5 | 	AlertDialogContent,
   6 | 	AlertDialogDescription,
   7 | 	AlertDialogFooter,
   8 | 	AlertDialogHeader,
   9 | 	AlertDialogTitle,
  10 | 	AlertDialogTrigger
  11 | } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/alert-dialog";
  12 | import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/avatar";
  13 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
  14 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
  15 | import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/table";
  16 | import { useMutation, useQuery, useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
  17 | import { useNavigate } from "@tanstack/react-router";
  18 | import { type ColumnDef, flexRender, getCoreRowModel, useReactTable } from "@tanstack/react-table";
  19 | import { format } from "date-fns";
  20 | import { CalendarIcon, ClockIcon, EyeIcon, PencilIcon, PhoneIcon, Trash2, VideoIcon } from "lucide-react";
  21 | import { toast } from "sonner";
  22 | import { getInitials } from
  23 | @clinic
  24 | /ui/bil / utils;
  25 | ";
  26 | 
  27 | import { orpc } from "@/utils/orpc";
  28 | 
  29 | type Appointment = {
  30 | 	appointmentDate: string | Date;
  31 | 	appointmentPrice?: number | null;
  32 | 	clinicId: string;
  33 | 	doctor?: {
  34 | 		id: string;
  35 | 		name: string;
  36 | 		specialty: string;
  37 | 		email?: string | null;
  38 | 		phone?: string | null;
  39 | 		img?: string | null;
  40 | 		colorCode?: string | null;
  41 | 	};
  42 | 	doctorId: string;
  43 | 	durationMinutes?: number | null;
  44 | 	id: string;
  45 | 	note?: string | null;
  46 | 	patient?: {
  47 | 		id: string;
  48 | 		firstName: string;
  49 | 		lastName: string;
  50 | 		email?: string | null;
  51 | 		phone?: string | null;
  52 | 		image?: string | null;
  53 | 	};
  54 | 	patientId: string;
  55 | 	reason?: string | null;
  56 | 	service?: {
  57 | 		id: string;
  58 | 		serviceName: string;
  59 | 		price: number;
  60 | 		duration: number;
  61 | 	};
  62 | 	serviceId?: string | null;
  63 | 	status: "PENDING" | "SCHEDULED" | "COMPLETED" | "CANCELLED" | "NO_SHOW" | undefined;
  64 | 	time?: string | null;
  65 | 	type: string;
  66 | };
  67 | 
  68 | type AppointmentsTableProps = {
  69 | 	clinicId: string;
  70 | 	filters?: {
  71 | 		status?: "PENDING" | "SCHEDULED" | "COMPLETED" | "CANCELLED" | "NO_SHOW" | undefined;
  72 | 		doctorId?: string;
  73 | 		startDate?: Date;
  74 | 		endDate?: Date;
  75 | 	};
  76 | 	onEdit?: (appointment: Appointment) => void;
  77 | 	onView?: (appointment: Appointment) => void;
  78 | };
  79 | 
  80 | export function AppointmentsTable({ onEdit, onView, filters }: AppointmentsTableProps) {
  81 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
  82 | 	const navigate = useNavigate();
  83 | 
  84 | 	// Build query input with filters
  85 | 	const queryInput = {
  86 | 		page: 1,
  87 | 		limit: 100,
  88 | 		...(filters?.status && { status: filters.status }),
  89 | 		...(filters?.doctorId && { doctorId: filters.doctorId }),
  90 | 		...(filters?.startDate && { startDate: filters.startDate }),
  91 | 		...(filters?.endDate && { endDate: filters.endDate })
  92 | 	};
  93 | 
  94 | 	// Fetch appointments using ORPC
  95 | 	const { data, isLoading } = useQuery({
  96 | 		...orpc.appointment.list.queryOptions({
  97 | 			input: {
  98 | 				...queryInput,
  99 | 				fromDate: filters?.startDate ?? new Date(),
 100 | 				toDate: filters?.endDate ?? new Date()
 101 | 			}
 102 | 		})
 103 | 	});
 104 | 
 105 | 	const updateAppointmentStatus = useMutation({
 106 | 		mutationFn: (input: { id: string; status: Appointment["status"] }) =>
 107 | 			orpc.appointment.updateStatus.call({
 108 | 				id: input.id,
 109 | 				status: input.status ?? "SCHEDULED"
 110 | 			}),
 111 | 		onSuccess: () => {
 112 | 			toast.success("Appointment status updated successfully");
 113 | 			void queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 114 | 				queryKey: orpc.appointment.list.key({})
 115 | 			});
 116 | 		},
 117 | 		onError: error => {
 118 | 			console.error(error);
 119 | 			toast.error("Failed to update appointment status");
 120 | 		}
 121 | 	});
 122 | 
 123 | 	const deleteAppointment = useMutation({
 124 | 		mutationFn: (input: { id: string }) => orpc.appointment.delete?.call?.(input) || Promise.resolve(),
 125 | 		onSuccess: () => {
 126 | 			toast.success("Appointment cancelled successfully");
 127 | 			void queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 128 | 				queryKey: orpc.appointment.list.key({})
 129 | 			});
 130 | 		},
 131 | 		onError: error => {
 132 | 			console.error(error);
 133 | 
 134 | 			toast.error("Failed to cancel appointment");
 135 | 		}
 136 | 	});
 137 | 
 138 | 	const getStatusBadge = (status: Appointment["status"]) => {
 139 | 		const variants: Record<string, "default" | "secondary" | "destructive" | "outline"> = {
 140 | 			SCHEDULED: "default",
 141 | 			PENDING: "outline",
 142 | 			COMPLETED: "secondary",
 143 | 			CANCELLED: "destructive",
 144 | 			NO_SHOW: "outline"
 145 | 		};
 146 | 
 147 | 		const labels: Record<string, string> = {
 148 | 			SCHEDULED: "Scheduled",
 149 | 			PENDING: "Pending",
 150 | 			COMPLETED: "Completed",
 151 | 			CANCELLED: "Cancelled",
 152 | 			NO_SHOW: "No Show"
 153 | 		};
 154 | 
 155 | 		return <Badge variant={status ? variants[status] : "default"}>{status ? labels[status] : "Unknown"}</Badge>;
 156 | 	};
 157 | 
 158 | 	const getAppointmentTypeIcon = (type: string) => {
 159 | 		switch (type?.toLowerCase()) {
 160 | 			case "video":
 161 | 			case "telehealth":
 162 | 				return <VideoIcon className='h-3 w-3' />;
 163 | 			case "phone":
 164 | 				return <PhoneIcon className='h-3 w-3' />;
 165 | 			default:
 166 | 				return <CalendarIcon className='h-3 w-3' />;
 167 | 		}
 168 | 	};
 169 | 
 170 | 	const columns: ColumnDef<Appointment, unknown>[] = [
 171 | 		{
 172 | 			accessorKey: "patient",
 173 | 			header: "Patient",
 174 | 			cell: ({ row }) => {
 175 | 				const appointment = row.original;
 176 | 				const patient = appointment.patient;
 177 | 				return (
 178 | 					<div className='flex items-center gap-3'>
 179 | 						<Avatar className='h-8 w-8'>
 180 | 							{patient?.image ? (
 181 | 								<AvatarImage
 182 | 									alt={patient?.firstName}
 183 | 									src={patient.image}
 184 | 								/>
 185 | 							) : null}
 186 | 							<AvatarFallback>
 187 | 								{patient ? getInitials(`${patient.firstName} ${patient.lastName}`) : "N/A"}
 188 | 							</AvatarFallback>
 189 | 						</Avatar>
 190 | 						<div>
 191 | 							<div className='font-medium'>
 192 | 								{patient ? `${patient.firstName} ${patient.lastName}` : "Unknown Patient"}
 193 | 							</div>
 194 | 							<div className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>
 195 | 								{patient?.phone ?? patient?.email ?? "No contact"}
 196 | 							</div>
 197 | 						</div>
 198 | 					</div>
 199 | 				);
 200 | 			}
 201 | 		},
 202 | 		{
 203 | 			accessorKey: "doctor",
 204 | 			header: "Doctor",
 205 | 			cell: ({ row }) => {
 206 | 				const appointment = row.original;
 207 | 				const doctor = appointment.doctor;
 208 | 				return (
 209 | 					<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 210 | 						{doctor?.colorCode && (
 211 | 							<div
 212 | 								className='h-2 w-2 rounded-full'
 213 | 								style={{ backgroundColor: doctor.colorCode }}
 214 | 							/>
 215 | 						)}
 216 | 						<div>
 217 | 							<div className='font-medium'>Dr. {doctor?.name ?? "Unknown"}</div>
 218 | 							<div className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>{doctor?.specialty ?? "General"}</div>
 219 | 						</div>
 220 | 					</div>
 221 | 				);
 222 | 			}
 223 | 		},
 224 | 		{
 225 | 			accessorKey: "appointmentDate",
 226 | 			header: "Date & Time",
 227 | 			cell: ({ row }) => {
 228 | 				const appointment = row.original;
 229 | 				return (

 283 | 					/>
 284 | 				</div>
 285 | 			)
 286 | 		},
 287 | 		{
 288 | 			id: "actions",
 289 | 			header: "Actions",
 290 | 			cell: ({ row }) => {
 291 | 				const appointment = row.original;
 292 | 				const canEdit = appointment.status === "SCHEDULED" || appointment.status === "PENDING";
 293 | 				const canStart = appointment.status === "SCHEDULED";
 294 | 
 295 | 				return (
 296 | 					<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 297 | 						{canStart && (
 298 | 							<Button
 299 | 								aria-label='Start visit'
 300 | 								className='h-8'
 301 | 								onClick={() =>
 302 | 									navigate({
 303 | 										to: `/dashboard/medical-records/${appointment.id}`
 304 | 									})
 305 | 								}
 306 | 								size='sm'
 307 | 								variant='default'
 308 | 							>
 309 | 								Start Visit
 310 | 							</Button>
 311 | 						)}
 312 | 
 313 | 						<Button
 314 | 							aria-label='View appointment'
 315 | 							onClick={() => onView?.(appointment)}
 316 | 							size='sm'
 317 | 							variant='ghost'
 318 | 						>
 319 | 							<EyeIcon className='h-4 w-4' />
 320 | 						</Button>
 321 | 
 322 | 						{canEdit && (
 323 | 							<Button
 324 | 								aria-label='Edit appointment'
 325 | 								onClick={() => onEdit?.(appointment)}
 326 | 								size='sm'
 327 | 								variant='ghost'
 328 | 							>
 329 | 								<PencilIcon className='h-4 w-4' />
 330 | 							</Button>
 331 | 						)}
 332 | 
 333 | 						{canEdit && (
 334 | 							<AlertDialog>
 335 | 								<AlertDialogTrigger asChild>
 336 | 									<Button
 337 | 										aria-label='Cancel appointment'
 338 | 										className='text-red-600'
 339 | 										size='sm'
 340 | 										variant='ghost'
 341 | 									>
 342 | 										<Trash2 className='h-4 w-4' />
 343 | 									</Button>
 344 | 								</AlertDialogTrigger>
 345 | 								<AlertDialogContent>
 346 | 									<AlertDialogHeader>
 347 | 										<AlertDialogTitle>Cancel Appointment</AlertDialogTitle>
 348 | 										<AlertDialogDescription>
 349 | 											Are you sure you want to cancel the appointment with{" "}
 350 | 											{appointment.patient?.firstName} {appointment.patient?.lastName}? This
 351 | 											action cannot be undone.
 352 | 										</AlertDialogDescription>
 353 | 									</AlertDialogHeader>
 354 | 									<AlertDialogFooter>
 355 | 										<AlertDialogCancel>Keep Appointment</AlertDialogCancel>
 356 | 										<AlertDialogAction
 357 | 											className='bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground'
 358 | 											onClick={() =>
 359 | 												updateAppointmentStatus.mutate({
 360 | 													id: appointment.id,
 361 | 													status: "CANCELLED"
 362 | 												})
 363 | 											}
 364 | 										>
 365 | 											Cancel Appointment
 366 | 										</AlertDialogAction>
 367 | 									</AlertDialogFooter>
 368 | 								</AlertDialogContent>
 369 | 							</AlertDialog>
 370 | 						)}
 371 | 
 372 | 						{!canEdit && appointment.status === "COMPLETED" && (
 373 | 							<AlertDialog>
 374 | 								<AlertDialogTrigger asChild>
 375 | 									<Button
 376 | 										aria-label='Delete appointment'
 377 | 										className='text-red-600'
 378 | 										size='sm'
 379 | 										variant='ghost'
 380 | 									>
 381 | 										<Trash2 className='h-4 w-4' />
 382 | 									</Button>
 383 | 								</AlertDialogTrigger>
 384 | 								<AlertDialogContent>
 385 | 									<AlertDialogHeader>
 386 | 										<AlertDialogTitle>Delete Appointment Record</AlertDialogTitle>
 387 | 										<AlertDialogDescription>
 388 | 											Are you sure you want to delete the record for the appointment with{" "}
 389 | 											{appointment.patient?.firstName} {appointment.patient?.lastName}? This
 390 | 											action cannot be undone.
 391 | 										</AlertDialogDescription>
 392 | 									</AlertDialogHeader>
 393 | 									<AlertDialogFooter>
 394 | 										<AlertDialogCancel>Cancel</AlertDialogCancel>
 395 | 										<AlertDialogAction
 396 | 											className='bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground'
 397 | 											onClick={() =>
 398 | 												deleteAppointment.mutate({
 399 | 													id: appointment.id
 400 | 												})
 401 | 											}
 402 | 										>
 403 | 											Delete Record
 404 | 										</AlertDialogAction>
 405 | 									</AlertDialogFooter>
 406 | 								</AlertDialogContent>
 407 | 							</AlertDialog>
 408 | 						)}
 409 | 					</div>
 410 | 				);
 411 | 			}
 412 | 		}
 413 | 	];
 414 | 
 415 | 	if (isLoading) {
 416 | 		return <div className='flex justify-center p-8'>Loading appointments...</div>;
 417 | 	}
 418 | 
 419 | 	const appointments = data && "appointments" in data ? (data.appointments as Appointment[]) : [];
 420 | 
 421 | 	return (
 422 | 		<AppointmentDataTable
 423 | 			columns={columns}
 424 | 			data={appointments}
 425 | 		/>
 426 | 	);
 427 | }
 428 | 
 429 | function AppointmentDataTable({ columns, data }: { columns: ColumnDef<Appointment, unknown>[]; data: Appointment[] }) {
 430 | 	const table = useReactTable({
 431 | 		data,
 432 | 		columns,
 433 | 		getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel()
 434 | 	});
 435 | 
 436 | 	return (
 437 | 		<div className='overflow-hidden rounded-lg border'>
 438 | 			<Table>
 439 | 				<TableHeader>
 440 | 					{table.getHeaderGroups().map(headerGroup => (
 441 | 						<TableRow key={headerGroup.id}>
 442 | 							{headerGroup.headers.map(header => (
 443 | 								<TableHead key={header.id}>
 444 | 									{header.isPlaceholder
 445 | 										? null
 446 | 										: flexRender(header.column.columnDef.header, header.getContext())}
 447 | 								</TableHead>
 448 | 							))}
 449 | 						</TableRow>
 450 | 					))}
 451 | 				</TableHeader>
 452 | 				<TableBody>
 453 | 					{table.getRowModel().rows.length ? (
 454 | 						table.getRowModel().rows.map(row => (
 455 | 							<TableRow key={row.id}>
 456 | 								{row.getVisibleCells().map(cell => (
 457 | 									<TableCell key={cell.id}>
 458 | 										{flexRender(cell.column.columnDef.cell, cell.getContext())}
 459 | 									</TableCell>
 460 | 								))}
 461 | 							</TableRow>
 462 | 						))
 463 | 					) : (
 464 | 						<TableRow>
 465 | 							<TableCell
 466 | 								className='h-24 text-center'
 467 | 								colSpan={columns.length}
 468 | 							>
 469 | 								No appointments found.
 470 | 							</TableCell>
 471 | 						</TableRow>
 472 | 					)}
 473 | 				</TableBody>
 474 | 			</Table>
 475 | 		</div>
 476 | 	);
 477 | }
 478 | 
 479 | const statusOptions: {
 480 | 	label: string;
 481 | 	value: Appointment["status"];
 482 | 	color: string;
 483 | }[] = [
 484 | 	{ label: "Scheduled", value: "SCHEDULED", color: "bg-blue-500" },
 485 | 	{ label: "Pending", value: "PENDING", color: "bg-yellow-500" },
 486 | 	{ label: "Completed", value: "COMPLETED", color: "bg-green-500" },
 487 | 	{ label: "Cancelled", value: "CANCELLED", color: "bg-red-500" },
 488 | 	{ label: "No Show", value: "NO_SHOW", color: "bg-gray-500" }
 489 | ];
 490 | 
 491 | // Sub-component for inline status update (if needed)
 492 | function StatusDropdown({
 493 | 	// appointmentId,
 494 | 	currentStatus,
 495 | 	onUpdate
 496 | }: {
 497 | 	appointmentId: string;
 498 | 	currentStatus: Appointment["status"];
 499 | 	onUpdate: (status: Appointment["status"]) => void;
 500 | }) {
 501 | 	return (
 502 | 		<select
 503 | 			className='rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-2 py-1 text-sm'
 504 | 			onChange={e => onUpdate(e.target.value as Appointment["status"])}
 505 | 			value={currentStatus}
 506 | 		>
 507 | 			{statusOptions.map(opt => (
 508 | 				<option
 509 | 					key={opt.value}
 510 | 					value={opt.value}
 511 | 				>
 512 | 					{opt.label}
 513 | 				</option>
 514 | 			))}
 515 | 		</select>
 516 | 	);
 517 | }

```

`components/themes/active-theme.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { createContext, type ReactNode, useContext, useEffect, useState } from "react";
   2 | 
   3 | import { DEFAULT_THEME } from "./theme.config";
   4 | 
   5 | const COOKIE_NAME = "active_theme";
   6 | 
   7 | function setThemeCookie(theme: string) {
   8 | 	if (typeof window === "undefined") return;
   9 | 
  10 | 	document.cookie = `${COOKIE_NAME}=${theme}; path=/; max-age=31536000; SameSite=Lax; ${window.location.protocol === "https:" ? "Secure;" : ""}`;
  11 | }
  12 | 
  13 | type ThemeContextType = {
  14 | 	activeTheme: string;
  15 | 	setActiveTheme: (theme: string) => void;
  16 | };
  17 | 
  18 | const ThemeContext = createContext<ThemeContextType | undefined>(undefined);
  19 | 
  20 | export function ActiveThemeProvider({ children, initialTheme }: { children: ReactNode; initialTheme?: string }) {
  21 | 	const themeToUse = initialTheme ?? DEFAULT_THEME;
  22 | 	const [activeTheme, setActiveTheme] = useState<string>(themeToUse);
  23 | 
  24 | 	useEffect(() => {
  25 | 		// Only update if theme has changed
  26 | 		const currentTheme = document.documentElement.getAttribute("data-theme");
  27 | 		if (currentTheme === activeTheme) {
  28 | 			// Still update cookie in case it's missing
  29 | 			setThemeCookie(activeTheme);
  30 | 		} else {
  31 | 			setThemeCookie(activeTheme);
  32 | 
  33 | 			// Remove existing data-theme attribute
  34 | 			document.documentElement.removeAttribute("data-theme");
  35 | 
  36 | 			// Remove any theme classes from body (cleanup)
  37 | 			const themeClasses = Array.from(document.body.classList).filter(className =>
  38 | 				className.startsWith("theme-")
  39 | 			);
  40 | 			for (const className of themeClasses) {
  41 | 				document.body.classList.remove(className);
  42 | 			}
  43 | 
  44 | 			// Set data-theme on html element
  45 | 			if (activeTheme) {
  46 | 				document.documentElement.setAttribute("data-theme", activeTheme);
  47 | 			}
  48 | 		}
  49 | 	}, [activeTheme]);
  50 | 
  51 | 	return <ThemeContext.Provider value={{ activeTheme, setActiveTheme }}>{children}</ThemeContext.Provider>;
  52 | }
  53 | 
  54 | export function useThemeConfig() {
  55 | 	const context = useContext(ThemeContext);
  56 | 	if (context === undefined) {
  57 | 		throw new Error("useThemeConfig must be used within an ActiveThemeProvider");
  58 | 	}
  59 | 	return context;
  60 | }

```

`components/themes/theme-mode-toggle.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { Icons } from "@clinic/ui/components/icons";
   2 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   3 | import { Kbd } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/kbd";
   4 | import { Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipTrigger } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/tooltip";
   5 | import { useTheme } from "next-themes";
   6 | import * as React from "react";
   7 | 
   8 | export function ThemeModeToggle() {
   9 | 	const { setTheme, resolvedTheme } = useTheme();
  10 | 
  11 | 	const handleThemeToggle = React.useCallback(
  12 | 		(e?: React.MouseEvent) => {
  13 | 			const newMode = resolvedTheme === "dark" ? "light" : "dark";
  14 | 			const root = document.documentElement;
  15 | 
  16 | 			if (!document.startViewTransition) {
  17 | 				setTheme(newMode);
  18 | 				return;
  19 | 			}
  20 | 
  21 | 			// Set coordinates from the click event
  22 | 			if (e) {
  23 | 				root.style.setProperty("--x", `${e.clientX}px`);
  24 | 				root.style.setProperty("--y", `${e.clientY}px`);
  25 | 			}
  26 | 
  27 | 			document.startViewTransition(() => {
  28 | 				setTheme(newMode);
  29 | 			});
  30 | 		},
  31 | 		[resolvedTheme, setTheme]
  32 | 	);
  33 | 
  34 | 	return (
  35 | 		<Tooltip>
  36 | 			<TooltipTrigger asChild>
  37 | 				<Button
  38 | 					className='group/toggle size-8'
  39 | 					onClick={handleThemeToggle}
  40 | 					size='icon'
  41 | 					variant='secondary'
  42 | 				>
  43 | 					<Icons.brightness />
  44 | 					<span className='sr-only'>Toggle theme</span>
  45 | 				</Button>
  46 | 			</TooltipTrigger>
  47 | 			<TooltipContent>
  48 | 				Toggle theme <Kbd>D D</Kbd>
  49 | 			</TooltipContent>
  50 | 		</Tooltip>
  51 | 	);
  52 | }

```

`components/user-menu.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   2 | import {
   3 | 	DropdownMenu,
   4 | 	DropdownMenuContent,
   5 | 	DropdownMenuGroup,
   6 | 	DropdownMenuItem,
   7 | 	DropdownMenuLabel,
   8 | 	DropdownMenuSeparator,
   9 | 	DropdownMenuTrigger
  10 | } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/dropdown-menu";
  11 | import { Skeleton } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/skeleton";
  12 | import { Link, useNavigate } from "@tanstack/react-router";
  13 | 
  14 | import { authClient } from "@/lib/auth-client";
  15 | 
  16 | export default function UserMenu() {
  17 | 	const navigate = useNavigate();
  18 | 	const { data: session, isPending } = authClient.useSession();
  19 | 
  20 | 	if (isPending) {
  21 | 		return <Skeleton className='h-9 w-24' />;
  22 | 	}
  23 | 
  24 | 	if (!session) {
  25 | 		return (
  26 | 			<Link to='/login'>
  27 | 				<Button variant='outline'>Sign In</Button>
  28 | 			</Link>
  29 | 		);
  30 | 	}
  31 | 
  32 | 	return (
  33 | 		<DropdownMenu>
  34 | 			<DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
  35 | 				<Button variant='outline'>{session.user.name}</Button>
  36 | 			</DropdownMenuTrigger>
  37 | 			<DropdownMenuContent className='bg-card'>
  38 | 				<DropdownMenuGroup>
  39 | 					<DropdownMenuLabel>My Account</DropdownMenuLabel>
  40 | 					<DropdownMenuSeparator />
  41 | 					<DropdownMenuItem>{session.user.email}</DropdownMenuItem>
  42 | 					<DropdownMenuItem
  43 | 						onClick={() => {
  44 | 							authClient.signOut({
  45 | 								fetchOptions: {
  46 | 									onSuccess: () => {
  47 | 										navigate({
  48 | 											to: "/"
  49 | 										});
  50 | 									}
  51 | 								}
  52 | 							});
  53 | 						}}
  54 | 						variant='destructive'
  55 | 					>
  56 | 						Sign Out
  57 | 					</DropdownMenuItem>
  58 | 				</DropdownMenuGroup>
  59 | 			</DropdownMenuContent>
  60 | 		</DropdownMenu>
  61 | 	);
  62 | }
```

`components/vitals/columns.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { DataTableColumnHeader } from "@clinic/ui/components/data-table/DataTableColumnHeader";
   2 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
   3 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   4 | import { Checkbox } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/checkbox";
   5 | import {
   6 | 	DropdownMenu,
   7 | 	DropdownMenuContent,
   8 | 	DropdownMenuItem,
   9 | 	DropdownMenuLabel,
  10 | 	DropdownMenuSeparator,
  11 | 	DropdownMenuTrigger
  12 | } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/dropdown-menu";
  13 | import type { ColumnDef } from "@tanstack/react-table";
  14 | import { format } from "date-fns";
  15 | import { Activity, Droplets, Eye, Heart, MoreHorizontal, Ruler, Thermometer, Trash2, Wind } from "lucide-react";
  16 | 
  17 | export interface VitalSignsRecord {
  18 | 	id: string;
  19 | 	patientId: string;
  20 | 	patientName: string;
  21 | 	recordedAt: Date;
  22 | 	bodyTemperature: number | null;
  23 | 	systolic: number | null;
  24 | 	diastolic: number | null;
  25 | 	heartRate: number | null;
  26 | 	respiratoryRate: number | null;
  27 | 	oxygenSaturation: number | null;
  28 | 	weight: number | null;
  29 | 	height: number | null;
  30 | 	headCircumference: number | null;
  31 | 	bmi: number | null;
  32 | 	notes: string | null;
  33 | 	ageDays: number | null;
  34 | 	ageMonths: number | null;
  35 | 	gender: "MALE" | "FEMALE" | "OTHER" | null;
  36 | }
  37 | 
  38 | const getVitalStatusBadge = (
  39 | 	value: number | null,
  40 | 	ranges: { min: number; max: number }
  41 | ): { color: string; label: string } | null => {
  42 | 	if (value === null) return null;
  43 | 	if (value < ranges.min) return { color: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800", label: "Low" };
  44 | 	if (value > ranges.max) return { color: "bg-orange-100 text-orange-800", label: "High" };
  45 | 	return { color: "bg-green-100 text-green-800", label: "Normal" };
  46 | };
  47 | 
  48 | const temperatureRanges = { min: 36.1, max: 37.2 };
  49 | const heartRateRanges = { min: 60, max: 100 };
  50 | const _bpSystolicRanges = { min: 90, max: 120 };
  51 | const _bpDiastolicRanges = { min: 60, max: 80 };
  52 | const respRateRanges = { min: 12, max: 20 };
  53 | const o2Ranges = { min: 95, max: 100 };
  54 | 
  55 | const formatMeasurement = (value: number | null, unit: string): string => {
  56 | 	if (value === null) return "—";
  57 | 	return `${value.toFixed(1)} ${unit}`;
  58 | };
  59 |

  66 | function VitalSignsRowActions({ record, onView, onDelete }: VitalSignsRowActionsProps) {

  68 | 		<DropdownMenu>
  69 | 			<DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>

  71 | 					className='h-8 w-8 p-0'
  72 | 					variant='ghost'

  74 | 					<span className='sr-only'>Open menu</span>
  75 | 					<MoreHorizontal className='h-4 w-4' />
  76 | 				</Button>
  77 | 			</DropdownMenuTrigger>

  79 | 				<DropdownMenuLabel>Actions</DropdownMenuLabel>

  81 | 					<Eye className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />

  83 | 				</DropdownMenuItem>
  84 | 				<DropdownMenuSeparator />

  86 | 					className='text-destructive focus:text-destructive'

```

`components/vitals/growth-percentile-chart.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/select";
   2 | import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/tabs";

   4 | import { useCallback, useMemo, useState } from "react";
   5 | import { Area, CartesianGrid, ComposedChart, Line, ResponsiveContainer, Tooltip, XAxis, YAxis } from "recharts";
   6 | 
   7 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   8 | // Types
   9 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  10 | 
  11 | interface GrowthDataPoint {
  12 | 	date: string | Date;
  13 | 	weight?: number | null;
  14 | 	height?: number | null;
  15 | 	headCircumference?: number | null;
  16 | 	bmi?: number | null;
  17 | 	weightPercentile?: number | null;

  19 | 	bmiPercentile?: number | null;
  20 | 	ageMonths?: number | null;
  21 | 	ageDays?: number | null;
  22 | }

  24 | interface GrowthPercentileChartProps {
  25 | 	data?: GrowthDataPoint[];
  26 | 	patientGender?: "MALE" | "FEMALE";
  27 | 	patientBirthDate?: string | Date;
  28 | 	loading?: boolean;
  29 | 	/** Called when the user clicks "Add Record". Omit to hide the button. */
  30 | 	onAddRecord?: () => void;
  31 | }
  32 | 
  33 | type ChartMetric = "weight" | "height" | "bmi" | "headCircumference";
  34 | 
  35 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  36 | // Constants

  39 | const metricLabels: Record<ChartMetric, { label: string; unit: string }> = {
  40 | 	weight: { label: "Weight", unit: "kg" },
  41 | 	height: { label: "Height", unit: "cm" },
  42 | 	bmi: { label: "BMI", unit: "kg/m²" },
  43 | 	headCircumference: { label: "Head Circumference", unit: "cm" }

  47 | 	weight: "#3b82f6",
  48 | 	height: "#10b981",
  49 | 	bmi: "#f59e0b",
  50 | 	headCircumference: "#8b5cf6"
  51 | };

  53 | const sdColors = {
  54 | 	SD3: "#b91c1c",
  55 | 	SD2: "#dc2626",
  56 | 	SD1: "#f87171",
  57 | 	SD0: "#10b981",
  58 | 	SD1neg: "#f59e0b",
  59 | 	SD2neg: "#ea580c",
  60 | 	SD3neg: "#9a3412"
  61 | };
```
