```tsx
  63 | const SD_KEYS = ["SD3neg", "SD2neg", "SD1neg", "SD0", "SD1", "SD2", "SD3"] as const;
  64 | 
  65 | type SDKey = (typeof SD_KEYS)[number];
  66 | 
  67 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  68 | // WHO z-score data
  69 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  70 | 
  71 | interface WHODataPoint {
  72 | 	Day: string;
  73 | 	L: string;
  74 | 	M: string;
  75 | 	S: string;
  76 | 	SD4neg: string;
  77 | 	SD3neg: string;
  78 | 	SD2neg: string;
  79 | 	SD1neg: string;
  80 | 	SD0: string;
  81 | 	SD1: string;
  82 | 	SD2: string;
  83 | 	SD3: string;
  84 | 	SD4: string;
  85 | }
  86 | 
  87 | interface WHOData {
  88 | 	wfa: {
  89 | 		boys: WHODataPoint[];
  90 | 		girls: WHODataPoint[];
  91 | 	};
  92 | }
  93 | 
  94 | import whoZScoreData from "../../../data/zscore-wfa.json";
  95 | 
  96 | const whoData = whoZScoreData as WHOData;
  97 | 
  98 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  99 | // Chart data types
 100 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 101 | 
 102 | interface ChartRow {
 103 | 	ageDays: number;
 104 | 	/** Patient's actual measurement (null for pure-reference rows) */
 105 | 	actual: number | null;
 106 | 	/** Date of the measurement (only present on patient rows) */
 107 | 	date?: string | Date;
 108 | 	SD3neg: number;
 109 | 	SD2neg: number;
 110 | 	SD1neg: number;
 111 | 	SD0: number;
 112 | 	SD1: number;
 113 | 	SD2: number;
 114 | 	SD3: number;
 115 | }
 116 | 
 117 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 118 | // Helpers
 119 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 120 | 
 121 | function calculateAgeDays(birthDate: Date, measurementDate: Date): number {
 122 | 	const diffTime = measurementDate.getTime() - birthDate.getTime();
 123 | 	return Math.max(0, Math.floor(diffTime / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)));
 124 | }
 125 | 
 126 | function formatAgeDays(ageDays: number): string {
 127 | 	const months = ageDays / 30.4375;
 128 | 	if (months < 1) return `${ageDays}d`;
 129 | 	if (months < 24) return `${Math.round(months)}mo`;
 130 | 	return `${(months / 12).toFixed(1)}y`;
 131 | }
 132 | 
 133 | /**
 134 |  * Build the continuous WHO reference curve sampled at regular intervals.
 135 |  * We sample every `step` days within the provided dataset.
 136 |  */
 137 | function buildReferenceCurve(gender: "MALE" | "FEMALE", maxAgeDays: number, step = 14): ChartRow[] {
 138 | 	const dataSet = gender === "MALE" ? whoData.wfa.boys : whoData.wfa.girls;
 139 | 	if (!dataSet?.length) return [];
 140 | 
 141 | 	const lastAvailableDay = Number.parseInt(dataSet[dataSet.length - 1].Day, 10);
 142 | 	const upperBound = Math.min(maxAgeDays, lastAvailableDay);
 143 | 
 144 | 	const rows: ChartRow[] = [];
 145 | 	let idx = 0;
 146 | 
 147 | 	for (let day = 0; day <= upperBound; day += step) {
 148 | 		// Advance idx so dataSet[idx].Day <= day
 149 | 		while (idx < dataSet.length - 1 && Number.parseInt(dataSet[idx + 1].Day, 10) <= day) {
 150 | 			idx++;
 151 | 		}
 152 | 
 153 | 		const before = dataSet[idx];
 154 | 		const after = idx < dataSet.length - 1 ? dataSet[idx + 1] : before;
 155 | 		const beforeDay = Number.parseInt(before.Day, 10);
 156 | 		const afterDay = Number.parseInt(after.Day, 10);
 157 | 
 158 | 		const ratio = afterDay === beforeDay ? 0 : (day - beforeDay) / (afterDay - beforeDay);
 159 | 
 160 | 		const row: ChartRow = {
 161 | 			ageDays: day,
 162 | 			actual: null,
 163 | 			SD3neg: lerp(before.SD3neg, after.SD3neg, ratio),
 164 | 			SD2neg: lerp(before.SD2neg, after.SD2neg, ratio),
 165 | 			SD1neg: lerp(before.SD1neg, after.SD1neg, ratio),
 166 | 			SD0: lerp(before.SD0, after.SD0, ratio),
 167 | 			SD1: lerp(before.SD1, after.SD1, ratio),
 168 | 			SD2: lerp(before.SD2, after.SD2, ratio),
 169 | 			SD3: lerp(before.SD3, after.SD3, ratio)
 170 | 		};
 171 | 		rows.push(row);
 172 | 	}
 173 | 
 174 | 	return rows;
 175 | }
 176 | 
 177 | function lerp(aStr: string, bStr: string, t: number): number {
 178 | 	const a = Number.parseFloat(aStr);
 179 | 	const b = Number.parseFloat(bStr);
 180 | 	return a + (b - a) * t;
 181 | }
 182 | 
 183 | /**
 184 |  * Merge patient measurement points into the reference curve.
 185 |  * Each patient point is inserted at its exact ageDays position.
 186 |  */
 187 | function mergePatientData(
 188 | 	refCurve: ChartRow[],
 189 | 	measurements: {
 190 | 		ageDays: number;
 191 | 		actual: number | null;
 192 | 		date?: string | Date;
 193 | 	}[],
 194 | 	gender: "MALE" | "FEMALE"
 195 | ): ChartRow[] {
 196 | 	const dataSet = gender === "MALE" ? whoData.wfa.boys : whoData.wfa.girls;
 197 | 	if (!dataSet?.length) return refCurve;
 198 | 
 199 | 	// Build a Map of ageDays -> refCurve index for quick dedup
 200 | 	const existingDays = new Set(refCurve.map(r => r.ageDays));
 201 | 
 202 | 	const extraRows: ChartRow[] = [];
 203 | 
 204 | 	for (const m of measurements) {
 205 | 		if (m.actual === null && m.actual === undefined) continue;
 206 | 
 207 | 		// Interpolate SD values at this exact age
 208 | 		let idx = 0;
 209 | 		while (idx < dataSet.length - 1 && Number.parseInt(dataSet[idx + 1].Day, 10) <= m.ageDays) {
 210 | 			idx++;
 211 | 		}
 212 | 		const before = dataSet[idx];
 213 | 		const after = idx < dataSet.length - 1 ? dataSet[idx + 1] : before;
 214 | 		const beforeDay = Number.parseInt(before.Day, 10);
 215 | 		const afterDay = Number.parseInt(after.Day, 10);
 216 | 		const ratio = afterDay === beforeDay ? 0 : (m.ageDays - beforeDay) / (afterDay - beforeDay);
 217 | 
 218 | 		const row: ChartRow = {
 219 | 			ageDays: m.ageDays,
 220 | 			actual: m.actual,
 221 | 			date: m.date,
 222 | 			SD3neg: lerp(before.SD3neg, after.SD3neg, ratio),
 223 | 			SD2neg: lerp(before.SD2neg, after.SD2neg, ratio),
 224 | 			SD1neg: lerp(before.SD1neg, after.SD1neg, ratio),
 225 | 			SD0: lerp(before.SD0, after.SD0, ratio),
 226 | 			SD1: lerp(before.SD1, after.SD1, ratio),
 227 | 			SD2: lerp(before.SD2, after.SD2, ratio),
 228 | 			SD3: lerp(before.SD3, after.SD3, ratio)
 229 | 		};
 230 | 
 231 | 		if (existingDays.has(m.ageDays)) {
 232 | 			// Update the existing reference row with the actual value
 233 | 			const existing = refCurve.find(r => r.ageDays === m.ageDays);
 234 | 			if (existing) {
 235 | 				existing.actual = m.actual;
 236 | 				existing.date = m.date;
 237 | 			}
 238 | 		} else {
 239 | 			extraRows.push(row);
 240 | 		}
 241 | 	}
 242 | 
 243 | 	const merged = [...refCurve, ...extraRows];
 244 | 	merged.sort((a, b) => a.ageDays - b.ageDays);
 245 | 	return merged;
 246 | }
 247 | 
 248 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 249 | // Tooltip
 250 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 251 | 
 252 | function CustomTooltip(props: {
 253 | 	active?: boolean;
 254 | 	payload?: Array<{ payload?: ChartRow; [k: string]: unknown }>;
 255 | 	metric: ChartMetric;
 256 | }) {
 257 | 	const { active, payload, metric } = props;
 258 | 
 259 | 	if (!active || !payload || payload.length === 0) return null;
 260 | 
 261 | 	const row = payload[0]?.payload as ChartRow | undefined;
 262 | 	if (!row) return null;
 263 | 
 264 | 	const { label, unit } = metricLabels[metric];
 265 | 	const ageLabel = formatAgeDays(row.ageDays);
 266 | 
 267 | 	return (
 268 | 		<div className='rounded-lg border bg-white p-3 shadow-lg dark:bg-gray-900'>
 269 | 			<p className='mb-1 font-medium text-sm'>
 270 | 				Age: {ageLabel}
 271 | 				{row.date && (
 272 | 					<span className='ml-2 text-muted-foreground text-xs'>
 273 | 						({new Date(row.date).toLocaleDateString()})
 274 | 					</span>
 275 | 				)}
 276 | 			</p>
 277 | 
 278 | 			{row.actual != null && (
 279 | 				<p
 280 | 					className='text-sm'
 281 | 					style={{ color: metricColors[metric] }}
 282 | 				>
 283 | 					<strong>
 284 | 						{label}: {row.actual.toFixed(1)} {unit}
 285 | 					</strong>
 286 | 				</p>
 287 | 			)}
 288 | 
 289 | 			<div className='mt-1 border-t pt-1 text-muted-foreground text-xs'>
 290 | 				<p className='mb-0.5 font-medium'>WHO Reference:</p>
 291 | 				{SD_KEYS.map(k => (
 292 | 					<p
 293 | 						key={k}
 294 | 						style={{ color: sdColors[k as keyof typeof sdColors] }}
 295 | 					>
 296 | 						{formatSDLabel(k)}: {row[k].toFixed(1)} {unit}
 297 | 					</p>
 298 | 				))}
 299 | 			</div>
 300 | 		</div>
 301 | 	);
 302 | }
 303 | 
 304 | function formatSDLabel(key: SDKey): string {
 305 | 	const map: Record<SDKey, string> = {
 306 | 		SD3neg: "-3 SD",
 307 | 		SD2neg: "-2 SD",
 308 | 		SD1neg: "-1 SD",
 309 | 		SD0: "Median",
 310 | 		SD1: "+1 SD",
 311 | 		SD2: "+2 SD",
 312 | 		SD3: "+3 SD"
 313 | 	};
 314 | 	return map[key];
 315 | }
 316 | 
 317 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 318 | // SD line/area definitions
 319 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 320 | 
 321 | const sdBands: {
 322 | 	lower: SDKey;
 323 | 	upper: SDKey;
 324 | 	color: string;
 325 | 	opacity: number;
 326 | }[] = [
 327 | 	{ lower: "SD3neg", upper: "SD2neg", color: "#fca5a5", opacity: 0.25 },
 328 | 	{ lower: "SD2neg", upper: "SD1neg", color: "#fed7aa", opacity: 0.2 },
 329 | 	{ lower: "SD1neg", upper: "SD0", color: "#d1fae5", opacity: 0.2 },
 330 | 	{ lower: "SD0", upper: "SD1", color: "#d1fae5", opacity: 0.2 },
 331 | 	{ lower: "SD1", upper: "SD2", color: "#fed7aa", opacity: 0.2 },
 332 | 	{ lower: "SD2", upper: "SD3", color: "#fca5a5", opacity: 0.25 }
 333 | ];
 334 | 
 335 | const sdLines: { key: SDKey; label: string; color: string }[] = [
 336 | 	{ key: "SD3neg", label: "-3 SD", color: sdColors.SD3neg },
 337 | 	{ key: "SD2neg", label: "-2 SD", color: sdColors.SD2neg },
 338 | 	{ key: "SD1neg", label: "-1 SD", color: sdColors.SD1neg },
 339 | 	{ key: "SD0", label: "Median", color: sdColors.SD0 },
 340 | 	{ key: "SD1", label: "+1 SD", color: sdColors.SD1 },
 341 | 	{ key: "SD2", label: "+2 SD", color: sdColors.SD2 },
 342 | 	{ key: "SD3", label: "+3 SD", color: sdColors.SD3 }
 343 | ];
 344 | 
 345 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 346 | // Component
 347 | // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 348 | 
 349 | export function GrowthPercentileChart({
 350 | 	data = [],
 351 | 	patientGender = "MALE",
 352 | 	patientBirthDate,
 353 | 	loading = false,
 354 | 	onAddRecord
 355 | }: GrowthPercentileChartProps) {
 356 | 	const [metric, setMetric] = useState<ChartMetric>("weight");
 357 | 	const [ageRange, setAgeRange] = useState<"6m" | "1y" | "2y" | "5y" | "all">("2y");
 358 | 	const [showShadedArea, setShowShadedArea] = useState(true);
 359 | 
 360 | 	// Determine birth date from props or infer from first record
 361 | 	const birthDate = useMemo(() => {
 362 | 		if (patientBirthDate) return new Date(patientBirthDate);
 363 | 		if (data.length && data[0].ageDays != null) {
 364 | 			const d = new Date(data[0].date);
 365 | 			d.setDate(d.getDate() - (data[0].ageDays ?? 0));
 366 | 			return d;
 367 | 		}
 368 | 		// Fallback: assume first measurement is at birth
 369 | 		return data.length ? new Date(data[0].date) : new Date();
 370 | 	}, [patientBirthDate, data]);
 371 | 
 372 | 	// Convert patient data to {ageDays, actual} tuples
 373 | 	const patientPoints = useMemo(() => {
 374 | 		return data
 375 | 			.map(p => ({
 376 | 				ageDays: p.ageDays ?? calculateAgeDays(birthDate, new Date(p.date)),
 377 | 				actual: (p[metric] as number | null | undefined) ?? null,
 378 | 				date: p.date
 379 | 			}))
 380 | 			.filter(p => p.actual != null)
 381 | 			.sort((a, b) => a.ageDays - b.ageDays);
 382 | 	}, [data, metric, birthDate]);
 383 | 
 384 | 	// Determine max age to render
 385 | 	const maxAgeDays = useMemo(() => {
 386 | 		const ageMap: Record<string, number> = {
 387 | 			"6m": 183,
 388 | 			"1y": 365,
 389 | 			"2y": 730,
 390 | 			"5y": 1826,
 391 | 			all: 1856
 392 | 		};
 393 | 		const rangeMax = ageMap[ageRange] ?? 1856;
 394 | 		const dataMax = patientPoints.length ? Math.max(...patientPoints.map(p => p.ageDays)) : 0;
 395 | 		// Extend a bit past the last measurement
 396 | 		return Math.max(rangeMax, dataMax + 30);
 397 | 	}, [ageRange, patientPoints]);
 398 | 
 399 | 	// Build the merged reference + patient chart data
 400 | 	const chartData = useMemo(() => {
 401 | 		// Sample step: smaller for short ranges, bigger for long
 402 | 		const step = maxAgeDays <= 365 ? 7 : maxAgeDays <= 730 ? 14 : 30;
 403 | 		const ref = buildReferenceCurve(patientGender, maxAgeDays, step);
 404 | 		return mergePatientData(ref, patientPoints, patientGender);
 405 | 	}, [patientGender, maxAgeDays, patientPoints]);
 406 | 
 407 | 	// Filtered by age range
 408 | 	const filteredData = useMemo(() => {
 409 | 		const ageMap: Record<string, number> = {
 410 | 			"6m": 183,
 411 | 			"1y": 365,
 412 | 			"2y": 730,
 413 | 			"5y": 1826,
 414 | 			all: Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER
 415 | 		};
 416 | 		const limit = ageMap[ageRange] ?? Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER;
 417 | 		return chartData.filter(r => r.ageDays <= limit);
 418 | 	}, [chartData, ageRange]);
 419 | 
 420 | 	const getYAxisDomain = useCallback(() => {
 421 | 		const vals: number[] = [];
 422 | 		for (const d of filteredData) {
 423 | 			if (d.actual != null) vals.push(d.actual);
 424 | 			vals.push(d.SD3neg, d.SD3);
 425 | 		}
 426 | 		if (!vals.length) return [0, 20];
 427 | 		const min = Math.min(...vals);
 428 | 		const max = Math.max(...vals);
 429 | 		const pad = Math.max(0.5, (max - min) * 0.08);
 430 | 		return [Math.max(0, min - pad), max + pad];
 431 | 	}, [filteredData]);
 432 | 
 433 | 	// ---------- Render ----------
 434 | 
 435 | 	if (loading) {
 436 | 		return (
 437 | 			<div className='flex h-80 items-center justify-center'>
 438 | 				<div className='text-muted-foreground'>Loading growth data...</div>
 439 | 			</div>
 440 | 		);
 441 | 	}
 442 | 
 443 | 	if (!data || data.length === 0) {
 444 | 		return (
 445 | 			<div className='flex h-80 flex-col items-center justify-center text-center'>
 446 | 				<Ruler className='mb-3 h-12 w-12 text-muted-foreground' />
 447 | 				<p className='text-muted-foreground'>No growth measurements recorded yet</p>
 448 | 				<p className='text-muted-foreground text-sm'>
 449 | 					Record height and weight measurements to see growth trends
 450 | 				</p>
 451 | 				{onAddRecord && (
 452 | 					<button
 453 | 						className='mt-4 inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-md bg-primary px-3 py-1.5 text-primary-foreground text-sm transition-colors hover:bg-primary/90'
 454 | 						onClick={onAddRecord}
 455 | 						type='button'
 456 | 					>
 457 | 						<Plus className='h-4 w-4' />
 458 | 						Add First Record
 459 | 					</button>
 460 | 				)}
 461 | 			</div>
 462 | 		);
 463 | 	}
 464 | 
 465 | 	return (
 466 | 		<div className='space-y-4'>
 467 | 			{/* Controls */}
 468 | 			<div className='flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-4'>
 469 | 				<Tabs
 470 | 					className='shrink-0'
 471 | 					onValueChange={v => setMetric(v as ChartMetric)}
 472 | 					value={metric}
 473 | 				>
 474 | 					<TabsList>
 475 | 						<TabsTrigger value='weight'>Weight</TabsTrigger>
 476 | 						<TabsTrigger value='height'>Height</TabsTrigger>
 477 | 						<TabsTrigger value='bmi'>BMI</TabsTrigger>
 478 | 						<TabsTrigger value='headCircumference'>Head Circ.</TabsTrigger>
 479 | 					</TabsList>
 480 | 				</Tabs>
 481 | 
 482 | 				<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 483 | 					{onAddRecord && (
 484 | 						<button
 485 | 							className='inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-md bg-primary px-2.5 py-1 text-primary-foreground text-xs transition-colors hover:bg-primary/90'
 486 | 							onClick={onAddRecord}
 487 | 							type='button'
 488 | 						>
 489 | 							<Plus className='h-3.5 w-3.5' />
 490 | 							Add Record
 491 | 						</button>
 492 | 					)}
 493 | 
 494 | 					<button
 495 | 						className={`rounded-md px-2 py-1 text-xs transition-colors ${
 496 | 							showShadedArea ? "bg-primary/10 text-primary" : "bg-muted text-muted-foreground"
 497 | 						}`}
 498 | 						onClick={() => setShowShadedArea(!showShadedArea)}
 499 | 						type='button'
 500 | 					>
 501 | 						{showShadedArea ? "Hide SD Areas" : "Show SD Areas"}
 502 | 					</button>
 503 | 
 504 | 					<Select
 505 | 						onValueChange={(v: typeof ageRange) => setAgeRange(v)}
 506 | 						value={ageRange}
 507 | 					>
 508 | 						<SelectTrigger className='w-32'>
 509 | 							<SelectValue />
 510 | 						</SelectTrigger>
 511 | 						<SelectContent>
 512 | 							<SelectItem value='6m'>0 – 6 months</SelectItem>
 513 | 							<SelectItem value='1y'>0 – 1 year</SelectItem>
 514 | 							<SelectItem value='2y'>0 – 2 years</SelectItem>
 515 | 							<SelectItem value='5y'>0 – 5 years</SelectItem>
 516 | 							<SelectItem value='all'>All time</SelectItem>
 517 | 						</SelectContent>
 518 | 					</Select>
 519 | 				</div>
 520 | 			</div>
 521 | 
 522 | 			{/* Chart */}
 523 | 			<ResponsiveContainer
 524 | 				height={420}
 525 | 				width='100%'
 526 | 			>
 527 | 				<ComposedChart
 528 | 					data={filteredData}
 529 | 					margin={{ top: 10, right: 30, left: 10, bottom: 0 }}
 530 | 				>
 531 | 					<CartesianGrid
 532 | 						className='stroke-muted'
 533 | 						strokeDasharray='3 3'
 534 | 					/>
 535 | 
 536 | 					<XAxis
 537 | 						axisLine={false}
 538 | 						dataKey='ageDays'
 539 | 						domain={[0, "dataMax"]}
 540 | 						label={{
 541 | 							value: "Age",
 542 | 							position: "insideBottomRight",
 543 | 							offset: -5,
 544 | 							style: { fontSize: 11, fill: "currentColor" }
 545 | 						}}
 546 | 						tick={{ fontSize: 11 }}
 547 | 						tickFormatter={formatAgeDays}
 548 | 						tickLine={false}
 549 | 						type='number'
 550 | 					/>
 551 | 
 552 | 					<YAxis
 553 | 						axisLine={false}
 554 | 						domain={getYAxisDomain()}
 555 | 						label={{
 556 | 							value: `${metricLabels[metric].label} (${metricLabels[metric].unit})`,
 557 | 							angle: -90,
 558 | 							position: "insideLeft",
 559 | 							style: { fontSize: 11, fill: "currentColor" }
 560 | 						}}
 561 | 						tick={{ fontSize: 11 }}
 562 | 						tickLine={false}
 563 | 					/>
 564 | 
 565 | 					<Tooltip
 566 | 						content={
 567 | 							((props: Record<string, unknown>) => (
 568 | 								<CustomTooltip
 569 | 									active={props.active as boolean}
 570 | 									metric={metric}
 571 | 									payload={
 572 | 										props.payload as Array<{
 573 | 											payload?: ChartRow;
 574 | 											[k: string]: unknown;
 575 | 										}>
 576 | 									}
 577 | 								/>
 578 | 							)) as never
 579 | 						}
 580 | 					/>
 581 | 
 582 | 					{/* Shaded bands between SD lines — render lower as invisible fill, upper as colored */}
 583 | 					{showShadedArea &&
 584 | 						sdBands.map(band => (
 585 | 							<Area
 586 | 								dataKey={band.upper}
 587 | 								fill={band.color}
 588 | 								fillOpacity={band.opacity}
 589 | 								isAnimationActive={false}
 590 | 								key={`band-${band.lower}-${band.upper}`}
 591 | 								stroke='none'
 592 | 								type='monotone'
 593 | 							/>
 594 | 						))}
 595 | 
 596 | 					{/* SD reference lines */}
 597 | 					{sdLines.map(line => (
 598 | 						<Line
 599 | 							activeDot={false}
 600 | 							dataKey={line.key}
 601 | 							dot={false}
 602 | 							isAnimationActive={false}
 603 | 							key={line.key}
 604 | 							name={line.label}
 605 | 							stroke={line.color}
 606 | 							strokeDasharray={line.key === "SD0" ? "0" : "4 4"}
 607 | 							strokeWidth={line.key === "SD0" ? 2 : 1}
 608 | 							type='monotone'
 609 | 						/>
 610 | 					))}
 611 | 
 612 | 					{/* Patient measurement line connecting the dots */}
 613 | 					<Line
 614 | 						activeDot={{ r: 7 }}
 615 | 						connectNulls
 616 | 						dataKey='actual'
 617 | 						dot={{ r: 5, fill: metricColors[metric], strokeWidth: 2 }}
 618 | 						name='Actual'
 619 | 						stroke={metricColors[metric]}
 620 | 						strokeWidth={2.5}
 621 | 						type='monotone'
 622 | 					/>
 623 | 				</ComposedChart>
 624 | 			</ResponsiveContainer>
 625 | 
 626 | 			{/* Legend */}
 627 | 			<div className='flex flex-wrap items-center justify-center gap-4 pt-2 text-xs'>
 628 | 				<div className='flex items-center gap-1.5'>
 629 | 					<div
 630 | 						className='h-3 w-3 rounded-full'
 631 | 						style={{ backgroundColor: metricColors[metric] }}
 632 | 					/>
 633 | 					<span>{metricLabels[metric].label}</span>
 634 | 				</div>
 635 | 				<div className='flex items-center gap-1.5'>
 636 | 					<div
 637 | 						className='h-0 w-5 border-t-2'
 638 | 						style={{ borderColor: sdColors.SD0 }}
 639 | 					/>
 640 | 					<span>Median (50th %ile)</span>
 641 | 				</div>
 642 | 				<div className='flex items-center gap-1.5'>
 643 | 					<div
 644 | 						className='h-0 w-5 border-t border-dashed'
 645 | 						style={{ borderColor: sdColors.SD2 }}
 646 | 					/>
 647 | 					<span>±2 SD</span>
 648 | 				</div>
 649 | 				<div className='flex items-center gap-1.5'>
 650 | 					<div
 651 | 						className='h-0 w-5 border-t border-dashed'
 652 | 						style={{ borderColor: sdColors.SD3neg }}
 653 | 					/>
 654 | 					<span>±3 SD</span>
 655 | 				</div>
 656 | 			</div>
 657 | 
 658 | 			{/* Interpretation note */}
 659 | 			<div className='rounded-lg bg-muted/50 p-3 text-center text-muted-foreground text-xs'>
 660 | 				Chart shows patient measurements compared to WHO Child Growth Standards (Weight-for-Age). The shaded
 661 | 				areas represent standard deviation ranges from -3 SD to +3 SD. Values outside ±2 SD may indicate growth
 662 | 				concerns.
 663 | 			</div>
 664 | 		</div>
 665 | 	);
 666 | }
 667 | 
 668 | export default GrowthPercentileChart;

```

`components/vitals/vital-signs-form.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // src/components/forms/vital-signs-form.tsx
   2 | 
   3 | import { Badge } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/badge";
   4 | import { Button } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/button";
   5 | import { Calendar } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/calendar";
   6 | import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/card";
   7 | import { Input } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/input";
   8 | import { Label } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/label";
   9 | import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/popover";
  10 | import { Separator } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/separator";
  11 | import { cn } from "@clinic/ui/lib/utils";
  12 | import { useMutation, useQuery, useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
  13 | import { useSelector } from "@tanstack/react-store";
  14 | import { format } from "date-fns";
  15 | import {
  16 | 	Activity,
  17 | 	Calendar as CalendarIcon,
  18 | 	Clock,
  19 | 	Droplets,
  20 | 	Heart,
  21 | 	Ruler,
  22 | 	Thermometer,
  23 | 	User,
  24 | 	Wind
  25 | } from "lucide-react";
  26 | import * as React from "react";
  27 | import { toast } from "sonner";
  28 | import * as z from "zod";
  29 | 
  30 | import { useAppForm, useFormFields } from "@/components/forms/tanstack-form";
  31 | import { orpc } from "@/utils/orpc";
  32 | 
  33 | // Vital Signs Form Schema
  34 | const vitalSignsFormSchema = z.object({
  35 | 	id: z.string(),
  36 | 	patientId: z.string().min(1, "Please select a patient"),
  37 | 	medicalId: z.string().min(1, "Medical record ID is required"),
  38 | 	encounterId: z.string(),
  39 | 	recordedAt: z.date(),
  40 | 
  41 | 	// Vital signs measurements
  42 | 	bodyTemperature: z.number().min(30, "Temperature too low").max(45, "Temperature too high").optional(),
  43 | 	systolic: z.number().min(50, "Systolic pressure too low").max(250, "Systolic pressure too high").optional(),
  44 | 	diastolic: z.number().min(30, "Diastolic pressure too low").max(150, "Diastolic pressure too high").optional(),
  45 | 	heartRate: z.number().min(30, "Heart rate too low").max(250, "Heart rate too high").optional(),
  46 | 	respiratoryRate: z.number().min(5, "Respiratory rate too low").max(60, "Respiratory rate too high").optional(),
  47 | 	oxygenSaturation: z.number().min(50, "Oxygen saturation too low").max(100, "Oxygen saturation too high").optional(),
  48 | 
  49 | 	// Growth measurements (pediatric)
  50 | 	weight: z.number().min(0.2, "Weight too low").max(200, "Weight too high").optional(),
  51 | 	height: z.number().min(30, "Height too low").max(250, "Height too high").optional(),
  52 | 	headCircumference: z
  53 | 		.number()
  54 | 		.min(20, "Head circumference too low")
  55 | 		.max(80, "Head circumference too high")
  56 | 		.optional(),
  57 | 	bmi: z.number().optional(),
  58 | 
  59 | 	// Age tracking for pediatric percentiles
  60 | 	ageDays: z.number().optional(),
  61 | 	ageMonths: z.number().optional(),
  62 | 	gender: z.enum(["MALE", "FEMALE", "OTHER"]).optional(),
  63 | 
  64 | 	notes: z.string().optional()
  65 | });
  66 | 
  67 | type VitalSignsFormValues = z.infer<typeof vitalSignsFormSchema>;
  68 | 
  69 | // Helper function to calculate age from date of birth
  70 | function calculateAge(dateOfBirth: Date): { days: number; months: number } {
  71 | 	const today = new Date();
  72 | 	const diffTime = Math.abs(today.getTime() - dateOfBirth.getTime());
  73 | 	const diffDays = Math.ceil(diffTime / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  74 | 	const diffMonths =
  75 | 		(today.getFullYear() - dateOfBirth.getFullYear()) * 12 + (today.getMonth() - dateOfBirth.getMonth());
  76 | 
  77 | 	return { days: diffDays, months: Math.max(0, diffMonths) };
  78 | }
  79 | 
  80 | // Helper to calculate BMI
  81 | function calculateBMI(weight: number | undefined, height: number | undefined): number | undefined {
  82 | 	if (weight && height && height > 0) {
  83 | 		const heightInMeters = height / 100;
  84 | 		return Number((weight / (heightInMeters * heightInMeters)).toFixed(1));
  85 | 	}
  86 | 	return undefined;
  87 | }
  88 | 
  89 | // Helper to interpret vital signs
  90 | function getVitalStatus(
  91 | 	value: number | undefined,
  92 | 	ranges: {
  93 | 		min: number;
  94 | 		max: number;
  95 | 		criticalMin?: number;
  96 | 		criticalMax?: number;
  97 | 	},
  98 | 	unit: string
  99 | ): { status: "normal" | "warning" | "critical"; display: string } {
 100 | 	if (value === undefined) return { status: "normal", display: "Not recorded" };
 101 | 
 102 | 	if (ranges.criticalMin && value < ranges.criticalMin) {
 103 | 		return { status: "critical", display: `⚠️ Critical Low: ${value} ${unit}` };
 104 | 	}
 105 | 	if (ranges.criticalMax && value > ranges.criticalMax) {
 106 | 		return { status: "critical", display: `⚠️ Critical High: ${value} ${unit}` };
 107 | 	}
 108 | 	if (value < ranges.min) {
 109 | 		return { status: "warning", display: `Low: ${value} ${unit}` };
 110 | 	}
 111 | 	if (value > ranges.max) {
 112 | 		return { status: "warning", display: `High: ${value} ${unit}` };
 113 | 	}
 114 | 	return { status: "normal", display: `${value} ${unit}` };
 115 | }
 116 | 
 117 | // Reference ranges for vital signs
 118 | const vitalRanges = {
 119 | 	bodyTemperature: {
 120 | 		min: 36.1,
 121 | 		max: 37.2,
 122 | 		criticalMin: 35.0,
 123 | 		criticalMax: 40.0,
 124 | 		unit: "°C"
 125 | 	},
 126 | 	systolic: {
 127 | 		min: 90,
 128 | 		max: 120,
 129 | 		criticalMin: 70,
 130 | 		criticalMax: 180,
 131 | 		unit: "mmHg"
 132 | 	},
 133 | 	diastolic: {
 134 | 		min: 60,
 135 | 		max: 80,
 136 | 		criticalMin: 40,
 137 | 		criticalMax: 120,
 138 | 		unit: "mmHg"
 139 | 	},
 140 | 	heartRate: {
 141 | 		min: 60,
 142 | 		max: 100,
 143 | 		criticalMin: 40,
 144 | 		criticalMax: 150,
 145 | 		unit: "bpm"
 146 | 	},
 147 | 	respiratoryRate: {
 148 | 		min: 12,
 149 | 		max: 20,
 150 | 		criticalMin: 8,
 151 | 		criticalMax: 30,
 152 | 		unit: "breaths/min"
 153 | 	},
 154 | 	oxygenSaturation: {
 155 | 		min: 95,
 156 | 		max: 100,
 157 | 		criticalMin: 85,
 158 | 		criticalMax: 100,
 159 | 		unit: "%"
 160 | 	}
 161 | };
 162 | 
 163 | // Pediatric reference ranges by age group
 164 | const pediatricRanges = {
 165 | 	infant: {
 166 | 		heartRate: { min: 80, max: 160 },
 167 | 		respiratoryRate: { min: 20, max: 40 }
 168 | 	},
 169 | 	toddler: {
 170 | 		heartRate: { min: 70, max: 120 },
 171 | 		respiratoryRate: { min: 18, max: 30 }
 172 | 	},
 173 | 	child: {
 174 | 		heartRate: { min: 60, max: 110 },
 175 | 		respiratoryRate: { min: 15, max: 25 }
 176 | 	},
 177 | 	adolescent: {
 178 | 		heartRate: { min: 55, max: 100 },
 179 | 		respiratoryRate: { min: 12, max: 20 }
 180 | 	}
 181 | };
 182 | 
 183 | function getPediatricRange(ageMonths: number | undefined) {
 184 | 	if (!ageMonths) return pediatricRanges.adolescent;
 185 | 	if (ageMonths < 12) return pediatricRanges.infant;
 186 | 	if (ageMonths < 36) return pediatricRanges.toddler;
 187 | 	if (ageMonths < 144) return pediatricRanges.child;
 188 | 	return pediatricRanges.adolescent;
 189 | }
 190 | 
 191 | // Helper to get vital sign display component
 192 | const VitalSignDisplay = ({
 193 | 	value,
 194 | 	ranges,
 195 | 	label,
 196 | 	icon: Icon
 197 | }: {
 198 | 	value: number | undefined;
 199 | 	ranges: typeof vitalRanges.bodyTemperature;
 200 | 	label: string;
 201 | 	icon: React.ElementType;
 202 | }) => {
 203 | 	const status = getVitalStatus(value, ranges, ranges.unit);
 204 | 	const statusColors = {
 205 | 		normal: "border-green-200 bg-green-50",
 206 | 		warning: "border-yellow-200 bg-yellow-50",
 207 | 		critical: "border-red-200 bg-red-50"
 208 | 	};
 209 | 
 210 | 	return (
 211 | 		<div className={cn("rounded-lg border p-3", statusColors[status.status])}>
 212 | 			<div className='flex items-center gap-2'>
 213 | 				<Icon
 214 | 					className={cn(
 215 | 						"h-4 w-4",
 216 | 						status.status === "normal"
 217 | 							? "text-green-600"
 218 | 							: status.status === "warning"
 219 | 								? "text-yellow-600"
 220 | 								: "text-red-600"
 221 | 					)}
 222 | 				/>
 223 | 				<span className='font-medium text-sm'>{label}</span>
 224 | 			</div>
 225 | 			<p
 226 | 				className={cn(
 227 | 					"mt-1 font-semibold text-lg",
 228 | 					status.status === "normal"
 229 | 						? "text-green-700"
 230 | 						: status.status === "warning"
 231 | 							? "text-yellow-700"
 232 | 							: "text-red-700"
 233 | 				)}
 234 | 			>
 235 | 				{status.display}
 236 | 			</p>
 237 | 		</div>
 238 | 	);
 239 | };
 240 | 
 241 | type VitalSignsFormProps = {
 242 | 	encounterId?: string;
 243 | 	initialData?: Partial<VitalSignsFormValues> & { id?: string };
 244 | 	medicalId?: string;
 245 | 	onCancel?: () => void;
 246 | 	onSuccess?: () => void;
 247 | 	patientId?: string;
 248 | 	readOnly?: boolean;
 249 | };
 250 | 
 251 | export function VitalSignsForm({
 252 | 	initialData,
 253 | 	patientId: propPatientId,
 254 | 	encounterId: propEncounterId,
 255 | 	medicalId: propMedicalId,
 256 | 	onSuccess,
 257 | 	onCancel,
 258 | 	readOnly = false
 259 | }: VitalSignsFormProps) {
 260 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
 261 | 	const [selectedPatientId, _setSelectedPatientId] = React.useState(propPatientId ?? initialData?.patientId ?? "");
 262 | 
 263 | 	// Fetch patients for dropdown
 264 | 	const { data: patientsData, isLoading: patientsLoading } = useQuery(
 265 | 		orpc.patient.list.queryOptions({
 266 | 			input: { search: "" }
 267 | 		})
 268 | 	);
 269 | 
 270 | 	// Fetch patient details to calculate age and gender
 271 | 	const { data: patientData } = useQuery({
 272 | 		...orpc.patient.getById.queryOptions({
 273 | 			input: { id: selectedPatientId }
 274 | 		}),
 275 | 		enabled: !!selectedPatientId
 276 | 	});
 277 | 
 278 | 	// Create vital signs mutation
 279 | 	const { mutate: createVitalSigns, isPending: isCreatePending } = useMutation(
 280 | 		orpc.vitalSigns.create.mutationOptions({
 281 | 			onSuccess: () => {
 282 | 				toast.success("Vital signs recorded successfully");
 283 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 284 | 					queryKey: orpc.vitalSigns.key()
 285 | 				});
 286 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 287 | 					queryKey: orpc.patient.getById.queryKey({
 288 | 						input: { id: selectedPatientId }
 289 | 					})
 290 | 				});
 291 | 				onSuccess?.();
 292 | 			},
 293 | 			onError: (error: Error) => {
 294 | 				console.error(error);
 295 | 				toast.error(error.message || "Failed to record vital signs");
 296 | 			}
 297 | 		})
 298 | 	);
 299 | 
 300 | 	// Update vital signs mutation
 301 | 	const { mutate: updateVitalSigns, isPending: isUpdatePending } = useMutation(
 302 | 		orpc.vitalSigns.update.mutationOptions({
 303 | 			onSuccess: () => {
 304 | 				toast.success("Vital signs updated successfully");
 305 | 				queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 306 | 					queryKey: orpc.vitalSigns.key()
 307 | 				});
 308 | 				onSuccess?.();
 309 | 			},
 310 | 			onError(error) {
 311 | 				console.error(error);
 312 | 				toast.error(error.message || "Failed to update vital signs");
 313 | 			}
 314 | 		})
 315 | 	);
 316 | 
 317 | 	const isPending = isCreatePending || isUpdatePending;
 318 | 
 319 | 	// Calculate age based on patient's date of birth
 320 | 	const ageInfo = React.useMemo(() => {
 321 | 		if (patientData?.dateOfBirth) {
 322 | 			return calculateAge(new Date(patientData.dateOfBirth));
 323 | 		}
 324 | 		return { days: undefined, months: undefined };
 325 | 	}, [patientData]);
 326 | 
 327 | 	const pediatricRange = getPediatricRange(ageInfo.months);
 328 | 
 329 | 	const form = useAppForm({
 330 | 		defaultValues: {
 331 | 			id: initialData?.id ?? "",
 332 | 			patientId: initialData?.patientId ?? propPatientId ?? "",
 333 | 			medicalId: initialData?.medicalId ?? propMedicalId ?? "",
 334 | 			encounterId: initialData?.encounterId ?? propEncounterId ?? "",
 335 | 			recordedAt: initialData?.recordedAt ?? new Date(),
 336 | 			bodyTemperature: initialData?.bodyTemperature ?? undefined,
 337 | 			systolic: initialData?.systolic ?? undefined,
 338 | 			diastolic: initialData?.diastolic ?? undefined,
 339 | 			heartRate: initialData?.heartRate ?? undefined,
 340 | 			respiratoryRate: initialData?.respiratoryRate ?? undefined,
 341 | 			oxygenSaturation: initialData?.oxygenSaturation ?? undefined,
 342 | 			weight: initialData?.weight ?? undefined,
 343 | 			height: initialData?.height ?? undefined,
 344 | 			headCircumference: initialData?.headCircumference ?? undefined,
 345 | 			bmi: initialData?.bmi ?? undefined,
 346 | 			ageDays: ageInfo.days,
 347 | 			ageMonths: ageInfo.months,
 348 | 			gender: (patientData?.gender as "MALE" | "FEMALE") ?? undefined,
 349 | 			notes: initialData?.notes ?? undefined
 350 | 		} satisfies VitalSignsFormValues,
 351 | 		validators: {
 352 | 			onSubmit: ({ value }) => {
 353 | 				const result = vitalSignsFormSchema.safeParse(value);
 354 | 				if (!result.success) {
 355 | 					return result.error.issues.map(i => i.message).join(", ");
 356 | 				}
 357 | 			}
 358 | 		},
 359 | 		onSubmit: async ({ value }) => {
 360 | 			const payload: Omit<VitalSignsType, "id"> = {
 361 | 				patientId: value.patientId,
 362 | 				medicalId: value.medicalId,
 363 | 				encounterId: value.encounterId || null,
 364 | 				recordedAt: value.recordedAt,
 365 | 				bodyTemperature: value.bodyTemperature ?? null,
 366 | 				systolic: value.systolic ?? null,
 367 | 				diastolic: value.diastolic ?? null,
 368 | 				heartRate: value.heartRate ?? null,
 369 | 				respiratoryRate: value.respiratoryRate ?? null,
 370 | 				oxygenSaturation: value.oxygenSaturation ?? null,
 371 | 				ageDays: ageInfo.days ?? 0,
 372 | 				ageMonths: ageInfo.months ?? 0,
 373 | 				gender: patientData?.gender as Gender | null,
 374 | 				notes: value.notes ?? null,
 375 | 				patient: undefined,
 376 | 				clinic: undefined,
 377 | 				createdAt: new Date(),
 378 | 				updatedAt: new Date(),
 379 | 				clinicId: null,
 380 | 				growthRecords: [],
 381 | 				encounter: undefined,
 382 | 				medical: undefined
 383 | 			};
 384 | 
 385 | 			if (initialData?.id) {
 386 | 				updateVitalSigns({ ...payload, id: initialData.id });
 387 | 			} else {
 388 | 				createVitalSigns(payload);
 389 | 			}
 390 | 		}
 391 | 	});
 392 | 
 393 | 	const formValues = useSelector(form.store, s => s.values);
 394 | 
 395 | 	// Auto-calculate BMI when weight or height changes
 396 | 	React.useEffect(() => {
 397 | 		const bmi = calculateBMI(formValues.weight, formValues.height);
 398 | 		if (bmi !== formValues.bmi) {
 399 | 			form.setFieldValue("bmi", bmi);
 400 | 		}
 401 | 	}, [formValues.weight, formValues.height, formValues.bmi, form]);
 402 | 
 403 | 	// Update age when patient changes
 404 | 	React.useEffect(() => {
 405 | 		if (ageInfo.days !== undefined && ageInfo.months !== undefined) {
 406 | 			form.setFieldValue("ageDays", ageInfo.days);
 407 | 			form.setFieldValue("ageMonths", ageInfo.months);
 408 | 		}
 409 | 		if (patientData?.gender) {
 410 | 			form.setFieldValue("gender", patientData.gender as Gender);
 411 | 		}
 412 | 	}, [ageInfo.days, ageInfo.months, patientData?.gender, form]);
 413 | 
 414 | 	const { FormSelectField, FormTextField, FormTextareaField } = useFormFields<VitalSignsFormValues>();
 415 | 
 416 | 	return (
 417 | 		<Card className='mx-auto w-full max-w-4xl'>
 418 | 			<CardHeader>
 419 | 				<CardTitle className='flex items-center gap-2 font-bold text-2xl'>
 420 | 					<Activity className='h-6 w-6' />
 421 | 					{initialData?.id ? "Edit Vital Signs" : "Record Vital Signs"}
 422 | 				</CardTitle>
 423 | 				<p className='text-muted-foreground'>Record patient vital signs and growth measurements</p>
 424 | 			</CardHeader>
 425 | 			<CardContent>
 426 | 				<form.AppForm>
 427 | 					<form.Form className='space-y-6'>
 428 | 						{/* Patient Selection */}
 429 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 430 | 							<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 431 | 								<User className='h-5 w-5' />
 432 | 								Patient Information
 433 | 							</h3>
 434 | 							<Separator />
 435 | 							<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2'>
 436 | 								{propPatientId ? (
 437 | 									<FormTextField
 438 | 										disabled
 439 | 										label='Patient ID'
 440 | 										name='patientId'
 441 | 										type='text'
 442 | 									/>
 443 | 								) : (
 444 | 									<FormSelectField
 445 | 										label='Patient'
 446 | 										name='patientId'
 447 | 										options={
 448 | 											patientsData?.patients?.map(
 449 | 												(p: { id: string; firstName: string; lastName: string }) => {
 450 | 													return {
 451 | 														value: p.id,
 452 | 														label: `${p.firstName} ${p.lastName}`
 453 | 													};
 454 | 												}
 455 | 											) ?? []
 456 | 										}
 457 | 										placeholder={patientsLoading ? "Loading..." : "Select patient"}
 458 | 										required
 459 | 										validators={{
 460 | 											onBlur: z.string().min(1, "Please select a patient")
 461 | 										}}
 462 | 									/>
 463 | 								)}
 464 | 
 465 | 								{patientData && (
 466 | 									<>
 467 | 										<div className='rounded-lg bg-muted p-3'>
 468 | 											<div className='font-medium text-sm'>Patient Name</div>
 469 | 											<div>
 470 | 												{patientData.firstName} {patientData.lastName}
 471 | 											</div>
 472 | 										</div>
 473 | 										<div className='rounded-lg bg-muted p-3'>
 474 | 											<div className='font-medium text-sm'>Age</div>
 475 | 											<div>
 476 | 												{ageInfo.months !== undefined &&
 477 | 													(ageInfo.months < 24
 478 | 														? `${ageInfo.months} months (${ageInfo.days} days)`
 479 | 														: `${Math.floor(ageInfo.months / 12)} years ${ageInfo.months % 12} months`)}
 480 | 											</div>
 481 | 										</div>
 482 | 										<div className='rounded-lg bg-muted p-3'>
 483 | 											<div className='font-medium text-sm'>Gender</div>
 484 | 											<div>{patientData.gender ?? "Not specified"}</div>
 485 | 										</div>
 486 | 									</>
 487 | 								)}
 488 | 							</div>
 489 | 						</div>
 490 | 
 491 | 						{/* Recording Date & Time */}
 492 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 493 | 							<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 494 | 								<Clock className='h-5 w-5' />
 495 | 								Recording Date & Time
 496 | 							</h3>
 497 | 							<Separator />
 498 | 							<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4'>
 499 | 								<form.AppField name='recordedAt'>
 500 | 									{field => (
 501 | 										<div className='space-y-2'>
 502 | 											<Label>Date & Time Recorded *</Label>
 503 | 											<Popover>
 504 | 												<PopoverTrigger asChild>
 505 | 													<Button
 506 | 														className={cn(
 507 | 															"w-full justify-start text-left font-normal",
 508 | 															!field.state.value && "text-muted-foreground"
 509 | 														)}
 510 | 														disabled={readOnly}
 511 | 														variant='outline'
 512 | 													>
 513 | 														<CalendarIcon className='mr-2 h-4 w-4' />
 514 | 														{field.state.value ? (
 515 | 															format(field.state.value, "PPP p")
 516 | 														) : (
 517 | 															<span>Pick date and time</span>
 518 | 														)}
 519 | 													</Button>
 520 | 												</PopoverTrigger>
 521 | 												<PopoverContent
 522 | 													align='start'
 523 | 													className='w-auto p-0'
 524 | 												>
 525 | 													<Calendar
 526 | 														mode='single'
 527 | 														onSelect={date => {
 528 | 															if (date) {
 529 | 																const current = field.state.value || new Date();
 530 | 																date.setHours(current.getHours(), current.getMinutes());
 531 | 																field.handleChange(date);
 532 | 															}
 533 | 														}}
 534 | 														selected={field.state.value}
 535 | 													/>
 536 | 													<div className='border-t p-3'>
 537 | 														<Input
 538 | 															onChange={e => {
 539 | 																const [hours, minutes] = e.target.value
 540 | 																	.split(":")
 541 | 																	.map(Number);
 542 | 																const newDate = field.state.value || new Date();
 543 | 																newDate.setHours(hours ?? 0, minutes);
 544 | 																field.handleChange(newDate);
 545 | 															}}
 546 | 															type='time'
 547 | 															value={
 548 | 																field.state.value
 549 | 																	? format(field.state.value, "HH:mm")
 550 | 																	: ""
 551 | 															}
 552 | 														/>
 553 | 													</div>
 554 | 												</PopoverContent>
 555 | 											</Popover>
 556 | 										</div>
 557 | 									)}
 558 | 								</form.AppField>
 559 | 							</div>
 560 | 						</div>
 561 | 
 562 | 						{/* Vital Signs */}
 563 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 564 | 							<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 565 | 								<Heart className='h-5 w-5' />
 566 | 								Vital Signs
 567 | 							</h3>
 568 | 							<Separator />
 569 | 
 570 | 							{/* Summary cards for existing values */}
 571 | 							{readOnly && (
 572 | 								<div className='grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-6'>
 573 | 									<VitalSignDisplay
 574 | 										icon={Thermometer}
 575 | 										label='Temperature'
 576 | 										ranges={vitalRanges.bodyTemperature}
 577 | 										value={formValues.bodyTemperature}
 578 | 									/>
 579 | 									<VitalSignDisplay
 580 | 										icon={Droplets}
 581 | 										label='Systolic'
 582 | 										ranges={vitalRanges.systolic}
 583 | 										value={formValues.systolic}
 584 | 									/>
 585 | 									<VitalSignDisplay
 586 | 										icon={Droplets}
 587 | 										label='Diastolic'
 588 | 										ranges={vitalRanges.diastolic}
 589 | 										value={formValues.diastolic}
 590 | 									/>
 591 | 									<VitalSignDisplay
 592 | 										icon={Heart}
 593 | 										label='Heart Rate'
 594 | 										ranges={vitalRanges.heartRate}
 595 | 										value={formValues.heartRate}
 596 | 									/>
 597 | 									<VitalSignDisplay
 598 | 										icon={Wind}
 599 | 										label='Respiratory Rate'
 600 | 										ranges={vitalRanges.respiratoryRate}
 601 | 										value={formValues.respiratoryRate}
 602 | 									/>
 603 | 									<VitalSignDisplay
 604 | 										icon={Activity}
 605 | 										label='O₂ Saturation'
 606 | 										ranges={vitalRanges.oxygenSaturation}
 607 | 										value={formValues.oxygenSaturation}
 608 | 									/>
 609 | 								</div>
 610 | 							)}
 611 | 
 612 | 							<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3'>
 613 | 								<FormTextField
 614 | 									disabled={readOnly}
 615 | 									label='Body Temperature (°C)'
 616 | 									name='bodyTemperature'
 617 | 									placeholder='36.5'
 618 | 									step={0.1}
 619 | 									type='number'
 620 | 									validators={{
 621 | 										onBlur: z
 622 | 											.number()
 623 | 											.min(30, "Temperature too low")
 624 | 											.max(45, "Temperature too high")
 625 | 											.optional()
 626 | 									}}
 627 | 								/>
 628 | 
 629 | 								<div className='space-y-2'>
 630 | 									<Label>Blood Pressure</Label>
 631 | 									<div className='grid grid-cols-2 gap-2'>
 632 | 										<FormTextField
 633 | 											disabled={readOnly}
 634 | 											label='Systolic'
 635 | 											name='systolic'
 636 | 											placeholder='120'
 637 | 											type='number'
 638 | 										/>
 639 | 										<FormTextField
 640 | 											disabled={readOnly}
 641 | 											label=''
 642 | 											name='diastolic'
 643 | 											placeholder='80'
 644 | 											type='number'
 645 | 										/>
 646 | 									</div>
 647 | 								</div>
 648 | 
 649 | 								<FormTextField
 650 | 									disabled={readOnly}
 651 | 									label='Heart Rate (bpm)'
 652 | 									name='heartRate'
 653 | 									placeholder='72'
 654 | 									type='number'
 655 | 									validators={{
 656 | 										onBlur: z
 657 | 											.number()
 658 | 											.min(30, "Heart rate too low")
 659 | 											.max(250, "Heart rate too high")
 660 | 											.optional()
 661 | 									}}
 662 | 								/>
 663 | 
 664 | 								<FormTextField
 665 | 									disabled={readOnly}
 666 | 									label='Respiratory Rate (breaths/min)'
 667 | 									name='respiratoryRate'
 668 | 									placeholder='16'
 669 | 									type='number'
 670 | 									validators={{
 671 | 										onBlur: z
 672 | 											.number()
 673 | 											.min(5, "Respiratory rate too low")
 674 | 											.max(60, "Respiratory rate too high")
 675 | 											.optional()
 676 | 									}}
 677 | 								/>
 678 | 
 679 | 								<FormTextField
 680 | 									disabled={readOnly}
 681 | 									label='Oxygen Saturation (%)'
 682 | 									max={100}
 683 | 									min={0}
 684 | 									name='oxygenSaturation'
 685 | 									placeholder='98'
 686 | 									type='number'
 687 | 									validators={{
 688 | 										onBlur: z
 689 | 											.number()
 690 | 											.min(50, "Oxygen saturation too low")
 691 | 											.max(100, "Oxygen saturation too high")
 692 | 											.optional()
 693 | 									}}
 694 | 								/>
 695 | 							</div>
 696 | 
 697 | 							{/* Age-specific reference info */}
 698 | 							{ageInfo.months !== undefined && ageInfo.months < 18 && (
 699 | 								<div className='rounded-lg bg-blue-50 p-3 text-blue-700 text-sm'>
 700 | 									<strong>Pediatric Reference Ranges:</strong> Heart rate:{" "}
 701 | 									{pediatricRange.heartRate.min}-{pediatricRange.heartRate.max} bpm, Respiratory rate:{" "}
 702 | 									{pediatricRange.respiratoryRate.min}-{pediatricRange.respiratoryRate.max}{" "}
 703 | 									breaths/min
 704 | 								</div>
 705 | 							)}
 706 | 						</div>
 707 | 
 708 | 						{/* Growth Measurements (Pediatric) */}
 709 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 710 | 							<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 711 | 								<Ruler className='h-5 w-5' />
 712 | 								Growth Measurements
 713 | 							</h3>
 714 | 							<Separator />
 715 | 							<div className='grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3'>
 716 | 								<FormTextField
 717 | 									disabled={readOnly}
 718 | 									label='Weight (kg)'
 719 | 									name='weight'
 720 | 									placeholder='70.5'
 721 | 									step={0.1}
 722 | 									type='number'
 723 | 									validators={{
 724 | 										onBlur: z
 725 | 											.number()
 726 | 											.min(0.2, "Weight too low")
 727 | 											.max(200, "Weight too high")
 728 | 											.optional()
 729 | 									}}
 730 | 								/>
 731 | 
 732 | 								<FormTextField
 733 | 									disabled={readOnly}
 734 | 									label='Height / Length (cm)'
 735 | 									name='height'
 736 | 									placeholder='170'
 737 | 									step={0.1}
 738 | 									type='number'
 739 | 									validators={{
 740 | 										onBlur: z
 741 | 											.number()
 742 | 											.min(30, "Height too low")
 743 | 											.max(250, "Height too high")
 744 | 											.optional()
 745 | 									}}
 746 | 								/>
 747 | 
 748 | 								{ageInfo.months !== undefined && ageInfo.months < 36 && (
 749 | 									<FormTextField
 750 | 										disabled={readOnly}
 751 | 										label='Head Circumference (cm)'
 752 | 										name='headCircumference'
 753 | 										placeholder='45'
 754 | 										step={0.1}
 755 | 										type='number'
 756 | 										validators={{
 757 | 											onBlur: z
 758 | 												.number()
 759 | 												.min(20, "Head circumference too low")
 760 | 												.max(80, "Head circumference too high")
 761 | 												.optional()
 762 | 										}}
 763 | 									/>
 764 | 								)}
 765 | 
 766 | 								<FormTextField
 767 | 									disabled
 768 | 									label='BMI'
 769 | 									name='bmi'
 770 | 									placeholder='24.2'
 771 | 									step={0.1}
 772 | 									type='number'
 773 | 								/>
 774 | 
 775 | 								{formValues.bmi && (
 776 | 									<div className='col-span-full rounded-lg bg-muted p-3'>
 777 | 										<div className='font-medium text-sm'>BMI Classification</div>
 778 | 										<div>
 779 | 											{formValues.bmi < 18.5 && "Underweight"}
 780 | 											{formValues.bmi >= 18.5 && formValues.bmi < 25 && "Normal weight"}
 781 | 											{formValues.bmi >= 25 && formValues.bmi < 30 && "Overweight"}
 782 | 											{formValues.bmi >= 30 && "Obese"}
 783 | 										</div>
 784 | 									</div>
 785 | 								)}
 786 | 							</div>
 787 | 						</div>
 788 | 
 789 | 						{/* Notes */}
 790 | 						<div className='space-y-4'>
 791 | 							<h3 className='flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg'>
 792 | 								<Activity className='h-5 w-5' />
 793 | 								Additional Notes
 794 | 							</h3>
 795 | 							<Separator />
 796 | 							<FormTextareaField
 797 | 								disabled={readOnly}
 798 | 								label='Notes'
 799 | 								name='notes'
 800 | 								placeholder='Any additional observations or concerns...'
 801 | 								rows={3}
 802 | 							/>
 803 | 						</div>
 804 | 
 805 | 						{/* Actions */}
 806 | 						{!readOnly && (
 807 | 							<>
 808 | 								<Separator />
 809 | 								<div className='flex justify-end gap-4'>
 810 | 									{onCancel && (
 811 | 										<Button
 812 | 											disabled={isPending}
 813 | 											onClick={onCancel}
 814 | 											type='button'
 815 | 											variant='outline'
 816 | 										>
 817 | 											Cancel
 818 | 										</Button>
 819 | 									)}
 820 | 									<form.SubmitButton
 821 | 										className='min-w-30'
 822 | 										disabled={isPending}
 823 | 									>
 824 | 										{isPending
 825 | 											? "Saving..."
 826 | 											: initialData?.id
 827 | 												? "Update Vital Signs"
 828 | 												: "Save Vital Signs"}
 829 | 									</form.SubmitButton>
 830 | 								</div>
 831 | 							</>
 832 | 						)}
 833 | 					</form.Form>
 834 | 				</form.AppForm>
 835 | 			</CardContent>
 836 | 		</Card>
 837 | 	);
 838 | }
 839 | 
 840 | // Quick vital signs form for use within patient encounter
 841 | type QuickVitalSignsFormProps = {
 842 | 	encounterId?: string;
 843 | 	medicalId?: string;
 844 | 	onCancel?: () => void;
 845 | 	onSuccess?: () => void;
 846 | 	patientId: string;
 847 | };
 848 | 
 849 | export function QuickVitalSignsForm({
 850 | 	patientId,
 851 | 	encounterId,
 852 | 	medicalId,
 853 | 	onSuccess,
 854 | 	onCancel
 855 | }: QuickVitalSignsFormProps) {
 856 | 	return (
 857 | 		<VitalSignsForm
 858 | 			encounterId={encounterId}
 859 | 			medicalId={medicalId}
 860 | 			onCancel={onCancel}
 861 | 			onSuccess={onSuccess}
 862 | 			patientId={patientId}
 863 | 		/>
 864 | 	);
 865 | }
 866 | 
 867 | // Vital signs history / view-only component
 868 | type VitalSignsHistoryProps = {
 869 | 	onSelectRecord?: (recordId: string) => void;
 870 | 	patientId: string;
 871 | };
 872 | 
 873 | export function VitalSignsHistory({ patientId, onSelectRecord }: VitalSignsHistoryProps) {
 874 | 	const { data, isLoading } = useQuery(
 875 | 		orpc.vitalSigns.listByPatient.queryOptions({
 876 | 			input: { patientId, limit: 50 }
 877 | 		})
 878 | 	);
 879 | 
 880 | 	if (isLoading) {
 881 | 		return <div className='py-8 text-center'>Loading vital signs history...</div>;
 882 | 	}
 883 | 
 884 | 	if (!data?.vitalSigns?.length) {
 885 | 		return (
 886 | 			<div className='py-8 text-center text-muted-foreground'>No vital signs records found for this patient.</div>
 887 | 		);
 888 | 	}
 889 | 
 890 | 	return (
 891 | 		<div className='space-y-4'>
 892 | 			<h3 className='font-semibold text-lg'>Vital Signs History</h3>
 893 | 			<div className='space-y-3'>
 894 | 				{data.vitalSigns.map((record: VitalSignsType) => (
 895 | 					<button
 896 | 						className='w-full cursor-pointer text-left'
 897 | 						key={record.id}
 898 | 						onClick={() => onSelectRecord?.(record.id)}
 899 | 						type='button'
 900 | 					>
 901 | 						<Card className='transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50'>
 902 | 							<CardContent className='p-4'>
 903 | 								<div className='flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-2'>
 904 | 									<div className='font-medium'>{format(new Date(record.recordedAt), "PPP p")}</div>
 905 | 									<div className='flex flex-wrap gap-3 text-sm'>
 906 | 										{record.bodyTemperature && (
 907 | 											<Badge variant='outline'>🌡️ {record.bodyTemperature}°C</Badge>
 908 | 										)}
 909 | 										{record.heartRate && <Badge variant='outline'>❤️ {record.heartRate} bpm</Badge>}
 910 | 										{record.systolic && record.diastolic && (
 911 | 											<Badge variant='outline'>
 912 | 												💓 {record.systolic}/{record.diastolic}
 913 | 											</Badge>
 914 | 										)}
 915 | 									</div>
 916 | 								</div>
 917 | 							</CardContent>
 918 | 						</Card>
 919 | 					</button>
 920 | 				))}
 921 | 			</div>
 922 | 		</div>
 923 | 	);
 924 | }

```

```ts
 445 | // Helper function to get role display name
 446 | export const getRoleDisplay = (role: string): string => {
 447 | 	const roleMap: Record<string, string> = {
 448 | 		admin: "Admin",
 449 | 		doctor: "Doctor",
 450 | 		staff: "Staff",
 451 | 		patient: "Patient"
 452 | 	};
 453 | 	return roleMap[role] || role;
 454 | };
 455 | 
 456 | // Helper function to get role color
 457 | export const getRoleColor = (role: string): string => {
 458 | 	const colorMap: Record<string, string> = {
 459 | 		admin: "text-red-600 dark:text-red-400",
 460 | 		doctor: "text-blue-600 dark:text-blue-400",
 461 | 		staff: "text-green-600 dark:text-green-400",
 462 | 		patient: "text-yellow-600 dark:text-yellow-400"
 463 | 	};
 464 | 	return colorMap[role] || "text-gray-600";
 465 | };
```

`db-collections/client.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // lib/db-client.ts
   2 | 
   3 | import type { DoctorListQuery, PatientListQuery } from "@clinic/db/zod/clinic.schema";
   4 | import { useMutation, useQuery, useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   5 | 
   6 | import * as appointmentFns from "@/functions/appointment";
   7 | import * as doctorFns from "@/functions/doctor";
   8 | import * as medicalFns from "@/functions/medical";
   9 | import * as patientFns from "@/functions/patient";
  10 | import * as pharmacyFns from "@/functions/pharmacy";
  11 | import * as analyticsQs from "@/functions/queries/analytic";
  12 | // Import your server functions
  13 | import * as appointmentQs from "@/functions/queries/appointment";
  14 | import * as doctorQs from "@/functions/queries/doctor";
  15 | import * as medicalQs from "@/functions/queries/medical";
  16 | import * as patientQs from "@/functions/queries/patient";
  17 | import * as pharmacyQs from "@/functions/queries/pharmacy";
  18 | import * as systemQs from "@/functions/queries/system";
  19 | import * as systemFns from "@/functions/system";
  20 | 
  21 | import { appointmentKeys } from "../functions/queries/appointment";
  22 | import { patientKeys } from "../functions/queries/patient";
  23 | // ... other imports
  24 | 
  25 | // Create a unified React DB client that wraps your server functions
  26 | export const createDbClient = () => {
  27 | 	const queryClient = useQueryClient();
  28 | 
  29 | 	return {
  30 | 		// Appointments
  31 | 		appointment: {
  32 | 			getAll: (clinicId: string) => useQuery(appointmentQs.getAllAppointmentsOptions(clinicId)),
  33 | 
  34 | 			getById: (id: string, clinicId: string) => useQuery(appointmentQs.getAppointmentByIdOptions(id, clinicId)),
  35 | 
  36 | 			create: () =>
  37 | 				useMutation({
  38 | 					mutationFn: appointmentFns.createAppointment,
  39 | 					onSuccess: () => {
  40 | 						queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: appointmentKeys.all });
  41 | 					}
  42 | 				}),
  43 | 
  44 | 			update: () =>
  45 | 				useMutation({
  46 | 					mutationFn: appointmentFns.updateAppointment,
  47 | 					onSuccess: () => {
  48 | 						queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: appointmentKeys.all });
  49 | 					}
  50 | 				}),
  51 | 
  52 | 			cancel: () =>
  53 | 				useMutation({
  54 | 					mutationFn: appointmentFns.cancelAppointment
  55 | 				})
  56 | 		},
  57 | 
  58 | 		// Patients
  59 | 		patient: {
  60 | 			getAll: (clinicId: string, filters?: Partial<PatientListQuery>) =>
  61 | 				useQuery(patientQs.listPatientsOptions({ clinicId, ...filters })),
  62 | 
  63 | 			getById: (id: string, clinicId: string) => useQuery(patientQs.getPatientByIdOptions(id, clinicId)),
  64 | 
  65 | 			getWithHistory: (id: string, clinicId: string) =>
  66 | 				useQuery(patientQs.getPatientWithFullHistoryOptions(id, clinicId)),
  67 | 
  68 | 			create: () =>
  69 | 				useMutation({
  70 | 					mutationFn: patientFns.createPatient,
  71 | 					onSuccess: () => {
  72 | 						queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: patientKeys.all });
  73 | 					}
  74 | 				}),
  75 | 
  76 | 			update: () =>
  77 | 				useMutation({
  78 | 					mutationFn: patientFns.updatePatient
  79 | 				}),
  80 | 
  81 | 			softDelete: () =>
  82 | 				useMutation({
  83 | 					mutationFn: patientFns.softDeletePatient
  84 | 				})
  85 | 		},
  86 | 
  87 | 		// Doctors
  88 | 		doctor: {
  89 | 			getAll: (clinicId: string, filters?: Partial<DoctorListQuery>) =>
  90 | 				useQuery(doctorQs.listDoctorsOptions({ clinicId, ...filters })),
  91 | 
  92 | 			getById: (id: string, clinicId?: string) => useQuery(doctorQs.getDoctorByIdOptions(id, clinicId)),
  93 | 
  94 | 			getWorkingDays: (doctorId: string) => useQuery(doctorQs.getWorkingDaysOptions(doctorId)),
  95 | 
  96 | 			create: () =>
  97 | 				useMutation({
  98 | 					mutationFn: doctorFns.createDoctor
  99 | 				}),
 100 | 
 101 | 			update: () =>
 102 | 				useMutation({
 103 | 					mutationFn: doctorFns.updateDoctor
 104 | 				})
 105 | 		},
 106 | 
 107 | 		// Medical Records
 108 | 		medicalRecord: {
 109 | 			getByPatient: (patientId: string, clinicId: string) =>
 110 | 				useQuery(medicalQs.getPatientMedicalRecordsOptions(patientId, clinicId)),
 111 | 
 112 | 			create: () =>
 113 | 				useMutation({
 114 | 					mutationFn: medicalFns.createMedicalRecord
 115 | 				}),
 116 | 
 117 | 			createComplete: () =>
 118 | 				useMutation({
 119 | 					mutationFn: medicalFns.createCompleteEncounter
 120 | 				})
 121 | 		},
 122 | 
 123 | 		// Pharmacy
 124 | 		pharmacy: {
 125 | 			getPrescriptions: (patientId: string, clinicId?: string) =>
 126 | 				useQuery(pharmacyQs.getPatientActivePrescriptionsOptions(patientId, clinicId)),
 127 | 
 128 | 			getDrugs: (filters?: { search?: string; category?: string; limit?: number; offset?: number }) =>
 129 | 				useQuery(pharmacyQs.listDrugsOptions(filters || {})),
 130 | 
 131 | 			dispenseMedication: () =>
 132 | 				useMutation({
 133 | 					mutationFn: pharmacyFns.dispenseMedication
 134 | 				})
 135 | 		},
 136 | 
 137 | 		// Analytics
 138 | 		analytics: {
 139 | 			getNewPatients: (clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) =>
 140 | 				useQuery(analyticsQs.getNewPatientsCountOptions(clinicId, startDate, endDate)),
 141 | 
 142 | 			getDemographics: (clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) =>
 143 | 				useQuery(analyticsQs.getPatientDemographicsOptions(clinicId, startDate, endDate)),
 144 | 
 145 | 			getTopConditions: (clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date, limit?: number) =>
 146 | 				useQuery(analyticsQs.getTopConditionsOptions(clinicId, startDate, endDate, limit))
 147 | 		},
 148 | 
 149 | 		// System
 150 | 		system: {
 151 | 			getNotifications: (userId: string, clinicId?: string) =>
 152 | 				useQuery(systemQs.getUserNotificationsOptions(userId, clinicId)),
 153 | 
 154 | 			markNotificationRead: () =>
 155 | 				useMutation({
 156 | 					mutationFn: systemFns.markNotificationsAsRead
 157 | 				}),
 158 | 
 159 | 			getConfig: (key: string) => useQuery(systemQs.getConfigOptions(key))
 160 | 		}
 161 | 	};
 162 | };

```

`directus/client.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { createDirectus, readItems, rest, staticToken } from "@directus/sdk";
   2 | 
   3 | const directusUrl = import.meta.env.VITE_DIRECTUS_URL || "http://localhost:8055";
   4 | const directusToken = import.meta.env.DIRECTUS_STATIC_TOKEN;
   5 | 
   6 | const client = createDirectus(directusUrl).with(rest());
   7 | 
   8 | export const directus = directusToken ? client.with(staticToken(directusToken)) : client;
   9 | 
  10 | export async function getDirectusItems(collection: string) {
  11 | 	return directus.request(readItems(collection));
  12 | }

```

`functions/admin.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { db } from "@clinic/db";
   2 | import * as schema from "@clinic/db/schema";
   3 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   4 | import { and, eq, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   5 | import z from "zod";
   6 | 
   7 | // Schema definitions
   8 | const clinicIdSchema = z.object({ clinicId: z.uuid() });
   9 | const appointmentIdsSchema = z.object({
  10 | 	appointmentIds: z.array(z.string()),
  11 | 	status: z.enum(["PENDING", "CONFIRMED", "CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"]),
  12 | 	reason: z.string().optional()
  13 | });
  14 | const cancelAppointmentSchema = z.object({
  15 | 	appointmentId: z.string(),
  16 | 	clinicId: z.string(),
  17 | 	reason: z.string().optional()
  18 | });
  19 | 
  20 | const rescheduleSchema = z.object({
  21 | 	id: z.string(),
  22 | 	newDate: z.date(),
  23 | 	clinicId: z.string()
  24 | });
  25 | // const configKeySchema = z.object({ key: z.string() });
  26 | const configValueSchema = z.object({ key: z.string(), value: z.string() });
  27 | // const clinicByNameSchema = z.object({ name: z.string() });
  28 | 
  29 | // Placeholder for the actual Drizzle schema for appointment insertion
  30 | // This would typically be imported from a central schema definition file.
  31 | const AppointmentInsertSchema = z.object({
  32 | 	id: z.uuid().optional(), // Assuming ID is generated or optional on insert
  33 | 	clinicId: z.uuid(),
  34 | 	patientId: z.uuid(),
  35 | 	doctorId: z.uuid(),
  36 | 	serviceId: z.uuid().optional(),
  37 | 	appointmentDate: z.date(),
  38 | 	time: z.string(),
  39 | 	durationMinutes: z.number().int().positive().optional(),
  40 | 	status: z.enum(["PENDING", "CONFIRMED", "CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"]).optional(),
  41 | 	reason: z.string().optional(),
  42 | 	note: z.string().optional(),
  43 | 	appointmentPrice: z.number().optional(),
  44 | 	type: z.string().optional(),
  45 | 	isDeleted: z.boolean().optional(),
  46 | 	createdAt: z.date().optional(),
  47 | 	updatedAt: z.date().optional(),
  48 | 	deletedAt: z.date().optional()
  49 | });

 160 | const bulkUpdateAppointmentsStatus = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 161 | 	.validator(appointmentIdsSchema)
 162 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 163 | 		try {
 164 | 			const { appointmentIds, status, reason } = ctx.data;
 165 | 			return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 166 | 				const updatedAppointments = await tx
 167 | 					.update(schema.appointment)
 168 | 					.set({
 169 | 						status,
 170 | 						reason,
 171 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 172 | 					})
 173 | 					.where(sql`${schema.appointment.id} IN (${appointmentIds.map(id => sql`${id}`).join(", ")})`)
 174 | 					.returning();
 175 | 				return updatedAppointments;
 176 | 			});
 177 | 		} catch (error) {
 178 | 			console.error("Error bulk updating appointments:", error);
 179 | 			throw new Error("Failed to bulk update appointments");
 180 | 		}
 181 | 	});

 183 | const cancelExistingAppointment = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 184 | 	.validator(cancelAppointmentSchema)
 185 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 186 | 		try {
 187 | 			const { appointmentId, clinicId, reason } = ctx.data;
 188 | 			return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 189 | 				const [updatedAppointment] = await tx
 190 | 					.update(schema.appointment)
 191 | 					.set({
 192 | 						status: "CANCELLED",
 193 | 						reason,
 194 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 195 | 					})
 196 | 					.where(and(eq(schema.appointment.id, appointmentId), eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId)))
 197 | 					.returning();
 198 | 				if (!updatedAppointment) {
 199 | 					throw new Error("Appointment not found or already cancelled");
 200 | 				}
 201 | 				return updatedAppointment;
 202 | 			});
 203 | 		} catch (error) {
 204 | 			console.error("Error cancelling appointment:", error);
 205 | 			throw new Error("Failed to cancel appointment");
 206 | 		}
 207 | 	});
 208 | 
 209 | // The original error was: Type '"PUT"' is not assignable to type 'Method | undefined'.
 210 | // Assuming 'Method' type from '@tanstack/react-start' only includes 'GET' and 'POST'
 211 | // or similar limited set. Changing to 'POST' to resolve the type error.
 212 | // Semantically, updates can often be handled by POST if PUT is not explicitly supported
 213 | // by the framework's server function abstraction.
 214 | // Also, `updateAppointmentSchema` was undefined, so it's defined above.
 215 | const updateExistingAppointment = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 216 | 	.validator(updateAppointmentSchema)
 217 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 218 | 		try {
 219 | 			const { id, clinicId, data } = ctx.data;
 220 | 			return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 221 | 				const [updatedAppointment] = await tx
 222 | 					.update(schema.appointment)
 223 | 					.set({
 224 | 						...data,
 225 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 226 | 					})
 227 | 					.where(and(eq(schema.appointment.id, id), eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId)))
 228 | 					.returning();
 229 | 				if (!updatedAppointment) {
 230 | 					throw new Error("Appointment not found or update failed");
 231 | 				}
 232 | 				return updatedAppointment;
 233 | 			});
 234 | 		} catch (error) {
 235 | 			console.error("Error updating appointment:", error);
 236 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update appointment");
 237 | 		}
 238 | 	});
 239 | 
 240 | const rescheduleExistingAppointment = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 241 | 	.validator(rescheduleSchema)
 242 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 243 | 		try {
 244 | 			const { id, newDate, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 245 | 			return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 246 | 				const [updatedAppointment] = await tx
 247 | 					.update(schema.appointment)
 248 | 					.set({
 249 | 						appointmentDate: newDate,
 250 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 251 | 					})
 252 | 					.where(and(eq(schema.appointment.id, id), eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId)))
 253 | 					.returning();
 254 | 				if (!updatedAppointment) {
 255 | 					throw new Error("Appointment not found or reschedule failed");
 256 | 				}
 257 | 				return updatedAppointment;
 258 | 			});
 259 | 		} catch (error) {
 260 | 			console.error("Error rescheduling appointment:", error);
 261 | 			throw new Error("Failed to reschedule appointment");
 262 | 		}
 263 | 	});

 497 | 
 498 | // `updateUserSchema` was undefined, defining it here.
 499 | // It's used in `updateUserToAdmin` which takes `userId`, `clinicId`, and `name`.
 500 | const updateUserSchema = z.object({
 501 | 	userId: z.uuid(),
 502 | 	clinicId: z.uuid(),
 503 | 	name: z.string().optional()
 504 | });
 505 | const updateUserToAdmin = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 506 | 	.validator(updateUserSchema)
 507 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 508 | 		try {
 509 | 			const { userId, clinicId, name } = ctx.data;
 510 | 			const [result] = await db
 511 | 				.update(schema.user)
 512 | 				.set({
 513 | 					role: "admin",
 514 | 					emailVerified: true,
 515 | 					clinicId,
 516 | 					...(name && { name }),
 517 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 518 | 				})
 519 | 				.where(eq(schema.user.id, userId))
 520 | 				.returning();
 521 | 			return result;
 522 | 		} catch (error) {
 523 | 			console.error("Error updating user to admin:", error);
 524 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update user to admin");
 525 | 		}
 526 | 	});
```

`functions/ai-service.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // apps/web/app/services/ai.service.ts
   2 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   3 | 
   4 | interface ChatMessage {
   5 | 	message: string;
   6 | 	patientAgeMonths?: number;
   7 | 	patientGender?: string;
   8 | }
   9 | 
  10 | export const sendToPediatricAI = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
  11 | 	.validator((data: ChatMessage) => data)
  12 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
  13 | 		const response = await fetch("http://localhost:8000/api/chat", {
  14 | 			method: "POST",
  15 | 			headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
  16 | 			body: JSON.stringify({
  17 | 				message: data.message,
  18 | 				patient_age_months: data.patientAgeMonths,
  19 | 				patient_gender: data.patientGender
  20 | 			})
  21 | 		});
  22 | 
  23 | 		if (!response.ok) {
  24 | 			throw new Error("AI service unavailable");
  25 | 		}
  26 | 
  27 | 		return response.json();
  28 | 	});
  29 | 
  30 | export const analyzeGrowth = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
  31 | 	.validator(
  32 | 		(data: {
  33 | 			ageMonths: number;
  34 | 			gender: string;
  35 | 			weightKg: number;
  36 | 			heightCm: number;
  37 | 			headCircumferenceCm?: number;
  38 | 		}) => data
  39 | 	)
  40 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
  41 | 		const response = await fetch("http://localhost:8000/api/analyze-growth", {
  42 | 			method: "POST",
  43 | 			headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
  44 | 			body: JSON.stringify({
  45 | 				age_months: data.ageMonths,
  46 | 				gender: data.gender,
  47 | 				weight_kg: data.weightKg,
  48 | 				height_cm: data.heightCm,
  49 | 				head_circumference_cm: data.headCircumferenceCm
  50 | 			})
  51 | 		});
  52 | 		return response.json();
  53 | 	});

```

`functions/analytics.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/repo/analytics-repo.ts
   2 | 
   3 | import { db } from "@clinic/db";
   4 | import * as schema from "@clinic/db/schema";
   5 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   6 | import { and, eq, gte, lte } from "drizzle-orm";
   7 | import z from "zod";
   8 | 
   9 | const clinicDateRangeSchema = z.object({
  10 | 	clinicId: z.string().min(1),
  11 | 	startDate: z.date(),
  12 | 	endDate: z.date()
  13 | });
  14 | 
  15 | const clinicYearSchema = z.object({
  16 | 	clinicId: z.string().min(1),
  17 | 	year: z.number().int().min(2000).max(2100)
  18 | });
  19 | 
  20 | const clinicDateRangeLimitSchema = z.object({
  21 | 	clinicId: z.string().min(1),
  22 | 	startDate: z.date(),
  23 | 	endDate: z.date(),
  24 | 	limit: z.number().int().positive().default(10)
  25 | });
  26 |

 164 | 					lte(schema.patient.createdAt, endDate)

 204 | const getPatientDemographics = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 205 | 	.validator(clinicDateRangeSchema)
 206 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 207 | 		try {
 208 | 			const { clinicId, startDate, endDate } = ctx.data;
 209 | 
 210 | 			const patients = await db.query.patient.findMany({
 211 | 				where: {
 212 | 					clinicId,
 213 | 					isDeleted: false,
 214 | 					createdAt: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate }
 215 | 				},
 216 | 				columns: {
 217 | 					id: true,
 218 | 					gender: true,
 219 | 					dateOfBirth: true,
 220 | 					createdAt: true,
 221 | 					bloodGroup: true,
 222 | 					maritalStatus: true
 223 | 				}
 224 | 			});
 225 | 
 226 | 			// Calculate demographic statistics
 227 | 			const genderStats = patients.reduce(
 228 | 				(acc, p) => {
 229 | 					const gender = p.gender || "UNKNOWN";
 230 | 					acc[gender] = (acc[gender] || 0) + 1;
 231 | 					return acc;
 232 | 				},
 233 | 				{} as Record<string, number>
 234 | 			);
 235 | 
 236 | 			const ageGroups = patients.reduce(
 237 | 				(acc, p) => {
 238 | 					const age = calculateAge(p.dateOfBirth);
 239 | 					let group = "";
 240 | 					if (age < 1) group = "Infant (<1 year)";
 241 | 					else if (age < 5) group = "Toddler (1-4 years)";
 242 | 					else if (age < 12) group = "Child (5-11 years)";
 243 | 					else if (age < 18) group = "Adolescent (12-17 years)";
 244 | 					else group = "Adult (18+ years)";
 245 | 					acc[group] = (acc[group] || 0) + 1;
 246 | 					return acc;
 247 | 				},
 248 | 				{} as Record<string, number>
 249 | 			);
 250 | 
 251 | 			return {
 252 | 				totalPatients: patients.length,
 253 | 				genderDistribution: genderStats,
 254 | 				ageGroupDistribution: ageGroups,
 255 | 				patients
 256 | 			};
 257 | 		} catch (error) {
 258 | 			console.error("Error getting patient demographics:", error);
 259 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get patient demographics");
 260 | 		}
 261 | 	});
 262 | 
 263 | // Helper function to calculate age in years
 264 | function calculateAge(dateOfBirth: Date): number {
 265 | 	const today = new Date();
 266 | 	let age = today.getFullYear() - dateOfBirth.getFullYear();
 267 | 	const monthDiff = today.getMonth() - dateOfBirth.getMonth();
 268 | 	if (monthDiff < 0 || (monthDiff === 0 && today.getDate() < dateOfBirth.getDate())) {
 269 | 		age--;
 270 | 	}
 271 | 	return age;
 272 | }

 357 | // const getPrescriptionsForAnalytics = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 358 | // 	.validator(clinicDateRangeSchema)
 359 | // 	.handler(async ctx => {
 360 | // 		try {
 361 | // 			const { clinicId, startDate, endDate } = ctx.data;

 363 | // 			const prescriptions = await db.query.prescription.findMany({
 364 | // 				where: {
 365 | // 					clinicId,

 367 | // 				},

 369 | // 					prescribedItems: {
 370 | // 						with: {
 371 | // 							drug: true
 372 | // 						}
 373 | // 					},
 374 | // 					doctor: true
 375 | // 				},
 376 | // 				orderBy: (prescriptions, { desc }) => [desc(prescriptions.issuedDate)]
 377 | // 			});

 379 | // 			// Calculate prescription statistics
 380 | // 			const medicationFrequency = prescriptions
 381 | // 				.flatMap(p => p.prescribedItems)
 382 | // 				.reduce(
 383 | // 					(acc, item) => {
 384 | // 						const drugName = item.drug?.name || "Unknown";
 385 | // 						acc[drugName] = (acc[drugName] || 0) + 1;
 386 | // 						return acc;
 387 | // 					},
 388 | // 					{} as Record<string, number>
 389 | // 				);
 390 | 
 391 | // 			const topMedications = Object.entries(medicationFrequency)
 392 | // 				.map(([medication, count]) => ({ medication, count }))
 393 | // 				.sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count)
 394 | // 				.slice(0, 10);
 395 |

 397 | // 				prescriptions,
 398 | // 				statistics: {
 399 | // 					totalPrescriptions: prescriptions.length,
 400 | // 					topMedications,
```
