```ts
 411 | const getTopConditions = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 412 | 	.validator(clinicDateRangeLimitSchema)
 413 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 414 | 		try {
 415 | 			const { clinicId, startDate, endDate, limit } = ctx.data;
 416 | 
 417 | 			const diagnoses = await db.query.diagnosis.findMany({
 418 | 				where: {
 419 | 					clinicId,
 420 | 					date: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate },
 421 | 					isDeleted: false
 422 | 				},
 423 | 				columns: {
 424 | 					diagnosis: true
 425 | 				}
 426 | 			});
 427 | 
 428 | 			// Count occurrences of each diagnosis
 429 | 			const conditionCounts = new Map<string, number>();
 430 | 			for (const d of diagnoses) {
 431 | 				if (d.diagnosis) {
 432 | 					// Split multiple diagnoses if needed
 433 | 					const conditions = d.diagnosis.split(",").map(c => c.trim());
 434 | 					for (const condition of conditions) {
 435 | 						const count = conditionCounts.get(condition) || 0;
 436 | 						conditionCounts.set(condition, count + 1);
 437 | 					}
 438 | 				}
 439 | 			}
 440 | 
 441 | 			const totalPatientsResult = await db.$count(
 442 | 				schema.patient,
 443 | 				and(
 444 | 					eq(schema.patient.clinicId, clinicId),
 445 | 					eq(schema.patient.isDeleted, false),
 446 | 					gte(schema.patient.createdAt, startDate),
 447 | 					lte(schema.patient.createdAt, endDate)
 448 | 				)
 449 | 			);
 450 | 
 451 | 			const totalPatients = totalPatientsResult;
 452 | 
 453 | 			const topConditions = Array.from(conditionCounts.entries())
 454 | 				.map(([condition, count]) => ({
 455 | 					condition,
 456 | 					prevalence: totalPatients > 0 ? (count / totalPatients) * 100 : 0,
 457 | 					affectedPatients: count
 458 | 				}))
 459 | 				.sort((a, b) => b.prevalence - a.prevalence)
 460 | 				.slice(0, limit);
 461 | 
 462 | 			return topConditions;
 463 | 		} catch (error) {
 464 | 			console.error("Error getting top conditions:", error);
 465 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get top conditions");
 466 | 		}
 467 | 	});
 468 | 
 469 | const getSeasonalAppointmentData = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 470 | 	.validator(clinicYearSchema)
 471 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 472 | 		try {
 473 | 			const { clinicId, year } = ctx.data;
 474 | 
 475 | 			const seasons = [
 476 | 				{ name: "Winter", months: [12, 1, 2] },
 477 | 				{ name: "Spring", months: [3, 4, 5] },
 478 | 				{ name: "Summer", months: [6, 7, 8] },
 479 | 				{ name: "Fall", months: [9, 10, 11] }
 480 | 			];
 481 | 
 482 | 			const seasonData = [];
 483 | 			for (const season of seasons) {
 484 | 				const startMonth = season.months[0];
 485 | 				const endMonth = season.months[season.months.length - 1];
 486 | 
 487 | 				let startDate: Date;
 488 | 				let endDate: Date;
 489 | 
 490 | 				if (startMonth && endMonth) {
 491 | 					// Handle year wrap for Winter
 492 | 					if (season.name === "Winter" && startMonth === 12) {
 493 | 						startDate = new Date(year - 1, startMonth - 1, 1);
 494 | 						endDate = new Date(year, endMonth - 1, 31);
 495 | 					} else {
 496 | 						startDate = new Date(year, startMonth - 1, 1);
 497 | 						endDate = new Date(year, endMonth - 1, 31);
 498 | 					}
 499 | 
 500 | 					const appointments = await db.query.appointment.findMany({
 501 | 						where: {
 502 | 							clinicId,
 503 | 							isDeleted: false,
 504 | 							appointmentDate: {
 505 | 								gte: startDate,
 506 | 								lte: endDate
 507 | 							}
 508 | 						},
 509 | 						with: {
 510 | 							medicalRecords: {
 511 | 								with: {
 512 | 									vitalSigns: true,
 513 | 									diagnosis: true
 514 | 								}
 515 | 							}
 516 | 						}
 517 | 					});
 518 | 
 519 | 					// Aggregate conditions from medical records
 520 | 					const conditions: Record<string, number> = {};
 521 | 					for (const apt of appointments) {
 522 | 						if (apt.medicalRecords[0].diagnosis) {
 523 | 							const diagList = apt.medicalRecords[0].diagnosis.split(",").map(d => d.trim());
 524 | 							for (const diag of diagList) {
 525 | 								conditions[diag] = (conditions[diag] || 0) + 1;
 526 | 							}
 527 | 						}
 528 | 					}
 529 | 
 530 | 					seasonData.push({
 531 | 						season: season.name,
 532 | 						totalAppointments: appointments.length,
 533 | 						conditions,
 534 | 						topConditions: Object.entries(conditions)
 535 | 							.sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])
 536 | 							.slice(0, 5)
 537 | 							.map(([condition, count]) => ({ condition, count }))
 538 | 					});
 539 | 				}
 540 | 			}
 541 | 
 542 | 			return seasonData;
 543 | 		} catch (error) {
 544 | 			console.error("Error getting seasonal appointment data:", error);
 545 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get seasonal appointment data");
 546 | 		}
 547 | 	});

 567 | // 				}

 586 | // 					if (apt.status === "CANCELLED") stats.cancelledAppointments++;
 587 | // 					if (apt.appointmentPrice) stats.totalRevenue += apt.appointmentPrice;
 588 | 
 589 | // 					return acc;

 610 | const getImmunizationCoverage = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 611 | 	.validator(clinicIdSchema)
 612 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 613 | 		try {
 614 | 			const { clinicId } = ctx.data;
 615 | 
 616 | 			const patients = await db.query.patient.findMany({
 617 | 				where: {
 618 | 					clinicId,
 619 | 					isDeleted: false
 620 | 				},
 621 | 				columns: {
 622 | 					id: true,
 623 | 					dateOfBirth: true
 624 | 				}
 625 | 			});
 626 | 
 627 | 			const immunizations = await db.query.immunization.findMany({
 628 | 				where: {
 629 | 					clinicId,
 630 | 					isDeleted: false
 631 | 				},
 632 | 				columns: {
 633 | 					patientId: true,
 634 | 					vaccine: true
 635 | 				}
 636 | 			});
 637 | 
 638 | 			// Calculate coverage by vaccine
 639 | 			const vaccineCoverage: Record<string, { total: number; completed: number; percentage: number }> = {};
 640 | 
 641 | 			const vaccineList = [...new Set(immunizations.map(imm => imm.vaccine))];
 642 | 			for (const vaccine of vaccineList) {
 643 | 				const patientsVaccinated = new Set(
 644 | 					immunizations.filter(imm => imm.vaccine === vaccine).map(imm => imm.patientId)
 645 | 				);
 646 | 				const coverage = (patientsVaccinated.size / patients.length) * 100;
 647 | 				vaccineCoverage[vaccine] = {
 648 | 					total: patients.length,
 649 | 					completed: patientsVaccinated.size,
 650 | 					percentage: coverage
 651 | 				};
 652 | 			}
 653 | 
 654 | 			return {
 655 | 				totalPatients: patients.length,
 656 | 				vaccineCoverage,
 657 | 				fullyImmunized: patients.filter(p => {
 658 | 					const patientImmunizations = immunizations.filter(imm => imm.patientId === p.id);
 659 | 					return patientImmunizations.length >= 10; // Assuming 10+ vaccines for full immunization
 660 | 				}).length
 661 | 			};
 662 | 		} catch (error) {
 663 | 			console.error("Error getting immunization coverage:", error);
 664 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get immunization coverage");
 665 | 		}
 666 | 	});
 667 | 
 668 | export {
 669 | 	// getAppointmentCountsByStatus,
 670 | 	// getAppointmentsInRange,
 671 | 	// getClinicRevenue,
 672 | 	// getDoctorPerformance,
 673 | 	getImmunizationCoverage,
 674 | 	// getMonthlyAppointmentData,
 675 | 	getNewPatientsCount,
 676 | 	// getOverdueImmunizations,
 677 | 	getPatientDemographics,
 678 | 	// getPatientsInDateRange,
 679 | 	// getPrescriptionsForAnalytics,
 680 | 	getSeasonalAppointmentData,
 681 | 	getTopConditions
 682 | };

```

```ts
 198 | const getAppointmentById = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 199 | 	.validator(appointmentIdSchema)
 200 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 201 | 		try {
 202 | 			const { id, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 203 | 			return await db.query.appointment.findFirst({
 204 | 				where: { id, clinicId, isDeleted: false },
 205 | 				with: {
 206 | 					patient: true,
 207 | 					doctor: true,
 208 | 					service: true,
 209 | 					clinic: true
 210 | 				}
 211 | 			});
 212 | 		} catch (error) {
 213 | 			console.error("Error getting appointment by ID:", error);
 214 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get appointment");
 215 | 		}
 216 | 	});
 217 | 
 218 | const createAppointment = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 219 | 	.validator(createAppointmentSchema)
 220 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 221 | 		try {
 222 | 			const { data } = ctx.data;
 223 | 			const [result] = await db
 224 | 				.insert(schema.appointment)
 225 | 				.values({
 226 | 					...data,
 227 | 					id: data.id || crypto.randomUUID(),
 228 | 					createdAt: new Date(),
 229 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 230 | 				})
 231 | 				.returning();
 232 | 			return result;
 233 | 		} catch (error) {
 234 | 			console.error("Error creating appointment:", error);
 235 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create appointment");
 236 | 		}
 237 | 	});
 238 | 
 239 | const updateAppointment = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 240 | 	.validator(updateAppointmentSchema)
 241 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 242 | 		try {
 243 | 			const { id, ...data } = ctx.data;
 244 | 			const [result] = await db
 245 | 				.update(schema.appointment)
 246 | 				.set({ ...data, updatedAt: new Date() })
 247 | 				.where(eq(schema.appointment.id, id ?? ""))
 248 | 				.returning();
 249 | 			return result;
 250 | 		} catch (error) {
 251 | 			console.error("Error updating appointment:", error);
 252 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update appointment");
 253 | 		}
 254 | 	});

 289 | const getAppointmentsInRange = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 290 | 	.validator(dateRangeSchema)
 291 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 292 | 		try {
 293 | 			const { clinicId, startDate, endDate, doctorId } = ctx.data;
 294 | 			const conditions: Record<string, unknown> = {
 295 | 				clinicId,
 296 | 				isDeleted: false,
 297 | 				appointmentDate: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate }
 298 | 			};
 299 | 			if (doctorId) conditions.doctorId = doctorId;
 300 | 
 301 | 			return await db.query.appointment.findMany({
 302 | 				where: conditions,
 303 | 				with: {
 304 | 					patient: { with: { user: true } },
 305 | 					doctor: true
 306 | 				},
 307 | 				orderBy: { appointmentDate: "asc" }
 308 | 			});
 309 | 		} catch (error) {
 310 | 			console.error("Error getting appointments in range:", error);
 311 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get appointments in range");
 312 | 		}
 313 | 	});

 322 | 				with: { patient: true, doctor: true },

 324 | 			});

 334 | 		try {
 335 | 			const { clinicId, startDate, endDate, doctorId } = ctx.data;

 339 | 					isDeleted: false,

 352 | const getAppointmentCountsByStatus = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 353 | 	.validator(z.object({ clinicId: z.string() }))
 354 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 355 | 		try {
 356 | 			const { clinicId } = ctx.data;
 357 | 			const results = await db
 358 | 				.select({
 359 | 					status: schema.appointment.status,
 360 | 					count: count()
 361 | 				})
 362 | 				.from(schema.appointment)
 363 | 				.where(and(eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false)))
 364 | 				.groupBy(schema.appointment.status);
 365 | 
 366 | 			return results.reduce(
 367 | 				(acc, curr) => {
 368 | 					if (curr.status) acc[curr.status] = Number(curr.count);
 369 | 					return acc;
 370 | 				},
 371 | 				{} as Record<string, number>
 372 | 			);
 373 | 		} catch (error) {
 374 | 			console.error("Error getting appointment counts:", error);
 375 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get appointment counts");
 376 | 		}
 377 | 	});

 497 | const getMonthlyAppointmentData = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 498 | 	.validator(monthlyDataSchema)
 499 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 500 | 		try {
 501 | 			const { clinicId, year } = ctx.data;
 502 | 			return await db
 503 | 				.select({
 504 | 					month: sql<number>`CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM ${schema.appointment.appointmentDate}) AS INTEGER)`,
 505 | 					count: count()
 506 | 				})
 507 | 				.from(schema.appointment)
 508 | 				.where(
 509 | 					and(
 510 | 						eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId),
 511 | 						eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false),
 512 | 						sql`EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ${schema.appointment.appointmentDate}) = ${year}`
 513 | 					)
 514 | 				)
 515 | 				.groupBy(sql`EXTRACT(MONTH FROM ${schema.appointment.appointmentDate})`)
 516 | 				.orderBy(sql`EXTRACT(MONTH FROM ${schema.appointment.appointmentDate})`);
 517 | 		} catch (error) {
 518 | 			console.error("Error getting monthly appointment data:", error);
 519 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get monthly appointment data");
 520 | 		}
 521 | 	});
 522 | 
 523 | const getAppointmentsWithFilters = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 524 | 	.validator(appointmentsFilterSchema)
 525 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 526 | 		try {
 527 | 			const { clinicId, filters, pagination } = ctx.data;
 528 | 
 529 | 			// Build where conditions object for RQB
 530 | 			const whereConditions: Record<string, unknown> = {
 531 | 				clinicId: clinicId,
 532 | 				isDeleted: false
 533 | 			};
 534 | 
 535 | 			// Add simple equality filters
 536 | 			if (filters.status) whereConditions.status = filters.status;
 537 | 			if (filters.doctorId) whereConditions.doctorId = filters.doctorId;
 538 | 			if (filters.patientId) whereConditions.patientId = filters.patientId;
 539 | 			if (filters.type) whereConditions.type = filters.type;
 540 | 
 541 | 			// Add date range filters
 542 | 			if (filters.startDate && filters.endDate) {
 543 | 				whereConditions.appointmentDate = {
 544 | 					gte: filters.startDate,
 545 | 					lte: filters.endDate
 546 | 				};
 547 | 			} else if (filters.startDate) {
 548 | 				whereConditions.appointmentDate = { gte: filters.startDate };
 549 | 			} else if (filters.endDate) {
 550 | 				whereConditions.appointmentDate = { lte: filters.endDate };
 551 | 			}
 552 | 
 553 | 			// Add search filter using OR conditions
 554 | 			if (filters.search) {
 555 | 				whereConditions.OR = [
 556 | 					{ reason: { like: `%${filters.search}%` } },
 557 | 					{ type: { like: `%${filters.search}%` } }
 558 | 				];
 559 | 			}
 560 | 
 561 | 			const [appointments, totalResult] = await Promise.all([
 562 | 				db.query.appointment.findMany({
 563 | 					where: whereConditions,
 564 | 					with: {
 565 | 						patient: true,
 566 | 						doctor: true
 567 | 					},
 568 | 					limit: pagination.limit,
 569 | 					offset: pagination.offset,
 570 | 					orderBy: { appointmentDate: "desc" }
 571 | 				}),
 572 | 				db
 573 | 					.select({ count: count() })
 574 | 					.from(schema.appointment)
 575 | 					.where(
 576 | 						and(
 577 | 							eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId),
 578 | 							eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false),
 579 | 							filters.status ? eq(schema.appointment.status, filters.status) : undefined,
 580 | 							filters.doctorId ? eq(schema.appointment.doctorId, filters.doctorId) : undefined,
 581 | 							filters.patientId ? eq(schema.appointment.patientId, filters.patientId) : undefined,
 582 | 							filters.type ? eq(schema.appointment.type, filters.type) : undefined,
 583 | 							filters.startDate && filters.endDate
 584 | 								? between(schema.appointment.appointmentDate, filters.startDate, filters.endDate)
 585 | 								: filters.startDate
 586 | 									? gte(schema.appointment.appointmentDate, filters.startDate)
 587 | 									: filters.endDate
 588 | 										? lte(schema.appointment.appointmentDate, filters.endDate)
 589 | 										: undefined,
 590 | 							filters.search
 591 | 								? or(
 592 | 										like(schema.appointment.reason, `%${filters.search}%`),
 593 | 										like(schema.appointment.type, `%${filters.search}%`)
 594 | 									)
 595 | 								: undefined
 596 | 						)
 597 | 					)
 598 | 			]);
 599 | 
 600 | 			return {
 601 | 				appointments,
 602 | 				total: totalResult[0]?.count ?? 0
 603 | 			};
 604 | 		} catch (error) {
 605 | 			console.error("Error getting appointments with filters:", error);
 606 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get appointments with filters");
 607 | 		}
 608 | 	});
 609 | const checkTimeSlotAvailability = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 610 | 	.validator(checkAvailabilitySchema)
 611 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 612 | 		try {
 613 | 			const { doctorId, appointmentDate, durationMinutes, clinicId, excludeId } = ctx.data;
 614 | 
 615 | 			const appointmentEnd = new Date(appointmentDate);
 616 | 			appointmentEnd.setMinutes(appointmentEnd.getMinutes() + durationMinutes);
 617 | 
 618 | 			const conditions = [
 619 | 				eq(schema.appointment.doctorId, doctorId),
 620 | 				eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId),
 621 | 				eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false),
 622 | 				lte(schema.appointment.appointmentDate, appointmentEnd),
 623 | 				gte(sql`${schema.appointment.appointmentDate}`, appointmentDate)
 624 | 			];
 625 | 
 626 | 			if (excludeId) {
 627 | 				conditions.push(ne(schema.appointment.id, excludeId));
 628 | 			}
 629 | 
 630 | 			const overlapping = await db
 631 | 				.select()
 632 | 				.from(schema.appointment)
 633 | 				.where(and(...conditions))
 634 | 				.limit(1);
 635 | 
 636 | 			return overlapping.length === 0;
 637 | 		} catch (error) {
 638 | 			console.error("Error checking time slot availability:", error);
 639 | 			throw new Error("Failed to check time slot availability");
 640 | 		}
 641 | 	});

 662 | 	.validator(cancelAppointmentSchema)
 663 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 664 | 		try {
 665 | 			const { appointmentId, clinicId, reason } = ctx.data;
 666 | 			return await db.transaction(async tx => {

 668 | 					.update(schema.appointment)
 669 | 					.set({
 670 | 						status: "CANCELLED",
 671 | 						note: reason,
 672 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 673 | 					})
 674 | 					.where(eq(schema.appointment.id, appointmentId))
 675 | 					.returning();
 676 | 
 677 | 				// Create notification
 678 | 				if (appointment) {
 679 | 					await tx.insert(schema.notification).values({
 680 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 681 | 						userId: appointment.patientId,
 682 | 						clinicId,
 683 | 						title: "Appointment Cancelled",
 684 | 						body: `Your appointment has been cancelled. Reason: ${reason}`,
 685 | 						type: "appointment_cancelled",
 686 | 						priority: "high",
 687 | 						status: "unread",
 688 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
 689 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 690 | 					});
 691 | 				}
 692 | 
 693 | 				return appointment;
 694 | 			});
 695 | 		} catch (error) {
 696 | 			console.error("Error cancelling appointment:", error);
 697 | 			throw new Error("Failed to cancel appointment");
 698 | 		}

 837 | const createAppointmentWithReminder = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 838 | 	.validator(createWithReminderSchema)
 839 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 840 | 		try {
 841 | 			const { data, reminderData } = ctx.data;
 842 | 			return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 843 | 				// Check for conflicts
 844 | 				const existingAppointment = await tx.query.appointment.findFirst({
 845 | 					where: {
 846 | 						doctorId: data.doctorId,
 847 | 						time: data.time ?? "",
 848 | 						isDeleted: false,
 849 | 						appointmentDate: { gte: data.appointmentDate },
 850 | 						status: {
 851 | 							notIn: ["CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"]
 852 | 						}
 853 | 					}
 854 | 				});
 855 | 
 856 | 				if (existingAppointment) {
 857 | 					throw new Error("Time slot already booked");
 858 | 				}
 859 | 
 860 | 				// Create appointment
 861 | 				const [appointment] = await tx
 862 | 					.insert(schema.appointment)
 863 | 					.values({
 864 | 						...data,
 865 | 						id: data.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
 866 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
 867 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 868 | 					})
 869 | 					.returning();
 870 | 
 871 | 				// Create reminder if requested
 872 | 				if (reminderData && appointment) {
 873 | 					await tx.insert(schema.reminder).values({
 874 | 						...reminderData,
 875 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 876 | 						appointmentId: appointment.id,
 877 | 						status: "PENDING"
 878 | 					});
 879 | 				}
 880 | 
 881 | 				// Create notification for patient
 882 | 				const patient = await tx.query.patient.findFirst({
 883 | 					where: { id: data.patientId },
 884 | 					with: { user: true }
 885 | 				});
 886 | 
 887 | 				if (patient?.userId) {
 888 | 					await tx.insert(schema.notification).values({
 889 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 890 | 						userId: patient.userId,
 891 | 						clinicId: data.clinicId,
 892 | 						title: "Appointment Scheduled",
 893 | 						body: `Your appointment has been scheduled for ${new Date(data.appointmentDate).toLocaleDateString()} at ${data.time}`,
 894 | 						type: "appointment_scheduled",
 895 | 						priority: "high",
 896 | 						status: "unread",
 897 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
 898 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 899 | 					});
 900 | 				}
 901 | 
 902 | 				return appointment;
 903 | 			});
 904 | 		} catch (error) {
 905 | 			console.error("Error creating appointment with reminder:", error);
 906 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create appointment with reminder");
 907 | 		}
 908 | 	});

 910 | const createMedicalRecordWithEncounter = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 911 | 	.validator(medicalRecordWithEncounterSchema)
 912 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 913 | 		try {
 914 | 			const data = ctx.data;

 929 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
 930 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 931 | 					})

 944 | 						diagnosis: data.diagnosis,
 945 | 						symptoms: data.symptoms,
 946 | 						status: "ACTIVE",

 949 | 					})

 962 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 963 | 					});
 964 | 				}
 965 | 
 966 | 				// Create prescriptions if provided
 967 | 				if (data.prescriptions && data.prescriptions.length > 0) {
 968 | 					const [prescription] = await tx
 969 | 						.insert(schema.prescription)
 970 | 						.values({
 971 | 							id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 972 | 							medicalRecordId: medicalRecord?.id ?? "",
 973 | 							patientId: data.patientId,
 974 | 							doctorId: data.doctorId,
 975 | 							clinicId: data.clinicId,
 976 | 							encounterId: data.appointmentId,
 977 | 							status: "active",
 978 | 							issuedDate: new Date(),
 979 | 							createdAt: new Date(),
 980 | 							updatedAt: new Date()
 981 | 						})
 982 | 						.returning();
 983 | 
 984 | 					for (const med of data.prescriptions) {
 985 | 						// Find or create drug
 986 | 						let drug = await tx.query.drug.findFirst({
 987 | 							where: { name: med.medicationName }
 988 | 						});
 989 | 
 990 | 						if (!drug) {
 991 | 							[drug] = await tx
 992 | 								.insert(schema.drug)
 993 | 								.values({
 994 | 									id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 995 | 									name: med.medicationName,
 996 | 									createdAt: new Date(),
 997 | 									updatedAt: new Date()
 998 | 								})
 999 | 								.returning();
1000 | 						}
1001 | 
1002 | 						await tx.insert(schema.prescribedItem).values({
1003 | 							id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1004 | 							prescriptionId: prescription?.id ?? "",
1005 | 							clinicId: data.clinicId,
1006 | 							drugId: drug?.id ?? "",
1007 | 							dosageValue: med.dosageValue,
1008 | 							dosageUnit: med.dosageUnit,
1009 | 							frequency: med.frequency,
1010 | 							duration: med.duration,
1011 | 							createdAt: new Date(),
1012 | 							updatedAt: new Date()
1013 | 						});
1014 | 					}
1015 | 				}
1016 | 
1017 | 				// Update appointment status
1018 | 				await tx
1019 | 					.update(schema.appointment)
1020 | 					.set({ status: "COMPLETED", updatedAt: new Date() })
1021 | 					.where(eq(schema.appointment.id, data.appointmentId));
1022 | 
1023 | 				return { medicalRecord, diagnosis };
1024 | 			});
1025 | 		} catch (error) {
1026 | 			console.error("Error creating medical record with encounter:", error);
1027 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create medical record");
1028 | 		}
1029 | 	});

1031 | const rescheduleAppointment = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1032 | 	.validator(rescheduleSchema)
1033 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1034 | 		try {
1035 | 			const { appointmentId, newDate, newTime, reason } = ctx.data;
1036 | 			return await db.transaction(async tx => {
1037 | 				const appointment = await tx.query.appointment.findFirst({
1038 | 					where: { id: appointmentId }
1039 | 				});
1040 | 
1041 | 				if (!appointment) {
1042 | 					throw new Error("Appointment not found");
1043 | 				}
1044 | 
1045 | 				// Check new time slot availability
1046 | 				const conflict = await tx.query.appointment.findFirst({
1047 | 					where: {
1048 | 						doctorId: appointment.doctorId,
1049 | 						appointmentDate: {
1050 | 							lte: newDate,
1051 | 							gte: new Date()
1052 | 						},
1053 | 						isDeleted: false,
1054 | 						status: {
1055 | 							notIn: ["CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"]
1056 | 						}
1057 | 					}
1058 | 				});
1059 | 
1060 | 				if (conflict && conflict.id !== appointmentId) {
1061 | 					throw new Error("New time slot is already booked");
1062 | 				}
1063 | 
1064 | 				// Update appointment
1065 | 				const [updated] = await tx
1066 | 					.update(schema.appointment)
1067 | 					.set({
1068 | 						appointmentDate: newDate,
1069 | 						time: newTime,
1070 | 						note: reason ? `${appointment.note || ""}\nRescheduled: ${reason}` : appointment.note,
1071 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
1072 | 					})
1073 | 					.where(eq(schema.appointment.id, appointmentId))
1074 | 					.returning();
1075 | 
1076 | 				// Notify patient
1077 | 				const patient = await tx.query.patient.findFirst({
1078 | 					where: { id: appointment.patientId },
1079 | 					with: { user: true }
1080 | 				});
1081 | 
1082 | 				if (patient?.userId) {
1083 | 					await tx.insert(schema.notification).values({
1084 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1085 | 						userId: patient.userId,
1086 | 						clinicId: appointment.clinicId,
1087 | 						title: "Appointment Rescheduled",
1088 | 						body: `Your appointment has been rescheduled to ${newDate.toLocaleDateString()} at ${newTime}`,
1089 | 						type: "appointment_rescheduled",
1090 | 						priority: "high",
1091 | 						status: "unread",
1092 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
1093 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
1094 | 					});
1095 | 				}
1096 | 
1097 | 				return updated;
1098 | 			});
1099 | 		} catch (error) {
1100 | 			console.error("Error rescheduling appointment:", error);
1101 | 			throw new Error("Failed to reschedule appointment");
1102 | 		}
1103 | 	});
1104 | 
1105 | const restoreAppointment = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1106 | 	.validator(z.object({ id: z.string() }))
1107 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1108 | 		try {
1109 | 			const { id } = ctx.data;
1110 | 			const [result] = await db
1111 | 				.update(schema.appointment)
1112 | 				.set({ deletedAt: null, isDeleted: false, updatedAt: new Date() })
1113 | 				.where(eq(schema.appointment.id, id))
1114 | 				.returning();
1115 | 			return result;
1116 | 		} catch (error) {
1117 | 			console.error("Error restoring appointment:", error);
1118 | 			throw new Error("Failed to restore appointment");
1119 | 		}
1120 | 	});
1121 | const getAppointmentsWithPagination = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1122 | 	.validator(
1123 | 		z.object({
1124 | 			clinicId: z.string(),
1125 | 			pagination: z.object({ page: z.number(), limit: z.number() }),
1126 | 			filters: z
1127 | 				.object({
1128 | 					status: z.enum(["PENDING", "CONFIRMED", "COMPLETED", "CANCELLED", "NO_SHOW"]).optional(),
1129 | 					fromDate: z.date().optional(),
1130 | 					toDate: z.date().optional(),
1131 | 					patientId: z.string().optional(),
1132 | 					doctorId: z.string().optional(),
1133 | 					search: z.string().optional()
1134 | 				})
1135 | 				.optional()
1136 | 		})
1137 | 	)
1138 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1139 | 		try {
1140 | 			const { clinicId, pagination, filters } = ctx.data;
1141 | 			const { page, limit } = pagination;
1142 | 			const offset = (page - 1) * limit;
1143 | 
1144 | 			// Build where conditions object for RQB v2
1145 | 			const whereConditions: Record<string, unknown> = {
1146 | 				clinicId: clinicId,
1147 | 				isDeleted: false
1148 | 			};
1149 | 
1150 | 			// Add simple equality filters
1151 | 			if (filters?.status) whereConditions.status = filters.status;
1152 | 			if (filters?.doctorId) whereConditions.doctorId = filters.doctorId;
1153 | 			if (filters?.patientId) whereConditions.patientId = filters.patientId;
1154 | 
1155 | 			// Add date range filters
1156 | 			if (filters?.fromDate && filters?.toDate) {
1157 | 				whereConditions.appointmentDate = {
1158 | 					gte: filters.fromDate,
1159 | 					lte: filters.toDate
1160 | 				};
1161 | 			} else if (filters?.fromDate) {
1162 | 				whereConditions.appointmentDate = { gte: filters.fromDate };
1163 | 			} else if (filters?.toDate) {
1164 | 				whereConditions.appointmentDate = { lte: filters.toDate };
1165 | 			}
1166 | 
1167 | 			// Add search filter using OR
1168 | 			if (filters?.search) {
1169 | 				whereConditions.OR = [
1170 | 					{ reason: { like: `%${filters.search}%` } },
1171 | 					{ type: { like: `%${filters.search}%` } }
1172 | 				];
1173 | 			}
1174 | 
1175 | 			const [appointments, totalResult] = await Promise.all([
1176 | 				db.query.appointment.findMany({
1177 | 					where: whereConditions,
1178 | 					with: {
1179 | 						patient: {
1180 | 							columns: { id: true, firstName: true, lastName: true, email: true, phone: true }
1181 | 						},
1182 | 						doctor: {
1183 | 							columns: { id: true, name: true, specialty: true, email: true }
1184 | 						},
1185 | 						service: {
1186 | 							columns: { id: true, serviceName: true, price: true, duration: true }
1187 | 						},
1188 | 						clinic: {
1189 | 							columns: { id: true, name: true, address: true, phone: true }
1190 | 						}
1191 | 					},
1192 | 					limit: limit,
1193 | 					offset: offset,
1194 | 					orderBy: { appointmentDate: "desc" }
1195 | 				}),
1196 | 				db
1197 | 					.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)` })
1198 | 					.from(schema.appointment)
1199 | 					.where(
1200 | 						and(
1201 | 							eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId),
1202 | 							eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false),
1203 | 							filters?.status ? eq(schema.appointment.status, filters.status) : undefined,
1204 | 							filters?.doctorId ? eq(schema.appointment.doctorId, filters.doctorId) : undefined,
1205 | 							filters?.patientId ? eq(schema.appointment.patientId, filters.patientId) : undefined,
1206 | 							filters?.fromDate && filters?.toDate
1207 | 								? between(schema.appointment.appointmentDate, filters.fromDate, filters.toDate)
1208 | 								: filters?.fromDate
1209 | 									? gte(schema.appointment.appointmentDate, filters.fromDate)
1210 | 									: filters?.toDate
1211 | 										? lte(schema.appointment.appointmentDate, filters.toDate)
1212 | 										: undefined,
1213 | 							filters?.search
1214 | 								? or(
1215 | 										like(schema.appointment.reason, `%${filters.search}%`),
1216 | 										like(schema.appointment.type, `%${filters.search}%`)
1217 | 									)
1218 | 								: undefined
1219 | 						)
1220 | 					)
1221 | 			]);
1222 | 
1223 | 			const total = Number(totalResult[0]?.count ?? 0);
1224 | 
1225 | 			return {
1226 | 				appointments,
1227 | 				total,
1228 | 				page,
1229 | 				limit,
1230 | 				totalPages: Math.ceil(total / limit)
1231 | 			};
1232 | 		} catch (error) {
1233 | 			console.error("Error getting appointments with pagination:", error);
1234 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get paginated appointments");
1235 | 		}
1236 | 	});
1237 | const getPatientAppointments = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
1238 | 	.validator(patientAppointmentsSchema)
1239 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1240 | 		try {
1241 | 			const { patientId, clinicId, pagination, status } = ctx.data;
1242 | 			const { page, limit } = pagination;
1243 | 			const offset = (page - 1) * limit;
1244 | 
1245 | 			const conditions = [
1246 | 				eq(schema.appointment.patientId, patientId),
1247 | 				eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId),
1248 | 				eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false)
1249 | 			];
1250 | 
1251 | 			if (status) conditions.push(eq(schema.appointment.status, status));
1252 | 
1253 | 			const [appointments, totalResult] = await Promise.all([
1254 | 				db.query.appointment.findMany({
1255 | 					where: {
1256 | 						patientId,
1257 | 						clinicId,
1258 | 						isDeleted: false
1259 | 					},
1260 | 					with: {
1261 | 						doctor: true,

1263 | 						clinic: true
1264 | 					},
1265 | 					limit,
1266 | 					offset,
1267 | 					orderBy: { appointmentDate: "desc" }
1268 | 				}),
1269 | 				db
1270 | 					.select({ count: count() })
1271 | 					.from(schema.appointment)
1272 | 					.where(and(...conditions))
1273 | 			]);
1274 | 
1275 | 			const total = totalResult[0]?.count ?? 0;
1276 | 
1277 | 			return {
1278 | 				appointments,
1279 | 				total,
1280 | 				page,
1281 | 				limit,
1282 | 				totalPages: Math.ceil(total / limit)
1283 | 			};
1284 | 		} catch (error) {

1542 | 				NO_SHOW: counts?.NO_SHOW || 0
1543 | 			},
```

`functions/auth.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/repositories/auth.repo.ts
   2 |

   4 | import * as schema from "@clinic/db/schema";

  36 | const deleteTwoFactorSchema = z.object({ id: z.string() });
  37 | const createUserQuotaFromInputSchema = z.object({ data: z.record(z.string(), z.any()) });

  40 | const deleteUserQuotaSchema = z.object({ id: z.string() });
  41 | const TwoFactorCreateSchema = createInsertSchema(schema.twoFactor);
  42 | const createManyTwoFactorsSchema = z.array(TwoFactorCreateSchema);
  43 | // =======================
  44 | // Schema Validators
  45 | // =======================

  94 | const createUser = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
  95 | 	.validator(UserCreateSchema)
  96 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
  97 | 		try {
  98 | 			const data = ctx.data;
  99 | 			const [result] = await db
 100 | 				.insert(schema.user)
 101 | 				.values({
 102 | 					...data,
 103 | 					createdAt: new Date(),
 104 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 105 | 				})
 106 | 				.returning();
 107 | 			return result;
 108 | 		} catch (error) {
 109 | 			console.error("Error creating user:", error);
 110 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create user");
 111 | 		}
 112 | 	});
 113 | 
 114 | const updateUser = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 115 | 	.validator(UserUpdateSchema)
 116 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 117 | 		try {
 118 | 			const { id, ...data } = ctx.data;
 119 | 			if (!id) {
 120 | 				throw new Error("User ID is required for update");
 121 | 			}
 122 | 			const [result] = await db
 123 | 				.update(schema.user)
 124 | 				.set({ ...data, updatedAt: new Date() })
 125 | 				.where(eq(schema.user.id, id as string))
 126 | 				.returning();
 127 | 			return result;
 128 | 		} catch (error) {
 129 | 			console.error("Error updating user:", error);
 130 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update user");
 131 | 		}
 132 | 	});
 133 |

 135 | 	.validator(ClinicMemberUpdateSchema)
 136 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 137 | 		try {

 140 | 				.update(schema.user)
 141 | 				.set({ clinicId, updatedAt: new Date() })
 142 | 				.where(eq(schema.user.id, userId as string))
 143 | 				.returning();
 144 | 			return result;
 145 | 		} catch (error) {

 147 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update user clinic");
 148 | 		}
 149 | 	});

 151 | const getAdminCount = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(async () => {
 152 | 	try {
 153 | 		const result = await db.select({ count: count() }).from(schema.user).where(eq(schema.user.role, "admin"));
 154 | 		return result[0]?.count ?? 0;
 155 | 	} catch (error) {
 156 | 		console.error("Error getting admin count:", error);
 157 | 		throw new Error("Failed to get admin count");
 158 | 	}

 345 | const createUserQuota = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 346 | 	.validator(UserQuotaCreateSchema)
 347 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 348 | 		try {
 349 | 			const { ...data } = ctx.data;
 350 | 			const [result] = await db
 351 | 				.insert(schema.userQuota)
 352 | 				.values({
 353 | 					...data,
 354 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 355 | 				})
 356 | 				.returning();
 357 | 			return result;
 358 | 		} catch (error) {
 359 | 			console.error("Error creating user quota:", error);
 360 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create user quota");
 361 | 		}
 362 | 	});
 363 | 
 364 | const updateUserQuota = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 365 | 	.validator(UserQuotaUpdateSchema)
 366 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 367 | 		try {
 368 | 			const { userId, ...data } = ctx.data;
 369 | 			const [result] = await db
 370 | 				.update(schema.userQuota)
 371 | 				.set({ ...data, updatedAt: new Date() })
 372 | 				.where(eq(schema.userQuota.userId, userId ?? ""))
 373 | 				.returning();
 374 | 			return result;
 375 | 		} catch (error) {
 376 | 			console.error("Error updating user quota:", error);
 377 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update user quota");
 378 | 		}
 379 | 	});
 380 | 
 381 | const getOrCreateUserQuota = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 382 | 	.validator(userQuotaUserIdSchema)
 383 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 384 | 		try {
 385 | 			const { userId } = ctx.data;
 386 | 			let quota = await db.query.userQuota.findFirst({
 387 | 				where: { userId }
 388 | 			});
 389 | 
 390 | 			if (!quota) {
 391 | 				const [newQuota] = await db
 392 | 					.insert(schema.userQuota)
 393 | 					.values({
 394 | 						userId,
 395 | 						quota: 100,
 396 | 						usedQuota: 0,
 397 | 						fileCount: 0,
 398 | 						fileCountQuota: 1000,
 399 | 						inviteCount: 0,
 400 | 						inviteQuota: 10,
 401 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 402 | 					})
 403 | 					.returning();
 404 | 				quota = newQuota;
 405 | 			}
 406 | 
 407 | 			return quota;
 408 | 		} catch (error) {
 409 | 			console.error("Error getting or creating user quota:", error);
 410 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get or create user quota");
 411 | 		}
 412 | 	});
 413 | 
 414 | const getUserWithAllRelations = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 415 | 	.validator(userIdSchema)
 416 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 417 | 		try {
 418 | 			const { userId } = ctx.data;
 419 | 			const user = await db.query.user.findFirst({
 420 | 				where: { id: userId ?? "" },
 421 | 				with: {
 422 | 					folders: {
 423 | 						where: { id: undefined } // Get root folders only
 424 | 					},
 425 | 					clinicMemberships: {
 426 | 						where: {
 427 | 							userId
 428 | 						}
 429 | 					},
 430 | 					doctorProfile: true,
 431 | 					staffProfile: true,
 432 | 					patientProfile: {
 433 | 						with: {
 434 | 							appointments: {
 435 | 								where: { isDeleted: false },
 436 | 								orderBy: { appointmentDate: "desc" },
 437 | 								limit: 5
 438 | 							}
 439 | 						}
 440 | 					},
 441 | 					notifications: {
 442 | 						where: { status: "unread" },
 443 | 						orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" }
 444 | 					}
 445 | 				}
 446 | 			});
 447 | 
 448 | 			return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(user));
 449 | 		} catch (error) {
 450 | 			console.error("Error getting user with relations:", error);
 451 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get user details");
 452 | 		}
 453 | 	});

 459 | const createManyUsers = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 460 | 	.validator(z.object({ data: UserCreateSchema.array() }))
 461 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 462 | 		try {
 463 | 			const { data } = ctx.data;
 464 | 			const usersWithTimestamps = data.map(user => ({
 465 | 				...user,
 466 | 				createdAt: new Date(),
 467 | 				updatedAt: new Date()
 468 | 			}));
 469 | 			return await db.insert(schema.user).values(usersWithTimestamps).returning();
 470 | 		} catch (error) {
 471 | 			console.error("Error creating many users:", error);
 472 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create multiple users");
 473 | 		}
 474 | 	});
 475 | 
 476 | const updateManyUsers = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 477 | 	.validator(z.object({ ids: z.array(z.string()), data: UserUpdateSchema }))
 478 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 479 | 		try {
 480 | 			const { ids, data } = ctx.data;
 481 | 			const updateData = { ...data, updatedAt: new Date() };
 482 | 			return await db.update(schema.user).set(updateData).where(inArray(schema.user.id, ids)).returning();
 483 | 		} catch (error) {
 484 | 			console.error("Error updating many users:", error);
 485 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update multiple users");
 486 | 		}
 487 | 	});

```

`functions/calendar.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/repositories/calendar.repo.ts
   2 | 
   3 | import { db } from "@clinic/db";
   4 | import type { Weekday } from "@clinic/db/schema";
   5 | import * as schema from "@clinic/db/schema";
   6 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   7 | import { and, eq, ne, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   8 | import z from "zod";
   9 | 
  10 | // =======================
  11 | // Schema Validators
  12 | // =======================
  13 | 
  14 | const doctorWorkingHoursSchema = z.object({
  15 | 	doctorId: z.string(),
  16 | 	date: z.date()
  17 | });
  18 | 
  19 | const checkSlotAvailabilitySchema = z.object({
  20 | 	doctorId: z.string(),
  21 | 	start: z.date(),
  22 | 	end: z.date(),
  23 | 	clinicId: z.string(),
  24 | 	excludeId: z.string().optional()
  25 | });
  26 | 
  27 | const bookedSlotsSchema = z.object({
  28 | 	doctorId: z.string(),
  29 | 	date: z.date()
  30 | });
  31 | 
  32 | const createRemindersSchema = z.object({
  33 | 	appointmentId: z.string(),
  34 | 	appointmentDate: z.date(),
  35 | 	reminderTimes: z.array(z.number()).optional()
  36 | });
  37 | 
  38 | const doctorWeeklyScheduleSchema = z.object({
  39 | 	doctorId: z.string(),
  40 | 	startDate: z.date()
  41 | });
  42 | 
  43 | // =======================
  44 | // Server Functions
  45 | // =======================
  46 | 
  47 | const getDoctorWorkingHours = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
  48 | 	.validator(doctorWorkingHoursSchema)
  49 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
  50 | 		try {
  51 | 			const { doctorId, date } = ctx.data;
  52 | 			const dayOfWeek = date.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { weekday: "long" }).toUpperCase();
  53 | 
  54 | 			const result = await db.query.workingDay.findFirst({
  55 | 				where: {
  56 | 					doctorId,
  57 | 					day: dayOfWeek as Weekday
  58 | 				}
  59 | 			});
  60 | 
  61 | 			if (!result) {
  62 | 				return null;
  63 | 			}
  64 | 
  65 | 			return {
  66 | 				start: result.startTime,
  67 | 				end: result.endTime
  68 | 			};
  69 | 		} catch (error) {
  70 | 			console.error("Error getting doctor working hours:", error);
  71 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get doctor working hours");
  72 | 		}
  73 | 	});
  74 | 
  75 | const checkSlotAvailability = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
  76 | 	.validator(checkSlotAvailabilitySchema)
  77 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
  78 | 		try {
  79 | 			const { doctorId, start, end, clinicId, excludeId } = ctx.data;
  80 | 
  81 | 			const conditions = [
  82 | 				eq(schema.appointment.doctorId, doctorId),
  83 | 				eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId),
  84 | 				eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false),
  85 | 				sql`${schema.appointment.appointmentDate} < ${end.toISOString()}`,
  86 | 				sql`${schema.appointment.appointmentDate} + (${schema.appointment.durationMinutes} || ' minutes')::interval > ${start.toISOString()}`
  87 | 			];
  88 | 
  89 | 			if (excludeId) {
  90 | 				conditions.push(ne(schema.appointment.id, excludeId));
  91 | 			}
  92 | 
  93 | 			const overlapping = await db
  94 | 				.select()
  95 | 				.from(schema.appointment)
  96 | 				.where(and(...conditions))
  97 | 				.limit(1);
  98 | 
  99 | 			return overlapping.length === 0;
 100 | 		} catch (error) {
 101 | 			console.error("Error checking slot availability:", error);
 102 | 			throw new Error("Failed to check slot availability");
 103 | 		}
 104 | 	});
 105 | 
 106 | const getBookedSlotsForDoctor = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 107 | 	.validator(bookedSlotsSchema)
 108 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 109 | 		try {
 110 | 			const { doctorId, date } = ctx.data;
 111 | 			const startOfDay = new Date(date);
 112 | 			startOfDay.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
 113 | 			const endOfDay = new Date(date);
 114 | 			endOfDay.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
 115 | 
 116 | 			const appointments = await db.query.appointment.findMany({
 117 | 				where: {
 118 | 					doctorId,
 119 | 					isDeleted: false,
 120 | 					appointmentDate: { gte: startOfDay, lte: endOfDay },
 121 | 					status: { notIn: ["CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"] }
 122 | 				},
 123 | 				columns: { appointmentDate: true, durationMinutes: true }
 124 | 			});
 125 | 
 126 | 			return appointments.map(apt => ({
 127 | 				start: apt.appointmentDate,
 128 | 				duration: apt.durationMinutes ?? 30
 129 | 			}));
 130 | 		} catch (error) {
 131 | 			console.error("Error getting booked slots:", error);
 132 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get booked slots");
 133 | 		}
 134 | 	});
 135 | 
 136 | const createAppointmentReminders = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 137 | 	.validator(createRemindersSchema)
 138 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 139 | 		try {
 140 | 			const { appointmentId, appointmentDate, reminderTimes = [24, 2] } = ctx.data;
 141 | 			const reminders = [];
 142 | 
 143 | 			for (const hoursBefore of reminderTimes) {
 144 | 				const reminderTime = new Date(appointmentDate);
 145 | 				reminderTime.setHours(reminderTime.getHours() - hoursBefore);
 146 | 
 147 | 				// Only create reminder if the time is in the future
 148 | 				if (reminderTime > new Date()) {
 149 | 					const [reminder] = await db
 150 | 						.insert(schema.reminder)
 151 | 						.values({
 152 | 							id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 153 | 							appointmentId,
 154 | 							method: "EMAIL",
 155 | 							status: "PENDING",
 156 | 							sentAt: reminderTime
 157 | 						})
 158 | 						.returning();
 159 | 
 160 | 					reminders.push(reminder);
 161 | 				}
 162 | 			}
 163 | 
 164 | 			return reminders;
 165 | 		} catch (error) {
 166 | 			console.error("Error creating appointment reminders:", error);
 167 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create appointment reminders");
 168 | 		}
 169 | 	});
 170 | 
 171 | const getDoctorWeeklySchedule = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 172 | 	.validator(doctorWeeklyScheduleSchema)
 173 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 174 | 		try {
 175 | 			const { doctorId, startDate } = ctx.data;
 176 | 			const endDate = new Date(startDate);
 177 | 			endDate.setDate(endDate.getDate() + 6);
 178 | 			endDate.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
 179 | 
 180 | 			const [workingDays, appointments] = await Promise.all([
 181 | 				db.query.workingDay.findMany({
 182 | 					where: {
 183 | 						doctorId
 184 | 					}
 185 | 				}),
 186 | 				db.query.appointment.findMany({
 187 | 					where: {
 188 | 						doctorId,
 189 | 						isDeleted: false,
 190 | 						appointmentDate: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate },
 191 | 						status: { notIn: ["CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"] }
 192 | 					},
 193 | 					with: {
 194 | 						patient: {
 195 | 							columns: { id: true, firstName: true, lastName: true }
 196 | 						}
 197 | 					},
 198 | 					orderBy: { appointmentDate: "asc" }
 199 | 				})
 200 | 			]);
 201 | 
 202 | 			return { workingDays, appointments };
 203 | 		} catch (error) {
 204 | 			console.error("Error getting doctor weekly schedule:", error);
 205 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get doctor weekly schedule");
 206 | 		}
 207 | 	});
 208 | 
 209 | // =======================
 210 | // Additional Calendar Utility Functions
 211 | // =======================
 212 | 
 213 | const getAvailableTimeSlotsForDay = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 214 | 	.validator(
 215 | 		z.object({
 216 | 			doctorId: z.string(),
 217 | 			date: z.date(),
 218 | 			clinicId: z.string(),
 219 | 			durationMinutes: z.number().optional(),
 220 | 			excludeAppointmentId: z.string().optional()
 221 | 		})
 222 | 	)
 223 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 224 | 		try {
 225 | 			const { doctorId, date, clinicId, durationMinutes = 30, excludeAppointmentId } = ctx.data;
 226 | 
 227 | 			// Get working hours
 228 | 			const workingHours = await getDoctorWorkingHours({
 229 | 				data: { doctorId, date }
 230 | 			});
 231 | 
 232 | 			if (!workingHours) {
 233 | 				return [];
 234 | 			}
 235 | 
 236 | 			// Parse working hours
 237 | 			const [startHour, startMinute] = workingHours.start.split(":").map(Number);
 238 | 			const [endHour, endMinute] = workingHours.end.split(":").map(Number);
 239 | 
 240 | 			const startTime = new Date(date);
 241 | 			startTime.setHours(startHour, startMinute, 0, 0);
 242 | 
 243 | 			const endTime = new Date(date);
 244 | 			endTime.setHours(endHour, endMinute, 0, 0);
 245 | 
 246 | 			// Get booked slots
 247 | 			const bookedSlots = await getBookedSlotsForDoctor({
 248 | 				data: { doctorId, date }
 249 | 			});
 250 | 
 251 | 			// Generate available slots
 252 | 			const slots = [];
 253 | 			const currentSlot = new Date(startTime);
 254 | 
 255 | 			while (currentSlot < endTime) {
 256 | 				const slotEnd = new Date(currentSlot);
 257 | 				slotEnd.setMinutes(slotEnd.getMinutes() + durationMinutes);
 258 | 
 259 | 				// Check if slot extends beyond working hours
 260 | 				if (slotEnd > endTime) {
 261 | 					break;
 262 | 				}
 263 | 
 264 | 				// Check for conflicts
 265 | 				const isBooked = bookedSlots.some(booked => {
 266 | 					const bookedStart = booked.start;
 267 | 					const bookedEnd = new Date(bookedStart);
 268 | 					bookedEnd.setMinutes(bookedEnd.getMinutes() + booked.duration);
 269 | 
 270 | 					return currentSlot < bookedEnd && slotEnd > bookedStart;
 271 | 				});
 272 | 
 273 | 				// Check availability
 274 | 				const isAvailable = await checkSlotAvailability({
 275 | 					data: {
 276 | 						doctorId,
 277 | 						start: currentSlot,
 278 | 						end: slotEnd,
 279 | 						clinicId,
 280 | 						excludeId: excludeAppointmentId
 281 | 					}
 282 | 				});
 283 | 
 284 | 				if (!isBooked && isAvailable) {
 285 | 					slots.push({
 286 | 						start: currentSlot,
 287 | 						end: slotEnd,
 288 | 						startTime: currentSlot.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: "2-digit", minute: "2-digit" }),
 289 | 						endTime: slotEnd.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: "2-digit", minute: "2-digit" }),
 290 | 						available: true
 291 | 					});
 292 | 				}
 293 | 
 294 | 				// Move to next slot
 295 | 				currentSlot.setMinutes(currentSlot.getMinutes() + durationMinutes);
 296 | 			}
 297 | 
 298 | 			return slots;
 299 | 		} catch (error) {
 300 | 			console.error("Error getting available time slots for day:", error);
 301 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get available time slots");
 302 | 		}
 303 | 	});
 304 | 
 305 | const bulkCreateAppointmentReminders = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 306 | 	.validator(
 307 | 		z.object({
 308 | 			reminders: z.array(
 309 | 				z.object({
 310 | 					appointmentId: z.string(),
 311 | 					appointmentDate: z.date(),
 312 | 					reminderTimes: z.array(z.number()).optional()
 313 | 				})
 314 | 			)
 315 | 		})
 316 | 	)
 317 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 318 | 		try {
 319 | 			const { reminders } = ctx.data;
 320 | 			const allReminders = [];
 321 | 
 322 | 			for (const reminder of reminders) {
 323 | 				const createdReminders = await createAppointmentReminders({
 324 | 					data: {
 325 | 						appointmentId: reminder.appointmentId,
 326 | 						appointmentDate: reminder.appointmentDate,
 327 | 						reminderTimes: reminder.reminderTimes
 328 | 					}
 329 | 				});
 330 | 				allReminders.push(...createdReminders);
 331 | 			}
 332 | 
 333 | 			return allReminders;
 334 | 		} catch (error) {
 335 | 			console.error("Error bulk creating appointment reminders:", error);
 336 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create appointment reminders");
 337 | 		}
 338 | 	});
 339 | 
 340 | const getDoctorScheduleForMonth = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 341 | 	.validator(
 342 | 		z.object({
 343 | 			doctorId: z.string(),
 344 | 			year: z.number(),
 345 | 			month: z.number() // 0-11
 346 | 		})
 347 | 	)
 348 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 349 | 		try {
 350 | 			const { doctorId, year, month } = ctx.data;
 351 | 
 352 | 			const startDate = new Date(year, month, 1);
 353 | 			const endDate = new Date(year, month + 1, 0);
 354 | 			endDate.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
 355 | 
 356 | 			const [workingDays, appointments] = await Promise.all([
 357 | 				db.query.workingDay.findMany({
 358 | 					where: {
 359 | 						doctorId
 360 | 					}
 361 | 				}),
 362 | 				db.query.appointment.findMany({
 363 | 					where: {
 364 | 						doctorId,
 365 | 						isDeleted: false,
 366 | 						appointmentDate: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate },
 367 | 						status: { notIn: ["CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"] }
 368 | 					},
 369 | 					with: {
 370 | 						patient: {
 371 | 							columns: { id: true, firstName: true, lastName: true }
 372 | 						}
 373 | 					},
 374 | 					orderBy: { appointmentDate: "asc" }
 375 | 				})
 376 | 			]);
 377 | 
 378 | 			// Group appointments by date
 379 | 			const appointmentsByDate = appointments.reduce(
 380 | 				(acc, apt) => {
 381 | 					const dateKey = apt.appointmentDate.toISOString().split("T")[0];
 382 | 					if (!acc[dateKey]) {
 383 | 						acc[dateKey] = [];
 384 | 					}
 385 | 					acc[dateKey].push(apt);
 386 | 					return acc;
 387 | 				},
 388 | 				{} as Record<string, typeof appointments>
 389 | 			);
 390 | 
 391 | 			// Generate schedule for each day of the month
 392 | 			const schedule = [];
 393 | 			for (let d = new Date(startDate); d <= endDate; d.setDate(d.getDate() + 1)) {
 394 | 				const currentDate = new Date(d);
 395 | 				const dayOfWeek = currentDate.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { weekday: "long" }).toUpperCase();
 396 | 
 397 | 				const workingDay = workingDays.find(wd => wd.day === dayOfWeek);
 398 | 				const dateKey = currentDate.toISOString().split("T")[0];
 399 | 				const dayAppointments = appointmentsByDate[dateKey] || [];
 400 | 
 401 | 				schedule.push({
 402 | 					date: currentDate,
 403 | 					isWorkingDay: !!workingDay,
 404 | 					workingHours: workingDay
 405 | 						? {
 406 | 								start: workingDay.startTime,
 407 | 								end: workingDay.endTime
 408 | 							}
 409 | 						: null,
 410 | 					appointments: dayAppointments,
 411 | 					appointmentCount: dayAppointments.length
 412 | 				});
 413 | 			}
 414 | 
 415 | 			return schedule;
 416 | 		} catch (error) {
 417 | 			console.error("Error getting doctor schedule for month:", error);
 418 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get doctor schedule");
 419 | 		}
 420 | 	});
 421 | 
 422 | const getConflictingAppointments = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 423 | 	.validator(
 424 | 		z.object({
 425 | 			doctorId: z.string(),
 426 | 			startDate: z.date(),
 427 | 			endDate: z.date(),
 428 | 			clinicId: z.string()
 429 | 		})
 430 | 	)
 431 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 432 | 		try {
 433 | 			const { doctorId, startDate, endDate, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 434 | 
 435 | 			const appointments = await db.query.appointment.findMany({
 436 | 				where: {
 437 | 					doctorId,
 438 | 					clinicId,
 439 | 					isDeleted: false,
 440 | 					appointmentDate: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate },
 441 | 					status: { notIn: ["CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"] }
 442 | 				},
 443 | 				orderBy: { appointmentDate: "asc" }
 444 | 			});
 445 | 
 446 | 			// Find overlapping appointments
 447 | 			const conflicts = [];
 448 | 			for (let i = 0; i < appointments.length; i++) {
 449 | 				const current = appointments[i];
 450 | 				const currentStart = current.appointmentDate;
 451 | 				const currentEnd = new Date(currentStart);
 452 | 				currentEnd.setMinutes(currentEnd.getMinutes() + (current.durationMinutes || 30));
 453 | 
 454 | 				for (let j = i + 1; j < appointments.length; j++) {
 455 | 					const next = appointments[j];
 456 | 					const nextStart = next.appointmentDate;
 457 | 					const nextEnd = new Date(nextStart);
 458 | 					nextEnd.setMinutes(nextEnd.getMinutes() + (next.durationMinutes || 30));
 459 | 
 460 | 					if (currentStart < nextEnd && currentEnd > nextStart) {
 461 | 						conflicts.push({
 462 | 							appointment1: current,
 463 | 							appointment2: next,
 464 | 							overlapStart: new Date(Math.max(currentStart.getTime(), nextStart.getTime())),
 465 | 							overlapEnd: new Date(Math.min(currentEnd.getTime(), nextEnd.getTime()))
 466 | 						});
 467 | 					}
 468 | 				}
 469 | 			}
 470 | 
 471 | 			return conflicts;
 472 | 		} catch (error) {
 473 | 			console.error("Error finding conflicting appointments:", error);
 474 | 			throw new Error("Failed to find conflicting appointments");
 475 | 		}
 476 | 	});
 477 | 
 478 | export {
 479 | 	bulkCreateAppointmentReminders,
 480 | 	checkSlotAvailability,
 481 | 	createAppointmentReminders,
 482 | 	getAvailableTimeSlotsForDay,
 483 | 	getBookedSlotsForDoctor,
 484 | 	getConflictingAppointments,
 485 | 	getDoctorScheduleForMonth,
 486 | 	getDoctorWeeklySchedule,
 487 | 	getDoctorWorkingHours
 488 | };

```

`functions/clinic.ts`:

```ts
 272 | 			const { userId } = ctx.data;

 275 | 					id: schema.clinic.id,
 276 | 					name: schema.clinic.name,

 290 | export const removeUserFromClinic = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 291 | 	.validator(z.object({ userId: z.string(), clinicId: z.string() }))
 292 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 293 | 		try {
 294 | 			const { userId, clinicId } = ctx.data;

 296 | 				.delete(schema.clinicMember)
 297 | 				.where(and(eq(schema.clinicMember.userId, userId), eq(schema.clinicMember.clinicId, clinicId)))
 298 | 				.returning();
 299 | 			return result;

 306 | // =======================
 307 | // Clinic Statistics
 308 | // =======================
 309 | 
 310 | export const getClinicStatistics = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 311 | 	.validator(clinicIdSchema)
 312 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 313 | 		try {
 314 | 			const { clinicId } = ctx.data;
 315 | 			const [doctors, patients, appointments, revenue] = await Promise.all([
 316 | 				db
 317 | 					.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)` })
 318 | 					.from(schema.doctor)
 319 | 					.where(and(eq(schema.doctor.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.doctor.isDeleted, false))),
 320 | 				db
 321 | 					.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)` })
 322 | 					.from(schema.patient)
 323 | 					.where(and(eq(schema.patient.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.patient.isDeleted, false))),
 324 | 				db
 325 | 					.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)` })
 326 | 					.from(schema.appointment)
 327 | 					.where(and(eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false))),
 328 | 				db
 329 | 					.select({ total: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(${schema.payment.amount}), 0)` })
 330 | 					.from(schema.payment)
 331 | 					.where(and(eq(schema.payment.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.payment.status, "PAID")))
 332 | 			]);
 333 | 
 334 | 			return {
 335 | 				doctors: doctors[0]?.count ?? 0,
 336 | 				patients: patients[0]?.count ?? 0,
 337 | 				appointments: appointments[0]?.count ?? 0,
 338 | 				revenue: revenue[0]?.total ?? 0
 339 | 			};
 340 | 		} catch (error) {
 341 | 			console.error("Error getting clinic statistics:", error);
 342 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get clinic statistics");
 343 | 		}
 344 | 	});

 427 | // =======================
 428 | // Clinic Dashboard
 429 | // =======================
 430 | 
 431 | export const getClinicDashboard = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 432 | 	.validator(clinicIdSchema)
 433 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 434 | 		try {
 435 | 			const { clinicId } = ctx.data;
 436 | 			const [clinic, stats, recentAppointments, topDoctors] = await Promise.all([
 437 | 				db.query.clinic.findFirst({
 438 | 					where: { id: clinicId, isDeleted: false }
 439 | 				}),
 440 | 				db.transaction(async tx => {
 441 | 					const [doctorCount, patientCount, appointmentCount, revenue] = await Promise.all([
 442 | 						tx
 443 | 							.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)` })
 444 | 							.from(schema.doctor)
 445 | 							.where(and(eq(schema.doctor.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.doctor.isDeleted, false))),
 446 | 						tx
 447 | 							.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)` })
 448 | 							.from(schema.patient)
 449 | 							.where(and(eq(schema.patient.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.patient.isDeleted, false))),
 450 | 						tx
 451 | 							.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)` })
 452 | 							.from(schema.appointment)
 453 | 							.where(
 454 | 								and(eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false))
 455 | 							),
 456 | 						tx
 457 | 							.select({ total: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(${schema.payment.amount}), 0)` })
 458 | 							.from(schema.payment)
 459 | 							.where(and(eq(schema.payment.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.payment.status, "PAID")))
 460 | 					]);
 461 | 					return {
 462 | 						doctors: doctorCount[0]?.count ?? 0,
 463 | 						patients: patientCount[0]?.count ?? 0,
 464 | 						appointments: appointmentCount[0]?.count ?? 0,
 465 | 						revenue: revenue[0]?.total ?? 0
 466 | 					};
 467 | 				}),
 468 | 				db.query.appointment.findMany({
 469 | 					where: { clinicId, isDeleted: false },
 470 | 					with: {
 471 | 						patient: true,
 472 | 						doctor: true
 473 | 					},
 474 | 					orderBy: { appointmentDate: "desc" },
 475 | 					limit: 10
 476 | 				}),
 477 | 				db.query.doctor.findMany({
 478 | 					where: { clinicId, isDeleted: false },
 479 | 					with: {
 480 | 						appointments: {
 481 | 							where: { isDeleted: false }
 482 | 						}
 483 | 					},
 484 | 					limit: 5
 485 | 				})
 486 | 			]);
 487 | 
 488 | 			return { clinic, stats, recentAppointments, topDoctors };
 489 | 		} catch (error) {
 490 | 			console.error("Error getting clinic dashboard:", error);
 491 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get clinic dashboard");
 492 | 		}
 493 | 	});
 494 | 
 495 | // =======================
 496 | // Service Management
 497 | // =======================
 498 | 
 499 | export const listServices = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 500 | 	.validator(serviceListSchema)
 501 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 502 | 		try {
 503 | 			const { clinicId, search, category, page, pageSize } = ctx.data;
 504 | 			const offset = (page - 1) * pageSize;
 505 | 
 506 | 			let whereConditions = and(eq(schema.service.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.service.isDeleted, false));
 507 | 
 508 | 			if (category) {
 509 | 				whereConditions = and(whereConditions, eq(schema.service.category, category));
 510 | 			}
 511 | 
 512 | 			if (search) {
 513 | 				whereConditions = and(whereConditions, like(schema.service.serviceName, `%${search}%`));
 514 | 			}
 515 | 
 516 | 			const [services, total] = await Promise.all([
 517 | 				db.query.service.findMany({
 518 | 					where: {
 519 | 						clinicId,
 520 | 						isDeleted: false,
 521 | 						...whereConditions
 522 | 					},
 523 | 					limit: pageSize,
 524 | 					offset,
 525 | 					orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" }
 526 | 				}),
 527 | 				db
 528 | 					.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)` })
 529 | 					.from(schema.service)
 530 | 					.where(whereConditions)
 531 | 					.then(result => result[0]?.count ?? 0)
 532 | 			]);
 533 | 
 534 | 			return {
 535 | 				services,
 536 | 				total,
 537 | 				page,
 538 | 				totalPages: Math.ceil(total / pageSize)
 539 | 			};
 540 | 		} catch (error) {
 541 | 			console.error("Error listing services:", error);
 542 | 			throw new Error("Failed to list services");
 543 | 		}
 544 | 	});
 545 |

 680 | export const getServiceStatistics = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 681 | 	.validator(serviceStatsSchema)
 682 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 683 | 		try {
 684 | 			const { clinicId, startDate, endDate } = ctx.data;
 685 | 			const services = await db.query.service.findMany({
 686 | 				where: {
 687 | 					clinicId,
 688 | 					isDeleted: false
 689 | 				},
 690 | 				with: {
 691 | 					appointments: {
 692 | 						where: {
 693 | 							isDeleted: false,
 694 | 							...(startDate &&
 695 | 								endDate && {
 696 | 									appointmentDate: {
 697 | 										gte: startDate,
 698 | 										lte: endDate
 699 | 									}
 700 | 								})
 701 | 						}
 702 | 					},
 703 | 					labTests: {
 704 | 						where:
 705 | 							startDate && endDate
 706 | 								? {
 707 | 										testDate: {
 708 | 											gte: startDate,
 709 | 											lte: endDate
 710 | 										}
 711 | 									}
 712 | 								: undefined
 713 | 					}
 714 | 				}
 715 | 			});
 716 | 
 717 | 			return services.map(service => ({
 718 | 				id: service.id,
 719 | 				name: service.serviceName,
 720 | 				category: service.category,
 721 | 				price: service.price,
 722 | 				duration: service.duration,
 723 | 				isAvailable: service.isAvailable,
 724 | 				appointmentCount: service.appointments.length,
 725 | 				labTestCount: service.labTests.length,
 726 | 				totalUsage: service.appointments.length + service.labTests.length,
 727 | 				estimatedRevenue: service.appointments.length * (service.price ?? 0)
 728 | 			}));
 729 | 		} catch (error) {
 730 | 			console.error("Error getting service statistics:", error);
 731 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get service statistics");
 732 | 		}
 733 | 	});
 734 | 
 735 | export const getPopularServices = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 736 | 	.validator(
 737 | 		z.object({
 738 | 			clinicId: z.string(),
 739 | 			limit: z.number().default(10),
 740 | 			startDate: z.date().optional(),
 741 | 			endDate: z.date().optional()
 742 | 		})
 743 | 	)
 744 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 745 | 		try {
 746 | 			const { clinicId, limit, startDate, endDate } = ctx.data;
 747 | 			const stats = await getServiceStatistics({ data: { clinicId, startDate, endDate } });
 748 | 			return stats.sort((a, b) => b.totalUsage - a.totalUsage).slice(0, limit);
 749 | 		} catch (error) {
 750 | 			console.error("Error getting popular services:", error);
 751 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get popular services");
 752 | 		}
 753 | 	});

 757 | 	.handler(async ctx => {

 761 | 			const startDate = new Date();
 762 | 			startDate.setDate(startDate.getDate() - days);
 763 |

 765 | 			return stats.filter(service => service.totalUsage < threshold);

 768 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get low usage services");
 769 | 		}

 772 | export const getServiceRevenueReport = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 773 | 	.validator(z.object({ clinicId: z.string(), startDate: z.date(), endDate: z.date() }))
 774 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 775 | 		try {
 776 | 			const { clinicId, startDate, endDate } = ctx.data;
 777 | 			const services = await db.query.service.findMany({
 778 | 				where: {
 779 | 					clinicId,
 780 | 					isDeleted: false
 781 | 				},
 782 | 				with: {
 783 | 					appointments: {
 784 | 						where: {
 785 | 							isDeleted: false,
 786 | 							status: "COMPLETED",
 787 | 							appointmentDate: {
 788 | 								gte: startDate,
 789 | 								lte: endDate
 790 | 							}
 791 | 						}
 792 | 					}
 793 | 				}
 794 | 			});
 795 | 
 796 | 			const report = {
 797 | 				period: { startDate, endDate },
 798 | 				totalRevenue: 0,
 799 | 				services: [] as Array<{
 800 | 					id: string;
 801 | 					name: string;
 802 | 					category: string | null;
 803 | 					appointmentCount: number;
 804 | 					revenue: number;
 805 | 					averagePrice: number;
 806 | 				}>
 807 | 			};
 808 | 
 809 | 			for (const service of services) {
 810 | 				const appointmentCount = service.appointments.length;
 811 | 				const revenue = appointmentCount * (service.price ?? 0);
 812 | 				report.totalRevenue += revenue;
 813 | 				report.services.push({
 814 | 					id: service.id,
 815 | 					name: service.serviceName,
 816 | 					category: service.category,
 817 | 					appointmentCount,
 818 | 					revenue,
 819 | 					averagePrice: service.price ?? 0
 820 | 				});
 821 | 			}
 822 | 
 823 | 			return report;
 824 | 		} catch (error) {
 825 | 			console.error("Error getting service revenue report:", error);
 826 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get service revenue report");
 827 | 		}
 828 | 	});
 829 | 
 830 | export const canDeleteService = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 831 | 	.validator(serviceIdSchema)
 832 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 833 | 		try {
 834 | 			const { serviceId } = ctx.data;
 835 | 			const service = await db.query.service.findFirst({
 836 | 				where: { id: serviceId },
 837 | 				with: {
 838 | 					appointments: {
 839 | 						where: {
 840 | 							isDeleted: false,
 841 | 							status: { notIn: ["CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"] }
 842 | 						},
 843 | 						limit: 1
 844 | 					},
 845 | 					labTests: {
 846 | 						limit: 1
 847 | 					}
 848 | 				}
 849 | 			});
 850 | 
 851 | 			if (!service) {
 852 | 				return { canDelete: false, reason: "Service not found" };
 853 | 			}
 854 | 
 855 | 			if (service.appointments.length > 0) {
 856 | 				return { canDelete: false, reason: "Service has upcoming appointments" };
 857 | 			}
 858 | 
 859 | 			if (service.labTests.length > 0) {
 860 | 				return { canDelete: false, reason: "Service has associated lab tests" };
 861 | 			}
 862 | 
 863 | 			return { canDelete: true };
 864 | 		} catch (error) {
 865 | 			console.error("Error checking if service can be deleted:", error);
 866 | 			throw new Error("Failed to check service deletion eligibility");
 867 | 		}
 868 | 	});

 870 | export const getServiceUsageTrends = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 871 | 	.validator(serviceUsageSchema)
 872 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 873 | 		try {
 874 | 			const { clinicId, serviceId, months } = ctx.data;
 875 | 			const trends = [];
 876 | 			const now = new Date();
 877 | 
 878 | 			const service = await getServiceById({ data: { serviceId, clinicId } });
 879 | 
 880 | 			for (let i = months - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
 881 | 				const startDate = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth() - i, 1);
 882 | 				const endDate = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth() - i + 1, 0);
 883 | 
 884 | 				const appointments = await db.query.appointment.findMany({
 885 | 					where: {
 886 | 						clinicId,
 887 | 						serviceId,
 888 | 						isDeleted: false,
 889 | 						status: "COMPLETED",
 890 | 						appointmentDate: {
 891 | 							gte: startDate,
 892 | 							lte: endDate
 893 | 						}
 894 | 					}
 895 | 				});
 896 | 
 897 | 				trends.push({
 898 | 					month: startDate.toLocaleString("default", {
 899 | 						month: "long",
 900 | 						year: "numeric"
 901 | 					}),
 902 | 					appointmentCount: appointments.length,
 903 | 					revenue: appointments.length * (service?.price ?? 0)
 904 | 				});
 905 | 			}
 906 | 
 907 | 			return trends;
 908 | 		} catch (error) {
 909 | 			console.error("Error getting service usage trends:", error);
 910 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get service usage trends");
 911 | 		}
 912 | 	});

 915 | // Doctor Performance

 917 | 
 918 | export const getDoctorPerformanceReport = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 919 | 	.validator(doctorPerformanceSchema)
 920 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 921 | 		try {
 922 | 			const { clinicId, startDate, endDate } = ctx.data;
 923 | 			const doctors = await db.query.doctor.findMany({
 924 | 				where: {
 925 | 					clinicId,
 926 | 					isDeleted: false
 927 | 				},
 928 | 				with: {
 929 | 					appointments: {
 930 | 						where: {
 931 | 							appointmentDate: {
 932 | 								gte: startDate,
 933 | 								lte: endDate
 934 | 							},
 935 | 							isDeleted: false
 936 | 						}
 937 | 					},
 938 | 					ratings: {
 939 | 						where: {
 940 | 							createdAt: {
 941 | 								gte: startDate,
 942 | 								lte: endDate
 943 | 							}
 944 | 						}
 945 | 					},
 946 | 					prescriptions: {
 947 | 						where: {
 948 | 							issuedDate: {
 949 | 								gte: startDate,
 950 | 								lte: endDate
 951 | 							}
 952 | 						}
 953 | 					}
 954 | 				}
 955 | 			});
 956 | 
 957 | 			return doctors.map(doctor => {
 958 | 				const completedAppointments = doctor.appointments.filter(a => a.status === "COMPLETED");
 959 | 				const cancelledAppointments = doctor.appointments.filter(a => a.status === "CANCELLED");
 960 | 				const averageRating =
 961 | 					doctor.ratings.length > 0
 962 | 						? doctor.ratings.reduce((sum, r) => sum + (r.rating ?? 0), 0) / doctor.ratings.length
 963 | 						: 0;
 964 | 
 965 | 				return {
 966 | 					id: doctor.id,
 967 | 					name: doctor.name,
 968 | 					specialty: doctor.specialty,
 969 | 					totalAppointments: doctor.appointments.length,
 970 | 					completedAppointments: completedAppointments.length,
 971 | 					cancelledAppointments: cancelledAppointments.length,
 972 | 					completionRate:
 973 | 						doctor.appointments.length > 0
 974 | 							? (completedAppointments.length / doctor.appointments.length) * 100
 975 | 							: 0,
 976 | 					totalPrescriptions: doctor.prescriptions.length,
 977 | 					averageRating,
 978 | 					revenue: completedAppointments.reduce((sum, a) => sum + (a.appointmentPrice ?? 0), 0)
 979 | 				};
 980 | 			});
 981 | 		} catch (error) {
 982 | 			console.error("Error getting doctor performance report:", error);
 983 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get doctor performance report");
 984 | 		}
 985 | 	});

 991 | export const createService = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 992 | 	.validator(serviceCreateSchema)
 993 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 994 | 		try {
 995 | 			const data = ctx.data;
 996 | 			const [result] = await db
 997 | 				.insert(schema.service)
 998 | 				.values({
 999 | 					...data,
1000 | 					id: data.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
1001 | 					createdAt: new Date(),
1002 | 					updatedAt: new Date(),
1003 | 					isDeleted: false
1004 | 				})
1005 | 				.returning();
1006 | 			return result;
1007 | 		} catch (error) {
1008 | 			console.error("Error creating service:", error);
1009 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create service");
1010 | 		}
1011 | 	});

1077 | export const createServiceWithCategory = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1078 | 	.validator(z.object({ data: serviceCreateSchema, categoryId: z.string().optional() }))
1079 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1080 | 		try {
1081 | 			const { data } = ctx.data;
1082 | 			return await db.transaction(async tx => {
1083 | 				// Check if service with same name exists in clinic
1084 | 				const existing = await tx.query.service.findFirst({
1085 | 					where: {
1086 | 						clinicId: data.clinicId,
1087 | 						serviceName: data.serviceName,
1088 | 						isDeleted: false
1089 | 					}
1090 | 				});
1091 | 
1092 | 				if (existing) {
1093 | 					throw new Error("Service with this name already exists in the clinic");
1094 | 				}
1095 | 
1096 | 				// Create service
1097 | 				const [service] = await tx
1098 | 					.insert(schema.service)
1099 | 					.values({
1100 | 						...data,
1101 | 						id: data.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
1102 | 						isAvailable: data.isAvailable ?? true,
1103 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
1104 | 						updatedAt: new Date(),
1105 | 						isDeleted: false
1106 | 					})
1107 | 					.returning();
1108 | 
1109 | 				// If category is provided, you could link it to a category table here
1110 | 				// This would require a service_categories table
1111 | 
1112 | 				return service;
1113 | 			});
1114 | 		} catch (error) {
1115 | 			console.error("Error creating service with category:", error);
1116 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create service with category");
1117 | 		}
1118 | 	});
1119 | 
1120 | export const cloneService = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1121 | 	.validator(cloneServiceSchema)
1122 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1123 | 		try {
1124 | 			const { serviceId, newClinicId } = ctx.data;
1125 | 			return await db.transaction(async tx => {
1126 | 				const originalService = await tx.query.service.findFirst({
1127 | 					where: { id: serviceId, isDeleted: false }
1128 | 				});
1129 | 
1130 | 				if (!originalService) {
1131 | 					throw new Error("Original service not found");
1132 | 				}
1133 | 
1134 | 				// Clone service with new ID
1135 | 				const [clonedService] = await tx
1136 | 					.insert(schema.service)
1137 | 					.values({
1138 | 						...originalService,
1139 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1140 | 						clinicId: newClinicId ?? originalService.clinicId,
1141 | 						serviceName: `${originalService.serviceName} (Copy)`,
1142 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
1143 | 						updatedAt: new Date(),
1144 | 						deletedAt: null,
1145 | 						isDeleted: false
1146 | 					})
1147 | 					.returning();
1148 | 
1149 | 				return clonedService;
1150 | 			});
1151 | 		} catch (error) {
1152 | 			console.error("Error cloning service:", error);
1153 | 			throw new Error("Failed to clone service");
1154 | 		}
1155 | 	});
1156 | 
1157 | export const batchUpdateServicePrices = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1158 | 	.validator(batchPriceSchema)
1159 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1160 | 		try {
1161 | 			const { updates } = ctx.data;
1162 | 			return await db.transaction(async tx => {
1163 | 				const results = [];
1164 | 				for (const update of updates) {
1165 | 					const [updated] = await tx
1166 | 						.update(schema.service)
1167 | 						.set({
1168 | 							price: update.price,
1169 | 							updatedAt: new Date()
1170 | 						})
1171 | 						.where(eq(schema.service.id, update.id))
1172 | 						.returning();
1173 | 					results.push(updated);
1174 | 				}
1175 | 				return results;
1176 | 			});
1177 | 		} catch (error) {
1178 | 			console.error("Error batch updating service prices:", error);
1179 | 			throw new Error("Failed to batch update service prices");
1180 | 		}
1181 | 	});
1182 | 
1183 | // =======================
1184 | // Rating Management
1185 | // =======================
1186 | 
1187 | export const createRating = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1188 | 	.validator(ratingSchema)
1189 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1190 | 		try {
1191 | 			const data = ctx.data;
1192 | 			const [result] = await db
1193 | 				.insert(schema.rating)
1194 | 				.values({
1195 | 					...data,
1196 | 					createdAt: new Date(),
1197 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
1198 | 				})
1199 | 				.returning();
1200 | 			return result;
1201 | 		} catch (error) {
1202 | 			console.error("Error creating rating:", error);
1203 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create rating");
1204 | 		}
1205 | 	});
1206 | 
1207 | export const updateRating = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1208 | 	.validator(z.object({ id: z.string(), data: ratingSchema.partial() }))
1209 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1210 | 		try {
1211 | 			const { id, data } = ctx.data;
1212 | 			const [result] = await db
1213 | 				.update(schema.rating)
1214 | 				.set({ ...data, updatedAt: new Date() })
1215 | 				.where(eq(schema.rating.id, Number(id)))
1216 | 				.returning();
1217 | 			return result;
1218 | 		} catch (error) {
1219 | 			console.error("Error updating rating:", error);
1220 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update rating");
1221 | 		}
1222 | 	});
1223 | 
1224 | export const deleteRating = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1225 | 	.validator(ratingIdSchema)
1226 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1227 | 		try {
1228 | 			const { id } = ctx.data;
1229 | 			const [result] = await db
1230 | 				.delete(schema.rating)
1231 | 				.where(eq(schema.rating.id, Number(id)))
1232 | 				.returning();
1233 | 			return result;
1234 | 		} catch (error) {
1235 | 			console.error("Error deleting rating:", error);
1236 | 			throw new Error("Failed to delete rating");
1237 | 		}
1238 | 	});

```
