```ts
 133 | export const getDoctorById = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 134 | 	.validator(doctorIdSchema)
 135 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 136 | 		try {
 137 | 			const { doctorId, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 138 | 			const conditions = {
 139 | 				id: doctorId,
 140 | 				clinicId,
 141 | 				isDeleted: false
 142 | 			};
 143 | 			if (clinicId) conditions.clinicId = clinicId;
 144 | 
 145 | 			return await db.query.doctor.findFirst({
 146 | 				where: conditions,
 147 | 				with: {
 148 | 					user: true,
 149 | 					clinic: true,
 150 | 					workingDays: true
 151 | 				}
 152 | 			});
 153 | 		} catch (error) {
 154 | 			console.error("Error getting doctor by ID:", error);
 155 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get doctor");
 156 | 		}
 157 | 	});
 158 | 
 159 | export const getDoctorByUserId = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 160 | 	.validator(doctorUserIdSchema)
 161 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 162 | 		try {
 163 | 			const { userId, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 164 | 			const conditions = { userId, isDeleted: false, clinicId };
 165 | 			if (clinicId) conditions.clinicId = clinicId;
 166 | 
 167 | 			return await db.query.doctor.findFirst({
 168 | 				where: conditions,
 169 | 				with: { user: true, clinic: true }
 170 | 			});
 171 | 		} catch (error) {
 172 | 			console.error("Error getting doctor by user ID:", error);
 173 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get doctor");
 174 | 		}
 175 | 	});
 176 | 
 177 | export const listDoctors = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 178 | 	.validator(listDoctorsSchema)
 179 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 180 | 		try {
 181 | 			const { clinicId, limit, offset, search, specialty, status, availabilityStatus } = ctx.data;
 182 | 
 183 | 			let conditions = and(eq(schema.doctor.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.doctor.isDeleted, false));
 184 | 
 185 | 			if (specialty) {
 186 | 				conditions = and(conditions, eq(schema.doctor.specialty, specialty));
 187 | 			}
 188 | 			if (status) {
 189 | 				conditions = and(conditions, eq(schema.doctor.status, status));
 190 | 			}
 191 | 			if (availabilityStatus) {
 192 | 				conditions = and(conditions, eq(schema.doctor.availabilityStatus, availabilityStatus));
 193 | 			}
 194 | 			if (search) {
 195 | 				conditions = and(
 196 | 					conditions,
 197 | 					or(like(schema.doctor.name, `%${search}%`), like(schema.doctor.specialty, `%${search}%`))
 198 | 				);
 199 | 			}
 200 | 
 201 | 			const [doctors, totalResult] = await Promise.all([
 202 | 				db.query.doctor.findMany({
 203 | 					where: {
 204 | 						clinicId,
 205 | 						isDeleted: false,
 206 | 						...conditions
 207 | 					},
 208 | 					limit,
 209 | 					offset,
 210 | 					orderBy: { name: "asc" }
 211 | 				}),
 212 | 				db.select({ count: count() }).from(schema.doctor).where(conditions)
 213 | 			]);
 214 | 
 215 | 			return {
 216 | 				doctors,
 217 | 				total: totalResult[0]?.count ?? 0
 218 | 			};
 219 | 		} catch (error) {
 220 | 			console.error("Error listing doctors:", error);
 221 | 			throw new Error("Failed to list doctors");
 222 | 		}
 223 | 	});
 224 |

 229 | export const createDoctor = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 230 | 	.validator(DoctorCreateSchema)
 231 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 232 | 		try {
 233 | 			const data = ctx.data;
 234 | 			const [result] = await db
 235 | 				.insert(schema.doctor)
 236 | 				.values({
 237 | 					...data,
 238 | 					id: (data.id ?? crypto.randomUUID()) as string,
 239 | 					createdAt: new Date(),
 240 | 					updatedAt: new Date(),
 241 | 					isDeleted: false
 242 | 				})
 243 | 				.returning();
 244 | 			return result;
 245 | 		} catch (error) {
 246 | 			console.error("Error creating doctor:", error);
 247 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create doctor");
 248 | 		}
 249 | 	});

 253 | 	.handler(async ctx => {

 259 | 				.where(eq(schema.doctor.id, id ?? ""))
 260 | 				.returning();
 261 | 			return result;
 262 | 		} catch (error) {

 264 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update doctor");
 265 | 		}

 293 | 				.where(inArray(schema.doctor.id, ids))

 301 | export const upsertDoctor = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 302 | 	.validator(DoctorCreateSchema)
 303 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 304 | 		try {
 305 | 			const data = ctx.data;
 306 | 			const [result] = await db
 307 | 				.insert(schema.doctor)
 308 | 				.values({
 309 | 					...data,
 310 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 311 | 				})
 312 | 				.onConflictDoUpdate({
 313 | 					target: schema.doctor.userId,
 314 | 					set: { ...data, updatedAt: new Date() }
 315 | 				})
 316 | 				.returning();
 317 | 			return result;
 318 | 		} catch (error) {
 319 | 			console.error("Error upserting doctor:", error);
 320 | 			throw new Error("Failed to upsert doctor");
 321 | 		}
 322 | 	});

 324 | export const softDeleteDoctor = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 325 | 	.validator(doctorIdSchema)
 326 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 327 | 		try {
 328 | 			const { doctorId, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 329 | 			const conditions = [eq(schema.doctor.id, doctorId)];
 330 | 			if (clinicId) conditions.push(eq(schema.doctor.clinicId, clinicId));
 331 | 
 332 | 			const [result] = await db
 333 | 				.update(schema.doctor)
 334 | 				.set({ deletedAt: new Date(), isDeleted: true, updatedAt: new Date() })
 335 | 				.where(and(...conditions))
 336 | 				.returning();
 337 | 			return result;
 338 | 		} catch (error) {
 339 | 			console.error("Error soft deleting doctor:", error);
 340 | 			throw new Error("Failed to delete doctor");
 341 | 		}
 342 | 	});

 344 | export const deleteDoctor = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 345 | 	.validator(doctorIdSchema)
 346 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 347 | 		try {
 348 | 			const { doctorId, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 349 | 			const conditions = [eq(schema.doctor.id, doctorId)];
 350 | 			if (clinicId) conditions.push(eq(schema.doctor.clinicId, clinicId));
 351 | 
 352 | 			const [result] = await db
 353 | 				.delete(schema.doctor)
 354 | 				.where(and(...conditions))
 355 | 				.returning();
 356 | 			return result;
 357 | 		} catch (error) {
 358 | 			console.error("Error deleting doctor:", error);
 359 | 			throw new Error("Failed to delete doctor");

 469 | export const deleteWorkingDay = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 470 | 	.validator(workingDayIdSchema)
 471 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 472 | 		try {
 473 | 			const { id, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 474 | 
 475 | 			if (clinicId) {
 476 | 				// Get doctors in the clinic first
 477 | 				const clinicDoctors = await db
 478 | 					.select({ id: schema.doctor.id })
 479 | 					.from(schema.doctor)
 480 | 					.where(eq(schema.doctor.clinicId, clinicId));
 481 | 
 482 | 				const doctorIds = clinicDoctors.map(d => d.id);
 483 | 
 484 | 				const [result] = await db
 485 | 					.delete(schema.workingDay)
 486 | 					.where(and(eq(schema.workingDay.id, id), inArray(schema.workingDay.doctorId, doctorIds)))
 487 | 					.returning();
 488 | 				return result;
 489 | 			}
 490 | 
 491 | 			const [result] = await db.delete(schema.workingDay).where(eq(schema.workingDay.id, id)).returning();
 492 | 			return result;
 493 | 		} catch (error) {
 494 | 			console.error("Error deleting working day:", error);
 495 | 			throw new Error("Failed to delete working day");
 496 | 		}
 497 | 	});
 498 | 
 499 | export const replaceWorkingDays = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 500 | 	.validator(z.object({ doctorId: z.string(), workingDays: z.array(WorkingDaySchema) }))
 501 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 502 | 		try {
 503 | 			const { doctorId, workingDays } = ctx.data;
 504 | 			return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 505 | 				await tx.delete(schema.workingDay).where(eq(schema.workingDay.doctorId, doctorId));
 506 | 				if (workingDays.length > 0) {
 507 | 					const workingDaysWithIds = workingDays.map(day => ({
 508 | 						...day,
 509 | 						id: day.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
 510 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
 511 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 512 | 					}));
 513 | 					await tx.insert(schema.workingDay).values(workingDaysWithIds);
 514 | 				}
 515 | 			});
 516 | 		} catch (error) {
 517 | 			console.error("Error replacing working days:", error);
 518 | 			throw new Error("Failed to replace working days");
 519 | 		}
 520 | 	});
 521 | 
 522 | export const createManyWorkingDays = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 523 | 	.validator(z.object({ workingDays: z.array(WorkingDaySchema) }))
 524 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 525 | 		try {
 526 | 			const { workingDays } = ctx.data;
 527 | 			const workingDaysWithIds = workingDays.map(day => ({
 528 | 				...day,
 529 | 				id: day.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
 530 | 				createdAt: new Date(),
 531 | 				updatedAt: new Date()
 532 | 			}));
 533 | 			return await db.insert(schema.workingDay).values(workingDaysWithIds).returning();
 534 | 		} catch (error) {
 535 | 			console.error("Error creating many working days:", error);
 536 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create working days");
 537 | 		}
 538 | 	});
 539 | 
 540 | export const updateManyWorkingDays = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 541 | 	.validator(workingDayBulkSchema)
 542 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 543 | 		try {
 544 | 			const { ids, data } = ctx.data;
 545 | 			const updateData = { ...data, updatedAt: new Date() };
 546 | 			return await db
 547 | 				.update(schema.workingDay)
 548 | 				.set(updateData)
 549 | 				.where(inArray(schema.workingDay.id, ids))
 550 | 				.returning();
 551 | 		} catch (error) {
 552 | 			console.error("Error updating many working days:", error);
 553 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update working days");
 554 | 		}
 555 | 	});
 556 | 
 557 | // =======================
 558 | // Doctor Performance
 559 | // =======================
 560 | 
 561 | export const getDoctorPerformance = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 562 | 	.validator(doctorPerformanceSchema)
 563 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 564 | 		try {
 565 | 			const { doctorId, startDate, endDate, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 566 | 
 567 | 			const [appointments, ratings, prescriptions] = await Promise.all([
 568 | 				db.query.appointment.findMany({
 569 | 					where: {
 570 | 						doctorId,
 571 | 						isDeleted: false,
 572 | 						...(clinicId && { clinicId }),
 573 | 						appointmentDate: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate }
 574 | 					}
 575 | 				}),
 576 | 				db.query.rating.findMany({
 577 | 					where: {
 578 | 						staffId: doctorId,
 579 | 						createdAt: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate }
 580 | 					}
 581 | 				}),
 582 | 				db.query.prescription.findMany({
 583 | 					where: {
 584 | 						doctorId,
 585 | 						issuedDate: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate }
 586 | 					}
 587 | 				})
 588 | 			]);
 589 | 
 590 | 			const completedAppointments = appointments.filter(a => a.status === "COMPLETED");
 591 | 			const cancelledAppointments = appointments.filter(a => a.status === "CANCELLED");
 592 | 			const averageRating =
 593 | 				ratings.length > 0 ? ratings.reduce((sum, r) => sum + (r.rating ?? 0), 0) / ratings.length : 0;
 594 | 
 595 | 			return {
 596 | 				totalAppointments: appointments.length,
 597 | 				completedAppointments: completedAppointments.length,
 598 | 				cancelledAppointments: cancelledAppointments.length,
 599 | 				completionRate:
 600 | 					appointments.length > 0 ? (completedAppointments.length / appointments.length) * 100 : 0,
 601 | 				totalPrescriptions: prescriptions.length,
 602 | 				averageRating,
 603 | 				totalRevenue: completedAppointments.reduce((sum, a) => sum + (a.appointmentPrice ?? 0), 0)
 604 | 			};
 605 | 		} catch (error) {
 606 | 			console.error("Error getting doctor performance:", error);
 607 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get doctor performance");
 608 | 		}
 609 | 	});
 610 | 
 611 | // =======================
 612 | // Doctor Availability & Schedule
 613 | // =======================
 614 | 
 615 | export const getDoctorAvailability = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 616 | 	.validator(doctorAvailabilitySchema)
 617 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 618 | 		try {
 619 | 			const { doctorId, date } = ctx.data;
 620 | 
 621 | 			const startOfDay = new Date(date);
 622 | 			startOfDay.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
 623 | 
 624 | 			const endOfDay = new Date(date);
 625 | 			endOfDay.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
 626 | 
 627 | 			const [workingDays, appointments] = await Promise.all([
 628 | 				db.query.workingDay.findMany({
 629 | 					where: { doctorId }
 630 | 				}),
 631 | 				db.query.appointment.findMany({
 632 | 					where: {
 633 | 						doctorId,
 634 | 						appointmentDate: {
 635 | 							gte: startOfDay,
 636 | 							lte: endOfDay
 637 | 						},
 638 | 						isDeleted: false
 639 | 					}
 640 | 				})
 641 | 			]);
 642 | 
 643 | 			return { workingDays, appointments };
 644 | 		} catch (error) {
 645 | 			console.error("Error getting doctor availability:", error);
 646 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get doctor availability");
 647 | 		}
 648 | 	});
 649 | 
 650 | export const getDoctorWithSchedule = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 651 | 	.validator(doctorScheduleSchema)
 652 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 653 | 		try {
 654 | 			const { doctorId, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 655 | 			const whereCondition = { id: doctorId, clinicId };
 656 | 			if (clinicId) whereCondition.clinicId = clinicId;
 657 | 
 658 | 			return await db.query.doctor.findFirst({
 659 | 				where: whereCondition,
 660 | 				with: {
 661 | 					user: true,
 662 | 					clinic: true,
 663 | 					workingDays: true,
 664 | 					appointments: {
 665 | 						where: {
 666 | 							isDeleted: false,
 667 | 							appointmentDate: { gte: new Date() }
 668 | 						},
 669 | 						with: {
 670 | 							patient: true,
 671 | 							service: true
 672 | 						},
 673 | 						orderBy: { appointmentDate: "asc" }
 674 | 					},
 675 | 					medicalRecords: {
 676 | 						with: {
 677 | 							patient: true
 678 | 						},
 679 | 						orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
 680 | 						limit: 20
 681 | 					},
 682 | 					prescriptions: {
 683 | 						where: { status: "active" },
 684 | 						with: {
 685 | 							patient: true,
 686 | 							prescribedItems: {
 687 | 								with: {
 688 | 									drug: true
 689 | 								}
 690 | 							}
 691 | 						},
 692 | 						orderBy: { issuedDate: "desc" }
 693 | 					}
 694 | 				}
 695 | 			});
 696 | 		} catch (error) {
 697 | 			console.error("Error getting doctor with schedule:", error);
 698 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get doctor schedule");
 699 | 		}
 700 | 	});
 701 | 
 702 | export const getAvailableTimeSlots = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 703 | 	.validator(timeSlotsSchema)
 704 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 705 | 		try {
 706 | 			const { doctorId, date, durationMinutes } = ctx.data;
 707 | 			const dayOfWeek = date.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { weekday: "long" }).toUpperCase();
 708 | 
 709 | 			const workingDay = await db.query.workingDay.findFirst({
 710 | 				where: {
 711 | 					doctorId: doctorId,
 712 | 					day: dayOfWeek as Weekday
 713 | 				}
 714 | 			});
 715 | 
 716 | 			if (!workingDay) {
 717 | 				return [];
 718 | 			}
 719 | 
 720 | 			const startOfDay = new Date(date);
 721 | 			startOfDay.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
 722 | 
 723 | 			const endOfDay = new Date(date);
 724 | 			endOfDay.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
 725 | 
 726 | 			const appointments = await db.query.appointment.findMany({
 727 | 				where: {
 728 | 					doctorId,
 729 | 					appointmentDate: {
 730 | 						gte: startOfDay,
 731 | 						lte: endOfDay
 732 | 					},
 733 | 					isDeleted: false,
 734 | 					status: {
 735 | 						notIn: ["CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"]
 736 | 					}
 737 | 				}
 738 | 			});
 739 | 
 740 | 			// Generate time slots
 741 | 			const startHour = Number.parseInt(workingDay.startTime.split(":")[0] ?? "0", 10);
 742 | 			const startMinute = Number.parseInt(workingDay.startTime.split(":")[1] ?? "0", 10);
 743 | 			const endHour = Number.parseInt(workingDay.endTime.split(":")[0] ?? "0", 10);
 744 | 			const endMinute = Number.parseInt(workingDay.endTime.split(":")[1] ?? "0", 10);
 745 | 
 746 | 			const slots = [];
 747 | 			const currentTime = new Date(date);
 748 | 			currentTime.setHours(startHour, startMinute, 0, 0);
 749 | 			const endTime = new Date(date);
 750 | 			endTime.setHours(endHour, endMinute, 0, 0);
 751 | 
 752 | 			while (currentTime < endTime) {
 753 | 				const slotEnd = new Date(currentTime);
 754 | 				slotEnd.setMinutes(slotEnd.getMinutes() + durationMinutes);
 755 | 
 756 | 				// Check if slot is available
 757 | 				const isBooked = appointments.some(apt => {
 758 | 					const aptTime = new Date(apt.appointmentDate);
 759 | 					return (
 760 | 						aptTime.getHours() === currentTime.getHours() &&
 761 | 						aptTime.getMinutes() === currentTime.getMinutes()
 762 | 					);
 763 | 				});
 764 | 
 765 | 				if (!isBooked) {
 766 | 					slots.push({
 767 | 						startTime: currentTime.toLocaleTimeString(),
 768 | 						endTime: slotEnd.toLocaleTimeString(),
 769 | 						available: true
 770 | 					});
 771 | 				}
 772 | 
 773 | 				currentTime.setMinutes(currentTime.getMinutes() + durationMinutes);
 774 | 			}
 775 | 
 776 | 			return slots;
 777 | 		} catch (error) {
 778 | 			console.error("Error getting available time slots:", error);
 779 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get available time slots");
 780 | 		}
 781 | 	});
 782 | 
 783 | export const updateDoctorSchedule = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 784 | 	.validator(updateScheduleSchema)
 785 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 786 | 		try {
 787 | 			const { doctorId, workingDays } = ctx.data;
 788 | 
 789 | 			await db.transaction(async tx => {
 790 | 				await tx.delete(schema.workingDay).where(eq(schema.workingDay.doctorId, doctorId));
 791 | 
 792 | 				for (const day of workingDays) {
 793 | 					await tx.insert(schema.workingDay).values({
 794 | 						...day,
 795 | 						doctorId,
 796 | 						id: day.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
 797 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
 798 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 799 | 					});
 800 | 				}
 801 | 			});
 802 | 
 803 | 			return { success: true };
 804 | 		} catch (error) {
 805 | 			console.error("Error updating doctor schedule:", error);
 806 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update doctor schedule");
 807 | 		}
 808 | 	});

```

`functions/labs.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/repo/labs.repo.ts
   2 | 
   3 | import { db } from "@clinic/db";
   4 | import * as schema from "@clinic/db/schema";
   5 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   6 | import { eq, inArray } from "drizzle-orm";
   7 | import z from "zod";
   8 | 
   9 | // =======================
  10 | // Schema Validators
  11 | // =======================
  12 | 
  13 | const clinicIdSchema = z.object({ clinicId: z.string().min(1) });
  14 | const patientIdSchema = z.object({ patientId: z.string().min(1) });
  15 | const labTestIdSchema = z.object({ labTestId: z.string().min(1) });
  16 | const patientLabTestsSchema = z.object({
  17 | 	patientId: z.string(),
  18 | 	status: z.enum(["PENDING", "IN_PROGRESS", "COMPLETED", "CANCELLED"]).optional()
  19 | });
  20 | const updateResultsSchema = z.object({
  21 | 	labTestId: z.string(),
  22 | 	result: z.string(),
  23 | 	status: z.enum(["PENDING", "IN_PROGRESS", "COMPLETED", "CANCELLED"])
  24 | });
  25 | const createLabTestSchema = z.object({
  26 | 	id: z.string().optional(),
  27 | 	diagnosisId: z.string().optional(),
  28 | 	patientId: z.string(),
  29 | 	recordId: z.string(),
  30 | 	serviceId: z.string(),
  31 | 	testDate: z.date(),
  32 | 	result: z.string().default(""),
  33 | 	status: z.enum(["PENDING", "IN_PROGRESS", "COMPLETED", "CANCELLED"]).default("PENDING"),
  34 | 	notes: z.string().optional()
  35 | });
  36 | const updateLabTestSchema = z.object({
  37 | 	id: z.string(),
  38 | 	data: z.object({
  39 | 		diagnosisId: z.string().optional(),
  40 | 		result: z.string().optional(),
  41 | 		status: z.enum(["PENDING", "IN_PROGRESS", "COMPLETED", "CANCELLED"]).optional(),
  42 | 		notes: z.string().optional(),
  43 | 		testDate: z.date().optional()
  44 | 	})
  45 | });
  46 | 
  47 | // =======================
  48 | // Lab Test Queries
  49 | // =======================
  50 | 
  51 | export const getPendingByClinicId = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
  52 | 	.validator(clinicIdSchema)
  53 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
  54 | 		try {
  55 | 			const { clinicId } = ctx.data;
  56 | 
  57 | 			// First get patients in the clinic
  58 | 			const patients = await db.query.patient.findMany({
  59 | 				where: { clinicId, isDeleted: false },
  60 | 				columns: { id: true }
  61 | 			});
  62 | 
  63 | 			const patientIds = patients.map(p => p.id);
  64 | 
  65 | 			if (patientIds.length === 0) {
  66 | 				return [];
  67 | 			}
  68 | 
  69 | 			return await db.query.labTest.findMany({
  70 | 				where: {
  71 | 					status: "PENDING",
  72 | 					patientId: {
  73 | 						arrayContains: patientIds // Use object syntax for inArray
  74 | 					}
  75 | 				},
  76 | 				with: {
  77 | 					patient: true,
  78 | 					service: true
  79 | 				},
  80 | 				orderBy: { testDate: "asc" }
  81 | 			});
  82 | 		} catch (error) {
  83 | 			console.error("Error getting pending lab tests by clinic:", error);
  84 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get pending lab tests");
  85 | 		}
  86 | 	});
  87 | 
  88 | export const getByPatientId = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
  89 | 	.validator(patientIdSchema)
  90 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
  91 | 		try {
  92 | 			const { patientId } = ctx.data;
  93 | 			return await db.query.labTest.findMany({
  94 | 				where: { patientId },
  95 | 				with: {
  96 | 					service: true
  97 | 				},
  98 | 				orderBy: { testDate: "desc" }
  99 | 			});
 100 | 		} catch (error) {
 101 | 			console.error("Error getting lab tests by patient:", error);
 102 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get lab tests");
 103 | 		}
 104 | 	});
 105 | 
 106 | export const getPatientLabTests = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 107 | 	.validator(patientLabTestsSchema)
 108 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 109 | 		try {
 110 | 			const { patientId, status } = ctx.data;
 111 | 
 112 | 			const whereClause: Record<string, unknown> = { patientId };
 113 | 			if (status) {
 114 | 				whereClause.status = status;
 115 | 			}
 116 | 
 117 | 			return await db.query.labTest.findMany({
 118 | 				where: whereClause,

 152 | export const updateLabTestResults = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 153 | 	.validator(updateResultsSchema)
 154 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 155 | 		try {
 156 | 			const { labTestId, result, status } = ctx.data;
 157 | 
 158 | 			const [updatedLabTest] = await db
 159 | 				.update(schema.labTest)
 160 | 				.set({
 161 | 					result,
 162 | 					status,
 163 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 164 | 				})
 165 | 				.where(eq(schema.labTest.id, labTestId))
 166 | 				.returning();
 167 | 
 168 | 			if (!updatedLabTest) {
 169 | 				throw new Error("Lab test not found");
 170 | 			}
 171 | 
 172 | 			return updatedLabTest;
 173 | 		} catch (error) {

 175 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update lab test results");
 176 | 		}

 179 | export const getPendingLabTests = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(async () => {
 180 | 	try {
 181 | 		return await db.query.labTest.findMany({
 182 | 			where: {
 183 | 				status: "PENDING"
 184 | 			},
 185 | 			with: {
 186 | 				patient: true,
 187 | 				service: true
 188 | 			},
 189 | 			orderBy: { testDate: "asc" }
 190 | 		});
 191 | 	} catch (error) {
 192 | 		console.error("Error getting pending lab tests:", error);
 193 | 		throw new Error("Failed to get pending lab tests");
 194 | 	}
 195 | });
 196 | 
 197 | // =======================
 198 | // Lab Test Statistics
 199 | // =======================
 200 | 
 201 | export const getLabTestStatistics = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 202 | 	.validator(clinicIdSchema)
 203 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 204 | 		try {
 205 | 			const { clinicId } = ctx.data;
 206 | 
 207 | 			// Get patients in the clinic
 208 | 			const patients = await db.query.patient.findMany({
 209 | 				where: { clinicId, isDeleted: false },
 210 | 				columns: { id: true }
 211 | 			});
 212 | 
 213 | 			const patientIds = patients.map(p => p.id);
 214 | 
 215 | 			if (patientIds.length === 0) {
 216 | 				return {
 217 | 					total: 0,
 218 | 					pending: 0,
 219 | 					inProgress: 0,
 220 | 					completed: 0,
 221 | 					cancelled: 0,
 222 | 					byMonth: []
 223 | 				};
 224 | 			}
 225 | 
 226 | 			// Get all lab tests for the clinic
 227 | 			const labTests = await db.query.labTest.findMany({
 228 | 				where: {
 229 | 					patientId: {
 230 | 						arrayContains: patientIds
 231 | 					}
 232 | 				}
 233 | 			});
 234 | 
 235 | 			const total = labTests.length;
 236 | 			const pending = labTests.filter(lt => lt.status === "PENDING").length;
 237 | 			const inProgress = labTests.filter(lt => lt.status === "IN_PROGRESS").length;
 238 | 			const completed = labTests.filter(lt => lt.status === "COMPLETED").length;
 239 | 			const cancelled = labTests.filter(lt => lt.status === "CANCELLED").length;
 240 | 
 241 | 			// Group by month
 242 | 			const byMonthMap = new Map();
 243 | 			labTests.forEach(lt => {
 244 | 				const monthKey = lt.testDate
 245 | 					? new Date(lt.testDate).toLocaleString("default", { month: "long", year: "numeric" })
 246 | 					: "Unknown";
 247 | 				if (!byMonthMap.has(monthKey)) {
 248 | 					byMonthMap.set(monthKey, { month: monthKey, count: 0 });
 249 | 				}
 250 | 				byMonthMap.get(monthKey).count++;
 251 | 			});
 252 | 
 253 | 			const byMonth = Array.from(byMonthMap.values());
 254 | 
 255 | 			return {
 256 | 				total,
 257 | 				pending,
 258 | 				inProgress,
 259 | 				completed,
 260 | 				cancelled,
 261 | 				byMonth
 262 | 			};
 263 | 		} catch (error) {
 264 | 			console.error("Error getting lab test statistics:", error);
 265 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get lab test statistics");
 266 | 		}
 267 | 	});
 268 | 
 269 | // =======================
 270 | // Lab Test CRUD Operations
 271 | // =======================
 272 | 
 273 | export const createLabTest = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 274 | 	.validator(createLabTestSchema)
 275 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 276 | 		try {
 277 | 			const data = ctx.data;
 278 | 
 279 | 			const [result] = await db
 280 | 				.insert(schema.labTest)
 281 | 				.values({
 282 | 					id: data.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
 283 | 					diagnosisId: data.diagnosisId,
 284 | 					patientId: data.patientId,
 285 | 					recordId: data.recordId,
 286 | 					serviceId: data.serviceId,
 287 | 					testDate: data.testDate,
 288 | 					result: data.result,
 289 | 					status: data.status,
 290 | 					notes: data.notes,
 291 | 					createdAt: new Date(),
 292 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 293 | 				})
 294 | 				.returning();
 295 | 
 296 | 			return result;
 297 | 		} catch (error) {
 298 | 			console.error("Error creating lab test:", error);
 299 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create lab test");
 300 | 		}
 301 | 	});
 302 | 
 303 | export const createManyLabTests = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 304 | 	.validator(z.object({ labTests: z.array(createLabTestSchema) }))
 305 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 306 | 		try {
 307 | 			const { labTests } = ctx.data;
 308 | 
 309 | 			const labTestsWithIds = labTests.map(lt => ({
 310 | 				id: lt.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
 311 | 				diagnosisId: lt.diagnosisId,
 312 | 				patientId: lt.patientId,
 313 | 				recordId: lt.recordId,
 314 | 				serviceId: lt.serviceId,
 315 | 				testDate: lt.testDate,
 316 | 				result: lt.result,
 317 | 				status: lt.status,
 318 | 				notes: lt.notes,
 319 | 				createdAt: new Date(),
 320 | 				updatedAt: new Date()
 321 | 			}));
 322 | 
 323 | 			return await db.insert(schema.labTest).values(labTestsWithIds).returning();
 324 | 		} catch (error) {
 325 | 			console.error("Error creating multiple lab tests:", error);
 326 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create lab tests");
 327 | 		}
 328 | 	});
 329 | 
 330 | export const updateLabTest = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 331 | 	.validator(updateLabTestSchema)
 332 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 333 | 		try {
 334 | 			const { id, data } = ctx.data;
 335 | 
 336 | 			const updateData = { ...data, updatedAt: new Date() };
 337 | 
 338 | 			const [result] = await db
 339 | 				.update(schema.labTest)
 340 | 				.set(updateData)
 341 | 				.where(eq(schema.labTest.id, id))
 342 | 				.returning();
 343 | 
 344 | 			if (!result) {
 345 | 				throw new Error("Lab test not found");
 346 | 			}
 347 | 
 348 | 			return result;
 349 | 		} catch (error) {
 350 | 			console.error("Error updating lab test:", error);
 351 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update lab test");
 352 | 		}
 353 | 	});
 354 | 
 355 | export const updateManyLabTests = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 356 | 	.validator(z.object({ ids: z.array(z.string()), data: updateLabTestSchema.shape.data }))
 357 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 358 | 		try {
 359 | 			const { ids, data } = ctx.data;
 360 | 
 361 | 			const updateData = { ...data, updatedAt: new Date() };
 362 | 
 363 | 			return await db.update(schema.labTest).set(updateData).where(inArray(schema.labTest.id, ids)).returning();
 364 | 		} catch (error) {
 365 | 			console.error("Error updating multiple lab tests:", error);
 366 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update lab tests");
 367 | 		}
 368 | 	});

 371 | 	.validator(labTestIdSchema)
 372 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 373 | 		try {
 374 | 			const { labTestId } = ctx.data;
 375 |

 377 |

 379 | 				throw new Error("Lab test not found");
 380 | 			}
 381 | 
 382 | 			return result;
 383 | 		} catch (error) {

 393 | export const bulkUpdateLabTestStatus = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 394 | 	.validator(
 395 | 		z.object({
 396 | 			labTestIds: z.array(z.string()),
 397 | 			status: z.enum(["PENDING", "IN_PROGRESS", "COMPLETED", "CANCELLED"])
 398 | 		})
 399 | 	)
 400 | 	.handler(async ctx => {

 403 |

 405 | 				.update(schema.labTest)

 408 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 409 | 				})

 418 | // =======================
 419 | // Lab Test Reports
 420 | // =======================
 421 | 
 422 | export const getLabTestReport = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 423 | 	.validator(
 424 | 		z.object({
 425 | 			clinicId: z.string(),
 426 | 			startDate: z.date(),
 427 | 			endDate: z.date()
 428 | 		})
 429 | 	)
 430 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 431 | 		try {
 432 | 			const { clinicId, startDate, endDate } = ctx.data;
 433 | 
 434 | 			// Get patients in the clinic
 435 | 			const patients = await db.query.patient.findMany({
 436 | 				where: { clinicId, isDeleted: false },
 437 | 				columns: { id: true }
 438 | 			});
 439 | 
 440 | 			const patientIds = patients.map(p => p.id);
 441 | 
 442 | 			if (patientIds.length === 0) {
 443 | 				return {
 444 | 					totalTests: 0,
 445 | 					completedTests: 0,
 446 | 					pendingTests: 0,
 447 | 					cancelledTests: 0,
 448 | 					testsByService: [],
 449 | 					averageTurnaroundTime: 0
 450 | 				};
 451 | 			}
 452 | 
 453 | 			// Get lab tests within date range
 454 | 			const labTests = await db.query.labTest.findMany({
 455 | 				where: {
 456 | 					patientId: {
 457 | 						arrayContains: patientIds
 458 | 					},
 459 | 					testDate: {
 460 | 						gte: startDate,
 461 | 						lte: endDate
 462 | 					}
 463 | 				},
 464 | 
 465 | 				// and(
 466 | 				// 	inArray(schema.labTest.patientId, patientIds),
 467 | 				// 	gte(schema.labTest.testDate, startDate),
 468 | 				// 	lte(schema.labTest.testDate, endDate)
 469 | 				// ),
 470 | 				orderBy: { testDate: "desc" },
 471 | 				with: {
 472 | 					service: true
 473 | 				}
 474 | 			});
 475 | 
 476 | 			const totalTests = labTests.length;
 477 | 			const completedTests = labTests.filter(lt => lt.status === "COMPLETED").length;
 478 | 			const pendingTests = labTests.filter(lt => lt.status === "PENDING").length;
 479 | 			const cancelledTests = labTests.filter(lt => lt.status === "CANCELLED").length;
 480 | 
 481 | 			// Group by service
 482 | 			const testsByServiceMap = new Map();
 483 | 			labTests.forEach(lt => {
 484 | 				const serviceName = lt.service?.serviceName || "Unknown";
 485 | 				if (!testsByServiceMap.has(serviceName)) {
 486 | 					testsByServiceMap.set(serviceName, {
 487 | 						serviceName,
 488 | 						count: 0,
 489 | 						completed: 0,
 490 | 						pending: 0
 491 | 					});
 492 | 				}
 493 | 				const serviceStats = testsByServiceMap.get(serviceName);
 494 | 				serviceStats.count++;
 495 | 				if (lt.status === "COMPLETED") serviceStats.completed++;
 496 | 				if (lt.status === "PENDING") serviceStats.pending++;
 497 | 			});
 498 | 
 499 | 			const testsByService = Array.from(testsByServiceMap.values());
 500 | 
 501 | 			// Calculate average turnaround time (simplified - would need created_at and completed_at timestamps)
 502 | 			// For now, just return a placeholder
 503 | 			const averageTurnaroundTime = 0;
 504 | 
 505 | 			return {
 506 | 				totalTests,
 507 | 				completedTests,
 508 | 				pendingTests,
 509 | 				cancelledTests,
 510 | 				testsByService,
 511 | 				averageTurnaroundTime
 512 | 			};
 513 | 		} catch (error) {
 514 | 			console.error("Error getting lab test report:", error);
 515 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get lab test report");
 516 | 		}
 517 | 	});
 518 | 
 519 | // =======================
 520 | // Lab Test Notifications
 521 | // =======================
 522 | 
 523 | export const getRecentlyCompletedLabTests = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 524 | 	.validator(z.object({ clinicId: z.string(), limit: z.number().default(10) }))
 525 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 526 | 		try {
 527 | 			const { clinicId, limit } = ctx.data;
 528 | 
 529 | 			const patients = await db.query.patient.findMany({
 530 | 				where: { clinicId, isDeleted: false },
 531 | 				columns: { id: true }
 532 | 			});
 533 | 
 534 | 			const patientIds = patients.map(p => p.id);
 535 | 
 536 | 			if (patientIds.length === 0) {
 537 | 				return [];
 538 | 			}
 539 | 
 540 | 			return await db.query.labTest.findMany({
 541 | 				where: {
 542 | 					patientId: {
 543 | 						arrayContains: patientIds
 544 | 					},
 545 | 					status: "COMPLETED"
 546 | 				},
 547 | 
 548 | 				// and(inArray(schema.labTest.patientId, patientIds), eq(schema.labTest.status, "COMPLETED")),
 549 | 				with: {
 550 | 					patient: true,
 551 | 					service: true
 552 | 				},
 553 | 				orderBy: { updatedAt: "desc" },
 554 | 				limit
 555 | 			});
 556 | 		} catch (error) {
 557 | 			console.error("Error getting recently completed lab tests:", error);
 558 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get recently completed lab tests");
 559 | 		}
 560 | 	});

```

```ts
 228 | // =======================

 230 | export const countMedicalRecord = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 231 | 	.validator(medicalRecordCountSchema)
 232 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 233 | 		try {
 234 | 			const { clinicId, patientId, doctorId } = ctx.data;
 235 | 			return await db.$count(
 236 | 				schema.medicalRecord,
 237 | 				and(
 238 | 					eq(schema.medicalRecord.clinicId, clinicId),
 239 | 					patientId ? eq(schema.medicalRecord.patientId, patientId) : undefined,
 240 | 					doctorId ? eq(schema.medicalRecord.doctorId, doctorId) : undefined,
 241 | 					eq(schema.medicalRecord.isDeleted, false)
 242 | 				)
 243 | 			);
 244 | 		} catch (error) {
 245 | 			console.error("Error counting medical records:", error);
 246 | 			throw new Error("Failed to count medical records");
 247 | 		}
 248 | 	});

 251 | // Vital Signs Queries
 252 | // =======================
 253 | 
 254 | export const listVitalSignsByPatient = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 255 | 	.validator(vitalSignsListSchema)
 256 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 257 | 		try {
 258 | 			const { patientId, clinicId, fromDate, toDate, pageSize, page } = ctx.data;
 259 | 			const whereConditions = {
 260 | 				patientId,
 261 | 				clinicId,
 262 | 				recordedAt: {
 263 | 					lte: fromDate,
 264 | 					gte: toDate
 265 | 				}
 266 | 			};
 267 | 
 268 | 			if (fromDate || toDate) {
 269 | 				if (fromDate) whereConditions.recordedAt.gte = fromDate;
 270 | 				if (toDate) whereConditions.recordedAt.lte = toDate;
 271 | 			}
 272 | 
 273 | 			return await db.query.vitalSign.findMany({
 274 | 				where: whereConditions,
 275 | 				orderBy: { recordedAt: "desc" },
 276 | 				limit: pageSize,
 277 | 				offset: (page - 1) * pageSize
 278 | 			});
 279 | 		} catch (error) {
 280 | 			console.error("Error listing vital signs:", error);
 281 | 			throw new Error("Failed to list vital signs");
 282 | 		}
 283 | 	});

 508 | export const getVitalSigns = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 509 | 	.validator(vitalSignsParamsSchema)
 510 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 511 | 		try {
 512 | 			const { patientId, clinicId, page = 1, pageSize = 50, limit, fromDate, toDate, encounterId } = ctx.data;
 513 | 			const finalLimit = limit ?? pageSize;
 514 | 
 515 | 			const whereConditions = {
 516 | 				patientId,
 517 | 				clinicId,
 518 | 				recordedAt: {
 519 | 					gte: fromDate,
 520 | 					lte: toDate
 521 | 				},
 522 | 				encounterId
 523 | 			};
 524 | 
 525 | 			if (fromDate || toDate) {
 526 | 				if (fromDate) whereConditions.recordedAt.gte = fromDate;
 527 | 				if (toDate) whereConditions.recordedAt.lte = toDate;
 528 | 			}
 529 | 
 530 | 			if (encounterId) {
 531 | 				whereConditions.encounterId = encounterId;
 532 | 			}
 533 | 
 534 | 			return await db.query.vitalSign.findMany({
 535 | 				where: whereConditions,
 536 | 				orderBy: { recordedAt: "desc" },
 537 | 				limit: finalLimit,
 538 | 				offset: (page - 1) * finalLimit
 539 | 			});
 540 | 		} catch (error) {
 541 | 			console.error("Error getting vital signs:", error);
 542 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get vital signs");
 543 | 		}
 544 | 	});

 575 | export const checkVitalSignsAccess = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 576 | 	.validator(checkAccessSchema)
 577 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 578 | 		try {
 579 | 			const { userId, patientId } = ctx.data;
 580 | 			const userData = await db.query.user.findFirst({
 581 | 				where: { id: userId },
 582 | 				with: {
 583 | 					patients: true,
 584 | 					doctors: true
 585 | 				}
 586 | 			});
 587 | 
 588 | 			if (!userData) {
 589 | 				return false;
 590 | 			}
 591 | 
 592 | 			if (userData.role === "admin" || userData.role === "staff") {
 593 | 				return true;
 594 | 			}
 595 | 			if (userData.role === "doctor" && userData.doctors) {
 596 | 				return true;
 597 | 			}
 598 | 			if (userData.role === "patient" && Array.isArray(userData.patients)) {
 599 | 				return userData.patients.some(p => p.id === patientId);
 600 | 			}
 601 | 
 602 | 			// Check if user is guardian
 603 | 			const guardianRecord = await db.query.guardian.findFirst({
 604 | 				where: {
 605 | 					userId,
 606 | 					patientId
 607 | 				}
 608 | 			});
 609 | 
 610 | 			return !!guardianRecord;
 611 | 		} catch (error) {
 612 | 			console.error("Error checking vital signs access:", error);
 613 | 			throw new Error("Failed to check access");
 614 | 		}
 615 | 	});

 621 | export const createBillForAppointment = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 622 | 	.validator(z.object({ appointmentId: z.string() }))
 623 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 624 | 		try {
 625 | 			const { appointmentId } = ctx.data;
 626 | 			return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 627 | 				const appointment = await tx.query.appointment.findFirst({
 628 | 					where: { id: appointmentId },
 629 | 					with: {
 630 | 						patient: true,
 631 | 						doctor: true,
 632 | 						service: true
 633 | 					}
 634 | 				});
 635 | 
 636 | 				if (!appointment) {
 637 | 					throw new Error("Appointment not found");
 638 | 				}
 639 | 
 640 | 				// Calculate total amount
 641 | 				let totalAmount = appointment.appointmentPrice ?? 0;
 642 | 				if (appointment.service) {
 643 | 					totalAmount += appointment.service.price || 0;
 644 | 				}
 645 | 
 646 | 				// Create payment record
 647 | 				const [payment] = await tx
 648 | 					.insert(schema.payment)
 649 | 					.values({
 650 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 651 | 						clinicId: appointment.clinicId,
 652 | 						patientId: appointment.patientId,
 653 | 						appointmentId: appointment.id,
 654 | 						billDate: new Date(),
 655 | 						totalAmount,
 656 | 						amount: totalAmount,
 657 | 						status: "PENDING",
 658 | 						receiptNumber: Math.floor(Math.random() * 1_000_000)
 659 | 					})
 660 | 					.returning();
 661 | 
 662 | 				return payment;
 663 | 			});
 664 | 		} catch (error) {
 665 | 			console.error("Error creating bill for appointment:", error);
 666 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create bill for appointment");
 667 | 		}
 668 | 	});

 717 | export const listPayments = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 718 | 	.validator(listPaymentsSchema)
 719 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 720 | 		try {
 721 | 			const { clinicId, startDate, endDate, status, limit, offset } = ctx.data;
 722 | 
 723 | 			const conditions: SQL[] = [eq(schema.payment.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.payment.isDeleted, false)];
 724 | 
 725 | 			if (startDate) conditions.push(gte(schema.payment.paymentDate, startDate));
 726 | 			if (endDate) conditions.push(lte(schema.payment.paymentDate, endDate));
 727 | 			if (status) conditions.push(eq(schema.payment.status, status as schema.PaymentStatus));
 728 | 
 729 | 			const whereConditions: Record<string, unknown> = {
 730 | 				clinicId,
 731 | 				isDeleted: false,
 732 | 				status: status as schema.PaymentStatus | undefined
 733 | 			};
 734 | 
 735 | 			if (startDate || endDate) {
 736 | 				whereConditions.paymentDate = {};
 737 | 			}
 738 | 
 739 | 			if (typeof whereConditions.paymentDate === "object" && whereConditions.paymentDate !== null) {
 740 | 				if (startDate) (whereConditions.paymentDate as Record<string, unknown>).gte = startDate;
 741 | 				if (endDate) (whereConditions.paymentDate as Record<string, unknown>).lte = endDate;
 742 | 			}
 743 | 
 744 | 			if (status) whereConditions.status = status;
 745 | 
 746 | 			const [items, totalResult] = await Promise.all([
 747 | 				db.query.payment.findMany({
 748 | 					where: whereConditions,
 749 | 					limit,
 750 | 					offset,
 751 | 					with: {
 752 | 						patient: true,
 753 | 						appointment: true
 754 | 					},
 755 | 					orderBy: { paymentDate: "desc" }
 756 | 				}),
 757 | 				db
 758 | 					.select({ count: count() })
 759 | 					.from(schema.payment)
 760 | 					.where(and(...conditions))
 761 | 			]);
 762 | 
 763 | 			return {
 764 | 				items,
 765 | 				total: totalResult[0]?.count ?? 0
 766 | 			};
 767 | 		} catch (error) {
 768 | 			console.error("Error listing payments:", error);
 769 | 			throw new Error("Failed to list payments");
 770 | 		}
 771 | 	});
 772 | 
 773 | export const getClinicRevenue = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 774 | 	.validator(clinicRevenueSchema)
 775 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 776 | 		try {
 777 | 			const { clinicId, startDate, endDate } = ctx.data;
 778 | 			const payments = await db.query.payment.findMany({
 779 | 				where: {
 780 | 					clinicId,
 781 | 					isDeleted: false,
 782 | 					createdAt: {
 783 | 						gte: startDate,
 784 | 						lte: endDate
 785 | 					}
 786 | 				},
 787 | 				with: {
 788 | 					patient: true
 789 | 				},
 790 | 				orderBy: (payment, { desc }) => [desc(payment.createdAt)]
 791 | 			});
 792 | 
 793 | 			const totalRevenue = payments.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.status === "PAID" ? (p.amountPaid ?? 0) : 0), 0);
 794 | 			const totalBilled = payments.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.totalAmount ?? 0), 0);
 795 | 
 796 | 			const outstanding = Math.max(0, totalBilled - totalRevenue);
 797 | 
 798 | 			const pendingClaims = payments.filter(p => p.paymentMethod === "INSURANCE" && p.status !== "PAID").length;
 799 | 
 800 | 			const collectionRate = totalBilled > 0 ? Math.round((totalRevenue / totalBilled) * 100) : 100;
 801 | 
 802 | 			const transactions = payments.map(p => ({
 803 | 				id: p.id,
 804 | 				patientId: p.patientId || "",
 805 | 				patientName: p.patient ? `${p.patient.firstName} ${p.patient.lastName}` : "Unknown Patient",
 806 | 				amount: p.totalAmount ?? 0,
 807 | 				date: p.paymentDate || p.createdAt,
 808 | 				type: p.status === "PAID" ? ("PAYMENT" as const) : ("INVOICE" as const),
 809 | 				status: (p.status === "PAID"
 810 | 					? "PAID"
 811 | 					: p.status === "PENDING" || p.status === "PARTIAL"
 812 | 						? "PENDING"
 813 | 						: p.status === "UNPAID"
 814 | 							? "OVERDUE"
 815 | 							: "CANCELLED") as "PAID" | "PENDING" | "OVERDUE" | "CANCELLED",
 816 | 				description: p.notes || undefined
 817 | 			}));
 818 | 
 819 | 			return {
 820 | 				totalRevenue,
 821 | 				totalBilled,
 822 | 				monthlyRevenue: totalRevenue,
 823 | 				revenueGrowth: 12,
 824 | 				outstanding,
 825 | 				pendingClaims,
 826 | 				collectionRate,
 827 | 				paymentCount: payments.length,
 828 | 				averagePayment: payments.length > 0 ? totalRevenue / payments.length : 0,
 829 | 				payments,
 830 | 				transactions
 831 | 			};
 832 | 		} catch (error) {
 833 | 			console.error("Error getting clinic revenue:", error);
 834 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get clinic revenue");
 835 | 		}
 836 | 	});
 837 | 
 838 | export const processPayment = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 839 | 	.validator(processPaymentSchema)
 840 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 841 | 		try {
 842 | 			const { paymentId, amountPaid, paymentMethod, notes } = ctx.data;
 843 | 			return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 844 | 				const payment = await tx.query.payment.findFirst({
 845 | 					where: { id: paymentId }
 846 | 				});
 847 | 
 848 | 				if (!payment) {
 849 | 					throw new Error("Payment not found");
 850 | 				}
 851 | 
 852 | 				const [updatedPayment] = await tx
 853 | 					.update(schema.payment)
 854 | 					.set({
 855 | 						amountPaid,
 856 | 						paymentMethod: paymentMethod as schema.PaymentMethod,
 857 | 						paymentDate: new Date(),
 858 | 						paidDate: new Date(),
 859 | 						status: amountPaid >= (payment.totalAmount ?? 0) ? "PAID" : "PARTIAL",
 860 | 						notes,
 861 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 862 | 					})
 863 | 					.where(eq(schema.payment.id, paymentId))
 864 | 					.returning();
 865 | 
 866 | 				return updatedPayment;
 867 | 			});
 868 | 		} catch (error) {
 869 | 			console.error("Error processing payment:", error);
 870 | 			throw new Error("Failed to process payment");
 871 | 		}
 872 | 	});
 873 | 
 874 | export const getTimeLeftForAppointment = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 875 | 	.validator(appointmentTimeSchema)
 876 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 877 | 		try {
 878 | 			const { appointmentId } = ctx.data;
 879 | 			const record = await db.query.appointment.findFirst({
 880 | 				with: {
 881 | 					patient: true,
 882 | 					doctor: true,
 883 | 					clinic: true,
 884 | 					service: true
 885 | 				},
 886 | 				where: { id: appointmentId }
 887 | 			});
 888 | 
 889 | 			if (!record?.appointmentDate) {
 890 | 				return "Appointment not found or date missing";
 891 | 			}
 892 | 
 893 | 			const now = new Date();
 894 | 			const appointmentTime = new Date(record.appointmentDate);
 895 | 
 896 | 			const diffMs = appointmentTime.getTime() - now.getTime();
 897 | 			if (diffMs < 0) return "Appointment has already passed";
 898 | 
 899 | 			const diffMins = Math.floor(diffMs / (1000 * 60));
 900 | 			const hours = Math.floor(diffMins / 60);
 901 | 			const mins = diffMins % 60;
 902 | 
 903 | 			if (hours > 0) {
 904 | 				return `${hours} hours and ${mins} minutes remaining`;
 905 | 			}
 906 | 			return `${mins} minutes remaining`;
 907 | 		} catch (error) {
 908 | 			console.error("Error getting time left for appointment:", error);
 909 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get time left");
 910 | 		}
 911 | 	});
 912 |

1210 | // =======================
1211 | // Complex Operations
1212 | // =======================
1213 | 
1214 | export const completeEncounter = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1215 | 	.validator(completeEncounterSchema)
1216 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1217 | 		try {
1218 | 			const { medicalRecordId, diagnosisId, notes, followUpDate, prescribedMedications } = ctx.data;
1219 | 			return await db.transaction(async tx => {
1220 | 				// Update medical record
1221 | 				const [medicalRecord] = await tx
1222 | 					.update(schema.medicalRecord)
1223 | 					.set({
1224 | 						status: "COMPLETED",
1225 | 						notes,
1226 | 						followUpDate,
1227 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
1228 | 					})
1229 | 					.where(eq(schema.medicalRecord.id, medicalRecordId))
1230 | 					.returning();
1231 | 
1232 | 				if (!medicalRecord) {
1233 | 					throw new Error("Medical record not found");
1234 | 				}
1235 | 
1236 | 				// Create prescriptions if provided
1237 | 				const prescriptions = [];
1238 | 				if (prescribedMedications?.length) {
1239 | 					const [prescription] = await tx
1240 | 						.insert(schema.prescription)
1241 | 						.values({
1242 | 							id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1243 | 							medicalRecordId: medicalRecord.id,
1244 | 							patientId: medicalRecord.patientId,
1245 | 							doctorId: medicalRecord.doctorId,
1246 | 							clinicId: medicalRecord.clinicId,
1247 | 							encounterId: diagnosisId || "",
1248 | 							status: "active",
1249 | 							issuedDate: new Date(),
1250 | 							createdAt: new Date(),
1251 | 							updatedAt: new Date()
1252 | 						})
1253 | 						.returning();
1254 | 
1255 | 					for (const med of prescribedMedications) {
1256 | 						const [prescribedItem] = await tx
1257 | 							.insert(schema.prescribedItem)
1258 | 							.values({
1259 | 								id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1260 | 								prescriptionId: prescription?.id ?? "",
1261 | 								clinicId: medicalRecord.clinicId,
1262 | 								drugId: med.drugId,
1263 | 								dosageValue: med.dosageValue,
1264 | 								dosageUnit: med.dosageUnit,
1265 | 								frequency: med.frequency,
1266 | 								duration: med.duration,
1267 | 								instructions: med.instructions,
1268 | 								createdAt: new Date(),
1269 | 								updatedAt: new Date()
1270 | 							})
1271 | 							.returning();
1272 | 						prescriptions.push(prescribedItem);
1273 | 					}
1274 | 				}
1275 | 
1276 | 				// Update appointment status
1277 | 				await tx
1278 | 					.update(schema.appointment)
1279 | 					.set({ status: "COMPLETED" })
1280 | 					.where(eq(schema.appointment.id, medicalRecord.appointmentId));
1281 | 
1282 | 				return { medicalRecord, prescriptions };
1283 | 			});
1284 | 		} catch (error) {
1285 | 			console.error("Error completing encounter:", error);
1286 | 			throw new Error("Failed to complete encounter");
1287 | 		}
1288 | 	});
1289 | 
1290 | export const addVitalSignsToMedicalRecord = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1291 | 	.validator(addVitalSignsSchema)
1292 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1293 | 		try {
1294 | 			const { medicalRecordId, vitalSigns } = ctx.data;
1295 | 			const [vitalSign] = await db
1296 | 				.insert(schema.vitalSign)
1297 | 				.values({
1298 | 					...vitalSigns,
1299 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1300 | 					medicalId: medicalRecordId,
1301 | 					createdAt: new Date(),
1302 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
1303 | 				})
1304 | 				.returning();
1305 | 
1306 | 			if (vitalSigns.growthRecordId) {
1307 | 				const growthRec = await db.query.growthRecord.findFirst({
1308 | 					where: {
1309 | 						id: vitalSigns.growthRecordId
1310 | 					}
1311 | 				});
1312 | 
1313 | 				if (growthRec?.weight && growthRec.height) {
1314 | 					const heightNum = Number(growthRec.height);
1315 | 					const weightNum = Number(growthRec.weight);
1316 | 
1317 | 					const bmi = weightNum / (heightNum / 100) ** 2;
1318 | 					const bmiValue = Number.parseFloat(bmi.toFixed(1));
1319 | 
1320 | 					await db
1321 | 						.update(schema.vitalSign)
1322 | 						.set({ notes: `Calculated BMI: ${bmiValue}` })
1323 | 						.where(eq(schema.vitalSign.id, vitalSign?.id ?? ""));
1324 | 
1325 | 					const mr = await db.query.medicalRecord.findFirst({
1326 | 						where: {
1327 | 							id: medicalRecordId
1328 | 						}
1329 | 					});
1330 | 
1331 | 					if (mr) {
1332 | 						await recordGrowthWithPercentiles({
1333 | 							data: {
1334 | 								patientId: mr.patientId,
1335 | 								clinicId: mr.clinicId,
1336 | 								date: new Date(),
1337 | 								weight: weightNum,
1338 | 								height: heightNum,
1339 | 								bmi: bmiValue
1340 | 							}
1341 | 						});
1342 | 					}
1343 | 				}
1344 | 			}
1345 | 
1346 | 			return vitalSign;
1347 | 		} catch (error) {
1348 | 			console.error("Error adding vital signs to medical record:", error);
1349 | 			throw new Error("Failed to add vital signs");
1350 | 		}
1351 | 	});
1352 | 
1353 | export const createCompleteEncounter = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1354 | 	.validator(createCompleteEncounterSchema)
1355 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1356 | 		try {
1357 | 			const { medicalRecord, diagnoses, vitalSigns, growthRecord } = ctx.data;
1358 | 			return await db.transaction(async tx => {
1359 | 				// 1. Fetch appointment & clinic
1360 | 				const appointment = await tx.query.appointment.findFirst({
1361 | 					where: { id: medicalRecord.appointmentId },
1362 | 					columns: { clinicId: true }
1363 | 				});
1364 | 
1365 | 				if (!appointment?.clinicId) throw new Error("Clinic not assigned");
1366 | 
1367 | 				// 2. Complete appointment
1368 | 				await tx
1369 | 					.update(schema.appointment)
1370 | 					.set({ status: "COMPLETED" })
1371 | 					.where(eq(schema.appointment.id, medicalRecord.appointmentId));
1372 | 
1373 | 				// 3. Insert Records
1374 | 				const [record] = await tx
1375 | 					.insert(schema.medicalRecord)
1376 | 					.values({
1377 | 						...medicalRecord,
1378 | 						id: medicalRecord.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
1379 | 						clinicId: appointment.clinicId,
1380 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
1381 | 						updatedAt: new Date(),
1382 | 						isDeleted: false
1383 | 					})
1384 | 					.returning();
1385 | 
1386 | 				const [diagnosis] = await tx
1387 | 					.insert(schema.diagnosis)
1388 | 					.values({
1389 | 						...diagnoses[0],
1390 | 						id: diagnoses[0]?.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
1391 | 						patientId: medicalRecord.patientId,
1392 | 						doctorId: medicalRecord.doctorId,
1393 | 						appointmentId: medicalRecord.appointmentId,
1394 | 						medicalId: record.id,
1395 | 						date: new Date(),
1396 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
1397 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
1398 | 					})
1399 | 					.returning();
1400 | 
1401 | 				// 4. Conditional Inserts
1402 | 				let vitalSignsResult: typeof schema.vitalSign.$inferSelect | undefined;
1403 | 				if (vitalSigns && vitalSigns.length > 0) {
1404 | 					const [vitalsResult] = await tx
1405 | 						.insert(schema.vitalSign)
1406 | 						.values({
1407 | 							...vitalSigns[0],
1408 | 							id: vitalSigns[0].id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
1409 | 							medicalId: record.id,
1410 | 							createdAt: new Date(),
1411 | 							updatedAt: new Date()
1412 | 						})
1413 | 						.returning();
1414 | 					vitalSignsResult = vitalsResult;
1415 | 				}
1416 | 
1417 | 				let growthRecordResult: typeof schema.growthRecord.$inferSelect | undefined;
1418 | 				if (growthRecord && growthRecord.length > 0) {
1419 | 					const [growthResult] = await tx
1420 | 						.insert(schema.growthRecord)
1421 | 						.values({
1422 | 							...growthRecord[0],
1423 | 							id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1424 | 							recordedAt: new Date(),
1425 | 							createdAt: new Date(),
1426 | 							updatedAt: new Date()
1427 | 						})
1428 | 						.returning();
1429 | 					growthRecordResult = growthResult;
1430 | 				}
1431 | 
1432 | 				return {
1433 | 					medicalRecord: record,
1434 | 					diagnosis,
1435 | 					vitalSigns: vitalSignsResult,
1436 | 					growthRecord: growthRecordResult
1437 | 				};
1438 | 			});
1439 | 		} catch (error) {
1440 | 			console.error("Error creating complete encounter:", error);
1441 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create complete encounter");
1442 | 		}
1443 | 	});

```

`functions/patient.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/repositories/patient.repo.ts
   2 | 
   3 | import { db, type Status } from "@clinic/db";
   4 | import * as schema from "@clinic/db/schema";
   5 | import {
   6 | 	type PatientCreateInput,
   7 | 	PatientCreateSchema,
   8 | 	type PatientUpdateInput,
   9 | 	PatientUpdateSchema
  10 | } from "@clinic/db/zod";
  11 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
  12 | import { and, asc, count, eq, ilike, inArray, like, or, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
  13 | import z from "zod";
  14 | 
  15 | // =======================
  16 | // Zod Validators
  17 | // =======================
  18 | 
  19 | const patientIdSchema = z.object({
  20 | 	id: z.string().min(1),
  21 | 	clinicId: z.string().min(1)
  22 | });
  23 | 
  24 | const clinicIdOnlySchema = z.object({
  25 | 	clinicId: z.string().min(1)
  26 | });
  27 | 
  28 | const listPatientsSchema = z.object({
  29 | 	clinicId: z.string().min(1),
  30 | 	limit: z.number().min(1).max(100).default(20),
  31 | 	offset: z.number().min(0).default(0),
  32 | 	search: z.string().optional(),
  33 | 	status: z.enum(schema.statusEnum.enumValues).optional(),
  34 | 	isActive: z.boolean().optional(),
  35 | 	gender: z.enum(schema.genderEnum.enumValues).optional(),
  36 | 	bloodGroup: z.enum(schema.bloodGroupEnum.enumValues).optional()
  37 | });

 106 | 
 107 | // =======================
 108 | // Helper Functions (Server-side only)
 109 | // =======================
 110 | 
 111 | function validatePatientData(data: PatientCreateInput | PatientUpdateInput) {
 112 | 	if (data.email && !data.email.includes("@")) {
 113 | 		return { valid: false, error: "Invalid email address" };
 114 | 	}
 115 | 	if (data.phone && data.phone.length < 5) {
 116 | 		return { valid: false, error: "Phone number too short" };
 117 | 	}
 118 | 	if (data.dateOfBirth && data.dateOfBirth > new Date()) {
 119 | 		return { valid: false, error: "Date of birth cannot be in the future" };
 120 | 	}
 121 | 	return { valid: true };
 122 | }

 128 | export const validatePatient = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 129 | 	.validator(z.object({ data: z.any() }))
 130 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 131 | 		return validatePatientData(ctx.data.data);
 132 | 	});

 134 | export const getPatientById = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 135 | 	.validator(patientIdSchema)
 136 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 137 | 		try {
 138 | 			const { id, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 139 | 			const patient = await db.query.patient.findFirst({
 140 | 				where: {
 141 | 					id,
 142 | 					clinicId,
 143 | 					isDeleted: false
 144 | 				},
 145 | 				with: {
 146 | 					user: true,
 147 | 					clinic: true
 148 | 				}
 149 | 			});
 150 | 			return patient;
 151 | 		} catch (error) {
 152 | 			console.error("Error getting patient by ID:", error);
 153 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get patient");
 154 | 		}
 155 | 	});

 157 | export const generateMRN = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 158 | 	.validator(clinicIdOnlySchema)
 159 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 160 | 		try {
 161 | 			const { clinicId } = ctx.data;
 162 | 			const lastPatient = await db.query.patient.findFirst({
 163 | 				where: {
 164 | 					clinicId,
 165 | 					isDeleted: false
 166 | 				},
 167 | 				orderBy: (patient, { desc }) => desc(patient.createdAt)
 168 | 			});
 169 | 
 170 | 			if (lastPatient?.mrn) {
 171 | 				const match = lastPatient.mrn.match(/\d/);
 172 | 				if (match) {
 173 | 					const nextNumber = Number.parseInt(match[0], 10);
 174 | 					return `MRN-${nextNumber.toString().padStart(6, "0")}`;
 175 | 				}
 176 | 			}
 177 | 			return "MRN-000001";
 178 | 		} catch (error) {
 179 | 			console.error("Error generating MRN:", error);
 180 | 			throw new Error("Failed to generate MRN");
 181 | 		}
 182 | 	});

 223 | export const listPatients = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 224 | 	.validator(listPatientsSchema)
 225 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 226 | 		try {
 227 | 			const { clinicId, limit, offset, search, status, isActive, gender, bloodGroup } = ctx.data;
 228 | 
 229 | 			// Start with a dynamic query builder
 230 | 			const baseConditions = and(eq(schema.patient.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.patient.isDeleted, false));
 231 | 
 232 | 			let query = db
 233 | 				.select()
 234 | 				.from(schema.patient)
 235 | 				.leftJoin(schema.user, eq(schema.patient.userId, schema.user.id))
 236 | 				.where(baseConditions)
 237 | 				.$dynamic(); // Enable dynamic mode
 238 | 
 239 | 			// Add filters dynamically
 240 | 			if (status) {
 241 | 				query = query.where(eq(schema.patient.status, status));
 242 | 			}
 243 | 
 244 | 			if (isActive !== undefined) {
 245 | 				query = query.where(eq(schema.patient.isActive, isActive));
 246 | 			}
 247 | 
 248 | 			if (gender) {
 249 | 				query = query.where(eq(schema.patient.gender, gender));
 250 | 			}
 251 | 
 252 | 			if (bloodGroup) {
 253 | 				query = query.where(eq(schema.patient.bloodGroup, bloodGroup));
 254 | 			}
 255 | 
 256 | 			// Add search with OR condition
 257 | 			if (search) {
 258 | 				query = query.where(
 259 | 					or(
 260 | 						like(schema.patient.mrn, `%${search}%`),
 261 | 						like(schema.patient.firstName, `%${search}%`),
 262 | 						like(schema.patient.lastName, `%${search}%`),
 263 | 						like(schema.patient.email, `%${search}%`),
 264 | 						like(schema.patient.phone, `%${search}%`)
 265 | 					)
 266 | 				);
 267 | 			}
 268 | 
 269 | 			// Add pagination and ordering
 270 | 			query = query.limit(limit).offset(offset).orderBy(asc(schema.patient.lastName));
 271 | 
 272 | 			// Execute the main query
 273 | 			const results = await query;
 274 | 
 275 | 			// Transform joined results to match expected format
 276 | 			const patients = results.map(result => ({
 277 | 				...result.patient,
 278 | 				user: result.user
 279 | 			}));
 280 | 
 281 | 			// Build count query separately (simpler, doesn't need dynamic mode)
 282 | 			const countConditions = [];
 283 | 			countConditions.push(eq(schema.patient.clinicId, clinicId));
 284 | 			countConditions.push(eq(schema.patient.isDeleted, false));
 285 | 
 286 | 			if (status) countConditions.push(eq(schema.patient.status, status));
 287 | 			if (isActive !== undefined) countConditions.push(eq(schema.patient.isActive, isActive));
 288 | 			if (gender) countConditions.push(eq(schema.patient.gender, gender));
 289 | 			if (bloodGroup) countConditions.push(eq(schema.patient.bloodGroup, bloodGroup));
 290 | 
 291 | 			if (search) {
 292 | 				countConditions.push(
 293 | 					or(
 294 | 						like(schema.patient.mrn, `%${search}%`),
 295 | 						like(schema.patient.firstName, `%${search}%`),
 296 | 						like(schema.patient.lastName, `%${search}%`),
 297 | 						like(schema.patient.email, `%${search}%`),
 298 | 						like(schema.patient.phone, `%${search}%`)
 299 | 					)
 300 | 				);
 301 | 			}
 302 | 
 303 | 			const totalResult = await db
 304 | 				.select({ count: count() })
 305 | 				.from(schema.patient)
 306 | 				.where(and(...countConditions));
 307 | 
 308 | 			return {
 309 | 				patients,
 310 | 				total: Number(totalResult[0]?.count ?? 0)
 311 | 			};
 312 | 		} catch (error) {
 313 | 			console.error("Error listing patients:", error);
 314 | 			throw new Error("Failed to list patients");
 315 | 		}
 316 | 	});
 317 | export const createPatient = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 318 | 	.validator(PatientCreateSchema)
 319 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 320 | 		try {
 321 | 			const data = ctx.data;
 322 | 			const now = new Date();
 323 | 
 324 | 			const [result] = await db
 325 | 				.insert(schema.patient)
 326 | 				.values({
 327 | 					...data,
 328 | 					createdAt: now,
 329 | 					updatedAt: now
 330 | 				})
 331 | 				.returning();
 332 | 
 333 | 			return result;
 334 | 		} catch (error) {
 335 | 			console.error("Error creating patient:", error);
 336 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create patient");
 337 | 		}
 338 | 	});

 340 | export const updatePatient = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 341 | 	.validator(z.object({ id: z.string(), data: PatientUpdateSchema }))
 342 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 343 | 		try {
 344 | 			const { id, data } = ctx.data;
 345 | 			const [result] = await db
 346 | 				.update(schema.patient)
 347 | 				.set({ ...data, updatedAt: new Date() })
 348 | 				.where(eq(schema.patient.id, id))
 349 | 				.returning();
 350 | 
 351 | 			if (!result) {
 352 | 				throw new Error("Patient not found");
 353 | 			}
 354 | 			return result;
 355 | 		} catch (error) {
 356 | 			console.error("Error updating patient:", error);
 357 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update patient");
 358 | 		}
 359 | 	});

 362 | 	.validator(patientIdSchema)
 363 | 	.handler(async ctx => {

 365 | 			const { id, clinicId } = ctx.data;

 367 | 				.update(schema.patient)
 368 | 				.set({ deletedAt: new Date(), isDeleted: true })
 369 | 				.where(and(eq(schema.patient.id, id), eq(schema.patient.clinicId, clinicId)))
 370 | 				.returning();
 371 | 
 372 | 			if (!result) {
 373 | 				throw new Error("Patient not found");
 374 | 			}
 375 | 			return result;
 376 | 		} catch (error) {
 377 | 			console.error("Error deleting patient:", error);
 378 | 			throw new Error("Failed to delete patient");
 379 | 		}

 382 | export const bulkUpdatePatientStatus = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 383 | 	.validator(bulkUpdateStatusSchema)
 384 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 385 | 		try {
 386 | 			const { patientIds, status } = ctx.data;
 387 | 			const updateData = { status, updatedAt: new Date(), isActive: false };
 388 | 			if (status === "INACTIVE") {
 389 | 				updateData.isActive = false;
 390 | 			}
 391 | 
 392 | 			const result = await db
 393 | 				.update(schema.patient)
 394 | 				.set(updateData)
 395 | 				.where(inArray(schema.patient.id, patientIds))
 396 | 				.returning();
 397 | 
 398 | 			return result;
 399 | 		} catch (error) {
 400 | 			console.error("Error bulk updating patient status:", error);
 401 | 			throw new Error("Failed to bulk update patient status");
 402 | 		}
 403 | 	});

 405 | export const getPatientWithFullHistory = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 406 | 	.validator(patientIdSchema)
 407 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 408 | 		try {
 409 | 			const { id, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 410 | 			const patient = await db.query.patient.findFirst({
 411 | 				where: { id, clinicId, isDeleted: false },
 412 | 
 413 | 				with: {
 414 | 					user: true,
 415 | 					clinic: true,
 416 | 					guardians: {
 417 | 						with: { user: true }
 418 | 					},
 419 | 					appointments: {
 420 | 						where: { isDeleted: false },
 421 | 						with: { doctor: true, service: true },
 422 | 						orderBy: (appointment, { desc }) => desc(appointment.appointmentDate)
 423 | 					},
 424 | 					medicalRecords: {
 425 | 						with: {
 426 | 							doctor: true,
 427 | 							appointment: true,
 428 | 							vitalSigns: true,
 429 | 							prescriptions: {
 430 | 								with: {
 431 | 									prescribedItems: {
 432 | 										with: { drug: true }
 433 | 									}
 434 | 								}
 435 | 							}
 436 | 						},
 437 | 						orderBy: (record, { desc }) => desc(record.createdAt)
 438 | 					},
 439 | 					vitalSigns: {
 440 | 						orderBy: (vs, { desc }) => desc(vs.recordedAt),
 441 | 						limit: 10
 442 | 					},
 443 | 					growthRecords: {
 444 | 						orderBy: (gr, { desc }) => desc(gr.date)
 445 | 					},
 446 | 					immunizations: {
 447 | 						with: { administeredBy: true },
 448 | 						orderBy: (imm, { desc }) => desc(imm.date)
 449 | 					},
 450 | 					labTests: {
 451 | 						with: { service: true },
 452 | 						orderBy: (lab, { desc }) => desc(lab.testDate)
 453 | 					},
 454 | 					prescriptions: {
 455 | 						with: {
 456 | 							doctor: true,
 457 | 							prescribedItems: {
 458 | 								with: { drug: true }
 459 | 							}
 460 | 						},
 461 | 						orderBy: (pres, { desc }) => desc(pres.issuedDate)
 462 | 					},
 463 | 					payments: {
 464 | 						orderBy: (payment, { desc }) => desc(payment.paymentDate)
 465 | 					},
 466 | 					feedingLogs: {
 467 | 						orderBy: (log, { desc }) => desc(log.date)
 468 | 					},
 469 | 					developmentalChecks: {
 470 | 						orderBy: (check, { desc }) => desc(check.checkDate)
 471 | 					}
 472 | 				}
 473 | 			});
 474 | 
 475 | 			return patient;
 476 | 		} catch (error) {
 477 | 			console.error("Error getting patient full history:", error);
 478 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get patient history");
 479 | 		}
 480 | 	});

 510 | export const getPatientStats = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 511 | 	.validator(z.object({ patientId: z.string() }))
 512 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 513 | 		try {
 514 | 			const { patientId } = ctx.data;
 515 | 
 516 | 			// Appointment stats using SQLite
 517 | 			const appointmentStats = await db
 518 | 				.select({
 519 | 					total: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)`,
 520 | 					completed: sql<number>`CAST(sum(CASE WHEN ${schema.appointment.status} = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER)`,
 521 | 					cancelled: sql<number>`CAST(sum(CASE WHEN ${schema.appointment.status} = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER)`,
 522 | 					lastVisit: sql<Date | null>`max(CASE WHEN ${schema.appointment.status} = 'COMPLETED' THEN ${schema.appointment.appointmentDate} ELSE NULL END)`,
 523 | 					nextAppointment: sql<Date | null>`min(CASE WHEN ${schema.appointment.appointmentDate} > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND ${schema.appointment.status} NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'COMPLETED') THEN ${schema.appointment.appointmentDate} ELSE NULL END)`
 524 | 				})
 525 | 				.from(schema.appointment)
 526 | 				.where(and(eq(schema.appointment.patientId, patientId), eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false)));
 527 | 
 528 | 			// Payment stats
 529 | 			const paymentStats = await db
 530 | 				.select({
 531 | 					total: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)`,
 532 | 					paidAmount: sql<number>`COALESCE(CAST(sum(${schema.payment.amountPaid}) AS INTEGER), 0)`,
 533 | 					totalAmount: sql<number>`COALESCE(CAST(sum(${schema.payment.totalAmount}) AS INTEGER), 0)`
 534 | 				})
 535 | 				.from(schema.payment)
 536 | 				.where(and(eq(schema.payment.patientId, patientId), eq(schema.payment.isDeleted, false)));
 537 | 
 538 | 			// Prescription stats
 539 | 			const prescriptionStats = await db
 540 | 				.select({
 541 | 					total: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)`,
 542 | 					active: sql<number>`CAST(sum(CASE WHEN ${schema.prescription.status} = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER)`
 543 | 				})
 544 | 				.from(schema.prescription)
 545 | 				.where(eq(schema.prescription.patientId, patientId));
 546 | 
 547 | 			// Immunization count
 548 | 			const immunizationCount = await db
 549 | 				.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)` })
 550 | 				.from(schema.immunization)
 551 | 				.where(and(eq(schema.immunization.patientId, patientId), eq(schema.immunization.isDeleted, false)));
 552 | 
 553 | 			const stats = appointmentStats[0];
 554 | 			const payments = paymentStats[0];
 555 | 			const prescriptions = prescriptionStats[0];
 556 | 			const immunizations = immunizationCount[0];
 557 | 
 558 | 			return {
 559 | 				totalAppointments: stats?.total ?? 0,
 560 | 				completedAppointments: stats?.completed ?? 0,
 561 | 				cancelledAppointments: stats?.cancelled ?? 0,
 562 | 				totalPayments: payments?.total ?? 0,
 563 | 				paidAmount: payments?.paidAmount ?? 0,
 564 | 				dueAmount: (payments?.totalAmount ?? 0) - (payments?.paidAmount ?? 0),
 565 | 				totalPrescriptions: prescriptions?.total ?? 0,
 566 | 				activePrescriptions: prescriptions?.active ?? 0,
 567 | 				totalImmunizations: immunizations?.count ?? 0,
 568 | 				lastVisit: stats?.lastVisit ?? null,
 569 | 				nextAppointment: stats?.nextAppointment ?? null
 570 | 			};
 571 | 		} catch (error) {
 572 | 			console.error("Error getting patient stats:", error);
 573 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get patient stats");
 574 | 		}
 575 | 	});
 576 |

 593 | export const createGuardian = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 594 | 	.validator(
 595 | 		z.object({
 596 | 			patientId: z.string(),
 597 | 			userId: z.string(),
 598 | 			relation: z.string(),
 599 | 			isPrimary: z.boolean().optional(),
 600 | 			phone: z.string().optional(),
 601 | 			email: z.string().email().optional()
 602 | 		})
 603 | 	)
 604 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 605 | 		try {
 606 | 			const data = ctx.data;
 607 | 			const [result] = await db
 608 | 				.insert(schema.guardian)
 609 | 				.values({
 610 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 611 | 					...data,
 612 | 					isPrimary: data.isPrimary ?? false
 613 | 				})
 614 | 				.returning();
 615 | 			return result;
 616 | 		} catch (error) {
 617 | 			console.error("Error creating guardian:", error);

 678 | export const getPatientsWithAppointmentsThisWeek = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 679 | 	.validator(clinicIdOnlySchema)
 680 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 681 | 		try {
 682 | 			const { clinicId } = ctx.data;
 683 | 			const startOfWeek = new Date();
 684 | 			startOfWeek.setDate(startOfWeek.getDate() - startOfWeek.getDay());
 685 | 			startOfWeek.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
 686 | 
 687 | 			const endOfWeek = new Date(startOfWeek);
 688 | 			endOfWeek.setDate(endOfWeek.getDate());
 689 | 
 690 | 			const appointments = await db.query.appointment.findMany({
 691 | 				where: {
 692 | 					clinicId,
 693 | 					isDeleted: false,
 694 | 					status: "CONFIRMED",
 695 | 					appointmentDate: {
 696 | 						gte: startOfWeek,
 697 | 						lte: endOfWeek
 698 | 					}
 699 | 				},
 700 | 				with: {
 701 | 					patient: {
 702 | 						with: {
 703 | 							guardians: true
 704 | 						}
 705 | 					},
 706 | 					doctor: true
 707 | 				},
 708 | 				orderBy: (appointment, { asc }) => asc(appointment.appointmentDate)
 709 | 			});
 710 | 			return appointments;
 711 | 		} catch (error) {
 712 | 			console.error("Error getting weekly appointments:", error);

 717 | export const getPatientGrowthPercentiles = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 718 | 	.validator(patientIdSchema)
 719 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 720 | 		try {
 721 | 			const { id, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 722 | 			const patient = await db.query.patient.findFirst({
 723 | 				where: { id, clinicId, isDeleted: false },
 724 | 
 725 | 				with: {
 726 | 					growthRecords: {
 727 | 						orderBy: (record, { asc }) => asc(record.date)
 728 | 					}
 729 | 				}
 730 | 			});
 731 | 
 732 | 			if (!patient?.growthRecords.length) {
 733 | 				return null;
 734 | 			}
 735 | 
 736 | 			const whoStandards = await db.query.whoGrowthStandard.findMany({
 737 | 				where: { gender: patient.gender as "MALE" | "FEMALE", measurementType: "BMI" }
 738 | 			});
 739 | 
 740 | 			// Calculate percentiles for each growth record
 741 | 			const growthWithPercentiles = patient.growthRecords.map(record => {
 742 | 				const standard = whoStandards.find(s => Math.abs(s.ageDays - (record.ageDays ?? 0)) <= 30);
 743 | 
 744 | 				let percentile = null;
 745 | 				if (standard && record.bmi) {
 746 | 					// Simple percentile calculation (simplified)
 747 | 					if (record.bmi <= standard.sd3neg) percentile = 1;
 748 | 					else if (record.bmi <= standard.sd2neg) percentile = 2;
 749 | 					else if (record.bmi <= standard.sd1neg) percentile = 5;
 750 | 					else if (record.bmi >= standard.sd3pos) percentile = 99;
 751 | 					else if (record.bmi >= standard.sd2pos) percentile = 97;
 752 | 					else if (record.bmi >= standard.sd1pos) percentile = 85;
 753 | 					else percentile = 50;
 754 | 				}
 755 | 
 756 | 				return { ...record, percentile };
 757 | 			});
 758 | 
 759 | 			return growthWithPercentiles;
 760 | 		} catch (error) {
 761 | 			console.error("Error calculating growth percentiles:", error);
 762 | 			throw new Error("Failed to calculate growth percentiles");
 763 | 		}
 764 | 	});
 765 |

 964 | export const createPatientWithGuardian = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 965 | 	.validator(patientWithGuardianSchema)
 966 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 967 | 		try {
 968 | 			const { patientData, guardianData } = ctx.data;
 969 | 			const now = new Date();
 970 | 
 971 | 			const result = await db.transaction(async tx => {
 972 | 				// Create patient
 973 | 				const [patient] = await tx
 974 | 					.insert(schema.patient)
 975 | 					.values({
 976 | 						...patientData,
 977 | 						createdAt: now,
 978 | 						updatedAt: now
 979 | 					})
 980 | 					.returning();
 981 | 
 982 | 				// Create guardian if provided
 983 | 				if (guardianData && patient) {
 984 | 					await tx.insert(schema.guardian).values({
 985 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 986 | 						patientId: patient.id,
 987 | 						...guardianData,
 988 | 						isPrimary: guardianData.isPrimary ?? false
 989 | 					});
 990 | 				}
 991 | 
 992 | 				// Create initial growth record if age appropriate
 993 | 				if (patient?.dateOfBirth) {
 994 | 					const ageInDays = Math.floor((Date.now() - patient.dateOfBirth.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
 995 | 
 996 | 					if (ageInDays <= 730) {
 997 | 						// First 2 years
 998 | 						await tx.insert(schema.growthRecord).values({
 999 | 							id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1000 | 							patientId: patient.id,
1001 | 							clinicId: patient.clinicId,
1002 | 							date: new Date(),
1003 | 							ageDays: ageInDays,
1004 | 							ageMonths: Math.floor(ageInDays / 30),
1005 | 							gender: patient.gender as schema.Gender,
1006 | 							recordedAt: new Date(),
1007 | 							createdAt: now,
1008 | 							updatedAt: now
1009 | 						});
1010 | 					}
1011 | 				}
1012 | 
1013 | 				return patient;
1014 | 			});
1015 | 
1016 | 			return result;
1017 | 		} catch (error) {
1018 | 			console.error("Error creating patient with guardian:", error);
1019 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create patient with guardian");
1020 | 		}
1021 | 	});
```
