```ts
1096 | // Add to functions/patient.ts
1097 | export const getPatientsCount = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
1098 | 	.validator(
1099 | 		z.object({
1100 | 			clinicId: z.string(),
1101 | 			search: z.string().optional(),
1102 | 			status: z.string().optional()
1103 | 		})
1104 | 	)
1105 | 	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
1106 | 		try {
1107 | 			const { clinicId, search, status } = data;
1108 | 
1109 | 			const conditions = [eq(schema.patient.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.patient.isDeleted, false)];
1110 | 
1111 | 			if (search?.trim()) {
1112 | 				const searchCondition = or(
1113 | 					ilike(schema.patient.mrn, `%${search}%`),
1114 | 					ilike(schema.patient.firstName, `%${search}%`),
1115 | 					ilike(schema.patient.lastName, `%${search}%`),
1116 | 					ilike(schema.patient.email, `%${search}%`),
1117 | 					ilike(schema.patient.phone, `%${search}%`)
1118 | 				);
1119 | 
1120 | 				if (searchCondition) {
1121 | 					conditions.push(searchCondition);
1122 | 				}
1123 | 			}
1124 | 
1125 | 			if (status && status !== "all") {
1126 | 				conditions.push(eq(schema.patient.status, status as Status));
1127 | 			}
1128 | 
1129 | 			const [{ count: total }] = await db
1130 | 				.select({
1131 | 					count: count()
1132 | 				})
1133 | 				.from(schema.patient)
1134 | 				.where(and(...conditions));
1135 | 
1136 | 			return {
1137 | 				count: Number(total)
1138 | 			};
1139 | 		} catch (error) {
1140 | 			console.error("Error counting patients:", error);
1141 | 			throw new Error("Failed to count patients");
1142 | 		}
1143 | 	});

```

`functions/pediatric.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/repositories/pediatric.repo.ts
   2 | 
   3 | import { db, type FeedingType, type Gender } from "@clinic/db";
   4 | import * as schema from "@clinic/db/schema/clinic";
   5 | import { ImmunizationCreateSchema } from "@clinic/db/zod";
   6 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   7 | import { and, eq, gte, inArray, lte, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   8 | import z from "zod";
   9 | 
  10 | // =======================
  11 | // Zod Validators
  12 | // =======================
  13 | 
  14 | const patientClinicSchema = z.object({
  15 | 	patientId: z.string(),
  16 | 	clinicId: z.string()
  17 | });
  18 | 
  19 | const growthRecordIdSchema = z.object({
  20 | 	id: z.string(),
  21 | 	clinicId: z.string()
  22 | });
  23 | 
  24 | const growthRecordListSchema = z.object({
  25 | 	clinicId: z.string(),
  26 | 	patientId: z.string().optional(),
  27 | 	limit: z.number().default(50),
  28 | 	offset: z.number().default(0)
  29 | });
  30 | 
  31 | const addMeasurementSchema = z.object({
  32 | 	patientId: z.string(),
  33 | 	date: z.date(),
  34 | 	weight: z.number().optional(),
  35 | 	height: z.number().optional(),
  36 | 	headCircumference: z.number().optional(),
  37 | 	notes: z.string().optional(),
  38 | 	clinicId: z.string()
  39 | });

 135 | const getPatientGrowthRecords = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 136 | 	.validator(patientClinicSchema)
 137 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 138 | 		try {
 139 | 			const { patientId, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 140 | 			const records = await db.query.growthRecord.findMany({
 141 | 				where: {
 142 | 					patientId: patientId,
 143 | 					clinicId: clinicId
 144 | 				},
 145 | 				orderBy: { date: "asc" }
 146 | 			});
 147 | 			return records;
 148 | 		} catch (error) {
 149 | 			console.error("Error getting growth records:", error);
 150 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get growth records");
 151 | 		}

 154 | const listGrowthRecords = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 155 | 	.validator(growthRecordListSchema)
 156 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 157 | 		try {
 158 | 			const { clinicId, patientId, limit, offset } = ctx.data;
 159 | 
 160 | 			// Build where object dynamically
 161 | 			const where = { clinicId: clinicId, patientId };
 162 | 			if (patientId) {
 163 | 				where.patientId = patientId;
 164 | 			}
 165 | 
 166 | 			const [records, totalResult] = await Promise.all([
 167 | 				db.query.growthRecord.findMany({
 168 | 					where,
 169 | 					limit,
 170 | 					offset,
 171 | 					orderBy: { date: "desc" }
 172 | 				}),
 173 | 				db
 174 | 					.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)` })
 175 | 					.from(schema.growthRecord)
 176 | 					.where(
 177 | 						patientId
 178 | 							? sql`${schema.growthRecord.clinicId} = ${clinicId} AND ${schema.growthRecord.patientId} = ${patientId}`
 179 | 							: sql`${schema.growthRecord.clinicId} = ${clinicId}`
 180 | 					)
 181 | 			]);
 182 | 
 183 | 			return {
 184 | 				records,
 185 | 				total: Number(totalResult[0]?.count ?? 0)
 186 | 			};
 187 | 		} catch (error) {
 188 | 			console.error("Error listing growth records:", error);
 189 | 			throw new Error("Failed to list growth records");
 190 | 		}
 191 | 	});

 200 | 					id: id,
 201 | 					clinicId: clinicId
 202 | 				},

 212 | const listFeedingLogs = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 213 | 	.validator(feedingLogFiltersSchema)
 214 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 215 | 		try {
 216 | 			const { patientId, clinicId, startDate, endDate, type, limit, offset } = ctx.data;
 217 | 
 218 | 			// Build where object with operators
 219 | 			const where = {
 220 | 				patientId: patientId,
 221 | 				type,
 222 | 				clinicId,
 223 | 				date: {
 224 | 					lte: endDate,
 225 | 					gte: startDate
 226 | 				}
 227 | 			};
 228 | 
 229 | 			if (startDate) {
 230 | 				where.date = { ...where.date, gte: startDate };
 231 | 			}
 232 | 			if (endDate) {
 233 | 				where.date = { ...where.date, lte: endDate };
 234 | 			}
 235 | 			if (type) {
 236 | 				where.type = type;
 237 | 			}
 238 | 
 239 | 			const logs = await db.query.feedingLog.findMany({
 240 | 				where,
 241 | 				orderBy: { date: "desc" },
 242 | 				limit,
 243 | 				offset
 244 | 			});
 245 | 
 246 | 			// For counting, use raw SQL or keep using the query builder
 247 | 			const totalResult = await db
 248 | 				.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)` })
 249 | 				.from(schema.feedingLog)
 250 | 				.where(
 251 | 					and(
 252 | 						eq(schema.feedingLog.patientId, patientId),
 253 | 						startDate ? gte(schema.feedingLog.date, startDate) : undefined,
 254 | 						endDate ? lte(schema.feedingLog.date, endDate) : undefined,
 255 | 						type ? eq(schema.feedingLog.type, type) : undefined
 256 | 					)
 257 | 				);
 258 | 
 259 | 			const total = Number(totalResult[0]?.count ?? 0);
 260 | 
 261 | 			return {
 262 | 				logs,
 263 | 				total,
 264 | 				hasMore: offset + limit < total
 265 | 			};
 266 | 		} catch (error) {
 267 | 			console.error("Error listing feeding logs:", error);
 268 | 			throw new Error("Failed to list feeding logs");
 269 | 		}
 270 | 	});
 271 | 
 272 | const getFeedingStats = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 273 | 	.validator(feedingStatsSchema)
 274 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 275 | 		try {
 276 | 			const { patientId, clinicId, days } = ctx.data;
 277 | 			const endDate = new Date();
 278 | 			const startDate = new Date();
 279 | 			startDate.setDate(startDate.getDate() - days);
 280 | 
 281 | 			const logs = await db.query.feedingLog.findMany({
 282 | 				where: {
 283 | 					patientId: patientId,
 284 | 					clinicId,
 285 | 					date: {
 286 | 						gt: startDate,
 287 | 						lt: endDate
 288 | 					}
 289 | 				},
 290 | 				orderBy: { date: "asc" }
 291 | 			});
 292 | 
 293 | 			// Rest of the function remains the same...
 294 | 			const byType: Record<string, number> = {};
 295 | 			let totalDuration = 0;
 296 | 			let totalAmount = 0;
 297 | 			const feedingsByDayMap: Record<string, { count: number; totalDuration: number; totalAmount: number }> = {};
 298 | 
 299 | 			for (const log of logs) {
 300 | 				byType[log.type] = (byType[log.type] || 0) + 1;
 301 | 				totalDuration += log.duration || 0;
 302 | 				totalAmount += log.amount || 0;
 303 | 
 304 | 				const dateKey = log.date.toISOString().split("T")[0] ?? "";
 305 | 				if (!feedingsByDayMap[dateKey]) {
 306 | 					feedingsByDayMap[dateKey] = { count: 0, totalDuration: 0, totalAmount: 0 };
 307 | 				}
 308 | 				feedingsByDayMap[dateKey].count++;
 309 | 				feedingsByDayMap[dateKey].totalDuration += log.duration || 0;
 310 | 				feedingsByDayMap[dateKey].totalAmount += log.amount || 0;
 311 | 			}
 312 | 
 313 | 			const averageDuration = logs.length > 0 ? totalDuration / logs.length : 0;
 314 | 
 315 | 			return {
 316 | 				totalFeedings: logs.length,
 317 | 				byType,
 318 | 				averageDuration,
 319 | 				totalAmount,
 320 | 				feedingsByDay: Object.entries(feedingsByDayMap)
 321 | 					.map(([date, stats]) => ({
 322 | 						date,
 323 | 						count: stats.count,
 324 | 						totalDuration: stats.totalDuration,
 325 | 						totalAmount: stats.totalAmount
 326 | 					}))
 327 | 					.sort((a, b) => a.date.localeCompare(b.date))
 328 | 			};
 329 | 		} catch (error) {
 330 | 			console.error("Error getting feeding stats:", error);
 331 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get feeding stats");
 332 | 		}
 333 | 	});
 334 | 
 335 | const getBreastfeedingStats = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 336 | 	.validator(feedingStatsSchema)
 337 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 338 | 		try {
 339 | 			const { patientId, clinicId, days } = ctx.data;
 340 | 			const endDate = new Date();
 341 | 			const startDate = new Date();
 342 | 			startDate.setDate(startDate.getDate() - days);
 343 | 
 344 | 			const logs = await db.query.feedingLog.findMany({
 345 | 				where: {
 346 | 					patientId: patientId,
 347 | 					clinicId,
 348 | 					type: "BREAST",
 349 | 					date: {
 350 | 						lt: startDate,
 351 | 						gt: endDate
 352 | 					}
 353 | 				},
 354 | 				orderBy: { date: "asc" }
 355 | 			});
 356 | 
 357 | 			// Rest of the function remains the same...
 358 | 			const today = new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0] ?? "";
 359 | 			const todayFeedings = logs.filter(log => log.date.toISOString().split("T")[0] === today);
 360 | 			const todayTotal = todayFeedings.length;
 361 | 
 362 | 			const weeklyDataMap: Record<
 363 | 				string,
 364 | 				{ duration: number; count: number; leftDuration: number; rightDuration: number }
 365 | 			> = {};
 366 | 
 367 | 			for (const log of logs) {
 368 | 				const dateKey = log.date.toISOString().split("T")[0] ?? "";
 369 | 				if (!weeklyDataMap[dateKey]) {
 370 | 					weeklyDataMap[dateKey] = { duration: 0, count: 0, leftDuration: 0, rightDuration: 0 };
 371 | 				}
 372 | 				weeklyDataMap[dateKey].duration += log.duration || 0;
 373 | 				weeklyDataMap[dateKey].count++;
 374 | 				if (log.breast === "LEFT") weeklyDataMap[dateKey].leftDuration += log.duration || 0;
 375 | 				if (log.breast === "RIGHT") weeklyDataMap[dateKey].rightDuration += log.duration || 0;
 376 | 				if (log.breast === "BOTH") {
 377 | 					weeklyDataMap[dateKey].leftDuration += (log.duration || 0) / 2;
 378 | 					weeklyDataMap[dateKey].rightDuration += (log.duration || 0) / 2;
 379 | 				}
 380 | 			}
 381 | 
 382 | 			const weeklyData = Object.entries(weeklyDataMap)
 383 | 				.map(([date, stats]) => ({
 384 | 					date,
 385 | 					duration: stats.duration,
 386 | 					count: stats.count,
 387 | 					leftDuration: stats.leftDuration,
 388 | 					rightDuration: stats.rightDuration
 389 | 				}))
 390 | 				.sort((a, b) => a.date.localeCompare(b.date))
 391 | 				.slice(-7);
 392 | 
 393 | 			const totalDuration = logs.reduce((sum, log) => sum + (log.duration || 0), 0);
 394 | 			const averageDuration = logs.length > 0 ? totalDuration / logs.length : 0;
 395 | 
 396 | 			const last7Days = weeklyData.slice(-7);
 397 | 			const weeklyAverage =
 398 | 				last7Days.length > 0 ? last7Days.reduce((sum, day) => sum + day.count, 0) / last7Days.length : 0;
 399 | 
 400 | 			const sessionsByTimeOfDay = { morning: 0, afternoon: 0, evening: 0, night: 0 };
 401 | 			let leftPreference = 0;
 402 | 			let rightPreference = 0;
 403 | 			let bothPreference = 0;
 404 | 
 405 | 			for (const log of logs) {
 406 | 				const hour = log.date.getHours();
 407 | 				if (hour >= 6 && hour < 12) sessionsByTimeOfDay.morning++;
 408 | 				else if (hour >= 12 && hour < 17) sessionsByTimeOfDay.afternoon++;
 409 | 				else if (hour >= 17 && hour < 21) sessionsByTimeOfDay.evening++;
 410 | 				else sessionsByTimeOfDay.night++;
 411 | 
 412 | 				if (log.breast === "LEFT") leftPreference++;
 413 | 				else if (log.breast === "RIGHT") rightPreference++;
 414 | 				else if (log.breast === "BOTH") bothPreference++;
 415 | 			}
 416 | 
 417 | 			const totalFeedings = logs.length;
 418 | 			const breastPreference = {
 419 | 				left: totalFeedings > 0 ? (leftPreference / totalFeedings) * 100 : 0,
 420 | 				right: totalFeedings > 0 ? (rightPreference / totalFeedings) * 100 : 0,
 421 | 				both: totalFeedings > 0 ? (bothPreference / totalFeedings) * 100 : 0
 422 | 			};
 423 | 
 424 | 			return {
 425 | 				todayTotal,
 426 | 				weeklyAverage: Math.round(weeklyAverage * 10) / 10,
 427 | 				totalSessions: logs.length,
 428 | 				averageDuration: Math.round(averageDuration * 10) / 10,
 429 | 				weeklyData,
 430 | 				sessionsByTimeOfDay,
 431 | 				breastPreference
 432 | 			};
 433 | 		} catch (error) {
 434 | 			console.error("Error getting breastfeeding stats:", error);
 435 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get breastfeeding stats");
 436 | 		}
 437 | 	});
 438 |

 506 | const getGrowthAnalytics = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 507 | 	.validator(patientClinicSchema)
 508 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 509 | 		try {
 510 | 			const { patientId, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 511 | 			const records = await getPatientGrowthRecords({ data: { patientId, clinicId } });
 512 | 
 513 | 			if (!records || records.length < 2) return { velocity: null, records: records || [] };
 514 | 
 515 | 			const first = records[0];
 516 | 			const last = records[records.length - 1];
 517 | 			if (!first || !last) {
 518 | 				return { velocity: null, records };
 519 | 			}
 520 | 
 521 | 			const monthsDiff = (last.date.getTime() - first.date.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 30.44);
 522 | 			const weightVelocity =
 523 | 				monthsDiff > 0 ? (Number(last.weight ?? 0) - Number(first.weight ?? 0)) / monthsDiff : 0;
 524 | 			const heightVelocity =
 525 | 				monthsDiff > 0 ? (Number(last.height ?? 0) - Number(first.height ?? 0)) / monthsDiff : 0;
 526 | 
 527 | 			return {
 528 | 				records,
 529 | 				velocity: {
 530 | 					weightKgPerMonth: weightVelocity.toFixed(2),
 531 | 					heightCmPerMonth: heightVelocity.toFixed(2)
 532 | 				}
 533 | 			};
 534 | 		} catch (error) {
 535 | 			console.error("Error calculating growth analytics:", error);
 536 | 			throw new Error("Failed to calculate growth analytics");
 537 | 		}
 538 | 	});
 539 |

 555 | const getDevelopmentalProgress = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 556 | 	.validator(z.object({ patientId: z.string() }))
 557 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 558 | 		try {
 559 | 			const { patientId } = ctx.data;
 560 | 			const [milestones, checks] = await Promise.all([
 561 | 				db.query.developmentalMilestones.findMany({
 562 | 					where: { patientId },
 563 | 					orderBy: (m, { asc }) => asc(m.dateRecorded)
 564 | 				}),
 565 | 				db.query.developmentalCheck.findMany({
 566 | 					where: { patientId },
 567 | 					orderBy: (c, { asc }) => asc(c.checkDate)
 568 | 				})
 569 | 			]);
 570 | 
 571 | 			const milestonesByAge: Record<string, typeof milestones> = {};
 572 | 			for (const milestone of milestones) {
 573 | 				if (!milestonesByAge[milestone.ageAchieved]) {
 574 | 					milestonesByAge[milestone.ageAchieved] = [];
 575 | 				}
 576 | 				milestonesByAge[milestone.ageAchieved]?.push(milestone);
 577 | 			}
 578 | 
 579 | 			return {
 580 | 				milestones: milestonesByAge,
 581 | 				developmentalChecks: checks,
 582 | 				totalMilestonesAchieved: milestones.length,
 583 | 				lastCheckup: checks[checks.length - 1]
 584 | 			};
 585 | 		} catch (error) {
 586 | 			console.error("Error getting developmental progress:", error);
 587 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get developmental progress");
 588 | 		}
 589 | 	});

 629 | const getAllVaccineSchedules = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(async () => {
 630 | 	try {
 631 | 		const schedules = await db.query.vaccineSchedule.findMany({

 641 | const listImmunizations = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 642 | 	.validator(immunizationListSchema)
 643 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 644 | 		try {
 645 | 			const { limit, offset, patientId, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 646 | 
 647 | 			const whereConditions = [eq(schema.immunization.isDeleted, false)];
 648 | 			if (clinicId) whereConditions.push(eq(schema.immunization.clinicId, clinicId));
 649 | 			if (patientId) whereConditions.push(eq(schema.immunization.patientId, patientId));
 650 | 
 651 | 			const [records, totalResult] = await Promise.all([
 652 | 				db.query.immunization.findMany({
 653 | 					where: { isDeleted: false, clinicId, patientId },
 654 | 					limit,
 655 | 					offset,
 656 | 					orderBy: (imm, { desc }) => desc(imm.date)
 657 | 				}),
 658 | 				db
 659 | 					.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)` })
 660 | 					.from(schema.immunization)
 661 | 					.where(and(...whereConditions))
 662 | 			]);
 663 |

 665 | 				records,
 666 | 				total: Number(totalResult[0]?.count ?? 0)
 667 | 			};

 674 | const getPatientVaccineSchedule = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 675 | 	.validator(z.object({ patientId: z.string() }))
 676 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 677 | 		try {
 678 | 			const { patientId } = ctx.data;
 679 | 			const patient = await db.query.patient.findFirst({
 680 | 				where: { id: patientId },
 681 | 				with: { immunizations: true }
 682 | 			});
 683 | 
 684 | 			if (!patient) {
 685 | 				throw new Error("Patient not found");
 686 | 			}
 687 | 
 688 | 			const ageInDays = Math.floor((Date.now() - patient.dateOfBirth.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
 689 | 
 690 | 			const dueVaccines = await db.query.vaccineSchedule.findMany({
 691 | 				where: {
 692 | 					isDeleted: false,
 693 | 					ageInDaysMin: { lte: ageInDays },
 694 | 					ageInDaysMax: { gte: ageInDays }
 695 | 				}
 696 | 			});
 697 | 
 698 | 			const administeredVaccines = new Set(patient.immunizations.map(i => i.vaccine));
 699 | 			const pendingVaccines = dueVaccines.filter(v => !administeredVaccines.has(v.vaccineName));
 700 | 
 701 | 			return { pendingVaccines, administeredVaccines: patient.immunizations };
 702 | 		} catch (error) {
 703 | 			console.error("Error getting patient vaccine schedule:", error);
 704 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get vaccine schedule");
 705 | 		}
 706 | 	});

 708 | const getVaccineInventoryStatus = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 709 | 	.validator(z.object({ clinicId: z.string() }))
 710 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 711 | 		try {
 712 | 			const { clinicId } = ctx.data;
 713 | 			const inventory = await db.query.vaccineInventory.findMany({
 714 | 				where: { clinicId },
 715 | 				orderBy: (inv, { asc }) => asc(inv.expirationDate)
 716 | 			});
 717 | 
 718 | 			const now = new Date();
 719 | 			const expiringSoon = inventory.filter(v => {
 720 | 				const daysUntilExpiry = Math.ceil(
 721 | 					((v.expirationDate?.getTime() ?? now.getTime()) - now.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)
 722 | 				);
 723 | 				return daysUntilExpiry <= 30 && daysUntilExpiry > 0;
 724 | 			});
 725 | 
 726 | 			const expired = inventory.filter(v => v.expirationDate && v.expirationDate < now);
 727 | 			const lowStock = inventory.filter(v => v.quantity < 10);
 728 | 
 729 | 			return {
 730 | 				totalVaccines: inventory.length,
 731 | 				totalDoses: inventory.reduce((sum, v) => sum + (v.quantity ?? 0), 0),
 732 | 				expiringSoon,
 733 | 				expired,
 734 | 				lowStock,
 735 | 				inventoryByVaccine: inventory
 736 | 			};
 737 | 		} catch (error) {
 738 | 			console.error("Error getting vaccine inventory:", error);
 739 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get vaccine inventory");
 740 | 		}
 741 | 	});

 827 | const recordImmunization = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 828 | 	.validator(recordImmunizationSchema)
 829 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 830 | 		try {
 831 | 			const data = ctx.data;
 832 | 			const result = await db.transaction(async tx => {
 833 | 				if (data.vaccineInventoryId) {
 834 | 					const inventory = await tx.query.vaccineInventory.findFirst({
 835 | 						where: { id: data.vaccineInventoryId }
 836 | 					});
 837 | 
 838 | 					if (!inventory || inventory.quantity < 1) {
 839 | 						throw new Error("Insufficient vaccine stock");
 840 | 					}
 841 | 
 842 | 					await tx
 843 | 						.update(schema.vaccineInventory)
 844 | 						.set({
 845 | 							quantity: inventory.quantity - 1,
 846 | 							updatedAt: new Date()
 847 | 						})
 848 | 						.where(eq(schema.vaccineInventory.id, data.vaccineInventoryId));
 849 | 				}
 850 | 
 851 | 				const [immunization] = await tx
 852 | 					.insert(schema.immunization)
 853 | 					.values({
 854 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 855 | 						recordId: crypto.randomUUID(),
 856 | 						...data,
 857 | 						status: "COMPLETED",
 858 | 						createdAt: new Date()
 859 | 					})
 860 | 					.returning();
 861 | 
 862 | 				const vaccineSchedule = await tx.query.vaccineSchedule.findFirst({
 863 | 					where: { vaccineName: data.vaccine }
 864 | 				});
 865 | 
 866 | 				if (vaccineSchedule?.ageInDaysMax) {
 867 | 					const patient = await tx.query.patient.findFirst({
 868 | 						where: { id: data.patientId }
 869 | 					});
 870 | 
 871 | 					if (patient) {
 872 | 						const ageAtVaccination = Math.floor(
 873 | 							(data.date.getTime() - patient.dateOfBirth.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)
 874 | 						);
 875 | 
 876 | 						if (ageAtVaccination > vaccineSchedule.ageInDaysMax) {
 877 | 							await tx
 878 | 								.update(schema.immunization)
 879 | 								.set({ isOverDue: true })
 880 | 								.where(eq(schema.immunization.id, immunization.id));
 881 | 						}
 882 | 					}
 883 | 				}
 884 | 
 885 | 				return immunization;
 886 | 			});
 887 | 
 888 | 			return result;
 889 | 		} catch (error) {
 890 | 			console.error("Error recording immunization:", error);
 891 | 			throw new Error("Failed to record immunization");
 892 | 		}
 893 | 	});

1043 | const bulkUpdateVaccineInventory = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1044 | 	.validator(bulkVaccineUpdateSchema)
1045 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1046 | 		try {
1047 | 			const { clinicId, updates } = ctx.data;
1048 | 			const results = await db.transaction(async tx => {
1049 | 				const output = [];
1050 | 				for (const update of updates) {
1051 | 					const existing = await tx.query.vaccineInventory.findFirst({
1052 | 						where: { clinicId, vaccineName: update.vaccineName }
1053 | 					});
1054 | 
1055 | 					if (existing) {
1056 | 						const [updated] = await tx
1057 | 							.update(schema.vaccineInventory)
1058 | 							.set({
1059 | 								quantity: existing.quantity + update.quantity,
1060 | 								lotNumber: update.lotNumber || existing.lotNumber,
1061 | 								expirationDate: update.expirationDate || existing.expirationDate,
1062 | 								updatedAt: new Date()
1063 | 							})
1064 | 							.where(eq(schema.vaccineInventory.id, existing.id))
1065 | 							.returning();
1066 | 						output.push(updated);
1067 | 					} else {
1068 | 						const [created] = await tx
1069 | 							.insert(schema.vaccineInventory)
1070 | 							.values({
1071 | 								id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1072 | 								clinicId,
1073 | 								vaccineName: update.vaccineName,
1074 | 								quantity: update.quantity,
1075 | 								lotNumber: update.lotNumber,
1076 | 								expirationDate: update.expirationDate,
1077 | 								createdAt: new Date(),
1078 | 								updatedAt: new Date()
1079 | 							})
1080 | 							.returning();
1081 | 						output.push(created);
1082 | 					}
1083 | 				}
1084 | 				return output;
1085 | 			});
1086 | 			return results;
1087 | 		} catch (error) {
1088 | 			console.error("Error bulk updating vaccine inventory:", error);
1089 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update vaccine inventory");
1090 | 		}
1091 | 	});

1093 | const syncFeedingLogs = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1094 | 	.validator(
1095 | 		z.object({
1096 | 			patientId: z.string(),
1097 | 			clinicId: z.string(),
1098 | 			externalLogs: z.array(
1099 | 				z.object({
1100 | 					timestamp: z.date(),
1101 | 					type: z.string(),
1102 | 					duration: z.number().optional(),
1103 | 					amount: z.number().optional(),
1104 | 					source: z.string()
1105 | 				})
1106 | 			)
1107 | 		})
1108 | 	)
1109 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1110 | 		try {
1111 | 			const { patientId, clinicId, externalLogs } = ctx.data;
1112 | 			const results = [];
1113 | 			const errors = [];
1114 | 
1115 | 			for (const externalLog of externalLogs) {
1116 | 				try {
1117 | 					const existingLog = await db.query.feedingLog.findFirst({
1118 | 						where: {
1119 | 							patientId,
1120 | 							clinicId,
1121 | 							date: {
1122 | 								gt: new Date(externalLog.timestamp.getTime() - 5 * 60 * 1000),
1123 | 								lt: new Date(externalLog.timestamp.getTime() + 5 * 60 * 1000)
1124 | 							}
1125 | 						}
1126 | 					});
1127 | 
1128 | 					if (!existingLog) {
1129 | 						const newLog = await createFeedingLog({
1130 | 							data: {
1131 | 								patientId,
1132 | 								date: externalLog.timestamp,
1133 | 								clinicId: clinicId,
1134 | 								type: externalLog.type as FeedingType,
1135 | 								duration: externalLog.duration,
1136 | 								amount: externalLog.amount,
1137 | 								notes: `Synced from ${externalLog.source}`
1138 | 							}
1139 | 						});
1140 | 						results.push(newLog);
1141 | 					} else {
1142 | 						errors.push({
1143 | 							timestamp: externalLog.timestamp,
1144 | 							error: "Duplicate log found within 5 minute window"
1145 | 						});
1146 | 					}
1147 | 				} catch (error) {
1148 | 					errors.push({
1149 | 						timestamp: externalLog.timestamp,
1150 | 						error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"
1151 | 					});
1152 | 				}
1153 | 			}
1154 | 
1155 | 			return { synced: results.length, failed: errors.length, results, errors };
1156 | 		} catch (error) {
1157 | 			console.error("Error syncing feeding logs:", error);
1158 | 			throw new Error("Failed to sync feeding logs");
1159 | 		}
1160 | 	});
1161 | 
1162 | const recordGrowthWithPercentiles = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1163 | 	.validator(growthWithPercentilesSchema)
1164 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1165 | 		try {
1166 | 			const data = ctx.data;
1167 | 			const result = await db.transaction(async tx => {
1168 | 				const patient = await tx.query.patient.findFirst({
1169 | 					where: { id: data.patientId }
1170 | 				});
1171 | 
1172 | 				if (!patient) {
1173 | 					throw new Error("Patient not found");
1174 | 				}
1175 | 
1176 | 				const ageDays = Math.floor(
1177 | 					(data.date.getTime() - patient.dateOfBirth.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)
1178 | 				);
1179 | 				const ageMonths = Math.floor(ageDays / 30);
1180 | 
1181 | 				const whoStandards = await tx.query.whoGrowthStandard.findMany({
1182 | 					where: {
1183 | 						gender: patient.gender as Gender,
1184 | 						ageDays: {
1185 | 							gte: ageDays - 30,
1186 | 							lte: ageDays + 30
1187 | 						}
1188 | 					}
1189 | 				});
1190 | 
1191 | 				let weightForAgeZ: number | undefined;
1192 | 				let heightForAgeZ: number | undefined;
1193 | 				let bmiForAgeZ: number | undefined;
1194 | 
1195 | 				const weightStandard = whoStandards.find(s => s.measurementType === "WEIGHT");
1196 | 				if (weightStandard && data.weight) {
1197 | 					weightForAgeZ = (data.weight - weightStandard.mValue) / weightStandard.sValue;
1198 | 				}
1199 | 
1200 | 				const heightStandard = whoStandards.find(s => s.measurementType === "HEIGHT");
1201 | 				if (heightStandard && data.height) {
1202 | 					heightForAgeZ = (data.height - heightStandard.mValue) / heightStandard.sValue;
1203 | 				}
1204 | 
1205 | 				if (data.bmi) {
1206 | 					const bmiStandard = whoStandards.find(s => s.measurementType === "BMI");
1207 | 					if (bmiStandard) {
1208 | 						bmiForAgeZ = (data.bmi - bmiStandard.mValue) / bmiStandard.sValue;
1209 | 					}
1210 | 				}
1211 | 
1212 | 				const [growthRecord] = await tx
1213 | 					.insert(schema.growthRecord)
1214 | 					.values({
1215 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1216 | 						...data,
1217 | 						ageDays,
1218 | 						ageMonths,
1219 | 						weightForAgeZ,
1220 | 						heightForAgeZ,
1221 | 						bmiForAgeZ,
1222 | 						recordedAt: new Date(),
1223 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
1224 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
1225 | 					})
1226 | 					.returning();
1227 | 
1228 | 				if (weightForAgeZ && (weightForAgeZ < -2 || weightForAgeZ > 2)) {
1229 | 					await tx.insert(schema.alert).values({
1230 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1231 | 						title: "Abnormal Growth Pattern",
1232 | 						message: `Patient ${patient.firstName} ${patient.lastName} has abnormal weight-for-age Z-score: ${weightForAgeZ.toFixed(2)}`,
1233 | 						type: "growth_alert",
1234 | 						timestamp: new Date(),
1235 | 						action: {
1236 | 							label: "View Patient",
1237 | 							href: `/patients/${patient.id}`
1238 | 						}
1239 | 					});
1240 | 				}
1241 | 
1242 | 				return growthRecord;
1243 | 			});
1244 | 
1245 | 			return result;
1246 | 		} catch (error) {
1247 | 			console.error("Error recording growth with percentiles:", error);
1248 | 			throw new Error("Failed to record growth data");
1249 | 		}
1250 | 	});
1251 | 
1252 | const getWHOStandards = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1253 | 	.validator(whoStandardsSchema)
1254 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1255 | 		try {
1256 | 			const { ageDays, gender, measurementType } = ctx.data;
1257 | 			const standard = await db.query.whoGrowthStandard.findFirst({
1258 | 				where: { ageDays, gender, measurementType }
1259 | 			});
1260 | 			return standard;
1261 | 		} catch (error) {
1262 | 			console.error("Error getting WHO standards:", error);
1263 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get WHO standards");
1264 | 		}
1265 | 	});
1266 | 
1267 | const generateRecurringFeedings = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1268 | 	.validator(recurringFeedingsSchema)
1269 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
1270 | 		try {
1271 | 			const { patientId, clinicId, schedule } = ctx.data;
1272 | 			const feedings = [];
1273 | 			const currentDate = new Date(schedule.startDate);
1274 | 			const endDate = new Date(schedule.endDate);
1275 | 
1276 | 			while (currentDate <= endDate) {
1277 | 				for (const time of schedule.times) {
1278 | 					const [hours, minutes] = time.split(":").map(Number);
1279 | 					const feedingTime = new Date(currentDate);
1280 | 					feedingTime.setHours(hours || 0, minutes || 0, 0, 0);
1281 | 
1282 | 					feedings.push({
1283 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1284 | 						patientId,
1285 | 						date: feedingTime,
1286 | 						type: schedule.type,
1287 | 						duration: schedule.duration,
1288 | 						amount: schedule.amount,
1289 | 						notes: "Auto-generated from recurring schedule",
1290 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
1291 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
1292 | 					});
1293 | 				}
1294 | 				currentDate.setDate(currentDate.getDate() + 1);
1295 | 			}
1296 | 
1297 | 			const existingLogs = await listFeedingLogs({
1298 | 				data: {
1299 | 					patientId,
1300 | 					clinicId,
1301 | 					startDate: schedule.startDate,
1302 | 					endDate: schedule.endDate,
1303 | 					limit: 1000,
1304 | 					offset: 0
1305 | 				}
1306 | 			});
1307 | 
1308 | 			const existingTimes = new Set(existingLogs.logs.map(log => log.date.toISOString()));
1309 | 			const newFeedings = feedings.filter(feeding => !existingTimes.has(feeding.date.toISOString()));
1310 | 
1311 | 			if (newFeedings.length > 0) {
1312 | 				return await createManyFeedingLogs({ data: { logs: newFeedings } });
1313 | 			}
1314 | 
1315 | 			return [];
1316 | 		} catch (error) {
1317 | 			console.error("Error generating recurring feedings:", error);
1318 | 			throw new Error("Failed to generate recurring feedings");
1319 | 		}
1320 | 	});
1321 | 
1322 | export {
1323 | 	addMeasurementPoint,
1324 | 	bulkUpdateVaccineInventory,
1325 | 	createDevelopmentalCheck,
1326 | 	createDevelopmentalMilestone,
1327 | 	createFeedingLog,
1328 | 	createImmunization,
1329 | 	createManyFeedingLogs,
1330 | 	createVaccineSchedule,
1331 | 	deleteFeedingLog,
1332 | 	generateRecurringFeedings,
1333 | 	getAllVaccineSchedules,
1334 | 	getBreastfeedingStats,
1335 | 	getDevelopmentalProgress,
1336 | 	getDevelopmentalScreenings,
1337 | 	getFeedingLogById,
1338 | 	getFeedingStats,
1339 | 	getFeedingsByDateRange,
1340 | 	getGrowthAnalytics,
1341 | 	getGrowthRecordById,
1342 | 	getLatestFeedingLog,
1343 | 	getOverdueImmunizations,
1344 | 	getPatientGrowthRecords,
1345 | 	getPatientVaccineSchedule,
1346 | 	getUpcomingImmunizations,
1347 | 	getVaccineInventoryStatus,
1348 | 	getWHOStandards,
1349 | 	listFeedingLogs,
1350 | 	listGrowthRecords,
1351 | 	listImmunizations,
1352 | 	recordGrowthWithPercentiles,
1353 | 	recordImmunization,
1354 | 	syncFeedingLogs,
1355 | 	updateFeedingLog,
1356 | 	updateManyFeedingLogs
1357 | };

```

`functions/pharmacy.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/repositories/pharmacy.repo.ts

 114 | const getPatientActivePrescriptions = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 115 | 	.validator(patientActivePrescriptionsSchema)
 116 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 117 | 		try {
 118 | 			const { patientId, clinicId, includeExpired } = ctx.data;
 119 | 
 120 | 			// Build where object dynamically
 121 | 			const where = {
 122 | 				clinicId,
 123 | 				patientId,
 124 | 				status: "active",
 125 | 				endDate: {
 126 | 					gt: new Date()
 127 | 				}
 128 | 			};
 129 | 
 130 | 			if (clinicId) {
 131 | 				where.clinicId = clinicId;
 132 | 			}
 133 | 
 134 | 			if (!includeExpired) {
 135 | 				where.status = "active";
 136 | 				where.endDate = {
 137 | 					gt: new Date()
 138 | 				};
 139 | 			}
 140 | 
 141 | 			const prescriptions = await db.query.prescription.findMany({
 142 | 				where: { clinicId, patientId, status: "active", endDate: { gt: new Date() } },
 143 | 				with: {
 144 | 					prescribedItems: {
 145 | 						with: {
 146 | 							drug: true,
 147 | 							dispenses: {
 148 | 								orderBy: { dispensedAt: "desc" },
 149 | 								limit: 10
 150 | 							}
 151 | 						}
 152 | 					},
 153 | 					doctor: {
 154 | 						with: {
 155 | 							user: true
 156 | 						}
 157 | 					}
 158 | 				},
 159 | 				orderBy: { issuedDate: "desc" }
 160 | 			});
 161 | 
 162 | 			return prescriptions;
 163 | 		} catch (error) {
 164 | 			console.error("Error getting active prescriptions:", error);
 165 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get active prescriptions");
 166 | 		}

 297 | 		try {

 300 | 				where: {

 305 | 					}

 322 | const listDrugs = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 323 | 	.validator(listDrugsSchema)
 324 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 325 | 		try {
 326 | 			const { search, category, limit, offset } = ctx.data;
 327 | 
 328 | 			const whereConditions: Record<string, unknown> = {};
 329 | 
 330 | 			if (search) {
 331 | 				whereConditions.OR = [
 332 | 					{ name: { like: `%${search}%` } },
 333 | 					{ genericName: { like: `%${search}%` } },
 334 | 					{ brandName: { like: `%${search}%` } }
 335 | 				];
 336 | 			}
 337 | 
 338 | 			if (category) {
 339 | 				whereConditions.contraindications = { like: `%${category}%` };
 340 | 			}
 341 | 
 342 | 			const drugsList = await db.query.drug.findMany({
 343 | 				where: whereConditions,
 344 | 				limit,
 345 | 				offset,
 346 | 				orderBy: { name: "asc" }
 347 | 			});
 348 | 
 349 | 			// Count query using same conditions
 350 | 			const countResult = await db
 351 | 				.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)` })
 352 | 				.from(schema.drug)
 353 | 				.where(
 354 | 					and(
 355 | 						search
 356 | 							? or(
 357 | 									like(schema.drug.name, `%${search}%`),
 358 | 									like(schema.drug.genericName, `%${search}%`),
 359 | 									like(schema.drug.brandName, `%${search}%`)
 360 | 								)
 361 | 							: undefined,
 362 | 						category ? like(schema.drug.contraindications, `%${category}%`) : undefined
 363 | 					)
 364 | 				);
 365 | 
 366 | 			const total = Number(countResult[0]?.count ?? 0);
 367 | 
 368 | 			return {
 369 | 				drugs: drugsList,
 370 | 				pagination: { limit, offset, total, hasMore: offset + limit < total }
 371 | 			};
 372 | 		} catch (error) {
 373 | 			console.error("Error listing drugs:", error);
 374 | 			throw new Error("Failed to list drugs");
 375 | 		}
 376 | 	});

 394 | const updatePrescriptionStatus = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 395 | 	.validator(updatePrescriptionStatusSchema)
 396 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 397 | 		try {
 398 | 			const { id, status, performedBy } = ctx.data;
 399 | 			await db.transaction(async tx => {
 400 | 				await tx
 401 | 					.update(schema.prescription)
 402 | 					.set({ status, updatedAt: new Date() })
 403 | 					.where(eq(schema.prescription.id, id));
 404 | 
 405 | 				await tx.insert(schema.prescriptionLog).values({
 406 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 407 | 					prescriptionId: id,
 408 | 					action: status.toUpperCase(),
 409 | 					performedBy,
 410 | 					createdAt: new Date()
 411 | 				});
 412 | 			});
 413 | 			return { success: true };
 414 | 		} catch (error) {
 415 | 			console.error("Error updating prescription status:", error);
 416 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update prescription status");
 417 | 		}

 420 | const checkDoctorAccess = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 421 | 	.validator(checkDoctorAccessSchema)
 422 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 423 | 		try {
 424 | 			const { doctorId, userId, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 425 | 			const userRecord = await db.query.user.findFirst({
 426 | 				where: { id: userId },
 427 | 				with: {
 428 | 					doctors: true,
 429 | 					clinics: true
 430 | 				}
 431 | 			});
 432 | 
 433 | 			if (!userRecord) return false;
 434 | 
 435 | 			// Admin has full access
 436 | 			if (userRecord.role === "admin" || userRecord.role === "superadmin") return true;
 437 | 
 438 | 			// Staff has limited access
 439 | 			if (userRecord.role === "staff") return true;
 440 | 
 441 | 			// Doctor access
 442 | 			if (userRecord.role === "doctor") {
 443 | 				const doctorRecord = await db.query.doctor.findFirst({
 444 | 					where: { userId: userId, id: doctorId }
 445 | 				});
 446 | 				return !!doctorRecord;
 447 | 			}
 448 | 
 449 | 			// Check clinic membership
 450 | 			if (clinicId) {
 451 | 				const clinicMember = await db.query.clinicMember.findFirst({
 452 | 					where: { userId: userId, clinicId: clinicId }
 453 | 				});
 454 | 				return !!clinicMember;
 455 | 			}
 456 | 
 457 | 			return false;
 458 | 		} catch (error) {
 459 | 			console.error("Error checking doctor access:", error);
 460 | 			throw new Error("Failed to check doctor access");
 461 | 		}
 462 | 	});
 463 | 
 464 | const checkDrugStock = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 465 | 	.validator(checkDrugStockSchema)
 466 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 467 | 		try {
 468 | 			const { clinicId, threshold } = ctx.data;
 469 | 			const lowStockDrugs = await db.query.drug.findMany({
 470 | 				where: {
 471 | 					clinicId,
 472 | 					quantityInStock: { lt: threshold }
 473 | 				}
 474 | 			});
 475 | 
 476 | 			for (const drug of lowStockDrugs) {
 477 | 				await db.insert(schema.notification).values({
 478 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 479 | 					userId: "admin",
 480 | 					clinicId,
 481 | 					title: "Low Stock Alert",
 482 | 					body: `${drug.name} is running low. Only ${drug.quantityInStock} units remaining.`,
 483 | 					type: "low_stock",
 484 | 					priority: "high",
 485 | 					createdAt: new Date(),
 486 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 487 | 				});
 488 | 			}
 489 | 
 490 | 			return lowStockDrugs;
 491 | 		} catch (error) {
 492 | 			console.error("Error checking drug stock:", error);
 493 | 			throw new Error("Failed to check drug stock");
 494 | 		}
 495 | 	});
 496 | 
 497 | const dispenseMedication = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 498 | 	.validator(dispenseMedicationSchema)
 499 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 500 | 		try {
 501 | 			const data = ctx.data;
 502 | 			const result = await db.transaction(async tx => {
 503 | 				const prescribedItem = await tx.query.prescribedItem.findFirst({
 504 | 					where: { id: data.prescribedItemId },
 505 | 					with: { drug: true }
 506 | 				});
 507 | 
 508 | 				if (!prescribedItem) {
 509 | 					throw new Error("Prescribed item not found");
 510 | 				}
 511 | 
 512 | 				if (!prescribedItem.drug || (prescribedItem.drug.quantityInStock ?? 0) < data.quantityDispensed) {
 513 | 					throw new Error("Insufficient stock");
 514 | 				}
 515 | 
 516 | 				const [dispense] = await tx
 517 | 					.insert(schema.medicationDispense)
 518 | 					.values({
 519 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 520 | 						...data,
 521 | 						dispensedAt: new Date(),
 522 | 						createdAt: new Date()
 523 | 					})
 524 | 					.returning();
 525 | 
 526 | 				await tx
 527 | 					.update(schema.drug)
 528 | 					.set({
 529 | 						quantityInStock: (prescribedItem.drug.quantityInStock ?? 0) - data.quantityDispensed,
 530 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 531 | 					})
 532 | 					.where(eq(schema.drug.id, prescribedItem.drugId));
 533 | 
 534 | 				await tx
 535 | 					.update(schema.prescribedItem)
 536 | 					.set({
 537 | 						refillsRemaining: (prescribedItem.refillsRemaining ?? 0) - 1,
 538 | 						lastRefillDate: new Date(),
 539 | 						quantityDispensedTotal: (prescribedItem.quantityDispensedTotal ?? 0) + data.quantityDispensed,
 540 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 541 | 					})
 542 | 					.where(eq(schema.prescribedItem.id, data.prescribedItemId));
 543 | 
 544 | 				await tx.insert(schema.prescriptionLog).values({
 545 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 546 | 					prescriptionId: data.prescriptionId,
 547 | 					action: "DISPENSED",
 548 | 					performedBy: data.dispensedBy,
 549 | 					details: `Dispensed ${data.quantityDispensed} units of ${prescribedItem.drug.name}`,
 550 | 					createdAt: new Date()
 551 | 				});
 552 | 
 553 | 				return dispense;
 554 | 			});
 555 | 
 556 | 			return result;
 557 | 		} catch (error) {
 558 | 			console.error("Error dispensing medication:", error);
 559 | 			throw new Error("Failed to dispense medication");
 560 | 		}
 561 | 	});
 562 |

 598 | 			}));
```

`functions/queries/analytic.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { queryOptions } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   2 | 
   3 | import {
   4 | 	getImmunizationCoverage,
   5 | 	getNewPatientsCount,
   6 | 	getPatientDemographics,
   7 | 	getSeasonalAppointmentData,
   8 | 	getTopConditions
   9 | } from "@/functions/analytics";
  10 | 
  11 | export const analyticsKeys = {
  12 | 	all: ["analytics"] as const,
  13 | 	newPatients: (clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) =>
  14 | 		[...analyticsKeys.all, "newPatients", clinicId, startDate, endDate] as const,
  15 | 	demographics: (clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) =>
  16 | 		[...analyticsKeys.all, "demographics", clinicId, startDate, endDate] as const,
  17 | 	topConditions: (clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date, limit: number) =>
  18 | 		[...analyticsKeys.all, "topConditions", clinicId, startDate, endDate, limit] as const,
  19 | 	seasonalAppointments: (clinicId: string, year: number) =>
  20 | 		[...analyticsKeys.all, "seasonal", clinicId, year] as const,
  21 | 	immunizationCoverage: (clinicId: string) => [...analyticsKeys.all, "immunizationCoverage", clinicId] as const
  22 | };
  23 | 
  24 | export const getNewPatientsCountOptions = (clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) =>
  25 | 	queryOptions({
  26 | 		queryKey: analyticsKeys.newPatients(clinicId, startDate, endDate),
  27 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getNewPatientsCount({ data: { clinicId, startDate, endDate }, signal }),
  28 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 30, // 30 minutes
  29 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 60 // 1 hour
  30 | 	});
  31 | 
  32 | export const getPatientDemographicsOptions = (clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) =>
  33 | 	queryOptions({
  34 | 		queryKey: analyticsKeys.demographics(clinicId, startDate, endDate),
  35 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getPatientDemographics({ data: { clinicId, startDate, endDate }, signal }),
  36 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 60, // 1 hour
  37 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 120 // 2 hours
  38 | 	});
  39 | 
  40 | export const getTopConditionsOptions = (clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date, limit = 10) =>
  41 | 	queryOptions({
  42 | 		queryKey: analyticsKeys.topConditions(clinicId, startDate, endDate, limit),
  43 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getTopConditions({ data: { clinicId, startDate, endDate, limit }, signal }),
  44 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 30, // 30 minutes
  45 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 60 // 1 hour
  46 | 	});
  47 |
```

```ts
   1 | import type { Appointment, AppointmentStatus } from "@clinic/db/zod/clinic.schema";
   2 | import { queryOptions } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   3 | 
   4 | import {
   5 | 	getAllAppointments,
   6 | 	getAppointmentById,
   7 | 	getAppointmentCountsByStatus,
   8 | 	getAppointmentsByStatus,
   9 | 	getAppointmentsInRange,
  10 | 	getAppointmentsWithFilters,
  11 | 	getAppointmentsWithPagination,
  12 | 	getDoctorAppointmentsInRange,
  13 | 	getMonthlyAppointmentData,
  14 | 	getPatientAppointments,
  15 | 	validateAppointment
  16 | } from "@/functions/appointment";
  17 | 
  18 | export const appointmentKeys = {
  19 | 	all: ["appointments"] as const,
  20 | 	detail: (id: string, clinicId: string) => [...appointmentKeys.all, "detail", id, clinicId] as const,
  21 | 	list: (filters: Record<string, unknown>) => [...appointmentKeys.all, "list", filters] as const,
  22 | 	inRange: (clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date, doctorId?: string) =>
  23 | 		[...appointmentKeys.all, "range", clinicId, startDate, endDate, doctorId] as const,
  24 | 	byStatus: (clinicId: string, status: string) => [...appointmentKeys.all, "status", clinicId, status] as const,
  25 | 	byClinic: (clinicId: string) => [...appointmentKeys.all, "clinic", clinicId] as const,
  26 | 	monthly: (clinicId: string, year: number) => [...appointmentKeys.all, "monthly", clinicId, year] as const,
  27 | 	byPatient: (patientId: string, clinicId: string, page: number, limit: number, status?: string) =>
  28 | 		[...appointmentKeys.all, "patient", patientId, clinicId, page, limit, status] as const,
  29 | 	byDoctor: (doctorId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) =>
  30 | 		[...appointmentKeys.all, "doctor", doctorId, startDate, endDate] as const,
  31 | 	counts: (clinicId: string) => [...appointmentKeys.all, "counts", clinicId] as const,
  32 | 	validate: (appointmentId: string) => [...appointmentKeys.all, "validate", appointmentId] as const
  33 | };
  34 | 
  35 | export const getAppointmentByIdOptions = (id: string, clinicId: string) =>
  36 | 	queryOptions({
  37 | 		queryKey: appointmentKeys.detail(id, clinicId),
  38 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getAppointmentById({ data: { id, clinicId }, signal }) as Promise<Appointment>,
  39 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5, // 5 minutes
  40 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 10 // 10 minutes
  41 | 	});
  42 | 
  43 | export const getAppointmentsInRangeOptions = (clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date, doctorId?: string) =>
  44 | 	queryOptions({
  45 | 		queryKey: appointmentKeys.inRange(clinicId, startDate, endDate, doctorId),
  46 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) =>
  47 | 			getAppointmentsInRange({ data: { clinicId, startDate, endDate, doctorId }, signal }) as Promise<
  48 | 				Appointment[]
  49 | 			>,
  50 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 2, // 2 minutes
  51 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 5 // 5 minutes
  52 | 	});
  53 | 
  54 | export const getAppointmentsByStatusOptions = (clinicId: string, status: AppointmentStatus) =>
  55 | 	queryOptions({
  56 | 		queryKey: appointmentKeys.byStatus(clinicId, status),
  57 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) =>
  58 | 			getAppointmentsByStatus({ data: { clinicId, status }, signal }) as Promise<Appointment[]>,
  59 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 2, // 2 minutes
  60 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 5 // 5 minutes
  61 | 	});
  62 | 
  63 | export const getAllAppointmentsOptions = (clinicId: string) =>
  64 | 	queryOptions({
  65 | 		queryKey: appointmentKeys.byClinic(clinicId),
  66 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getAllAppointments({ data: { clinicId }, signal }) as Promise<Appointment[]>,
  67 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 2, // 2 minutes
  68 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 5 // 5 minutes
  69 | 	});
  70 | 
  71 | export const getAppointmentsWithFiltersOptions = (filters: {
  72 | 	clinicId: string;
  73 | 	filters: {
  74 | 		status?: AppointmentStatus;
  75 | 		startDate?: Date;
  76 | 		endDate?: Date;
  77 | 		doctorId?: string;
  78 | 		patientId?: string;
  79 | 		type?: string;
  80 | 		search?: string;
  81 | 	};
  82 | 	pagination: { limit: number; offset: number };
  83 | }) =>
  84 | 	queryOptions({
  85 | 		queryKey: appointmentKeys.list(filters),
  86 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) =>
  87 | 			getAppointmentsWithFilters({ data: filters, signal }) as unknown as Promise<Appointment[]>,
  88 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 1, // 1 minute
  89 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 5 // 5 minutes
  90 | 	});
  91 | 
  92 | export const getAppointmentsWithPaginationOptions = (params: {
  93 | 	clinicId: string;
  94 | 	pagination: { page: number; limit: number };
  95 | 	filters?: {
  96 | 		status?: AppointmentStatus;
  97 | 		fromDate?: Date;
  98 | 		toDate?: Date;
  99 | 		patientId?: string;
 100 | 		doctorId?: string;
 101 | 		search?: string;
 102 | 	};
 103 | }) =>
 104 | 	queryOptions({
 105 | 		queryKey: appointmentKeys.list(params),
 106 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) =>
 107 | 			getAppointmentsWithPagination({ data: params, signal }) as unknown as Promise<Appointment[]>,
 108 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 1, // 1 minute
 109 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 5 // 5 minutes
 110 | 	});
 111 | 
 112 | export const getMonthlyAppointmentDataOptions = (clinicId: string, year: number) =>
 113 | 	queryOptions({
 114 | 		queryKey: appointmentKeys.monthly(clinicId, year),
 115 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getMonthlyAppointmentData({ data: { clinicId, year }, signal }),
 116 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 30, // 30 minutes
 117 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 60 // 1 hour
 118 | 	});
 119 |

 121 | 	patientId: string,
 122 | 	clinicId: string,
 123 | 	page: number,
 124 | 	limit: number,
 125 | 	status?: AppointmentStatus
 126 | ) =>
 127 | 	queryOptions({
 128 | 		queryKey: appointmentKeys.byPatient(patientId, clinicId, page, limit, status),
 129 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) =>
 130 | 			getPatientAppointments({
 131 | 				data: { patientId, clinicId, pagination: { page, limit }, status },
 132 | 				signal
 133 | 			}) as unknown as Promise<Appointment[]>,

 136 | 	});

 139 | 	queryOptions({
```

```ts
   1 | // functions/queries/clinic.ts
   2 | import { queryOptions } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   3 | 
   4 | import {
   5 | 	canDeleteService,
   6 | 	getAvailableServices,

  28 | 
  29 | // =======================
  30 | // Query Keys
  31 | // =======================

  33 | export const clinicKeys = {
  34 | 	all: ["clinics"] as const,
  35 | 
  36 | 	// Clinic detail keys
  37 | 	detail: (clinicId: string) => [...clinicKeys.all, "detail", clinicId] as const,
  38 | 	byName: (name: string) => [...clinicKeys.all, "byName", name] as const,
  39 | 	default: () => [...clinicKeys.all, "default"] as const,
  40 | 
  41 | 	// User clinic relations
  42 | 	userClinics: (userId: string) => [...clinicKeys.all, "user", userId] as const,
  43 | 
  44 | 	// Statistics and dashboard
  45 | 	statistics: (clinicId: string) => [...clinicKeys.all, "statistics", clinicId] as const,
  46 | 	dashboard: (clinicId: string) => [...clinicKeys.all, "dashboard", clinicId] as const,
  47 | 	settings: (clinicId: string) => [...clinicKeys.all, "settings", clinicId] as const,
  48 | 
  49 | 	// Service keys
  50 | 	services: {
  51 | 		all: (clinicId: string) => [...clinicKeys.all, "services", clinicId] as const,
  52 | 		list: (params: { clinicId: string; search?: string; category?: string; page?: number; pageSize?: number }) =>
  53 | 			[...clinicKeys.services.all(params.clinicId), "list", params] as const,
  54 | 		available: (clinicId: string) => [...clinicKeys.services.all(clinicId), "available"] as const,
  55 | 		detail: (serviceId: string, clinicId?: string) =>
  56 | 			[...clinicKeys.services.all(clinicId || ""), "detail", serviceId] as const,
  57 | 		byCategory: (clinicId: string, category: string) =>
  58 | 			[...clinicKeys.services.all(clinicId), "category", category] as const,
  59 | 		categories: (clinicId: string) => [...clinicKeys.services.all(clinicId), "categories"] as const,
  60 | 		search: (clinicId: string, searchTerm: string) =>
  61 | 			[...clinicKeys.services.all(clinicId), "search", searchTerm] as const,
  62 | 		statistics: (clinicId: string, startDate?: Date, endDate?: Date) =>
  63 | 			[...clinicKeys.services.all(clinicId), "statistics", { startDate, endDate }] as const,
  64 | 		popular: (clinicId: string, limit?: number, startDate?: Date, endDate?: Date) =>
  65 | 			[...clinicKeys.services.all(clinicId), "popular", { limit, startDate, endDate }] as const,
  66 | 		lowUsage: (clinicId: string, threshold?: number, days?: number) =>
  67 | 			[...clinicKeys.services.all(clinicId), "low-usage", { threshold, days }] as const,
  68 | 		revenue: (clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) =>
  69 | 			[...clinicKeys.services.all(clinicId), "revenue", { startDate, endDate }] as const,
  70 | 		usageTrends: (clinicId: string, serviceId: string, months?: number) =>
  71 | 			[...clinicKeys.services.all(clinicId), "usage-trends", serviceId, months] as const,
  72 | 		canDelete: (serviceId: string) => [...clinicKeys.services.all(""), "can-delete", serviceId] as const
  73 | 	},
  74 | 
  75 | 	// Doctor performance keys
  76 | 	doctorPerformance: (clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) =>
  77 | 		[...clinicKeys.all, "doctor-performance", clinicId, startDate, endDate] as const,
  78 | 
  79 | 	// Config keys
  80 | 	config: (key: string) => [...clinicKeys.all, "config", key] as const
  81 | };
  82 | 
  83 | // =======================
  84 | // Clinic Query Options
  85 | // =======================
  86 | 
  87 | export const getClinicByIdOptions = (clinicId: string) =>
  88 | 	queryOptions({
  89 | 		queryKey: clinicKeys.detail(clinicId),
  90 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getClinicById({ data: { clinicId }, signal }),
  91 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 10, // 10 minutes
  92 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 30, // 30 minutes
  93 | 		enabled: !!clinicId
  94 | 	});
  95 | 
  96 | export const getClinicByNameOptions = (name: string) =>
  97 | 	queryOptions({
  98 | 		queryKey: clinicKeys.byName(name),
  99 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getClinicByName({ data: { name }, signal }),
 100 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 30, // 30 minutes
 101 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 60, // 1 hour
 102 | 		enabled: !!name
 103 | 	});
 104 | 
 105 | export const getDefaultClinicOptions = () =>
 106 | 	queryOptions({
 107 | 		queryKey: clinicKeys.default(),
 108 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getDefaultClinic({ signal }),
 109 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 30, // 30 minutes
 110 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 60 // 1 hour
 111 | 	});
 112 |

 114 | 	queryOptions({

 116 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getUserClinics({ data: { userId }, signal }),

 120 | 	});
 121 | 
 122 | // =======================
 123 | // Statistics & Dashboard Options
 124 | // =======================

 127 | 	queryOptions({
 128 | 		queryKey: clinicKeys.statistics(clinicId),
 129 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getClinicStatistics({ data: { clinicId }, signal }),

 306 | // =======================
 307 | // Infinite Query Options (for paginated services)
 308 | // =======================
 309 | 
 310 | import { infiniteQueryOptions } from "@tanstack/react-query";
 311 | 
 312 | export const infiniteServicesOptions = (params: {
 313 | 	clinicId: string;
 314 | 	search?: string;
 315 | 	category?: string;
 316 | 	pageSize?: number;
 317 | }) =>
 318 | 	infiniteQueryOptions({
 319 | 		queryKey: clinicKeys.services.list({ ...params, page: 1 }),
 320 | 		queryFn: ({ pageParam = 1, signal }) =>
 321 | 			listServices({
 322 | 				data: { ...params, page: pageParam, pageSize: params.pageSize || 10 },
 323 | 				signal
 324 | 			}),
 325 | 		initialPageParam: 1,
 326 | 		getNextPageParam: (lastPage, allPages) => {
 327 | 			const nextPage = allPages.length + 1;
 328 | 			return nextPage <= lastPage.totalPages ? nextPage : undefined;
 329 | 		},
 330 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 2, // 2 minutes
 331 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 5, // 5 minutes
 332 | 		enabled: !!params.clinicId
 333 | 	});

```

```ts
   1 | import type { AvailabilityStatus, Status } from "@clinic/db";
   2 | import { queryOptions } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   3 | 
   4 | import {
   5 | 	getAvailableTimeSlots,
```

`functions/queries/medical.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // queries/medical.ts
   2 | 
   3 | import type { PaymentStatus } from "@clinic/db/schema";
   4 | import { type QueryClient, queryOptions } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   5 | 
   6 | import {
   7 | 	checkVitalSignsAccess,
   8 | 	countMedicalRecord,
   9 | 	getClinicRevenue,
  10 | 	getDiagnosesByMedicalRecordId,
  11 | 	getEncounterById,
  12 | 	getLatestVitalSigns,
  13 | 	getMedicalRecordById,
  14 | 	getPatientEncounters,
  15 | 	getPatientMedicalRecords,
  16 | 	getPaymentById,
  17 | 	getPaymentsByAppointmentId,
  18 | 	getPaymentsByPatientId,

  22 | 	getVitalSigns,
  23 | 	getVitalSignsByMedicalRecordId,

  25 | 	listPayments,
  26 | 	listVitalSignsByPatient
  27 | } from "@/functions/medical";
  28 | 
  29 | // =======================
  30 | // Query Keys
  31 | // =======================
  32 | 
  33 | export const medicalKeys = {
  34 | 	all: ["medical"] as const,
  35 | 
  36 | 	// Medical Record keys
  37 | 	medicalRecords: ["medicalRecords"] as const,
  38 | 	medicalRecordCount: (clinicId: string, patientId?: string, doctorId?: string) =>
  39 | 		[...medicalKeys.medicalRecords, "count", clinicId, patientId, doctorId] as const,
  40 | 	medicalRecordList: (filters: {
  41 | 		clinicId: string;

  43 | 		doctorId?: string;
  44 | 		limit?: number;
  45 | 		offset?: number;
  46 | 	}) => [...medicalKeys.medicalRecords, "list", filters] as const,
  47 | 	medicalRecordDetail: (recordId: string, clinicId: string) =>
  48 | 		[...medicalKeys.medicalRecords, "detail", recordId, clinicId] as const,
  49 | 	patientMedicalRecords: (patientId: string, clinicId: string, limit?: number, offset?: number) =>
  50 | 		[...medicalKeys.medicalRecords, "patient", patientId, clinicId, limit, offset] as const,
  51 | 
  52 | 	// Diagnosis/Encounter keys
  53 | 	encounters: ["encounters"] as const,

  55 | 	patientEncounters: (patientId: string, clinicId: string) =>
  56 | 		[...medicalKeys.encounters, "patient", patientId, clinicId] as const,
  57 | 	diagnosesByMedicalRecord: (medicalId: string) => [...medicalKeys.encounters, "byMedicalRecord", medicalId] as const,
  58 | 
  59 | 	// Vital Signs keys
  60 | 	vitalSigns: ["vitalSigns"] as const,
  61 | 	vitalSignsList: (filters: {

  65 | 		toDate?: Date;
  66 | 		page?: number;
  67 | 		pageSize?: number;
  68 | 		encounterId?: string;

  70 | 	vitalSignsByPatient: (
  71 | 		patientId: string,
  72 | 		clinicId: string,
  73 | 		fromDate: Date,
  74 | 		toDate: Date,
  75 | 		page?: number,
  76 | 		pageSize?: number

  79 | 	latestVitalSigns: (patientId: string, clinicId: string) =>
  80 | 		[...medicalKeys.vitalSigns, "latest", patientId, clinicId] as const,
  81 | 	vitalSignsByMedicalRecord: (medicalId: string) =>
  82 | 		[...medicalKeys.vitalSigns, "byMedicalRecord", medicalId] as const,
  83 | 
  84 | 	// Trend Data keys
  85 | 	trendData: (patientId: string, clinicId: string, days: number) =>
  86 | 		[...medicalKeys.all, "trendData", patientId, clinicId, days] as const,
  87 | 
  88 | 	// Access Control keys
  89 | 	vitalSignsAccess: (userId: string, patientId: string) =>
  90 | 		[...medicalKeys.all, "access", "vitalSigns", userId, patientId] as const,
  91 | 
  92 | 	// Payment keys
  93 | 	payments: ["payments"] as const,

 109 |

 220 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getVitalSigns({ data: filters, signal }),

 324 | export const getTimeLeftForAppointmentOptions = (appointmentId: string) =>
 325 | 	queryOptions({
 326 | 		queryKey: medicalKeys.timeLeftForAppointment(appointmentId),
 327 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getTimeLeftForAppointment({ data: { appointmentId }, signal }),
 328 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 30, // 30 seconds (time changes frequently)
 329 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 2, // 2 minutes
 330 | 		refetchInterval: 60000 // Refetch every minute to update remaining time
 331 | 	});
 332 | 
 333 | // =======================
 334 | // Mutation Query Options (for useQueryClient invalidation)
 335 | // =======================
 336 | 
 337 | // These are helper keys for invalidating queries after mutations
 338 | export const medicalMutationKeys = {
 339 | 	// Medical Record mutations
 340 | 	createMedicalRecord: () => ["createMedicalRecord"] as const,
 341 | 	updateMedicalRecord: () => ["updateMedicalRecord"] as const,
 342 | 	deleteMedicalRecord: () => ["deleteMedicalRecord"] as const,
 343 | 	softDeleteMedicalRecord: () => ["softDeleteMedicalRecord"] as const,
 344 | 	restoreMedicalRecord: () => ["restoreMedicalRecord"] as const,
 345 | 
 346 | 	// Diagnosis mutations
 347 | 	createDiagnosis: () => ["createDiagnosis"] as const,
 348 | 	updateDiagnosis: () => ["updateDiagnosis"] as const,
 349 | 	deleteDiagnosis: () => ["deleteDiagnosis"] as const,
 350 | 	softDeleteDiagnosis: () => ["softDeleteDiagnosis"] as const,
 351 | 	restoreDiagnosis: () => ["restoreDiagnosis"] as const,
 352 | 
 353 | 	// Vital Sign mutations
 354 | 	createVitalSign: () => ["createVitalSign"] as const,
 355 | 	updateVitalSign: () => ["updateVitalSign"] as const,
 356 | 	deleteVitalSign: () => ["deleteVitalSign"] as const,
 357 | 
 358 | 	// Payment mutations
 359 | 	createBillForAppointment: () => ["createBillForAppointment"] as const,
 360 | 	processPayment: () => ["processPayment"] as const,
 361 | 
 362 | 	// Patient Bill mutations
 363 | 	createPatientBill: () => ["createPatientBill"] as const,
 364 | 	updatePatientBill: () => ["updatePatientBill"] as const,
 365 | 	deletePatientBill: () => ["deletePatientBill"] as const,
 366 | 
 367 | 	// Complex Operations mutations
 368 | 	completeEncounter: () => ["completeEncounter"] as const,
 369 | 	addVitalSignsToMedicalRecord: () => ["addVitalSignsToMedicalRecord"] as const,
 370 | 	createCompleteEncounter: () => ["createCompleteEncounter"] as const
 371 | };
 372 | 
 373 | // Invalidation helper
 374 | export const invalidateMedicalQueries = (
 375 | 	queryClient: QueryClient,
 376 | 	options?: {
 377 | 		patientId?: string;
 378 | 		medicalRecordId?: string;
 379 | 		appointmentId?: string;
 380 | 		clinicId?: string;
 381 | 	}
 382 | ) => {
 383 | 	const { patientId, medicalRecordId, appointmentId, clinicId } = options || {};
 384 | 
 385 | 	// Invalidate all medical records lists
 386 | 	queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: medicalKeys.medicalRecords });
 387 | 
 388 | 	// Invalidate patient-specific queries
 389 | 	if (patientId) {
 390 | 		queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 391 | 			queryKey: medicalKeys.patientMedicalRecords(patientId, clinicId || "")
 392 | 		});
 393 | 		queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 394 | 			queryKey: medicalKeys.patientEncounters(patientId, clinicId || "")
 395 | 		});
 396 | 		queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 397 | 			queryKey: medicalKeys.vitalSignsList({ patientId, clinicId: clinicId || "" })
 398 | 		});
 399 | 		queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 400 | 			queryKey: medicalKeys.latestVitalSigns(patientId, clinicId || "")
 401 | 		});
 402 | 		queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 403 | 			queryKey: medicalKeys.paymentsByPatient(patientId)
 404 | 		});
 405 | 	}
 406 | 
 407 | 	// Invalidate medical record specific queries
 408 | 	if (medicalRecordId) {
 409 | 		queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 410 | 			queryKey: medicalKeys.medicalRecordDetail(medicalRecordId, clinicId || "")
 411 | 		});
 412 | 		queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 413 | 			queryKey: medicalKeys.diagnosesByMedicalRecord(medicalRecordId)
 414 | 		});
 415 | 		queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 416 | 			queryKey: medicalKeys.vitalSignsByMedicalRecord(medicalRecordId)
 417 | 		});
 418 | 	}
 419 | 
 420 | 	// Invalidate appointment payment queries
 421 | 	if (appointmentId) {
 422 | 		queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 423 | 			queryKey: medicalKeys.paymentsByAppointment(appointmentId)
 424 | 		});
 425 | 	}
 426 | 
 427 | 	// Invalidate clinic revenue
 428 | 	if (clinicId) {
 429 | 		queryClient.invalidateQueries({
 430 | 			queryKey: medicalKeys.paymentsList({ clinicId, limit: 0, offset: 0 })
 431 | 		});
 432 | 	}
 433 | };

```

`functions/queries/pediatric.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // queries/pediatric.ts
   2 |

  54 | 		list: (clinicId: string, patientId?: string, limit?: number, offset?: number) =>
  55 | 			[...pediatricKeys.all, "growthRecords", "list", clinicId, patientId, limit, offset] as const,

  84 | 			[...pediatricKeys.all, "feedingLogs", "stats", patientId, clinicId, days] as const,

  86 | 			[...pediatricKeys.all, "feedingLogs", "breastfeedingStats", patientId, clinicId, days] as const,
  87 | 		byDateRange: (patientId: string, clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) =>
  88 | 			[...pediatricKeys.all, "feedingLogs", "dateRange", patientId, clinicId, startDate, endDate] as const,
  89 | 		latest: (patientId: string) => [...pediatricKeys.all, "feedingLogs", "latest", patientId] as const
  90 | 	},
  91 |

  97 | 	},

 108 | 		},

 113 | 	},
 114 | 
 115 | 	// WHO Standards
 116 | 	whoStandards: (ageDays: number, gender: Gender, measurementType: MeasurementType) =>
 117 | 		[...pediatricKeys.all, "whoStandards", ageDays, gender, measurementType] as const
 118 | };
 119 | 
 120 | // =======================
 121 | // Growth Records Query Options

 167 | export const listFeedingLogsOptions = (filters: {

 169 | 	clinicId: string;
 170 | 	startDate?: Date;
 171 | 	endDate?: Date;
 172 | 	type?: FeedingType;
 173 | 	limit?: number;
 174 | 	offset?: number;
 175 | }) =>
 176 | 	queryOptions({
 177 | 		queryKey: pediatricKeys.feedingLogs.list(filters),
 178 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => listFeedingLogs({ data: filters, signal }),
 179 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 2, // 2 minutes
 180 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 5 // 5 minutes
 181 | 	});
 182 | 
 183 | export const infiniteFeedingLogsOptions = (filters: {
 184 | 	patientId: string;
 185 | 	clinicId: string;
 186 | 	startDate?: Date;
 187 | 	endDate?: Date;
 188 | 	type?: FeedingType;
 189 | 	limit?: number;
 190 | }) =>
 191 | 	infiniteQueryOptions({
 192 | 		queryKey: pediatricKeys.feedingLogs.infinite(filters),
 193 | 		queryFn: ({ pageParam = 0, signal }) =>
 194 | 			listFeedingLogs({
 195 | 				data: { ...filters, offset: pageParam, limit: filters.limit ?? 50 },
 196 | 				signal
 197 | 			}),
 198 | 		initialPageParam: 0,
 199 | 		getNextPageParam: (lastPage, allPages) => {
 200 | 			const loadedItems = allPages.reduce((sum, page) => sum + page.logs.length, 0);
 201 | 			return loadedItems < lastPage.total ? loadedItems : undefined;
 202 | 		},
 203 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 2, // 2 minutes
 204 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 5 // 5 minutes
 205 | 	});
 206 |
```

`functions/queries/pharmacy.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { queryOptions } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   2 | 
   3 | import {
   4 | 	checkDoctorAccess,
   5 | 	checkDrugStock,
   6 | 	getDoseGuidelines,
   7 | 	getDrugsByIds,
   8 | 	getPatientActivePrescriptions,
   9 | 	getPatientAllergies,
  10 | 	getPrescribedItem,
  11 | 	getPrescribedItemsByPrescriptionId,
  12 | 	getPrescriptionById,
  13 | 	getPrescriptionsByDateRange,
  14 | 	getPrescriptionsForAnalytics,
  15 | 	getPrescriptionWithItems,
  16 | 	listDrugs
  17 | } from "@/functions/pharmacy";
  18 | 
  19 | export const pharmacyKeys = {
  20 | 	all: ["pharmacy"] as const,
  21 | 
  22 | 	// Prescription keys
  23 | 	prescriptions: ["prescriptions"] as const,
  24 | 	prescription: (id: string) => [...pharmacyKeys.prescriptions, id] as const,
  25 | 	prescriptionWithItems: (id: string, clinicId?: string) =>
  26 | 		[...pharmacyKeys.prescriptions, "withItems", id, clinicId] as const,
  27 | 	patientActivePrescriptions: (patientId: string, clinicId?: string, includeExpired?: boolean) =>
  28 | 		[...pharmacyKeys.prescriptions, "active", patientId, clinicId, includeExpired] as const,
  29 | 	prescriptionsByDateRange: (patientId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) =>
  30 | 		[...pharmacyKeys.prescriptions, "dateRange", patientId, startDate, endDate] as const,
  31 | 	prescriptionsForAnalytics: (clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) =>
  32 | 		[...pharmacyKeys.prescriptions, "analytics", clinicId, startDate, endDate] as const,
  33 | 
  34 | 	// Prescribed Item keys
  35 | 	prescribedItems: ["prescribedItems"] as const,
  36 | 	prescribedItem: (id: string) => [...pharmacyKeys.prescribedItems, id] as const,
  37 | 	prescribedItemsByPrescription: (prescriptionId: string) =>
  38 | 		[...pharmacyKeys.prescribedItems, "byPrescription", prescriptionId] as const,
  39 | 
  40 | 	// Drug keys
  41 | 	drugs: ["drugs"] as const,
  42 | 	drug: (id: string) => [...pharmacyKeys.drugs, id] as const,
  43 | 	drugsByIds: (ids: string[], clinicId?: string) => [...pharmacyKeys.drugs, "byIds", ids.sort(), clinicId] as const,
  44 | 	drugList: (filters: { search?: string; category?: string; limit?: number; offset?: number }) =>
  45 | 		[...pharmacyKeys.drugs, "list", filters] as const,
  46 | 	drugStock: (clinicId: string, threshold?: number) => [...pharmacyKeys.drugs, "stock", clinicId, threshold] as const,
  47 | 
  48 | 	// Dose Guideline keys
  49 | 	doseGuidelines: ["doseGuidelines"] as const,
  50 | 	doseGuidelinesByDrugs: (drugIds: string[]) => [...pharmacyKeys.doseGuidelines, "byDrugs", drugIds.sort()] as const,
  51 | 
  52 | 	// Patient keys
  53 | 	patientAllergies: (patientId: string) => ["patient", patientId, "allergies"] as const,
  54 | 
  55 | 	// Access keys
  56 | 	doctorAccess: (doctorId: string, userId: string, clinicId?: string) =>
  57 | 		["access", "doctor", doctorId, userId, clinicId] as const
  58 | };
  59 | 
  60 | // =======================
  61 | // Prescription Query Options
  62 | // =======================
  63 |

  65 | 	queryOptions({
  66 | 		queryKey: pharmacyKeys.prescription(id),
  67 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getPrescriptionById({ data: { id }, signal }),
  68 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5, // 5 minutes
  69 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 10 // 10 minutes
  70 | 	});
  71 | 
  72 | export const getPatientActivePrescriptionsOptions = (patientId: string, clinicId?: string, includeExpired = false) =>
  73 | 	queryOptions({
  74 | 		queryKey: pharmacyKeys.patientActivePrescriptions(patientId, clinicId, includeExpired),
  75 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) =>
  76 | 			getPatientActivePrescriptions({ data: { patientId, clinicId, includeExpired }, signal }),
  77 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 2, // 2 minutes
  78 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 5 // 5 minutes
  79 | 	});
  80 | 
  81 | export const getPrescriptionWithItemsOptions = (id: string, clinicId?: string) =>
  82 | 	queryOptions({
  83 | 		queryKey: pharmacyKeys.prescriptionWithItems(id, clinicId),

  87 | 	});

  91 | 		queryKey: pharmacyKeys.prescriptionsByDateRange(patientId, startDate, endDate),
  92 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getPrescriptionsByDateRange({ data: { patientId, startDate, endDate }, signal }),
  93 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 10, // 10 minutes

 100 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getPrescriptionsForAnalytics({ data: { clinicId, startDate, endDate }, signal }),
```

`functions/queries/staff.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { queryOptions } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   2 | 
   3 | import {
   4 | 	getActiveStaffByDepartment,
   5 | 	getStaffByEmail,
   6 | 	getStaffById,
   7 | 	getStaffByRole,
   8 | 	getStaffByUserId,
   9 | 	getStaffStatistics,
  10 | 	getStaffWithUpcomingBirthdays,
  11 | 	listStaff,
  12 | 	searchStaff
  13 | } from "@/functions/staff";
  14 | 
  15 | import type { StaffFilters } from "../../types";
  16 | 
  17 | export const staffKeys = {
  18 | 	all: ["staff"] as const,
  19 | 
  20 | 	// List/Filter keys
  21 | 	list: (filters: StaffFilters) => [...staffKeys.all, "list", filters] as const,
  22 | 
  23 | 	// Detail keys
  24 | 	detail: (id: string, clinicId: string) => [...staffKeys.all, "detail", id, clinicId] as const,
  25 | 	byUserId: (userId: string, clinicId: string) => [...staffKeys.all, "userId", userId, clinicId] as const,
  26 | 	byEmail: (email: string, clinicId: string) => [...staffKeys.all, "email", email, clinicId] as const,
  27 | 	byRole: (clinicId: string, role: string) => [...staffKeys.all, "role", clinicId, role] as const,
  28 | 	byDepartment: (clinicId: string, department: string) =>
  29 | 		[...staffKeys.all, "department", clinicId, department] as const,
  30 | 
  31 | 	// Search keys
  32 | 	search: (clinicId: string, searchTerm: string, limit?: number) =>
  33 | 		[...staffKeys.all, "search", clinicId, searchTerm, limit] as const,
  34 | 
  35 | 	// Statistics keys
  36 | 	statistics: (clinicId: string) => [...staffKeys.all, "statistics", clinicId] as const,
  37 | 
  38 | 	// Upcoming birthdays
  39 | 	upcomingBirthdays: (clinicId: string) => [...staffKeys.all, "upcomingBirthdays", clinicId] as const
  40 | };
  41 | 
  42 | // =======================
  43 | // List & Filter Query Options
  44 | // =======================
  45 | 
  46 | export const listStaffOptions = (filters: StaffFilters) =>
  47 | 	queryOptions({
  48 | 		queryKey: staffKeys.list(filters),
  49 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => listStaff({ data: filters, signal }),
  50 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 2, // 2 minutes
  51 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 5 // 5 minutes
  52 | 	});
  53 | 
  54 | export const getStaffByIdOptions = (id: string, clinicId: string) =>
  55 | 	queryOptions({
  56 | 		queryKey: staffKeys.detail(id, clinicId),
  57 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getStaffById({ data: { id, clinicId }, signal }),
  58 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5, // 5 minutes
  59 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 10 // 10 minutes
  60 | 	});
  61 | 
  62 | export const getStaffByUserIdOptions = (userId: string, clinicId: string) =>
  63 | 	queryOptions({
  64 | 		queryKey: staffKeys.byUserId(userId, clinicId),
  65 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getStaffByUserId({ data: { userId, clinicId }, signal }),
  66 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5, // 5 minutes
  67 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 10 // 10 minutes
  68 | 	});
  69 | 
  70 | export const getStaffByEmailOptions = (email: string, clinicId: string) =>
  71 | 	queryOptions({
  72 | 		queryKey: staffKeys.byEmail(email, clinicId),
  73 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getStaffByEmail({ data: { email, clinicId }, signal }),

  75 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 10 // 10 minutes
  76 | 	});
  77 | 
  78 | export const getStaffByRoleOptions = (clinicId: string, role: "admin" | "doctor" | "staff" | "patient") =>
  79 | 	queryOptions({
  80 | 		queryKey: staffKeys.byRole(clinicId, role),
  81 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getStaffByRole({ data: { clinicId, role }, signal }),
```
