```ts
  83 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 10 // 10 minutes
  84 | 	});
  85 | 
  86 | export const getActiveStaffByDepartmentOptions = (clinicId: string, department: string) =>
  87 | 	queryOptions({
  88 | 		queryKey: staffKeys.byDepartment(clinicId, department),
  89 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getActiveStaffByDepartment({ data: { clinicId, department }, signal }),
  90 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5, // 5 minutes
  91 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 10 // 10 minutes
  92 | 	});
  93 | 
  94 | // =======================
  95 | // Search Query Options
  96 | // =======================
  97 | 
  98 | export const searchStaffOptions = (clinicId: string, searchTerm: string, limit = 20) =>
  99 | 	queryOptions({
 100 | 		queryKey: staffKeys.search(clinicId, searchTerm, limit),
 101 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => searchStaff({ data: { clinicId, searchTerm, limit }, signal }),
 102 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 1, // 1 minute
 103 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 5, // 5 minutes
 104 | 		enabled: searchTerm.length >= 2
 105 | 	});
 106 | 
 107 | // =======================
 108 | // Statistics Query Options
 109 | // =======================
 110 | 
 111 | export const getStaffStatisticsOptions = (clinicId: string) =>
 112 | 	queryOptions({
 113 | 		queryKey: staffKeys.statistics(clinicId),
 114 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getStaffStatistics({ data: { clinicId }, signal }),
 115 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 10, // 10 minutes
 116 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 30 // 30 minutes
 117 | 	});
 118 | 
 119 | export const getStaffWithUpcomingBirthdaysOptions = (clinicId: string) =>
 120 | 	queryOptions({
 121 | 		queryKey: staffKeys.upcomingBirthdays(clinicId),
 122 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getStaffWithUpcomingBirthdays({ data: { clinicId }, signal }),
 123 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 60, // 1 hour (birthdays don't change often)
 124 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 120 // 2 hours
 125 | 	});

```

`functions/queries/system.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/repositories/system.repo.query-options.ts
   2 | import { queryOptions } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   3 | 
   4 | // =======================
   5 | // Query Keys
   6 | // =======================
   7 | 
   8 | export const systemKeys = {
   9 | 	all: ["system"] as const,
  10 | 
  11 | 	// File search keys
  12 | 	files: {
  13 | 		all: ["files"] as const,
  14 | 		search: (userId: string, searchTerm: string) =>
  15 | 			[...systemKeys.all, "files", "search", userId, searchTerm] as const,
  16 | 		advancedSearch: (filters: AdvancedSearchFilters) => [...systemKeys.all, "files", "advanced", filters] as const
  17 | 	},
  18 | 
  19 | 	// Notification keys
  20 | 	notifications: {
  21 | 		all: ["notifications"] as const,
  22 | 		list: (filters: NotificationFilters) => [...systemKeys.all, "notifications", "list", filters] as const,
  23 | 		user: (userId: string, clinicId?: string, limit?: number, offset?: number) =>
  24 | 			[...systemKeys.all, "notifications", "user", userId, clinicId, limit, offset] as const,
  25 | 		unreadCount: (userId: string, clinicId?: string) =>
  26 | 			[...systemKeys.all, "notifications", "unreadCount", userId, clinicId] as const
  27 | 	},
  28 | 
  29 | 	// Analytics keys
  30 | 	analytics: {
  31 | 		clinic: (clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) =>
  32 | 			[...systemKeys.all, "analytics", "clinic", clinicId, startDate, endDate] as const
  33 | 	},
  34 | 
  35 | 	// Config keys
  36 | 	configs: {
  37 | 		all: ["configs"] as const,
  38 | 		detail: (key: string) => [...systemKeys.all, "configs", "detail", key] as const,
  39 | 		multiple: (keys: string[]) => [...systemKeys.all, "configs", "multiple", keys] as const,
  40 | 		keys: ["configs", "keys"] as const
  41 | 	},
  42 | 
  43 | 	// Payment keys
  44 | 	payments: {
  45 | 		receipt: (paymentId: string) => [...systemKeys.all, "payments", "receipt", paymentId] as const
  46 | 	}
  47 | };
  48 | 
  49 | // =======================
  50 | // Types
  51 | // =======================
  52 | 
  53 | interface AdvancedSearchFilters {
  54 | 	clinicId?: string;
  55 | 	patientName?: string;
  56 | 	doctorName?: string;
  57 | 	dateFrom?: Date;
  58 | 	dateTo?: Date;
  59 | 	status?: "PENDING" | "CONFIRMED" | "COMPLETED" | "CANCELLED" | "NO_SHOW";
  60 | }
  61 | 
  62 | interface NotificationFilters {
  63 | 	userId: string;
  64 | 	clinicId?: string;
  65 | 	status?: "all" | "read" | "unread";
  66 | 	type?: string | null;
  67 | 	search?: string;
  68 | 	limit?: number;
  69 | 	offset?: number;
  70 | }
  71 | 
  72 | // =======================
  73 | // File Search Query Options
  74 | // =======================
  75 | 
  76 | export const searchFilesOptions = (userId: string, searchTerm: string) =>
  77 | 	queryOptions({
  78 | 		queryKey: systemKeys.files.search(userId, searchTerm),
  79 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => searchFiles({ data: { userId, searchTerm }, signal }),
  80 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 1, // 1 minute
  81 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 5, // 5 minutes
  82 | 		enabled: searchTerm.length >= 2
  83 | 	});
  84 | 
  85 | export const advancedSearchOptions = (filters: AdvancedSearchFilters) =>
  86 | 	queryOptions({
  87 | 		queryKey: systemKeys.files.advancedSearch(filters),
  88 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => advancedSearch({ data: filters, signal }),
  89 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 2, // 2 minutes
  90 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 5 // 5 minutes
  91 | 	});
  92 | 
  93 | // =======================
  94 | // Notification Query Options
  95 | // =======================
  96 | 
  97 | export const listNotificationsOptions = (filters: NotificationFilters) =>
  98 | 	queryOptions({
  99 | 		queryKey: systemKeys.notifications.list(filters),
 100 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => listNotifications({ data: filters, signal }),
 101 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 30, // 30 seconds (notifications are frequent)
 102 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 2 // 2 minutes
 103 | 	});
 104 | 
 105 | export const getUserNotificationsOptions = (userId: string, clinicId?: string, limit = 5, offset = 0) =>
 106 | 	queryOptions({
 107 | 		queryKey: systemKeys.notifications.user(userId, clinicId, limit, offset),
 108 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getUserNotifications({ data: { userId, clinicId, limit, offset }, signal }),
 109 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 30, // 30 seconds
 110 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 2 // 2 minutes
 111 | 	});
 112 | 
 113 | // Helper to get just unread count (can be used with listNotifications response)
 114 | export const unreadNotificationsCountOptions = (userId: string, clinicId?: string) =>
 115 | 	queryOptions({
 116 | 		queryKey: systemKeys.notifications.unreadCount(userId, clinicId),
 117 | 		queryFn: async ({ signal }) => {
 118 | 			const result = await listNotifications({
 119 | 				data: {
 120 | 					userId,
 121 | 					clinicId,
 122 | 					status: "unread",
 123 | 					limit: 1,
 124 | 					offset: 0
 125 | 				},
 126 | 				signal
 127 | 			});
 128 | 			return result.unreadCount;
 129 | 		},
 130 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 15, // 15 seconds (unread count changes frequently)
 131 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 // 1 minute
 132 | 	});
 133 | 
 134 | // =======================
 135 | // Analytics Query Options
 136 | // =======================
 137 | 
 138 | export const getClinicAnalyticsOptions = (clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) =>
 139 | 	queryOptions({
 140 | 		queryKey: systemKeys.analytics.clinic(clinicId, startDate, endDate),
 141 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getClinicAnalytics({ data: { clinicId, startDate, endDate }, signal }),
 142 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 15, // 15 minutes (analytics don't change rapidly)
 143 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 30 // 30 minutes
 144 | 	});
 145 | 
 146 | // =======================
 147 | // Config Query Options
 148 | // =======================
 149 | 
 150 | export const getAllConfigsOptions = () =>
 151 | 	queryOptions({
 152 | 		queryKey: systemKeys.configs.all,
 153 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getAllConfigs({ signal }),
 154 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 30, // 30 minutes (configs change rarely)
 155 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 60 // 1 hour
 156 | 	});
 157 | 
 158 | export const getConfigOptions = (key: string) =>
 159 | 	queryOptions({
 160 | 		queryKey: systemKeys.configs.detail(key),
 161 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getConfig({ data: { key }, signal }),
 162 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 30, // 30 minutes
 163 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 60 // 1 hour
 164 | 	});
 165 | 
 166 | export const getConfigsOptions = (keys: string[]) =>
 167 | 	queryOptions({
 168 | 		queryKey: systemKeys.configs.multiple(keys),
 169 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getConfigs({ data: { keys }, signal }),
 170 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 30, // 30 minutes
 171 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 60, // 1 hour
 172 | 		enabled: keys.length > 0
 173 | 	});
 174 | 
 175 | export const getExistingConfigKeysOptions = () =>
 176 | 	queryOptions({
 177 | 		queryKey: systemKeys.configs.keys,
 178 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => getExistingConfigKeys({ signal }),
 179 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 60, // 1 hour
 180 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 120 // 2 hours
 181 | 	});
 182 | 
 183 | // =======================
 184 | // Payment Query Options
 185 | // =======================
 186 | 
 187 | export const generateReceiptOptions = (paymentId: string) =>
 188 | 	queryOptions({
 189 | 		queryKey: systemKeys.payments.receipt(paymentId),
 190 | 		queryFn: ({ signal }) => generateReceipt({ data: { paymentId }, signal }),
 191 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 60, // 1 hour (receipts are immutable once generated)
 192 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 120, // 2 hours
 193 | 		enabled: !!paymentId
 194 | 	});
 195 | 
 196 | // =======================
 197 | // Infinite Query Options (for paginated notifications)
 198 | // =======================
 199 | 
 200 | import { infiniteQueryOptions } from "@tanstack/react-query";
 201 | 
 202 | import {
 203 | 	advancedSearch,
 204 | 	generateReceipt,
 205 | 	getAllConfigs,
 206 | 	getClinicAnalytics,
 207 | 	getConfig,
 208 | 	getConfigs,
 209 | 	getExistingConfigKeys,
 210 | 	getUserNotifications,
 211 | 	listNotifications,
 212 | 	searchFiles
 213 | } from "../system";
 214 | 
 215 | export const infiniteNotificationsOptions = (filters: Omit<NotificationFilters, "offset">) =>
 216 | 	infiniteQueryOptions({
 217 | 		queryKey: systemKeys.notifications.list({ ...filters, offset: 0 }),
 218 | 		queryFn: ({ pageParam = 0, signal }) =>
 219 | 			listNotifications({
 220 | 				data: { ...filters, offset: pageParam },
 221 | 				signal
 222 | 			}),
 223 | 		initialPageParam: 0,
 224 | 		getNextPageParam: (lastPage, allPages) => {
 225 | 			const loadedItems = allPages.reduce((sum, page) => sum + page.items.length, 0);
 226 | 			return loadedItems < lastPage.total ? loadedItems : undefined;
 227 | 		},
 228 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 30, // 30 seconds
 229 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 5 // 5 minutes
 230 | 	});

```

`functions/refresh.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // lib/session-refresh.ts
   2 | import { authClient } from "../lib/auth-client";
   3 | 
   4 | let refreshInterval: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;
   5 | 
   6 | export function startSessionRefresh(intervalMinutes = 25) {
   7 | 	if (refreshInterval) {
   8 | 		clearInterval(refreshInterval);
   9 | 	}
  10 | 
  11 | 	refreshInterval = setInterval(
  12 | 		async () => {
  13 | 			try {
  14 | 				await authClient.getSession();
  15 | 			} catch (error) {
  16 | 				console.error("Session refresh failed:", error);
  17 | 			}
  18 | 		},
  19 | 		intervalMinutes * 60 * 1000
  20 | 	);
  21 | }
  22 | 
  23 | export function stopSessionRefresh() {
  24 | 	if (refreshInterval) {
  25 | 		clearInterval(refreshInterval);
  26 | 		refreshInterval = null;
  27 | 	}
  28 | }

```

`functions/staff.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/repositories/staff.repo.ts
   2 | 
   3 | import console from "node:console";
   4 | 
   5 | import { db } from "@clinic/db";
   6 | import * as schema from "@clinic/db/schema";
   7 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   8 | import { and, eq, inArray, like, or, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   9 | import z from "zod";
  10 | 
  11 | // =======================
  12 | // Zod Validators
  13 | // =======================
  14 | 
  15 | const listStaffSchema = z.object({
  16 | 	clinicId: z.string(),
  17 | 	page: z.number().min(1).default(1),
  18 | 	limit: z.number().min(1).max(100).default(20),
  19 | 	search: z.string().optional(),
  20 | 	role: z.enum(["admin", "doctor", "staff", "patient"]).optional(),
  21 | 	status: z.enum(["ACTIVE", "INACTIVE", "PENDING", "SUSPENDED"]).optional()
  22 | });
  23 | 
  24 | const staffIdSchema = z.object({
  25 | 	id: z.string(),
  26 | 	clinicId: z.string()
  27 | });
  28 | 
  29 | const createStaffSchema = z.object({
  30 | 	id: z.string().optional(),
  31 | 	email: z.string().email().optional(),
  32 | 	name: z.string().min(1),
  33 | 	phone: z.string().optional(),
  34 | 	userId: z.string().optional(),
  35 | 	clinicId: z.string(),
  36 | 	address: z.string(),
  37 | 	department: z.string().optional(),
  38 | 	img: z.string().optional(),
  39 | 	licenseNumber: z.string().optional(),
  40 | 	colorCode: z.string().optional(),
  41 | 	hireDate: z.date().optional(),
  42 | 	salary: z.number().optional(),
  43 | 	role: z.enum(["admin", "doctor", "staff", "patient"]),
  44 | 	status: z.enum(["ACTIVE", "INACTIVE", "PENDING", "SUSPENDED"]).default("ACTIVE"),
  45 | 	isActive: z.boolean().default(true)
  46 | });
  47 | 
  48 | const updateStaffSchema = createStaffSchema.partial();
  49 | 
  50 | const bulkStaffUpdateSchema = z.object({
  51 | 	ids: z.array(z.string()),
  52 | 	data: updateStaffSchema
  53 | });
  54 | 
  55 | // =======================
  56 | // Server Functions
  57 | // =======================
  58 | 
  59 | const listStaff = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
  60 | 	.validator(listStaffSchema)
  61 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
  62 | 		try {
  63 | 			const { clinicId, page, limit, search, role, status } = ctx.data;
  64 | 			const offset = (page - 1) * limit;
  65 | 
  66 | 			const whereConditions: Record<string, unknown> = {
  67 | 				clinicId,
  68 | 				isActive: true
  69 | 			};
  70 | 
  71 | 			if (role) whereConditions.role = role;
  72 | 			if (status) whereConditions.status = status;
  73 | 
  74 | 			if (search) {
  75 | 				whereConditions.OR = [
  76 | 					{ name: { like: `%${search}%` } },
  77 | 					{ email: { like: `%${search}%` } },
  78 | 					{ phone: { like: `%${search}%` } },
  79 | 					{ department: { like: `%${search}%` } }
  80 | 				];
  81 | 			}
  82 | 
  83 | 			const [staffList, totalResult] = await Promise.all([
  84 | 				db.query.staff.findMany({
  85 | 					where: whereConditions,
  86 | 					limit,
  87 | 					offset,
  88 | 					orderBy: (staff, { asc }) => asc(staff.name)
  89 | 				}),
  90 | 				db
  91 | 					.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)` })
  92 | 					.from(schema.staff)
  93 | 					.where(
  94 | 						and(
  95 | 							eq(schema.staff.clinicId, clinicId),
  96 | 							eq(schema.staff.isActive, true),
  97 | 							role ? eq(schema.staff.role, role) : undefined,
  98 | 							status ? eq(schema.staff.status, status) : undefined,
  99 | 							search
 100 | 								? or(
 101 | 										like(schema.staff.name, `%${search}%`),
 102 | 										like(schema.staff.email, `%${search}%`),
 103 | 										like(schema.staff.phone, `%${search}%`),
 104 | 										like(schema.staff.department, `%${search}%`)
 105 | 									)
 106 | 								: undefined
 107 | 						)
 108 | 					)
 109 | 			]);
 110 | 
 111 | 			const total = Number(totalResult[0]?.count ?? 0);
 112 | 
 113 | 			return {
 114 | 				staff: staffList,
 115 | 				total,
 116 | 				totalPages: Math.ceil(total / limit)
 117 | 			};
 118 | 		} catch (error) {
 119 | 			console.error("Error listing staff:", error);
 120 | 			throw new Error("Failed to list staff");
 121 | 		}
 122 | 	});
 123 | 
 124 | const getStaffById = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 125 | 	.validator(staffIdSchema)
 126 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 127 | 		try {
 128 | 			const { id, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 129 | 			const staff = await db.query.staff.findFirst({
 130 | 				where: { id, clinicId, isActive: true }
 131 | 			});
 132 | 			return staff;
 133 | 		} catch (error) {
 134 | 			console.error("Error getting staff by ID:", error);
 135 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get staff");
 136 | 		}
 137 | 	});
 138 | 
 139 | const createStaff = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 140 | 	.validator(createStaffSchema)
 141 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 142 | 		try {
 143 | 			const data = ctx.data;
 144 | 			const now = new Date();
 145 | 
 146 | 			const [result] = await db
 147 | 				.insert(schema.staff)
 148 | 				.values({
 149 | 					id: data.id || crypto.randomUUID(),
 150 | 					...data,
 151 | 					createdAt: now,
 152 | 					updatedAt: now
 153 | 				})
 154 | 				.returning();
 155 | 
 156 | 			return result;
 157 | 		} catch (error) {
 158 | 			console.error("Error creating staff:", error);
 159 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create staff");
 160 | 		}
 161 | 	});
 162 | 
 163 | const createManyStaff = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 164 | 	.validator(z.object({ staffList: z.array(createStaffSchema) }))
 165 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 166 | 		try {
 167 | 			const { staffList } = ctx.data;
 168 | 			const now = new Date();
 169 | 
 170 | 			const staffWithIds = staffList.map(staff => ({
 171 | 				...staff,
 172 | 				id: staff.id || crypto.randomUUID(),
 173 | 				createdAt: now,
 174 | 				updatedAt: now
 175 | 			}));
 176 | 
 177 | 			const result = await db.insert(schema.staff).values(staffWithIds).returning();
 178 | 
 179 | 			return result;
 180 | 		} catch (error) {
 181 | 			console.error("Error creating multiple staff members:", error);
 182 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create staff members");
 183 | 		}
 184 | 	});
 185 | 
 186 | const updateStaff = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 187 | 	.validator(z.object({ id: z.string(), data: updateStaffSchema }))
 188 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 189 | 		try {
 190 | 			const { id, data } = ctx.data;
 191 | 
 192 | 			const [result] = await db
 193 | 				.update(schema.staff)
 194 | 				.set({
 195 | 					...data,
 196 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 197 | 				})
 198 | 				.where(eq(schema.staff.id, id))
 199 | 				.returning();
 200 | 
 201 | 			if (!result) {
 202 | 				throw new Error("Staff member not found");
 203 | 			}
 204 | 
 205 | 			return result;
 206 | 		} catch (error) {
 207 | 			console.error("Error updating staff:", error);
 208 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update staff");
 209 | 		}
 210 | 	});
 211 | 
 212 | const updateManyStaff = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 213 | 	.validator(bulkStaffUpdateSchema)
 214 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 215 | 		try {
 216 | 			const { ids, data } = ctx.data;
 217 | 
 218 | 			const result = await db
 219 | 				.update(schema.staff)
 220 | 				.set({
 221 | 					...data,
 222 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 223 | 				})
 224 | 				.where(inArray(schema.staff.id, ids))
 225 | 				.returning();
 226 | 
 227 | 			return result;
 228 | 		} catch (error) {
 229 | 			console.error("Error updating multiple staff members:", error);
 230 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update staff members");
 231 | 		}
 232 | 	});
 233 | 
 234 | const deleteStaff = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 235 | 	.validator(z.object({ id: z.string() }))
 236 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 237 | 		try {
 238 | 			const { id } = ctx.data;
 239 | 
 240 | 			const [result] = await db.delete(schema.staff).where(eq(schema.staff.id, id)).returning();
 241 | 
 242 | 			if (!result) {
 243 | 				throw new Error("Staff member not found");
 244 | 			}
 245 | 
 246 | 			return result;
 247 | 		} catch (error) {
 248 | 			console.error("Error deleting staff:", error);
 249 | 			throw new Error("Failed to delete staff");
 250 | 		}
 251 | 	});
 252 | 
 253 | const softDeleteStaff = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 254 | 	.validator(z.object({ id: z.string() }))
 255 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 256 | 		try {
 257 | 			const { id } = ctx.data;
 258 | 
 259 | 			const [result] = await db
 260 | 				.update(schema.staff)
 261 | 				.set({
 262 | 					deletedAt: new Date(),
 263 | 					isActive: false,
 264 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 265 | 				})
 266 | 				.where(eq(schema.staff.id, id))
 267 | 				.returning();
 268 | 
 269 | 			if (!result) {
 270 | 				throw new Error("Staff member not found");
 271 | 			}
 272 | 
 273 | 			return result;
 274 | 		} catch (error) {
 275 | 			console.error("Error soft deleting staff:", error);
 276 | 			throw new Error("Failed to soft delete staff");
 277 | 		}
 278 | 	});
 279 | 
 280 | const restoreStaff = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 281 | 	.validator(z.object({ id: z.string() }))
 282 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 283 | 		try {
 284 | 			const { id } = ctx.data;
 285 | 
 286 | 			const [result] = await db
 287 | 				.update(schema.staff)
 288 | 				.set({
 289 | 					isActive: true,
 290 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 291 | 				})
 292 | 				.where(eq(schema.staff.id, id))
 293 | 				.returning();
 294 | 
 295 | 			if (!result) {
 296 | 				throw new Error("Staff member not found");
 297 | 			}
 298 | 
 299 | 			return result;
 300 | 		} catch (error) {
 301 | 			console.error("Error restoring staff:", error);
 302 | 			throw new Error("Failed to restore staff");
 303 | 		}
 304 | 	});
 305 | 
 306 | // Additional utility functions
 307 | 
 308 | const getStaffByUserId = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 309 | 	.validator(z.object({ userId: z.string(), clinicId: z.string() }))
 310 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 311 | 		try {
 312 | 			const { userId, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 313 | 			const staff = await db.query.staff.findFirst({
 314 | 				where: { userId, clinicId, isActive: true }
 315 | 			});
 316 | 			return staff;
 317 | 		} catch (error) {
 318 | 			console.error("Error getting staff by user ID:", error);
 319 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get staff");
 320 | 		}
 321 | 	});
 322 | 
 323 | const getStaffByEmail = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 324 | 	.validator(z.object({ email: z.string(), clinicId: z.string() }))
 325 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 326 | 		try {
 327 | 			const { email, clinicId } = ctx.data;

 335 | 		}

 340 | 	.handler(async ctx => {

 354 | const updateStaffStatus = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 355 | 	.validator(z.object({ id: z.string(), status: z.enum(["ACTIVE", "INACTIVE", "PENDING", "SUSPENDED"]) }))
 356 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 357 | 		try {
 358 | 			const { id, status } = ctx.data;
 359 | 
 360 | 			const [result] = await db
 361 | 				.update(schema.staff)
 362 | 				.set({
 363 | 					status,
 364 | 					isActive: status === "ACTIVE",
 365 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 366 | 				})
 367 | 				.where(eq(schema.staff.id, id))
 368 | 				.returning();
 369 | 
 370 | 			if (!result) {
 371 | 				throw new Error("Staff member not found");
 372 | 			}
 373 | 
 374 | 			return result;
 375 | 		} catch (error) {
 376 | 			console.error("Error updating staff status:", error);
 377 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update staff status");
 378 | 		}
 379 | 	});

 381 | const bulkUpdateStaffStatus = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 382 | 	.validator(z.object({ ids: z.array(z.string()), status: z.enum(["ACTIVE", "INACTIVE", "PENDING", "SUSPENDED"]) }))
 383 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 384 | 		try {
 385 | 			const { ids, status } = ctx.data;
 386 | 
 387 | 			const result = await db
 388 | 				.update(schema.staff)
 389 | 				.set({
 390 | 					status,
 391 | 					isActive: status === "ACTIVE",
 392 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 393 | 				})
 394 | 				.where(inArray(schema.staff.id, ids))
 395 | 				.returning();
 396 | 
 397 | 			return result;
 398 | 		} catch (error) {
 399 | 			console.error("Error bulk updating staff status:", error);
 400 | 			throw new Error("Failed to bulk update staff status");
 401 | 		}
 402 | 	});
 403 | 
 404 | const searchStaff = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 405 | 	.validator(z.object({ clinicId: z.string(), searchTerm: z.string().min(1), limit: z.number().default(20) }))
 406 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 407 | 		try {
 408 | 			const { clinicId, searchTerm, limit } = ctx.data;
 409 | 
 410 | 			const staff = await db.query.staff.findMany({
 411 | 				where: {
 412 | 					clinicId,
 413 | 					isActive: true,
 414 | 					OR: [
 415 | 						{ name: { like: `%${searchTerm}%` } },
 416 | 						{ email: { like: `%${searchTerm}%` } },
 417 | 						{ phone: { like: `%${searchTerm}%` } },
 418 | 						{ department: { like: `%${searchTerm}%` } }
 419 | 					]
 420 | 				},
 421 | 				limit
 422 | 			});
 423 | 
 424 | 			return staff;
 425 | 		} catch (error) {
 426 | 			console.error("Error searching staff:", error);
 427 | 			throw new Error("Failed to search staff");
 428 | 		}
 429 | 	});
 430 | 
 431 | const getStaffStatistics = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 432 | 	.validator(z.object({ clinicId: z.string() }))
 433 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 434 | 		try {
 435 | 			const { clinicId } = ctx.data;
 436 | 
 437 | 			const stats = await db
 438 | 				.select({
 439 | 					total: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)`,
 440 | 					active: sql<number>`CAST(sum(CASE WHEN ${schema.staff.isActive} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER)`,
 441 | 					inactive: sql<number>`CAST(sum(CASE WHEN NOT ${schema.staff.isActive} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER)`
 442 | 				})
 443 | 				.from(schema.staff)
 444 | 				.where(eq(schema.staff.clinicId, clinicId));
 445 | 
 446 | 			// Get role breakdown separately
 447 | 			const roleBreakdown = await db
 448 | 				.select({
 449 | 					role: schema.staff.role,
 450 | 					count: sql<number>`CAST(count(*) AS INTEGER)`
 451 | 				})
 452 | 				.from(schema.staff)
 453 | 				.where(eq(schema.staff.clinicId, clinicId))
 454 | 				.groupBy(schema.staff.role);
 455 | 
 456 | 			return {
 457 | 				total: stats[0]?.total ?? 0,
 458 | 				active: stats[0]?.active ?? 0,
 459 | 				inactive: stats[0]?.inactive ?? 0,
 460 | 				roleBreakdown
 461 | 			};
 462 | 		} catch (error) {
 463 | 			console.error("Error getting staff statistics:", error);
 464 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get staff statistics");
 465 | 		}
 466 | 	});
 467 | 
 468 | const getStaffWithUpcomingBirthdays = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 469 | 	.validator(z.object({ clinicId: z.string() }))
 470 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 471 | 		try {
 472 | 			// This would require a birthday field in staff table
 473 | 			// Placeholder implementation
 474 | 			const staff = await db.query.staff.findMany({
 475 | 				where: { clinicId: ctx.data.clinicId, isActive: true },
 476 | 				limit: 10
 477 | 			});
 478 | 
 479 | 			return staff;
 480 | 		} catch (error) {
 481 | 			console.error("Error getting staff birthdays:", error);
 482 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get staff birthdays");
 483 | 		}
 484 | 	});
 485 | 
 486 | const getStaffByRole = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 487 | 	.validator(z.object({ clinicId: z.string(), role: z.enum(["admin", "doctor", "staff", "patient"]) }))
 488 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 489 | 		try {
 490 | 			const { clinicId, role } = ctx.data;
 491 | 			const staff = await db.query.staff.findMany({

 493 | 				orderBy: (staff, { asc }) => asc(staff.name)
 494 | 			});
 495 | 			return staff;
 496 | 		} catch (error) {
 497 | 			console.error("Error getting staff by role:", error);
 498 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get staff by role");
 499 | 		}
 500 | 	});
```

`functions/system.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/repositories/system.repo.ts

   3 | import { db } from "@clinic/db";

  10 | // Zod Validators

  12 | 
  13 | type JSONValue = string | number | boolean | null | { [x: string]: JSONValue } | Array<JSONValue>;
  14 | 
  15 | interface SerializableNotification {
  16 | 	id: string;
  17 | 	userId: string;
  18 | 	clinicId: string;
  19 | 	title: string;
  20 | 	body: string;
  21 | 	type: string | null;
  22 | 	status: "read" | "unread";
  23 | 	priority: "high" | "medium" | "low" | null;
  24 | 	createdAt: Date;
  25 | 	updatedAt: Date;
  26 | 	actions: { label: string; href: string; payload?: Record<string, JSONValue> }[] | null;
  27 | 	metadata: Record<string, JSONValue> | null;
  28 | }

  42 | });

 155 | const searchFiles = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 156 | 	.validator(searchFilesSchema)
 157 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 158 | 		try {
 159 | 			const { userId, searchTerm } = ctx.data;
 160 | 
 161 | 			// ✅ FIX: Use object syntax for RQB v2
 162 | 			const files = await db.query.file.findMany({
 163 | 				where: {
 164 | 					userId: userId,
 165 | 					searchText: { like: `%${searchTerm}%` }
 166 | 				},
 167 | 				orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" }
 168 | 			});
 169 | 
 170 | 			return files;
 171 | 		} catch (error) {
 172 | 			console.error("Error searching files:", error);
 173 | 			throw new Error("Failed to search files");
 174 | 		}
 175 | 	});
 176 | 
 177 | const advancedSearch = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 178 | 	.validator(advancedSearchSchema)
 179 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 180 | 		try {
 181 | 			const { clinicId, patientName, doctorName, dateFrom, dateTo, status } = ctx.data;
 182 | 
 183 | 			// Build where conditions
 184 | 			const where: Record<string, unknown> = {
 185 | 				isDeleted: false,
 186 | 				deletedAt: null
 187 | 			};
 188 | 
 189 | 			if (clinicId) where.clinicId = clinicId;
 190 | 			if (status) where.status = status;
 191 | 			if (dateFrom && dateTo) {
 192 | 				where.appointmentDate = { gte: dateFrom, lte: dateTo };
 193 | 			}
 194 | 
 195 | 			// ✅ FIX: Build with clause with conditional includes
 196 | 			const withClause: Record<string, unknown> = {
 197 | 				service: true,
 198 | 				bills: true
 199 | 			};
 200 | 
 201 | 			if (patientName) {
 202 | 				withClause.patient = {
 203 | 					where: {
 204 | 						OR: [{ firstName: { like: `%${patientName}%` } }, { lastName: { like: `%${patientName}%` } }]
 205 | 					}
 206 | 				};
 207 | 			} else {
 208 | 				withClause.patient = true;
 209 | 			}
 210 | 
 211 | 			if (doctorName) {
 212 | 				withClause.doctor = {
 213 | 					where: {
 214 | 						name: { like: `%${doctorName}%` }
 215 | 					}
 216 | 				};
 217 | 			} else {
 218 | 				withClause.doctor = true;
 219 | 			}
 220 | 
 221 | 			const appointments = await db.query.appointment.findMany({
 222 | 				where,
 223 | 				with: withClause,
 224 | 				orderBy: { appointmentDate: "desc" }
 225 | 			});
 226 | 
 227 | 			return appointments;
 228 | 		} catch (error) {
 229 | 			console.error("Error in advanced search:", error);
 230 | 			throw new Error("Failed to perform advanced search");
 231 | 		}
 232 | 	});
 233 | 
 234 | const getUserNotifications = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 235 | 	.validator(
 236 | 		z.object({
 237 | 			userId: z.string(),
 238 | 			clinicId: z.string().optional(),
 239 | 			limit: z.number().default(5),
 240 | 			offset: z.number().default(0)
 241 | 		})
 242 | 	)
 243 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 244 | 		try {
 245 | 			const { userId, clinicId, limit, offset } = ctx.data;
 246 | 
 247 | 			// ✅ RQB v2 object syntax
 248 | 			const where: Record<string, unknown> = { userId };
 249 | 			if (clinicId) where.clinicId = clinicId;
 250 | 
 251 | 			const notifications = await db.query.notification.findMany({
 252 | 				where,
 253 | 				orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
 254 | 				limit,
 255 | 				offset
 256 | 			});
 257 | 
 258 | 			return notifications as unknown as SerializableNotification[];
 259 | 		} catch (error) {
 260 | 			console.error("Error getting user notifications:", error);
 261 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get notifications");
 262 | 		}
 263 | 	});
 264 | 
 265 | const listNotifications = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 266 | 	.validator(notificationsListSchema)
 267 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 268 | 		try {
 269 | 			const { userId, clinicId, status, type, search, limit, offset } = ctx.data;
 270 | 
 271 | 			// ✅ Build where clause using RQB v2 object syntax
 272 | 			const where: Record<string, unknown> = { userId };
 273 | 
 274 | 			if (clinicId) where.clinicId = clinicId;
 275 | 
 276 | 			if (status === "unread") where.status = "unread";
 277 | 			if (status === "read") where.status = "read";
 278 | 			if (type) where.type = type;
 279 | 
 280 | 			// ✅ Handle search with OR condition
 281 | 			if (search) {
 282 | 				where.OR = [{ body: { like: `%${search}%` } }, { title: { like: `%${search}%` } }];
 283 | 			}
 284 | 
 285 | 			const totalResult = await db
 286 | 				.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER)` })
 287 | 				.from(schema.notification)
 288 | 				.where(
 289 | 					and(
 290 | 						eq(schema.notification.userId, userId),
 291 | 						clinicId ? eq(schema.notification.clinicId, clinicId) : undefined,
 292 | 						status === "unread" ? eq(schema.notification.status, "unread") : undefined,
 293 | 						status === "read" ? eq(schema.notification.status, "read") : undefined,
 294 | 						type ? eq(schema.notification.type, type) : undefined,
 295 | 						search
 296 | 							? or(
 297 | 									like(schema.notification.body, `%${search}%`),
 298 | 									like(schema.notification.title, `%${search}%`)
 299 | 								)
 300 | 							: undefined
 301 | 					)
 302 | 				);
 303 | 
 304 | 			const unreadResult = await db
 305 | 				.select({ count: sql<number>`CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER)` })
 306 | 				.from(schema.notification)
 307 | 				.where(
 308 | 					and(
 309 | 						eq(schema.notification.userId, userId),
 310 | 						clinicId ? eq(schema.notification.clinicId, clinicId) : undefined,
 311 | 						eq(schema.notification.status, "unread")
 312 | 					)
 313 | 				);
 314 | 
 315 | 			// ✅ Get paginated items using RQB v2
 316 | 			const items = await db.query.notification.findMany({
 317 | 				where,
 318 | 				orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
 319 | 				limit,
 320 | 				offset
 321 | 			});
 322 | 
 323 | 			return {
 324 | 				items: items as unknown as SerializableNotification[],
 325 | 				total: Number(totalResult[0]?.count ?? 0),
 326 | 				unreadCount: Number(unreadResult[0]?.count ?? 0)
 327 | 			};
 328 | 		} catch (error) {
 329 | 			console.error("Error listing notifications:", error);
 330 | 			throw new Error("Failed to list notifications");
 331 | 		}
 332 | 	});
 333 | 
 334 | const markNotificationsAsRead = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 335 | 	.validator(markNotificationReadSchema)
 336 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 337 | 		try {
 338 | 			const { notificationId, userId } = ctx.data;
 339 | 
 340 | 			const result = await db
 341 | 				.update(schema.notification)
 342 | 				.set({ status: "read", updatedAt: new Date() })
 343 | 				.where(
 344 | 					and(
 345 | 						eq(schema.notification.id, notificationId),
 346 | 						userId ? eq(schema.notification.userId, userId) : sql`TRUE`
 347 | 					)
 348 | 				)
 349 | 				.returning();
 350 | 
 351 | 			return result as unknown as SerializableNotification[];
 352 | 		} catch (error) {
 353 | 			console.error("Error marking notification as read:", error);
 354 | 			throw new Error("Failed to mark notification as read");
 355 | 		}
 356 | 	});
 357 | 
 358 | const markAllNotificationsAsRead = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 359 | 	.validator(markAllReadSchema)
 360 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 361 | 		try {
 362 | 			const { userId, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 363 | 
 364 | 			const conditions = [eq(schema.notification.userId, userId), eq(schema.notification.status, "unread")];
 365 | 			if (clinicId) conditions.push(eq(schema.notification.clinicId, clinicId));
 366 | 
 367 | 			const result = await db
 368 | 				.update(schema.notification)
 369 | 				.set({ status: "read", updatedAt: new Date() })
 370 | 				.where(and(...conditions))
 371 | 				.returning();
 372 | 
 373 | 			return result as unknown as SerializableNotification[];
 374 | 		} catch (error) {
 375 | 			console.error("Error marking all notifications as read:", error);
 376 | 			throw new Error("Failed to mark all notifications as read");
 377 | 		}
 378 | 	});
 379 | 
 380 | const deleteNotification = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 381 | 	.validator(deleteNotificationSchema)
 382 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 383 | 		try {
 384 | 			const { notificationId, userId } = ctx.data;
 385 | 
 386 | 			const result = await db
 387 | 				.delete(schema.notification)
 388 | 				.where(and(eq(schema.notification.id, notificationId), eq(schema.notification.userId, userId)))
 389 | 				.returning();
 390 | 
 391 | 			return result as unknown as SerializableNotification[];
 392 | 		} catch (error) {
 393 | 			console.error("Error deleting notification:", error);
 394 | 			throw new Error("Failed to delete notification");
 395 | 		}
 396 | 	});
 397 | 
 398 | const clearAllNotifications = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 399 | 	.validator(clearNotificationsSchema)
 400 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 401 | 		try {
 402 | 			const { userId, clinicId } = ctx.data;
 403 | 
 404 | 			const conditions = [eq(schema.notification.userId, userId)];
 405 | 			if (clinicId) conditions.push(eq(schema.notification.clinicId, clinicId));
 406 | 
 407 | 			const result = await db
 408 | 				.delete(schema.notification)
 409 | 				.where(and(...conditions))
 410 | 				.returning();
 411 | 
 412 | 			return result as unknown as SerializableNotification[];
 413 | 		} catch (error) {
 414 | 			console.error("Error clearing notifications:", error);
 415 | 			throw new Error("Failed to clear notifications");
 416 | 		}
 417 | 	});
 418 | 
 419 | const getClinicAnalytics = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 420 | 	.validator(clinicAnalyticsSchema)
 421 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 422 | 		try {
 423 | 			const { clinicId, startDate, endDate } = ctx.data;
 424 | 
 425 | 			// ✅ FIX: Use object syntax for all queries
 426 | 			const appointments = await db.query.appointment.findMany({
 427 | 				where: {
 428 | 					clinicId,
 429 | 					isDeleted: false,
 430 | 					appointmentDate: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate }
 431 | 				}
 432 | 			});
 433 | 
 434 | 			const payments = await db.query.payment.findMany({
 435 | 				where: {
 436 | 					clinicId,
 437 | 					status: "PAID",
 438 | 					paymentDate: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate }
 439 | 				}
 440 | 			});
 441 | 
 442 | 			const patients = await db.query.patient.findMany({
 443 | 				where: {
 444 | 					clinicId,
 445 | 					isDeleted: false,
 446 | 					createdAt: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate }
 447 | 				}
 448 | 			});
 449 | 
 450 | 			const prescriptions = await db.query.prescription.findMany({
 451 | 				where: {
 452 | 					clinicId,
 453 | 					issuedDate: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate }
 454 | 				}
 455 | 			});
 456 | 
 457 | 			const appointmentStats = {
 458 | 				total: appointments.length,
 459 | 				completed: appointments.filter(a => a.status === "COMPLETED").length,
 460 | 				cancelled: appointments.filter(a => a.status === "CANCELLED").length,
 461 | 				pending: appointments.filter(a => a.status === "PENDING").length,
 462 | 				noShow: appointments.filter(a => a.status === "NO_SHOW").length
 463 | 			};
 464 | 
 465 | 			const revenue = payments.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.amount ?? 0), 0);
 466 | 			const revenueByMethod = payments.reduce(
 467 | 				(acc, p) => {
 468 | 					const method = p.paymentMethod || "UNKNOWN";
 469 | 					acc[method] = (acc[method] || 0) + (p.amount ?? 0);
 470 | 					return acc;
 471 | 				},
 472 | 				{} as Record<string, number>
 473 | 			);
 474 | 
 475 | 			return {
 476 | 				period: { startDate, endDate },
 477 | 				appointments: appointmentStats,
 478 | 				revenue: {
 479 | 					total: revenue,
 480 | 					byMethod: revenueByMethod,
 481 | 					averagePerAppointment: appointmentStats.completed > 0 ? revenue / appointmentStats.completed : 0
 482 | 				},
 483 | 				patients: {
 484 | 					total: patients.length,
 485 | 					newPatients: patients.length
 486 | 				},
 487 | 				prescriptions: prescriptions.length
 488 | 			};
 489 | 		} catch (error) {
 490 | 			console.error("Error getting clinic analytics:", error);
 491 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get clinic analytics");
 492 | 		}
 493 | 	});

 577 | const createPayment = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 578 | 	.validator(createPaymentSchema)
 579 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 580 | 		try {
 581 | 			const data = ctx.data;
 582 | 			const [result] = await db
 583 | 				.insert(schema.payment)
 584 | 				.values({
 585 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 586 | 					...data,
 587 | 					billDate: data.billDate || new Date(),
 588 | 					createdAt: new Date(),
 589 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 590 | 				})
 591 | 				.returning();
 592 | 			return result;

 596 | 		}

 599 | const recordPayment = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 600 | 	.validator(createPaymentSchema)
 601 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 602 | 		try {
 603 | 			const data = ctx.data;
 604 | 			const result = await db.transaction(async tx => {
 605 | 				const [payment] = await tx
 606 | 					.insert(schema.payment)
 607 | 					.values({
 608 | 						id: data.id || crypto.randomUUID(),
 609 | 						...data,
 610 | 						billDate: data.billDate || new Date(),
 611 | 						totalAmount: data.totalAmount || data.amount,
 612 | 						amountPaid: data.status === "PAID" ? data.amount : 0,
 613 | 						paidDate: data.status === "PAID" ? new Date() : null,
 614 | 						receiptNumber: data.receiptNumber || Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000000),
 615 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
 616 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 617 | 					})
 618 | 					.returning();
 619 | 				return payment;
 620 | 			});
 621 | 			return result;
 622 | 		} catch (error) {
 623 | 			console.error("Error recording payment:", error);
 624 | 			throw new Error("Failed to record payment");
 625 | 		}
 626 | 	});

 749 | const processPaymentWithReceipt = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 750 | 	.validator(processPaymentSchema)
 751 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 752 | 		try {
 753 | 			const { paymentId, amountPaid, paymentMethod, notes } = ctx.data;
 754 | 
 755 | 			const result = await db.transaction(async tx => {
 756 | 				// ✅ FIX: Use object syntax for with clause
 757 | 				const payment = await tx.query.payment.findFirst({
 758 | 					where: { id: paymentId },
 759 | 					with: {
 760 | 						patient: true,
 761 | 						appointment: true
 762 | 					}
 763 | 				});
 764 | 
 765 | 				if (!payment) {
 766 | 					throw new Error("Payment not found");
 767 | 				}
 768 | 
 769 | 				const isFullyPaid = amountPaid >= (payment.totalAmount ?? 0);
 770 | 				const receiptNumber = `RCP-${Date.now()}-${Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000)}`;
 771 | 
 772 | 				const [updatedPayment] = await tx
 773 | 					.update(schema.payment)
 774 | 					.set({
 775 | 						amountPaid,
 776 | 						paymentMethod,
 777 | 						paymentDate: new Date(),
 778 | 						paidDate: new Date(),
 779 | 						status: isFullyPaid ? "PAID" : "PARTIAL",
 780 | 						notes: notes ? `${payment.notes || ""}\n${notes}` : payment.notes,
 781 | 						receiptNumber: Number.parseInt(receiptNumber.split("-").pop() || "0", 10),
 782 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 783 | 					})
 784 | 					.where(eq(schema.payment.id, paymentId))
 785 | 					.returning();
 786 | 
 787 | 				if (payment.patient?.userId) {
 788 | 					await tx.insert(schema.notification).values({
 789 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 790 | 						userId: payment.patient.userId,
 791 | 						clinicId: payment.clinicId ?? "",
 792 | 						title: "Payment Receipt",
 793 | 						body: `Payment of ${amountPaid} received. Receipt #: ${receiptNumber}`,
 794 | 						type: "payment_receipt",
 795 | 						priority: "medium",
 796 | 						status: "unread",
 797 | 						metadata: {
 798 | 							receiptNumber,
 799 | 							amountPaid,
 800 | 							paymentMethod
 801 | 						},
 802 | 						createdAt: new Date(),
 803 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 804 | 					});
 805 | 				}
 806 | 
 807 | 				return updatedPayment;
 808 | 			});
 809 | 
 810 | 			return result;
 811 | 		} catch (error) {
 812 | 			console.error("Error processing payment with receipt:", error);
 813 | 			throw new Error("Failed to process payment");
 814 | 		}
 815 | 	});

 831 | const getConfig = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
 832 | 	.validator(z.object({ key: z.string() }))
 833 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 834 | 		try {
 835 | 			const { key } = ctx.data;
 836 | 			const result = await db.select().from(schema.configStore).where(eq(schema.configStore.key, key)).limit(1);
 837 | 			return result[0] || null;
 838 | 		} catch (error) {
 839 | 			console.error("Error getting config:", error);
 840 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get config");
 841 | 		}
 842 | 	});
 843 | 
 844 | const getConfigs = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 845 | 	.validator(z.object({ keys: z.array(z.string()) }))
 846 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 847 | 		try {
 848 | 			const { keys } = ctx.data;
 849 | 			const results = await Promise.all(keys.map(key => getConfig({ data: { key } })));
 850 | 			return results.reduce(
 851 | 				(acc, result, idx) => {
 852 | 					if (result) acc[keys[idx] ?? ""] = result.value;
 853 | 					return acc;
 854 | 				},
 855 | 				{} as Record<string, string>
 856 | 			);
 857 | 		} catch (error) {
 858 | 			console.error("Error getting multiple configs:", error);
 859 | 			throw new Error("Failed to get configs");
 860 | 		}
 861 | 	});
 862 | 
 863 | const setConfig = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 864 | 	.validator(setConfigSchema)
 865 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 866 | 		try {
 867 | 			const { key, value } = ctx.data;
 868 | 			await db.insert(schema.configStore).values({ key, value }).onConflictDoUpdate({
 869 | 				target: schema.configStore.key,
 870 | 				set: { value }
 871 | 			});
 872 | 
 873 | 			return { success: true, key };
 874 | 		} catch (error) {
 875 | 			console.error("Error setting config:", error);
 876 | 			throw new Error("Failed to set config");
 877 | 		}
 878 | 	});
 879 | 
 880 | const setConfigs = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 881 | 	.validator(setConfigsSchema)
 882 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 883 | 		try {
 884 | 			const { configs } = ctx.data;
 885 | 			for (const config of configs) {
 886 | 				await setConfig({ data: config });
 887 | 			}
 888 | 			return { success: true, count: configs.length };
 889 | 		} catch (error) {
 890 | 			console.error("Error setting multiple configs:", error);
 891 | 			throw new Error("Failed to set configs");
 892 | 		}
 893 | 	});
 894 | 
 895 | const deleteConfig = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 896 | 	.validator(z.object({ key: z.string() }))
 897 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 898 | 		try {
 899 | 			const { key } = ctx.data;
 900 | 			await db.delete(schema.configStore).where(eq(schema.configStore.key, key));
 901 | 			return { success: true, key };
 902 | 		} catch (error) {
 903 | 			console.error("Error deleting config:", error);
 904 | 			throw new Error("Failed to delete config");
 905 | 		}
 906 | 	});
 907 | 
 908 | const getExistingConfigKeys = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(async () => {
 909 | 	try {
 910 | 		const rows = await db.select({ key: schema.configStore.key }).from(schema.configStore);
 911 | 		return rows.map(row => row.key);
 912 | 	} catch (error) {
 913 | 		console.error("Error getting existing config keys:", error);
 914 | 		throw new Error("Failed to get config keys");
 915 | 	}
 916 | });
 917 | 
 918 | const initializeMissingConfigs = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
 919 | 	.validator(initializeConfigsSchema)
 920 | 	.handler(async ctx => {
 921 | 		try {
 922 | 			const { defaults } = ctx.data;
 923 | 			const existingKeys = await getExistingConfigKeys();
 924 | 			const missing = defaults.filter(d => !existingKeys.includes(d.key));
 925 | 
 926 | 			if (missing.length > 0) {
 927 | 				await db.insert(schema.configStore).values(missing).onConflictDoNothing();
 928 | 			}
 929 | 
 930 | 			return missing;
 931 | 		} catch (error) {
 932 | 			console.error("Error initializing missing configs:", error);
 933 | 			throw new Error("Failed to initialize configs");
 934 | 		}
 935 | 	});

```

`hooks/ai-hooks.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { clientTools } from "@tanstack/ai-client";
   2 | import type { InferChatMessages } from "@tanstack/ai-react";
   3 | import { createChatClientOptions, fetchServerSentEvents, useChat } from "@tanstack/ai-react";
   4 | 
   5 | // Import clinic tools (patient management)
   6 | import {
   7 | 	getAppointmentsByPatientToolDef,
   8 | 	getAppointmentsToolDef,
   9 | 	getClinicStatsToolDef,
  10 | 	getPatientByIdToolDef,
  11 | 	getPatientsByAgeGroupToolDef,
  12 | 	getPatientsToolDef,
  13 | 	getVaccinationScheduleByAgeToolDef,
  14 | 	getVaccineByNameToolDef,
  15 | 	getVaccinesToolDef,
  16 | 	searchPatientsToolDef
  17 | } from "@/lib/clinic-tools";
  18 | 
  19 | // Import health content tools
  20 | 
  21 | // ============================================
  22 | // CLIENT TOOL IMPLEMENTATIONS
  23 | // ============================================
  24 | 
  25 | // ============================================
  26 | // CHAT OPTIONS WITH ALL TOOLS
  27 | // ============================================
  28 | 
  29 | const chatOptions = createChatClientOptions({
  30 | 	connection: fetchServerSentEvents("/api/ai/chat"),
  31 | 	tools: clientTools(
  32 | 		// Demo tools
  33 | 
  34 | 		// Clinic management tools
  35 | 		getPatientsToolDef,
  36 | 		getPatientByIdToolDef,
  37 | 		getPatientsByAgeGroupToolDef,
  38 | 		getAppointmentsToolDef,
  39 | 		getAppointmentsByPatientToolDef,
  40 | 		getVaccinesToolDef,
  41 | 		getVaccineByNameToolDef,
  42 | 		getVaccinationScheduleByAgeToolDef,
  43 | 		searchPatientsToolDef,
  44 | 		getClinicStatsToolDef
  45 | 	)
  46 | });
  47 | 
  48 | export type ChatMessages = InferChatMessages<typeof chatOptions>;
  49 | 
  50 | // ============================================
  51 | // CUSTOM HOOKS FOR DIFFERENT CONTEXTS
  52 | // ============================================
  53 | 
  54 | // Main clinic chat hook (includes all tools)
  55 | export const useClinicChat = () => useChat(chatOptions);
  56 | 
  57 | // Pediatric chat hook (focused on children's health)
  58 | export const usePediatricChat = () => {
  59 | 	const chat = useChat(chatOptions);
  60 | 
  61 | 	// You can add custom logic here to filter or prioritize certain tools
  62 | 	return chat;
  63 | };
  64 | 
  65 | // Patient support chat hook (limited to patient-related tools)
  66 | export const usePatientSupportChat = () => {
  67 | 	const supportChatOptions = createChatClientOptions({
  68 | 		connection: fetchServerSentEvents("/api/ai/chat"),
  69 | 		tools: clientTools(
  70 | 			getPatientsToolDef,
  71 | 			getPatientByIdToolDef,
  72 | 			getAppointmentsToolDef,
  73 | 			getAppointmentsByPatientToolDef,
  74 | 			searchPatientsToolDef
  75 | 		)
  76 | 	});
  77 | 
  78 | 	return useChat(supportChatOptions);
  79 | };
  80 | 
  81 | // Health education chat hook (only content tools)
  82 | export const useHealthEducationChat = () => {
  83 | 	const educationChatOptions = createChatClientOptions({
  84 | 		connection: fetchServerSentEvents("/api/ai/chat"),
  85 | 		tools: clientTools(getVaccineByNameToolDef, getVaccinationScheduleByAgeToolDef)
  86 | 	});
  87 | 
  88 | 	return useChat(educationChatOptions);
  89 | };
  90 | 
  91 | // Vaccination-focused chat hook
  92 | export const useVaccinationChat = () => {
  93 | 	const vaccinationChatOptions = createChatClientOptions({
  94 | 		connection: fetchServerSentEvents("/api/ai/chat"),
  95 | 		tools: clientTools(getVaccinesToolDef, getVaccineByNameToolDef, getVaccinationScheduleByAgeToolDef)
  96 | 	});
  97 | 
  98 | 	return useChat(vaccinationChatOptions);
  99 | };
 100 | 
 101 | export default chatOptions;

```

`hooks/auth.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { queryOptions } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   2 | import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
   3 | 
   4 | import { authClient } from "../lib/auth-client";
   5 | 
   6 | // This is the Public Bridge for the User
   7 | export const $getUser = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(async () => {
   8 | 	const { getSession: fetchFromAuth } = await import("@clinic/api/lib/auth-functions");
   9 | 	const session = await fetchFromAuth({});
  10 | 	return session?.user ?? null;
  11 | });
  12 | 
  13 | // This is the Public Bridge for the Full Session
  14 | export const $getSession = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(async () => {
  15 | 	const { getSession: fetchFromAuth } = await import("@clinic/api/lib/auth-functions");
  16 | 	const session = await fetchFromAuth({});
  17 | 	return session ?? null;
  18 | });
  19 | 
  20 | export const ensureSession = createServerFn({ method: "GET" }).handler(async () => {
  21 | 	const session = await $getSession(); // Use the existing bridge
  22 | 
  23 | 	if (!session) {
  24 | 		throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  25 | 	}
  26 | 	return session;
  27 | });
  28 | 
  29 | export const signOut = async () => {
  30 | 	await authClient.signOut();
  31 | };
  32 | 
  33 | export const authQueryKeys = {
  34 | 	user: ["user"]
  35 | };
  36 | 
  37 | export function getAuthUserQueryOptions() {
  38 | 	return queryOptions({
  39 | 		staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5,
  40 | 		gcTime: 1000 * 60 * 10,
  41 | 		queryKey: authQueryKeys.user,
  42 | 		queryFn: () => $getUser()
  43 | 	});
  44 | }

```

`hooks/use-mobile.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import * as React from "react";
   2 | 
   3 | const MOBILE_BREAKPOINT = 768;
   4 | 
   5 | export function useIsMobile() {
   6 | 	const [isMobile, setIsMobile] = React.useState<boolean | undefined>(undefined);
   7 | 
   8 | 	React.useEffect(() => {
   9 | 		const mql = window.matchMedia(`(max-width: ${MOBILE_BREAKPOINT - 1}px)`);
  10 | 		const onChange = () => {
  11 | 			setIsMobile(window.innerWidth < MOBILE_BREAKPOINT);
  12 | 		};
  13 | 		mql.addEventListener("change", onChange);
  14 | 		setIsMobile(window.innerWidth < MOBILE_BREAKPOINT);
  15 | 		return () => mql.removeEventListener("change", onChange);
  16 | 	}, []);
  17 | 
  18 | 	return !!isMobile;
  19 | }

```

```ts
   1 | import i18n from "i18next";
   2 | import LanguageDetector from "i18next-browser-languagedetector";
   3 | import HttpBackend from "i18next-http-backend";
   4 | 
   5 | i18n.use(HttpBackend)
   6 | 	.use(LanguageDetector)
   7 | 	.init({
   8 | 		fallbackLng: "en",
   9 | 		supportedLngs: ["en", "fr"],
  10 | 		defaultNS: "common",
  11 | 		ns: ["common"],
  12 | 		interpolation: {
  13 | 			escapeValue: false
  14 | 		},
  15 | 		backend: {
  16 | 			loadPath: "/locales//.json"
  17 | 		},
  18 | 		detection: {
  19 | 			order: ["navigator", "htmlTag"],
  20 | 			caches: ["localStorage"]
  21 | 		}
  22 | 	});
  23 | 
  24 | export default i18n;
```

`lib/auth-client.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import type { Auth } from "@clinic/auth";
   2 | import { ac, admin, doctor, patient, staff } from "@clinic/auth/permissions";
   3 | import { adminClient, inferAdditionalFields } from "better-auth/client/plugins";
   4 | import { createAuthClient } from "better-auth/react";
   5 | 
   6 | export const authClient: ReturnType<typeof createAuthClient> = createAuthClient({
   7 | 	baseURL: process.env.VITE_BASE_URL,
   8 | 	plugins: [
   9 | 		adminClient({
  10 | 			ac,
  11 | 			roles: { staff, admin, patient, doctor }
  12 | 		}),
  13 | 		inferAdditionalFields<Auth>()
  14 | 	]
  15 | });
  16 | 
  17 | export type Session = typeof authClient.$Infer.Session;
  18 | 
  19 | export const { signIn, signOut, useSession } = authClient;
  20 | 
  21 | export const useAuth = () => {
  22 | 	const { data, isPending, error } = useSession();
  23 | 	const isAuthenticated = !!data?.user;
  24 | 	const user = data?.user;
  25 | 
  26 | 	return {
  27 | 		isAuthenticated,
  28 | 		user,
  29 | 		isPending, // Good for showing loading states
  30 | 		error // Good for error handling
  31 | 	};
  32 | };
  33 | 
  34 | export type AuthClientUser = (typeof authClient.$Infer.Session)["user"];
  35 | export type AuthClientSession = typeof authClient.$Infer.Session;
  36 | export type AuthClient = typeof authClient;

```

`lib/betterstack.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { Logtail } from "@logtail/node";
   2 | 
   3 | const endpoint = process.env.BETTERSTACK_INGESTING_HOST
   4 | 	? `https://${process.env.BETTERSTACK_INGESTING_HOST}`
   5 | 	: undefined;
   6 | 
   7 | export const logtail = new Logtail(process.env.BETTERSTACK_SOURCE_TOKEN ?? "", endpoint ? { endpoint } : undefined);
   8 | 
   9 | export async function logInfo(message: string, context?: Record<string, unknown>) {
  10 | 	logtail.info(message, context);
  11 | 	await logtail.flush();
  12 | }
  13 | 
  14 | export async function logError(message: string, context?: Record<string, unknown>) {
  15 | 	logtail.error(message, context);
  16 | 	await logtail.flush();
  17 | }

```

`lib/clinic-store.devtool.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // clinic-store.devtool.tsx
   2 | // TanStack Devtools plugin for clinic stores.
   3 | // Usage in __root.tsx: import StoreDevtools from "@/lib/clinic-store.devtool";
   4 | // then add StoreDevtools to the plugins array of <TanStackDevtools />.
   5 | 
   6 | import { EventClient } from "@tanstack/devtools-event-client";
   7 | import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
   8 | 
   9 | import {
  10 | 	appointmentStore,
  11 | 	authStore,
  12 | 	clinicStore,
  13 | 	doctorStore,
  14 | 	feedingLogStore,
  15 | 	growthRecordStore,
  16 | 	immunizationStore,
  17 | 	milestonesStore,
  18 | 	notificationStore,
  19 | 	patientStore,
  20 | 	prescriptionStore,
  21 | 	vaccineScheduleStore,
  22 | 	vitalSignsStore
  23 | } from "./clinic.store";
  24 | 
  25 | // ============================================================================
  26 | // EventMap  (pluginId:eventName  →  payload shape)
  27 | // ============================================================================
  28 | 
  29 | type EventMap = {
  30 | 	"clinic-store:auth": {
  31 | 		isAuthenticated: boolean;
  32 | 		isLoading: boolean;
  33 | 		error: string | null;
  34 | 		userId: string | null;
  35 | 		userName: string | null;
  36 | 	};
  37 | 	"clinic-store:clinic": {
  38 | 		currentClinicId: string | null;
  39 | 		currentClinicName: string | null;
  40 | 		clinicsCount: number;
  41 | 		isLoading: boolean;
  42 | 		error: string | null;
  43 | 	};
  44 | 	"clinic-store:patient": {
  45 | 		patientsCount: number;
  46 | 		currentPatientName: string | null;
  47 | 		totalCount: number;
  48 | 		isLoading: boolean;
  49 | 		error: string | null;
  50 | 		filterSearch: string;
  51 | 		filterStatus: string | null;
  52 | 	};
  53 | 	"clinic-store:appointment": {
  54 | 		appointmentsCount: number;
  55 | 		selectedDate: string | null;
  56 | 		viewMode: "day" | "week" | "month";
  57 | 		isLoading: boolean;
  58 | 		error: string | null;
  59 | 	};
  60 | 	"clinic-store:doctor": {
  61 | 		doctorsCount: number;
  62 | 		currentDoctorName: string | null;
  63 | 		specialtiesCount: number;
  64 | 		isLoading: boolean;
  65 | 		error: string | null;
  66 | 	};
  67 | 	"clinic-store:notification": {
  68 | 		notificationsCount: number;
  69 | 		unreadCount: number;
  70 | 		isLoading: boolean;
  71 | 		error: string | null;
  72 | 	};
  73 | 	"clinic-store:growth": {
  74 | 		recordsCount: number;
  75 | 		chartDataPoints: number;
  76 | 		isLoading: boolean;
  77 | 		error: string | null;
  78 | 	};
  79 | 	"clinic-store:immunization": {
  80 | 		immunizationsCount: number;
  81 | 		upcomingVaccinesCount: number;
  82 | 		isLoading: boolean;
  83 | 		error: string | null;
  84 | 	};
  85 | 	"clinic-store:feeding": {
  86 | 		logsCount: number;
  87 | 		totalFeedings: number;
  88 | 		averageDuration: number;
  89 | 		totalAmount: number;
  90 | 		isLoading: boolean;
  91 | 		error: string | null;
  92 | 	};
  93 | 	"clinic-store:milestones": {
  94 | 		milestonesCount: number;
  95 | 		ageGroupsCount: number;
  96 | 		isLoading: boolean;
  97 | 		error: string | null;
  98 | 	};
  99 | 	"clinic-store:vaccine-schedule": {
 100 | 		schedulesCount: number;
 101 | 		mandatoryCount: number;
 102 | 		isLoading: boolean;
 103 | 		error: string | null;
 104 | 	};
 105 | 	"clinic-store:neonatal": {
 106 | 		assessmentsCount: number;
 107 | 		currentAssessmentId: string | null;
 108 | 		isLoading: boolean;
 109 | 		error: string | null;
 110 | 	};
 111 | 	"clinic-store:prescription": {
 112 | 		prescriptionsCount: number;
 113 | 		activePrescriptionsCount: number;
 114 | 		isLoading: boolean;
 115 | 		error: string | null;
 116 | 	};
 117 | 	"clinic-store:vitals": {
 118 | 		vitalsCount: number;
 119 | 		hasTrends: boolean;
 120 | 		isLoading: boolean;
 121 | 		error: string | null;
 122 | 	};
 123 | };
 124 | 
 125 | // ============================================================================
 126 | // Event client  (pluginId = "clinic-store")
 127 | // ============================================================================
 128 | 
 129 | class ClinicStoreEventClient extends EventClient<EventMap> {
 130 | 	constructor() {
 131 | 		super({ pluginId: "clinic-store" });
 132 | 	}
 133 | }
 134 | 
 135 | const sdec = new ClinicStoreEventClient();
 136 | 
 137 | // ============================================================================
 138 | // Subscriptions — emit short key ("auth", not "clinic-store:auth")
 139 | // ============================================================================
 140 | 
 141 | authStore.subscribe(() => {
 142 | 	const s = authStore.state;
 143 | 	sdec.emit("clinic-store:auth", {
 144 | 		isAuthenticated: s.isAuthenticated,
 145 | 		isLoading: s.isLoading,
 146 | 		error: s.error,
 147 | 		userId: s.user?.id ?? null,
 148 | 		userName: s.user?.name ?? null
 149 | 	});
 150 | });
 151 | 
 152 | clinicStore.subscribe(() => {
 153 | 	const s = clinicStore.state;
 154 | 	sdec.emit("clinic-store:clinic", {
 155 | 		currentClinicId: s.currentClinic?.id ?? null,
 156 | 		currentClinicName: s.currentClinic?.name ?? null,
 157 | 		clinicsCount: s.clinics.length,
 158 | 		isLoading: s.isLoading,
 159 | 		error: s.error
 160 | 	});
 161 | });
 162 | 
 163 | patientStore.subscribe(() => {
 164 | 	const s = patientStore.state;
 165 | 	sdec.emit("clinic-store:patient", {
 166 | 		patientsCount: s.patients.length,
 167 | 		currentPatientName: s.currentPatient ? `${s.currentPatient.firstName} ${s.currentPatient.lastName}` : null,
 168 | 		totalCount: s.totalCount,
 169 | 		isLoading: s.isLoading,
 170 | 		error: s.error,
 171 | 		filterSearch: s.filters.search,
 172 | 		filterStatus: s.filters.status
 173 | 	});
 174 | });
 175 | 
 176 | appointmentStore.subscribe(() => {
 177 | 	const s = appointmentStore.state;
 178 | 	sdec.emit("clinic-store:appointment", {
 179 | 		appointmentsCount: s.appointments.length,
 180 | 		selectedDate: s.selectedDate?.toISOString() ?? null,
 181 | 		viewMode: s.viewMode,
 182 | 		isLoading: s.isLoading,
 183 | 		error: s.error
 184 | 	});
 185 | });
 186 | 
 187 | doctorStore.subscribe(() => {
 188 | 	const s = doctorStore.state;
 189 | 	sdec.emit("clinic-store:doctor", {
 190 | 		doctorsCount: s.doctors.length,
 191 | 		currentDoctorName: s.currentDoctor?.name ?? null,
 192 | 		specialtiesCount: s.specialties.length,
 193 | 		isLoading: s.isLoading,
 194 | 		error: s.error
 195 | 	});
 196 | });
 197 | 
 198 | notificationStore.subscribe(() => {
 199 | 	const s = notificationStore.state;
 200 | 	sdec.emit("clinic-store:notification", {
 201 | 		notificationsCount: s.notifications.length,
 202 | 		unreadCount: s.unreadCount,
 203 | 		isLoading: s.isLoading,
 204 | 		error: s.error
 205 | 	});
 206 | });
 207 | 
 208 | growthRecordStore.subscribe(() => {
 209 | 	const s = growthRecordStore.state;
 210 | 	sdec.emit("clinic-store:growth", {
 211 | 		recordsCount: s.records.length,
 212 | 		chartDataPoints: s.chartData.length,
 213 | 		isLoading: s.isLoading,
 214 | 		error: s.error
 215 | 	});
 216 | });
 217 | 
 218 | immunizationStore.subscribe(() => {
 219 | 	const s = immunizationStore.state;
 220 | 	sdec.emit("clinic-store:immunization", {
 221 | 		immunizationsCount: s.immunizations.length,
 222 | 		upcomingVaccinesCount: s.upcomingVaccines.length,
 223 | 		isLoading: s.isLoading,
 224 | 		error: s.error
 225 | 	});
 226 | });
 227 | 
 228 | feedingLogStore.subscribe(() => {
 229 | 	const s = feedingLogStore.state;
 230 | 	sdec.emit("clinic-store:feeding", {
 231 | 		logsCount: s.logs.length,
 232 | 		totalFeedings: s.stats?.totalFeedings ?? 0,
 233 | 		averageDuration: s.stats?.averageDuration ?? 0,
 234 | 		totalAmount: s.stats?.totalAmount ?? 0,
 235 | 		isLoading: s.isLoading,
 236 | 		error: s.error
 237 | 	});
 238 | });
 239 | 
 240 | milestonesStore.subscribe(() => {
 241 | 	const s = milestonesStore.state;
 242 | 	sdec.emit("clinic-store:milestones", {
 243 | 		milestonesCount: s.milestones.length,
 244 | 		ageGroupsCount: Object.keys(s.byAgeGroup).length,
 245 | 		isLoading: s.isLoading,
 246 | 		error: s.error
 247 | 	});
 248 | });
 249 | 
 250 | vaccineScheduleStore.subscribe(() => {
 251 | 	const s = vaccineScheduleStore.state;
 252 | 	sdec.emit("clinic-store:vaccine-schedule", {
 253 | 		schedulesCount: s.schedules.length,
 254 | 		mandatoryCount: s.mandatoryVaccines.length,
 255 | 		isLoading: s.isLoading,
 256 | 		error: s.error
 257 | 	});
 258 | });
 259 | 
 260 | prescriptionStore.subscribe(() => {
 261 | 	const s = prescriptionStore.state;
 262 | 	sdec.emit("clinic-store:prescription", {
 263 | 		prescriptionsCount: s.prescriptions.length,
 264 | 		activePrescriptionsCount: s.activePrescriptions.length,
 265 | 		isLoading: s.isLoading,
 266 | 		error: s.error
 267 | 	});
 268 | });
 269 | 
 270 | vitalSignsStore.subscribe(() => {
 271 | 	const s = vitalSignsStore.state;
 272 | 	sdec.emit("clinic-store:vitals", {
 273 | 		vitalsCount: s.vitals.length,
 274 | 		hasTrends: s.trends !== null,
 275 | 		isLoading: s.isLoading,
 276 | 		error: s.error
 277 | 	});
 278 | });
 279 | 
 280 | // ============================================================================
 281 | // Panel component
 282 | // ============================================================================
 283 | 
 284 | function DevtoolPanel() {
 285 | 	const [auth, setAuth] = useState<EventMap["clinic-store:auth"]>(() => {
 286 | 		const s = authStore.state;
 287 | 		return {
 288 | 			isAuthenticated: s.isAuthenticated,
 289 | 			isLoading: s.isLoading,
 290 | 			error: s.error,
 291 | 			userId: s.user?.id ?? null,
 292 | 			userName: s.user?.name ?? null
 293 | 		};
 294 | 	});
 295 | 	const [clinic, setClinic] = useState<EventMap["clinic-store:clinic"]>(() => {
 296 | 		const s = clinicStore.state;
 297 | 		return {
 298 | 			currentClinicId: s.currentClinic?.id ?? null,
 299 | 			currentClinicName: s.currentClinic?.name ?? null,
 300 | 			clinicsCount: s.clinics.length,
 301 | 			isLoading: s.isLoading,
 302 | 			error: s.error
 303 | 		};
 304 | 	});
 305 | 	const [patient, setPatient] = useState<EventMap["clinic-store:patient"]>(() => {
 306 | 		const s = patientStore.state;
 307 | 		return {
 308 | 			patientsCount: s.patients.length,
 309 | 			currentPatientName: s.currentPatient ? `${s.currentPatient.firstName} ${s.currentPatient.lastName}` : null,
 310 | 			totalCount: s.totalCount,
 311 | 			isLoading: s.isLoading,
 312 | 			error: s.error,
 313 | 			filterSearch: s.filters.search,
 314 | 			filterStatus: s.filters.status
 315 | 		};
 316 | 	});
 317 | 	const [appt, setAppt] = useState<EventMap["clinic-store:appointment"]>(() => {
 318 | 		const s = appointmentStore.state;
 319 | 		return {
 320 | 			appointmentsCount: s.appointments.length,
 321 | 			selectedDate: s.selectedDate?.toISOString() ?? null,
 322 | 			viewMode: s.viewMode,
 323 | 			isLoading: s.isLoading,
 324 | 			error: s.error
 325 | 		};
 326 | 	});
 327 | 	const [doctor, setDoctor] = useState<EventMap["clinic-store:doctor"]>(() => {
 328 | 		const s = doctorStore.state;
 329 | 		return {
 330 | 			doctorsCount: s.doctors.length,
 331 | 			currentDoctorName: s.currentDoctor?.name ?? null,
 332 | 			specialtiesCount: s.specialties.length,
 333 | 			isLoading: s.isLoading,
 334 | 			error: s.error
 335 | 		};
 336 | 	});
 337 | 	const [notif, setNotif] = useState<EventMap["clinic-store:notification"]>(() => {
 338 | 		const s = notificationStore.state;
 339 | 		return {
 340 | 			notificationsCount: s.notifications.length,
 341 | 			unreadCount: s.unreadCount,
 342 | 			isLoading: s.isLoading,
 343 | 			error: s.error
 344 | 		};
 345 | 	});
 346 | 	const [growth, setGrowth] = useState<EventMap["clinic-store:growth"]>(() => {
 347 | 		const s = growthRecordStore.state;
 348 | 		return {
 349 | 			recordsCount: s.records.length,
 350 | 			chartDataPoints: s.chartData.length,
 351 | 			isLoading: s.isLoading,
 352 | 			error: s.error
 353 | 		};
 354 | 	});
 355 | 	const [immun, setImmun] = useState<EventMap["clinic-store:immunization"]>(() => {
 356 | 		const s = immunizationStore.state;
 357 | 		return {
 358 | 			immunizationsCount: s.immunizations.length,
 359 | 			upcomingVaccinesCount: s.upcomingVaccines.length,
 360 | 			isLoading: s.isLoading,
 361 | 			error: s.error
 362 | 		};
 363 | 	});
 364 | 	const [feed, setFeed] = useState<EventMap["clinic-store:feeding"]>(() => {
 365 | 		const s = feedingLogStore.state;
 366 | 		return {
 367 | 			logsCount: s.logs.length,
 368 | 			totalFeedings: s.stats?.totalFeedings ?? 0,
 369 | 			averageDuration: s.stats?.averageDuration ?? 0,
 370 | 			totalAmount: s.stats?.totalAmount ?? 0,
 371 | 			isLoading: s.isLoading,
 372 | 			error: s.error
 373 | 		};
 374 | 	});
 375 | 	const [miles, setMiles] = useState<EventMap["clinic-store:milestones"]>(() => {
 376 | 		const s = milestonesStore.state;
 377 | 		return {
 378 | 			milestonesCount: s.milestones.length,
 379 | 			ageGroupsCount: Object.keys(s.byAgeGroup).length,
 380 | 			isLoading: s.isLoading,
 381 | 			error: s.error
 382 | 		};
 383 | 	});
 384 | 	const [vacc, setVacc] = useState<EventMap["clinic-store:vaccine-schedule"]>(() => {
 385 | 		const s = vaccineScheduleStore.state;
 386 | 		return {
 387 | 			schedulesCount: s.schedules.length,
 388 | 			mandatoryCount: s.mandatoryVaccines.length,
 389 | 			isLoading: s.isLoading,
 390 | 			error: s.error
 391 | 		};
 392 | 	});
 393 | 	const [rx, setRx] = useState<EventMap["clinic-store:prescription"]>(() => {
 394 | 		const s = prescriptionStore.state;
 395 | 		return {
 396 | 			prescriptionsCount: s.prescriptions.length,
 397 | 			activePrescriptionsCount: s.activePrescriptions.length,
 398 | 			isLoading: s.isLoading,
 399 | 			error: s.error
 400 | 		};
 401 | 	});
 402 | 	const [vitals, setVitals] = useState<EventMap["clinic-store:vitals"]>(() => {
 403 | 		const s = vitalSignsStore.state;
 404 | 		return {
 405 | 			vitalsCount: s.vitals.length,
 406 | 			hasTrends: s.trends !== null,
 407 | 			isLoading: s.isLoading,
 408 | 			error: s.error
 409 | 		};
 410 | 	});
 411 | 
 412 | 	useEffect(() => {
 413 | 		const unsubs = [
 414 | 			sdec.on("clinic-store:auth", e => setAuth(e.payload)),
 415 | 			sdec.on("clinic-store:clinic", e => setClinic(e.payload)),
 416 | 			sdec.on("clinic-store:patient", e => setPatient(e.payload)),
 417 | 			sdec.on("clinic-store:appointment", e => setAppt(e.payload)),
 418 | 			sdec.on("clinic-store:doctor", e => setDoctor(e.payload)),
 419 | 			sdec.on("clinic-store:notification", e => setNotif(e.payload)),
 420 | 			sdec.on("clinic-store:growth", e => setGrowth(e.payload)),
 421 | 			sdec.on("clinic-store:immunization", e => setImmun(e.payload)),
 422 | 			sdec.on("clinic-store:feeding", e => setFeed(e.payload)),
 423 | 			sdec.on("clinic-store:milestones", e => setMiles(e.payload)),
 424 | 			sdec.on("clinic-store:vaccine-schedule", e => setVacc(e.payload)),
 425 | 			sdec.on("clinic-store:prescription", e => setRx(e.payload)),
 426 | 			sdec.on("clinic-store:vitals", e => setVitals(e.payload))
 427 | 		];
 428 | 		return () =>
 429 | 			unsubs.forEach(fn => {
 430 | 				fn();
 431 | 			});
 432 | 	}, []);
 433 | 
 434 | 	const val = (v: string | number | boolean | null | undefined) => (v === null || v === undefined ? "—" : String(v));
 435 | 
 436 | 	const row = (label: string, value: string | number | boolean | null | undefined) => (
 437 | 		<>
 438 | 			<div className='whitespace-nowrap font-bold text-gray-500 text-sm'>{label}</div>
 439 | 			<div className='text-sm'>{val(value)}</div>
 440 | 		</>
 441 | 	);
 442 | 
 443 | 	return (
 444 | 		<div className='grid grid-cols-[1fr_10fr] gap-4 p-4 text-sm'>
 445 | 			{/* Auth */}
 446 | 			<div className='col-span-2 mt-2 font-semibold text-gray-700 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide'>Auth</div>
 447 | 			{row("Authenticated", auth.isAuthenticated)}
 448 | 			{row("User", auth.userName)}
 449 | 			{row("User ID", auth.userId)}
 450 | 			{row("Loading", auth.isLoading)}
 451 | 			{row("Error", auth.error)}
 452 | 
 453 | 			{/* Clinic */}
 454 | 			<div className='col-span-2 mt-2 font-semibold text-gray-700 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide'>Clinic</div>
 455 | 			{row("Current Clinic", clinic.currentClinicName)}
 456 | 			{row("Clinic ID", clinic.currentClinicId)}
 457 | 			{row("Total Clinics", clinic.clinicsCount)}
 458 | 			{row("Loading", clinic.isLoading)}
 459 | 
 460 | 			{/* Patient */}
 461 | 			<div className='col-span-2 mt-2 font-semibold text-gray-700 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide'>Patient</div>
 462 | 			{row("Loaded", patient.patientsCount)}
 463 | 			{row("Total", patient.totalCount)}
 464 | 			{row("Current", patient.currentPatientName)}
 465 | 			{row("Search", patient.filterSearch || "—")}
 466 | 			{row("Status Filter", patient.filterStatus)}
 467 | 
 468 | 			{/* Appointment */}
 469 | 			<div className='col-span-2 mt-2 font-semibold text-gray-700 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide'>
 470 | 				Appointment
 471 | 			</div>
 472 | 			{row("Count", appt.appointmentsCount)}
 473 | 			{row("Selected Date", appt.selectedDate)}
 474 | 			{row("View Mode", appt.viewMode)}
 475 | 
 476 | 			{/* Doctor */}
 477 | 			<div className='col-span-2 mt-2 font-semibold text-gray-700 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide'>Doctor</div>
 478 | 			{row("Count", doctor.doctorsCount)}
 479 | 			{row("Current", doctor.currentDoctorName)}
 480 | 			{row("Specialties", doctor.specialtiesCount)}
 481 | 
 482 | 			{/* Notifications */}
 483 | 			<div className='col-span-2 mt-2 font-semibold text-gray-700 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide'>
 484 | 				Notifications
 485 | 			</div>
 486 | 			{row("Total", notif.notificationsCount)}
 487 | 			{row("Unread", notif.unreadCount)}
 488 | 
 489 | 			{/* Growth */}
 490 | 			<div className='col-span-2 mt-2 font-semibold text-gray-700 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide'>
 491 | 				Growth Records
 492 | 			</div>
 493 | 			{row("Records", growth.recordsCount)}
 494 | 			{row("Chart Points", growth.chartDataPoints)}
 495 | 
 496 | 			{/* Immunization */}
 497 | 			<div className='col-span-2 mt-2 font-semibold text-gray-700 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide'>
 498 | 				Immunizations
 499 | 			</div>
 500 | 			{row("Total", immun.immunizationsCount)}
 501 | 			{row("Upcoming", immun.upcomingVaccinesCount)}
 502 | 
 503 | 			{/* Feeding */}
 504 | 			<div className='col-span-2 mt-2 font-semibold text-gray-700 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide'>
 505 | 				Feeding Logs
 506 | 			</div>
 507 | 			{row("Logs", feed.logsCount)}
 508 | 			{row("Total Feedings", feed.totalFeedings)}
 509 | 			{row("Avg Duration (min)", feed.averageDuration.toFixed(1))}
 510 | 			{row("Total Amount (mL)", feed.totalAmount.toFixed(1))}
 511 | 
 512 | 			{/* Milestones */}
 513 | 			<div className='col-span-2 mt-2 font-semibold text-gray-700 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide'>
 514 | 				Milestones
 515 | 			</div>
 516 | 			{row("Count", miles.milestonesCount)}
 517 | 			{row("Age Groups", miles.ageGroupsCount)}
 518 | 
 519 | 			{/* Vaccine Schedule */}
 520 | 			<div className='col-span-2 mt-2 font-semibold text-gray-700 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide'>
 521 | 				Vaccine Schedule
 522 | 			</div>
 523 | 			{row("Schedules", vacc.schedulesCount)}
 524 | 			{row("Mandatory", vacc.mandatoryCount)}
 525 | 			{/* Prescriptions */}
 526 | 			<div className='col-span-2 mt-2 font-semibold text-gray-700 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide'>
 527 | 				Prescriptions
 528 | 			</div>
 529 | 			{row("Total", rx.prescriptionsCount)}
 530 | 			{row("Active", rx.activePrescriptionsCount)}
 531 | 
 532 | 			{/* Vitals */}
 533 | 			<div className='col-span-2 mt-2 font-semibold text-gray-700 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide'>
 534 | 				Vital Signs
 535 | 			</div>
 536 | 			{row("Records", vitals.vitalsCount)}
 537 | 			{row("Has Trends", vitals.hasTrends)}
 538 | 		</div>
 539 | 	);
 540 | }
 541 | 
 542 | // ============================================================================
 543 | // Export — single object, matching the TanStack Devtools plugin shape
 544 | // ============================================================================
 545 | 
 546 | export default {
 547 | 	name: "TanStack Store",
 548 | 	render: <DevtoolPanel />
 549 | };

```

`lib/clinic-tools.ts`:
