```ts
 146 | // ============================================
 147 | // PATIENT TOOLS
 148 | // ============================================
 149 | 
 150 | // Get all patients
 151 | export const getPatientsToolDef = toolDefinition({
 152 | 	name: "getPatients",
 153 | 	description:
 154 | 		"Get all patients from the clinic database. Returns a list of patients with basic info including name, age, status, and last visit.",
 155 | 	inputSchema: z.object({}),
 156 | 	outputSchema: z.array(
 157 | 		z.object({
 158 | 			id: z.number(),
 159 | 			name: z.string(),
 160 | 			age: z.number(),
 161 | 			phone: z.string(),
 162 | 			email: z.string(),
 163 | 			lastVisit: z.string().nullable(),
 164 | 			nextAppointment: z.string().nullable(),
 165 | 			status: z.string(),
 166 | 			image: z.string().optional()
 167 | 		})
 168 | 	)
 169 | });
 170 | 
 171 | export const getPatients = getPatientsToolDef.server(() => {
 172 | 	return patients.map(patient => ({
 173 | 		id: patient.id,
 174 | 		name: patient.name,
 175 | 		age: patient.age,
 176 | 		phone: patient.phone,
 177 | 		email: patient.email,
 178 | 		lastVisit: patient.lastVisit,
 179 | 		nextAppointment: patient.nextAppointment,
 180 | 		status: patient.status,
 181 | 		image: patient.image
 182 | 	}));
 183 | });
 184 | 
 185 | // Get patient by ID
 186 | export const getPatientByIdToolDef = toolDefinition({
 187 | 	name: "getPatientById",
 188 | 	description: "Get detailed information about a specific patient including their medical history.",
 189 | 	inputSchema: z.object({
 190 | 		id: z.number().describe("The ID of the patient")
 191 | 	}),
 192 | 	outputSchema: z.object({
 193 | 		id: z.number(),
 194 | 		name: z.string(),
 195 | 		age: z.number(),
 196 | 		phone: z.string(),
 197 | 		email: z.string(),
 198 | 		lastVisit: z.string().nullable(),
 199 | 		nextAppointment: z.string().nullable(),
 200 | 		status: z.string(),
 201 | 		medicalHistory: z.array(z.string()),
 202 | 		image: z.string().optional()
 203 | 	})
 204 | });
 205 | 
 206 | export const getPatientById = getPatientByIdToolDef.server(({ id }) => {
 207 | 	const patient = patients.find(p => p.id === id);
 208 | 	if (!patient) {
 209 | 		return {
 210 | 			id: 0,
 211 | 			name: "Patient not found",
 212 | 			age: 0,
 213 | 			phone: "",
 214 | 			email: "",
 215 | 			lastVisit: null,
 216 | 			nextAppointment: null,
 217 | 			status: "",
 218 | 			medicalHistory: []
 219 | 		};
 220 | 	}
 221 | 	return {
 222 | 		id: patient.id,
 223 | 		name: patient.name,
 224 | 		age: patient.age,
 225 | 		phone: patient.phone,
 226 | 		email: patient.email,
 227 | 		lastVisit: patient.lastVisit,
 228 | 		nextAppointment: patient.nextAppointment,
 229 | 		status: patient.status,
 230 | 		medicalHistory: patient.medicalHistory,
 231 | 		image: patient.image
 232 | 	};
 233 | });
 234 | 
 235 | // Get patients by age group (for pediatric focus)
 236 | export const getPatientsByAgeGroupToolDef = toolDefinition({
 237 | 	name: "getPatientsByAgeGroup",
 238 | 	description: "Get patients filtered by age group. Useful for pediatric clinics to focus on children.",
 239 | 	inputSchema: z.object({
 240 | 		ageGroup: z.enum(["child", "adult", "senior"]).describe("Age group: child (0-12), adult (18-59), senior (60+)")
 241 | 	}),
 242 | 	outputSchema: z.array(
 243 | 		z.object({
 244 | 			id: z.number(),
 245 | 			name: z.string(),
 246 | 			age: z.number(),
 247 | 			lastVisit: z.string().nullable()
 248 | 		})
 249 | 	)
 250 | });
 251 | 
 252 | export const getPatientsByAgeGroup = getPatientsByAgeGroupToolDef.server(({ ageGroup }) => {
 253 | 	let filteredPatients = [];
 254 | 	if (ageGroup === "child") {
 255 | 		filteredPatients = patients.filter(p => p.age <= 12);
 256 | 	} else if (ageGroup === "adult") {
 257 | 		filteredPatients = patients.filter(p => p.age >= 18 && p.age <= 59);
 258 | 	} else {
 259 | 		filteredPatients = patients.filter(p => p.age >= 60);
 260 | 	}
 261 | 	return filteredPatients.map(p => ({
 262 | 		id: p.id,
 263 | 		name: p.name,
 264 | 		age: p.age,
 265 | 		lastVisit: p.lastVisit
 266 | 	}));
 267 | });
 268 | 
 269 | // ============================================
 270 | // APPOINTMENT TOOLS
 271 | // ============================================
 272 | 
 273 | // Get all appointments
 274 | export const getAppointmentsToolDef = toolDefinition({
 275 | 	name: "getAppointments",
 276 | 	description: "Get all upcoming and past appointments from the clinic.",
 277 | 	inputSchema: z.object({}),
 278 | 	outputSchema: z.array(
 279 | 		z.object({
 280 | 			id: z.number(),
 281 | 			patientId: z.number(),
 282 | 			patientName: z.string(),
 283 | 			date: z.string(),
 284 | 			time: z.string(),
 285 | 			type: z.string(),
 286 | 			status: z.string(),
 287 | 			notes: z.string()
 288 | 		})
 289 | 	)
 290 | });
 291 | 
 292 | export const getAppointments = getAppointmentsToolDef.server(() => {
 293 | 	return appointments.map(apt => {
 294 | 		const patient = patients.find(p => p.id === apt.patientId);
 295 | 		return {
 296 | 			id: apt.id,
 297 | 			patientId: apt.patientId,
 298 | 			patientName: patient?.name || "Unknown",
 299 | 			date: apt.date,
 300 | 			time: apt.time,
 301 | 			type: apt.type,
 302 | 			status: apt.status,
 303 | 			notes: apt.notes
 304 | 		};
 305 | 	});
 306 | });
 307 | 
 308 | // Get appointments by patient
 309 | export const getAppointmentsByPatientToolDef = toolDefinition({
 310 | 	name: "getAppointmentsByPatient",
 311 | 	description: "Get all appointments for a specific patient.",
 312 | 	inputSchema: z.object({
 313 | 		patientId: z.number().describe("The ID of the patient")
 314 | 	}),
 315 | 	outputSchema: z.array(
 316 | 		z.object({
 317 | 			id: z.number(),
 318 | 			date: z.string(),
 319 | 			time: z.string(),
 320 | 			type: z.string(),
 321 | 			status: z.string(),
 322 | 			notes: z.string()
 323 | 		})
 324 | 	)
 325 | });
 326 | 
 327 | export const getAppointmentsByPatient = getAppointmentsByPatientToolDef.server(({ patientId }) => {
 328 | 	const patientAppointments = appointments.filter(apt => apt.patientId === patientId);
 329 | 	return patientAppointments.map(apt => ({
 330 | 		id: apt.id,
 331 | 		date: apt.date,
 332 | 		time: apt.time,
 333 | 		type: apt.type,
 334 | 		status: apt.status,
 335 | 		notes: apt.notes
 336 | 	}));
 337 | });
 338 | 
 339 | // ============================================
 340 | // VACCINATION TOOLS
 341 | // ============================================

 343 | // Get all vaccines
 344 | export const getVaccinesToolDef = toolDefinition({
 345 | 	name: "getVaccines",
 346 | 	description:
 347 | 		"Get the complete vaccination schedule for Egyptian children. Returns all vaccines with doses and recommended ages.",
 348 | 	inputSchema: z.object({}),
 349 | 	outputSchema: z.array(
 350 | 		z.object({
 351 | 			id: z.number(),
 352 | 			name: z.string(),
 353 | 			disease: z.string(),
 354 | 			doses: z.number(),
 355 | 			recommendedAge: z.string()
 356 | 		})
 357 | 	)
 358 | });
 359 | 
 360 | export const getVaccines = getVaccinesToolDef.server(() => {
 361 | 	return vaccinations;
 362 | });
 363 | 
 364 | // Get vaccine by name
 365 | export const getVaccineByNameToolDef = toolDefinition({
 366 | 	name: "getVaccineByName",
 367 | 	description: "Get detailed information about a specific vaccine.",
 368 | 	inputSchema: z.object({
 369 | 		name: z.string().describe('The name of the vaccine (e.g., "MMR", "BCG", "Hexavalent")')
 370 | 	}),
 371 | 	outputSchema: z.object({
 372 | 		id: z.number(),
 373 | 		name: z.string(),
 374 | 		disease: z.string(),
 375 | 		doses: z.number(),
 376 | 		recommendedAge: z.string()
 377 | 	})
 378 | });
 379 | 
 380 | export const getVaccineByName = getVaccineByNameToolDef.server(({ name }) => {
 381 | 	const vaccine = vaccinations.find(v => v.name.toLowerCase() === name.toLowerCase());
 382 | 	if (!vaccine) {
 383 | 		return {
 384 | 			id: 0,
 385 | 			name: "Vaccine not found",
 386 | 			disease: "",
 387 | 			doses: 0,
 388 | 			recommendedAge: ""
 389 | 		};
 390 | 	}
 391 | 	return vaccine;
 392 | });
 393 | 
 394 | // Get vaccination schedule by child's age
 395 | export const getVaccinationScheduleByAgeToolDef = toolDefinition({
 396 | 	name: "getVaccinationScheduleByAge",
 397 | 	description: "Get which vaccines a child needs based on their current age in months.",

 404 | 			disease: z.string(),
 405 | 			dueNow: z.boolean(),
 406 | 			recommendedAge: z.string()
 407 | 		})
 408 | 	)
 409 | });

 481 | 	}));

 483 | 
 484 | // ============================================
 485 | // SEARCH TOOLS
 486 | // ============================================
 487 | 
 488 | // Search patients
 489 | export const searchPatientsToolDef = toolDefinition({
 490 | 	name: "searchPatients",
 491 | 	description: "Search for patients by name, phone number, or medical condition.",
 492 | 	inputSchema: z.object({
 493 | 		query: z.string().describe("Search query (name, phone, or condition)")
 494 | 	}),
 495 | 	outputSchema: z.array(
 496 | 		z.object({
 497 | 			id: z.number(),
 498 | 			name: z.string(),
 499 | 			age: z.number(),
 500 | 			phone: z.string(),
 501 | 			medicalHistory: z.array(z.string())
 502 | 		})
 503 | 	)
 504 | });
 505 | 
 506 | export const searchPatients = searchPatientsToolDef.server(({ query }) => {
 507 | 	const queryLower = query.toLowerCase();
 508 | 	const results = patients.filter(
 509 | 		patient =>
 510 | 			patient.name.toLowerCase().includes(queryLower) ||
 511 | 			patient.phone.includes(query) ||
 512 | 			patient.medicalHistory.some(condition => condition.toLowerCase().includes(queryLower))
 513 | 	);
 514 | 	return results.map(p => ({
 515 | 		id: p.id,
 516 | 		name: p.name,
 517 | 		age: p.age,
 518 | 		phone: p.phone,
 519 | 		medicalHistory: p.medicalHistory
 520 | 	}));
 521 | });
 522 | 
 523 | // ============================================
 524 | // CLINIC STATISTICS TOOLS
 525 | // ============================================
 526 | 
 527 | // Get clinic statistics
 528 | export const getClinicStatsToolDef = toolDefinition({
 529 | 	name: "getClinicStats",
 530 | 	description:
 531 | 		"Get clinic statistics including total patients, active patients, upcoming appointments, and age distribution.",
 532 | 	inputSchema: z.object({}),
 533 | 	outputSchema: z.object({
 534 | 		totalPatients: z.number(),
 535 | 		activePatients: z.number(),
 536 | 		upcomingAppointments: z.number(),
 537 | 		childrenUnder12: z.number(),
 538 | 		adults: z.number(),
 539 | 		seniors: z.number()
 540 | 	})
 541 | });
 542 | 
 543 | export const getClinicStats = getClinicStatsToolDef.server(() => {
 544 | 	const upcomingCount = appointments.filter(apt => apt.status === "scheduled").length;
 545 | 	const childrenUnder12 = patients.filter(p => p.age <= 12).length;
 546 | 	const adults = patients.filter(p => p.age >= 18 && p.age <= 59).length;
 547 | 	const seniors = patients.filter(p => p.age >= 60).length;
 548 | 
 549 | 	return {
 550 | 		totalPatients: patients.length,
 551 | 		activePatients: patients.filter(p => p.status === "active").length,
 552 | 		upcomingAppointments: upcomingCount,
 553 | 		childrenUnder12,
 554 | 		adults,
 555 | 		seniors
 556 | 	};
 557 | });

```

`lib/clinic.store.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // stores/index.ts
   2 | 
   3 | import type {
   4 | 	DbAppointment as AppointmentType,
   5 | 	DbClinic as ClinicType,
   6 | 	DbDevelopmentalMilestones as DevelopmentalMilestoneType,
   7 | 	DbDoctor as DoctorType,
   8 | 	DbGrowthRecord as GrowthRecordType,
   9 | 	DbImmunization as ImmunizationType,
  10 | 	DbLabTest as LabTestType,
  11 | 	DbNotification as NotificationType,
  12 | 	DbPatient as PatientType,
  13 | 	DbPayment as PaymentType,
  14 | 	DbPrescription as PrescriptionType,
  15 | 	DbService as ServiceType,
  16 | 	DbStaff as StaffType,
  17 | 	DbUser as UserType,
  18 | 	DbVaccineSchedule as VaccineScheduleType,
  19 | 	DbVitalSign as VitalSignsType
  20 | } from "@clinic/db/schema";
  21 | import type { FeedingLog } from "@clinic/db/zod/clinic.schema";
  22 | import { Store } from "@tanstack/store";
  23 | 
  24 | // ============================================================================
  25 | // Auth Store
  26 | // ============================================================================
  27 | 
  28 | interface AuthState {
  29 | 	user: UserType | null;
  30 | 	isLoading: boolean;
  31 | 	error: string | null;
  32 | 	isAuthenticated: boolean;
  33 | 	sessionToken: string | null;
  34 | }
  35 | 
  36 | export const authStore = new Store<AuthState>({
  37 | 	user: null,
  38 | 	isLoading: false,
  39 | 	error: null,
  40 | 	isAuthenticated: false,
  41 | 	sessionToken: null
  42 | });
  43 | 
  44 | export const authActions = {
  45 | 	setUser: (user: UserType | null) => {
  46 | 		authStore.setState(prev => ({
  47 | 			...prev,
  48 | 			user,
  49 | 			isAuthenticated: !!user
  50 | 		}));
  51 | 	},
  52 | 	setLoading: (isLoading: boolean) => {
  53 | 		authStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, isLoading }));
  54 | 	},
  55 | 	setError: (error: string | null) => {
  56 | 		authStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, error }));
  57 | 	},
  58 | 	logout: () => {
  59 | 		authStore.setState(() => ({
  60 | 			user: null,
  61 | 			isLoading: false,
  62 | 			error: null,
  63 | 			isAuthenticated: false,
  64 | 			sessionToken: null
  65 | 		}));
  66 | 	}
  67 | };
  68 | 
  69 | // ============================================================================
  70 | // Clinic Store
  71 | // ============================================================================
  72 | 
  73 | interface ClinicState {
  74 | 	currentClinic: ClinicType | null;
  75 | 	clinics: ClinicType[];
  76 | 	isLoading: boolean;
  77 | 	error: string | null;
  78 | }
  79 | 
  80 | export const clinicStore = new Store<ClinicState>({
  81 | 	currentClinic: null,
  82 | 	clinics: [],
  83 | 	isLoading: false,
  84 | 	error: null
  85 | });
  86 | 
  87 | export const clinicActions = {
  88 | 	setCurrentClinic: (clinic: ClinicType | null) => {
  89 | 		clinicStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, currentClinic: clinic }));
  90 | 	},
  91 | 	setClinics: (clinics: ClinicType[]) => {
  92 | 		clinicStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, clinics }));
  93 | 	},
  94 | 	addClinic: (clinic: ClinicType) => {
  95 | 		clinicStore.setState(state => ({
  96 | 			...state,
  97 | 			clinics: [...state.clinics, clinic]
  98 | 		}));
  99 | 	},
 100 | 	updateClinic: (id: string, updates: Partial<ClinicType>) => {
 101 | 		clinicStore.setState(state => ({
 102 | 			...state,
 103 | 			clinics: state.clinics.map(c => (c.id === id ? { ...c, ...updates } : c)),
 104 | 			currentClinic: state.currentClinic?.id === id ? { ...state.currentClinic, ...updates } : state.currentClinic
 105 | 		}));
 106 | 	},
 107 | 	setLoading: (isLoading: boolean) => {
 108 | 		clinicStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, isLoading }));
 109 | 	}
 110 | };
 111 | 
 112 | // ============================================================================
 113 | // Patient Store
 114 | // ============================================================================
 115 | 
 116 | interface PatientState {
 117 | 	patients: PatientType[];
 118 | 	currentPatient: PatientType | null;
 119 | 	isLoading: boolean;
 120 | 	error: string | null;
 121 | 	totalCount: number;
 122 | 	filters: {
 123 | 		search: string;
 124 | 		status: string | null;
 125 | 		dateRange: { start: Date | null; end: Date | null } | null;
 126 | 	};
 127 | }
 128 | 
 129 | export const patientStore = new Store<PatientState>({
 130 | 	patients: [],
 131 | 	currentPatient: null,
 132 | 	isLoading: false,
 133 | 	error: null,
 134 | 	totalCount: 0,
 135 | 	filters: {
 136 | 		search: "",
 137 | 		status: null,
 138 | 		dateRange: null
 139 | 	}
 140 | });
 141 | 
 142 | export const patientActions = {
 143 | 	setPatients: (patients: PatientType[], totalCount?: number) => {
 144 | 		patientStore.setState(state => ({
 145 | 			...state,
 146 | 			patients,
 147 | 			totalCount: totalCount ?? state.totalCount
 148 | 		}));
 149 | 	},
 150 | 	setCurrentPatient: (patient: PatientType | null) => {
 151 | 		patientStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, currentPatient: patient }));
 152 | 	},
 153 | 	addPatient: (patient: PatientType) => {
 154 | 		patientStore.setState(state => ({
 155 | 			...state,
 156 | 			patients: [patient, ...state.patients],
 157 | 			totalCount: state.totalCount + 1
 158 | 		}));
 159 | 	},
 160 | 	updatePatient: (id: string, updates: Partial<PatientType>) => {
 161 | 		patientStore.setState(state => ({
 162 | 			...state,
 163 | 			patients: state.patients.map(p => (p.id === id ? { ...p, ...updates } : p)),
 164 | 			currentPatient:
 165 | 				state.currentPatient?.id === id ? { ...state.currentPatient, ...updates } : state.currentPatient
 166 | 		}));
 167 | 	},
 168 | 	deletePatient: (id: string) => {
 169 | 		patientStore.setState(state => ({
 170 | 			...state,
 171 | 			patients: state.patients.filter(p => p.id !== id),
 172 | 			totalCount: state.totalCount - 1,
 173 | 			currentPatient: state.currentPatient?.id === id ? null : state.currentPatient
 174 | 		}));
 175 | 	},
 176 | 	setFilters: (filters: Partial<PatientState["filters"]>) => {
 177 | 		patientStore.setState(state => ({
 178 | 			...state,
 179 | 			filters: { ...state.filters, ...filters }
 180 | 		}));
 181 | 	},
 182 | 	setLoading: (isLoading: boolean) => {
 183 | 		patientStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, isLoading }));
 184 | 	}
 185 | };
 186 | 
 187 | // ============================================================================
 188 | // Appointment Store
 189 | // ============================================================================
 190 | 
 191 | interface AppointmentState {
 192 | 	appointments: AppointmentType[];
 193 | 	currentAppointment: AppointmentType | null;
 194 | 	isLoading: boolean;
 195 | 	error: string | null;
 196 | 	selectedDate: Date | null;
 197 | 	viewMode: "day" | "week" | "month";
 198 | }
 199 | 
 200 | export const appointmentStore = new Store<AppointmentState>({
 201 | 	appointments: [],
 202 | 	currentAppointment: null,
 203 | 	isLoading: false,
 204 | 	error: null,
 205 | 	selectedDate: new Date(),
 206 | 	viewMode: "day"
 207 | });
 208 | 
 209 | export const appointmentActions = {
 210 | 	setAppointments: (appointments: AppointmentType[]) => {
 211 | 		appointmentStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, appointments }));
 212 | 	},
 213 | 	setCurrentAppointment: (appointment: AppointmentType | null) => {
 214 | 		appointmentStore.setState(state => ({
 215 | 			...state,
 216 | 			currentAppointment: appointment
 217 | 		}));
 218 | 	},
 219 | 	addAppointment: (appointment: AppointmentType) => {
 220 | 		appointmentStore.setState(state => ({
 221 | 			...state,
 222 | 			appointments: [...state.appointments, appointment]
 223 | 		}));
 224 | 	},
 225 | 	updateAppointment: (id: string, updates: Partial<AppointmentType>) => {
 226 | 		appointmentStore.setState(state => ({
 227 | 			...state,
 228 | 			appointments: state.appointments.map(a => (a.id === id ? { ...a, ...updates } : a)),
 229 | 			currentAppointment:
 230 | 				state.currentAppointment?.id === id
 231 | 					? { ...state.currentAppointment, ...updates }
 232 | 					: state.currentAppointment
 233 | 		}));
 234 | 	},
 235 | 	deleteAppointment: (id: string) => {
 236 | 		appointmentStore.setState(state => ({
 237 | 			...state,
 238 | 			appointments: state.appointments.filter(a => a.id !== id),
 239 | 			currentAppointment: state.currentAppointment?.id === id ? null : state.currentAppointment
 240 | 		}));
 241 | 	},
 242 | 	setSelectedDate: (date: Date | null) => {
 243 | 		appointmentStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, selectedDate: date }));
 244 | 	},
 245 | 	setViewMode: (viewMode: "day" | "week" | "month") => {
 246 | 		appointmentStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, viewMode }));
 247 | 	},
 248 | 	setLoading: (isLoading: boolean) => {
 249 | 		appointmentStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, isLoading }));
 250 | 	}
 251 | };

 324 | 		staffStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, currentStaff: staff }));
 325 | 	},
 326 | 	addStaff: (staff: StaffType) => {
 327 | 		staffStore.setState(state => ({
 328 | 			...state,
 329 | 			staff: [...state.staff, staff]
 330 | 		}));
 331 | 	},
 332 | 	updateStaff: (id: string, updates: Partial<StaffType>) => {
 333 | 		staffStore.setState(state => ({
 334 | 			...state,
 335 | 			staff: state.staff.map(s => (s.id === id ? { ...s, ...updates } : s)),
 336 | 			currentStaff: state.currentStaff?.id === id ? { ...state.currentStaff, ...updates } : state.currentStaff
 337 | 		}));
 338 | 	},
 339 | 	deleteStaff: (id: string) => {
 340 | 		staffStore.setState(state => ({
 341 | 			...state,
 342 | 			staff: state.staff.filter(s => s.id !== id),
 343 | 			currentStaff: state.currentStaff?.id === id ? null : state.currentStaff
 344 | 		}));
 345 | 	},
 346 | 	setLoading: (isLoading: boolean) => {
 347 | 		staffStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, isLoading }));
 348 | 	}
 349 | };
 350 | 
 351 | // ============================================================================
 352 | // Notification Store
 353 | // ============================================================================
 354 | 
 355 | interface NotificationState {
 356 | 	notifications: NotificationType[];
 357 | 	unreadCount: number;
 358 | 	isLoading: boolean;
 359 | 	error: string | null;
 360 | }
 361 | 
 362 | export const notificationStore = new Store<NotificationState>({
 363 | 	notifications: [],
 364 | 	unreadCount: 0,
 365 | 	isLoading: false,
 366 | 	error: null
 367 | });
 368 | 
 369 | export const notificationActions = {
 370 | 	setNotifications: (notifications: NotificationType[]) => {
 371 | 		const unreadCount = notifications.filter(n => n.status === "unread").length;
 372 | 		notificationStore.setState(state => ({
 373 | 			...state,
 374 | 			notifications,
 375 | 			unreadCount
 376 | 		}));
 377 | 	},
 378 | 	addNotification: (notification: NotificationType) => {
 379 | 		notificationStore.setState(state => ({
 380 | 			...state,
 381 | 			notifications: [notification, ...state.notifications],
 382 | 			unreadCount: notification.status === "unread" ? state.unreadCount + 1 : state.unreadCount
 383 | 		}));
 384 | 	},
 385 | 	markAsRead: (id: string) => {
 386 | 		notificationStore.setState(state => {
 387 | 			const updated = state.notifications.map(n =>
 388 | 				n.id === id && n.status === "unread" ? { ...n, status: "read" as const } : n
 389 | 			);
 390 | 			const newUnreadCount = updated.filter(n => n.status === "unread").length;
 391 | 			return { ...state, notifications: updated, unreadCount: newUnreadCount };
 392 | 		});
 393 | 	},
 394 | 	markAllAsRead: () => {
 395 | 		notificationStore.setState(state => ({
 396 | 			...state,
 397 | 			notifications: state.notifications.map(n => ({
 398 | 				...n,
 399 | 				status: "read" as const
 400 | 			})),
 401 | 			unreadCount: 0
 402 | 		}));
 403 | 	},
 404 | 	setLoading: (isLoading: boolean) => {
 405 | 		notificationStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, isLoading }));
 406 | 	}
 407 | };
 408 | 
 409 | // ============================================================================
 410 | // Pediatric Store - Growth Records
 411 | // ============================================================================
 412 | 
 413 | interface GrowthRecordState {
 414 | 	records: GrowthRecordType[];
 415 | 	currentRecord: GrowthRecordType | null;
 416 | 	isLoading: boolean;
 417 | 	error: string | null;
 418 | 	chartData: { date: Date; weight: number; height: number; bmi: number }[];
 419 | }
 420 | 
 421 | export const growthRecordStore = new Store<GrowthRecordState>({
 422 | 	records: [],
 423 | 	currentRecord: null,
 424 | 	isLoading: false,
 425 | 	error: null,
 426 | 	chartData: []
 427 | });
 428 | 
 429 | export const growthRecordActions = {
 430 | 	setRecords: (records: GrowthRecordType[]) => {
 431 | 		const chartData = records.map(r => ({
 432 | 			date: r.date,
 433 | 			weight: r.weight ?? 0,
 434 | 			height: r.height ?? 0,
 435 | 			bmi: r.bmi ?? 0
 436 | 		}));
 437 | 		growthRecordStore.setState(state => ({
 438 | 			...state,
 439 | 			records,
 440 | 			chartData
 441 | 		}));
 442 | 	},
 443 | 	addRecord: (record: GrowthRecordType) => {
 444 | 		growthRecordStore.setState(state => ({
 445 | 			...state,
 446 | 			records: [...state.records, record],
 447 | 			chartData: [
 448 | 				...state.chartData,
 449 | 				{
 450 | 					date: record.date,
 451 | 					weight: record.weight ?? 0,
 452 | 					height: record.height ?? 0,
 453 | 					bmi: record.bmi ?? 0
 454 | 				}
 455 | 			]
 456 | 		}));
 457 | 	},
 458 | 	setCurrentRecord: (record: GrowthRecordType | null) => {
 459 | 		growthRecordStore.setState(state => ({
 460 | 			...state,
 461 | 			currentRecord: record
 462 | 		}));
 463 | 	},
 464 | 	setLoading: (isLoading: boolean) => {
 465 | 		growthRecordStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, isLoading }));
 466 | 	}
 467 | };

 469 | // ============================================================================
 470 | // Pediatric Store - Immunizations
 471 | // ============================================================================
 472 | 
 473 | interface ImmunizationState {
 474 | 	immunizations: ImmunizationType[];
 475 | 	upcomingVaccines: ImmunizationType[];
 476 | 	isLoading: boolean;
 477 | 	error: string | null;
 478 | }
 479 | 
 480 | export const immunizationStore = new Store<ImmunizationState>({
 481 | 	immunizations: [],
 482 | 	upcomingVaccines: [],
 483 | 	isLoading: false,
 484 | 	error: null
 485 | });
 486 | 
 487 | export const immunizationActions = {
 488 | 	setImmunizations: (immunizations: ImmunizationType[]) => {
 489 | 		const upcoming = immunizations.filter(i => i.status === "PENDING" || i.isOverDue);
 490 | 		immunizationStore.setState(state => ({
 491 | 			...state,
 492 | 			immunizations,
 493 | 			upcomingVaccines: upcoming
 494 | 		}));
 495 | 	},
 496 | 	addImmunization: (immunization: ImmunizationType) => {
 497 | 		immunizationStore.setState(state => ({
 498 | 			...state,
 499 | 			immunizations: [...state.immunizations, immunization],
 500 | 			upcomingVaccines:
 501 | 				immunization.status === "PENDING" || immunization.isOverDue
 502 | 					? [...state.upcomingVaccines, immunization]
 503 | 					: state.upcomingVaccines
 504 | 		}));
 505 | 	},
 506 | 	updateImmunization: (id: string, updates: Partial<ImmunizationType>) => {
 507 | 		immunizationStore.setState(state => ({
 508 | 			...state,
 509 | 			immunizations: state.immunizations.map(i => (i.id === id ? { ...i, ...updates } : i)),
 510 | 			upcomingVaccines: state.upcomingVaccines.filter(i => i.id !== id)
 511 | 		}));
 512 | 	},
 513 | 	setLoading: (isLoading: boolean) => {
 514 | 		immunizationStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, isLoading }));
 515 | 	}
 516 | };

 518 | // ============================================================================
 519 | // Pediatric Store - Feeding Logs
 520 | // ============================================================================
 521 | 
 522 | interface FeedingLogState {
 523 | 	logs: FeedingLog[];
 524 | 	currentLog: FeedingLog | null;
 525 | 	isLoading: boolean;
 526 | 	error: string | null;
 527 | 	stats: {
 528 | 		totalFeedings: number;
 529 | 		byType: Record<string, number>;
 530 | 		averageDuration: number;
 531 | 		totalAmount: number;
 532 | 	} | null;
 533 | }
 534 | 
 535 | export const feedingLogStore = new Store<FeedingLogState>({
 536 | 	logs: [],
 537 | 	currentLog: null,
 538 | 	isLoading: false,
 539 | 	error: null,
 540 | 	stats: null
 541 | });
 542 | 
 543 | export const feedingLogActions = {
 544 | 	setLogs: (logs: FeedingLog[]) => {
 545 | 		const byType: Record<string, number> = {};
 546 | 		let totalDuration = 0;
 547 | 		let totalAmount = 0;
 548 | 
 549 | 		logs.forEach(log => {
 550 | 			byType[log.type] = (byType[log.type] || 0) + 1;
 551 | 			totalDuration += log.duration ?? 0;
 552 | 			totalAmount += log.amount ?? 0;
 553 | 		});
 554 | 
 555 | 		const stats = {
 556 | 			totalFeedings: logs.length,
 557 | 			byType,
 558 | 			averageDuration: logs.length ? totalDuration / logs.length : 0,
 559 | 			totalAmount
 560 | 		};
 561 | 
 562 | 		feedingLogStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, logs, stats }));
 563 | 	},
 564 | 	addLog: (log: FeedingLog) => {
 565 | 		feedingLogStore.setState(state => ({
 566 | 			...state,
 567 | 			logs: [...state.logs, log]
 568 | 		}));
 569 | 		feedingLogActions.setLogs([...feedingLogStore.state.logs, log]);
 570 | 	},
 571 | 	setCurrentLog: (log: FeedingLog | null) => {
 572 | 		feedingLogStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, currentLog: log }));
 573 | 	},
 574 | 	setLoading: (isLoading: boolean) => {
 575 | 		feedingLogStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, isLoading }));
 576 | 	}
 577 | };
 578 | 
 579 | // ============================================================================
 580 | // Pediatric Store - Developmental Milestones
 581 | // ============================================================================
 582 | 
 583 | interface MilestonesState {
 584 | 	milestones: DevelopmentalMilestoneType[];
 585 | 	isLoading: boolean;
 586 | 	error: string | null;
 587 | 	byAgeGroup: Record<string, DevelopmentalMilestoneType[]>;
 588 | }
 589 | 
 590 | export const milestonesStore = new Store<MilestonesState>({
 591 | 	milestones: [],
 592 | 	isLoading: false,
 593 | 	error: null,
 594 | 	byAgeGroup: {}
 595 | });
 596 | 
 597 | export const milestoneActions = {
 598 | 	setMilestones: (milestones: DevelopmentalMilestoneType[]) => {
 599 | 		const byAgeGroup: Record<string, DevelopmentalMilestoneType[]> = {};
 600 | 		milestones.forEach(m => {
 601 | 			const age = m.ageAchieved;
 602 | 			if (!byAgeGroup[age]) byAgeGroup[age] = [];
 603 | 			byAgeGroup[age].push(m);
 604 | 		});
 605 | 		milestonesStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, milestones, byAgeGroup }));
 606 | 	},
 607 | 	addMilestone: (milestone: DevelopmentalMilestoneType) => {
 608 | 		milestonesStore.setState(state => ({
 609 | 			...state,
 610 | 			milestones: [...state.milestones, milestone]
 611 | 		}));
 612 | 		milestoneActions.setMilestones([...milestonesStore.state.milestones, milestone]);
 613 | 	},
 614 | 	setLoading: (isLoading: boolean) => {
 615 | 		milestonesStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, isLoading }));
 616 | 	}
 617 | };

 652 | // Prescription Store
 653 | // ============================================================================
 654 | 
 655 | interface PrescriptionState {
 656 | 	prescriptions: PrescriptionType[];
 657 | 	currentPrescription: PrescriptionType | null;
 658 | 	isLoading: boolean;
 659 | 	error: string | null;
 660 | 	activePrescriptions: PrescriptionType[];
 661 | }
 662 | 
 663 | export const prescriptionStore = new Store<PrescriptionState>({
 664 | 	prescriptions: [],
 665 | 	currentPrescription: null,
 666 | 	isLoading: false,
 667 | 	error: null,
 668 | 	activePrescriptions: []
 669 | });
 670 | 
 671 | export const prescriptionActions = {
 672 | 	setPrescriptions: (prescriptions: PrescriptionType[]) => {
 673 | 		const active = prescriptions.filter(p => p.status === "active" || p.status === "on_hold");
 674 | 		prescriptionStore.setState(state => ({
 675 | 			...state,
 676 | 			prescriptions,
 677 | 			activePrescriptions: active
 678 | 		}));
 679 | 	},
 680 | 	setCurrentPrescription: (prescription: PrescriptionType | null) => {
 681 | 		prescriptionStore.setState(state => ({
 682 | 			...state,
 683 | 			currentPrescription: prescription
 684 | 		}));
 685 | 	},
 686 | 	addPrescription: (prescription: PrescriptionType) => {
 687 | 		prescriptionStore.setState(state => ({
 688 | 			...state,
 689 | 			prescriptions: [...state.prescriptions, prescription],
 690 | 			activePrescriptions:
 691 | 				prescription.status === "active" || prescription.status === "on_hold"
 692 | 					? [...state.activePrescriptions, prescription]
 693 | 					: state.activePrescriptions
 694 | 		}));
 695 | 	},
 696 | 	updatePrescription: (id: string, updates: Partial<PrescriptionType>) => {
 697 | 		prescriptionStore.setState(state => ({
 698 | 			...state,
 699 | 			prescriptions: state.prescriptions.map(p => (p.id === id ? { ...p, ...updates } : p)),
 700 | 			activePrescriptions: state.activePrescriptions.filter(p => p.id !== id),
 701 | 			currentPrescription:
 702 | 				state.currentPrescription?.id === id
 703 | 					? { ...state.currentPrescription, ...updates }
 704 | 					: state.currentPrescription
 705 | 		}));
 706 | 	},
 707 | 	setLoading: (isLoading: boolean) => {
 708 | 		prescriptionStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, isLoading }));
 709 | 	}
 710 | };

 712 | // ============================================================================
 713 | // Vital Signs Store
 714 | // ============================================================================
 715 | 
 716 | interface VitalSignsState {
 717 | 	vitals: VitalSignsType[];
 718 | 	currentVitals: VitalSignsType | null;
 719 | 	isLoading: boolean;
 720 | 	error: string | null;
 721 | 	trends: {
 722 | 		systolic: number[];
 723 | 		diastolic: number[];
 724 | 		heartRate: number[];
 725 | 		recordedAt: Date[];
 726 | 	} | null;
 727 | }
 728 | 
 729 | export const vitalSignsStore = new Store<VitalSignsState>({
 730 | 	vitals: [],
 731 | 	currentVitals: null,
 732 | 	isLoading: false,
 733 | 	error: null,
 734 | 	trends: null
 735 | });
 736 | 
 737 | export const vitalSignsActions = {
 738 | 	setVitals: (vitals: VitalSignsType[]) => {
 739 | 		const sorted = [...vitals].sort((a, b) => new Date(a.recordedAt).getTime() - new Date(b.recordedAt).getTime());
 740 | 		const trends = {
 741 | 			systolic: sorted.map(v => v.systolic ?? 0),
 742 | 			diastolic: sorted.map(v => v.diastolic ?? 0),
 743 | 			heartRate: sorted.map(v => v.heartRate ?? 0),
 744 | 			recordedAt: sorted.map(v => v.recordedAt)
 745 | 		};
 746 | 		vitalSignsStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, vitals: sorted, trends }));
 747 | 	},
 748 | 	addVitals: (vitals: VitalSignsType) => {
 749 | 		vitalSignsStore.setState(state => ({
 750 | 			...state,
 751 | 			vitals: [...state.vitals, vitals]
 752 | 		}));
 753 | 		vitalSignsActions.setVitals([...vitalSignsStore.state.vitals, vitals]);
 754 | 	},
 755 | 	setCurrentVitals: (vitals: VitalSignsType | null) => {
 756 | 		vitalSignsStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, currentVitals: vitals }));
 757 | 	},
 758 | 	setLoading: (isLoading: boolean) => {
 759 | 		vitalSignsStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, isLoading }));
 760 | 	}
 761 | };

 765 | // ============================================================================

 767 | interface ServiceState {
 768 | 	services: ServiceType[];
 769 | 	isLoading: boolean;
 770 | 	error: string | null;
 771 | 	categories: string[];
 772 | }
 773 | 
 774 | export const serviceStore = new Store<ServiceState>({
 775 | 	services: [],
 776 | 	isLoading: false,
 777 | 	error: null,
 778 | 	categories: []
 779 | });
 780 | 
 781 | export const serviceActions = {
 782 | 	setServices: (services: ServiceType[]) => {
 783 | 		const categories = [...new Set(services.map(s => s.category).filter(Boolean))] as string[];
 784 | 		serviceStore.setState(state => ({
 785 | 			...state,
 786 | 			services,
 787 | 			categories
 788 | 		}));
 789 | 	},
 790 | 	addService: (service: ServiceType) => {
 791 | 		serviceStore.setState(state => ({
 792 | 			...state,
 793 | 			services: [...state.services, service]
 794 | 		}));
 795 | 		serviceActions.setServices([...serviceStore.state.services, service]);
 796 | 	},
 797 | 	updateService: (id: string, updates: Partial<ServiceType>) => {
 798 | 		serviceStore.setState(state => ({
 799 | 			...state,
 800 | 			services: state.services.map(s => (s.id === id ? { ...s, ...updates } : s))
 801 | 		}));
 802 | 	},
 803 | 	deleteService: (id: string) => {
 804 | 		serviceStore.setState(state => ({
 805 | 			...state,
 806 | 			services: state.services.filter(s => s.id !== id)
 807 | 		}));
 808 | 	},
 809 | 	setLoading: (isLoading: boolean) => {
 810 | 		serviceStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, isLoading }));
 811 | 	}
 812 | };

 814 | // ============================================================================
 815 | // Payment Store
 816 | // ============================================================================
 817 | 
 818 | interface PaymentState {
 819 | 	payments: PaymentType[];
 820 | 	currentPayment: PaymentType | null;
 821 | 	isLoading: boolean;
 822 | 	error: string | null;
 823 | 	totalRevenue: number;
 824 | 	pendingAmount: number;
 825 | }
 826 | 
 827 | export const paymentStore = new Store<PaymentState>({
 828 | 	payments: [],
 829 | 	currentPayment: null,
 830 | 	isLoading: false,
 831 | 	error: null,
 832 | 	totalRevenue: 0,
 833 | 	pendingAmount: 0
 834 | });
 835 | 
 836 | export const paymentActions = {
 837 | 	setPayments: (payments: PaymentType[]) => {
 838 | 		const totalRevenue = payments
 839 | 			.filter(p => p.status === "PAID")
 840 | 			.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.amountPaid ?? p.amount ?? 0), 0);
 841 | 		const pendingAmount = payments
 842 | 			.filter(p => p.status === "UNPAID" || p.status === "PARTIAL")
 843 | 			.reduce((sum, p) => sum + ((p.totalAmount ?? p.amount ?? 0) - (p.amountPaid ?? 0)), 0);
 844 | 		paymentStore.setState(state => ({
 845 | 			...state,
 846 | 			payments,
 847 | 			totalRevenue,
 848 | 			pendingAmount
 849 | 		}));
 850 | 	},
 851 | 	addPayment: (payment: PaymentType) => {
 852 | 		paymentStore.setState(state => ({
 853 | 			...state,
 854 | 			payments: [...state.payments, payment]
 855 | 		}));
 856 | 		paymentActions.setPayments([...paymentStore.state.payments, payment]);
 857 | 	},
 858 | 	setCurrentPayment: (payment: PaymentType | null) => {
 859 | 		paymentStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, currentPayment: payment }));
 860 | 	},
 861 | 	setLoading: (isLoading: boolean) => {
 862 | 		paymentStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, isLoading }));
 863 | 	}
 864 | };
 865 |

 889 | 		labTestStore.setState(state => ({

 893 | 		}));

 901 | 					? [...state.pendingTests, labTest]

 903 | 		}));

 910 | 		}));

 913 | 		labTestStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, currentLabTest: labTest }));

 920 | // ============================================================================
 921 | // UI Store (for global UI state)
 922 | // ============================================================================
 923 | 
 924 | interface UIState {
 925 | 	sidebarOpen: boolean;
 926 | 	theme: "light" | "dark" | "system";
 927 | 	notificationsEnabled: boolean;
 928 | 	currentModule: "dashboard" | "patients" | "appointments" | "prescriptions" | "pediatrics" | "billing" | "reports";
 929 | 	loadingOverlay: boolean;
 930 | 	toasts: Array<{
 931 | 		id: string;
 932 | 		message: string;
 933 | 		type: "success" | "error" | "info" | "warning";
 934 | 	}>;
 935 | }
 936 | 
 937 | export const uiStore = new Store<UIState>({
 938 | 	sidebarOpen: true,
 939 | 	theme: "system",
 940 | 	notificationsEnabled: true,
 941 | 	currentModule: "dashboard",
 942 | 	loadingOverlay: false,
 943 | 	toasts: []
 944 | });
 945 | 
 946 | export const uiActions = {
 947 | 	toggleSidebar: () => {
 948 | 		uiStore.setState(state => ({
 949 | 			...state,
 950 | 			sidebarOpen: !state.sidebarOpen
 951 | 		}));
 952 | 	},
 953 | 	setTheme: (theme: UIState["theme"]) => {
 954 | 		uiStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, theme }));
 955 | 	},
 956 | 	setCurrentModule: (module: UIState["currentModule"]) => {
 957 | 		uiStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, currentModule: module }));
 958 | 	},
 959 | 	setLoadingOverlay: (loading: boolean) => {
 960 | 		uiStore.setState(state => ({ ...state, loadingOverlay: loading }));
 961 | 	},
 962 | 	addToast: (toast: { message: string; type: UIState["toasts"][number]["type"] }) => {
 963 | 		const id = Date.now().toString();
 964 | 		uiStore.setState(state => ({
 965 | 			...state,
 966 | 			toasts: [...state.toasts, { id, message: toast.message, type: toast.type }]
 967 | 		}));
 968 | 		setTimeout(() => {
 969 | 			uiStore.setState(state => ({
 970 | 				...state,
 971 | 				toasts: state.toasts.filter(t => t.id !== id)
 972 | 			}));
 973 | 		}, 5000);
 974 | 	},
 975 | 	removeToast: (id: string) => {
 976 | 		uiStore.setState(state => ({
 977 | 			...state,
 978 | 			toasts: state.toasts.filter(t => t.id !== id)
 979 | 		}));
 980 | 	}
 981 | };
 982 | 
 983 | // ============================================================================
 984 | // Example derived store (full name pattern)
 985 | // ============================================================================
 986 | 
 987 | export const demoStore = new Store({
 988 | 	firstName: "Jane",
 989 | 	lastName: "Smith"
 990 | });
 991 | 
 992 | export const fullName = new Store(`${demoStore.state.firstName} ${demoStore.state.lastName}`);
 993 | 
 994 | demoStore.subscribe(() => {
 995 | 	fullName.setState(() => `${demoStore.state.firstName} ${demoStore.state.lastName}`);
 996 | });
 997 | 
 998 | // ============================================================================
 999 | // Consolidated Exports
1000 | // ============================================================================
1001 | 
1002 | export const stores = {
1003 | 	auth: authStore,
1004 | 	clinic: clinicStore,
1005 | 	patient: patientStore,
1006 | 	appointment: appointmentStore,
1007 | 	doctor: doctorStore,
1008 | 	staff: staffStore,
1009 | 	notification: notificationStore,
1010 | 	growthRecord: growthRecordStore,
1011 | 	immunization: immunizationStore,
1012 | 	feedingLog: feedingLogStore,
1013 | 	milestones: milestonesStore,
1014 | 	vaccineSchedule: vaccineScheduleStore,
1015 | 	prescription: prescriptionStore,
1016 | 	vitalSigns: vitalSignsStore,
1017 | 	service: serviceStore,
1018 | 	payment: paymentStore,
1019 | 	labTest: labTestStore,
1020 | 	ui: uiStore
1021 | };

1024 | 	auth: authActions,
1025 | 	clinic: clinicActions,
1026 | 	patient: patientActions,
1027 | 	appointment: appointmentActions,
1028 | 	doctor: doctorActions,
1029 | 	staff: staffActions,
1030 | 	notification: notificationActions,
1031 | 	growthRecord: growthRecordActions,
1032 | 	immunization: immunizationActions,
1033 | 	feedingLog: feedingLogActions,
1034 | 	milestones: milestoneActions,
1035 | 	vaccineSchedule: vaccineScheduleActions,
1036 | 	prescription: prescriptionActions,
1037 | 	vitalSigns: vitalSignsActions,
1038 | 	service: serviceActions,
1039 | 	payment: paymentActions,
1040 | 	labTest: labTestActions,
1041 | 	ui: uiActions
1042 | };
1043 | 
1044 | // Auth Selectors
1045 | export const selectAuthUser = (state: AuthState) => state.user;
1046 | export const selectIsAuthenticated = (state: AuthState) => state.isAuthenticated;
1047 | export const selectAuthLoading = (state: AuthState) => state.isLoading;
1048 | 
1049 | // Clinic Selectors
1050 | export const selectCurrentClinic = (state: ClinicState) => state.currentClinic;
1051 | export const selectClinics = (state: ClinicState) => state.clinics;
1052 | export const selectClinicLoading = (state: ClinicState) => state.isLoading;
1053 | 
1054 | // Patient Selectors
1055 | export const selectPatients = (state: PatientState) => state.patients;
1056 | export const selectCurrentPatient = (state: PatientState) => state.currentPatient;
1057 | export const selectPatientFilters = (state: PatientState) => state.filters;
1058 | 
1059 | // Helper: Get patient by ID
1060 | export const getPatientById = (id: string) => {
1061 | 	const state = patientStore.state;
1062 | 	return state.patients.find(p => p.id === id) || state.currentPatient;
1063 | };
1064 | 
1065 | // Growth Record Selectors
1066 | export const selectGrowthRecords = (state: GrowthRecordState) => state.records;
1067 | export const selectGrowthChartData = (state: GrowthRecordState) => state.chartData;
1068 | export const selectGrowthLoading = (state: GrowthRecordState) => state.isLoading;
1069 | 
1070 | // Helper: Get latest growth record
1071 | export const getLatestGrowthRecord = () => {
1072 | 	const records = growthRecordStore.state.records;
1073 | 	if (records.length === 0) return null;
1074 | 	return records.reduce((latest, current) => (new Date(current.date) > new Date(latest.date) ? current : latest));
1075 | };
1076 | 
1077 | // Helper: Get growth records by patient
1078 | export const getGrowthRecordsByPatient = (patientId: string) => {
1079 | 	return growthRecordStore.state.records.filter(r => r.patientId === patientId);
1080 | };
1081 | 
1082 | // Immunization Selectors
1083 | export const selectImmunizations = (state: ImmunizationState) => state.immunizations;
1084 | export const selectUpcomingVaccines = (state: ImmunizationState) => state.upcomingVaccines;
1085 | 
1086 | // Helper: Get immunizations by patient
1087 | export const getImmunizationsByPatient = (patientId: string) => {
1088 | 	return immunizationStore.state.immunizations.filter(i => i.patientId === patientId);
1089 | };
1090 | 
1091 | // Helper: Get overdue immunizations
1092 | export const getOverdueImmunizations = () => {
1093 | 	return immunizationStore.state.immunizations.filter(i => i.isOverDue);
1094 | };
1095 | 
1096 | // Helper: Get completion rate for a patient
1097 | export const getImmunizationCompletionRate = (patientId: string) => {
1098 | 	const patientImmunizations = getImmunizationsByPatient(patientId);
1099 | 	if (patientImmunizations.length === 0) return 0;
1100 | 	const completed = patientImmunizations.filter(i => i.status === "COMPLETED").length;
1101 | 	return (completed / patientImmunizations.length) * 100;
1102 | };
```

`lib/parsers.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { z } from "zod";
   2 | 
   3 | import { dataTableConfig } from "@/config/data-table";
   4 | import type { ExtendedColumnFilter, ExtendedColumnSort } from "@/types/data-table";
   5 | 
   6 | const sortingItemSchema = z.object({
   7 | 	id: z.string(),
   8 | 	desc: z.boolean()
   9 | });
  10 | 
  11 | export function parseSortingState<TData>(
  12 | 	value: string | undefined,
  13 | 	columnIds?: string[] | Set<string>
  14 | ): ExtendedColumnSort<TData>[] {
  15 | 	if (!value) return [];
  16 | 	const validKeys = columnIds ? (columnIds instanceof Set ? columnIds : new Set(columnIds)) : null;
  17 | 
  18 | 	try {
  19 | 		const parsed = JSON.parse(value);
  20 | 		const result = z.array(sortingItemSchema).safeParse(parsed);
  21 | 		if (!result.success) return [];
  22 | 		if (validKeys && result.data.some(item => !validKeys.has(item.id))) return [];
  23 | 		return result.data as ExtendedColumnSort<TData>[];
  24 | 	} catch {
  25 | 		return [];
  26 | 	}
  27 | }
  28 | 
  29 | export function serializeSortingState<TData>(value: ExtendedColumnSort<TData>[]): string {
  30 | 	return JSON.stringify(value);
  31 | }
  32 | 
  33 | const filterItemSchema = z.object({
  34 | 	id: z.string(),
  35 | 	value: z.union([z.string(), z.array(z.string())]),
  36 | 	variant: z.enum(dataTableConfig.filterVariants),
  37 | 	operator: z.enum(dataTableConfig.operators),
  38 | 	filterId: z.string()
  39 | });
  40 | 
  41 | export type FilterItemSchema = z.infer<typeof filterItemSchema>;
  42 | 
  43 | export function parseFiltersState<TData>(
  44 | 	value: string | undefined,
  45 | 	columnIds?: string[] | Set<string>
  46 | ): ExtendedColumnFilter<TData>[] {
  47 | 	if (!value) return [];
  48 | 	const validKeys = columnIds ? (columnIds instanceof Set ? columnIds : new Set(columnIds)) : null;
  49 | 
  50 | 	try {
  51 | 		const parsed = JSON.parse(value);
  52 | 		const result = z.array(filterItemSchema).safeParse(parsed);
  53 | 		if (!result.success) return [];
  54 | 		if (validKeys && result.data.some(item => !validKeys.has(item.id))) return [];
  55 | 		return result.data as unknown as ExtendedColumnFilter<TData>[];
  56 | 	} catch {
  57 | 		return [];
  58 | 	}
  59 | }
  60 | 
  61 | export function serializeFiltersState<TData>(value: ExtendedColumnFilter<TData>[]): string {
  62 | 	return JSON.stringify(value);
  63 | }

```

```ts
   1 | import arcjet, { shield, slidingWindow } from "@arcjet/node";
   2 | 
   3 | export const arcjetRateLimit = arcjet({
   4 | 	key: process.env.ARCJET_KEY!,
   5 | 	rules: [
   6 | 		shield({
   7 | 			mode: "DRY_RUN"
   8 | 		}),
   9 | 		slidingWindow({
  10 | 			mode: "LIVE",
  11 | 			interval: "1m",
  12 | 			max: 60
  13 | 		})
  14 | 	]
  15 | });
  16 | 
  17 | export async function checkRateLimit(request: Parameters<typeof arcjetRateLimit.protect>[0]) {
  18 | 	const decision = await arcjetRateLimit.protect(request);
  19 | 
  20 | 	return {
  21 | 		allowed: decision.isAllowed(),
  22 | 		denied: decision.isDenied(),
  23 | 		decision
  24 | 	};
  25 | }
```

`lib/search.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import Typesense from "typesense";
   2 | import type { CollectionSchema, CollectionUpdateSchema } from "typesense/lib/Typesense/Collection.js";
   3 | import type { CollectionCreateSchema } from "typesense/lib/Typesense/Collections.js";
   4 | import type { SearchResponse } from "typesense/lib/Typesense/Documents.js";
   5 | import type { SearchParams } from "typesense/lib/Typesense/Types.js";
   6 | 
   7 | /**
   8 |  * Typesense client for fast, typo-tolerant search
   9 |  * @see https://typesense.org/docs/
  10 |  */
  11 | export const searchClient = new Typesense.Client({
  12 | 	nodes: [
  13 | 		{
  14 | 			host: process.env.TYPESENSE_HOST ?? "",
  15 | 			port: Number(process.env.TYPESENSE_PORT || 8108),
  16 | 			protocol: process.env.TYPESENSE_PROTOCOL || "http"
  17 | 		}
  18 | 	],
  19 | 	apiKey: process.env.TYPESENSE_API_KEY ?? "",
  20 | 	connectionTimeoutSeconds: 5,
  21 | 	numRetries: 3,
  22 | 	retryIntervalSeconds: 0.1
  23 | });
  24 | 
  25 | /**
  26 |  * Search utilities for common search patterns
  27 |  */
  28 | 
  29 | /**
  30 |  * Search documents in a collection
  31 |  */
  32 | export async function search<T extends Record<string, unknown>>(
  33 | 	collectionName: string,
  34 | 	query: string,
  35 | 	queryBy: string,
  36 | 	options?: Omit<SearchParams<T, string>, "q" | "query_by">
  37 | ): Promise<SearchResponse<T>> {
  38 | 	return searchClient
  39 | 		.collections<T>(collectionName)
  40 | 		.documents()
  41 | 		.search({
  42 | 			q: query,
  43 | 			query_by: queryBy,
  44 | 			...options
  45 | 		});
  46 | }
  47 | 
  48 | /**
  49 |  * Add or update documents in a collection (upsert)
  50 |  */
  51 | export async function addDocuments<T extends Record<string, unknown>>(
  52 | 	collectionName: string,
  53 | 	documents: T[],
  54 | 	options?: { action?: "create" | "update" | "upsert" | "emplace" }
  55 | ): Promise<{ success: number; failed: number }> {
  56 | 	const results = await searchClient
  57 | 		.collections<T>(collectionName)
  58 | 		.documents()
  59 | 		.import(documents, { action: options?.action || "upsert" });
  60 | 
  61 | 	let success = 0;
  62 | 	let failed = 0;
  63 | 
  64 | 	for (const result of results) {
  65 | 		if (result.success) {
  66 | 			success++;
  67 | 		} else {
  68 | 			failed++;
  69 | 		}
  70 | 	}
  71 | 
  72 | 	return { success, failed };
  73 | }
  74 | 
  75 | /**
  76 |  * Update a single document by ID
  77 |  */
  78 | export async function updateDocument<T extends Record<string, unknown>>(
  79 | 	collectionName: string,
  80 | 	documentId: string,
  81 | 	document: Partial<T>
  82 | ): Promise<T> {
  83 | 	return searchClient.collections<T>(collectionName).documents(documentId).update(document) as Promise<T>;
  84 | }
  85 | 
  86 | /**
  87 |  * Delete a document by ID
  88 |  */
  89 | export async function deleteDocument(collectionName: string, documentId: string): Promise<{ id: string }> {
  90 | 	const result = (await searchClient.collections(collectionName).documents(documentId).delete()) as Record<
  91 | 		string,
  92 | 		unknown
  93 | 	>;
  94 | 	return { id: String(result.id) };
  95 | }
  96 | 
  97 | /**
  98 |  * Delete multiple documents by filter
  99 |  */
 100 | export async function deleteDocuments(collectionName: string, filterBy: string): Promise<{ numDeleted: number }> {
 101 | 	const result = await searchClient.collections(collectionName).documents().delete({ filter_by: filterBy });
 102 | 	return { numDeleted: result.num_deleted };
 103 | }
 104 | 
 105 | /**
 106 |  * Delete all documents in a collection
 107 |  */
 108 | export async function deleteAllDocuments(collectionName: string): Promise<{ numDeleted: number }> {
 109 | 	const result = await searchClient.collections(collectionName).documents().delete({ truncate: true });
 110 | 	return { numDeleted: result.num_deleted };
 111 | }
 112 | 
 113 | /**
 114 |  * Get a single document by ID
 115 |  */
 116 | export async function getDocument<T extends Record<string, unknown>>(
 117 | 	collectionName: string,
 118 | 	documentId: string
 119 | ): Promise<T | null> {
 120 | 	try {
 121 | 		return await searchClient.collections<T>(collectionName).documents(documentId).retrieve();
 122 | 	} catch {
 123 | 		return null;
 124 | 	}
 125 | }
 126 | 
 127 | /**
 128 |  * Export all documents from a collection
 129 |  */
 130 | export async function exportDocuments<T extends Record<string, unknown>>(collectionName: string): Promise<T[]> {
 131 | 	const exported = await searchClient.collections<T>(collectionName).documents().export();
 132 | 
 133 | 	return exported
 134 | 		.split("\n")
 135 | 		.filter(Boolean)
 136 | 		.map(line => JSON.parse(line) as T);
 137 | }
 138 | 
 139 | /**
 140 |  * Create a collection if it doesn't exist
 141 |  */
 142 | export async function createCollection(schema: CollectionCreateSchema): Promise<CollectionSchema> {
 143 | 	return searchClient.collections().create(schema);
 144 | }
 145 | 
 146 | /**
 147 |  * Delete a collection
 148 |  */
 149 | export async function deleteCollection(collectionName: string): Promise<CollectionSchema> {
 150 | 	return searchClient.collections(collectionName).delete();
 151 | }
 152 | 
 153 | /**
 154 |  * Get all collections
 155 |  */
 156 | export async function getCollections(): Promise<{ name: string; numDocuments: number }[]> {
 157 | 	const collections = await searchClient.collections().retrieve();
 158 | 	return collections.map(collection => ({
 159 | 		name: collection.name,
 160 | 		numDocuments: collection.num_documents
 161 | 	}));
 162 | }
 163 | 
 164 | /**
 165 |  * Get collection info
 166 |  */
 167 | export async function getCollection(collectionName: string): Promise<CollectionSchema | null> {
 168 | 	try {
 169 | 		return await searchClient.collections(collectionName).retrieve();
 170 | 	} catch {
 171 | 		return null;
 172 | 	}
 173 | }
 174 | 
 175 | /**
 176 |  * Update collection schema (add/drop fields)
 177 |  */
 178 | export async function updateCollectionSchema(
 179 | 	collectionName: string,
 180 | 	updates: CollectionUpdateSchema
 181 | ): Promise<CollectionSchema> {
 182 | 	return searchClient.collections(collectionName).update(updates);
 183 | }
 184 | 
 185 | /**
 186 |  * Create or update a collection alias
 187 |  */
 188 | export async function upsertAlias(
 189 | 	aliasName: string,
 190 | 	collectionName: string
 191 | ): Promise<{ name: string; collection_name: string }> {
 192 | 	return searchClient.aliases().upsert(aliasName, { collection_name: collectionName });
 193 | }
 194 | 
 195 | /**
 196 |  * Delete a collection alias
 197 |  */
 198 | export async function deleteAlias(aliasName: string): Promise<{ name: string }> {
 199 | 	return searchClient.aliases(aliasName).delete();
 200 | }
 201 | 
 202 | /**
 203 |  * Get all aliases
 204 |  */
 205 | export async function getAliases(): Promise<{ name: string; collectionName: string }[]> {
 206 | 	const { aliases } = await searchClient.aliases().retrieve();
 207 | 	return aliases.map(alias => ({
 208 | 		name: alias.name,
 209 | 		collectionName: alias.collection_name
 210 | 	}));
 211 | }
 212 | 
 213 | /**
 214 |  * Multi-search across multiple collections
 215 |  */
 216 | export async function multiSearch<T extends Record<string, unknown>>(
 217 | 	searches: Array<{
 218 | 		collection: string;
 219 | 		q: string;
 220 | 		query_by: string;
 221 | 		filter_by?: string;
 222 | 		sort_by?: string;
 223 | 		per_page?: number;
 224 | 	}>
 225 | ): Promise<{ results: SearchResponse<T>[] }> {
 226 | 	return searchClient.multiSearch.perform({ searches });
 227 | }
 228 | 
 229 | /**
 230 |  * Health check for Typesense
 231 |  */
 232 | export async function healthCheck(): Promise<{ status: "available" | "unavailable" }> {
 233 | 	try {
 234 | 		await searchClient.health.retrieve();
 235 | 		return { status: "available" };
 236 | 	} catch {
 237 | 		return { status: "unavailable" };
 238 | 	}
 239 | }
```

`routeTree.gen.ts`:

```ts
   1 | /* eslint-disable */
   2 | 
   3 | // @ts-nocheck
   4 | 
   5 | // noinspection JSUnusedGlobalSymbols
   6 | 
   7 | // This file was automatically generated by TanStack Router.
   8 | // You should NOT make any changes in this file as it will be overwritten.
   9 | // Additionally, you should also exclude this file from your linter and/or formatter to prevent it from being checked or modified.
  10 | 
  11 | import { Route as rootRouteImport } from './routes/__root'
  12 | import { Route as LoginRouteImport } from './routes/login'
  13 | import { Route as DashboardRouteImport } from './routes/dashboard'
  14 | import { Route as IndexRouteImport } from './routes/index'
  15 | import { Route as ApiRpcSplatRouteImport } from './routes/api/rpc/$'
  16 | import { Route as ApiAuthSplatRouteImport } from './routes/api/auth/$'
  17 | 
  18 | const LoginRoute = LoginRouteImport.update({
  19 |   id: '/login',
  20 |   path: '/login',
  21 |   getParentRoute: () => rootRouteImport,
  22 | } as any)
  23 | const DashboardRoute = DashboardRouteImport.update({
  24 |   id: '/dashboard',
  25 |   path: '/dashboard',
  26 |   getParentRoute: () => rootRouteImport,
  27 | } as any)
  28 | const IndexRoute = IndexRouteImport.update({
  29 |   id: '/',
  30 |   path: '/',
  31 |   getParentRoute: () => rootRouteImport,
  32 | } as any)
  33 | const ApiRpcSplatRoute = ApiRpcSplatRouteImport.update({
  34 |   id: '/api/rpc/$',
  35 |   path: '/api/rpc/$',
  36 |   getParentRoute: () => rootRouteImport,
  37 | } as any)
  38 | const ApiAuthSplatRoute = ApiAuthSplatRouteImport.update({
  39 |   id: '/api/auth/$',
  40 |   path: '/api/auth/$',
  41 |   getParentRoute: () => rootRouteImport,
  42 | } as any)
  43 | 
  44 | export interface FileRoutesByFullPath {
  45 |   '/': typeof IndexRoute
  46 |   '/dashboard': typeof DashboardRoute
  47 |   '/login': typeof LoginRoute
  48 |   '/api/auth/$': typeof ApiAuthSplatRoute
  49 |   '/api/rpc/$': typeof ApiRpcSplatRoute
  50 | }
  51 | export interface FileRoutesByTo {
  52 |   '/': typeof IndexRoute
  53 |   '/dashboard': typeof DashboardRoute
  54 |   '/login': typeof LoginRoute
  55 |   '/api/auth/$': typeof ApiAuthSplatRoute
  56 |   '/api/rpc/$': typeof ApiRpcSplatRoute
  57 | }
  58 | export interface FileRoutesById {
  59 |   __root__: typeof rootRouteImport
  60 |   '/': typeof IndexRoute
  61 |   '/dashboard': typeof DashboardRoute
  62 |   '/login': typeof LoginRoute
  63 |   '/api/auth/$': typeof ApiAuthSplatRoute
  64 |   '/api/rpc/$': typeof ApiRpcSplatRoute
  65 | }
  66 | export interface FileRouteTypes {
  67 |   fileRoutesByFullPath: FileRoutesByFullPath
  68 |   fullPaths: '/' | '/dashboard' | '/login' | '/api/auth/$' | '/api/rpc/$'
  69 |   fileRoutesByTo: FileRoutesByTo
  70 |   to: '/' | '/dashboard' | '/login' | '/api/auth/$' | '/api/rpc/$'
  71 |   id: '__root__' | '/' | '/dashboard' | '/login' | '/api/auth/$' | '/api/rpc/$'
  72 |   fileRoutesById: FileRoutesById
  73 | }
  74 | export interface RootRouteChildren {
  75 |   IndexRoute: typeof IndexRoute
  76 |   DashboardRoute: typeof DashboardRoute
  77 |   LoginRoute: typeof LoginRoute
  78 |   ApiAuthSplatRoute: typeof ApiAuthSplatRoute
  79 |   ApiRpcSplatRoute: typeof ApiRpcSplatRoute
  80 | }
  81 | 
  82 | declare module '@tanstack/react-router' {
  83 |   interface FileRoutesByPath {
  84 |     '/login': {
  85 |       id: '/login'
  86 |       path: '/login'
  87 |       fullPath: '/login'
  88 |       preLoaderRoute: typeof LoginRouteImport
  89 |       parentRoute: typeof rootRouteImport
  90 |     }
  91 |     '/dashboard': {
  92 |       id: '/dashboard'
  93 |       path: '/dashboard'
  94 |       fullPath: '/dashboard'
  95 |       preLoaderRoute: typeof DashboardRouteImport
  96 |       parentRoute: typeof rootRouteImport
  97 |     }
  98 |     '/': {
  99 |       id: '/'
 100 |       path: '/'
 101 |       fullPath: '/'
 102 |       preLoaderRoute: typeof IndexRouteImport
 103 |       parentRoute: typeof rootRouteImport
 104 |     }
 105 |     '/api/rpc/$': {
 106 |       id: '/api/rpc/$'
 107 |       path: '/api/rpc/$'
 108 |       fullPath: '/api/rpc/$'
 109 |       preLoaderRoute: typeof ApiRpcSplatRouteImport
 110 |       parentRoute: typeof rootRouteImport
 111 |     }
 112 |     '/api/auth/$': {
 113 |       id: '/api/auth/$'
 114 |       path: '/api/auth/$'
 115 |       fullPath: '/api/auth/$'
 116 |       preLoaderRoute: typeof ApiAuthSplatRouteImport
 117 |       parentRoute: typeof rootRouteImport
 118 |     }
 119 |   }
 120 | }
 121 | 
 122 | const rootRouteChildren: RootRouteChildren = {
 123 |   IndexRoute: IndexRoute,
 124 |   DashboardRoute: DashboardRoute,
 125 |   LoginRoute: LoginRoute,
 126 |   ApiAuthSplatRoute: ApiAuthSplatRoute,
 127 |   ApiRpcSplatRoute: ApiRpcSplatRoute,
 128 | }
 129 | export const routeTree = rootRouteImport
 130 |   ._addFileChildren(rootRouteChildren)
 131 |   ._addFileTypes<FileRouteTypes>()
 132 | 
 133 | import type { getRouter } from './router.tsx'
 134 | import type { createStart } from '@tanstack/react-start'
 135 | declare module '@tanstack/react-start' {
 136 |   interface Register {
 137 |     ssr: true
 138 |     router: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getRouter>>
 139 |   }
 140 | }
```

`router.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { QueryClientProvider } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   2 | import { createRouter as createTanStackRouter } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   3 | 
   4 | import "./index.css";
   5 | import Loader from "./components/loader";
   6 | import { routeTree } from "./routeTree.gen";
   7 | import { orpc, queryClient } from "./utils/orpc";
   8 | 
   9 | export const getRouter = () => {
  10 | 	const router = createTanStackRouter({
  11 | 		routeTree,
  12 | 		scrollRestoration: true,
  13 | 		defaultPreloadStaleTime: 0,
  14 | 		context: { orpc, queryClient },
  15 | 		defaultPendingComponent: () => <Loader />,
  16 | 		defaultNotFoundComponent: () => <div>Not Found</div>,
  17 | 		Wrap: ({ children }) => <QueryClientProvider client={queryClient}>{children}</QueryClientProvider>
  18 | 	});
  19 | 	return router;
  20 | };
  21 | 
  22 | declare module "@tanstack/react-router" {
  23 | 	interface Register {
  24 | 		router: ReturnType<typeof getRouter>;
  25 | 	}
  26 | }
```

```tsx
   1 | import { Toaster } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/sonner";
   2 | import { TooltipProvider } from "@clinic/ui/components/ui/tooltip";
   3 | import { HotkeysProvider } from "@tanstack/react-hotkeys";
   4 | import type { QueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   5 | import { ReactQueryDevtools } from "@tanstack/react-query-devtools";
   6 | import { createRootRouteWithContext, HeadContent, Outlet, Scripts } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   7 | import { TanStackRouterDevtools } from "@tanstack/react-router-devtools";
   8 | import { ThemeProvider } from "next-themes";
   9 | import { lazy, Suspense } from "react";
  10 | 
  11 | import Header from "@/components/header";
  12 | import { ActiveThemeProvider } from "@/components/themes/active-theme";
  13 | import appCss from "@/index.css?url";
  14 | import type { orpc } from "@/utils/orpc";
  15 | 
  16 | const SearchDropdownComponent = lazy(() => import("@/components/search-dropdown"));
  17 | 
  18 | export const links = [
  19 | 	{ to: "/", label: "Home", icon: "🏠" },
  20 | 	{ to: "/dashboard", label: "Dashboard", icon: "📊" },
  21 | 	{ to: "/patients", label: "Patients", icon: "👶" },
  22 | 	{ to: "/appointments", label: "Appointments", icon: "📅" },
  23 | 	{ to: "/prescriptions", label: "Prescriptions", icon: "💊" }
  24 | ] as const;
  25 | 
  26 | export interface RouterAppContext {
  27 | 	orpc: typeof orpc;
  28 | 	queryClient: QueryClient;
  29 | }
  30 | 
  31 | const META_THEME_COLORS = {
  32 | 	light: "#ffffff",
  33 | 	dark: "#09090b"
  34 | };
  35 | 
  36 | const activeTheme = "system";
  37 | 
  38 | export const Route = createRootRouteWithContext<RouterAppContext>()({
  39 | 	head: () => ({
  40 | 		meta: [
  41 | 			{
  42 | 				charSet: "utf-8"
  43 | 			},
  44 | 			{
  45 | 				name: "viewport",
  46 | 				content: "width=device-width, initial-scale=1"
  47 | 			},
  48 | 			{
  49 | 				name: "theme-color",
  50 | 				content: META_THEME_COLORS.light
  51 | 			},
  52 | 			{
  53 | 				title: "Smart Clinic - Pediatric Management System"
  54 | 			}
  55 | 		],
  56 | 		links: [
  57 | 			{
  58 | 				rel: "stylesheet",
  59 | 				href: appCss
  60 | 			},
  61 | 			{
  62 | 				rel: "icon",
  63 | 				type: "image/x-icon",
  64 | 				href: "/favicon.ico"
  65 | 			}
  66 | 		]
  67 | 	}),
  68 | 	component: RootLayout
  69 | });
  70 | 
  71 | function RootLayout() {
  72 | 	return (
  73 | 		<ThemeProvider
  74 | 			attribute='class'
  75 | 			defaultTheme='system'
  76 | 			disableTransitionOnChange
  77 | 			enableColorScheme
  78 | 			enableSystem
  79 | 		>
  80 | 			<ActiveThemeProvider initialTheme={activeTheme}>
  81 | 				<HotkeysProvider>
  82 | 					<RootLayoutContent />
  83 | 				</HotkeysProvider>
  84 | 			</ActiveThemeProvider>
  85 | 		</ThemeProvider>
  86 | 	);
  87 | }
  88 | 
  89 | function RootLayoutContent() {
  90 | 	return (
  91 | 		<html
  92 | 			lang='en'
  93 | 			suppressHydrationWarning
  94 | 		>
  95 | 			<head>
  96 | 				<HeadContent />
  97 | 				<script>
  98 | 					{`
  99 | 						try {
 100 | 							const theme = localStorage.getItem('theme');
 101 | 							const isDark = theme === 'dark' || (!theme && window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches);
 102 | 							if (isDark) {
 103 | 								document.querySelector('meta[name="theme-color"]')?.setAttribute('content', '${META_THEME_COLORS.dark}');
 104 | 							} else {
 105 | 								document.querySelector('meta[name="theme-color"]')?.setAttribute('content', '${META_THEME_COLORS.light}');
 106 | 							}
 107 | 						} catch (_) {}
 108 | 					`}
 109 | 				</script>
 110 | 			</head>
 111 | 			<body className='wrap-anywhere font-sans antialiased selection:bg-[rgba(79,184,178,0.24)]'>
 112 | 				<div className='grid h-svh grid-rows-[auto_1fr]'>
 113 | 					<Header />
 114 | 					<TooltipProvider>
 115 | 						<main className='overflow-auto'>
 116 | 							<Suspense
 117 | 								fallback={<div className='flex h-full items-center justify-center'>Loading...</div>}
 118 | 							>
 119 | 								<SearchDropdownComponent />
 120 | 							</Suspense>
 121 | 							<Outlet />
 122 | 						</main>
 123 | 					</TooltipProvider>

 127 | 					richColors

 132 | 				/>
 133 | 				<TanStackRouterDevtools position='bottom-right' />

 135 | 			</body>
 136 | 		</html>
 137 | 	);
```
