`routes/api/rpc/$.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { createContext } from "@clinic/api/context";
   2 | import { appRouter } from "@clinic/api/routers/index";
   3 | import { OpenAPIHandler } from "@orpc/openapi/fetch";
   4 | import { OpenAPIReferencePlugin } from "@orpc/openapi/plugins";
   5 | import { onError } from "@orpc/server";
   6 | import { RPCHandler } from "@orpc/server/fetch";
   7 | import { ZodToJsonSchemaConverter } from "@orpc/zod/zod4";
   8 | import { createFileRoute } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   9 | 
  10 | const rpcHandler = new RPCHandler(appRouter, {
  11 | 	interceptors: [
  12 | 		onError(error => {
  13 | 			console.error(error);
  14 | 		})
  15 | 	]
  16 | });
  17 | 
  18 | const apiHandler = new OpenAPIHandler(appRouter, {
  19 | 	plugins: [
  20 | 		new OpenAPIReferencePlugin({
  21 | 			schemaConverters: [new ZodToJsonSchemaConverter()]
  22 | 		})
  23 | 	],
  24 | 	interceptors: [
  25 | 		onError(error => {
  26 | 			console.error(error);
  27 | 		})
  28 | 	]
  29 | });
  30 | 
  31 | async function handle({ request }: { request: Request }) {
  32 | 	const rpcResult = await rpcHandler.handle(request, {
  33 | 		prefix: "/api/rpc",
  34 | 		context: await createContext({ req: request })
  35 | 	});
  36 | 	if (rpcResult.response) return rpcResult.response;
  37 | 
  38 | 	const apiResult = await apiHandler.handle(request, {
  39 | 		prefix: "/api/rpc/api-reference",
  40 | 		context: await createContext({ req: request })
  41 | 	});
  42 | 	if (apiResult.response) return apiResult.response;
  43 | 
  44 | 	return new Response("Not found", { status: 404 });
  45 | }
  46 | 
  47 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/api/rpc/$")({
  48 | 	server: {
  49 | 		handlers: {
  50 | 			HEAD: handle,
  51 | 			GET: handle,
  52 | 			POST: handle,
  53 | 			PUT: handle,
  54 | 			PATCH: handle,
  55 | 			DELETE: handle
  56 | 		}
  57 | 	}
  58 | });

```

`routes/dashboard.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { useQuery } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   2 | import { createFileRoute, redirect } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   3 | 
   4 | import { getUser } from "@/functions/get-user";
   5 | import { orpc } from "@/utils/orpc";
   6 | 
   7 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/dashboard")({
   8 | 	component: RouteComponent,
   9 | 	beforeLoad: async () => {
  10 | 		const session = await getUser();
  11 | 		return { session };
  12 | 	},
  13 | 	loader: async ({ context }) => {
  14 | 		if (!context.session) {
  15 | 			throw redirect({
  16 | 				to: "/login"
  17 | 			});
  18 | 		}
  19 | 	}
  20 | });
  21 | 
  22 | function RouteComponent() {
  23 | 	const { session } = Route.useRouteContext();
  24 | 
  25 | 	const privateData = useQuery(orpc.privateData.queryOptions());
  26 | 
  27 | 	return (
  28 | 		<div>
  29 | 			<h1>Dashboard</h1>
  30 | 			<p>Welcome {session?.user.name}</p>
  31 | 			<p>API: {privateData.data?.message}</p>
  32 | 		</div>
  33 | 	);
  34 | }

```

`routes/index.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | // apps/web/src/routes/index.tsx
   2 | import { createFileRoute, redirect } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   3 | 
   4 | import { getUser } from "../functions/get-user";
   5 | 
   6 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/dashboard")({
   7 | 	beforeLoad: async () => {
   8 | 		const session = await getUser();
   9 | 		return { session };
  10 | 	},
  11 | 	loader: async ({ context }) => {
  12 | 		const { session } = context;
  13 | 		if (!session) {
  14 | 			throw redirect({
  15 | 				to: "/login"
  16 | 			});
  17 | 		}
  18 | 		throw redirect({ to: "/dashboard" });
  19 | 	}
  20 | });

```

`routes/login.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | import { createFileRoute } from "@tanstack/react-router";
   2 | import { useState } from "react";
   3 | 
   4 | import SignInForm from "@/components/sign-in-form";
   5 | import SignUpForm from "@/components/sign-up-form";
   6 | 
   7 | export const Route = createFileRoute("/login")({
   8 | 	component: RouteComponent
   9 | });
  10 | 
  11 | function RouteComponent() {
  12 | 	const [showSignIn, setShowSignIn] = useState(false);
  13 | 
  14 | 	return showSignIn ? (
  15 | 		<SignInForm onSwitchToSignUp={() => setShowSignIn(false)} />
  16 | 	) : (
  17 | 		<SignUpForm onSwitchToSignIn={() => setShowSignIn(true)} />
  18 | 	);
  19 | }

```

`types/config.d.ts`:

```ts
   1 | /* eslint-disable */
   2 | /** biome-ignore-all lint/suspicious/noExplicitAny: <ok> */
   3 | // Generated for local development with Bun and LibSQL
   4 | // Supports both Cloudflare Workers and local development environments
   5 | 
   6 | export interface GlobalProps {
   7 | 	mainModule: typeof import("../../data/server");
   8 | }
   9 | 
  10 | export interface Env {
  11 | 	CACHE: KVNamespace;
  12 | 	BUCKET: R2Bucket;
  13 | 	// Use local LibSQL for development, D1 for production
  14 | 	tanstack_fast_db: D1Database | LocalLibSQLDatabase;
  15 | 	CART_READ_LIMITER: RateLimit;
  16 | 	CART_WRITE_LIMITER: RateLimit;
  17 | 	API_LIMITER: RateLimit;
  18 | 	AUTH_SECRET: string;
  19 | 	// Local development flags
  20 | 	ENVIRONMENT?: "development" | "production";
  21 | 	DATABASE_URL?: string;
  22 | }
  23 | 
  24 | // Local LibSQL Database interface for development
  25 | interface LocalLibSQLDatabase {
  26 | 	prepare(query: string): LocalLibSQLPreparedStatement;
  27 | 	batch<T = unknown>(statements: LocalLibSQLPreparedStatement[]): Promise<D1Result<T>[]>;
  28 | 	exec(query: string): Promise<D1ExecResult>;
  29 | }
  30 | 
  31 | interface LocalLibSQLPreparedStatement {
  32 | 	bind(...values: unknown[]): this;
  33 | 	first<T = unknown>(colName?: string): Promise<T | null>;
  34 | 	run<T = Record<string, unknown>>(): Promise<D1Result<T>>;
  35 | 	all<T = Record<string, unknown>>(): Promise<D1Result<T>>;
  36 | 	raw<T = unknown[]>(options?: { columnNames?: boolean }): Promise<T[] | [string[], ...T[]]>;
  37 | }
  38 | 
  39 | // D1 interfaces for production
  40 | interface D1Meta {
  41 | 	duration: number;
  42 | 	size_after: number;
  43 | 	rows_read: number;
  44 | 	rows_written: number;
  45 | 	last_row_id: number;
  46 | 	changed_db: boolean;
  47 | 	changes: number;
  48 | 	served_by_region?: string;
  49 | 	served_by_primary?: boolean;
  50 | 	timings?: {
  51 | 		sql_duration_ms: number;
  52 | 	};
  53 | 	total_attempts?: number;
  54 | }
  55 | 
  56 | interface D1Response {
  57 | 	success: true;
  58 | 	meta: D1Meta & Record<string, unknown>;
  59 | 	error?: never;
  60 | }
  61 | 
  62 | type D1Result<T = unknown> = D1Response & {
  63 | 	results: T[];
  64 | };
  65 | 
  66 | interface D1ExecResult {
  67 | 	count: number;
  68 | 	duration: number;
  69 | }
  70 | 
  71 | interface D1Database {
  72 | 	prepare(query: string): D1PreparedStatement;
  73 | 	batch<T = unknown>(statements: D1PreparedStatement[]): Promise<D1Result<T>[]>;
  74 | 	exec(query: string): Promise<D1ExecResult>;
  75 | 	withSession(constraintOrBookmark?: string): D1DatabaseSession;
  76 | }
  77 | 
  78 | interface D1DatabaseSession {
  79 | 	prepare(query: string): D1PreparedStatement;
  80 | 	batch<T = unknown>(statements: D1PreparedStatement[]): Promise<D1Result<T>[]>;
  81 | 	getBookmark(): string | null;
  82 | }
  83 | 
  84 | interface D1PreparedStatement {
  85 | 	bind(...values: unknown[]): this;
  86 | 	first<T = unknown>(colName?: string): Promise<T | null>;
  87 | 	run<T = Record<string, unknown>>(): Promise<D1Result<T>>;
  88 | 	all<T = Record<string, unknown>>(): Promise<D1Result<T>>;
  89 | 	raw<T = unknown[]>(options?: { columnNames?: boolean }): Promise<T[] | [string[], ...T[]]>;
  90 | }
  91 | 
  92 | // KV namespace interface
  93 | interface KVNamespace<Key extends string = string> {
  94 | 	get(key: Key, options?: Partial<KVNamespaceGetOptions<undefined>>): Promise<string | null>;
  95 | 	get(key: Key, type: "text"): Promise<string | null>;
  96 | 	get<ExpectedValue = unknown>(key: Key, type: "json"): Promise<ExpectedValue | null>;
  97 | 	get(key: Key, type: "arrayBuffer"): Promise<ArrayBuffer | null>;
  98 | 	get(key: Key, type: "stream"): Promise<ReadableStream | null>;
  99 | 	put(
 100 | 		key: Key,
 101 | 		value: string | ArrayBuffer | ArrayBufferView | ReadableStream,
 102 | 		options?: KVNamespacePutOptions
 103 | 	): Promise<void>;
 104 | 	delete(key: Key): Promise<void>;
 105 | 	list<Metadata = unknown>(options?: KVNamespaceListOptions): Promise<KVNamespaceListResult<Metadata, Key>>;
 106 | 	getWithMetadata<Metadata = unknown>(
 107 | 		key: Key,
 108 | 		options?: Partial<KVNamespaceGetOptions<undefined>>
 109 | 	): Promise<KVNamespaceGetWithMetadataResult<string, Metadata>>;
 110 | }
 111 | 
 112 | interface KVNamespaceGetOptions<Type> {
 113 | 	type: Type;
 114 | 	cacheTtl?: number;
 115 | }
 116 | 
 117 | interface KVNamespacePutOptions {
 118 | 	expiration?: number;
 119 | 	expirationTtl?: number;
 120 | 	metadata?: any | null;
 121 | }
 122 | 
 123 | interface KVNamespaceListOptions {
 124 | 	limit?: number;
 125 | 	prefix?: string | null;
 126 | 	cursor?: string | null;
 127 | }
 128 | 
 129 | interface KVNamespaceListKey<Metadata, Key extends string = string> {
 130 | 	name: Key;
 131 | 	expiration?: number;
 132 | 	metadata?: Metadata;
 133 | }
 134 | 
 135 | type KVNamespaceListResult<Metadata, Key extends string = string> =
 136 | 	| {
 137 | 			list_complete: false;
 138 | 			keys: KVNamespaceListKey<Metadata, Key>[];
 139 | 			cursor: string;
 140 | 			cacheStatus: string | null;
 141 | 	  }
 142 | 	| {
 143 | 			list_complete: true;
 144 | 			keys: KVNamespaceListKey<Metadata, Key>[];
 145 | 			cacheStatus: string | null;
 146 | 	  };
 147 | 
 148 | interface KVNamespaceGetWithMetadataResult<Value, Metadata> {
 149 | 	value: Value | null;
 150 | 	metadata: Metadata | null;
 151 | 	cacheStatus: string | null;
 152 | }
 153 | 
 154 | // R2 bucket interface
 155 | interface R2Bucket {
 156 | 	head(key: string): Promise<R2Object | null>;
 157 | 	get(key: string, options?: R2GetOptions): Promise<R2ObjectBody | null>;
 158 | 	put(
 159 | 		key: string,
 160 | 		value: ReadableStream | ArrayBuffer | ArrayBufferView | string | null | Blob,
 161 | 		options?: R2PutOptions
 162 | 	): Promise<R2Object>;
 163 | 	delete(keys: string | string[]): Promise<void>;
 164 | 	list(options?: R2ListOptions): Promise<R2Objects>;
 165 | }
 166 | 
 167 | interface R2Object {
 168 | 	readonly key: string;
 169 | 	readonly version: string;
 170 | 	readonly size: number;
 171 | 	readonly etag: string;
 172 | 	readonly httpEtag: string;
 173 | 	readonly uploaded: Date;
 174 | 	readonly httpMetadata?: R2HTTPMetadata;
 175 | 	readonly customMetadata?: Record<string, string>;
 176 | 	readonly range?: R2Range;
 177 | 	readonly storageClass: string;
 178 | 	writeHttpMetadata(headers: Headers): void;
 179 | }
 180 | 
 181 | interface R2ObjectBody extends R2Object {
 182 | 	readonly body: ReadableStream;
 183 | 	readonly bodyUsed: boolean;
 184 | 	arrayBuffer(): Promise<ArrayBuffer>;
 185 | 	bytes(): Promise<Uint8Array>;
 186 | 	text(): Promise<string>;
 187 | 	json<T>(): Promise<T>;
 188 | 	blob(): Promise<Blob>;
 189 | }
 190 | 
 191 | interface R2GetOptions {
 192 | 	onlyIf?: R2Conditional | Headers;
 193 | 	range?: R2Range | Headers;
 194 | 	ssecKey?: ArrayBuffer | string;
 195 | }
 196 | 
 197 | interface R2PutOptions {
 198 | 	onlyIf?: R2Conditional | Headers;
 199 | 	httpMetadata?: R2HTTPMetadata | Headers;
 200 | 	customMetadata?: Record<string, string>;
 201 | 	md5?: ArrayBuffer | ArrayBufferView | string;
 202 | 	storageClass?: string;
 203 | 	ssecKey?: ArrayBuffer | string;
 204 | }
 205 | 
 206 | interface R2Conditional {
 207 | 	etagMatches?: string;
 208 | 	etagDoesNotMatch?: string;
 209 | 	uploadedBefore?: Date;
 210 | 	uploadedAfter?: Date;
 211 | }
 212 | 
 213 | type R2Range =
 214 | 	| {
 215 | 			offset: number;
 216 | 			length?: number;
 217 | 	  }
 218 | 	| {
 219 | 			offset?: number;
 220 | 			length: number;
 221 | 	  }
 222 | 	| {
 223 | 			suffix: number;
 224 | 	  };
 225 | 
 226 | interface R2HTTPMetadata {
 227 | 	contentType?: string;
 228 | 	contentLanguage?: string;
 229 | 	contentDisposition?: string;
 230 | 	contentEncoding?: string;
 231 | 	cacheControl?: string;
 232 | 	cacheExpiry?: Date;
 233 | }
 234 | 
 235 | interface R2ListOptions {
 236 | 	limit?: number;
 237 | 	prefix?: string;
 238 | 	cursor?: string;
 239 | 	delimiter?: string;
 240 | 	startAfter?: string;
 241 | 	include?: ("httpMetadata" | "customMetadata")[];
 242 | }
 243 | 
 244 | type R2Objects = {
 245 | 	objects: R2Object[];
 246 | 	delimitedPrefixes: string[];
 247 | } & (
 248 | 	| {
 249 | 			truncated: true;
 250 | 			cursor: string;
 251 | 	  }
 252 | 	| {
 253 | 			truncated: false;
 254 | 	  }
 255 | );
 256 | 
 257 | // Rate limit interface
 258 | interface RateLimitOptions {
 259 | 	key: string;
 260 | }
 261 | 
 262 | interface RateLimitOutcome {
 263 | 	success: boolean;
 264 | }
 265 | 
 266 | interface RateLimit {
 267 | 	limit(options: RateLimitOptions): Promise<RateLimitOutcome>;
 268 | }
 269 | 
 270 | // Base Worker types
 271 | interface ExecutionContext<Props = unknown> {
 272 | 	waitUntil(promise: Promise<any>): void;
 273 | 	passThroughOnException(): void;
 274 | 	readonly props: Props;
 275 | }
 276 | 
 277 | export interface ExportedHandler<Env = unknown> {
 278 | 	fetch?: (request: Request, env: Env, ctx: ExecutionContext) => Response | Promise<Response>;
 279 | 	scheduled?: (controller: ScheduledController, env: Env, ctx: ExecutionContext) => void | Promise<void>;
 280 | 	queue?: (batch: MessageBatch<unknown>, env: Env, ctx: ExecutionContext) => void | Promise<void>;
 281 | }
 282 | 
 283 | interface ScheduledController {
 284 | 	readonly scheduledTime: number;
 285 | 	readonly cron: string;
 286 | 	noRetry(): void;
 287 | }
 288 | 
 289 | interface MessageBatch<Body = unknown> {
 290 | 	readonly messages: readonly Message<Body>[];
 291 | 	readonly queue: string;
 292 | 	retryAll(options?: QueueRetryOptions): void;
 293 | 	ackAll(): void;
 294 | }
 295 | 
 296 | interface Message<Body = unknown> {
 297 | 	readonly id: string;
 298 | 	readonly timestamp: Date;
 299 | 	readonly body: Body;
 300 | 	readonly attempts: number;
 301 | 	retry(options?: QueueRetryOptions): void;
 302 | 	ack(): void;
 303 | }
 304 | 
 305 | interface QueueRetryOptions {
 306 | 	delaySeconds?: number;
 307 | }
 308 | 
 309 | // Request and Response types
 310 | type BodyInit = ReadableStream<Uint8Array> | string | ArrayBuffer | ArrayBufferView | Blob | URLSearchParams | FormData;
 311 | 
 312 | interface Response {
 313 | 	status: number;
 314 | 	statusText: string;
 315 | 	headers: Headers;
 316 | 	ok: boolean;
 317 | 	redirected: boolean;
 318 | 	url: string;
 319 | 	clone(): Response;
 320 | 	arrayBuffer(): Promise<ArrayBuffer>;
 321 | 	text(): Promise<string>;
 322 | 	json<T>(): Promise<T>;
 323 | 	blob(): Promise<Blob>;
 324 | 	body: ReadableStream | null;
 325 | 	bodyUsed: boolean;
 326 | }
 327 | 
 328 | declare let Response: {
 329 | 	prototype: Response;
 330 | 	new (body?: BodyInit | null, init?: ResponseInit): Response;
 331 | 	error(): Response;
 332 | 	redirect(url: string, status?: number): Response;
 333 | 	json(any: any, init?: ResponseInit): Response;
 334 | };
 335 |

 340 | }
 341 | 
 342 | type HeadersInit = Headers | Iterable<Iterable<string>> | Record<string, string>;
 343 |

 347 | 	set(name: string, value: string): void;
 348 | 	append(name: string, value: string): void;
 349 | 	delete(name: string): void;

 351 | }
 352 |

 356 | };

 518 | // ReadableStream types
 519 | interface ReadableStream<R = any> {
 520 | 	getReader(): ReadableStreamDefaultReader<R>;
 521 | 	cancel(reason?: any): Promise<void>;
 522 | 	pipeTo(destination: WritableStream<R>): Promise<void>;
 523 | 	tee(): [ReadableStream<R>, ReadableStream<R>];
 524 | 	locked: boolean;
 525 | }
 526 | 
 527 | interface ReadableStreamDefaultReader<R = any> {
 528 | 	read(): Promise<ReadableStreamReadResult<R>>;
 529 | 	releaseLock(): void;
 530 | 	closed: Promise<void>;
 531 | 	cancel(reason?: any): Promise<void>;
 532 | }
 533 | 
 534 | type ReadableStreamReadResult<R> =
 535 | 	| {
 536 | 			done: false;
 537 | 			value: R;
 538 | 	  }
 539 | 	| {
 540 | 			done: true;
 541 | 			value?: undefined;
 542 | 	  };
 543 | 
 544 | declare let ReadableStream: {
 545 | 	prototype: ReadableStream;
 546 | 	new <R = any>(underlyingSource?: object, strategy?: object): ReadableStream<R>;
 547 | };
 548 |

 550 | 	getWriter(): WritableStreamDefaultWriter<W>;
 551 | 	close(): Promise<void>;
 552 | 	abort(reason?: any): Promise<void>;
 553 | 	locked: boolean;
 554 | }
 555 | 
 556 | interface WritableStreamDefaultWriter<W = any> {
 557 | 	write(chunk?: W): Promise<void>;
 558 | 	close(): Promise<void>;
 559 | 	abort(reason?: any): Promise<void>;
 560 | 	ready: Promise<void>;
 561 | 	closed: Promise<void>;
 562 | 	releaseLock(): void;
 563 | 	desiredSize: number | null;
 564 | }
 565 | 
 566 | declare let WritableStream: {
 567 | 	prototype: WritableStream;
 568 | 	new <W = any>(underlyingSink?: object, strategy?: object): WritableStream<W>;
 569 | };
```

`types/globals.d.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { auth } from "@/lib/auth"; // Your Better-Auth instance
   2 | import { Roles } from "@/types/globals";
   3 | 
   4 | export const checkRole = async (_role: Roles): Promise<boolean> => {
   5 | 	const session = await auth.api.getSession();
   6 | 
   7 | 	// Assuming Better-Auth stores user metadata in session.user.publicMetadata
   8 | 	const userRole = session?.user?.publicMetadata?.role?.toLowerCase();
   9 | 
  10 | 	return userRole === role.toLowerCase();
  11 | };
  12 | 
  13 | export const getRole = async (): Promise<string> => {
  14 | 	const session = await getSession();
  15 | 
  16 | 	// Default to "patient" if role is missing
  17 | 	const role = session?.user?.publicMetadata?.role?.toLowerCase() || "patient";
  18 | 
  19 | 	return role;
  20 | };
  21 | export { Roles };

```

`types/helper.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import type { AppointmentStatus } from "@clinic/db";
   2 | import { endOfMonth, format, getMonth, startOfYear } from "date-fns";
   3 | 
   4 | // --- Utility types and functions from your original file ---
   5 | // export type AppointmentStatus = 'CANCELLED' | 'COMPLETED' | 'PENDING' | 'SCHEDULED'
   6 | 
   7 | interface Appointment {
   8 | 	appointmentDate: Date; // Renamed from appointment_date to match Drizzle schema
   9 | 	status: AppointmentStatus;
  10 | }
  11 | 
  12 | function isValidStatus(status: string): status is AppointmentStatus {
  13 | 	return ["CANCELLED", "NO_SHOW", "CONFIRMED", "COMPLETED", "PENDING"].includes(status);
  14 | }
  15 | 
  16 | const initializeMonthlyData = () => {
  17 | 	const this_year = new Date().getFullYear();
  18 | 
  19 | 	const months = Array.from({ length: getMonth(new Date()) + 1 }, (_, index) => ({
  20 | 		appointment: 0,
  21 | 		completed: 0,
  22 | 		name: format(new Date(this_year, index), "MMM")
  23 | 	}));
  24 | 	return months;
  25 | };
  26 | 
  27 | // Exported for use in other routers (e.g., doctor.router.ts and admin.router.ts)
  28 | export const processAppointments = async (appointments: Appointment[]) => {
  29 | 	const monthlyData = initializeMonthlyData();
  30 | 
  31 | 	const appointmentCounts = appointments.reduce<Record<AppointmentStatus, number>>(
  32 | 		(acc, appointment) => {
  33 | 			const status = appointment.status;
  34 | 			const appointmentDate = appointment?.appointmentDate; // Renamed
  35 | 
  36 | 			const monthIndex = getMonth(appointmentDate);
  37 | 
  38 | 			if (
  39 | 				appointmentDate >= startOfYear(new Date()) &&
  40 | 				appointmentDate <= endOfMonth(new Date()) &&
  41 | 				monthlyData[monthIndex] // check that this exists
  42 | 			) {
  43 | 				monthlyData[monthIndex].appointment += 1;
  44 | 
  45 | 				if (status === "COMPLETED") {
  46 | 					monthlyData[monthIndex].completed += 1;
  47 | 				}
  48 | 			}
  49 | 
  50 | 			if (isValidStatus(status)) {
  51 | 				acc[status] = (acc[status] || 0) + 1;
  52 | 			}
  53 | 
  54 | 			return acc;
  55 | 		},
  56 | 		{
  57 | 			CANCELLED: 0,
  58 | 			COMPLETED: 0,
  59 | 			PENDING: 0,
  60 | 			NO_SHOW: 0,
  61 | 			CONFIRMED: 0
  62 | 		}
  63 | 	);
  64 | 
  65 | 	return { appointmentCounts, monthlyData };
  66 | };
  67 | 
  68 | export interface AllAppointmentsProps {
  69 | 	page: number | string;
  70 | 	limit?: number | string;
  71 | 	search?: string;
  72 | 	id?: string;
  73 | }

```

```ts
 122 | export type SnakeToCamelCase<S extends string> = S extends `${infer Head}_${infer Tail}`
 123 | 	? `${Lowercase<Head>}${Capitalize<SnakeToCamelCase<Tail>>}`
 124 | 	: Lowercase<S>;
 125 | 
 126 | export type CamelCaseKeys<T> =
 127 | 	T extends Array<infer U>
 128 | 		? CamelCaseKeys<U>[]
 129 | 		: T extends object
 130 | 			? {
 131 | 					[K in keyof T as SnakeToCamelCase<K & string>]: CamelCaseKeys<T[K]>;
 132 | 				}
 133 | 			: T;
 134 |

 136 | 	filters: string;
 137 | 	joinOperator: string;
 138 | 	page: string;
 139 | 	perPage: string;

 141 | };

 146 | 	label: string;
 147 | 	value: string;
 148 | };
 149 | 
 150 | export type FilterOperator = DataTableConfig["operators"][number];
 151 | export type FilterVariant = DataTableConfig["filterVariants"][number];
 152 | export type JoinOperator = DataTableConfig["joinOperators"][number];
 153 | 
 154 | export type ExtendedColumnSort<TData> = {
 155 | 	id: Extract<keyof TData, string>;
 156 | } & Omit<ColumnSort, "id">;
 157 | 
 158 | export type ExtendedColumnFilter<TData> = {
 159 | 	id: Extract<keyof TData, string>;
 160 | } & FilterItemSchema;
 161 |

 165 | };
```

`utils/orpc.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { createContext } from "@clinic/api/context";
   2 | import { appRouter } from "@clinic/api/routers/index";
   3 | import { createORPCClient } from "@orpc/client";
   4 | import { RPCLink } from "@orpc/client/fetch";
   5 | import type { RouterClient } from "@orpc/server";
   6 | import { createRouterClient } from "@orpc/server";
   7 | import { createTanstackQueryUtils } from "@orpc/tanstack-query";
   8 | import { QueryCache, QueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
   9 | import { createIsomorphicFn } from "@tanstack/react-start";
  10 | import { getRequest } from "@tanstack/react-start/server";
  11 | import { toast } from "sonner";
  12 | 
  13 | export const queryClient = new QueryClient({
  14 | 	queryCache: new QueryCache({
  15 | 		onError: (error, query) => {
  16 | 			toast.error(`Error: ${error.message}`, {
  17 | 				action: {
  18 | 					label: "retry",
  19 | 					onClick: query.invalidate
  20 | 				}
  21 | 			});
  22 | 		}
  23 | 	})
  24 | });
  25 | 
  26 | const getORPCClient = createIsomorphicFn()
  27 | 	.server(() =>
  28 | 		createRouterClient(appRouter, {
  29 | 			context: async () => {
  30 | 				return createContext({ req: getRequest() });
  31 | 			}
  32 | 		})
  33 | 	)
  34 | 	.client((): RouterClient<typeof appRouter> => {
  35 | 		const link = new RPCLink({
  36 | 			url: `${window.location.origin}/api/rpc`,
  37 | 			fetch(url, options) {
  38 | 				return fetch(url, {
  39 | 					...options,
  40 | 					credentials: "include"
  41 | 				});
  42 | 			}
  43 | 		});
  44 | 
  45 | 		return createORPCClient(link);
  46 | 	});
  47 | 
  48 | export const client: RouterClient<typeof appRouter> = getORPCClient();
  49 | 
  50 | export const orpc = createTanstackQueryUtils(client);

```
